Name: S.E. Palmeiras
Description:
A Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras é um clube poliesportivo brasileiro sediado em São Paulo que tem como modalidade esportiva principal o futebol, e é um dos times mais vencedores e de maior torcida do país. As cores do clube, presentes no escudo e bandeira oficial são o verde e branco. O vermelho, presente desde sua fundação, em 1914, foi excluído durante a Segunda Guerra Mundial, por pressão do governo nacional, na mesma reunião que formalizou a mudança de nome de Palestra para Palmeiras. 

O Verdão é o time com mais títulos nacionais conquistados, sendo o único a vencer todas as competições oficiais que disputou criadas no País, inicialmente pela Confederação Brasileira de Desportos (CBD) e, a partir da década de 1970, pela Confederação Brasileira de Futebol (CBF): o alviverde possui 16 conquistas deste porte, com destaque maior para seus 12 títulos do Campeonato Brasileiro (1960, 1967, 1967, 1969, 1972, 1973, 1993, 1994, 2016, 2018, 2022 e 2023). Além destes campeonatos, o Palmeiras já venceu quatro vezes a Copa do Brasil (em 1998, 2012, 2015 e 2020), uma vez a Copa dos Campeões (em 2000), e uma vez a Supercopa do Brasil (2023), competições essas também organizadas pela entidade máxima do futebol brasileiro.

No Estado de São Paulo, o Palmeiras também é um dos principais vencedores, com 27 conquistas Estaduais, sendo 26 do Campeonato Paulista (1920, 1926, 1927, 1932, 1933, 1934, 1936, 1940, 1942, 1944, 1947, 1950, 1959, 1963, 1966, 1972, 1974, 1976, 1993, 1994, 1996, 2008, 2020, 2022, 2023 e 2024), e mais dois Campeonatos Paulistas Extras (1926 e 1938). 

E interestadualmente falando, são cinco Torneios Rio-São Paulo (1933, 1951, 1965, 1993 e 2000). Vale lembrar que algumas dessas edições eram tão importantes quanto um Nacional.

E no âmbito internacional, o Palmeiras é o primeiro clube a ter sido campeão mundial, em 1951 (Copa Rio) e ainda acumula três Libertadores da América (1999, 2020 e 2021), uma Copa Mercosul (1998) e uma Recopa Sul-Americana (2022).

Name: Club Atlético River Plate
Description:
River Plate es el club más popular de la República Argentina, con más de 350.000 socios, más de 20 millones de hinchas en el país y miles en cada rincón del mundo. La Institución cuenta con 38 títulos nacionales (el más ganador) y 12 copas internacionales. Es el equipo que más encuentros ganó en la historia del fútbol argentino, el que más goles marcó, el que menos goles recibió y el que más jugadores aportó a la Selección Argentina.
Además, el Estadio Mâs Monumental es uno de los escenarios emblemáticos del mundo y el más grande de Sudamérica, con una capacidad de 85.018 espectadores. Es el lugar elegido por la Selección Nacional y por las principales bandas y cantantes internacionales para brindar sus espectáculos. Más de dos millones de personas lo visitan anualmente, entre el público que asiste a los eventos y turistas que realizan visitas guiadas. Junto a los 7000 socios que diariamente realizan actividades, este número asciende casi a los tres millones.
El Club cuenta con más de 20 deportes federados, múltiples actividades recreativas, un complejo polideportivo de primer nivel y una pensión que alberga a 120 futbolistas juveniles.
River Plate no es sólo deporte: cuenta con un Instituto educativo para 1500 alumnos y un Instituto Universitario inaugurado en 2013.
Todos los visitantes pueden deleitarse y emocionarse con el Museo River, el más grande y moderno del mundo, en donde podrán recorrer toda la historia riverplatense en videos, imágenes y atracciones.

Name: Hellenic Olympic Committee
Description:
Committee
The mission of the HOC is to oversee and act to ensure the development, promotion and safeguarding of the Olympic Movement, the spirit of fair play and out-of-school physical activity, in accordance with the principles of the Olympic Ideal and the traditions of the Hellenic sport. The HOC’s role is: To supervise the Olympic Sports and cooperate with the State as well as with the public and private bodies for the promotion of healthy sport policies. To encourage love for sports and respect for the spirit of sportsmanship among the young. To organise in cooperation with the National Federations the Olympic preparation of athletes. To proceed, on its sole responsibility, to the final selection of athletes who will represent Greece at the Olympic and Mediterranean Games.

Name: Florida Panthers
Description:
The Florida Panthers are a National Hockey League (NHL) team based in Sunrise, FL and play their home games out of Amerant Bank Arena. They won their first Stanley Cup Championship in franchise history on June 24, 2024.

Awarded a franchise on December 10, 1992, the Panthers officially began play during the 1993-94 season and are owned by Vincent Viola with Bill Zito serving as President, Hockey Operations & General Manager, and Paul Maurice serving as Head Coach. Aleksander Barkov serves as the team's captain, earning the honor ahead of the 2018-19 season.

The Panthers compete in the NHL's Atlantic Division out of the Eastern Conference.

Join the Territory by following @flapanthers on Twitter, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, and Facebook!

Name: SV Werder Bremen GmbH & Co KG aA
Description:
Der SV Werder Bremen ist mit knapp 50.000 Mitgliedern einer der größten und zugleich traditionsreichsten Sportvereine Deutschlands. Kerngeschäft ist der männliche Profi-Fußball. Als Gründungsmitglied der Fußball-Bundesliga konnten die Grün-Weißen bereits vier nationale Meisterschaften und sechs Pokalsiege feiern. Den größten Triumpf der 125-jährigen Geschichte des Sport-Vereins „Werder“ von 1899 e.V. feierte Werder mit dem Gewinn des Europapokals der Pokalsieger 1992. Wahrzeichen und Heimat des Vereins ist das WESERSTADION mit seinen charakteristischen Flutlichtmasten, zentrumsnah gelegen zwischen Weser und dem belebten Bremer „Viertel“.

Der SV Werder hat heute über 200 Mitarbeiter:innen und gilt unter anderem im eFootball sowie dem CSR-Engagement des Vereins national als Vorreiter. Seit vielen Jahren tritt Werder aktiv gegen Diskriminierung und Rassismus ein, darüber hinaus setzt sich der Verein für mehr Diversität, Gleichberechtigung und die Förderung von Frauen im Unternehmen ein, unter anderem durch die Initiative „Fußball kann mehr“. Die Fußballfrauen des Vereins sind etabliertes Mitglied der Google Pixel Frauen-Bundesliga. Als erster deutscher Profi-Klub schloss sich Werder 2022 zudem der globalen Bewegung „Common Goal“ an.

Name: Sport-Club Freiburg e.V.
Description:
Im Frühjahr 1904 gegründet, dauerte es knapp 90 Jahre, bis der SC in der Saison 1993/94 sein Bundesligadebüt feiern konnte. Mit wirtschaftlicher Weitsicht, einem familiären Klima im Club und seinem Umfeld sowie personeller Konstanz, ist es dem Sport-Club seitdem gelungen, der finanziell oftmals besser gestellten Konkurrenz auf Augenhöhe zu begegnen. In der Spielzeit 2021/22 ging der SC Freiburg in seine mittlerweile 22. Bundesligasaison.

Die größten Erfolge des SC sind der dritte Platz in der Bundesliga (Saison 1994/95), vier Meistertitel in der 2. Bundesliga (1993/94, 2003/04, 2009/10 und 2015/16), das Erreichen des Pokalfinals 2022, sowie sechs Qualifikationen für den UEFA-Pokal beziehungsweise die heutige UEFA Europa League (1995/96, 2001/02, 2013/14, 2017/18, 2022/23, 2023/24). Mit über 60.000 Mitgliedern zählt der SC Freiburg zu den größten Vereinen Baden-Württembergs. 

Der SC Freiburg versteht sich als Ausbildungsverein. Bereits seit 2001 – bevor im deutschen Profifußball verpflichtend Nachwuchsleistungszentren (NLZ) eingeführt wurden – werden in der Freiburger Fußballschule junge Spieler zu gestandenen Profis geformt. Dabei achtet der Sport-Club neben der sportlichen Weiterentwicklung auch auf die schulische Lehre seine Fußballschüler. Mit verschiedenen Projekten und Arbeitsgemeinschaften an Freiburger Schulen fördert der SC außerdem die körperliche Aktivität der Jugend. 

Auch abseits des Platzes ist sich der SC seiner Verantwortung bewusst: Mit sozialem Engagement in den Bereichen Bildung, Umwelt, Bewegung und Solidarität möchte der SC gemeinsam mit seinen Sponsoren und Partnern einen gesellschaftlichen Beitrag leisten.

Name: Ipswich Town FC
Description:
Having achieved promotion in the 2023/24 season, Ipswich Town are now members of the Premier League and play their home fixtures at Portman Road.
 
Originally formed as an amateur club in 1878, it was not until 1936 that the club turned professional. After winning the Southern League at the first attempt and finishing third the following season, Town were elected to the Football League in May 1938.
 
The club’s greatest successes include winning the First Division Championship, under Alf Ramsey who later won the World Cup with England, in 1962, lifting the FA Cup at Wembley in 1978, and winning the UEFA Cup after beating AZ Alkmaar of the Netherlands over two legs in the final in 1981.
 
The 1990s included Town playing in the inaugural season of the Premier League, and, having dropped to the second tier, securing promotion back to the top flight with a memorable play-off final victory over Barnsley in 2000.
 
Having been relegated to League One in 2019, the club was taken over by Gamechanger 20 Ltd in April 2021. Under the management of Kieran McKenna, who took charge at Portman Road in December 2021, the Blues were promoted back to the Championship at the end of the 2022/23 season.
 
Town continued their strong form in 2023/24, securing 96 points and automatic promotion to the top division of English football.

Name: Derby County Football Club
Description:
Derby County Football Club is a professional football club based in Derby, England. Notable for being one of the 12 founding members of the English Football League in 1888, it is one of only 10 clubs to have competed in every season of the English Football League and, in 2009, was ranked 137th in the top 200 European football teams of the 20th century by International Federation of Football History and Statistics.

Derby County Football Club was founded in 1884, by William Morley, as an offshoot of Derbyshire County Cricket Club. The club's competitive peak came in the 1970s when it had two spells as English League Champions and competed in major European competitions on four separate occasions, reaching the European Cup semi-finals, as well as winning several minor trophies. 

The club adopted its now traditional black and white club colours in the 1890s and appropriated its club nickname The Rams, a tribute to its links with the First Regiment of Derby Militia, which took a ram as its mascot and the song "The Derby Ram" as its regimental song, at the same time. Home games are played at Pride Park Stadium, located in Pride Park, Derby, where the club moved in 1997.

Derby County is owned by Clowes Developments (UK) Ltd after they finalised their purchase of the football club in July 2022.

Name: International Ice Hockey Federation (IIHF)
Description:
The IIHF, founded on 15 May 1908 in Paris, France, is the governing body of international ice hockey. The IIHF features 83 member associations, each of which is the national governing body of the sport in its nation. Besides controlling the international rulebook, processing international player transfers, and dictating officiating guidelines, the IIHF runs numerous development programmes designed to bring hockey to a broader population. The IIHF also presides over ice hockey in the Olympic Games, and over the IIHF World Championships at all levels, men, women, juniors under-20, juniors under-18 and women under-18. Each season, the IIHF in collaboration with its local organising committees, runs around 25 different World Championships in the five different categories.

Besides the world championships, the IIHF also runs a set of European club competitions. In 2008, the IIHF was celebrating its 100 year anniversary, honouring it with a host of ambitious new projects, including naming the Century All Star Team, the 100 Top Stories of the Century, charity events, children's development programmes, and the launch of the Victoria Cup.

Name: Club Sporting Cristal
Description:
CLUB SPORTING CRISTAL
UNA JOYA DE VEINTE CORONAS 
Sus vitrinas se adornan con veinte coronas nacionales conquistados en 67 años de fructífera presencia deportiva. El Juego limpio es su bandera, merced a la solidez moral heredada de sus fundadores, don Ricardo Bentín Mujica y doña Esther Grande de Bentín. Su crecimiento se refleja en la progresión de sus logros: un título a fines de los 50, dos en los 60, tres en los 70, tres en los 80 y cuatro en los 90. Es el club que en la alta competencia conserva portes, conjugándola con los preceptos modernos del entrenamiento. 

GLORIOSO TRI CAMPEÓN 
El impecable mantel de la excelencia lo extendió Sporting Cristal cuando se convirtió en una institución moderna, de primera clase. Sobre él colocó cuidadosamente los elementos necesarios para un logro irrepetible en el siglo XX: el primer tricampeonato de la era profesional del fútbol peruano. Cuatro hombres fueron claves en este hecho glorioso. El entonces presidente Francisco Lombardi, el técnico Juan Carlos Oblitas (94-95), Alfonso Grados Presidente de la Comisión de Fútbol, cuya tarea fue completada por el no menos exitoso entrenador uruguayo Sergio Markarian (96). una página de oro que recordamos para deleite de los amantes del fútbol bien jugado.

Description:
Građanski nogometni klub Dinamo najuspješniji je i najtrofejnijih hrvatski nogometni klub. Simbol grada Zagreba svake godine uspjesima na sportskom i nesportskom planu opravdava status najuspješnijeg kluba u regiji.
--
GNK Dinamo Zagreb (or GNK Dinamo) is a Croatian professional football club based in Zagreb, Croatia. Founded in 1911, plays at Maksimir stadium.

GNK Dinamo is the most successful Croatian club, having won 35 national championships, 24 national cups, 7 national supercups, and the Inter-Cities Fair Cup (today’s UEFA Europa League) in 1967.

As one of the most recognisable brand of Croatia’s capital Zagreb, and the club with the most fans in Croatia and among Croats all around the world, GNK Dinamo has always been more than just a football club. To the fans, Dinamo is much more than football and sport in general. The club and the players feel great pride, but also carry enormous responsibility. GNK has invested a lot of energy and funds in social responsibility programmes. By helping the people in need, children with rare diseases, new-borns and many others, GNK Dinamo has not only become a synonym of excellent sport results and success, but also recognised as a caring club.

	•	No VAR. No draws. No suits in the boardroom.
	•	Four quarters. Mic’d-up players. 35-yard shootouts.
	•	Classic clubs. Cinematic presentation.
	•	Built for fans. Streamed for free.
	•	Funded by real people — not billionaires.

This isn’t a reboot. It’s a rebellion.
Football Is For The Fans.
And we’re taking it back.

Name: Barra Futebol Clube
Description:
Fundado em 18 de janeiro de 2013, o Barra Futebol Clube é um clube da cidade de Balneário Camboriú, no litoral de Santa Catarina.

O Pescador, como é conhecido, tem uma história jovem, porém repleta de conquistas e com uma assinatura dourada. Nos profissionais, o Barra FC foi campeão invicto das Série C e Série B do Campeonato Catarinense, em 2015 e 2021, respectivamente. Em 2022, disputou pela primeira vez a elite do futebol de Santa Catarina, garantindo a permanência na Série A do Campeonato Catarinense, ficando na décima colocação, com dez pontos somados. 

Nas categorias de base, principal foco de trabalho do Barra FC, a história também é rica. Em 2022, o clube foi campeão do Catarinense Série A e da Copa Santa Catarina sub-17. Ainda foi campeão da Série C Catarinense Juvenil, em 2015, e da Série B Catarinense sub-17, em 2017. Os talentos formados no Centro de Treinamentos do Pescador já se espalham por gramados do Brasil e ao redor do mundo. Nomes como Jhonata Robert, Rodrigo Mathiola, Leonardo Naldi, Saile Samuel, Gabriel Couto e Luan Gabriel são exemplos do sucesso do trabalho de formação do clube.

Recentemente, o trabalho de base do Barra FC atingiu um novo nível, com quatro atletas da categoria sub-20 – Bruno Branco, Bruno Ramos, Gabriel Jesus e Lucas Nunes – realizando intercâmbios na academia do TSG Hoffenheim, na Alemanha. Ainda em 2022, os jovens Kayque Ryann, Kauã Vinícius e Matheus Sampaio, também do sub-20 do Pescador, foram emprestados ao Académico Viseu, de Portugal.

Name: Padel Pro
Description:
Padel Pro UAE is the largest Padel club in the United Arab Emirates. Based in Dubai, Padel Pro offers state-of-the-art Courts, High-Quality Match Making Services, Packages, Private or Group Coaching, Tournaments, Academies, & Merchandise for experienced or new Padel players of all ages.

More than just a Padel club, Padel Pro is a community of like-minded people who love to compete and socialize and provides an opportunity to network and meet new people in the UAE.

What is Padel?

Widely considered to be the fastest-growing sport in the world, Padel is a racquet sport that can be best defined as a hybrid between Tennis, Squash, and Badminton. Padel is very social, fun, and easy to grasp. With the right coach or trainer, a complete beginner can learn the basics of the sport and be up and running in about 20 minutes.

Enrique Corcuera, a Mexican national, invented the sport in 1969 in Mexico and founded the first Padel Club in 1947 in Marbella, Spain. Padel is one of the most popular sports in Spain, Argentina, Mexico, and other Latin American countries, and is becoming increasingly popular across Europe and the UK.

A standard Padel court is one-third the size of a Tennis court (10m X 20m); the balls used are the same as Tennis balls but with a little less pressure, and the racquets are stringless and perforated.

A las puertas de cumplir su 75º aniversario, Movistar Estudiantes es reconocido por tener equipos profesionales tanto masculino como femenino, y por tener una de las canteras inclusivas más grandes de Europa con más de 2.000 niños y niñas. Más de siete décadas de experiencia desde el patio del colegio han hecho de Movistar Estudiantes una de las mayores fábricas de talento del baloncesto español y europeo. En la cantera del club colegial se han formado a algunos de los nombres más reconocidos del baloncesto nacional e internacional: entrenadores de la talla de Antonio Díaz Miguel, Pepu Hernández o Aíto García Reneses, jugadores que alcanzaron la NBA como el pionero Fernando Martín, Sergio Rodríguez, Lucas Nogueira o Juancho Hernángomez; o jugadores y jugadoras de Selección Española como Juan Martínez Arroyo, Gonzalo y José Luis Sagi-Vela, Carlos Jiménez, Alberto Herreros, Alfonso y Felipe Reyes, Nacho Azofra, Javier Beirán, Edgar Vicedo, Darío Brizuela, Jaime Fernández, Silvia Domínguez o María Conde, entre otros.

Name: RPSG Sports Private Limited
Description:
RPSG Sports Private Limited is the sports arm of the RPSG Group, one of India’s largest conglomerates with an asset base of $7 Bn and an active presence in 35+ countries. Formed in 2014, RPSG Sports came to being with an unwavering goal – breeding excellence within the sporting community of India. Having made multiple investments, the current portfolio of RPSG Sports include the iconic ATK Mohun Bagan Football Club, the pathbreaking Lucknow Super Giants and the new and exciting Durban’s Super Giants.

The Group's first sports asset was ATK - a football club based in Kolkata, which competes in the Indian Super League football competition. The license for the club was acquired in 2014 by a consortium that also included the celebrated Spanish football club Atlético de Madrid, which exited in 2017. The club is one of the eight original participating ISL teams. The Group acquired a majority stake in Mohun Bagan Football in 2020.The iconic club, established in 1889, has won 100 major titles till date. They have won the prestigious I-League title five times. The clubs were merged and play as one since ISL 2020-21 onwards.

LSG, the group’s second foray into the IPL, kickstarted their campaign with great aplomb by qualifying for the playoffs in its very first season in 2021. 

Durban based DSG, the latest feather in the RPSG Sports cap took the country of South Africa by storm with inspiring performances in the inaugural edition of the SA20 league.

Description:
TopsportNetwerk is dé verbindende schakel tussen topsporters, sportclubs en het bedrijfsleven. Wij geloven in de kracht van duale carrières en helpen topsporters hun unieke vaardigheden en doorzettingsvermogen in te zetten voor succesvolle carrières buiten de sport.

Ons platform biedt een dynamische omgeving waar topsporters, sportclubs en bedrijven elkaar ontmoeten, elkaar inspireren en samen groeien. Met maatwerkoplossingen, zoals op maat gemaakte e-learning modules, trainingen en ontwikkelbeurzen, ondersteunen we topsporters in hun professionele ontwikkeling. 

We creëren waardevolle verbindingen, waarbij bedrijven profiteren van de inzet en discipline van topsporters en topsporters nieuwe kansen vinden in het bedrijfsleven. Tegelijkertijd ondersteunen we sportclubs in hun streven naar goed werkgeverschap door topsporters te helpen financiële stabiliteit te vinden, zodat ze zich volledig op hun sport kunnen concentreren. 

TopsportNetwerk neemt de regie en investeert in duurzame resultaten. Onze missie is helder: meer dan 8.000 topsporters perspectief bieden en bedrijven helpen hun uitdagingen op de arbeidsmarkt aan te gaan. Samen bouwen we aan een duurzame, gezonde en toekomstgerichte topsportcultuur.

Name: Judo Golovec
Description:
Welcome to our LinkedIn page! We are dedicated to sharing valuable insights and tips for successful local community development through the practice of judo. Our primary goal is to raise awareness about the transformative power of sports, particularly judo, in fostering social development.

WHAT WE DO
 At Judo Golovec, we proudly hold the title of a champion in judo for development. With a remarkable 40-year tradition, we are the only Slovenian judo club registered at the prestigious Kodokan Institute in Tokyo.

WHO WE ARE
Our team consists of passionate judo instructors and managers who are deeply committed to making a positive impact on the lives of young people and adults through the principles and practice of judo.

OUR CORE MISSION
 Our core mission is to provide judo training opportunities for individuals of all generations. We believe that judo can play a significant role in fostering physical and mental well-being, self-discipline, and personal growth.

OUR BROADER VISION
 Beyond our immediate mission, we are dedicated to utilizing judo as a catalyst for improving the overall quality of life in our local community. We aim to create an inclusive and supportive environment where everyone can thrive.

EXPERT PROJECT MANAGEMENT
With extensive experience in project management, we specialize in developing collaborative relationships with a diverse range of partners. By leveraging our expertise, we strive to bring about positive and sustainable outcomes for local communities through the application of judo principles. We are always seeking innovative ways to create inclusive opportunities that benefit individuals from all walks of life.

By joining us and supporting our cause, you can make a real difference in the lives of individuals in our community. Together, let's harness the power of judo to build a brighter future.

Name: Differently-Abled Cricket Council Of India
Description:
The Differently Abled Cricket Council of India (DCCI) represents a significant step towards fostering inclusive sports in India. Comprising representation from individuals with varying disabilities, including the blind, deaf and mute, physically disabled (wheelchair), and physically disabled (standing), DCCI aims to elevate the status of differently-abled cricket in India. This white paper outlines the roadmap for DCCI to ensure inclusivity and achieve its ultimate goal while considering the current landscape of cricket as a sport in India.
Vision and Mission
DCCI's primary mission should be to promote, organize, and develop cricket for differently-abled individuals across India. The vision should encompass achieving excellence, inclusivity, and recognition on par with mainstream cricket.

Name: Collectif des Championnes et Champions Français
Description:
Le CCCF, association Loi 1901, fondée par Marie-Claire RESTOUX, Patrice MARTIN, Cathy FLEURY, Philippe CANDELORO, Robert LEROUX et Pascal EOUZAN, a pour but de défendre l’égalité des droits d’accès à la retraite de toutes les sportives et de tous les sportifs de haut niveau de toutes générations. D’intervenir par tous actes pour les représenter afin de défendre leurs droits durant leur carrière sportive et plus généralement en développant toutes actions pouvant favoriser leur activité sportive, leur reconnaissance et leur reconversion.
De les épauler dans leurs revendications devant l’opinion, les administrations, les pouvoirs publics ou privés, les tribunaux …
De promouvoir, de créer et d’administrer toutes actions, projets, et structures au service de son objet.

Name: PoliMi Sailing Team
Description:
PoliMi Sailing Team is the student group of Politecnico di Milano composed by undergraduates coming from all the different fields of engineering and design, that thrive for putting their expertise and passion for sailing in a challenging extracurricular project.

Born in 2007, PoliMi Sailing Team is currently one of the most competitive contenders of the Foiling Sustainable Moth Challenge: an international competition inspired by the need of more sustainable and efficient sailboat designs and manufacturing methods, which ultimate goal is to combine sustainable and safety prerogatives with breath-taking performances and extreme emotions that can only be delivered by flying on the water! 

In particular, the team is responsible for the design, manufacturing and tests of an innovative and sustainable Moth prototype able to reach speeds up to 40 knots having the higher level of control possible; and yes, it’s even harder than what it looks like.

All of this is possible only thanks to the support that Politecnico di Milano University is providing, especially in its Design branch and to the more than 80 girls and boys that, dreaming of the America’s Cup, are putting daylily their energy and passion in such a challenging project.

Name: Lamboisières Martin Basket - Club Partenaires
Description:

Depuis sa création, le LMB n’a cessé de croître, tout en préservant les valeurs qui lui sont chères : convivialité, accessibilité du sport pour tous, et engagement envers la communauté locale. Avec des équipes évoluant à tous les niveaux, du loisir à la compétition nationale, dont une équipe féminine en Nationale 2, le club est aujourd’hui reconnu pour son développement constant et son implication dans la formation des jeunes talents.

Fort d’une solide base de partenaires locaux, le LMB offre à ses membres et à ses partenaires une visibilité importante et une vraie dynamique de groupe, contribuant à l’épanouissement de tous.

Name: Game Changer Sports Ministry, Inc.
Description:
VISION AND MISSION STATEMENTS

OUR MISSION
Our mission is to bring encouragement to athletes through the gospel 
so that they may become loyal followers of Jesus Christ.

OUR VISION
Our vision is to support and develop students and coaches through
the teachings of the Holy Bible taking their talents to a higher level. 

CHRIST DIED FOR US. WE PLAY FOR HIM.

GAME CHANGER SPORTS MINISTRY T.E.A.M. VALUES

TEAMWORK – We will work to lift teammates and others expressing our unity in Christ. Romans 12:10 – Love one another with brotherly affection. Outdo one another in showing honor.

EXCELLENCE – We will strive for excellence. Excellence means doing our very best in all we do.1 Corinthians 10:31 – So, whatever you eat or drink, or whatever you do, do all to the glory of God.

AUTHORITY – We will submit to the authority of The Bible, Christ, our parents, coaches, and teammates. Psalm 37:5 – Commit your way to the Lord: trust in Him, and He will act.

MATURITY – We will demonstrate maturity in our decisions and actions. Romans 12:2 – Do not  conform to this world, but be transformed buy the renewing of your mind, so that you may prove what the will of God is, that which is good, acceptable, and perfect.

We believe that students who choose to follow these T-E-A-M values will achieve more in sport and in life!

There are two aspects of our ministry:

1. TEAMs: A TEAM is our on campus student led sports club united in faith. We provide everything your school will need including launch package, complete training, and ongoing support. 

2. GAME ON SPORTS CAMPS & CLINICS: Throughout the year we offer sports clinics and camps. All instruction is from top NCAA Christian athletes and coaches. 

You will find more details on our TEAMs and GAME ON SPORTS CAMPS & CLINICS offered on our website gcsminc.com

Name: Junior Comtec e.V. – Studentische Unternehmensberatung
Description:
Junior Comtec Darmstadt e.V. ist eine über 35 Jahre alte studentische Unternehmensberatung und bietet Studierenden eine einzigartige Plattform zur fachlichen und persönlichen Weiterentwicklung.

Mit über 50 hoch motivierten Mitgliedern und einem breiten Spektrum an universitärem Wissen fördern wir die persönliche und fachliche Entwicklung durch interdisziplinäre Zusammenarbeit und kontinuierlichen Wissenstransfer. So bereiten wir uns optimal auf anspruchsvolle Beratungsprojekte vor.

Ein  wesentlicher Bestandteil von Junior Comtec stellt jedoch nicht nur unsere fachliche Weiterentwicklung, sondern auch unser Vereinsleben mit regelmäßigen Events und Strategiewochenenden dar, bei denen das Teambuilding und die Vernetzung untereinander gefördert werden. Dadurch entstehen eine enge Gemeinschaft und ein starkes Netzwerk, was für das spätere Berufsleben in der Unternehmensberatung von großem Vorteil ist.

Das aktive Vereinsleben bei Junior Comtec bietet unseren Berater:innen somit nicht nur die Möglichkeit, ihre fachlichen Fähigkeiten zu erweitern, sondern auch wertvolle persönliche Kontakte zu knüpfen und ein unterstützendes Umfeld zu erleben.
Regelmäßige interne und externe Schulungen stärken die Führungskompetenzen und das Qualitätsbewusstsein unserer Mitglieder. Durch praxisnahe interne und externe Workshops sowie den Austausch mit erfahrenen Expert:innen erweitern unsere Berater:innen stetig ihre Fähigkeiten und Kenntnisse.

Wir fördern ein offenes und gemeinschaftliches Umfeld, in welchem wir die Möglichkeit bieten, die eigenen Stärken einzubringen und sich weiterzuentwickeln.


Weiterführende Informationen findet Ihr auf unserer Homepage: www.junior-comtec.de 
Informationen für Studierende: www.junior-comtec-ev.de 
Kontaktiert uns: kontakt@junior-comtec.de
Impressum: www.junior-comtec.de/impressum.html

Name: Whitefield Football Club & Academy
Description:
Whitefield Football Club began as a group of passionate working professionals who came together during the COVID-19 pandemic, playing small-sided games like 5v5, 6v6, 7v7, and 9v9 from June to November 2020. What started as a fitness activity soon turned into a shared passion for football.

As we played regularly and formed an unofficial team, we began competing against local teams, strengthening our bond and honing our skills. This camaraderie and commitment inspired us to dream bigger, envisioning the creation of a formal ‘C’ Division team (11v11).

With this vision in mind, a core group of players took the initiative to establish Whitefield Football Club officially. In pursuit of this goal, we registered the club with the Karnataka State Football Association, marking the beginning of an exciting journey to grow the game we love and make a meaningful impact in our community.

They also had a minority interest in FC Cincinnati. The Dutch Lions Capital Group BV offers an infrastructure of soccer clubs and sport related organizations in the USA for player scouting, player development as well as business opportunities. Name: SNAP Sponsorship
Description:
SNAP helps grassroots sports maximise sponsorship revenue through our digital platform, helping volunteers connect with brands like never before. For over a decade the SNAP platform has provided solutions to the challenges faced with securing, managing and retaining funding for clubs across the UK. 

How It Works
• Clubs: Create your personal SNAP profile to showcase your opportunities and attract sponsors, saving invaluable time and admin duties. 
• Brands: Search, connect, and negotiate deals directly with clubs. Manage these partnerships in real-time to help meet your commercial objectives through sponsorship. 

Pricing
• Clubs: £19.95/month, with no commission—keep 100% of sponsorship earnings.
• Brands: Free.

Next Steps
• Sign up, create your profile and begin securing revenue through sponsorship. 

#MakingSponsorshipWork

Name: Al-Ahli Club Jordan
Description:
تأسس النادي الأهلي عام 1944 باسم النادي الأهلي الرياضي بموجب قرار مجلس الوزارة العالي في جلسته المنعقدة في 31/5/1944، وفي 15/10/1944 صادقت الهيئة الادارية على القانون الاساسي للنادي، وفي اليوم ذاته تكونت اول لجنة رياضية في النادي.
كان اول مقر للنادي في مبنى الجمعية الخيرية الشركسية في رأس العين، واستمر النادي في هذا المقر الى ان انتقل الى مقره الجديد الحالي في بيادر وادي السير، والذي افتتحه جلالة المغفور له الملك حسين بن طلال طيب الله ثراه عام 1984.
كان النادي الأهلي ومازال السباق في انشاء الملاعب والمنشآت الرياضية في الأردن، فهو اول من انشئ ملعباً ليلياً لكرة السلة مع مدرجات، واول من انشئ ملعباً مضاءاً لكرة اليد، واول نادي في الاردن ينشئ قاعة رياضية مغلقة متعددة الاغراض، كما انه يُعد في مقدمة الاندية التي انشأت برك سباحة للكبار والصغار.
يمتلك النادي الأهلي سجل حافل بالبطولات والألقاب بمجموع 91 لقب توزعت بين كرة القدم 10 ألقاب، كرة اليد 53 لقب وكرة السلة 28 لقب.
لدى النادي الأهلي أكثلر من 1000 لاعب مسجل في جمبع الرياضات والتي تشمل كرة القدم بكافة فئاتها وكرة اليد بكافة فئاتها بالإضافة الى كرة السلة، وفي الجانب الثقافي يمتلك النادي الأهلي فرقة للفلكلور الشركسي تتألف من أكثر من 60 عضواً من الجنسين وتبنى النادي هذه الفرقة للمحافظة على التراث الشركسي من الاندثار حيث شاركت الفرقة في العديد المهرجانات المحلية والدولية.
كما يضم مقر النادي الحالي منشآت وصالات يخدم بها المجتمع المحلي عبر العديد من الفعاليات والمناسبات الإجتماعية والتطوعية وتستخدم أيضاً لإقامة حفلات الزفاف والمناسبات والندوات، ومسابح قادره على استيعاب اعداد كبيرة من الرواد خلال فصل الصيف.

Name: TeamNL Topsport Metropool
Description:
Topsport Metropool is een door NOC*NSF geaccrediteerd TeamNL centrum. Sinds 2017 biedt Topsport Metropool de beste mogelijke omstandigheden voor topsporters in de regio Metropool (Zuidwest). Dat betekent uitmuntende trainingsomstandigheden, trainingsaccommodaties van wereldniveau en de beste specialistische begeleiders. Dit alles om topsporters en talenten het beste uit zichzelf te laten halen, hen voor te bereiden op het hoogste podium en hen ook maatschappelijk de juiste bagage mee te geven. 

Naast het faciliteren van de beste trainingsmogelijkheden, streeft Topsport Metropool er ook naar een bijdrage te leveren aan het vergroten van de maatschappelijke waarde van topsport, door zich te richten op inspiratie, kennisoverdracht en zichtbaarheid van topsport.

De uitstraling en prestaties van topsporters uit de regio bieden inspiratie voor 2,4 miljoen inwoners van de Metropoolregio. Zowel de sporters als experts in de programma’s van de Topsport Metropool komen graag in actie om hun kennis, inspiratie over te brengen.

Name: MiniLab
Description:
Chercheur et navigateur j’ai cofondé en 2018 une entreprise – @Avel Robotics - qui fabrique les foils des plus emblématiques voiliers de course au large : les IMOCA.

Le milieu industriel dans lequel je travaille prend aujourd’hui conscience de son impact environnemental: il devient indispensable de faire évoluer nos méthodes de conception et de production au profit de solutions plus éco-performantes.

Ces solutions existent déjà au laboratoire où j’ai réalisé ma thèse, et elles répondent au besoin de mon milieu industriel. 

À la croisée de la recherche et de l’industrie, notre projet collaboratif s'appelle MiniLab. 

Son objectif:  faire le pont entre le monde de la recherche et celui de l’industrie afin de démontrer la fiabilité de nouveaux matériaux et technologies. 

Le moyen: les soumettre à des conditions réelles sur un voilier de course pour les éprouver.

Embarquez avec nous!

What we teach:
• Purpose-driven saving and budgeting
• Credit building and debt control
• Income, taxes, and lifestyle planning
• NIL deals, contracts, and long-term strategy
• Investing 101
• Preparing for life beyond sports

Secure the bag, Secure your future.

Name: FC ALGHERO Srl
Description:
FC Alghero è un progetto che coglie una sfida: quella della formazione, di investire nel sociale per donare ai giovani del territorio l’opportunità di mettersi alla prova e di crescere sotto l’aspetto personale e professionale attraverso lo sport. Abbiamo raccolto sogni, idee, opportunità e le metteremo a correre in un campo a undici.
Il calcio per noi non è solo uno sport ma un insieme di virtù. Coraggio, tenacia, senso di appartenenza, rispetto dell’avversario, spirito di sacrificio, opportunità di crescita individuale e umana, emergono in partita e durante gli allenamenti supportando e forgiando gli atleti. Tutte caratteristiche che oltre a portare risultati sul campo, li porteranno anche fuori dal campo nella vita di tutti i giorni.
Attraverso il progetto FC Alghero, Nobento diffonde il suo valore di grande squadra che l’ha fatta crescere in questi anni e lo mette in gioco per valorizzare il
territorio. Investire nel sociale, restituire la gioia del lavoro facendo aggregazione, permette di trasferire le qualità proprie dell’azienda e il codice etico che, come società sportiva, ci siamo dati. Sport per crescere, per divertirci, per stare assieme.
Questo è #losportchecipiace e che vogliamo fare nel territorio che ci appartiene, che sentiamo Casa.
FC Alghero vuole contribuire alla crescita professionale, umana e individuale dei suoi atleti ricordando che il pallone è uno stimolo al “fare gruppo” in un ambiente sano, dove dignità e rispetto sono al primo posto, eliminando qualunque forma di discriminazione.
Non si raggiungono vittorie e risultati se prima non viene raggiunto il valore di squadra, di squadra unita dentro e fuori dal campo di gioco. Valore primario per la Società è l’osservanza dell’etica sportiva, intesa come onestà, lealtà, correttezza e conformità alle leggi e regolamenti.

Description:
Vi är RF-SISU Stockholm, landets största distrikt med 2700 idrottsföreningar.

Vårt grundläggande uppdrag är att företräda, stödja och samordna idrottsrörelsens gemensamma frågor regionalt och lokalt samt verka för och bidra till idrottens utveckling genom folkbildning och utbildning.

Riksidrottsförbundets och SISU Idrottsutbildarna är på riksnivå två organisationer. På distriktsnivå har RF och SISU Idrottsutbildarna lagts samman till en organisation – RF-SISU Distrikt. Det finns 19 olika distriktsförbund runt om i Sverige som jobbar med att på olika sätt stödja distriktens idrottsföreningar och specialidrottsförbund.
 
Idrottens värdegrund, inkludering, mångfald och jämställdhet är självklara ledord hos oss. Vi arbetar aktivt med att stödja föreningarnas och förbundens utveckling av exempelvis parasport, barn- och ungdomsidrott samt inte minst den mycket viktiga frågan om tillgången till idrottens anläggningar och andra idrottsmiljöer. Vi genomför även riktade satsningar i utvalda områden där idrotten behöver växa. Vi samarbetar med kommuner, myndigheter och organisationer.

Name: SKS Skûtsjesilen (Sintrale Kommisje Skûtsjesilen)
Description:
Het SKS Skûtsjesilen is één van de oudste en meest herkenbare zeiltradities van Nederland. Elke zomer strijden 14 authentieke skûtsjes (voormalige vrachtzeilschepen) op de Friese meren om het kampioenschap. Elk skûtsje vertegenwoordigt een dorp, stad of streek en vaart met een vaste bemanning, vaak bestaande uit meerdere generaties uit dezelfde gemeenschap. Er is een sterke binding met de oude skûtsjeschippersfamilies die nog steeds meevaren of schipper zijn. Het Skûtsjesilen is méér dan sport: het verbindt mensen, houdt cultureel erfgoed levend en weerspiegelt de Friese identiteit. De Sintrale Kommisje Skûtsjesilen (SKS) organiseert het jaarlijkse kampioenschap sinds 1945. In 2025 vieren we ons 80-jarig jubileum onder het thema: “Skûtsjesilen is meer als zeilen met skûtsjes.”

It SKS Skûtsjesilen is ien fan de âldste en meast bysûndere syltradysjes fan Nederlân. Fjirtjin autentike skûtsjes stride alle jierren op ’e Fryske marren foar de winst. Elk skip komt út foar in doarp, stêd of streek en fart mei in fêst team fan minsken dy't faak al jierren mei-inoar farre. De skûtsjes ha in sterke bining mei de âlde skûtsjeskippersfamyljes dy't noch steeds meifarre of skipper binne. Skûtsjesilen is mear as in wedstriid: it giet oer ferbining, erfguod en mienskip. De SKS organisearret dit kampioenskip sûnt 1945. Yn 2025 fiert de SKS har 80-jierrich bestean mei it tema: “Skûtsjesilen is mear as sile mei skûtsjes.”

SKS Skûtsjesilen is one of the Netherlands’ most iconic sailing traditions. Each summer, 14 historic skûtsjes (former cargo sailing barges) compete on the Frisian lakes. Each vessel represents a village, city or region and sails with a committed crew, often from the same skûtsje skipper families and communities. Skûtsjesilen is more than racing: it’s about heritage, teamwork, and pride. SKS has organized this cultural-sporting event since 1945. In 2025, we celebrate 80 years with the theme: “Skûtsjesilen is more than sailing with skûtsjes.”

Name: Södertälje Basketbollklubb
Description:
SBBK har sedan starten 1968 vuxit från ett litet kompisgäng till en stor förening med omfattande verksamhet. I början av 70-talet gick såväl herr- som damlaget upp i högsta serien. Sedan dess har båda lagen hört hemma i toppskiktet. Damerna har ett flertal gånger vunnit SM-guld och Svenska Cupen. Herrlaget Kings har även dom vid flera tillfällen vunnit SM-guld och Svenska Cupen. Båda lagen har vid flera tillfällen spelat i de olika Europacuperna. 1972 vann klubben sitt första ungdoms-SM. Det dröjde sedan bara några år, så kom SBBK att bli den dominerande ungdomsklubben i landet. Fram till idag har SBBK samlat ihop ett stort antal USM pokaler till prishyllan. Dessutom har klubben vunnit ett stort antal U20 SM och junior SM. Elitlagen har varit mycket framgångsrika. Trots det är SBBK lika känt i Södertälje och Basketsverige för sin breda ungdomsverksamhet. Det är också förmågan att kombinera elit- och breddsatsning som gör SBBK till den unika klubb man är idag. År 2012 köpte SBBK hela Täljehallen och Rosenborghallen och driver nu dessa anläggningar vidare i egen regi. Bolaget som ansvarar för detta är dotterbolaget Täljehallen AB.
VISION
SBBK vill vara ett föredöme inom svensk idrott. SBBK vill vara en totalklubb med bredd- såväl som elitverksamhet som tar ett stort samhällsansvar i Södertälje.
SBBK vill kännetecknas av den stora klubbens ambitioner, kvalitet och resurser i samklang med den lilla klubbens gemenskap, tillgänglighet och trygghet.

Name: Jaipur Polo Team
Description:
Welcome to the Jaipur Polo Team, where history, excellence, and legacy intertwine in an extraordinary tapestry of sporting glory. Founded in 1900, our team has been a part of the royal city of Jaipur's enduring love affair with polo, a relationship deepened by the patronage of the late H.H. Maharaja Sawai Man Singh II.

Maharaja Sawai Man Singh II was no ordinary patron. A nine-goal player in his prime, he left an indelible mark on the sport, one that continues to be celebrated in polo circles worldwide. His leadership saw us make our mark across prominent tournaments, from the UK to Europe, cementing our place as a global polo powerhouse.

Milestones That Matter:

Victory in England, 1933: We stormed England and returned victorious, sweeping all major tournaments.

Nine Years of Dominance: From 1930, we held India's Polo Crown for nine consecutive years.

World Cup Win, 1957: Maharaja Sawai Man Singh II led the Indian team to World Cup glory, further boosting our reputation.

A Tradition of Patronage: Our success is deeply entwined with the Jaipur Royal family's support, making Jaipur the home of Indian polo.

The Grounds: Maharaja Sawai Man Singh II's state-of-the-art polo ground in Jaipur is known for its exceptional quality.

International Recognition: Our triumphs have made us, and Indian polo, an internationally recognised name.

The Living Legacy: Our history is not just in the past; it continues to be written with each passing day.

Today, the torch has been passed to H.H. Maharaja Sawai Padmanabh Singh, the 303rd Maharaja of Jaipur. A +4 goals player himself, is the guiding light towards new milestones while honoring our rich history.

Join us as we continue to uphold the grand legacy bequeathed by H.H. Maharaja Sawai Man Singh II and carve out new legends in the annals of this noble sport. Your journey with the Jaipur Polo Team promises to be as illustrious as our past, as exciting as our present, and as promising as our future.

Name: SPORTUNION Österreich
Description:
Die SPORTUNION ist einer der drei Sportdachverbände in Österreich. Mit rund 731.000 Mitgliedern und 4.750 Vereinen (Stand 1.1.2026) übernehmen wir eine tragende Säule des Sports in Österreich. Als Breitensportorganisation bekennen wir uns zur Förderung von Sport und Bewegung in der österreichischen Gesellschaft.

Unser Verbandsmotto lautet: „Wir bewegen Menschen“. In der SPORTUNION tun wir das nicht nur im wörtlichen Sinn durch unser vielfältiges Angebot aus über 200 unterschiedlichen Sportarten. Wir bewegen Menschen auch auf emotionaler Ebene. Über den Sport schaffen wir Begeisterung und motivieren mehr als 50.000 ehrenamtliche Verantwortungsträger in mannigfaltigen Funktionen: als Übungsleiter, Vorturner, Instruktoren und Trainer setzen sie sich in ihrer Freizeit für die Gemeinschaft ein.

In der SPORTUNION ist der Verein für seine Mitglieder ein zweites Zuhause, hier werden soziale Werte gelebt und erlebt. Der Verein ist die Gesellschaft im Kleinen.

Name: The Clubhouse
Description:
Sponsored by EvoShield and a proud member of the EvoShield Army Prestige Club, The Clubhouse is a family-owned, all-purpose indoor baseball facility that utilizes industry-leading technology, player development methodology, and data-driven decision-making to ensure that our clients receive the quality coaching that they deserve.  The best type of development training is individualized, objective, and engaging; in an effort to help every one of our clients maximize their potential as a baseball player.

The Clubhouse strives to create the next generation of elite baseball players and baseball coaches.  We have used our shared knowledge and experience of having coaches from the NCAA, MiLB, and MLB to create a development program ensuring anyone who is a member of The Clubhouse will grow as a coach, an educator, and a role model to continue teaching the game of baseball at the highest level as baseball continues to evolve.  So do we, here at The Clubhouse.

Our goal is to foster further the love of the game, commitment to the hard work required to excel, and the sharing of objective information and truth with all of our clientele.  We do this all with the belief that strong relationships and accurate information are the keys to unlocking the fullest potential in every member of our Clubhouse Family.

Join us in shaping the next generation of football and Make Your Mark.

Name: YTÜ Fikrî Araştırmalar Kulübü (FARK)
Description:
Yıldız'ın eksik parçasını tamamlamak üzere, Hilâl'i de yanına alarak 11 Temmuz 2023 tarihinde resmî bir şekilde kurulan kulübümüzün adı FARK oldu. Fikrî Araştırmalar Kulübü; öğrencileri fikir üretmeye teşvik eden, onları bu anlamda cesaretlendiren ve motive eden, bütün öğrencilere âdil davranan, yenilikçi, gelişmeye açık bir kulüp olabilmeyi kendine vizyon edinmiştir. Alanında en tanınmış fikir adamlarıyla çeşitli faaliyetler düzenleyerek Yıldız Teknik Üniversitesi'nin en aktif sosyal kulübü olmayı amaçlamaktadır.

Fikrî Araştırmalar Kulübü, dünyaca ünlü ilim, fikir ve dava adamlarının oluşturdukları fikir akımlarını temel alarak öğrencilerin ferdî ve içtimaî varlığını güçlendirmeyi, toplumsal mutabakatı desteklemeyi ve köklü fikirlerin yetişmesine katkı sağlamayı amaçlar. Geçmişten günümüze uzanan fikrî mirası analiz edip günümüzle entegre etmeyi hedefler. Uzman akademisyenleri, araştırmacı konukları ve öğrencileri bir araya getirerek fikir alışverişlerinde bulunmak, beyin fırtınaları gerçekleştirerek öğrencilerin ufkunu açmak, fikrin yalnızca düşünceden ibaret olmadığını göstermek, fikir sahiplerine öncülük ederek hayallerini gerçekleştirmesine yardımcı olmak, ulusal ve uluslararası arenalarda öğrencilerin fikirlerini dile getirmelerine destek olmak, üretken öğrenci sayısını artırmak kulübün hedefleri arasındadır.

Farklı bölümlerden öğrencileri bir araya getirerek kaynaştırmak, öğrencilerin bilgi birikimlerini ve farkındalıklarını artırmak, uygulamalı etkinlikler ile öğrencilerin beceri ve yetkinliklerini kullanmalarını sağlamak, daha çok teknik alanda ön plana çıkan Yıldız Teknik Üniversitesi'ni sosyal, kültürel ve entelektüel mecralarda da etkinliğini arttırmak için çalışmalarda bulunmaktadır.

Name: Jagiellonia Białystok
Description:
Jagiellonia Białystok to najbardziej utytułowany klub piłkarski w północno-wschodniej Polsce. Jest nazywana Dumą Podlasia, ze względu na ogromne sukcesy i silną więź ze społecznością województwa podlaskiego. Za datę powstania Jagiellonii uznaje się dzień 30 maja 1920 roku. Wówczas żołnierze 42 Pułku Piechoty powołali do życia Klub Sportowy Batalionu Zapasowego 42 Pułku Piechoty. 

Jagiellonia Białystok budowała swoją sportową markę przez wiele lat, a największe sukcesy to miniona dekada. W tym okresie drużyna zdobyła mistrzostwo Polski w sezonie 2023/2024, srebrne medale w latach 2017 i 2018 oraz brązowy w 2015. Niezwykle istotny w dorobku klubowym jest także rok 2010, kiedy to Duma Podlasia sięgnęła po Puchar Polski i Superpuchar kraju. W 2024 roku po raz pierwszy w historii awansowała do fazy ligowej Ligi Konferencji UEFA i z powodzeniem reprezentuje Polskę na arenie międzynarodowej. 

Nie byłoby to możliwe bez wsparcia rzeszy oddanych Kibiców, a także naszych Partnerów. Misją Jagiellonii jest dostarczanie radości dla wspierającej jej społeczności. Poprzez sport chcemy promować zdrowy styl życia, rozwijać i edukować młode piłkarskie talenty, a przede wszystkim być lepszym każdego dnia.

Name: De Graafschap
Description:
De Graafschap is een betaald voetbal organisatie opgericht in 1954. De kreet ‘D’RAN’ illustreert op passende wijze het trotse gevoel van de Achterhoekse onverstoorbaarheid. Deze mentaliteit wordt verwacht door onze supporters maar komt ook op andere manieren terug. Zo is De Graafschap een ontmoetingsplaats voor de regio en leggen wij verbindingen op sociaal maatschappelijk en economisch vlak. 

Wij prijzen ons gelukkig dat ruim 350 ondernemingen sponsor zijn en gebruik maken van de vele mogelijkheden die wij hen bieden. Naast het bezoeken van de voetbalwedstrijden bieden we zeker een vijfentwintigtal activiteiten om bestaande relaties te ontmoeten of in gesprek te komen met nieuwe businesspartners.

Wie kent niet onze vermaarde Happy Hours, waar honderden sponsoren elkaar ontmoeten voor een bedrijfspresentatie, die vaak gelardeerd wordt met een spreker uit de stal van bekende Nederlanders. Maar ook de Workshop Hours en Power Hours mogen telkens op een grote belangstelling rekenen. Verder geven de tweemaandelijkse bijeenkomsten als Breakfast Hour en Meeting Lunch Hour u ook de mogelijkheid om zakelijke contacten op te doen.

Ook optimaal profiteren van het lidmaatschap van onze Business Club en als ondernemer volop de kans om uw netwerk op een sportieve en prettige wijze uit te breiden? Wij bieden u hiervoor het grootse zakelijke platform in Oost – Gelderland. Waar u een zakelijk één-tweetje kunt scoren!

Name: The Hockey News
Description: The Hockey News, owned by Roustan Media Ltd., was founded in 1947 and is the world's most-respected and top-selling hockey publication. Via our printed products, digital editions and website, THN.com, we provide our readers with top-to-bottom coverage for everything on ice, from the NHL to prospects to the game overseas. We also have provocative features, opinion and analysis from our stable of in-house experts and insider stories from our correspondents in each of the 31 NHL markets. No one covers the game like The Hockey News, and, thanks to our annual readership of 1.5 million people, according to Vividata, no one is able to connect our corporate partners to a hardcore hockey audience like THN.

Name: Global Esports
Description:
Global Esports (GE) is South Asia’s premier esports organization, representing the region on the global stage in Valorant’s VCT (Valorant Champions Tour). Founded in 2017, GE is more than just an esports team—it’s a movement to redefine gaming and esports for the next generation of players, creators, and fans.

With a legacy spanning 25+ rosters across 12 games, GE has consistently set benchmarks in competitive gaming, content creation, and fan engagement. Our VCT roster, based in Seoul, represents South Asia in Riot Games’ international league, competing at the highest levels of Valorant.

Our Mission

To build the world’s biggest gaming and esports company, starting with South Asia. We aim to empower gamers and creators to turn their passion into careers while establishing esports as a mainstream industry.

What We Do
	•	Esports: From competing globally to nurturing new talent through structured academy programs.
	•	Content Creation: Engaging millions with creator-driven content, live streams, and behind-the-scenes storytelling.
	•	Community Building: Driving fandom and connecting with audiences through activations, collaborations, and immersive experiences.

Key Milestones
	•	Youngest team in Valorant’s Franchise League.
	•	Record-breaking engagement with over a billion gamers reached in 2024.
	•	Partnerships with global brands like Intel, Acer, Nvidia and many leading tech innovators.
	•	Innovators of events like the Global Esports Fight Night & Face Off, blending competition and entertainment.

The Future

With a laser focus on Valorant and the VCT ecosystem, Global Esports is scaling esports academies, building collaborations, and creating unforgettable fan experiences. We are shaping South Asia’s gaming future while growing our presence on the global stage.

Name: Ileseum Clubs
Description:
India’s Leading Sports & Leisure Club Management Company.

Imagine a space where you thrive in an active-lifestyle environment, backed by world-class sporting facilities, premium fitness services, and an energizing atmosphere. That’s the essence of Ileseum Clubs.

At Ileseum, we unite sports, fitness, leisure, and co-working under one roof, designed for the modern urban individual. Our spaces are built to energize, connect, and elevate everyday living.

Our mission is to redefine urban lifestyles by offering a holistic club experience that serves as a vibrant third space, beyond home and work, where wellness, productivity, and leisure flourish together.

With state-of-the-art infrastructure and a growing national presence, we've partnered with some of India's most respected developers, The Wadhwa Group, SPR City, Goel Ganga Group, and Godrej Properties, to bring world-class sports ecosystems into premium real estate environments.

Whether you're a developer looking to enhance your next project, a corporate investing in employee well-being, or a professional seeking a workspace that moves with you, Ileseum delivers India's most complete club-life solution.

Name: U.S. Sassuolo
Description:
Fondato nel 1920, il Sassuolo Calcio rappresenta la città più piccola ad aver raggiunto la Serie A dal dopoguerra ad oggi.

Dal 2003 il club è di proprietà della Mapei SpA, che con passione, determinazione e investimenti mirati ha posto le fondamenta per una scalata vertiginosa verso l’élite del calcio italiano ed europeo.

Investimenti che inoltre hanno dotato il Sassuolo Calcio di due gioielli nel panorama nazionale: il “Mapei Stadium – Città del Tricolore” e il “Mapei Football Center”.

Nel dicembre 2013 l’azienda Mapei è diventata proprietaria dello stadio di Reggio Emilia inserendolo all’interno di un progetto legato al territorio. Con investimenti per oltre 18 milioni di euro, il Mapei Stadium è ora un impianto polifunzionale all’altezza dei più elevati standard internazionali.

Nel giugno 2019 è stato inaugurato il Mapei Football Center, un centro sportivo all’avanguardia di 45.000 mq che è diventato la casa della famiglia neroverde.

Dal 2016 il Sassuolo milita in Serie A con la prima squadra femminile. Gli investimenti nel calcio femminile da parte del club sono consistenti con oltre 200 atlete tesserate suddivise in 10 squadre. 

Altro fiore all’occhiello per il club è il settore giovanile maschile: 12 squadre e oltre 300 atleti che rappresentano il futuro del Sassuolo Calcio. Nel proprio palmares il settore giovanile neroverde vanta uno Scudetto Primavera (2024), tre Viareggio Cup (2017, 2022 e 2023), uno Scudetto Berretti (2018) e una Supercoppa Berretti (2018). 

Il Sassuolo Calcio è fermamente convinto della funzione sociale dello sport e dal 2021 ha sviluppato il progetto Generazione S che si pone l’obiettivo di veicolare i valori positivi di cui il club neroverde da sempre si fa portatore. Inclusività, rispetto e uguaglianza sono i punti cardine sui quali l’iniziativa pone le proprie basi per lo sviluppo di tre aree: EDUCATIONAL, ACADEMY ed EXPERIENCE.

Name: Adelaide United Football Club
Description:
Founded in 2003, Adelaide United Football Club (AUFC) is South Australian’s only professional football club. The Club competes in the A-Leagues and the National Premier League South Australia.

The Club exists for the people of South Australia, as a custodian for the game of football, and serves to foster the passion, pride, and purpose that football evokes within the community. 

The Club’s ambition is to be the most engaged, respected, and successful football club in Australia, and to always think and be about ‘More Than Football’.

Name: TFA
Description:
The Football Academy (TFA) is a niche football academy and pro football club head quartered in Dubai , with FA & UEFA qualified coaches we focus on the local talent pool, to identify the talented, passionate and committed and guide them to playing the highest level of Football. Since 2016, TFA has trained nearly 1,000 players through holistic development programs.

 Our mission is to develop confident, skilled footballers and responsible individuals by providing elite training environments, UEFA-licensed coaching, and international playing opportunities.
TFA offers a full developmental journey—from foundational programs like Little Boots to our elite EPC (Elite Performance Centre) squads, all the way to our Pathway2Play initiative, connecting players to trials, scholarships, and clubs across Europe and the U.S.

Name: ONIC Esports
Description:
In 2018, ONIC Esports was founded by a group of passionate Esports advocates in Indonesia who believed that this industry would bring about fundamental disruption within sports entertainment.

After experiencing consistent success in Indonesia and building a massive brand with close to a million social media followers, ONIC expanded to the Philippines to create ONIC PH. As a new entrant in the Philippine Esports market, ONIC PH has quickly established themselves as both a strong performer in competitions and a social media presence through Facebook.

ONIC currently operates in 3 countries with a number professional teams in esports titles such as Mobile Legends: Bang Bang, Free Fire, and APEX Legends.

Name: Matcha Club
Description:
A boutique padel and movement club in Al Quoz and Meydan, Matcha embraces the essence of simplicity, organic elements, and their profound mark on our lives. The core concept behind Matcha is fostering a sense of connection, providing a mindful escape from the city and leading wellness into the lives of people.

Movement classes at Matcha are led by some of Dubai's finest yoga instructors. Amidst breathtaking natural surroundings, the studios are designed to mimic the outdoors creating an immersive experience. The terracotta padel courts provide a visually stunning contrast against the backdrop of palm trees, creating a refreshing atmosphere as you engage in intense padel matches.

With the addition of Nette, indulgence takes on a new meaning offering a fusion of French and Japanese cuisine. The beautifully designed space, adorned with an open patio and colorful hues, harmoniously complements the flavors while immersing diners in their surroundings.

Name: The Player Care Group
Description:
We are the football industry's leading consulting & education company when it comes to Player Care, offering a unique audit/benchmarking service, mentoring, recruitment and football's favourite course - the 'Certificate in Player Care'. 

We believe that making a positive experience for the athletes & the organisation will lead to a growth in player retention, increased buy-in and long term lower costs when the athletes and their families find their home in your organisation. A positive experience for clubs will eventually lead to increased ROI through player appearances, loyalty from the athletes and a better team spirit.

We believe in honesty, openness, and trustworthiness in everything we do. All our processes expressly forbid our staff from any sort of commissions, kickbacks or freebies for the work they do – a vetted, approved-supplier list will prevent so many of the “cowboy” companies or price gougers that seek to take advantage of athletes these days.

We are championing a new, qualitative, data driven method of tracking athlete happiness & wellbeing that will allow you to measure the effectiveness of your Player Care offering, while also getting the athletes to buy in to and drive the improvement themselves.

Name: The Picklr
Description:
The Picklr is the world's fastest-growing network of premium indoor pickleball courts, offering an unparalleled experience for players of all skill levels. The Picklr provides programs for beginners to pros and a vibrant atmosphere. Membership to The Picklr includes access to all club locations nationwide, free court reservations, four clinics per month, and unlimited participation in leagues, competitive play/events, and tournaments. 

Pickleball is the fastest-growing sport in the country, and The Picklr is meeting the demand for a premium pickleball experience with an inspiring, athlete-driven brand.

Name: Northampton Town Football Club (Official)
Description:
Northampton Town Football Club currently play in Sky Bet League One at Sixfields Stadium, Northampton, NN5 5QA. 

The club's colours have traditionally been claret and white. The club nickname is ‘The Cobblers’, a reference to the town's historical shoe-making industry. 

The main shirt sponsor and principal partner is the University of Northampton, the back of shirt sponsor is Snowdon Homes, our sleeve sponsors are Green Ape Media and Zoo Accounting, our back of short sponsors are LCS. Our kit supplier is PUMA.

The current facilities include the Tollers Solicitors 1897 Suite, the Snowdon Homes Sports Lounge, the Weatherbys Boardroom and the Carrs Bar.

The main switchboard number is: 01604 683700, which is open during normal office hours and on match days. 

Commercial, hospitality and non matchday event questions can be sent by email to commercial@ntfc.co.uk

Media enquiries should be sent to gareth.willsher@ntfc.co.uk or jamie.duncan@ntfc.co.uk

Description: Mercury13 is a multi-club ownership group focused on acquiring controlling stakes in professional women’s football teams across Europe and Latin America.

Name: Centro Sportivo Italiano
Description:
Il Centro Sportivo Italiano é un'Associazione senza scopo di lucro, fondata sul volontariato, che promuove lo sport come momento di educazione, di crescita, di impegno e di aggregazione sociale, ispirandosi alla visione cristiana dell'uomo e della storia nel servizio alle persone e al territorio. 

Tra le più antiche Associazioni di promozione sportiva del nostro Paese, il CSI risponde ad una domanda di sport non solo numerica ma qualificata sul piano culturale, umano e sociale. 

Da sempre i giovani costituiscono il suo principale punto di riferimento, anche se le attività sportive promosse sono rivolte ad ogni fascia di età. 

Educare attraverso lo sport è la missione del Centro Sportivo Italiano. Questo è ormai consolidato nella prassi e nella coscienza dell'Associazione a tutti i livelli. 

Lo sport inteso dal CSI può anche essere uno strumento di prevenzione verso alcune particolari patologie sociali quali la solitudine, le paure, i timori, i dubbi, le devianze dei più giovani. Un'attività sportiva organizzata, continuativa, seria, promossa da educatori, allenatori, arbitri, dirigenti consapevoli del proprio "mandato" educativo, infatti, aiuta i giovani ad andare oltre, ad abbandonare gli egoismi e ad affrontare la strada della condivisione, della sperimentazione del limite, della conoscenza di sé. 

Proprio per questo, il CSI prevede un'articolazione della proposta sportiva nel rispetto delle età e dei bisogni di ciascun atleta, permettendogli in tal modo di scoprire il meglio di sé, di imparare a conoscere il proprio corpo, a valorizzarlo, a stimarlo.

Name: Panathinaikos F.C.
Description:
Founded in Athens in 1908, Panathinaikos F.C. is Greece’s oldest active football club and one of its most iconic sports institutions. With 20 Greek Championships and 20 Greek Cups to our name, we have built a legacy of footballing excellence and national dominance. 

On the international stage, our history includes being the only Greek club to reach a European Cup Final (1971) and participate in the Intercontinental Cup, as well as multiple deep runs in the Champions League and UEFA Cup. 

Beyond success on the pitch, Panathinaikos stands for fair play, unity, and ambition. Our extensive youth development network across Greece continues to identify and nurture the next generation of football talent, while our home, the historic Apostolos Nikolaidis Stadium has been a landmark of Athens football since 1922.

Looking ahead, our mission is to grow through innovation, brand expansion and meaningful partnerships, from digital and mobile media, to merchandising, broadcasting and corporate collaborations. Our goal is simple: to bring pride to our fans and to take our passionate community to the next level.

Follow our page for corporate news, career opportunities, sponsorship updates, merchandising launches and much more. Together, we keep moving forward, always aiming higher.

Name: Bay Area Host Committee
Description:
The Bay Area Host Committee (BAHC) was founded in 2022 with a single mission: to unite the Bay Area through sport by building pride, connecting communities, and re-energizing the entire region. 

With support from the area’s preeminent leaders and professional sports teams – including Bay FC, the Golden State Warriors, the San Francisco 49ers, the San Francisco Giants, the San Jose Earthquakes, the San Jose Sharks, and a new WNBA team – the BAHC is bringing the best to the Bay while celebrating the diversity, innovation, and fandom that make the region unique.

The BAHC is proud to contribute to the Bay Area’s legacy by hosting legendary athletes, world-class sporting events and global fan bases in the region’s most iconic venues — and is ready to show the world what the Bay is made of. 

The BAHC is currently slated to Host the 2025 NBA All-Star, Super Bowl LX, and FIFA World Cup 26.

Name: Science for Sport
Description:
Science for Sport is an online learning resource for all things related to sports science.

Created by sports scientists, for sports scientists.

With so much conflicting, opinion-based information online, we decided it was vital to build a reliable and trustworthy home for everything related to sports performance, and help you stay up-to-date in this rapidly growing industry. We provide educational content from articles, videos, podcasts, infographics, jobs, and a Research Digest for those who want to excel in this field.

Name: Association of Pickleball Players
Description: The Association of Pickleball Players (APP) provides opportunities for pickleball players of all ages and skill levels—professionals, amateurs and recreational—to compete in world-class pickleball events for the opportunity to win prize money and be seen on internationally televised broadcasts. The APP was founded in 2019 and operates the first and only tour fully and officially sanctioned by USA Pickleball. In 2023, it held 19 events across the country and supported five international tournaments. The APP prides itself on developing the next generation of pickleball champions through its APP Next Gen Series, the APP Next Gen National Team and other youth initiatives.

Geführt wie ein Start-up geht der Club einen ungewöhnlichen und innovativen Weg im deutschen Fußball. Name: Opes Italia
Description:
OPES (Organizzazione per l'Educazione allo Sport) is a Sports Promotion Organization recognized by CONI whose mission is to enhance the sporting activity in the life of each individual.

Born in 1980, OPES believes that sport is a gym of life and an extraordinary means to transmit positive values and healthy principles in society, especially in future generations.

For this reason, thanks to the collaboration with Institutions, Schools, Universities, Associations and Public and Private Organizations, it promotes and organizes, without profit, sports, cultural, social promotion, voluntary, training and recreational projects, both local and international.

Premio Città di Roma, Rome Sport Experience, Premio Scirea, #BeAlive, Entra in Squadra! and Sport@Scuola are just a few examples of how OPES tries to achieve its goals, countering the abandonment of sports practice, encouraging social aggregation and inclusion, rewarding positive characters that should be emulated, facilitating the birth of human relationships and encouraging good life practices.

OPES, being registered in the National Register of Social Promotion Associations (APS), has been transformed into a Third Sector Institution.

Furthermore, it is recognized by the M.I.U.R. as a Training Institution of School Staff of all levels and is accredited by the Presidency of the Council of Ministers (Department of Youth and National Civil Service) as a National Institution of 1st Class Civil Service.

Finally, it is the italian component of E.N.G.S.O. (European Non Government Sport Organization) and is engaged with F.I.C.TU.S. (Italian Federation of Cultural, Tourist and Sports Institutions) in the promotion of social and sport tourism.

Name: Widzew Łódź S.A.
Description:
Widzew Łódź to wyjątkowa marka wpisana w historię piłki nożnej. 

Nasza tradycja, sukcesy i tysiące wiernych fantów zobowiązują nas do czegoś więcej niż zawiera definicja klubu sportowego.

Poprzez nasze działania systematycznie budujemy pozycję lidera w obszarach marketingu sportowego, społecznej odpowiedzialności biznesu oraz stanowimy unikalną platformę do nawiązywania relacji biznesowych. 

Opieramy swoją strategię na wartościach takich jak dokładna analiza celów naszego partnera,  dedykowana aktywizacja działań marketingowych, precyzyjny plan komunikacji oraz wzajemna edukacja w ramach której chcemy dzielić się swoją wiedzą, zasobami i narzędziami by skutecznie realizować zamierzone cele.

Dołącz do grona biznesowych przyjaciół Widzewa Łódź jeśli chcesz przekonać się jak wygląda nasz pomysł na nową definicję klubu sportowego.

Bewegen is goed voor individu en samenleving
Iemand die beweegt voelt zich beter, zowel lichamelijk als geestelijk. Vaak is het al voldoende om te wandelen, te spelen of iedere dag gymnastiek te doen. Er zijn ook mensen die trainen voor een topprestatie, of met hun team voor het kampioenschap gaan. Maar voor velen zal het simpelweg het plezier en de voldoening zijn dat het beoefenen van jouw sport je oplevert. Sporten en bewegen is goed voor iedereen. En in veel gevallen doe je dat natuurlijk niet alleen. Je werkt aan je conditie en gezondheid samen met mensen uit je eigen omgeving. Buiten in de natuur, op school, de club, het buurthuis of op een pleintje in de wijk. Leuk, gezond en sociaal.

Name: Club Estudiantes de La Plata
Description:
El Club Estudiantes de La Plata es un club deportivo de Argentina, ubicado en la ciudad de La Plata, provincia de Buenos Aires. Fundado el 4 de agosto de 1905 y su principal actividad es el fútbol. Cuenta con 55.000 socios. Su mayor logro lo obtuvo en 1968, consagrándose Campeón del Mundo al derrotar al Manchester United de Inglaterra en la final de la Copa Intercontinental. 

Es uno de los únicos seis equipos argentinos que han ganado el máximo campeonato de clubes de fútbol a nivel mundial. Disputó las finales de esa copa en 1969, 1970 y 2009, esta última bajo el nuevo formato de Mundial de Clubes de la FIFA. Comenzó su actividad futbolística en 1906, al incorporarse a los torneos de AFA. 

Ha ganado siete campeonatos de Primera División del fútbol argentino y, a nivel internacional, también en cuatro ocasiones la Copa Libertadores de América, por lo que es el tercer conjunto argentino que más veces la ha obtenido. Además de ser la institución que rompió la hegemonía de títulos nacionales de los denominados cinco grandes en 1967, con la obtención del torneo Metropolitano, ganó la Copa Interamericana 1969. 

A nivel nacional volvió a consagrarse de manera consecutiva en el Torneo Metropolitano 1982 y el Torneo Nacional 1983. En 2006 forzó ante Boca la primera final en la historia del formato, venciéndolo en la definición del Torneo Apertura. Cuatro años más tarde volvería a gritar campeón del Apertura 2010.

En 2023, Estudiantes retomaría la senda de los títulos alzando la Copa Argentina, mientras que en 2024 obtuvo la Copa de la Liga Profesional y el Trofeo de Campeones, ambos en finales disputadas ante Vélez Sarsfield.

Además, en su palmarés cuentan dos copas nacionales no regulares, la Copa Escobar 1944 y la Copa de la República 1945; un torneo nacional durante la era amateur, en 1913; y la Copa Río de La Plata 1914. También fue finalista de la Copa Sudamericana 2008.

Description:
ratiopharm ulm is the sporting symbol of an entire region. Since 2006, the club, which was established in 2001, continuously competes in Germany's highest basketball league, the easyCredit Basketball Bundesliga (BBL). The relocation to the ratiopharm arena in December 2011 was the start of the most successful period in the club's history to date: eleven playoff appearances in the BBL and the establishment among the top 30 teams in Europe are testament to this. The season 2016/17 in particular took a record-breaking course with 27 consecutive national league victories - a record still unmatched today. 

With the opening of the OrangeCampus in 2020 the club achieved the next milestone. BBU '01, the club behind the professional team, is home to the country's second-most active basketball athletes and with the arrival at the OrangeCampus this number increased to 1.000 licensed players. To achieve this, the club invested 23 million euros in the youth performance center and ensured that the core values of "pioneering spirit" and " development hunger" are henceforth experienced in Ulm. As a "talent factory", the champions of tomorrow shall be developed while simultaneously the game of basketball is promoted in the region, with close ties to the region and its people.

This was demonstrated by the club's most recent impressive win of the BBL championship in 2023, when ratiopharm ulm and head coach Anton Gavel were able to defeat the highly favored teams from Berlin, Munich and Bonn. Entering the playoffs only as a seventh seed, ratiopharm ulm has thereby made history.

Samen met betrokken partners in o.a. zorg, onderwijs, cultuur, bedrijfsleven en sport stellen we binnen dit programma de kracht van bewegen en een gezonde leefstijl (met sport als katalysator) in de Achterhoek centraal. 

We vormen een dynamisch platform, waar alle regionale en lokale ambities, initiatieven, mensen en middelen bij elkaar komen. Achterhoek in Beweging kent de beweging in de regio en jaagt aan, motiveert, inspireert & verbindt. Samen werken we aan krachtige, levendige kernen, buurten en wijken in de Achterhoek met ruimte voor iedereen.

Name: Precision Football Club
Description: Precision Football Club is a football club based in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, founded in 2023. We are a FIFA registered team playing in the UAE Professional Divisions. Name: Madenat Alamal Football Club
Description:
Madenat Football Club - Academy Program 


At Madenat Football Club Academy, we offer comprehensive training programs to kids of different ages and skill levels.

We have two categories:
 Football School - U6 to U12 
 Youth Teams- U12 to U19

Football School is designed for kids between the ages of 4 and 12 years old, 
and it is the perfect starting point for young children who are interested in learning the basics of football. We believe that a solid foundation is essential for their future development as football players, which is why we focus on individual skill development, as well as understanding the game of football.
Our Football School is also the starting point for our competitive selection process. We identify talented young players who show potential to move on to our Youth Teams and receive specialized training for competitive football.

Our experienced coaches work closely with each child to help them develop their abilities and build confidence on the field. We also create a positive and supportive environment where children can have fun and make new friends while learning about the beautiful game of football.


Our Youth Teams, on the other hand, are designed for players between the ages of 12 and 19 years old, and it is a highly competitive program that focuses on developing individual and team skills, tactical understanding of the game, and mental toughness. Our specialized training for the Youth Teams is geared towards preparing players for competitive football and selection for our First team.

At our Football Academy, we are committed to helping our players achieve their full potential, regardless of their level of experience or skill. Our experienced coaches and staff work tirelessly to create a supportive and positive environment for all our players.

Joining our Football Club Academy children will discover the joy and excitement of the beautiful game of Football!

At Rakuten, we believe that sports and entertainment have the power to bring people together and unite the world by transcending language, cultural, and regional barriers. We walk together with our sports and entertainment partners to build a better future for everyone, empowering individuals, businesses, and societies to realize their dreams.
