Name: Dinamo Bucuresti
Description:
Romanian professional football club based in Bucharest, founded in 1948. 

Dinamo is one of the most successful football clubs in Romania, having won 18 championships, 13 Romanian Cups and 2 Romanian Supercups.

Dinamo is the first Romanian team to reach the European Champions' Cup semifinals in 1983-84.

Name: L'Alqueria del Basket
Description:
Desde 2017, en L'Alqueria del Basket trabajamos para impulsar acciones que fomenten el talento deportivo y humano a través del basket y de la cultura del esfuerzo.

Además, nuestra instalación es la mayor infraestructura de baloncesto del continente, contando con 13 pistas repartidas en 15000m2 que la convierten en un espacio único para disfrutar del mejor ambiente deportivo y organizar todo tipo de actividades. 

Se trata de una instalación adaptable a eventos de todo tipo, desde torneos de baloncesto, stages de pretemporada y trabajos específicos a workshops, congresos y team buildings. Todo lo que puedas imaginar es posible en L'Alqueria del Basket.


From 2017, in L'Alqueria del Basket we work to promote actions that encourage sports and human talent throughout basketball and the Effort Culture.

In addition, our facilities are in the biggest basketball infrastructure of the continent, having 13 courts spread over 15000m2 that make them a unique place to enjoy the best sports environment and to organise all kind of activities.

L'Alqueria del Basket is adaptable to all kind of events, from basketball tournaments, preseason stages and specific works to workshops, congresses and team buildings. All you can imagine is possible in L'Alqueria del Basket.

Name: DGI Storkøbenhavn
Description:
DGI Storkøbenhavn er idrætsforeningernes udviklingshus, og vi arbejder målrettet for at styrke motions- og idrætsfællesskaber i 11 kommuner i hovedstadsområdet; Ballerup, Dragør, Frederiksberg, Gentofte, Gladsaxe, Herlev, Hvidovre, København, Lyngby-Taarbæk, Rødovre og Tårnby.

Sammen med de lokalt forankrede medlemsforeninger udvikler og understøtter vi idræts- og motionsaktiviteter, der tager udgangspunkt i lokale behov og muligheder.

DGI Storkøbenhavn er en nonprofitorganisation, der hjælper foreningerne med at gøre en forskel - for lokalsamfundet og for foreningsidrætten og med "Udvikling i forening" som grundfortælling.

DGI Storkøbenhavn har oplevet en stor medlemsvækst i de seneste fem år og har i dag ca. 634 medlemsforeninger og ca. 297.000 aktivitetsmedlemmer fordelt i de 11 kommuner.

Name: Earth FC
Description:
We’re Earth FC, a campaign to mobilise millions of football fans in Brazil and around the world in the run up to COP 30, unleashing the power of football to protect what we love. 

Join the game to save the game. 

We’re in extra time in the match of our lives against our biggest rival: climate change and the destruction of nature. From international football clubs to grassroots teams , the game we love is under threat. Our grounds are under water. Players struggle with heat exhaustion. Without nature, there’s no football. 

But there’s still time for an epic comeback. In the run up to COP 30 in Brazil in 2025, fans, players, clubs and governments across the world can set rivalries aside and get behind the team that matters most of all. 

The campaign aims to drive positive nature and climate action and is steered by a coalition of football clubs, community groups, civil society, and youth organisations in Brazil and globally, convened by Onda Solidaria and Count Us In.

Name: Team BRIT

Milli Sporculardan oluşan ekibi ile Türkiye dışında; Brezilya, Meksika, İspanya, Fransa, Çek Cumhuriyeti, Portekiz, İngiltere, Almanya, İtalya, Japonya, Macau, Avusturya, İsveç, Yunanistan, Slovakya, Birleşik Arap Emirlikleri, Hırvatistan, Macaristan, Belçika olmak üzere 4 kıtada, 20 farklı ülkede, 32 farklı pistte 300'den fazla yarışta start almıştır. 

Borusan Otomotiv Motorsport, yurt içinde 10 Türkiye Pilotlar Şampiyonluğu ve 4 Takımlar Şampiyonluğu, yurt dışında WTCC (Dünya Şampiyonası) Takımlar beşinciliği, ETCC (Avrupa Kupası) Pilotlar ikinciliğini ve İtalya Endurance Champions Cup Pilotlar Şampiyonluğu elde etmiştir. 

Borusan Otomotiv Motorsport, WTCC ile ülkemizin FIA Dünya Şampiyonası'nı takip eden ilk Türk takımı olduğu gibi, Dubai 24H ile Endurance serilerinde yarışan ilk Türk takımı olarak ülkemizdeki motorsporları takımları arasında ayrıcalıklı bir yere sahiptir.

Name: Académico de Viseu FC, Futebol SAD
Description:
Fundado a 7 de junho de 1914, sob o nome de Sport Clube Académico, o Académico de Viseu celebra, este ano, 111 anos de história.
Ao longo das décadas, o emblema preto e branco transformou-se: foi Académico Futebol Clube, União Académica de Viseu e Clube Académico de Futebol, até que, em 2006, renasceu com a designação que hoje carrega a garra e a tradição da beira alta, Académico de Viseu Futebol Clube.
A criação da sua Sociedade Anónima Desportiva (SAD), a 4 de maio de 2017, marcou um novo capítulo na sua história centenária. Desde então, a Académico de Viseu Futebol Clube, Futebol SAD assumiu a gestão do futebol sénior e das equipas Sub-23, Sub-19 e Sub-18, guiada pela missão de manter o símbolo viseense no coração das competições profissionais, promovendo o desporto, o talento e o nome de Viseu por todo o país.
Com três participações na I Divisão Nacional, o Académico tornou-se uma figura de resistência, ambição e identidade regional.
Hoje, mais do que um clube, o Académico de Viseu é a força de um brasão que honra o passado com respeito e enfrenta o futuro com a mesma paixão inabalável que acendeu a chama em 1914.

Name: LFFP - Ligue Féminine de Football Professionnel
Description:
La création de la Ligue Féminine de Football Professionnel (LFFP), votée lors de l’Assemblée générale 2023, est l’aboutissement du travail mené par la FFF et la commission fédérale du football féminin depuis 2021. 

En s’engageant pour cette professionnalisation, la Fédération souhaite proposer une discipline d’excellence tout en garantissant les droits des joueuses. 

La naissance de la LFFP, le 1er juillet 2024, marque donc un tournant dans l'histoire du football français et illustre une dynamique sans précédent en faveur de la pratique féminine. 

Placée sous l’égide de la FFF, la Ligue, présidée par Jean-Michel Aulas, fonctionne avec sa propre organisation. Andreea Koenig, Présidente du RC Lens féminin depuis 2025, a été nommée vice-présidente par le Comité exécutif de la FFF.

Name: Sports Business Leaders
Description:
Sports Business Leaders (SBL) is the premier community and event series for sports industry professionals, entrepreneurs, and innovators. As the largest and most active sports business community in the Northeast Corridor, SBL is where the future of sports takes shape.

Through our in-person events and growing network, we foster a vibrant ecosystem where bold ideas are shared, strategic connections are made, and the sports industry thrives across sectors like tech, media, NIL, agencies, and athlete development.

We also power SBL Advisory, our consulting arm that helps sportstech startups and emerging brands accelerate growth. Name: FKS Stal Mielec S.A.
Description:
10 kwietnia 1939 z inicjatywy pracowników PZL Mielec powstał Fabryczny Klub Sportowy Stal Mielec. Pierwsze sukcesy piłkarskiej Stali Mielec przypadły na lata 70-te. Zespół dwukrotnie sięgnął po Mistrzostwo Polski (1973 i 1976 rok), raz wywalczył wicemistrzostwo kraju (1975 rok) i trzy raz zdobył trzecie miejsce (1974, 1979, 1982 rok. Jest jednym z dwóch polskich ćwierćfinalistów Pucharu UEFA w historii (1976 rok). 

Rok po zdobyciu pierwszego Mistrzostwa, w 1974 roku zostały rozegrane Mistrzostwa Świata w Niemczech, gdzie reprezentacja Polski zdobyła trzecie miejsce. Co istotne, wśród piłkarzy grających z orzełkiem na piersi znaleźli się mieleccy zawodnicy: Henryk Kasperczak, Jan Domarski i Grzegorz Lato.

Sezon 96/97 obfitował w rywalizację już w drugiej lidze. Na cztery kolejki przed końcem sezonu, 12 czerwca 1997 roku na walnym zgromadzeniu podjęto decyzję o ogłoszeniu upadłości klubu. Mielecka Stal zaczęła odbudowę zespołu od 5 ligi.
W okresie rozgrywania spotkań w III lidze lubelsko-podkarpackiej w sezonie 08/09 znów nie brakowało problemów, pomimo to udało się uratować zespół przed spadkiem. Sezon 12/13 obfitował w kolejny awans. W II lidze biało-niebiescy grali przez 3 lata. 15 maja 2016 przypieczętowali sukces, na który Podkarpacie czekało blisko 20 lat. Pierwsza liga powróciła do Mielca po 19. latach. Największym osiągnięciem zespołu od obfitujących w sukcesy lat 70-tych był awans do Ekstraklasy po 24 latach, który zapisaliśmy w historii 2020 roku.

Drużyna PGE FKS Stal Mielec rozgrywa swoje mecze ligowe na Stadionie Miejskim przy ul. Solskiego 1, który mieści 7000 kibiców. Na stadionie znajduje się także strefa Vip przeznaczona dla 348 osób. Klub posiada swój własny sklep na terenie stadionu, który już wkrótce zostanie znacznie powiększony i zmodernizowany.

Im umfassenden Kompetenzbereich von Sport Austria liegen die Koordination der sportpolitischen Aktivitäten, Erbringung von Serviceleistungen für die Mitglieder, Vertretung der Anliegen des Sports gegenüber staatlichen Einrichtungen, Vertretung des österreichischen Sports in internationalen Gremien, Koordination der Fördereinrichtungen, Fortbildung von Trainer:innen, ehrenamtlichen Funktionär:innen und hauptamtlichen Mitarbeiter:innen im Sport, Entwicklung von Sportprojekten, Begutachtung und Erarbeitung von Gesetzes- und Verordnungsentwürfen, Information über sportrelevante Rechts- und Steuerangelegenheiten, Herausgabe von Publikationen, Erstellung von Dokumentationen und Datenbanken, Event- und Verbandsmarketing und Förderung von Fairness im Sport, insbesondere durch Maßnahmen gegen Doping, Spielmanipulation, Gewalt und Rassismus.

Auf Basis dieser umfassenden Mission ist Sport Austria u.a. in folgenden nationalen und internationalen sportrelevanten Institutionen vertreten:

- Bundes-Sport GmbH (BSG)
- Österr. Olympisches Comité (ÖOC)

Name: Lloyd's Cricket Club
Description:
Lloyd's Cricket has a recorded history dating back to 1922 and over many years its records are sprinkled with some exceptional performances, which is not that surprising when one considers the number of notable County and Test cricketers to have represented the club during that time (including the likes of Sir Gubby Allen, Freddie Brown, Peter May, R.M.V. Robins and Brian Valentine - to name but a few).

In the early years it was a Lloyd's XI that took the field, but in 1974 an official Lloyd's Cricket Club was formed under the guidance and direction of our first Chairman, Bertie Brasier. The club has gone from strength to strength and retains many long-established fixtures against the likes of Sevenoaks Vine and Woodford Wells in their cricket weeks. We have enjoyed rivalry against the Stock Exchange for over 60 years and also play other City institutions, club sides and even the occasional touring side. We currently play about 10 regular season fixtures, but are looking at adding possibly adding one or two more as our playing membership continues to increase. In the more recent years we have also played, with much success, in the City Twenty20 Trophy against the Baltic and Stock Exchanges.
Touring is an important part of any club and LCC is no different: the club's first tour was an undefeated foray to Hong Kong in 1978 and since then Lloyd's has toured on several more occasions (to places as diverse as Paris, South Africa, Singapore, Malaysia, Bermuda, Argentina, Brazil and the USA) with varying degrees of success on the field, but always fine ambassadors off it! Our most recent tour was to South Africa in 2017 and was a great success all round, the side playing with great spirit, winning 4 of the 6 fixtures against strong opposition. The hospitality afforded by our hosts was exceptional and a huge thanks must go to Simon Turner and Sumaridge for their continued generosity and support of Lloyd's Cricket Club.

Der TV Gelnhausen entwickelt sich in den kommenden Jahren zu einem innovativen, digitalen, diversen Verein, der in der Main-Kinzig-Region eine bedeutende Kommunikationsplattform in den Bereichen Sport, Wirtschaft und gesellschaftlicher Verantwortung anbietet. Der TVG spaltet nicht, sondern ist für alle Menschen da, gleich welcher Religion, und hat sich klar gegen Rassismus positioniert. Bei Themen wie Inklusion und Klimaneutralität möchten wir uns zu einem Vorbildverein entwickeln. 

Für diesen Weg sucht der TV Gelnhausen starke Allianzen in einer starken Region, die den Weg des TVG aktiv mitgestalten wollen.

Name: Cork Constitution FC
Description:
Cork Constitution FC was founded by staff of the Cork Constitution Newspaper in 1892, making it one of the oldest rugby clubs in Ireland. Now better known in rugby circles as Cork Con, based in Temple Hill on the south side of Cork City.

Cork Con have won the Munster Senior Cup an impressive 30 times, as well as winning 25 Munster Senior League titles. The club have won the All Ireland League on 6 occasions and the Bateman Cup (All-Ireland) a record 7 times. In addition, in the history of the All Ireland League, Cork Con have never been regulated from 1A.

Cork Con is a club proud of its past and focused on its future. The hallmarks of its success are founded in the people the club attracts and develops and the club believes it has a responsibility to add value to Irish Sport both locally and nationally.

Cricket activities fall under a four tiered structure, namely Professional, Senior, Youth and Associations.

The DP World Lions is the Professional team we own. They play televised matches and are the direct pipeline to the national team. We then have our senior men and women's provincial teams, our youth teams comprising of schools and KFC Mini-Cricket (ages 4-13), and Associations.

A total of 53 Clubs participate in 18 Leagues that are administered by us. Additional associations affiliated with us include; DP World Lions Deaf Cricket, DP World Lions Blind Cricket and Differently-abled Cricket.

Our vision is to create unrivalled passion for cricket in central Gauteng. 

Our mission is to advance and transform cricket in central Gauteng by ensuring winning teams, nurturing club and schools cricket and offering a world-class experience at the DP World Wanderers Stadium.

Name: The Fort
Description:
WELCOME TO THE FORT
South Florida’s premier pickleball destination. It’s where the thrill of the sport meets relaxed social vibes. Dive into competitive games, savor made-from-scratch culinary delights, and sip on crafted beverages. Whether you’re here to challenge your limits or to bask in the social scene, it’s the perfect place for sports enthusiasts, foodies, friends, and corporate events alike. Find your place at The Fort!

PLAY ALL DAY (AND INTO THE NIGHT)
Welcome to The Fort Lauderdale Pickleball Club, your premier destination for pickleball enthusiasts. Featuring 43 professional regulation courts and the world’s first dedicated pickleball stadium, our state-of-the-art facility is perfect for both casual and competitive players. Experience open and reserved play clinics, leagues, tournaments, or simply enjoy watching touring pros train up close. Rain or shine, 14 of our courts are weatherproof, ensuring uninterrupted play. With an on-site pro shop, locker rooms, and a post-play recovery center, we promise an unparalleled pickleball experience.

EAT AND DRINK AT THE WATER'S EDGE
Situated within The Fort’s 10-acre grounds and part of the combined 96-acre park, The Lakehouse offers the taste of authentic flavors as you overlook the tranquil lake or active courts. Grab a signature drink, immerse in beach and watersports, try your hand at bocce, cornhole, golf simulators, table tennis, and the dart room. The Lakehouse isn’t just a venue; it’s where South Florida comes alive.

LIVE AND GIVE LOCALLY
The Fort, founded by devoted long-term Fort Lauderdale locals, is committed to supporting our community. From local charities to youth and senior programs, we’re dedicated to making a difference. Through pickleball and our other social activities, we host charitable events, supply schools with equipment and training, all with a simple goal: Support locals, spread happiness, and connect in the community while giving back to Fort Lauderdale.

Name: Team Sportservice provincie Utrecht
Description:
Team Sportservice houdt zich bezig met de maatschappelijke inzet van sport en bewegen. Nederland heeft een bijzonder rijke sportinfrastructuur, die onder andere bestaat uit bewegingsonderwijs, vrijwilligers, sportaccommodaties en sportverenigingen. Samen vormen ze het Sportkapitaal. Door te adviseren, kennis te delen, te ondersteunen en op te treden als uitvoeringspartner streeft Team Sportservice ernaar dat dit kapitaal zo goed mogelijk wordt benut. Zo zorgen we er bijvoorbeeld voor dat accommodaties vaker en beter worden gebruikt, vakdocenten lichamelijke opvoeding meer kunnen betekenen en de vereniging een échte ontmoetingsplek wordt met aanbod voor veel verschillende mensen. Het resultaat: een gezonde, vitale en sociale samenleving waarin echt iedereen de kracht van sport en bewegen benut!

Team sportservice bestaat uit drie afzonderlijke provinciale stichtingen, die samenwerken als één organisatie: Team Sportservice provincie Utrecht, Team Sportservice Noord-Holland en Team Sportservice Zuid-Holland. Al sinds onze oprichting in 1976 vervult Team sportservice een unieke en verbindende rol. Enerzijds helpen we landelijke ontwikkelingen op het gebied van sport en bewegen lokaal in te bedden. Anderzijds voeden we met onze lokale knowhow de kennisontwikkeling op landelijk niveau. Hiertoe zijn we in staat doordat we in bijna 20 gemeenten met bijna 300 medewerkers de lokale uitvoer van het sportbeleid voor onze rekening nemen. Vanuit deze positie kan Team Sportservice het verschil maken.

Name: Pro Football Support
Description:
At Pro Football Support, we provide a world-class multidisciplinary solution to the professional football industry. We have a group of highly qualified and experienced staff who all share the same driven passion for player development, collaborating to specialise in elite performance. 

Our aim is to achieve sustained peak performance within your sporting environment using cutting-edge programmes and development support mechanisms which are designed to maximise individual and team excellence. 
Our core areas of expertise are provided in more detail below: 

 Sport Psychology
Academy Audit Programmes: Providing greater access for chartered sports psychology in-line with EFL audit recommendations.

Individual Player Development: Bespoke psychological support and interventions for elite football players.

 Performance Consultancy
Football Specific CPD Series: Offering bespoke accredited CPD to optimise staff Multi-Disciplinary Team performance.

University Sports Science Module: We work closely with universities to integrate sports science into an academic setting.

Field-Based Specific Conditioning: Providing tailored field conditioning strategies to maximise training efficiency.

1 to 1 Mentoring Programmes: We mentor individuals to ensure world-class provision of sport science modalities within your club.

 Fitness Testing: 
Since 2013, Pro Football Support has carried out the benchmark fitness testing protocol for the Premier League. 

Providing fitness testing and strength & conditioning support to 35 out of the 44 Category 3 football club academies since 2009.

 Strength & Conditioning: 
Having worked with thousands of young footballers, we aim to develop them from an athletic perspective using our extensive knowledge, experience, and the latest research.

Name: Alcione Milano 1952
Description:
Dal 1952 Alcione Milano è una fra le realtà più dinamiche e significative nel settore del calcio giovanile. Da sempre iscritto alla FIGC e alla Lega Nazionale Dilettanti ha ottenuto, anno dopo anno, vittorie e trofei nelle diverse categorie.
 
Alla Presidenza della società si sono alternati personaggi illustri della città, particolarmente attenti allo sport e al sociale, quali Ernesto Pellegrini, poi presidente dell’Inter e Carlo Tognoli, in seguito sindaco di Milano per molti anni.
 
Protagonista sia a livello tecnico che organizzativo, Alcione Milano è diventato un modello da imitare. Tutte le persone che hanno giocato e frequentato l’Alcione Milano, di padre in figlio, conservano per la vita una grande nostalgia di quel periodo e dello “stile” Alcione.
Uno stile e un modo di essere che si fonda sui valori essenziali dello sport e della vita: buona educazione, correttezza, lealtà, rapporti sinceri con i compagni e con gli avversari, solidarietà.
 
Alcione Milano ha formato un buon numero di calciatori che sono approdati alla Serie A (di recente Lorenzo Dickmann alla Spal e Nicolò Rovella al Genoa e da qui alla Juventus, in passato Giuseppe Dossena e Andrea Caracciolo sono tra i più noti) e alla Nazionale. Altri – più numerosi – giocano fra i semiprofessionisti, in Eccellenza, Serie D e Serie C.
Attualmente la società milita in Serie D nel girone A.

Name: Košarkaški klub Dinamo Zagreb
Description:
Košarkaški klub Dinamo iz Zagreba trenutno se natječe u Prvoj hrvatskoj košarkaškoj ligi.

Vlasnici kluba su njegovi članovi, a snažnu podršku klubu pružaju navijači NK Dinama.

Konstantan napredak kluba rezultat je moderne organizacije, ambiciozne uprave te rada koji se temelji na stručnosti, uz motivirane i predane igrače. Ovi sportski uspjesi prerasli su okvire kvartovskog sporta, a ambicije su znatno veće. Stručno vodstvo kluba, uz potporu vjernih navijača Bad Blue Boysa, koji su u KK Rudešu prepoznali pravi zagrebački duh, spremno je i odlučno krenuti prema novim pobjedama.

KK Dinamo jedino je ime u Zagrebu koje nosi težinu jednog novog i ambicioznog košarkaškog programa. S promjenom imena kluba došlo je i do promjene na mjestu predsjednika. Dugogodišnjeg predsjednika Mladena Miholića zamijenio je Marijan Pojatina, koji će odlučno povesti klub prema novim uspjesima. Na skupštini kluba održanoj 27. travnja 2020. godine donesena je odluka o promjeni imena kluba u KK Dinamo Zagreb, a klub je službeno upisan u registar udruga 13. svibnja 2020. godine.

Name: Affinity Esports
Description: Founded in 2021, Affinity Esports is Connecticut’s premier organization for healthier gaming, dedicated to creating safe spaces that deliver holistic experiences for all gamers. By focusing on structured programming that promotes accessibility, community education, and inclusion, they elevate the long-term benefits of esports. Their engaging community of gamers and advocates is committed to balancing wellness, education, mentality, competition, and socialization, fostering powerful outcomes such as improved social and emotional skills, problem solving, career viability, and academic performance. Affinity Esports has been recognized as Partner of the Year by The Malcolm Baldrige School of Business at Post University and for Esports Excellence by the*gamehers for their contributions to the gaming industry.

Name: Neptune - Gagner Avec Parkinson
Description:
Le projet "Neptune- Gagner avec Parkinson" est un projet sportif d’envergure : participer à l’Ocean Globe Race, une course autour du monde avec escales, dans l’esprit de la célèbre Whitbread 1973, à bord du mythique bateau Neptune, qui a couru la deuxième édition de cette course en 1977. 
Neptune, Dieu de la mer, inspirera l’équipage Morbihannais intergénérationnel et pluridisciplinaire, dont la devise est « Qui ose vivra » !
En effet à son bord, la Team Neptune intègre Bertrand Delhom, un marin atteint par la maladie de Parkinson, une première dans l'histoire de la course au large. 

A travers cette aventure, Bertrand et la team Neptune ont pour ambition de donner de l’espoir aux 7 millions malades de Parkinson et de changer le regard sur cette maladie.

Name: Dubai International Marine Club
Description:
Dubai International Marine Club is considered one of the prominent marine sports clubs in the Emirate of Dubai, United Arab Emirates. We are known for our reputation and rich history in this field, as we were established in 1988 and became a central hub for water sports enthusiasts and professionals. We organise and host a variety of local, national, and international races and championships that cater to the needs of all segments of society and athletes. We provide a platform for individuals to showcase their talents, skills, and passion for marine sports, ranging from traditional and modern sailing to powerboats, jet skis, and fishing.

We’ve gained fame locally and internationally through hosting events such as Dubai International Boat Show, Powerboat World Championships, Jet Skis World Championships, among others. Our commitment to excellence in organising and hosting water sports events has been recognised by the Union Internationale Motonautique (UIM), which awarded us the title of the best organiser of the Powerboat World Championships.

We are also proud of our prestigious team, Victory Team, with an outstanding record in international powerboat championships. With a history spanning over three decades, Victory Team has achieved an impressive record, winning 26 world championships and over 600 podium finishes. These achievements not only bring honor to us but also inspire generations of racers.

The unwavering dedication of Victory Team to innovation and performance has led to the development of racing boats and commercial marine vessels that prioritise safety and reliability over speed. With our slogan " Leadership Legacy Sailing Towards Excellence," we continue to lead the way in the marine sports industry, setting new standards of excellence and inspiring future generations of marine sports enthusiasts.

Inspired by a passion for sport and a desire to help women advance in the industry, empowHERed provides mentorship and resources aimed at accelerating career progress, while promoting self-care, and fostering deeper relationships.

Through our three pillars of education, exposure, and empowHERment, we offer one-on-one mentorship, a Career Pipeline featuring partners from across the sports industry, webinars and networking events with industry professionals, career services, and mental health resources all aimed at helping women advance in a male-dominated industry.

Description:
Hello, we are AGUDAK!

AGUDAK was established as a Mountaineering and Nature Sports Society affiliated with AGU Sports Club in October 2023. In July 2024, it separated from AGU Sports Club and became an independent student social club, taking the name Natural Disaster & Search and Rescue Club. 

Committed to the synergy of sports and academic life, our vision is to bring successful search and rescue volunteers to our country! We provide first aid training, humanitarian aid volunteer training, search and rescue and natural disaster awareness training, as well as basic fire extinguishing training and mountaineering training to prepare us for challenging conditions. Along with our vision of search and rescue, we also have sub-branches such as orienteering, camping and hiking, to be adhered to the roots of the club. Stay tuned to witness the growth of our club every day!

Name: Team Amani
Federação Portuguesa de Voleibol
Description:
Federação Portuguesa de Voleibol. Fundada em abril, de 1947, somos uma Instituição de Utilidade Pública Desportiva, dedicada à promoção da prática do Voleibol e à organização e gestão da modalidade em Portugal.

Com mais de 75 anos de experiência, o nosso objetivo primário e último é dignificar o Voleibol. 

Co-fundadora da Federação Internacional de Voleibol (FIVB) e filiada na Confederação Europeia de Voleibol (CEV), no Comité Olímpico de Portugal (COP) e Comité Paralímpico de Portugal (CPP), destacamo-nos na coordenação de eventos desportivos, nomeadamente campeonatos de voleibol nacionais e internacionais (Indoor e Praia).

A forte imagem projetada pelo Voleibol português é alicerçada no crescimento da modalidade: com mais de 60 000 atletas federados, somos a segunda modalidade com mais atletas em Portugal. O Voleibol está visivelmente presente no desenvolvimento pessoal e social dos jovens desportistas em Portugal, havendo um foco nas equipas de Formação e no Desporto Escolar.
.
Portuguese Volleyball Federation. Founded in April 1947, we are a Public Utility Sports Institution, dedicated to promoting the practice of Volleyball and organizing and managing the sport in Portugal.

With more than 75 years of experience, our ultimate goal is to dignify Volleyball.

Co-founder of the International Volleyball Federation (FIVB) and affiliated with the European Volleyball Confederation (CEV), the Portuguese Olympic Committee (COP) and the Portuguese Paralympic Committee (CPP), we stand out in the coordination of sporting events, namely national and international Volleyball Championships (Indoor and Beach).

The strong image projected by Portuguese Volleyball is based on the growth of the sport: with more than 60,000 federated athletes, we are the second sport with the most athletes in Portugal. Volleyball is visibly present in the personal and social development of young athletes.

Description:

Dal 2019 trasformiamo il calcio in uno strumento concreto di inclusione: una squadra composta da persone con disabilità, monitori esperti, educatori e volontari, impegnata a promuovere equità e partecipazione attraverso lo sport.

Name: Ultimate Coach
Description:
En Ultimate Coach, llevamos la gestión de equipos de fútbol al siguiente nivel, proporcionando una plataforma integral que ahorra tiempo y maximiza la eficiencia de entrenadores y coordinadores. Diseñada para ser intuitiva y flexible, UC se adapta a las necesidades específicas de cada técnico, sin imponer metodologías de trabajo.

•Diseño de tareas y sesiones: Permite a los entrenadores crear entrenamientos personalizados, eligiendo materiales, posicionándolos en el campo, cambiando colores e incluyendo objetivos. Controlando la asistencia y rendimiento de los jugadores.

•Análisis de partidos y rendimiento: Recopila eventos clave de los partidos y proporciona análisis detallados, incluyendo estadísticas de carga, lesiones y rendimiento de cada jugador.

•Gestión de lesiones y tratamientos: En colaboración con el equipo médico, controla las lesiones, tratamientos y fechas de recuperación de los jugadores.

•Para todos los dispositivos: Compatible con móviles, tablets y ordenadores, con información disponible en tiempo real y capacidad de trabajar sin conexión a internet.

•Información unificada para coordinadores: Registra y compara datos de jugadores, facilitando el seguimiento del rendimiento y la actividad del club. Diseña y comparte tareas para establecer una metodología común.

Beneficios
•Para entrenadores: Proporciona recursos, inspiración y ahorra tiempo en la planificación y análisis de entrenamientos y partidos.

•Para coordinadores: Ofrece una visión unificada de la información del equipo, facilitando el seguimiento y el análisis detallado.

•Para clubes: Promueve la profesionalización y el uso de un lenguaje común, mejorando la coherencia y la eficacia en todos los niveles del club.

Ultimate Coach es la solución ideal para aquellos que buscan optimizar la gestión de sus equipos de fútbol, con una plataforma fácil de usar que se adapta a las necesidades de cada usuario. Únete a nosotros y descubre cómo podemos ayudarte a llevar tu equipo o club al éxito.

Name: TOP Sports
Description:
TOP Sports was founded to create a better youth sports model by focusing on player experience, long-term development, and an efficient, manageable schedule that encourages multi-sport play. We believe that multi-sport play, over time, is essential to creating a well-rounded and successful athlete, and as kids mature and grow, we believe the most versatile athletes become the best players in each sport. 

What started as a passion project in 2017 has now grown into the leading multi-sport organization in Ontario with thousands of participants annually. We currently operate TOP Hockey Club, TOP Soccer Club, and TOP Lacrosse Club with competitive and recreational programs, as well as TOP Sports Camps featuring a comprehensive summer camp and holiday camp program.

From day one, our vision has been to become the gold standard for youth sports organizations by offering high-quality, values-based programming that changes the culture of youth sports.

Der Coburger Weg als unsere Vereinsphilosophie beschreibt die nachhaltige Förderung und Entwicklung unserer Jugendspieler. Unser Anliegen ist es ganzheitliche Werte zu vermitteln und neben dem Sport auch die Persönlichkeitsentwicklung unseres Nachwuchses zu stärken.

Name: Stallion Sports Academy Dubai
Description:
A sports academy, in general, is an institution or organization dedicated to providing professional training and coaching in various sports disciplines. These academies aim to nurture and develop young talents while also catering to enthusiasts of all ages who wish to improve their skills and fitness levels. They often have experienced coaches, state-of-the-art facilities, and structured training programs.

Given that Dubai is known for its sports culture and world-class facilities, it is not surprising to find various sports academies catering to different sports. The Stallion Sports Academy, if it exists, could potentially offer training in popular sports such as football (soccer), tennis, cricket, basketball, swimming, athletics, and more.

Key features you might expect from a sports academy in Dubai:

Professional Coaching: Trained and experienced coaches who can provide individual attention and specialized training for athletes at different skill levels.

State-of-the-art Facilities: Access to high-quality sports facilities, such as well-maintained grounds, courts, swimming pools, and fitness centers.

Comprehensive Training Programs: Tailored programs designed to improve technical skills, physical fitness, tactical knowledge, and mental conditioning.

Youth Development: A focus on nurturing young talents and providing a pathway for them to pursue sports professionally, if desired.

Recreational Programs: In addition to competitive training, there might be recreational programs for hobbyists and fitness enthusiasts who wish to engage in sports for fun and health benefits.

Regular Competitions: Opportunities to participate in local and regional competitions to test and showcase the skills learned during training.

Keep in mind that this information is based on general sports academy concepts and practices. To get specific details about the Stallion Sports Academy in Dubai, I recommend conducting an online search or contacting local sports organizations for the

Name: Samiksha Sports Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Are you an athlete? Do you feel your breathing gets heavy before a big match or your legs feel stiff?

A coach? Does you player ever miss shots in a match that he or she consistently makes in your coaching sessions or practice games? 

As a parent, do you feel your child feels the pressure to win against lower ranked opponents or gets nervous before playing a higher ranked opponent? 

Just a spectator passionate about sport? Have you seen your favourite team or athlete crumble under pressure?

For most of us, these descriptions will sound familiar. Minds need to be trained to produce champions! Samiksha is India's first sport psychology consultancy where we help athletes & teams get mentally tough by developing self belief, self esteem, and self confidence which are all very important for excelling in sport & life. 

To find more information on SAMIKSHA visit us @ www.samiksha.co

Name: FernGP
Description:
24 x Championship winners, empowering #WomeninMotorsport | 2025 Drives Available

FernGP’s mission is driven by accuracy and passion that opens doors and overcomes boundaries that lead to achieving success. Our goal is to race internationally, to be the entry point for the future of female racing. We work as one to become the most professional, diverse and effective team in the paddocks.

We aspire to create a lasting legacy in Motorsport, creating the first all-female racing team. Beginning with single seaters, we have created a ‘driver programme’ to allow women to climb the motorsport ladder beginning with karting, moving to Formula Fords and further to F3. Effectively, we will be a feeder series to higher formulas.

Gender diversity in Motorsport is already being talked about, though there is still a lot that needs to be done. FernGP will provide the next public-facing female role models to show all young girls that this is something that is possible from any background.

By 2024 we will have created our sister team, FernGP The Female Side, an all female racing team. Future partnerships will allow us to continue developing inexperienced female motorsport enthusiasts into highly trained, skilled personnel and drivers.

Description:

Description:
The Australian Racecourse Managers Association was formed at the Australian Racecourse Managers Conference in Tasmania in August, 2004. 

Delegates to the conference unanimously supported the proposal as an important milestone in the industry quest for improvements in race and training track construction, management and presentation throughout the nation. 

The purposes of the ARMA are:  

- to promote and advance best practice in racecourse management 
- to encourage the highest standards of racecourse management efficiency and quality 
- to assist racecourse managers in the provision of race and training tracks of the highest standard 
- to conduct conferences and forums for communication and education on racecourse management 
- to facilitate research and development on all matters relevant to racecourse management 
- to compile data on racecourse management practices and effects 
- to disseminate relevant information to members 
- to represent racecourse managers, as required, on racing industry matters.

We’re proud to grow grassroots rugby on the Suffolk coast, supported by a network of volunteers, sponsors, and community partners. Our ethos centres on inclusivity, family spirit, and the core TREDS values of teamwork, respect, enjoyment, discipline, and sportsmanship.

We believe that multi-sport play, over time, is essential to creating a well-rounded and successful athlete, and as kids mature and grow, we believe the most versatile athletes become the best players in each sport. 

What started as a passion project in 2017 has now grown into the leading multi-sport organization in Ontario with thousands of participants annually. We currently operate TOP Hockey Club, TOP Soccer Club, and TOP Lacrosse Club with competitive and recreational programs, as well as TOP Sports Camps featuring a comprehensive summer camp and holiday camp program.

From day one, our vision has been to become the gold standard for youth sports organizations by offering high-quality, values-based programming that changes the culture of youth sports.

We are Saltire Thistle, Glasgow's Inclusive Football Club. 

Formed in 2010, the club was created to provide a safe space for members of the LGBTQIA+ community to participate in football. Inclusivity is not just a buzzword. it’s an integral part of our identity.

Many members join Saltire Thistle after a period of not being involved in sports, which can often be due to a lack of belonging. Saltire Thistle aims to create an environment where individuals can grow and become more comfortable with themselves, without changing who they are. 

On and off the park, we strive to create a welcoming, supportive and fun environment which creates impactful change including friendships and championing inclusivity in football. 

If you are interested in finding out more or joining the club, please don't hesitate to get in touch. You can email us on saltirethistlefc@gmail.com or reach out to us on our social media platforms which you will find on our LinkTree here - https://linktr.ee/saltirethistlefc

Name: UCLA Men's Rugby
Description:
UCLA Rugby has been a brotherhood since 1934. All players of the past, present, and future have a common bond of pride and passion for representing a global icon of academic and athletic excellence. With the four letters of UCLA emblazoned on your chest, you cross the chalk line onto the pitch you know you are backed not only by your fellow brothers but all the brothers throughout the rich history of the program as well.

Representing UCLA is a high honor. Several Bruin alumni have represented the United States in international competitions as members of the US Eagles National Rugby Team. In fact, UCLA Rugby has deep roots in the United States Rugby Football Union and was part of the very foundation of USA Rugby when it was founded in 1975. Famed UCLA Coach Dennis Storer was tabbed to be the US Eagles' first Head Coach in its history. He lead his team into battle against Australia which included legendary Bruin second-row warrior Craig Sweeney (US Eagles second Captain). Collectively, UCLA ruggers have earned over 100 caps in matches against the Worlds greatest teams including the New Zealand All Blacks, Australian Wallabies, South African Springboks, British Lions, and many, many more.

Our unwritten rules have been passed down from class to class for the last nine decades.  Our culture goes beyond our championship victories on the pitch.  It is bigger than our glory of the US Eagles or being selected as a Collegiate All American.  UCLA Rugby culture comes from an understanding that there are two types of people in the world; those that play rugby and everyone else. That knowledge fuels the deep respect we have for our rugby brothers, our opponents, and the game itself that lasts a lifetime. This mentality also drives one of the deepest elements of our culture which is the unwavering, unbreakable loyalty we have for each other. UCLA Rugby culture is Family.

Ici, la pratique du ski de compétition fait partie de la nature des choses.
On skie, on organise, on entraîne, on inculque les valeurs du sports avec la même ferveur que les pionniers qui ont créé en 1930 le Ski Club de la Vallée de Saint-Bon avant qu’il ne devienne le Club des Sports de Courchevel en 1948.

Association de loi 1901, le Club des Sports regroupe aujourd’hui 945 licenciés dont 208 enfants compétiteurs, répartis dans 4 sections (ski alpin, saut à ski, ski de fond, biathlon), avec six entraîneurs à l’année et dix saisonniers.
Une “grosse machine”, qui forme de futurs champions, membres des équipes de France, mais aussi, permet à des jeunes de s’orienter vers la profession de moniteur de ski ou de pisteur-secouriste.

Name: Newton Abbot Rugby Club
Description:
The Official Linkedin account of the Newton Abbot All Whites. One Community fiercely passionate about rugby and inclusive to all in the heart of Devon.

For Newton Abbot Rugby Club, rugby isn’t just a game – it’s the lifeblood of our community.

Founded in 1873, our club is one of the oldest in Devon. Today, Newton Abbot Rugby Club boasts two senior men’s teams, our very own thriving junior section and an league-winning women’s team. Boasting a two fully stocked bar and large marquee, we regularly host matches and community events on our grounds, where guests have the opportunity to enjoy the many facilities our club has to offer in the beautiful Devon countryside. 

As a fixture within our community, Newton Abbot Rugby Club is dedicated to creating an inclusive and welcoming sporting environment where everyone can come along and join in, regardless of previous experience or playing ability. Our club has been built on the core values that make rugby great – integrity, discipline, sportsmanship, respect and community. As a result, every activity and event hosted on our grounds is governed by the principles of equal opportunity. 

More than a century after our club was first established, Newton Abbot Rugby Club remains committed to celebrating the spirit of the South West, meeting the needs of our diverse community and ensuring our club is a great place to enjoy rugby.

Want to book your own Event in the Tent? Contact Us Now Clubhouse@narfc.co.uk!

#OneClub #OneCommunity

Name: BASS ANGLER INC
Description:
Bass Angler Inc.
 BAM Trail | Bass Angler Magazine

At Bass Angler Inc., we are committed to elevating the sport of bass fishing through the BAM Trail, an exclusive West Coast bass fishing tournament circuit. The BAM Trail offers anglers elite competition with multiple opportunities to showcase their skills, build their careers, and compete on professional platforms.

With BAM Trail’s extensive media reach, we provide more visibility for anglers than any other Western circuit. Our robust media presence spans Facebook (140K followers), YouTube (70K subscribers), and Instagram (50K followers), delivering unmatched exposure for anglers, sponsors, and partners. These platforms generate significant engagement, making the BAM Trail one of the most powerful and influential bass fishing circuits in the industry.

In addition to the BAM Trail, Bass Angler Inc. publishes Bass Angler Magazine (BAM), a quarterly print and digital publication designed to help anglers improve their fishing skills. Each issue features expert tips, techniques, and gear recommendations from top anglers, all geared toward enhancing the bass fishing experience.

Whether through the BAM Trail's competitive platform or our vast media network, Bass Angler Inc. provides the resources, knowledge, and visibility every bass angler needs to thrive.

Description: The Helvetic Guards are Switzerland's first and only professional American Football team. They'll begin play in the European League of Football (ELF) in 2023 and are looking forward to offering Swiss players, coaches, fans, media and partners a crack at football at the highest possible level in Europe while growing and promoting the game.

Name: Climate Classic Poland
Description:
The Climate Classic rally, initiated by the Dutch foundation Cycling 4 Climate, aims to raise awareness of climate change and mobilise rally participants, partners and observers to reduce the negative impact of their daily activities on the environment. Each participant estimates his or her carbon footprint and makes an honourable pledge to reduce it sustainably. The motto of the rallies is: "TIME IS OUR ONLY CHALLENGE!". 

On 28 May 2023, the first Polish edition of the Climate Classic cycling rally will take place. Green-hearted cyclists will ride along the Vistula Żuławy, with a start and finish in Gdańsk. The long distance to be covered in one day (100 or 250 km to choose from) is a metaphor for the collective effort needed to slow down climate change.

Name: Sports Data Analytics
Description:
SDA (Sports Data Analytics) is a leading and most trusted name in Sports Machine Learning, Data Management and Data Tagging 
We design and develop - 
1. Sports APIs
2. Sports Algorithms
3. Sports Customized Software
4. Sports Data Tagging Software

We also provide sports data tagging services in many sports, like:
1. Ice Hockey
2. Football
3. Basketball
4. Lawn Tennis
5. Lacrosse
6. Cricket
7. Basketball

One second can change anything, one second determines winning or losing. So, each second is important, more so in something as crucial as sports. That’s the idea on which services of our company have been built. 

We work closely with Coaches, Clubs, Managers, Colleges, High Schools, Sports Data Scientists to provide them the required software or data they need. We understand the how commercially important is the sports data.
To identify the strength and weakness of the player, to design the team strategy, to engage fans, to design the sports software, to design sports AIs, Sports Data plays an important role and we are masters in this task. 

Whether you want to build a robust Sports API or any sports software or want hundreds of live or recorded sports matches to be tagged, our team of sports data scientists along with data taggers, SDA (Sports Data Analytics) is the name you can rely upon.

Sports Data Analytics (SDA) provides comprehensive sports data management services and an array of hosted solutions derived from statistical analysis by revered sports data scientists that work tirelessly round the clock, ensuring accuracy of work for sports analysts and sports data consultants.

Name: Grassboots
Description:
Grassboots is an online marketplace platform for pre-loved sportswear and equipment, school uniform, musical instruments, books and more. 

If you're a school, university, community club, or grassroots music venue, you can quickly and easily establish an online ‘preloved marketplace’ on Grassboots. Registration is quick and simple. Once an organisation registers a marketplace they can invite their staff, volunteers, players, parents and guardians to list anything related to learning or playing. 

Communities can list anything they no longer need, or their children have outgrown. There will always be another person who does need or want those items.

By selling goods on Grassboots, communities do four amazing things:
1. Generate funds for their community 
2. Give unused items a second life
3. Keep quality goods away from landfill
4. Help make cost of participation affordable

Name: EV Vienna Capitals
Description:
Die Vienna Capitals - von ihren Fans "Caps" getauft - wurden im Jahr 2001 gegründet. Schon in der Saison 2004/2005 holte das junge Team aus Wien den ersten Meistertitel. 2017 konnte dieser Erfolg wiederholt werden. 

Heute sind die Caps nicht nur eine der stärksten Mannschaften der win2day ICE Hockey League - sie schafften es vor allem, sich in die Herzen der Österreicher und insbesondere der Wiener zu spielen und zählen damit zu den populärsten Club in Österreich!

Name: Lloyd's Yacht Club
Description:
Lloyd’s Yacht Club (LLYC) began much like Lloyd’s itself, with five individual members of Lloyd’s sailing an informal race to Cherbourg, with the idea of forming a club being discussed over dinner on their arrival.

In 1938, the club was officially formed, with membership restricted to Members of Lloyd’s and those who had a ticket to work in the room.

Today, club members come from across the financial services industries, many of whom join the club in order to build contacts within the community and to have fun on the water during club weekends on Lutine - food and drink is still prevalent during these weekends!

 In addition to sailing Lutine, Club membership offers many events, including the Lineslip regatta, Lutine Bell race, Finn trophy, Fastnet, Swan Europeans and many more.  The monthly newsletter provides information about these and social events such as the monthly drinks at the Little Ship Club, the Senior Members lunch and the Annual Dinner Dance.  Other benefits are available within the membership section.

If you are interested in becoming a member then see the membership section on the web-site; https://lloydsyachtclub.com/club-membership/

Description:
QUEER MOMENTS ist eine Initiative des gemeinnützigen Vereins Queer Dance im Gemeindebau. Ziel ist es, den Begriff „queer“ nicht mehr mit „ausgrenzend anders“ sondern mit „individuell und inklusiv anders“ zu besetzen. Die Vision des Vereins lautet: Jeder Mensch hat das Recht, seine Individualität zu leben und zu genießen – QUEER MOMENTS feiert diese Freiheit der Gesellschaft. QUEER MOMENTS soll als Einladung zum gesellschaftlichen Diskurs gesehen werden, um für alle Menschen eine barrierefreie Gesellschaft zu ermöglichen.

Unter dem Dach von „QUEER MOMENTS“ haben bereits mehrere vielbeachtete Events stattgefunden – darunter der 1. QUEER BALL im Schloss Neugebäude, der die Menschen generationenübergreifend und über alle Bezirksgrenzen hinweg zum gesellschaftlichen Diskurs eingeladen hat. Neben inklusiven Events wie dem QUEER BALL stehen unter dem Titel „Queer Dance im Wiener Gemeindebau“ auch Tanzveranstaltungen in den Wiener Randbezirken, medienwirksame Kunstfotoausstellungen und vielbeachtete Sensibilisierungsmaßnahmen auf dem Programm. Damit will die Initiative auf unsichtbare gesellschaftliche Barrieren in unserer Gesellschaft hinweisen und ein neues Verständnis für ein wertschätzendes Miteinander schaffen.

From the App, you can create a team and be the Captain and collect team from your friends and requests to join your team or request to join an existing team

Name: Federazione Pugilistica Italiana
Description:
1. La Federazione Pugilistica Italiana (F.P.I.), fondata nel 1916, è associazione senza fine di lucro con personalità giuridica di diritto privato ai sensi del Decreto Legislativo 23 luglio 1999 n. 242 e successive modificazioni e integrazioni. Essa è riconosciuta, ai fini sportivi, dal Consiglio Nazionale del C.O.N.I. ed è costituita dalle Associazioni e Società che praticano il pugilato, la cui domanda sia stata accettata dal Consiglio Federale. 
2. La F.P.I. è una associazione federata al C.O.N.I. ed affiliata all’International Boxing Association (AIBA). Alla F.P.I. possono aderire le seguenti persone fisiche tesserate per le Federazione: atleti, procuratori degli atleti, medici sportivi, tecnici sportivi, dirigenti federali, ufficiali di gara la cui domanda di tesseramento sia stata accettata nei termini regolamentari. 
3. La F.P.I. è autorizzata in via esclusiva a svolgere in Italia l’attività sportiva del pugilato agonistico e amatoriale, in armonia con le deliberazioni del C.I.O. e del C.O.N.I., anche in considerazione della rilevanza pubblicistica di specifici aspetti di tale attività e a rappresentarlo in ambito internazionale. La F.P.I. svolge, l’attività sportiva in armonia ed osservanza dei regolamenti, e delle deliberazioni e degli indirizzi delle Federazioni internazionali. La FPI è responsabile dell’attività pugilistica in Italia, ed in particolare del Settore AIBA Open Boxing (AOB) e del Settore AIBA Pro Boxing (APB), purché non siano in contrasto con le deliberazioni e gli indirizzi del C.I.O. e del C.O.N.I. 4. La F.P.I. nell’ambito dell’ordinamento sportivo gode di autonomia tecnica, organizzativa e gestionale, sotto la vigilanza del C.O.N.I.. 
5. La F.P.I. è retta sui principi di libera e democratica partecipazione alla attività sportiva in condizioni di uguaglianza e di pari opportunità, in armonia con l’ordinamento sportivo nazionale e internazionale.

Name: Rugby Legends Podcast
Description:
Welcome to Rugby Legends – the podcast that brings you insight and advice from international players and coaches for young rugby players who are keen to learn and get better. I’m Arthur Dickins, I’m 13 years old and a keen rugby player. In each episode, I sit down with amazing current and former stars of rugby to hear about their journey from first picking up a rugby ball to playing and coaching at the highest level.
 
I get to ask them the kinds of questions that my fellow age-grade rugby players (and their coaches!) want to ask, such as: 

What made you pick rugby over other sports?
How did you know you were good enough to go professional? 
What’s the best advice you received from a coach? 
How do you deal with nerves before a big game? 
How do you bounce back from a bad game? 
And lots more!
 
If you are a young player such as me, a coach of young players, or you simply love rugby, I think you’ll really enjoy hearing the wisdom, knowledge and experience shared by these inspiring legends of the game.

Contact Us:

Name: Vedanta Zinc Football & Sports Foundation
Description:
Vedanta Zinc Football & Sports Foundation, an initiative of Hindustan Zinc, is a Section-8 company that aims to bring a transformative change in the country's sporting ecosystem.

The flagship CSR programme of Vedanta Zinc Football & Sports Foundation, 'Zinc Football' is a grassroots football initiative established in 2017 to positively impact the football landscape across multiple levels by leveraging the power of the most loved sport in the world combined with quality education as a tool for social development.

At the heart of the initiative is a state-of-the-art residential academy equipped with the latest advancements in sports science and technology. A technology-based player performance analysis centre has also been set up that enables coaches to impart training that is at par with global standards. Currently, 60 young and aspiring footballers across age groups are part of the academy, which also has a DAV school within its campus, and all the expenses related to their education, training, diet and boarding are taken care of by the company.

Zinc Football believes that “every child should have an opportunity to play”. This philosophy led to the setting up of community football schools - Zinc Football Schools, in Hindustan Zinc operational areas where over 350 children receive training on a weekly basis by AIFF-certified coaches. 

Hindustan Zinc firmly believes that any sport has the power to bring communities together and drive positive change in society, and is proud to be playing its part in creating a brighter future for the next generation.

Name: Clube Atlético Aramaçan
Description:
Clube Atlético Aramaçan, fundado em 6 de agosto de 1930, é reconhecido como um dos mais tradicionais clubes da Região do ABCD. Ao longo dos anos, o Aramaçan tem proporcionado momentos de lazer, diversão e prática esportiva para seus associados e a comunidade em geral.

Com uma vasta gama de opções, o clube oferece mais de 37 modalidades esportivas e culturais, atendendo aos interesses e preferências de pessoas de todas as idades. Se você é um entusiasta do esporte, encontrará diversas opções, desde os tradicionais como futebol, tênis e natação, até esportes de raquete, como squash e tamboréu. Além disso, há espaço para artes marciais, academia de ginástica, pista de atletismo e muito mais.

Além das atividades esportivas, o Aramaçan conta com mais de 30 espaços de lazer, onde os associados podem desfrutar de momentos relaxantes e divertidos. O balneário com suas piscinas, o parque infantil, as quadras de praia, os salões para locação e o teatro são apenas algumas das opções disponíveis para garantir o entretenimento e a diversão de todos.

O clube está constantemente buscando inovação e aprimoramento, mantendo-se atualizado com as demandas e tendências do mundo esportivo e cultural. Com uma equipe dedicada e instalações de qualidade, o Aramaçan oferece um ambiente acolhedor e propício para a prática esportiva, o convívio social e o desenvolvimento pessoal.

Seja para praticar esportes, desfrutar de momentos de lazer em família ou participar de eventos e atividades culturais, o Clube Atlético Aramaçan é um local que proporciona bem-estar, diversão e integração para seus associados e visitantes. Sua tradição, variedade de modalidades e espaços de lazer o tornam uma referência na região, consolidando sua posição como um dos clubes mais estimados e queridos do ABCD.

Name: BAAR - Bassin Annecy Aravis Rugby
Description:
Le BAAR, BASSIN ANNECY ARAVIS RUGBY est né en 2018 du rapprochement de 3 clubs fondateurs : US Annecy Rugby / RC Annecy-le-vieux / RC Thônes Aravis

Né autour d’effectifs hétérogènes et d’une volonté d’union pour voir grand, le BAAR s’est construit avec deux axes forts :
- La cohésion avec les valeurs de partage, solidarité, respect et humilité. 
- L’ambition avec l’objectif de permettre à chacun de jouer son meilleur rugby, mieux former nos jeunes, rassembler et mutualiser les moyens.

Le rassemblement BAAR est précurseur en France et devient un exemple souvent cité de réussite dans le cercle du rugby amateur.

Le rugby pour tous comme vecteur d’émancipation, c’est l’ADN du BAAR :  Trouver du plaisir autour de valeurs fortes, former et faire grandir chacun et chacune en tant que personne, progresser individuellement ainsi que dans le jeu à XV sont l’unique feuille de route.

Entrez dans la mêlée et rejoignez le projet BAAR !

Name: FC Bondues
Description:
A l'origine, 2 clubs existaient à Bondues : l'USB, au profil de compétiteur, et le CJB, dont l'ambition est de porter son projet éducatif le plus loin possible.

Aujourd'hui, le club compte presque 900 licenciés et l'une des belles structures du football amateur dans les Hauts de France.

31 équipes en compétitions,
45 éducateurs,
Des labels FFF élite et l'ambition de progresser en conservant des valeurs fortes.

En 2009, la municipalité demande aux 2 clubs de fusionner, projet déjà entrepris quelques années avant, mais sans résultat. « l'USB s'était peut-être vu un peu trop beau. Nous avions atteint le septième tour de la coupe de France », selon les propres termes de son président, Marc Herbaux.

2009 verra donc l'aboutissement de cette fusion. « Il n'y a rien qui sépare les deux clubs. Nous sommes issus de la même ville et, par conséquent, il s'agit de la même population. Les enfants côtoient les mêmes quartiers, les mêmes écoles. Le plus intelligent était donc de nous regrouper », explique le président du CJB, Etienne Zinave.

La fusion s'est déroulée en trois temps, selon les règles administratives en vigueur. Le 27 avril 2009, lors d'une assemblée générale constitutive, a d'abord été entérinée la création de la nouvelle entité, le FCB. Ensuite, lors d'une assemblée générale extraordinaire le mardi suivant, l'USB a voté sa dissolution. Puis ce fut au tour du CJB d'emboîter le pas trois jours plus tard.

Name: Mulhouse Futsal Alsace
Description:
Nous sommes ravis de vous présenter notre projet inspirant : la création d’un club de futsal qui s’inscrit comme une suite naturelle des actions menées dans notre ville.

Cette initiative est le prolongement de la fondation de l’association “Les Quatre” en 2021, qui avait pour objectif d’introduire le football comme un moyen de divertissement pour la jeunesse de notre communauté.

Dans cette optique, nous avons prévu la formation d’équipes pour garçons et filles, réparties en différentes catégories : baby foot (3 à 6 ans), U7 et U9. 

Nous organiserons régulièrement des tournois et des rencontres pendant les vacances scolaires, permettant aux jeunes de se mesurer à d’autres équipes, de progresser et de vivre des moments inoubliables sur le terrain.

Nous aurons également des équipes de jeunes dans les catégories 11 à 17 ans, avec des séances de détection prévues prochainement.

Ces événements sportifs offrent aux enfants l’opportunité de se développer dans un cadre compétitif sain, où fair-play et plaisir de jouer sont au centre de nos préoccupations, dans un environnement sécurisé et bienveillant.

Parallèlement, nous mettons en place une équipe senior, masculine et féminine, qui nourrit de grandes ambitions en participant à des compétitions de haut niveau, avec pour objectif la victoire. 

Composées de jeunes talents passionnés, nos équipes seniors ont pour mission de représenter fièrement la ville de Mulhouse et de hisser le futsal au plus haut niveau.

Ce projet est le fruit d’une succession d’initiatives et d’interactions avec les jeunes de notre communauté. 

Notre objectif est de collaborer avec les clubs de futsal déjà présents dans la région afin de renforcer les liens et développer encore davantage cette discipline.

Name: Christchurch United Football Club
Description:
Christchurch United is a proud Christchurch Football Club with a strong and successful history. The club was formed as a merger of several Christchurch clubs in the early 1970s.

It was one of the founding clubs of the NZ National Soccer League in 1970. Over the years the club have won six National League Titles, six English Cups and six Chatham Cups, including the two famous doubles in 1975 and in 1991.

The Club produced a number of great players including 44 who played for All Whites. Steve Sumner and Ryan Nelsen were the captains of NZ National teams at the 1982 and 2010 World Cups. All these legend players wore blue and white uniform of United in the prime of their careers.

In 1995 association of football reporters recognised Christchurch United as the best NZ club for 1970-1995.

In 2016 Christchurch United cemented the future of the Club after merging with the rapidly growing Christchurch Football Academy (CFA) who were based at the new state-of-the-art Football Centre. The merger between CFA and CUFC in 2016 has reignited the legacy.

In 2022, our mens senior first team won the Southern League for the first time in 24 years and joined the National League for the first time in 30 years scoring in every round. Our Womens first team won the Championship in the same year.

Name: PZM – Polski Związek Motorowy (Polish Automobile and Motorcycle Federation)
Description:
Polski Związek Motorowy – PZM, od ponad 70 lat zajmuje się promocją, organizacją i rozwojem polskiego sportu motorowego. Te jasno sprecyzowane cele były fundamentem PZM od samego początku i do dziś pozostają dla nas motywacją i źródłem miłości do motoryzacji.

Z marzeń i pasji powstała rodzina PZM – kilkaset automobilklubów i klubów sportowych, zrzeszających setki tysięcy sympatyków motoryzacji, za pośrednictwem których przesłanie PZM dociera do każdego miejsca w Polsce. To właśnie dzięki ludziom możemy wspierać kariery młodych talentów i budować wizerunek wschodzących gwiazd polskiego sportu motorowego.

Chcemy, aby automobilizm i motosport były źródłem edukacji i poprawy bezpieczeństwa na polskich drogach. Dlatego angażujemy się w inicjatywy lokalne, wspieramy budowę infrastruktury i działamy na rzecz praw osób zmotoryzowanych i niepełnosprawnych uczestników ruchu drogowego, domagając się równego ich traktowania. Prowadzimy działalność oświatową i edukacyjną, ponieważ wierzymy, że odpowiedzialne traktowanie młodego pokolenia zaowocuje w przyszłości odpowiedzialnymi zmotoryzowanymi. Polskie drogi mogą być jednymi z najbezpieczniejszych w Europie i do tego dążymy jako Związek.

PZM jest organizatorem i koordynatorem imprez rangi Mistrzostw Polski i Pucharu Polski oraz wielu lokalnych w sportach motorowych: samochodowym, motocyklowym, kartingowym i caravaningowym. PZM jest gospodarzem także imprez rangi Mistrzostw Świata i Europy w sporcie motocyklowym, kartingowym i samochodowym.

Jedną z naszych kluczowych ofert dla zmotoryzowanych jest ochrona Autoklubu SOS – Assistance. Nieprzewidziane zdarzenia mogą przytrafić się nawet najlepszemu kierowcy. Takie sytuacje są zawsze stresujące, dlatego naszym klientom zapewniamy najwyższej jakości usługi, 24 h/dobę, przez cały rok – w każdym miejscu w Polsce i za granicą. Wystarczy twój jeden telefon, a otrzymasz pełną opiekę i poczujesz się naprawdę bezpiecznie. Zgłoszenie możesz również wysłać przez aplikację Asystent Podróży.

Elle vous propose des séances d'activités sportives où vous pouvez-vous affronter, interagir et jouer les uns avec les autres.  Si vous avez envie de passer un bon moment et de créer des liens avec des individus, Leets est faite pour vous.

Rencontrer de nouvelles personnes qui partagent les mêmes passions que vous. Oubliez votre stress de fin de journée et développez votre esprit d'équipe dans une ambiance conviviale.

Que votre équipe soit à la recherche d'un match sportif amical ou d'une séance d'entraînement intense, Leets a une activité sportive qui vous convient.

Ensemble, motivez-vous à faire du sport. Leets Go!

Name: BHAG CLUB
Description:
The Bhag isn’t your average run club - it’s a movement for movement. 
We’re here for the beginners, the pros, the fitness freaks and the community-seekers.

We’re a community built on sweat, laughter and the collective chaos of the morning. We believe movement is medicine, and showing up is half the battle won. Our runs are about more than just fitness metrics - they’re about discovering your rhythm, your city, and your community. From sunrise runs to midnight marathons, we’re revolutionising running into something social, soulful, and seriously fun. 

Whether you’re training for a marathon, or taking baby steps towards your first run, come as you are. No judgment, no ego - just endorphins and people who get it. It’s a vibe, a tribe and a reminder that the journey is the destination. 

So if you don’t trust yourself yet, trust us. We got you.

Name: Vendée Poiré Football
Description:
Fondé en 1954, le Vendée Poiré Football est un club emblématique de la région, basé au Complexe de l'Idonnière. Fort de ses 820 licenciés, il rassemble passionnés, joueurs et bénévoles autour de valeurs fortes : humilité, respect, travail et plaisir.

Le club évolue à tous les niveaux, de nos jeunes catégories jusqu’à notre équipe phare en National 3, en passant par des équipes féminines, une section futsal et des équipes seniors dans toutes les divisions (R1, R3, D2, D4). Nous sommes fiers de notre label Élite pour les jeunes masculins et Bronze pour le pôle féminin, ainsi que de nos sections sportives scolaires (Collège du Puy Chabot et Lycée Notre Dame du Roc).

Le Vendée Poiré Football est également soutenu par un réseau de plus de 100 partenaires locaux et nationaux, qui partagent nos valeurs et notre passion pour le football. Nos partenaires jouent un rôle clé dans notre réussite, et ensemble, nous créons des synergies positives pour le sport, l'économie locale et le développement de notre club.

Name: Sportfreunde Siegen von 1899 e.V.
Description:
Die Sportfreunde Siegen sind ein Fußballverein aus Siegen in Nordrhein-Westfalen. Der Verein wurde am 8. September 1899 ursprünglich als Abteilung des TV Jahn Siegen 1879 gegründet und hieß damals noch Fußballclub Jahn Siegen. 

Im Jahr 1923 erfolgte der Zusammenschluss mit dem Sportverein 07 Siegen. Seitdem trägt der Verein, bis auf eine kurze Phase nach dem Zweiten Weltkrieg, den Namen Sportfreunde Siegen von 1899 e.V. 

Die Sportfreunde spielten als traditionsreichster Club Südwestfalens jahrzehntelang in Deutschlands zweiter oder dritter Spielklasse. Der größte Erfolg des Vereins stammt von 1955, als die Siegener Deutscher Amateurmeister wurden. 

Den letzten Auftritt in Deutschlands zweithöchster Spielklasse hatte der Verein in der Saison 2005/2006. Nach dem Rückzug des Mäzens Manfred Utsch, der durch sein jahrzehntelanges herausragendes Engagement überhaupt erst professionellen Fußball in Siegen ermöglicht hatte, spielt der Verein aktuell in der Regionalliga West (Deutschlands vierthöchste Spielklasse).

Name: Moloko Cycling
Description:
Moloko Cycling is dedicated to enhancing your cycling experience with high-quality gear, innovative accessories, and exceptional customer service. We provide a curated selection of bikes, apparel, and equipment designed for both casual riders and serious cyclists. At Moloko Cycling, our mission is to inspire and support your journey on two wheels, ensuring every ride is enjoyable and fulfilling. Join our community and discover the perfect blend of performance, comfort, and style.

Moloko Cycling Escapes offer unforgettable cycling experiences in stunning locations across Europe. Our escapes are designed for cyclists of all levels, providing an ideal mix of adventure, relaxation, and local culture. Join us for expertly guided rides through picturesque landscapes, stay in charming accommodations, and enjoy delicious meals that really showcase the best of the local cuisine. Whether you're exploring the mountain passes of the Pyrenees, the coastal roads of Mallorca, or the rugged countryside of Portugal, our cycling escapes promise memorable journeys and lasting friendships. Die Heimspiele werden in der St. Jakob Arena ausgetragen, welche Platz für 6612 Zuschauer bietet und inmitten der grössten Sportanlage der Region Basel lokalisiert ist. Mit der guten Anbindung an den öffentlichen Verkehr, sowie einem grossen Parkhaus erreicht der EHC Basel viele Zuschauer und treue Fans und bietet eine attraktive Plattform für Werbemöglichkeiten und Partnerschaften.
Mit seiner grossen Nachwuchsabteilung setzt der EHC Basel auf die Jugend und stellt eine qualitativ hochwertige Ausbildung und Förderung von jungen Talenten sicher. 

Ganz unter dem Motto «Basel isch Hockey» begeistert der EHC Basel die Region.

Name: ZKS - Zürcher Kantonalverband für Sport
Description:
Zürcher Kantonalverband für Sport (ZKS): Kompetenz, Engagement und Netzwerk im Dienste des Sports im Kanton Zürich!

Der Zürcher Kantonalverband für Sport (ZKS) ist das Kompetenzzentrum für den Vereins- und Verbandssport im Kanton Zürich und als solches das Dach über 65 Zürcher Sportverbände mit rund 2300 Vereinen und über 366 000 Mitgliedern, davon 122 000 Kinder und Jugendliche unter 20 Jahren.

 Gemeinsam für eine starke Sportgemeinschaft in Zürich:
Wir engagieren uns, damit im Kanton Zürich bestmögliche Rahmenbedingungen für unsere Mitglieder geschaffen, gefördert und nachhaltig verankert werden.

 Förderung von Jugend- und Breitensport: 
Wir fördern den Jugend- und Breitensport, indem wir uns für einen möglichst grossen Mittelzufluss engagieren und diese Mittel demokratisch und sinnvoll einsetzen.

 Interessenvertretung unserer Mitglieder:
Wir setzen uns für die Interessen unserer Mitglieder ein, damit der Sport, das freiwillige Engagement und das Ehrenamt in Gesellschaft, Politik und Wirtschaft die Anerkennung erhalten, die ihnen gebührt.

 Unterstützung von Sportverbänden und -vereinen: 
Wir unterstützen die Sportverbände und -vereine mit innovativen Dienst- und Beratungsleistungen, damit sich unsere Mitglieder weiterentwickeln können.

 Aufbau eines sportpolitischen Netzwerks:
Wir pflegen aktiv ein sportpolitisches Netzwerk, stehen im engen Dialog mit den Zürcher Behörden und prägen die kantonale Sportpolitik.

 Betrieb des Sportzentrums Kerenzerberg: 
Wir betreiben im Auftrag des Kantons Zürich das Sportzentrum Kerenzerberg.

 Förderung des freiwilligen Engagements:
Wir fördern das freiwillige Engagement und leben das erfolgreiche Zusammenwirken von ehrenamtlichen und hauptamtlichen Kräften vor, weil das gesamte Sportsystem davon abhängt.

Name: Athletes For Athletes Holdings
Description:
AFA (aka. Athletes for Athletes) is a startup company that focuses on building a technology infrastructure & IoT layered on top of the sports industry eco-system.

For commercial sports communities, we are a venue operation & technology solution provider. We bring revolutions by presenting venue operators and users with a cloud-based booking management system. User can choose a venue, place a booking, and make payments directly online simply by accessing our mobile app. On the same system, venue operators can list out services which they provide, access and manage their venue’s schedules, and even obtain detailed data sheets for each of their venues. 
 
Our focus is solving the problems that our venue operators may face as well. Leveraing on IoT , AFA Link is designed to help venue operators in automating and reducing the reliance of manual labour. “AFA Link” features a simple yet effective solution, automated lighting systems that users can turn on by scanning the QR code on site when beginning their activities. The future of IoT tech in sports venue will help operators to have a fully-automated machine operated venue management.

The future of AFA will bring more convenience for our users by taking care all the essential needs & sporting experience for the community within a single digital platform.

AFA established strong partnership with National Sports Institut of Malaysia as well as the private sports business entities in ensuring greater services is given to the people.

Name: SIERRA FOOTBALL CLUB-SL
Description:
SIERRA FOOTBALL CLUB/ACADEMY is a Second Division Club in SIERRA LEONE.

Name: Ayr Rugby Club
Description:
Ayr RFC was established in 1897 and moved to Millbrae in the historic village of Alloway in 1964. 

Our men's 1st XV topped the BT Premiership, the highest level of Scottish club rugby, in 2015/16; and Ayr Ladies won the BT Women's National League Division 1 to gain promotion to the Premier League. There is a men's 2nd XV, as well as Millbrae RFC, a de facto 3rd XV, who are BT National Bowl Champions.

The Ayrshire Bulls compete in the FOSROC Super 6 and lifted the title in 2021, becoming the first Champions of the tournament. Their matches are broadcast live on Premier Sports, BBC iPlayer & SRU website, with the matches attracting some of the biggest crowds at Millbrae throughout the season.

Ayr-Wellington Youth Rugby has boys' teams from P1 to under-18s and girls' under-15s and under-18s teams, and the U15s, U16s and U18s boys are multi-title winners, with many representing Scotland age groups. Ayr Rugby Academy offers specific programmes to nurture the best young male and female players.

The club hosts a range of social events throughout the season, including the very popular Ayr RFC charity ladies' lunches and the Land O'Burns Beer Festival. Our large function room is available for hire free of charge.

All of our teams have competed for silverware throughout the year, with the youth section having a particularly successful season, but our primary focus is to promote and encourage the values of rugby to male and female, young and old, and be the club of the community for the community.

Name: D'Alessandro Scouting
Description:
D'Alessandro Scouting is a company that offers an innovative way to implement or outsource the scouting activities of professional Football Clubs. It's not easy nowadays for a club to hold and manage an effective internal scouting department: it costs economically, it costs time, energies and mostly it needs something that it's difficoult to have, stability. We have 17 scouts, each on one country, covering a total of 35 leagues around the world. They are organized as a team with individual and group goals, a virtual office and a large network that gives them the possibility to have the eyes and ears of local journalits, coaches, scouts and players. Our mindset is to be effective and in-depth.

WHAT WE MEAN WITH IN-DEPTH SCOUTING
For us is not just a matter of finding a talent. For us it is matter of analyzing, studying and reporting on it. First of all we start from the pitch. We are very traditional on that, our scouting methodology ground is to see as many games as possible of the leagues we follow. In this way, at the end of the season we have seen almost all the players of the league playing a minimum of 7-8 games. Than our analysis starts from the technical side, proceeds with the tactical and mental and ends with the physical. But this is only the first part: a player is not only what he appears on the pitch, a player is firstly a person, and what we do is to build a psychological reportage of the person behind the player. We are able to do that thanks to our network where we always find the right people to answer to our questions: it can be thanks to the direct cooperation of the players or thanks to their agents but mostly thanks to our semiotic psychologist.

The clubs that work with us are able to get advantage of this massive work and build a very extended and in-depth knowledge of a thousand talented players that match their market targets.
