For all football consultancy enquires and media engagements for Huw Jenkins OBE, contact Tony via mobile: 07786508976 or via email: tonysharkey@icloud.com.

‘From the bottom of League 2 to the Premier League’
During his time at Swansea, Huw Jenkins OBE guided the club from the bottom of League 2 to the Premier League, a League Cup Final victory and playing in European competition.
As well as performing all of the functions of Chairman and CEO, Huw undertook many of the duties attributed to a Sporting Director.
He employed some world-class head coaches including:
Roberto Martinez, Paulo Sousa, Brendan Rodgers, Michael Laudrup, Carlos Carvahal and Graham Potter.

Huw was responsible for growing the academy and gaining Cat 1 Academy Status.

He delivered a surplus of over £100 million in his transfer dealings, securing large fees for the following players: Alfie Mawson, Lukasz Fabianski, Joe Rodon, Gylfi Sigurdsson (club record fee), Fernando Llorente, Jack Cork, André Ayew, Ashley Williams, Jonjo Shelvey, Wilfried Bony, Ben Davies, Michel Vorm, Joe Allen, Scott Sinclair and Danny Graham.

Daniel James and Oli McBurnie were brought through during Huw’s tenure and were sold in the summer of 2019.

Huw was named Football CEO of the Year at the 2015 Football Business Awards.
Huw received his OBE in 2015. Huw was recognised for his services to sport in Wales.

Areas of expertise:
- Club Strategy / Management

Name: Black Girls Tennis Club
Description:
Joy equity and radical wellness are at the forefront of everything we do. We utilize our platform to inform, encourage, motivate, and change the narrative. Liberation through sports and PLAY is a significant concept that can transform communities. Our efforts support economic development, local tourism, family preservation, legacy, and generational abundance. 


We focus on four key pillars to bring our mission into reality: 

Culture Change - Creating an environment where Black women and girls in tennis have the same opportunities as everyone else on and off the court. Dismantling the systemic barriers that prevent equality in sports. Shifting attitudes around what’s appropriate in tennis culture.

Access - Working with local governments to assess public access to courts and tennis programming. Improving tennis conditions. Creating opportunities locally, nationally and globally for Black women and girls to see and participate in tennis and tennis-related activities. 

Representation - Representation on and off the court, in decision-making rooms and the places and spaces that dictate tennis culture. Amplifying Black women and girls narratives in tennis. 

Exposure - Introducing tennis as a source of health and wellness, opportunities, community, recreational play and joy for all ages. Exposure to the idea of hobbies as necessary and a lifestyle centered around community and radical wellness through individual liberation.

Vi delar tillsammans med SSFs övriga grenar (alpint, backhoppning, längd, freeskiing, puckel, rullskidor, skicross, snowboard, speedskiing och telemark) uppgiften att leda skid- och snowboardidrotter i Sverige på ett sådant sätt att de står i överensstämmelse med idrottsrörelsens verksamhetsidé, vision och värdegrund samt företräda dessa idrotter. 

Vår vision - Bäst i världen – alla på snö
Vår mission - Vi vill bli fler och vi vill bli bättre!

Svenska Skidförbundet bildades den 11 december 1908, är ett av de äldsta och största idrottsförbunden i Sverige. Vi har drygt 146 000 medlemmar organiserade i cirka 1 300 föreningar indelade i 23 distrikt, från norr till söder (2020).

Da quando abbiamo aperto i battenti nel 2019, i Camaleonti hanno brillato conquistando inviti prestigiosi in tutta Europa e riconoscimenti che riecheggiano a livello cantonale e nazionale.

Our tagline, "Think Outside the Book," reflects our commitment to experiential education, where students learn by doing, exploring, and engaging in real-world challenges. Through residential camps, sports events, and leadership programs, we build confidence, teamwork, resilience, and adaptability—preparing students for life, not just exams.

What TEEMS Stands For
T – Trust: We build lasting relationships with schools, students, and partners.
E – Education: Our programs promote lifelong learning and leadership.
E – Empowerment: We give students the confidence to thrive.
M – Mindset: We nurture resilience, adaptability, and curiosity.
S – Success: We create pathways for personal and academic growth.

What We Do
1. Residential & Holiday Camps – Leadership, sports, adventure, and language immersion programs tailored for international schools.
2. International School Partnerships – Custom-designed enrichment programs that align with school goals.
3. Sports Event Management – FOBISIA-approved expertise in hosting, managing, and delivering large-scale international school tournaments.
4. Global Expansion – Operations in Thailand, Hong Kong, and planned growth in Chengdu, UAE, and KSA.
5. Accreditations & Collaborations – Partnerships with Mae Fah Luang Foundation and Duke of Edinburgh Award to ensure world-class standards.

Why TEEMS Global?
1. Trusted by International Schools – A preferred affiliate FOBISIA member with strong industry recognition.
2. High-Impact Learning & Sports Management – Innovative residential programs designed for real-world skills development.
3. Global Reach & Growth – Expanding across Asia and the Middle East while maintaining quality, safety, and excellence.

Name: SG Schorndorf 1846 e. V.
Description: Die Sportgemeinschaft Schorndorf 1846 e.V. ist ein Sportverein mit 20 Abteilungen und mehr als 4000 Mitgliedern in Schorndorf, davon rund 2.000 Kinder und Jugendliche. Neben Wettkampf- und Gesundheitssport für alle Altersgruppen hält die SG Schorndorf vor allem für Kinder ein breites Angebot bereit: dazu zählen Feriensportwochen, eine Bewegungswelt mit Kindersportschule, FUNsport sowie eine Fußball- und Schwimmschule. Das vereinseigene Fitnessstudio (Ulrich Schatz Sportzentrum) ist Treffpunkt aller Generationen in und um Schorndorf mit dem Fokus auf Sport, Fitness, Gesundheit und Bewegung. Hier trainieren nicht nur SGlerinnen und SGler sondern auch Mitglieder unserer über 20 Kooperationsvereine und Nicht-Mitglieder. Das „SG Kurszentrum“ bietet zeitlich begrenzte Kurse – auch für Nichtmitglieder. Ob Rückbildung, Zumba oder Crossfit - mit dem erweiterten Angebot wollen wir unserer sozialen Verantwortung nachkommen, die Gesellschaft in Bewegung zu bringen, insbesondere Menschen, die sich nicht an einen Verein binden möchten. Wir bieten aktuell über 20 Rehasport-Kurse an. Die SG Schorndorf ist mehr als „nur“ ein Sportverein. Wir verstehen uns als Gesundheitsdienstleister für Schorndorf und Umgebung.

Name: GPX
Description:
GPX is the world's largest esports community hub, an organization of your favorite esports tournaments founded by your favorite esports icons.

Aim to have more successful dreams of the community, GPX is committed to witness & assists the rise of the next powerful and xtraordinary icon in the esports and sports markets around the globe.

Founded in 2021 by Steven Kurniawan, you can call him Marsha, MSC 2019 Runner-Up. Yurino Putra, The M1 World Champions Tank goes by Donkey. Lastly, Eko Julianto, aka Oura, was the first man crowned as the first MVP at the first Mobile Legends: Bang Bang World Championships.

GPX pledged to hear from the community, resulting in an emotional connection impact for both GPX and the community.

The organizations learned to give a little different approaches to the community, which led to GPX becoming the World's Largest Esports Market Holder. We need to make sure that the Community Voice won't stop aspiring, and these never-ending Community Dreams will never back off!

-

Who are we?

We are voices of the community!
Oura, Donkey, and Marsha are part of the community. They just can't stop dreaming about lifting a trophy. Restless days of training and hard work make their way to the pro scene.

We are built by the community!
After a successful run into the pro scene, they keep their mouths hungry and achieve what it needs to be; national, regional, world championships, you name it, they've accomplished their journey. Oura, Donkey, and Marsha then pursue larger community goals by establishing their co-owned esports organization, GPX.

We are home of the community!
Oura, Donkey, and Marsha are not even getting slower. Therefore, it's their time to give back to the community what they've given, utilizing the Community Voices. So yeah, we can finally be proud of being back home to the community!

That's what we meant from the community, by the community, and for the community!

Name: Wexford Wanderers RFC
Description:
Wexford Wanderers, founded in 1924, is a family-friendly, welcoming and inclusive rugby club based just outside Wexford town, in the sunny South East of Ireland.
Our centenary is on 7th October 2024 and we are currently working on improvements to our facilities in time for this major milestone.
We are also compiling the history of the club as well as planning events to celebrate this important anniversary year.
We are based in the townland of Park, overlooking the river Slaney.
The club colours are white, blue and black jerseys, with blue and black socks and black knicks.
We field men’s and women’s teams in the South East and Leinster Leagues and we have very active boys and girls sections catering for minis (under 7 to under 12) and youths (under 13 to under 19).
We also have an enthusiastic group of young mixed-ability rugby players who will warmly welcome newcomers.
Our cricket section fields at both adult and youth levels in the Leinster League from April to September each year.
We have our own grounds incorporating three floodlit pitches, a clubhouse and a gymnasium.
The club also has a thriving social scene with a wide range of fun activities and events, for all ages and interests, throughout the year.
You can check in to our social media channels regularly for news and updates on events:

Description:
Jai Hind, Welcome to the profile of Aim For Success Archery Academy Jabalpur, We take pride in being the only and pioneer academy of Jabalpur importing archery knowledge to our archers. Archery is the art, sport, practice, or skill of using a bow to shoot arrows. The word comes from the Latin arcus for bow. Historically, archery has been used for hunting and combat. In modern times, it is mainly a competitive sport and recreational activity. A person who participates in archery is typically called an archer or a bowman.

Aim For Success:
We are very pleased to inform you that our academy, which is 5 years old , is one of the pioneer academy of Jabalpur in the field of archery. We offer an introduction to archery class every Saturday evening. Designed especially for the new archers. This program for anyone who would like to try out archery without having to buy equipment.

Vision of “Aim For Success Archery Academy” is to promote archery and produce archers who can win medals for India. We have comprehensive courses for students at all levels of proficiency. Training at “Aim for success academy” is provided by experts who are really passionate about archery. Our archers have already won many medals in national archery tournament.

Description:
Arena Alicante, esta situada la Playa de San Juan. Se trata de una de las más completas instalaciones no sólo de la Comunidad Valenciana sino de toda España. 

Cuenta con 26.000 metros cuadrados, de los cuales 6.800 son cubiertos y más de 19.000 dedicados al deporte exterior. 

La zona interior del Complejo Deportivo Municipal, cuenta con sala de musculaciónn de más de 1.000 metros, equipada con maquinaria de última generación, dispone también de 6 salas para actividades colectivas, para ciclo indoor, indoorwalking, 2 dedicadas a exhibiciones y master class, un tatami para la práctica de artes marciales. Por último la zona de agua y Spa con dos piscinas, una semi-olímpica de nado libre y otra especial para realizar actividades acuáticas. La zona Spa, ofrece todos los servicios necesarios para disfrutar después de una sesión de actividad física, o simplemente para disfrutar de unos momentos de relax. También dispone de 3 pistas de Squash 

La zona exterior, cuenta con una pista de atletismo de tartam oficial de 800 metros de cuerda, 1 pista de tenis convertible en 4 de mini-tenis, 6 de tenis, de las cuáles 3 son de tierra batida y 3 de resina sintética, un campo de fútbol 11 convertible en dos de fútbol 7 y por último zona de Padel con 14 pistas, 2 individuales, 12 dobles siendo 5 de ellas cubiertas y una pista central con aforo para 1000 personas.

Name: Tabonon
Description:
Tabonon is dé sportschool voor kickboksen, MMA, Grappling, Brazilian Jiu Jitsu, krachttraining, yoga of personal training. Als grootste vechtsportschool van Noord-Oost Nederland, worden er verschillende lessen aangeboden voor zowel beginners als gevorderden ongeacht de leeftijd. Denk hierbij aan zaktraining, 40+ training, jeugdtraining, technieklessen en krachttraining.

Alle lessen worden gegeven door opgeleide professionals welke intern of bij NOC NSF een opleiding hebben gevolgd. Op 2 locaties in Zwolle en 1 in Raalte bieden we 7 dagen per week privé-, groepslessen en workshops aan waarbij onze kernwaarden veiligheid, sfeer, kwaliteit en professionaliteit centraal staan. Een succeservaring gegarandeerd!

Tabonon is aangesloten bij bedrijfsfitness Nederland. Zodra jouw werkgever hierbij is aangesloten kan je met kortingen bij ons komen sporten. Kijk op de website of vraag jouw werkgever om meer informatie.

Workshop kickboksen
Mocht je werkgever geen lid zijn van bedrijfssport Nederland dan is het ook mogelijk om een losse workshop te volgen. Hier kan een thema in verwerkt worden zoals samenwerken, elkaar beter leren kennen of grenzen aangeven. Ook is het mogelijk om een workshop te maken aan de hand van de kernwaarden van het bedrijf. Dit is allemaal in overleg. De workshop voor bedrijven kan variëren van een uur tot 2 uur (of langer, in overleg mogelijk). 

Training aan docenten
Het is ook mogelijk om een training te volgen voor psychomotorische therapie en lichamelijke opvoeding docenten. In deze training leer je hoe je vechtsport als middel gebruikt in therapie of in het onderwijs. Het is een training van 3 keer 2 uur waarin je allerlei leerlijnen en methodes leert om vechtsport kan inzetten. Naast bovengenoemde groepen kan je ook bij ons terecht voor personeelsfeesten, vrijgezellenfeesten, open dagen of andere activiteiten.

Neem contact met ons op voor de mogelijkheden.

Entrenamos a atletas amateurs y competitivos de todo el mundo, con un enfoque particular en ejecutivos, emprendedores y personas con poco tiempo disponible que buscan maximizar su rendimiento a través de planes de entrenamiento personalizados, estructurados y basados en ciencia.

Name: WE RUN BELFAST
Description:
WRB is a social running club in Belfast.

instagram.com/werunbelfast
werunbelfast.org

WRB was started in 2018 by people who love to run. Having experienced RUN DEM CREW in London, the crew was founded in Belfast and continues to hold weekly runs and meetups over coffee and donuts.

Some of us run marathons, some of us can hardly run the length of ourselves - and that’s the point.

Always easy, everyone welcome. If you want to set a PB and wear one of those skimpy running vests, join your nearest harriers.

Many overlook the importance of community. Having people to stand beside and show an interest in your life may seem like a pretty insignificant thing, but statistics show that community is one of the most important things for your mental health.

This is especially important for Northern Ireland, where we’re facing a suicide epidemic and exist in what is widely considered a PTSD state (post-Troubles). NI has the highest rate of PTSD in a study of 30 countries including South Africa and Lebanon. Our need for mental health funding is 25% greater than England, but our funding is 20% less. More people have now died to suicide than died in the Troubles, with worrying figures showing no signs of slowing down. 

Running isn't going to fix this problem, but it can go a long way to helping people clear their heads, and possibly move towards a more positive mental health state. 

ALL YOU HAVE TO THINK ABOUT WHEN YOU’RE RUNNING IS PUTTING ONE FOOT IN FRONT OF THE OTHER.

We believe that the run isn't the most important thing we do. We want to offer an open community to everyone, where you won’t be judged or left out.

Name: Vasas SC
Description:
A Magyarországi Vas- és Fémmunkások Szövetsége már megalakulásától kezdve igyekezett megtalálni a megfelelő kereteket a szabadidő minél tartalmasabb eltöltésére. Így alakult meg 1911. március 16-án a több ezer főt aktív, több tízezer főt passzív sportolásra ösztönző Vas- és Fémmunkások Sport Clubja. 

A sportegyesületnek a hagyományos sportágak mellett (labdarúgás, atlétika, birkózás, kézilabda, vízilabda, ökölvívás, röplabda, vívás, sakk, tenisz) olyan kuriózumnak számító szakosztályai is alakultak, mint a gyeplabda, a motorcsónak, a motorkerékpár-autó. 

A piros-kék egyesület sportolói az évtizedek során több mint másfélezer országos bajnoki címet, több mint 50 olimpiai, 60 világbajnoki és Európa-bajnoki címet nyertek, és immár paralimpiai aranyérmesei is vannak a Vasasnak.

A múltban olyan kiválóságok öregbítették a Vasas Sport Club hírnevét, mint az atléta Németh Imre, a 100. olimpiai bajnoki címet szerző birkózó, Hegedűs Csaba, a teniszező Körmöczy Zsuzsa és Taróczy Balázs, vagy a Vasas labdarúgást megtestesítő Illovszky Rudolf. De folytathatjuk a legendák sorát Papp Lászlóval, Gedó Györggyel, a vívó Kárpáti Rudolffal, a vízilabdázók képviseletében Markovits Kálmánnal, Jeney Lászlóval, a Faragó-Csapó-Kenéz „triumvirátussal”, vagy a Mocsai Lajos irányításával BEK-et nyert női kézilabdázókkal és még jó néhány oldalon keresztül sorolhatnánk a nagyságokat, egészen a jelen sporttörténeti alakjáig, a kardvívó Szilágyi Áronig.

A Vasas Sport Club legfőbb célja és alapfeladata a sport szeretetének átadása a legkisebbeknek, illetve az ezekhez szükséges infrastruktúra biztosítása, a közösségépítés, az utánpótlásnevelés, és az itt sportoló kiválóságainak számára valamennyi szükséges feltétel biztosítása, minél több, éremesélyes olimpikon felkészülésének elősegítése.

Ahhoz, hogy ezeket a célokat megvalósíthassuk, a múltban szükségessé vált a létesítmények helyzetének rendezése. 2004. november 1-jén írta alá - az országban elsőként - a Vasas Sport Club a Kincstári Vagyoni

Name: Florida High School Athletic Association
Description:
The Florida High School Athletic Association (FHSAA) is committed to this ideal, and to the belief that a quality education does not begin or end in the classroom.

For over a century, the FHSAA – through the cooperative efforts of its member schools – has provided opportunities for high school students in Florida to participate on a fair and equitable basis in interscholastic athletic programs that produce vital educational benefits.

The FHSAA sponsors over 3,500 championship series games through which 144 teams, and 294 individuals are crowned state champions in 32 sports each year. Over 2,000 student athletes each year experience winning a championship. Through participation in these athletic programs, over 800,000 students annually are extended opportunities to receive lessons in leadership, sportsmanship and citizenship.

The Florida High School Athletic Association . . . building leaders through teamwork, sportsmanship and citizenship.

Name: FC Dynamo Kyiv
Description:
FC Dynamo Kyiv is one of Europe’s most storied football clubs, representing tradition, excellence, and resilience since 1927. Based in the capital of Ukraine, Dynamo has won 17 Ukrainian championships, 13 Ukrainian Cups, two European Cup Winners' Cup and European Super Cup, establishing itself as a symbol of sporting achievement and national pride.

Today, Dynamo Kyiv combines its legendary heritage with a forward-looking vision built on professional management, digital innovation, and sustainable growth. The club’s structure encompasses the First Team, U19 Team, and Academy, supported by modern infrastructure, and an expanding network of global partners.

As a proud ambassador of Ukrainian football on the European stage, FC Dynamo Kyiv continues to uphold the values of excellence, integrity, and unity – both on and off the pitch.

Name: Stade Caennais Rugby Club
Description:
Le Stade Caennais Rugby Club, le club de rugby phare de l’agglomération caennaise, a été créé en 2007. Son équipe fanion évolue en Fédérale 2, les jeunes (U16 et U18) évoluent en National.

L'ambition du Stade Caennais est de proposer à chacun de jouer à son meilleur niveau. Pour cela, nous nous basons sur la formation de nos joueurs dès 5 ans.

Notre école de rugby est labellisée par la FFR depuis 2007, nous y cultivons le goût du sport et du rugby, mais aussi les valeurs tant vantées de notre passion ovale :  Solidarité, Respect, Sérieux, Combativité… Les équipes benjamins et minimes apprennent à devenir des joueurs de rugby à XV.

Nos équipes jeunes cultivent le goût de la performance collective, dans l’objectif de développer le potentiel de chacun pour alimenter le groupe senior de notre club ou d’équipes plus prestigieuses….

Le groupe senior regroupe des joueurs essentiellement formés au club mais aussi d’ailleurs, qui ensemble se tournent vers un objectif commun de performance sportive, tout en sachant préserver l’esprit convivial et festif du rugby…

Le Stade Caennais Rugby Club, un état d’esprit au service de l’esprit d’équipe, de 5 à 55 ans (voire plus beaucoup plus).

Name: Tehrun running club
Description: ما اولین کلاب دوی شهری ایران هستیم. کار ما دویدن و ایجاد یه حس متمایز با دویدن هست. اسم ما تهران کلابه .  تهران کلاب بیش از 10000  دونده داره  و شما هم میتونی یکی از ما باشی. تهران کلاب فقط مخصوص دونده های حرفه ای نیست و هر کسی با هر سن و سالی و هر سطحی از آمادگی میتونه همراه تهران باشه و با اون بدوه و یا دویدن رو یاد بگیره و از اون لذت ببره. معروف ترین برنامه تهران برنامه جمعه صبح هاست که توی اون یه مسیر تقریبا 10 کیلومتری رو داخل شهر انتخاب میکنیم و همه باهم صبح جمعه میدویم ، برنامه جمعه های تهران از سال 96 شروع شده و اون موقع کمتر از انگشتای دوتا دست دونده داشته ولی الان بیش از 1000 نفر در برنامه های جمعه ما شرکت میکنند. فعالیت تهران گسترده است و در زمینه آموزش هم فعالیت میکنه. تهران کلاب مجرب ترین مربی های دوی همگانی رو در کشور داره و کلاسهای آمادگی برای دویدن استقامت رو برگزار میکنه. همچنین تهران کلاب و تیمش توی اکثر مسابقات بین المللی شرکت میکند و امکان شرکت توی این مسابقات رو برای شما هم فراهم میکنن. تهران کلاب خودش مسابقه هم برگزار میکنه و در این زمینه همکاری نزدیکی با فدراسیون دو و میدانی و کمیته ملی المپیک داره . تهران کلاب ماراتن بین المللی خلیج فارس رو برگزار میکنه که بزرگترین مسابقه بین المللی در سطح کشوره.

Name: The Famous Project
Description:
Our ambition is to not only break the record of becoming the *first* all-female team to race around the world non-stop and unassisted, but to conquer the Jules Verne Trophy, at the very least establishing an all-female reference time which has never been done before.

The crew will race the 100-foot trimaran IDEC SPORT which is arguably the fastest boat on the planet which also holds the current record for the Trophy Jules Verne, set in 2017 by Francis Joyon and his crew standing at 40 days 23 hours 30 minutes and 30 seconds.

We're daring to enter the history books - follow us!

Name: Deutsche Vereinigung für Sportwissenschaft (dvs)
Description:
Die Deutsche Vereinigung für Sportwissenschaft e.V. (dvs) ist ein Zusammenschluss von Wissenschaftlerinnen und Wissenschaftler der Sportwissenschaft, vorwiegend aus Deutschland, Österreich und der Schweiz. Sie vertritt derzeit rund 1.100 Personen.

Die dvs wurde 1976 in München gegründet und verfolgt das Ziel, die Sportwissenschaft zu fördern und weiter zu entwickeln. Sie sieht ihre Aufgaben insbesondere in der,
- Förderung sportwissenschaftlicher Forschung,
- Sicherung guter wissenschaftlicher Praxis auf der Grundlage berufsethischer Grundsätze,
- Unterstützung der wissenschaftlichen Kommunikation innerhalb und zwischen den Sektionen und Kommissionen,
- Veröffentlichung von Ergebnissen der von ihr veranstalteten Tagungen und Kongressen,
- Förderung des sportwissenschaftlichen Nachwuchses,
- Verleihung von Preisen,
- Stellungnahme zu Fragen von Studium und Lehre der Sportwissenschaft,
- Entwicklung einer zeitgemäßen Personalstruktur im Bereich sportwissenschaftlicher Einrichtungen,
- Vertretung der Belange der Sportwissenschaft im nationalen und internationalen Bereich.

Auf der Seite Stellenbörse finden Sie aktuelle Ausschreibungen für Sportwissenschaftler*innen: https://www.sportwissenschaft.de/stellenborse/stellenangebote/

Name: Diversity Sports LLC

At Diversity Sports, we believe sports have the power to do more than entertain, they unite. In today’s world, communities are often divided by culture, background, or opportunity. That’s where we step in. We create platforms where people don’t just play, they connect. Whether you’re an athlete, business, or community group, you’re looking for meaningful experiences that go beyond the game, and that’s exactly what we deliver.

Over the years, we have organized more than 100 diverse sporting events across football, basketball, cricket, volleyball, skating, and more. From global tournaments like the Inter Nations Championship to culturally rich gatherings like the AfriBIZ United Cup, our events attract thousands of participants and spectators. With trusted partners, top facilities, and proven event management, we have built a track record of turning sports into opportunities for unity, growth, and unforgettable memories.

We bring together athletes, teams, businesses, and communities through inclusive sports tournaments and championships, tailored corporate team-building activities, professional sports management and facility services, global sports camps and training programs, and seamless event marketing and ticketing solutions.

No matter where you come from, you will find a place here. At Diversity Sports, every game is bigger than the scoreboard. 

Ready to play your part? Explore our upcoming events, partner with us, or reach out today to build something unforgettable together.

Name: England and Wales Cricket Board (ECB)
Description: The England and Wales Cricket Board (ECB) is the national governing body of cricket in England and Wales. It was formed on 1 January 1997 as a single governing body to combine the roles formerly fulfilled by the Test and County Cricket Board, the National Cricket Association and the Cricket Council. In April 1998 the Women's Cricket Association was integrated into the organisation. The ECB's head offices are at Lord's Cricket Ground in north-west London.

Name: Mirassol Futebol Clube
Description:
O Mirassol Futebol Clube foi fundado em 9 de novembro de 1925, na cidade de Mirassol, localizada no interior do estado de São Paulo, Brasil. O clube tem uma história que se estende por várias décadas. Durante esses anos, com muito empenho e dedicação alcançou grandes conquistas, por exemplo: Acesso para a 1ª Divisão do Campeonato Paulista em 2007 e novamente em 2016, permanecendo na elite até hoje; Campeão do Campeonato Brasileiro Série D de 2020, com acesso para a Série C; e Campeão do Campeonato Brasileiro Série C de 2022, com acesso para a Série B.

Orgulhosamente veste amarelo, verde e branco e seu mascote é representado pelo Leão.

O grande símbolo da mudança do Mirassol foi o centro de treinamento, proporcionando um ambiente de alto desempenho para o desenvolvimento de talentos e aprimoramento técnico, o local conta com quatro campos, academia, vestiários, sala de imprensa, lavanderia, cozinha e refeitório, rouparia e apartamentos para jogadores do elenco profissional e da categoria de base.

Os jogos são do clube são realizados no Estádio Municipal José Maria de Campos Maia, mais conhecido como Maião, um local icônico que testemunhou inúmeras vitórias e momentos inesquecíveis.

Mais do que um clube, o Mirassol Futebol Clube é parte integrante da comunidade. Atua ativamente na promoção do esporte, incentivando a participação local e contribuindo para o crescimento do futebol em no município de Mirassol e região.

Dafür erschaffen wir ein euphorisierendes und bewegendes Umfeld, in dem Menschen gemeinsam aktiv werden und fördern langfristig Gesundheit, Teambuilding und Motivation.

Name: CAFO-FOOTBALL ACADEMY  ( Republic of Bénin, West Africa)
Description:
CAFO ( Centre Academique de Football d'Ottola).
The Ottola Academic Football Center was born at the beginning of 2021 on the initiative of a dynamic, ambitious youth, aware of the impact of football in development, a youth who measure the passion that the environment gives in football, from the participation of football to the reconciliation of an environment fractured by politics and the rural exodus (movement of young people to Nigeria) which is a phenomenon that is lastingly raging in the youthful class, a youth in search of a way to occupy their spare time in a healthy way through an education football marriage. A marriage that will see the birth of many world stars because like other African countries, Benin is one of the States with fewer international stars for lack of adequate national training centers. The few rare initiatives in this area are often confronted with problems of organization and follow-up. This prevents many young people from pursuing and realizing their dreams. This manifests itself through a high rate of youth dropouts. So CAFO wants to be a reference center to overcome these various failures by establishing a healthy link between football, school and professional training. Minor, the Ottola Academic Football Center is inspired by the experience of some viable local clubs (ABI SPORT, Académy-SESSEGNON, and some foreign clubs (Coton Sport de Yaoundé, Zamalec de l'Egypt etc, ...) by organizing a selection test from April 11 to April 14, 2021
During these four days, the committee was able to detect 90 talents in two different age groups: the 9 to 12 year old group and the 13 to 15 year old group

Name: Garuda Lions F.C
Description:
Garuda Lions FC is not just a football club; we're a community dedicated to creating a better future for underprivileged children in Indonesia. Our mission is to become the top football club in the country while also developing world-class players from diverse backgrounds. We believe that football is a powerful tool for change, and we're dedicated to making a difference in the lives of those who are often overlooked.
We take pride in offering a safe, inclusive, and supportive environment for our players. Our holistic world-class coaching is free and designed to help our players develop the skills and knowledge they need to succeed both on and off the field. We utilize the latest training methods and focus on building important life skills, such as teamwork, leadership, and self-discipline. We believe that these skills will enable our players to achieve success in all aspects of their lives.

We recognize that there is a wealth of untapped talent in underprivileged communities, and we are committed to investing in this potential. By providing access to opportunities that many of these children would not otherwise have, we hope to create a better future for them and for the Indonesian football industry. Our goal is to help these young players become confident, capable individuals who are capable of competing at a global level.

At Garuda Lions FC, we're also committed to promoting Indonesia's rich and diverse culture to the rest of the world. We believe that respect for diversity, inclusion, and community are essential values that should be celebrated both on and off the field. We hope that through our players, we can help to showcase Indonesia's beautiful culture to the rest of the world.

Joining Garuda Lions FC means becoming part of a community that is passionate about making a difference.
So, If you share our values and vision, we invite you to join us on this journey. Together, we can create a brighter future for Indonesia and for the underprivileged.

Name: Shift Up Now
Description:
Shift Up Now is an organization dedicated to finding the partners who want to work with women in motorsport, and help us fund female athletes in our sport. 

In the global sports marketing landscape, under 1% of the $66 billion annual spend goes to women in sports, and in motorsport, an environment where having the appropriate funding literally equals the opportunity to compete, we're working to try and lower this gap so that less careers are stalled out at lower levels, and less winning women are left on the sidelines. 

This is a sport where men and women can compete equally when they have equal funding, and equal opportunity, and our goals are to help talented female athletes find the support needed to continue their careers, and to have the opportunities to win at the highest levels of our sport.

One day there will be a female face on the Borg Warner Trophy.

One day there will be women competing in, and winning races in the top echelons of NASCAR.

One day we will see the next host of female athletes competing at the top levels of Sports Car racing in America. 

It all starts with funding, and affording talent the opportunity to rise. This is our goal, and our mission.

Name: RUGBY CLUB MASSY ESSONNE
Description:
Fondé en 1971, le RCME est un club emblématique du rugby français, reconnu pour ses performances sportives, sa formation d’excellence et son engagement sur le territoire. Avec 18 titres de champion de France toutes catégories confondues, il est aujourd’hui considéré comme l’un des plus grands pourvoyeurs de talents français. Son centre de formation, labellisé FFR, a vu émerger de nombreux internationaux, comme Mathieu Bastareaud, Sekou Macalou, Caroline Boujard ou Cameron Woki. 

Au-delà du sport, le RCME porte un projet d’insertion sportive, sociale et professionnelle. Soutenu par son école de rugby, ses sections scolaires et ses actions locales, son engagement est reconnu par le label Club Engagé de la FFR. Avec "La Relance Gagnante", le club renforce le lien entre sport et entreprise, accompagnant ses joueurs vers des formations et des emplois d'excellence, en lien avec ses partenaires.

Name: Surfing NSW
Description:
Surfing NSW, established in 1963, is the largest and longest running of the recognised state bodies for the sport of surfing in Australia.

Surfing NSW, in conjunction with its 10 Regional Associations, is responsible for managing events across the state from grassroots level events through to international professional events such as the Billabong ASP World Junior Championships and the Boost Mobile Surf Show.

Surfing NSW has over 100 affiliated boardrider clubs and 34 licensed surf schools, operating from Kingscliff in the north of the state to Tathra in the south.

For more information in how to become involved with Australia's number one sporting lifestyle in Australia's biggest surfing state contact the Surfing NSW office.
	
Our mission is to develop the sport of surfing in NSW to its maximum potential through the delivery of professional events, coaching and educational programs.

Surfing NSW is supported by the NSW Department of Sport & Recreation, who share in our mission to develop our sport and increase participation levels.

Name: Irish Sailing
Description:
Irish Sailing is the National Governing Body for sailing, powerboating and windsurfing in Ireland.

The primary objectives since its foundation in 1945 are to:
Serve the needs of its members.
Represent their interests at home and abroad with sports and government bodies.
Promote the development of the sports and increase the number of active participants.

Irish Sailing has 22,500 members and over 200 Irish Sailing affiliated organisations offering a range of training, racing, social, and leisure activities for their members. 
There is a network of over 135 Irish Sailing Training Centres offering training courses for dinghy, keelboat and catamaran sailors, cruisers, powerboaters, windsurfers, personal watercrafts (aka Jet Ski) and inland waterways motorboats, for Irish Sailing members and the general public alike.

Name: Amiens Padel
Description:
Bienvenue à AMIENS PADEL !

Votre complexe vous accueillera dès 2025, 7j/7 de 10h à 22h (dimanche de 10h à 15h), Chemin du Grand Riez à Cagny 80330

Quel que soit votre âge ou votre niveau, vous trouverez forcément plaisir à venir pratiquer le padel sur l'un de nos 7 terrains ou tout simplement profiter de nos espaces de convivialité.
 
Vous souhaitez vous initier individuellement ou en groupe ? Notre équipe propose des cours dispensés par un coach professionnel !
Vous n’avez pas de matériel ? Pas de panique, nous avons ce qu’il vous faut en location. Sinon, rendez-vous dans notre boutique.
 
La convivialité est également au cœur de notre offre. Grâce à notre club house de 200m2, vous pourrez revivre ensemble les meilleurs moments de votre match. 
Une pause padel le midi ? Une offre de restauration vous est également proposée. 
 
Pour les professionnels, nous avons diverses offres adaptées à vos besoins. Vous pouvez tout simplement associer votre image à celle de notre complexe ou même organiser un séminaire avec vos équipes. 
Nous disposons d’une salle de réunion pouvant accueillir, en fonction de l’utilisation, jusqu’à 80 personnes.

Name: Karachi University Pharmacy Sports Club(KUPSC)
Description:
The Karachi University Pharmacy Sports Club (KUPSC) is a student organization that focuses on promoting physical activity and healthy lifestyles among students at the Department Of Pharmacy,University of Karachi. The club offers a range of sports and physical activities, including cricket, football, basketball, table tennis, and badminton. The activities are designed to help students reduce stress and anxiety, which can be particularly challenging during exam periods or times of high academic pressure.

KUSPC's activities also provide a platform for students to socialize and build relationships with their peers, which can enhance their overall well-being and mental health. By participating in sports and physical activities, students can improve their fitness levels, develop coordination, and strengthen their immune systems, all of which can have a positive impact on their health.

In addition to promoting physical activity, KUSC also organizes various educational and social events that promote healthy lifestyles, such as seminars on nutrition and healthy eating, health fairs, and social events that provide healthy food options. Overall, the Karachi University Sports Club plays a vital role in promoting physical activity and healthy lifestyles among students, helping them to manage stress and maintain good health.

Our clubs blend progressive court sizes and a science-backed methodology to help players of all levels build confidence, refine technique, and grow on and off the court.

Rooted in the neighborhoods we serve, we create spaces where friendships thrive — from Downtown Brooklyn, Long Island City, and FiDi to Philadelphia and Ridge Hill (opening November 2025).

Name: Team Polti VisitMalta
Description:
Team Polti VisitMalta is a cycling structure with ProTeam, U-23 and junior teams that is part of the Contador Foundation. A project with more than 10 years of history, promoted by the cyclists Alberto Contador and Ivan Basso together with Fran Contador. Some of the greatest cyclists of today have grown on its ranks, in a structure that has not lost its origins with the steep forward in 2021 into the ProTeam category thanks to the impulse of Eolo and Kometa. Two victories in the Giro d’Italia, a great image as a team and constant growth have allowed the Polti company to join the project in 2024, which aspires to continue to evolve in the world of cycling.

Always with its sights set on development, on a human level, and on training formation, on a sporting level, and with the ambition of continuing to grow on the road to the highest category, the WorldTour, Team Polti Kometa has already competed in three editions of the Giro d’Italia and has won two stage victories in the race thanks to Lorenzo Fortunato and Davide Bais. The climber Fortunato won on Zoncolan in 2021, in a feat that will always be remembered; while Bais won on Campo Imperatore by showing his strength in the final part of the climb.

Guided by Fran Contador, Alberto Contador and Iván Basso, and with the aim of giving back to cycling a part of what cycling has given them, the team has earned on and off the road the respect of opponents, the admiration of fans and the interest of new cyclists and new sponsors, who want to join a project that is both sporting and human.

Through the social projects of the Alberto Contador Foundation, such as Bicis para la Vida by ŠKODA or Idemticos; as well as promoting the youth and under-23 training teams, and the Plaza Éboli cycling schools in Pinto (Madrid), the dimension of Polti Kometa grows every day with great professionals, important objectives and the enthusiasm of a project that loves cycling.

Name: K.v.v. Quick Boys
Description:
De Katwijkse voetbalvereniging Quick Boys is opgericht op 1 februari 1920. Met ruim 3.000 leden is K.v.v. Quick Boys de grootste voetbalvereniging van Nederland. Quick Boys kent een rijke historie met twintig afdelings-kampioenschappen sinds 1941 op het (toenmalig) hoogste niveau, elf landskampioenschappen bij de zaterdagamateurs en drie algehele landstitels.
In 2025 bereikte Quick Boys voor de tweede keer op rij de kwartfinale van het TOTO KNVB Bekertoernooi. In mei 2025 behaalde Quick Boys de titel in de tweede divisie, seizoen 2024-2025.

Quick Boys heeft bijna 300 bedrijven als sponsor aan zich verbonden die zich hebben verzameld als leden van de Business Club Quick Boys.

Name: Clube Atlético Indiano
Description:
Fundado em 1930 por um grupo de amigos apaixonados por futebol, o Clube Atlético Indiano nasceu do sonho de criar um espaço onde a paixão pelo esporte pudesse florescer. Inspirados pelo legado de Mahatma Gandhi, escolheram o nome em homenagem à sua mensagem de paz e resistência não violenta. Desde então, o Indiano tem sido um ponto de encontro por amigos e famílias.

Ao longo dos anos, O Clube passou por uma jornada de crescimento e transformação, partindo de um modesto terreno no Brooklin para uma vasta área às margens da Represa Guarapiranga em 1946. Com a determinação de seus diretores e sócios, evoluiu de um simples campo de futebol para uma sede majestosa, oferecendo uma variedade de instalações, incluindo ginásios, piscinas, quadras de tênis e campos, além de bares e espaço para eventos.

Name: Hexacup
Description:
Le sport a changé notre vie. 

Avec lui, on a grandi, appris, on s'est fait des souvenirs et des amis.
Mais le sport, c'est aussi fait pour s'engager. 
Alors on a eu une idée simple : un championnat 100% gratuit mais où chaque joueur doit participer à des actions écologiques.

En 2020, on a créé un petit tournoi de foot à Bordeaux. 
En 2023, notre app compte +20.000 users partout en France. 
Rien n'a changé, sauf la taille de nos actions : 300.000 mégots ramassés dans toute la France le 13 mai 2023 !

Et si en plus de changer la vie, le sport changeait le monde ?

Description: De Nederlandse Ski Vereniging is een actieve en dynamische sportbond en serviceorganisatie. Met diverse activiteiten, diensten en producten streeft de Nederlandse Ski Vereniging naar meer voordeel, service, veiligheid en plezier voor alle wintersporters.

Name: ACE Volleyball Club
Description:
Ace Volleyball Club prides itself on its family culture. We build strong leaders and set out to provide opportunity to our athletes in all stages of their careers. As a collective we value teamwork, mental toughness, and community outreach.

With over 2500 players, coaches, and alumni, Ace Volleyball Club offers an established network of strong, like-minded individuals. Our family supports each other and provides a home wherever you may be.

As one of the largest volleyball clubs in Canada, our Calgary, Foothills, Cochrane, Medicine Hat, Lethbridge, and Fraser Valley chapters operate with over 57 teams. We offer immense opportunity for mobility, growth, and freedom at all age groups. Our players compete in a team environment and learn the fundamental skills required for playing in Canadian and American port-secondary institutions. Our coaches can provide insight for athletes’ future planning and are more than willing to help athletes set goals and assist them in achieving them.

Ace Volleyball Club is involved in several community outreach initiatives. A few of the charities we support includes the Alberta’s Children Hospital, Make a Wish Foundation, and several local food banks. In the past eight seasons Ace Volleyball Club has raised over $97,000 for children in the Alberta Children’s Hospital, $100,000 for Make a Wish Foundation, $12,000 for the Canadian Women’s National Volleyball Team, and has donated a dozen boxes of volleyball gear to youth in Nairobi, Kenya via the Youth Initiative Development Program.

Name: Skate Australia
Description:
Skate Australia is the national sporting organisation for skate sports and skateboarding, recognised by Sport Australia, the Australian Olympic Committee and the international federation, World Skate.

Skate Australia works in partnership with affiliated State Skating Associations to bring together the diverse and active skating disciplines of Artistic, Inline Downhill, Inline Freestyle, Inline Hockey, Inline Speed, Rink Hockey, Roller Derby, Roller Freestyle, Skateboarding Downhill and Street Luge, Skateboarding Vert and the Olympic Disciplines of Skateboarding Park and Street.

Operating across 36+ countries, we combine strategic league development, advanced digital engagement, and iconic venue creation to build a new era of global sport.

Through our groundbreaking "50 Vets a Week" program, we are on a mission to relieve over $5,000,000 in veteran debt during the 2025 race season. Every time we compete, veterans win, and our partners become part of something far greater than a logo on a racecar.

 Driven by Purpose
With races across the NASCAR Cup Series, our team platform connects brands with one of the most loyal and action-oriented fan bases in sports.

 Veterans First, Always
We support veteran-owned businesses, collaborate with military-affiliated partners, and tell authentic stories that inspire real change.

 Partnerships That Make an Impact
When you partner with Team AmeriVet, you join a cause-driven mission that doesn’t just generate visibility, it changes lives.

Let's build something meaningful together — on and off the track.

Name: ASPTT Clermont Omnisports
Description:
L'ASPTT Clermont Omnisports : Un Club, Une Passion, Une Communauté

Bienvenue à l'ASPTT Clermont Omnisports, l'endroit où le sport se transforme en passion, et où les communautés sportives se rassemblent pour vivre des moments exceptionnels. Depuis notre fondation en 1938, nous sommes fiers d'incarner pleinement nos valeurs en promouvant la pratique sportive pour tous, quel que soit l'âge ou le niveau.

Notre histoire riche en traditions sportives a façonné notre identité. Avec une variété de disciplines allant de l'athlétisme au football, en passant par le rugby touch, le tennis, la natation, le tir sportif, l'ecole de sport et bien d'autres. L'ASPTT Clermont Omnisports est le lieu de rencontre des sportifs de tous horizons. 
Nous offrons des opportunités pour les jeunes talents en herbe, les amateurs passionnés et les athlètes de haut niveau.

Au-delà de la compétition, nous croyons en l'importance du sport en tant que vecteur de valeurs positives. L'esprit d'équipe, la discipline, la persévérance et le respect sont les fondements de notre club. Nous nous efforçons de transmettre ces valeurs à nos membres, car nous croyons que le sport va au-delà du terrain et contribue à la formation de citoyens responsables.

Notre communauté est notre plus grande fierté. Chaque membre, chaque bénévole et chaque supporter joue un rôle essentiel dans la réussite de notre club. 

Que vous soyez un sportif chevronné ou simplement à la recherche d'une nouvelle passion, l'ASPTT Clermont Omnisports vous ouvre ses portes. Rejoignez-nous pour vivre l'excitation du sport, pour créer des amitiés durables et pour contribuer à une communauté en pleine croissance.

Nous sommes bien plus qu'un club sportif. Nous sommes l'ASPTT Clermont Omnisports, et nous vous invitons à faire partie de notre histoire sportive.

REJOINS LE MOUVEMENT.

Name: João Diogo Manteigas
Description:
Estimados Consócios e demais Benfiquistas,

O meu nome é João Diogo Manteigas, sou sócio do Sport Lisboa e Benfica há 40 anos e apresento-me hoje como candidato à Presidência do Sport Lisboa e Benfica.

O Sport Lisboa e Benfica é, para mim, muito mais do que um clube. É uma paixão que me acompanha desde sempre, felizmente transmitida pelo meu Pai desde o primeiro momento em que nasci. 

Nada faz mais sentido do que a excelência de se sentir e pertencer ao Sport Lisboa e Benfica. 

Cresci a querer viver intensamente tudo o que envolvia o Sport Lisboa e Benfica. Fiz um trajeto idêntico a tantos outros que, tal como eu, passaram pelas várias modalidades do clube. Joguei rugby nas camadas jovens e alcancei a faixa de cadete no basquetebol, uma das modalidades mais poderosas do clube.

A par da minha ligação direta ao clube, sempre fiz questão de seguir as equipas do Benfica para todo o lado. Seja onde for.

Percebi, desde muito cedo, que era necessário acumular uma vasta experiência no setor desportivo mas com maior incidência no futebol, tanto a nível pessoal como profissional.

Assumo que o objetivo sempre foi claro para mim: poder um dia mais tarde, se os meus consócios assim me permitirem, colocar todas as ferramentas  necessárias e adquiridas ao longo dos últimos 17 anos ao serviço da instituição “Benfica”, toda ela composta por uma gigantesca transversalidade.

Far-me-ei rodear de uma equipa de profissionais altamente qualificados no setor desportivo e nas mais diversas áreas. Farei-me rodear de novas ideias e estratégias que mudarão o rumo do nosso Sport Lisboa e Benfica.

Asseguro-vos que a minha equipa estará pronta para liderar com paixão, competência e uma visão clara para o futuro do Sport Lisboa e Benfica, colocando sempre os superiores interesses deste, na pessoa dos seus sócios, em primeiro lugar.

Saibam que será com elevada emoção, determinação e compromisso que estou convicto que o Benfica Vencerá!

Sócio do Sport Lisboa e Benfica n. 12.262

Name: Footy
Description:
Footy is a fast growing football competition for companies and friends. Started in 2010 with the first competition, Footy now organizes multiple leagues catering for different groups. There are leagues for companies and friends, women, students, indoor and in different cities; Amsterdam, Utrecht and Amstelveen.

All leagues are played on small sided football fields - mostly 7 a side. Games are played weekly and are guided by qualified referees. You decide what evening and location you play, so it suits your diary. Footy facilitates the whole competition so you just need to show up and enjoy your game. 

In 2016 Footy Park, the first Footy owned football park, opened its doors in Amsterdam. Our own leagues are being played and always followed by an equally entertaining 3rd half. With 3 5aside courts and 2 6aside pitches we can also organise company events and cater for parties. 

Footy offers dynamic careers in a sporty environment. If your heart beats faster from words like organizing, sales, and football Footy could be your type of company. For more information on roles and opportunities visit our website www.footyamsterdam.nl or contact us directly.

Key Offerings:
•	Leks Schools League: We proudly organize the Leks Schools League, a premier scouting program that brings together secondary schools from across Nigeria in a spirited home and away format. This initiative not only showcases raw talent but also serves as a stepping stone for aspiring athletes to shine on a larger stage.

•	Escola United: As the proud owners of Escola United, a formidable team competing in The Creative Championship (TCC), we are dedicated to nurturing talents at the grassroots level. Escola United also takes part in Nigerian National League (NLO), further contributing to the growth and development of football in Nigeria.

Motto: Sic Parvis Magna - Greatness from small beginnings. This phrase encapsulates our belief that every young athlete has the potential for greatness, and with the right guidance and opportunities, they can achieve extraordinary feats.

Name: Gwalia United
Description:
Gwalia United – Past, Present, and Future

Founded in 1975 as Cardiff City Ladies, our club has been a proud pioneer in women’s football for nearly five decades. From grassroots beginnings to producing over 100 international players, we have built a legacy rooted in resilience, talent, and community spirit. For many years, we carried the flag for Welsh football in England, competing against the strongest clubs in the game and giving countless young players a platform to dream.

In 2024, we began a bold new chapter, rebranding as Gwalia United to reflect our national identity and ambition. We are now the only Welsh club competing in the English system, representing not just a city, but the whole nation. Off the pitch, we’ve rebuilt our infrastructure, introduced cutting-edge performance analysis, and deepened our commitment to developing homegrown players. On the pitch, we are building a squad capable of challenging for promotion, while remaining grounded in our values of integrity, inclusivity, and excellence.

Looking ahead, our vision is clear: to rise through the leagues and reach the Women’s Super League, inspiring the next generation of Welsh players and supporters along the way. Our pathway links directly with youth football, colleges, and the FAW, ensuring that the best talent in Wales has a route to the top. Commercially, initiatives like The Gwalia 500 aim to unite business and sport in a way never seen before in Wales, creating a powerful network of support to fuel our ambitions.

The future of Gwalia United is not just about football—it’s about community pride, national representation, and proving that Welsh women can compete and win at the highest level. Our story is one of history, transformation, and an unshakeable belief in what we can achieve together. The next chapter is being written now—and we invite you to be part of it.

Name: Scuderia Bandeiras
Description:
A Scuderia Bandeiras é muito mais que uma equipe de Stock Car: somos um hub de negócios, relacionamento estratégico e experiências exclusivas, utilizando o automobilismo como plataforma de conexão entre marcas, empresas e clientes.

Fundada pelo piloto e empresário Átila Abreu, nossa equipe une performance esportiva de alto nível à inovação empresarial. Criamos oportunidades únicas para patrocinadores e parceiros, potencializando resultados por meio de ações de marketing estratégicas, eventos personalizados, palestras e experiências corporativas exclusivas.

Nosso objetivo é impulsionar marcas e gerar negócios, ampliando a visibilidade e proporcionando conexões valiosas através da emoção, competitividade e dinamismo do automobilismo.

Name: Quantum Movement
Description:
Quantum is creating a world where practitioners have the tools to facilitate a convenient and personalised program that maximizes an athlete’s true potential and performance by extending playing time and reducing injury risk.

Quantum's AI-powered user-friendly sports technology platform optimizes athletic performance and recovery. Developed by elite sports physiotherapists, it uses state-of-the-art sensors and camera technology to capture and analyze 3D movement data, providing a detailed biomechanical view of each athlete's performance.

The portable system allows for seamless deployment in various settings, making high-level performance analysis accessible anytime, anywhere. Unique algorithms enable coaches and physiotherapists to set customized performance targets, establish benchmarks, and track progress.

Quantum Movement offers several benefits, including:

Efficient Injury Recovery: Reduces downtime and gets athletes back to their peak quickly.
Return-to-Play Protocol: Ensures athletes return to play only when fully prepared, preventing re-injury.
Pre-Season Screening: Offers a complete assessment to tailor development plans and mitigate injury risks.
In-Season Monitoring: Provides continuous assessments to proactively address health and performance needs.

Key outcomes of using Quantum Movement include enhanced player longevity, improved team outcomes, and an innovative health framework, setting new standards in athlete care.

Vi har kompetente rådgivere inden for sportens verden, der alle er eller har været dybt engageret i lokale idrætsforeninger. Derfor har vi stor erfaring i det aarhusianske idrætsliv. Name: Player Care and Support Services Limited
Description:

Our mission is to ensure that everyone within the game feels supported, valued, and prepared; both on and off the pitch. We understand the unique pressures of professional football, and we’re committed to delivering practical, discreet, and personalised support that makes a real difference to people’s lives.

From day-to-day wellbeing and lifestyle management to crisis support and bespoke care solutions, we offer a service built on experience, empathy, and integrity.

Proud #SBS Winner, PCSS Ltd is dedicated to raising standards in Player Care and helping individuals and organisations across football thrive at every level.

Name: Real Club de Golf La Herrería
Description:
El Real Club de Golf La Herrería, inaugurado en 1966, se encuentra inmerso en el Bosque de La Herrería a 400 metros del Monasterio de San Lorenzo de El Escorial y a 45 kilómetros de Madrid, al pie del Monte Abantos. La Dehesa de La Herrería es una de las propiedades adquiridas por Felipe II para la manutención del Real Monasterio de San Lorenzo el Real de El Escorial.
La sociedad Real Club de Golf La Herrería, S.A.U.(originalmente INTERPRESTIGE, S.A.U.) fue creada en 1985 por la Sociedad Estatal Tabacalera S.A. En 1992 modifica sus estatutos para llevar el desarrollo y la gestión de La Herrería Club de Golf, tras un acuerdo con Patrimonio Nacional, gestora hasta ese momento del Club. En 2006, tras solicitud a la Casa Real, se concedió el título de “REAL” a La Herrería Club de Golf, momento en que cambia su denominación social a REAL CLUB DE GOLF LA HERRERIA S.A.U. Actualmente esta sociedad es propiedad de Imperial Tobacco Company a través de la sociedad
española Altadis.
Location: San Lorenzo de El Escorial, Madrid

Name: IN SPORT s.r.l. Società Sportiva Dilettantistica
Description:
IN SPORT S.r.l. Società Sportiva Dilettantistica è una società senza scopo di lucro.

Il Gruppo IN SPORT (che comprende 4 Società Sportive Dilettantistiche) ha come finalità la promozione dell'attività sportiva intesa come benessere psico-fisico della persona e come momento di socializzazione, divertimento, educazione e salute che vengono sintetizzati nella vision: “Allenati a star bene”.

Con oltre 20 impianti in 3 Regioni (Lombardia, Piemonte e Veneto) rappresenta una realtà riconosciuta ed affermata nonché un punto di riferimento a livello nazionale nella gestione di Centri Sportivi natatori e polifunzionali.

Conta sulla collaborazione di risorse umane altamente qualificate e di indiscussa professionalità, opera quotidianamente per offrire un servizio di alta qualità, orientato alla soddisfazione di tutti gli sportivi e non che frequentano i propri Centri Sportivi.

Da molti anni promuove attività sociali, con particolare attenzione a quelle in favore delle persone con disabilità ed a quelle rivolte alla terza età.

IN SPORT è riconosciuta dal Comitato Olimpico Nazionale Italiano (CONI); è affiliata alla Federazione Italiana Nuoto (FIN) con il riconoscimento della Scuola Nuoto, alla Federazione Italiana Di Atletica Leggera (FIDAL), alla Federazione Italiana Triathlon (FITRI), alla Federazione Italiana Pesistica (FIPE).
È anche affiliato agli Enti di Promozione Sportiva CNS Libertas e CSI.

IN SPORT è in possesso delle Certificazioni di Qualità ISO 9001:2015 per l'attività di “promozione di attività sportive con gestione di impianti sportivi” e della ISO 14001:2015 per i “sistemi di gestione dell’ambiente”. Ha inoltre ottenuto dall’Autorità Garante della Concorrenza e del Mercato il rating di legalità «stella-stella+» e si è dotata del modello organizzativo L. 231 con nomina dell’Organismo di Vigilanza.

Name: FC TOKYO
Description:
■ Company Name：
Tokyo Football Club Co., Ltd.

■ Established：
October 1, 1998 (Tokyo Citizens' Day)

■ Main Business：
(1) Professional football team "FC Tokyo" operated since 1999
(2) Soccer School and Soccer Promotion Activities
(3) Team's Original Goods Production and Sales

■ FC Tokyo's Basic Philosophy：
We aim to achieve the realization of the following principles through a collaborative system between local communities, government, and businesses, and strive to create a truly "local J-League club for the citizens" from a long-term perspective.

(1) Contribute to the healthy physical and mental development of youth and the health and joy of citizens through soccer, and contribute to the promotion of sports culture and the development of local communities, as well as international exchange and friendship.
(2) In the future, we aim to create a club that focuses on "lifelong sports" that can contribute to the local community in both competitive sports and recreational activities, including sports other than soccer. This will be based on the organization of J-League clubs and will be achieved through its development and expansion.
(3) Nurture a soccer team that is suitable for the capital Tokyo, which has become a symbol for the citizens and gives dreams to young people, create many fans among the citizens, and contribute to the development of a sense of solidarity among the citizens (sense of belonging to the local community) and the revitalization of the local community.
(4) We strive to collaborate and cooperate with schools and local communities, focusing on soccer clinics, soccer schools, and various events, in order to promote and provide guidance for soccer activities to youth and citizens of all ages.

Name: Villefranche Handball Business Club
Description:
Villefranche Handball Beaujolais (VHB) – Club de handball de référence en Beaujolais et Val de Saône.

Créé en 2008, le VHB s’est rapidement imposé comme un acteur majeur du handball régional, porté par la passion, la performance et un fort ancrage territorial. Avec près de 100 licenciés, des bénévoles engagés et une équipe fanion évoluant en Nationale 3, le club défend fièrement ses couleurs  sur tous les terrains.

Mais le VHB, ce n’est pas qu’une équipe : c’est une communauté.
 Des jeunes qui découvrent la pratique dès le baby-hand
 Des éducateurs et arbitres en formation
 Des dirigeants et bénévoles qui font vivre l’association au quotidien
 Des partenaires qui s’engagent à nos côtés pour bâtir un projet durable

 Notre mission : développer la pratique du handball pour toutes les générations, former les talents de demain, et renforcer le lien entre le monde associatif et le monde économique.

Parce qu’un maillot est bien plus qu’un équipement, nous faisons du sport un vecteur d’image et de fierté collective. Chaque partenariat, qu’il soit financier, en nature ou en compétences, est une pierre apportée à l’édifice du club. Ensemble, nous faisons rayonner nos valeurs :
 L’engagement
 La solidarité
 La transmission
 L’ambition

 Nos matchs à domicile se jouent à L’Escale (Arnas) véritable lieu de vie et de partage.

 Notre vision : bâtir un club moderne, structuré et ambitieux, capable de fédérer autour du sport et de contribuer au dynamisme économique et social du territoire.

Vous êtes une entreprise, une institution ou un passionné de sport ?
 Rejoignez l’aventure du VHB et devenez acteur de son développement.

On joue fort  On vit fort

Name: CoTrainer
Description:
CoTrainer - Alles für dein Fußballtraining!
Die beste Trainingsapp, die Dein Fußballtraining auf das nachste Level bringt.

CoTrainer wurde speziell für Fußballtrainer und
-spieler entwickelt, um das Training effizienter, interaktiver und unterhaltsamer zu gestalten.

"Mit CoTrainer kannst Du dich von deinen Ausreden verabschieden. Es kommt nur noch auf deine Leidenschaft und Motivation für den Fußball an!" - Dzsenifer Marozsán - 6x Champions League Siegerin

Gamechanger für Trainer:
1.    Umfangreicher Übungskatalog: Zugriff auf eine umfangreiche Datenbank mit über 1000 Übungen, die individuell auf die Stärken und Schwächen deiner Mannschaft eingehen.
2.    Effiziente Trainingskonzeption: Mit CoTrainer planst du dein Mannschaftstraining spielerisch leicht in unter 5 Minuten.
3.    Einheitliche Philosophie: Mit CoTrainer stattest du deinen Verein mit einem einheitlichen Trainingskonzept für alle Mannschaften aus.

Gamechanger für Spieler:
1.    Train Like a Pro: Trainiere überall und jederzeit mit individuellen Übungen und Plänen. Lerne von den Besten und Trainiere mit den Fußballgrößen Dzsenifer Marozsán, Svenja Huth und Alex Frei.
2.    Individualtraining: Als Spieler kannst mit dich mit CoTrainer in spezifischen Dimensionen weiterentwickeln und die Saison deines Lebens spielen.
3.    Challenges: Messe dich in Challenges mit Fußballern auf der ganzen Welt.
4.    Kostenlos: Für alle Spieler ist CoTrainer vollig kostenlos.

Lade Dir CoTrainer jetzt herunter und erlebe, wie einfach und effektiv modernes Fußballtraining sein kann. Mache den ersten Schritt zu mehr Erfolg auf dem Spielfeld!

Name: Businessclub Rijnsburgse Boys
Description:
De businessclub van Rijnsburgse Boys bestaat uit ongeveer 180 bedrijven uit de Duin- en Bollenstreek, actief in uiteenlopende branches. Het lidmaatschap van de businessclub biedt uitstekende mogelijkheden om contacten te leggen en te onderhouden met (mogelijke) klanten.

Doel
De businessclub van Rijnsburgse Boys stelt zich ten doel te bevorderen dat de selectie-elftallen op een zo hoog mogelijk niveau presteren in de verschillende voetbalcompetities. Met de financiële bijdrage steunen de bedrijven in de eerste plaats het eerste elftal. Maar een deel van de inkomsten gaat ook naar de jeugdopleiding van Rijnsburgse Boys.

Sponsorhome
De sponsoren ontmoeten elkaar in de sfeervolle ambiance van het sponsorhome, onder het genot van een hapje en een drankje, voor en na de thuiswedstrijden van Rijnsburgse Boys. Bij een aantal uitwedstrijden, onder andere bij clubs in de regio, bent u ook welkom in het sponsorhome van de tegenstander. Daarnaast organiseren we regelmatig business-to-business bijeenkomsten en gezellige avonden, zoals een wijnproeverij, borrels en een slotavond met de A-selectie. Bij het lidmaatschap van de businessclub hoort ook het jaarlijkse bezoek aan een wedstrijd in de eredivisie.

Promotie en relatiebeheer
Het lidmaatschap van de businessclub is een uitstekende gelegenheid om te netwerken. Ook kunt u via Rijnsburgse Boys uw producten en diensten promoten, variërend van advertenties in het programmablad en reclameboodschappen op de moderne LED boarding tot het uitnodigen van relaties voor een complete middag uit.

Name: Altay Spor Kulübü
Description:
ALTAY, Türk sporunun aynası ve tarihidir. İzmir’de sporun öncülüğünü yaparken İkinci Meşrutiyet’ten sonra hürriyet  kıvılcımı Altay’da atılmıştır. Siyah-beyazlı gençler, Rum, Ermeni ve diğer azınlıkların politik, ekonomik, sportif baskılarına karşı ilk bayrağı açtılar. Böylelikle Türk gençliğini,  “Gavur İzmir” adını çıkaran Rum ve Ermeni toplumlarıyla,  İzmir’deki Rum metropoliti Hiristosmos ve avanesine karşı uyandırdılar. Milliyetçilik bilinçlenmesine önayak olan Necati Bey ile Vasıf Çınar Bey, İttihat ve Terakki Cemiyeti’nde Celal Bayar ile kol kola omuz omuza mücadele ettiler.

İzmir’in işgali sırasında ilk kurşunu sıkan şehit gazeteci Osman Nevres’in (Hasan Tahsin) arkadaşları Necati Bey ve Vasıf Çınar Bey, hürriyet kıvılcımını işte böyle ateşlediler. Hasan Tahsin’in vatan sevgisi ve hürriyet aşkı ”İzmir’e Doğru” isimli gazetede de sürdü.
Altaylı olmakla, her kuşak için büyük bir övünç kaynağıdır. Gelecek kuşaklar da dedelerinin, babalarının, ağabeylerinin sönmeyen meşalesini taşıyacaktır. İşte “Büyük ALTAY” sözü, yalnız spor sahalarındaki başarıdan dolayı değil, hürriyet kıvılcımını ateşleyen , milliyetçilik ruhunu yaşatan, milliyetçilik bilincini yerleştiren, milli mücadelede canını ortaya koyan, Kurtuluş Savaşı’nda destanlar yaratan, Cumhuriyet döneminde hizmetten hizmete koşan, Atatürk Devrimleri’ni koruyan, yaşatan evlatlarının eserinden dolayı söylendi.

İLKLERİN TAKIMI ALTAY

– Altay, futbol tarihimizde deplasmanda maç oynayan ilk Türk takımıdır.
– 15 kez İzmir şampiyonluğu yaşayan tek İzmir takımıdır.
– Kendi bünyesinden iki kulüp daha çıkaran (Altınordu-Göztepe) ilk Türk takımıdır.

Name: MAFALALA RUGBY CLUBE
Description:
Integridade, paixão, solidariedade, disciplina e respeito: estes são os valores que todos os dias ensinamos.

Usamos o rugby como catalisador e transformador da comunidade local.

O nosso objetivo é dotar os jovens do bairro com ferramentas educativas, físicas, éticas e psicológicas que os fortaleçam para o sucesso no futuro.

O Desporto como ferramenta aglutinadora e motivacional no combate à pobreza, usando o seu poder educacional na criação de perspectivas que se estendem além do amanhã, onde a sobrevivência deixe de ser um fim em si e apenas um caminho no trajecto de uma vida útil na sociedade.

Trabalhamos com cerca de mil crianças mas escolas de ensino primário, alcançando assim todas as crianças do bairro, a futura e também, indirectamente, toda a população no presente.

Além das escolas primárias, estamos a cimentar as camadas jovens do Clube onde vamos implantar o conceito do funil educativo integrado, fomentando assim a meritocracia e a igualdade de género.

No escalão sénior além de termos conquistado o primeiro campeonato nacional oficial da Federação Moçambicana de Rugby, a quem cedemos vários jogadores para representar o país, temos casos de sucesso de integração no mundo laboral derivados da ambição inculcada no Clube, que extravasa o sucesso desportivo e se explana na vida quotidiana dos nossos jogadores e dirigentes.

O Respeito, a Integridade, a Paixão, a Solidariedade, e a Disciplina, são os valores que prosseguimos. 
Não os vemos como um dado adquirido, mas sim, como uma guia para o que pretendemos alcançar.

Synergy is the organizing committee of IGNITE, the annual two-day Sports Meet hosted by IGDTUW. With a fervent belief in the transformative power of sports, IGNITE is an exhilarating celebration of athletic prowess of women in sports, graced by many renowned sports personalities and numerous athletes from colleges across India. Name: Cybersmart Aquatics
Description:
Dive into Excellence with Cybersmart Aquatics

Welcome to Cybersmart Aquatics, where passion meets precision in the art of swimming. Located at the state-of-the-art Milnerton High School facility in Cape Town, our club offers an unparalleled aquatic experience in our newly constructed, indoor, and heated pool. Since our inception in 2008, we’ve been driven by a singular vision: to create a premier, independently operated swimming club that fosters talent, nurtures growth, and builds champions.

At Cybersmart Aquatics, we believe that every swimmer has the potential to excel. Our team of highly qualified coaches, including Olympic-level instructors, is dedicated to providing top-tier coaching for swimmers of all levels—from beginners to elite athletes. With customized programs that emphasize technique, endurance, and mental fortitude, we’re here to help you achieve your personal best.

Our commitment extends beyond the pool. We offer a holistic approach to training, incorporating dry-land exercises, nutrition advice, and mental conditioning to ensure our swimmers are well-rounded athletes. Whether you’re training for competition or simply looking to improve your fitness, Cybersmart Aquatics provides a supportive and motivating environment.

Explore more about our programs, upcoming events, and exclusive offers at www.cybersmartaquatics.com and shop the latest swim gear at www.shop.cybersmartaquatics.com

Join us at Cybersmart Aquatics—where your journey to aquatic excellence begins!

Name: Idræt og Sociale Medier
Description:
Idræt og Sociale Medier hjælper og inspirerer idrætsforeninger og andre fællesskaber med at etablere sig på sociale medier og få det indarbejdet som en del af dagligdagen.

De danske idrætsforeninger er et overflødighedshorn af sportslige og sociale tilbud. Desværre er tilbuddene alt for ofte usynlige for potentielle medlemmer, der er vant til, at information, motivation og invitationer dukker op i nyhedsstrømmen på sociale medier. 

En forening er et fællesskab. Spil på det. Dyrk det. Få det til at vokse med hjælp fra sociale medier.

Mine erfaringer er baseret på dagligt arbejde med idræt og sociale medier siden 2008, hvor jeg startede Løbeklubben på Facebook. Det blev Danmarks største brugerdrevne løbenetværk, hvor mange medlemmer blev en del af hinandens løbeliv - og liv generelt.

Siden 2015 har jeg hjulpet orienteringssporten med at blive mere synlige på Facebook. Det er sket gennem:
- Facebooksiden Orienteringssjov, der samler klubbernes træninger og løb, der er åbne for alle
- Praktiske workshops for klubbernes Facebookadministratorer
- Online coaching af klubbernes Facebookadministratorer
- Artikler i bladet Orientering

KONTAKT

Name: EuroGames Lyon 2025
Description:
Hosted annually in a different European city since 1992, the EuroGames stand as the largest inclusive amateur sports event in Europe, celebrating diversity, particularly in terms of disability, sexual orientation, and gender identity. The primary objective is to provide a welcoming and "safe" space for everyone to come together and practice sport. The EuroGames whose license is held by the EGLSF, "European Gay and Lesbian Sport Federation," are open to all who embrace the values of inclusion and diversity and support participation in sports, regardless of sexual orientation, gender identity, age, disability, or sporting level.
The city of Lyon had the honnor to win the organisation of the EuroGames in 2025 from the 23rd to the 26th of july. More than 4000 athletes coming from all over Europe and beyond are expected, with the support of 800 volunteers, in 35 sports in competition and parasports, opening and closing ceremonies...
The EuroGames Lyon 2025 will be a HIGH time to celebrate diversity in sport.

Sponsored by
- Ville de Lyon
- Métropole du Grand Lyon
- Ministère chargé des sports
- Ministère chargé de l'égalité entre les femmes et les hommes, de la diversité et de l'égalité des chances

__________________

Name: Sportregion Rhein-Neckar e. V.
Description: Die Metropolregion Rhein-Neckar besteht aus vielen sportlich-engagierten Vereinen, Unternehmen, Kommunen und einer sportbegeisterten Bevölkerung. Der gemeinnützige Verein Sportregion Rhein-Neckar nutzt diese vorhandenen Potentiale und bildet ein länderübergreifendes Netzwerk für die Akteure des Sports in der Rhein-Neckar-Region. Seit der Gründung im Jahr 2004 gilt der Anspruch des Vereins die Region mit hoher Lebensqualität besser zu positionieren, die regionale Identität nachhaltig zu stärken und die Zusammenarbeit im Sport zukunftsorientiert weiterzuentwickeln. Um dem gerecht zu werden, ermöglicht die Sportregion Rhein-Neckar e. V. ihren knapp 200 Mitgliedern aus den Bereichen Breiten- und Spitzensport, Wirtschaft, Wissenschaft und Kommunen einen branchen- und sportartenübergreifenden Austausch. Nach dem Motto „Gemeinsam die Region bewegen“ organisiert der Verein mit seinen vier Beiräten regelmäßige Netzwerktreffen, bei denen aktuelle Themen, Ideen und Probleme besprochen und gemeinsame Projekte initiiert werden. Den 24-köpfigen Vereinsvorstand führt Prof. Dr. Eckart Würzner, Oberbürgermeister der Stadt Heidelberg, mit seinen Stellvertretern Ralf Eisenhauer (Bürgermeister Stadt Mannheim in Bereichen Bauen, Planung, Verkehr und Sport), Prof. Dr. Henning Plessner (Ruprecht-Karls-Universität Heidelberg, Institut für Sport und Sportwissenschaft) und Rudolf Storck (Sportbund Pfalz). Die Geschäfte werden von Andrea Michels geführt.

Name: Real Eyes Sport
Description:
Real Eyes Sport è un'associazione Sportiva Dilettantistica senza fini di lucro. 
Nata nel 2019, da un’idea di Daniele Cassioli, promuove e organizza attività ludico-motorie per persone con disabilità e oggi conta più di 200 tesserati sotto i 18 anni, un dato estremamente significativo. 

La mission dell’associazione risiede nel promuovere l’avviamento motorio e avvicinare il maggior numero possibile di persone con disabilità allo sport, inteso come alleato riabilitativo e potente strumento per rinforzare la cultura dell’inclusione tra i giovani, sensibilizzando allo stesso tempo genitori, insegnanti, personale medico e paramedico ed eventuali caregeaver sull’impatto positivo che tali iniziative hanno sulla vita di chi ha una disabilità.
Offrire esperienze motivanti, arricchenti e divertenti per tutte le fasce di età, rafforzando il senso di comunità e il rispetto del prossimo.
Stimolare la crescita cognitiva dei ragazzi proponendo attività sportive ed eventi, sostenendo contestualmente le famiglie coinvolte. 

Cosa fa l’associazione?
- Si adopera per facilitare e aumentare le quote di movimento nella popolazione più giovane e con disabilità.
- Attività formative, educative e didattiche nelle scuole. 
- Attività sportive in collaborazione con enti (pubblici o privati), organizzazioni, associazioni e qualunque altra realtà che sia in linea sotto il profilo valoriale, avendo a cuore lo sport come strumento educativo e d’inclusione. 
- Attività per la concreta diffusione della cultura inclusiva, soprattutto partendo dai bambini e dalle loro famiglie. 
- Campagne ed eventi che hanno lo scopo di avvicinare la comunità al mondo della disabilità. 
- Camp estivi ed invernali per bambini e ragazzi con disabilità visiva. 

https://sportrealeyes.it/
