Name: Milwaukee Golf Tour
Description:
Say goodbye to all-day tournaments or the weekly ‘Tuesday League Play’ at the same course every week.

The Milwaukee Golf Tour (‘MGT’) is redefining the way a traditional golf league is being offered. The MGT is a singles, flighted, net handicap, tournament rule, stroke play format. The MGT season (April - September) consists of a 12 event schedule that runs parallel with the PGA Tour schedule.

Schedule flexibility is what separates the MGT from everyone else, members are given two weeks to play the said scheduled event. You must play with another member on tour to attest to your score, and for your round to be official. There are special attestation rules in place for major events & playoffs where playing with a new attester is required. 

The MGT utilizes handicap flights, a FedEx Cup style point system with payouts for each event (gross and net), regular season flight champions and a championship day purse. Members are able to instantly communicate with one another via our Slack network - broken down by preferred time of play and flights. Members can also book tee times via our online booking service to pair up with other members.

The Milwaukee Golf Tour is an affiliate of the Hybrid Golf Tour.

Pre-register at mkegolftour.com for all news & updates regarding the 2025 season!

Name: BOXER INSIDE CLUB
Description:
Le club Boxer Inside
La boxe pour tous, dans un vrai esprit club
Boxer Inside Club, c’est d’abord un club associatif ouvert à toutes celles et tous ceux qui veulent boxer, de 7 à 77 ans, de la pratique de loisirs aux compétitions pour amateurs et professionnels, à des tarifs très accessibles et dans des salles accueillantes et bien équipées. Le club dispose de trois sites : Paris 13ème,  Aulnay-sous-Bois et Le Blanc-Mesnil en Seine-Saint-Denis.

A travers ses différents programmes, le Club accueille chaque année plus de 1500 personnes dans un vrai esprit club. L’association est animée par une quinzaine de personnes – salariés permanents, coachs bénévoles, jeunes en service civique... Boxer Inside est affilié à la Fédération française de boxe.

L’Academy
École de boxe, école de vie
Ouverte aux jeunes filles et garçons de 10 à 17 ans, passés à l’origine par le club Boxer Inside, l’Academy est plus qu’une école de boxe : une école de vie, dont l’ambition est de créer des parcours de réussite pour les jeunes. Au-delà de former les potentiels champions de demain, l’Academy aide chaque jeune à développer par le sport les compétences transversales et les savoir-être qui favoriseront son insertion sociale et professionnelle. L’apprentissage de la discipline sportive à travers la boxe, selon une méthode fondée sur l’engagement et la bienveillance, va de pair avec des formations (premiers secours, éloquence...) et des ateliers thématiques (journalisme, anglais...) qui complètent le bagage éducatif et citoyen des jeunes, et contribuent à leur ouverture au monde.

Name: Try Tag Rugby
Description:
Try Tag Rugby is a fast-growing social sports organisation running leagues, tournaments and social events across the UK. Our offering of Tag Rugby is one of the most inclusive male and female sports available in the UK. 

In summer 2023 Try Tag Rugby saw a record 883 teams, just over 10,500 adult players, playing weekly across the UK at over 70 leagues. We have established popular Try Tag Rugby leagues in Brighton & Hove, Bristol, Coventry & Warwickshire, Edinburgh, London, Manchester, Newcastle, Thames Valley, Wigan, West Yorkshire, South Yorkshire and York, but that’s just the start! Licensing opportunities are available to take Try Tag Rugby to all parts of the UK.

Our event style tournaments run throughout the year across multiple locations. Tournaments welcome players from all corners of the world and include onsite attendance of over 2000 people at our largest events. 

We take great pride in players saying that joining Try Tag Rugby is like becoming part of a giant family. The fun social scene that develops around our leagues and from being part of a team is a big draw for our players and makes participation about more than just the game itself.

Try Tag Rugby is also the official UK delegate to the ITF (International Tag Federation), responsible for managing the Great Britain Tag Rugby teams. Great Britain competes annually against other international teams, and every three years at the Tag World Cup.

With over 40 staff & licensees, we would love to hear from hard working & talented sports enthusiasts keen to help us grow over the coming years. Opportunities also exist for commercial partners to get involved with our leagues, events & Great Britain teams. 

To understand more, please visit www.trytagrugby.com

Name: Showcase Basketball
Description:
Showcase Basketball is the premier organization for basketball player development.  We provide the highest level of basketball training in a fun and positive atmosphere.  Through our various work in the United States and Europe, Showcase Basketball is becoming a worldwide brand that has a proven model of building great basketball players and even better people.

The spirit of Showcase Basketball is driven by the desire of our founder, Jeff Christensen, to provide professional level training to basketball players of all ages and skill levels.  By allowing our participants to learn professional level techniques at an early age, we can offer them a platform to advance their development more quickly and gain a competitive advantage over their opponents.

Within our programs, players are taught not only “how” to do something, but “why” they need to know it, and “when” and “where” it will be useful for them.  Our combination of providing the highest level of basketball training, a focus on developing basketball IQ, and molding young athletes to be outstanding people in all aspects of their life has brought rave reviews from parents, lasting relationships with participants, and high praise from team coaches.

What We Do?

As a sports tech company, we provide innovative technology solutions to the sports industry in India and other countries. Our offerings include software, mobile applications, and wearable devices that are essential for grassroots-level players, emerging kids, sports teams, athletes, and coaches. Our goal is to help them improve their performance and achieve their goals.

Our Products and Services Offering

Performance analytics and tracking software
Training and conditioning tools and programs
Mobile apps and websites for managing teams, schedules, and stats

Our Modus Operandi
At Footrax, we aim to revolutionize football training and development with our wearable device that tracks performance and takes analysis to the next level. Our goal is to provide a platform for football stars to showcase their talents and be scouted and groomed by the best coaches. Ultimately, our goal is to inspire and support the growth of the sport, fostering collaboration and innovation within the industry.

Name: United Academie
Description:
United Académie a été fondée au Sénégal par l'ancien footballeur international Cheikh Mbengue et ses associés, dont Moussa Sissoko.

Notre mission est de former les jeunes footballeurs de demain en alliant 3 piliers clés :

 Le football : nous repérons et formons des talents des catégories U13 à U19, les préparant à atteindre le plus haut niveau, y compris des carrières professionnelles.  

L'éducation : nous mettons un accent particulier sur la formation académique de nos joueurs pour leur offrir des alternatives en dehors du terrain.  

Le développement personnel : nous savons que le football façonne des individus dans leur globalité, avec des valeurs humaines fortes qui les accompagneront tout au long de leur vie.

Aujourd’hui, United Académie en quelques chiffres, c’est :
• 70 joueurs répartis dans 4 catégories (U13, U15, U17, U19).  
• 3 joueurs actuellement en Europe, signant un tournant majeur pour l’académie.  
• 1 joueur ayant remporté la Coupe d'Afrique des Nations et 2 joueurs ayant participé à une Coupe du Monde.

L’aventure de United Académie ne fait que commencer ! L’avenir est prometteur et nous sommes prêts à accompagner nos joueurs à chaque étape de leur parcours, avec de nouveaux défis à relever et des succès à venir.

 Ce n’est que le début de notre histoire, et le meilleur reste à venir !

Name: Women's Football Awards
Description:
The Women’s Football Awards is Europe’s first major awards event dedicated exclusively to celebrating excellence across the women’s game - on and off the pitch. Launched in 2023 by leading figures from the football and media industries, the event has quickly become the go-to annual celebration for players, pioneers, brands, and organisations driving the sport forward.

Recognising standout talent and impact across every level of the game - from grassroots to global superstars - the Women’s Football Awards shines a spotlight on the athletes, leaders, allies, and innovators shaping the future of women’s football.

From honouring world-class players and rising stars to recognising the people and partners growing the game globally, the Awards brings together the sport’s biggest names and boldest changemakers under one roof.

With a mission to champion excellence, amplify visibility, and accelerate progress, the Women’s Football Awards has become more than just a ceremony - it’s a global platform for inspiration, recognition, and change in the world’s fastest-growing sport.

Name: Footballers Global
Description:
Footballers Global is the ultimate platform for players to showcase their talent to verified scouts and for scouts to discover exceptional footballers worldwide. We provide a dynamic hub where players can create professional profiles, showcase their skills through video highlights, and engage with scouts, teams, and academies. 

Our goal is to empower players in their football journey, while offering scouts a global player search engine to find the best unseen talent. Join us and unleash your football potential today. 

Footballers Global are committed to supporting players at every stage of their football journey, from grassroots to professional levels. We understand the importance of nurturing talent from the very beginning, which is why our platform is designed to cater to players of all ages and skill levels. Whether you are just starting out in grassroots football or aspiring to play professionally, we provide the guidance and resources to help you succeed.

What sets us apart is our team of experienced professionals who have firsthand knowledge of the football industry. Our ambassadors are all ex-professional players and existing professionals who have walked the same path and can offer invaluable advice and insights. Their expertise covers various aspects of the game, from technical skills to mental resilience and career progression. With their guidance, you can benefit from their wealth of knowledge and learn from their personal experiences.

Established in late 2019, Footballers Global has experienced remarkable growth and success. We are excited to announce the upcoming launch of our highly anticipated revamped site in the summer of 2023. This new iteration of our platform will elevate the football experience for players, scouts, and football enthusiasts worldwide. Stay tuned for an immersive and innovative football hub that will take your football journey to new heights.

Name: Talentpost Sports India
Description:
Talentpost: Unlocking Potential, Creating Futures



India, home to over 140 crore people, has one of the world’s largest youth populations. Across sports, performing arts, and entertainment, there is an abundance of raw talent—yet many aspiring individuals struggle due to limited opportunities, financial constraints, and lack of mentorship.



Talentpost is here to change that.



Our Vision: A Global Talent Ecosystem



Talentpost envisions becoming India’s premier platform for identifying, nurturing, and elevating young talent. We aim to create a structured system where athletes, artists, and performers receive the right training, resources, and career pathways to achieve professional success.



Whether it’s a young gymnast dreaming of representing India or a passionate musician looking for their big break, Talentpost bridges the gap between potential and opportunity.



Why Talentpost?



We recognize the barriers that many promising individuals face:



 Lack of Training & Infrastructure – Access to quality coaching, equipment, and performance spaces is limited.

 Limited Financial Support – Many talented individuals are forced to quit due to financial constraints.

 No Clear Career Roadmap – Guidance on transitioning from amateur to professional is often missing.

 No Merit-Based Recognition – Talent should be the key to success, not just connections.



Talentpost is changing the narrative by creating a structured, merit-based talent development platform that offers:



 World-Class Training & Coaching

 Scholarships & Financial Support

 Mentorship by Industry Experts

 Competitions & Global Exposure

 Career & Brand Development Opportunities



Be a Part of the Movement



At Talentpost, we believe in the power of talent. If you’re a young athlete, artist, or performer looking for a breakthrough, we’re here to support your journey.

Description:
A Confederação Brasileira de Futsal (CBFS) é a entidade responsável por gerir a modalidade em todo o território nacional. Ligada à Confederação Brasileira de Futebol (CBF) - que representa o futsal perante a FIFA e Conmebol -, a CBFS iniciou as atividades no dia 15 de junho de 1979.

O Brasil é o único país do mundo que possui uma entidade voltada apenas para gerir o futsal. A sede da CBFS fica atualmente em Fortaleza, no Ceará.

- 

Seleção Brasileira

Reconhecido por ser um esporte genuinamente brasileiro, o futsal trouxe diversos títulos ao país. O Brasil é o maior campeão mundial, tendo conquistado o título 7 vezes - 2 quando o futsal mundial era gerido pela FIFUSA e outras 5 já na organização da FIFA. 

No feminino a hegemonia não é diferente. As brasileiras seguem invictas no Mundial, tendo conquistado um total de 5 títulos - todos os disputados até 2015.

Name: Bury St Edmunds Rugby Union Football Club
Description:
Bury St Edmunds Rugby Club are the highest placed rugby club in Norfolk and Suffolk.

From humble beginnings, our rise as a rugby club has been a story of hard work, community & commitment. As with every journey, there have been monumental highs and tragic lows; extraordinary successes & crushing setbacks, but this has all contributed to where, who, and what we are today. After nearly 100 years, we certainly have a story to tell but our journey is only just beginning.

Bury St Edmunds RFC provides a rugby home to over 4,000 members but we are #morethanjustarugbyclub. The Greene King IPA Haberden is somewhere to meet friends, network, enjoy a lunch, support local businesses, attend or run events, go to the gym, drink local beer & coffee, support charities, & much more. Whatever brings you to the Haberden, you’ll be met with that famous rugby club welcome.

On certain days, you’ll be able to catch some of the region’s finest rugby players in action at some of the region’s most exceptional facilities. 

Indeed, our rugby success is our pride and joy. It is no secret that the foundations for this success have been built on the unparalleled voluntary support of our members, the power of community & the extraordinary generosity of our sponsors & partners. Without these partners, we simply would not be where we are today. However, our ambitions remain high and we are constantly aiming to welcome new partners, supporters & sponsors into the #buryrugbyfamily.

With that in mind, our Partnerships Manager, Will Affleck, would welcome the opportunity to share our vision for the club & what we are doing across the entire club with any like-minded businesses or individuals who are keen to learn more about supporting Bury Rugby on our journey. 

Contact Will to learn more about the partnership, sponsorship & advertising opportunities we have available across the club via will@bserufc.co.uk. 

Whatever your aims & objectives are, there will be something at this great club for you.

Name: FK Apolonia (Official Page)
Description:
KF Apolonia është një klub futbolli në Fier, Shqipëri. Ne jemi një klub i njohur dhe me histori të pasur dhe nivel te larte te trajnimit dhe te futbollisteve qe trajnohen tek ne. 

Si klub, ne jemi tëpërkushtuar në promovimin e futbollit profesionist dhe zhvillimin e talentit lokal. Me një akademi të fortë futbolli, ne ofrojmë trajnim të cilësisë së lartë për lojtarët e rinj dhe u japim mundësi të zhvillojnë potencialin e tyre në mënyrë të plotë.

Ekipi ynë i parë është pjesë e Kategorisë së Parë në futbollin shqiptar dhe merr pjesë në kompeticionet e nivelit të lartë. Ne kemi arritur suksese të konsiderueshme në kampionatin vendas dhe kemi marrë pjesë në kompeticione ndërkombëtare, duke përfaqësuar me krenari klubin tonë dhe qytetin e Fierit.

Ne vlerësojmë bashkëpunimin dhe përkushtimin e ekipit tonë, si lojtarëve, stafit teknik dhe udhëheqjes së klubit. Kemi një vizion të qartë për të ndërtuar një klub të suksesshëm dhe të qëndrueshëm në skenën futbollistike shqiptare.

Nëse jeni një profesionist i lidhur me botën e futbollit dhe jeni i interesuar për mundësi bashkëpunimi apo zhvillimin e karrierës suaj në një mjedis profesional futbollistik, ju ftojmë të na ndiqni në LinkedIn për të qëndruar në kontakt dhe të njihni më shumë rreth klubin tonë dhe mundësive të ofruara.

Për të mësuar më shumë rreth klubin tonë dhe aktivitetet tona, vizitoni faqen tonë zyrtare në www.fkapolonia.al.

Name: Club Alianza Atlético de Sullana
Description:
Asociación Deportiva Alianza Sullana / Club Sport Alianza Atlético es una institución deportiva representativa de la Región y patrimonio de la ciudad de Sullana, teniendo como fecha de fundación el 18 de enero de 1920. (102 años)
De gran importancia el aporte de nuestros jugadores en el Campeonato Nacional de 1936 donde se impondría la Selección de Sullana como campeona, dando el nombre al coloso “Campeones del 36”.
Desde 1987 hemos disputado la máxima división del fútbol peruano luego de ganar la Intermedia Norte, jugando 24 temporadas ininterrumpidas donde logramos 3 participaciones internacionales en Copa Sudamericana (avanzando de fase en todas las disputadas) y ocupando el 9° en la tabla histórica del torneo profesional de la Primera División.
Dentro de nuestro palmarés, tenemos 35 títulos de la Liga de Sullana (1928, 1929, 1930, 1933, 1934, 1935, 1943, 1944, 1945, 1946, 1947, 1948, 1949, 1951, 1952, 1953, 1957, 1958, 1959, 1960, 1966, 1967, 1968, 1969, 1970, 1971, 1972, 1973, 1975, 1976, 1977, 1981, 1982, 1983, 1986) y un campeonato de Liga 2 (2020).

Name: Janse & Janse
Description:
Eerlijk is eerlijk, het is best heel bijzonder wat we gaan doen: deelnemen aan de WORLD’S TOUGHEST ROW – ATLANTIC 2024. Met een roeiboot een oceaan oversteken is op zich al bijzonder genoeg, maar als broer en zus samen maakt het heel speciaal. Het mag ook duidelijk zijn dat we het niet alleen maar doen omdat het grote avontuur lokt. Avonturen lokken altijd. En we doen het ook niet alleen voor ons eigen ego. We willen met deze tocht substantieel bijdragen voor de goede doelen waar we voor gekozen heben; Special Olympics Nederland en de Plastic Soup Foundation. Voor mens en milieu.

De naam zegt het al, deze tocht wordt gezien als de zwaarste roeirace ter wereld. De race is jaarlijks en begint op het Canarische eiland La Gomera. Tot de finish in English Harbour van het tropische eiland Antigua (Caribisch gebied) is het zo’n 5.000 kilometer non-stop roeien. Vanaf de start zijn de teams compleet op zichzelf aangewezen. Roeien in een schema van twee uur op en twee uur af, ook ‘s nachts, het eten van gevriesdroogde maaltijden, geconfronteerd worden met zeeziekte, blaren en vermoeidheid, maakt dat de oversteek met recht een challenge wordt genoemd.

Name: Eskilstuna Guif
Description:
Vår vision är att erbjuda handboll av hög klass för så många som möjligt, så länge som möjligt, så hållbart som möjligt!
 
Eskilstuna Guif vilar på en över hundraårig historia och är en av Eskilstunas största idrottsföreningar. Hos oss ska alla känna trygghet, glädje, öppenhet och gemenskap – det är vår värdegrund.
 
Herrlaget spelar i Handbollsligan Herr och har varit i SM-final fyra gånger. Damlaget spelar i division 1. Våra sportsliga mål på sikt är att damlaget ska spela i Handbollsligan Dam och att herrlaget ska vara topp-4 i Handbollsligan Herr. För att nå våra mål bygger vi en organisation och träningsmöjligheter av hög kvalitet som gör att spelare vill stanna.
 
Vi har en bred barn- och ungdomsverksamhet med över 20 lag och nära 600 barn och unga från bollskola till dam- och herrjunior. Det lägger också grunden för att få elitspelare från egna led.
 
Eskilstuna Guif tar också ett samhällsansvar genom föreningens hållbarhets- och CSR-arbete. För oss är idrotten en viktig samhällskraft som bidrar till bättre folkhälsa, demokrati och inkludering.

Name: Freestyle Trampoline Association
Description:
THE FREESTYLE TRAMPOLINE ASSOCIATION

"It is not about just throwing crazy tricks, it's about being unique!"

Our Association offers our members and the audience who attend our events a never before seen exciting format where these freestyle trampoline athletes can be recognized, not just for their ability but for their unique individual style.

Our aim is to create an Association that revolutionizes the acrobatic market in a way that has never been done before. We promote Freestyle Trampolining Globally, through competitions, sport and coaching, innovation and technology. We use our platform to support our community and connect businesses to create a sustainable industry.

Our core principles:

√  Provide a platform for all freestyle acrobatic enthusiasts
√  Allow for unique individual expression and style
√  Community first & foremost
√  Support each other and be all-inclusive
√  Made for the athletes, by the athletes

Here at the FTA, we encourage athletes to explore what their body and mind can do on a trampoline by experimenting in a very strategic step-by-step manner. Through this creative learning process, Freestyle Trampoline athletes can unlock an infinite amount of skills compared to the limited number in the traditional stream. 

We focus on helping athletes use trampoline to discover themselves and what makes them unique.  These days, many professional acrobatic athletes are starting to turn to Freestyle because they see the limitless options available.

Name: BashBall
Description:
Our team is driven by the conviction that baseball still reigns supreme as America's pastime and the greatest game on Earth. However, we acknowledge that the youth version of the game could use a makeover. While charming, traditional youth baseball games tend to drag on, stretching too long and becoming overly complex and difficult for young players. Moreover, youth baseball games don't provide enough at-bats and defensive opportunities to help kids develop their skills and improve their confidence.

Enter BashBall.

BashBall revolutionizes youth baseball by zeroing in on its most thrilling elements: hitting and defense. In each BashBall game, players enjoy approximately 20 at-bats and defensive opportunities. Over the nine-week season, this means players will have approximately 200 competitive at-bats and defensive opportunities, respectively. With no pitching or baserunning involved, BashBall maintains a brisk pace without taxing kids' arms or bodies. Gone are the typical moments of idleness on the bench, kicking dirt, or picking grass in the outfield. BashBall provides non-stop action at a fast pace that keeps players fully engaged at all times.

We firmly believe that young athletes thrive when they're actively competing and genuinely enjoying the game. BashBall seamlessly blends everything kids love about baseball—hitting, fielding, competing, and playing with their friends—while eliminating the factors that dampen their enthusiasm: sluggish gameplay, limited action, challenging pitching, errors, strikeouts, and scarce opportunities.

Our mission is to reintroduce the joy to youth baseball, reinvigorate player development, and inject excitement back into the sport. Much like the carefree days of "Street Ball," "Wiffle Ball," and "Homerun Derby," BashBall is designed to enhance your child's skills, and reignite their passion for America's favorite pastime.

#BashBall
www.BashBall.org
www.BroncoBaseballAcademy.com

Name: Player Development Project
Description:
Player Development Project enables soccer coaches, clubs and governing bodies to create ideal learning environments for their players.

We do this in five ways:

1. Our free weekly newsletter, On the Grass:  Each week we deliver key considerations around a coaching theme, one critical action to take, and additional ‘deep-dive’ material. No filler, just quality coaching tools and tips.

2. Governing Body Partnerships: We partner with governing bodies to digitise coach education, engage coaches in ongoing learning, and create positive experiences for all stakeholders.  Services range from web development and design to custom content creation, growth strategy, reporting, communication and online events.

3. PDP Membership: Becoming a PDP Member provides unlimited access to the world’s most extensive collection of coach education resources and an invitation to our online coaching community.

4. PDP Academy: World-class online coaching courses, designed and delivered by some of the best coaches and coach educators in the world.  

5. PDP Club and School Partnerships: turn your club or school into a learning centre. Give all your coaches access to PDP resources, 1-on-1 mentoring, custom workshops and more.

L'objectif est de réunir entre 15 et 20 entreprises, non concurrentes les unes envers les autres, le principe étant d'accueillir une seule entreprise par profession.

Trois points importants au sujet du club d'affaires :
- L'ESEG Douai crée et se charge de l'animation du club d'affaires
- L'adhésion de chacun des membres est reversée à hauteur de 50 % à l'ESEG Douai
- Cette nouvelle source de financement est "gagnant/gagnant"

Créée en 1963, l’ESEG Douai (Entente sportive des enfants de Gayant) est une équipe cycliste qui évolue en National 2 depuis la saison 2022. Le club regroupe environ 70 licenciés, allant de l’école de cyclisme à la catégorie Élite.

Les « Douai de la route » peuvent compter sur une structure humaine et matérielle solide : deux employés (directeur sportif et entraîneur), une vingtaine de bénévoles (mécanicien, soigneur…), des locaux (bureau et atelier) ou encore des véhicules (voiture et camion atelier).

Description:

Questi hanno deciso di unire la loro esperienza nel settore del motorsport per dare vita ad una nuova struttura in grado di offrire una gamma completa di servizi legati a questo mondo.

Gestione Vetture da Competizione:
Questa divisione si dedica a fornire tutte le attività necessarie per la compravendita o il noleggio di vetture da competizione. Si tratta di un’attività sofisticata che include anche servizi di consulenza accurati e una suite completa per la gestione e l'assistenza delle vetture nel tempo.

Stagioni Sportive:
Questo reparto è specializzato nella pianificazione degli eventi sportivi. Ci occupiamo di valutare le specifiche esigenze dei piloti e di proporre soluzioni su misura. Disponiamo di vetture di proprietà che possono essere condivise per eventi a carattere sia nazionale che internazionale, con diverse modalità operative.

Gestione Piloti:
La divisione si focalizza sulla consulenza, promozione e gestione dell’immagine dei piloti, anche non professionisti. Offrire un approccio strategico al mondo del motorsport rappresenta un valore aggiunto per chi è già inserito nel settore e, ancor di più, per chi vi si avvicina per la prima volta.

Vetture Gran Turismo:
Mega Motorsport è un partner qualificato nella vendita e nella ricerca di vetture stradali Gran Turismo. I nostri canali di ricerca e la nostra competenza rappresentano elementi chiave per garantire la piena soddisfazione degli appassionati. La gestione del complesso percorso di selezione e acquisizione di vetture Gran Turismo è la nostra passione e ci procura grande soddisfazione.

Name: Weymouth and Portland National Sailing Academy (WPNSA)
Description:
The Academy is a multifaceted business.  The driving force and focus are the sailing events, but to sustain the facilities and business the WPNSA has several other revenue streams;
 
• Squad training through the RYA and class associations
• Other sporting events such as cycling, triathlons and running
• Meetings facilities including conferences and corporate days
• Functions such as; weddings, parties, dinner dances and awards
• Boat hoist and dry storage
• Membership
 
WPNSA has close links with the Royal Yachting Association (RYA) working with them in many significant events such as the Sailing World Cup and Youth National Championships.  In addition, WPNSA is the training base for the British Sailing Team.

Leading sailors from around the globe discovered what those closer to home have long been aware of: the combination of clean winds, sheltered waters and weak tides in the area is unique and provides an unrivalled location for thrilling sporting competition.

WPNSA primarily offers its superb venue for events and training, but also has onsite partners that operate a successful sailing school, windsurfing school and a large members’ community catering for all abilities from complete beginners to Olympians.

Facilities on-shore include a licensed function room, conference/meeting rooms, various slipways, a 16-tonne boat hoist, extensive dinghy parks, three permanent cranes and storage for all types of boats.

Our magnificent venue lends itself perfectly as an outstanding choice of venue for functions, business meetings, weddings and conferences.

Name: Les Tota'LeMans Raid
Description:
Nous sommes Stéphanie et Mélanie, nous avons un magnifique rêve : participer au prochain Raid Amazones de mars 2024.

Mais qu'est-ce que le Raid Amazones ? "Pas de moteur, que de la sueur", super slogan non ? Mais, c'est surtout : 
       - un raid 100% féminin
       - des épreuves sportives le matin (trail, VTT, canoë, tir à l'arc et course d'orientation)
       - la découverte du pays lors des après-midi (rencontre avec la population, visite des écoles, immersion dans le mode de vie des locaux)
       - une bonne dose de solidarité de la part de ZBO (société organisatrice du Raid sous la direction de Alexandre Debanne) qui soutient à chaque édition une cause locale en lien avec l'éducation des enfants et surtout des Amazones elles-mêmes.

Et oui, sachez qu'en parallèle de notre participation au Raid Amazones, nous avons choisi d'aller encore plus loin dans le coté solidaire. En effet, nous mettons en avant une association locale : l'ADIMC 72. 
Cette association œuvre en faveur des personnes atteintes de paralysie cérébrale. Les Tota'LeMans Raid ont la volonté de soutenir notamment le projet PC School qui permettra l'adaptation de robots humanoïdes pour faciliter les apprentissages des enfants. 

Pour réaliser ces projets, nous avons besoin de soutient et plus particulièrement financier, comme tous sportifs s'engageant sur un Raid.  C'est pourquoi nous faisons appel à vous tous aujourd'hui, dans le but que chacun d'entre vous puissiez contribuer à votre niveau.

Les Tota'LeMans Raid mettent déjà tout en œuvre au quotidien, tant sur le côté sportif que sur le côté financier, pour aller au bout de ce projet. Entrainement de CrossFit, course à pied ou VTT, participation à des évènements sportifs (Raid Haut Anjou, Mud'Ouches...) ou encore stand de vente de crêpes lors de manifestations, vente de billets de tombola ou encore organisation d’un défi connecté. Bref, on se donnent à fond !!

Nous comptons donc sur votre esprit solidaire pour nous soutenir :-)
Location: Le Mans, Pays de la Loire

Name: NK Kustošija
Description:
Nogometni klub Kustošija osnovan je 1929. godine i više od 90 godina ponosno djeluje kao simbol sportskog duha zapadnog dijela Zagreba. Klub se fokusira na razvoj mladih igrača, promicanje sportskih vrijednosti i stvaranje pozitivnog okruženja u kojem nogomet spaja zajednicu.

Naša seniorska momčad nastupa u SuperSport Drugoj NL, dok se sve naše mlađe kategorije natječu u najvišim rangovima hrvatskog nogometa. Poseban naglasak stavljamo na stručan rad, modernu infrastrukturu i partnerske odnose sa sponzorima i lokalnom zajednicom.

Cilj NK Kustošije nije samo natjecanje, već i odgoj odgovornih, timski orijentiranih mladih ljudi koji sport doživljavaju kao način života.
Kroz sport, obrazovanje i zajedništvo, nastavljamo graditi priču o klubu koji raste iz kvarta - s ponosom, strašću i vizijom budućnosti.

--

 Kustošija Football Club was founded in 1929 and has proudly represented the sporting spirit of western Zagreb for over 90 years. The club focuses on developing young players, promoting fair play and teamwork, and building a positive environment where football connects the community.

Our first team competes in the SuperSport Druga NL, while all our youth categories play in the highest levels of Croatian football. We emphasize professional coaching, modern facilities, and strong partnerships with sponsors and the local community.

The goal of NK Kustošija is not only to compete, but to educate responsible, team-oriented young people who see football as a way of life.
Through sport, education, and unity, we continue to build the story of a club that grows from its neighborhood - with pride, passion, and vision.

Name: On Target Scouting
Description:
On Target Scouting specialises in providing football clubs with independent, professional scouting reports, assisting with identifying players, monitoring free agent footballers or assessing external recruitment opportunities by providing clear, credible & club-ready assessments.

We also work directly with free agent footballers in preparing reports that can be issued to clubs. With so many highlight videos going unseen, we bridge the gap by delivering structured, tailored reports that clubs actually want to review and can utilise to make knowledgeable and accurate player evaluations

Using Scout Decision, we produce detailed evaluations built around positional KPIs, tactical roles in possession & out of possession, strengths and weaknesses, video analysis, and player comparisons. Every report can be customised for individual players, agent portfolios, or specific club requirements.

We are open to partnering directly with clubs to support their talent identification needs or opposition analysis across local leagues, academy pathways, or specific recruitment projects. If your club requires additional scouting support or consistent reporting across targeted competitions, we’d welcome the opportunity to connect

La Fédération Pickleball France promeut le développement de la pratique de ce sport en France et à l'international. Elle regroupe des associations sportives en France ayant pour but de faire pratiquer le pickleball.

Elle a également créé son académie de formation des initiateurs et animateurs de Pickleball en partenariat avec l'IPTPA (USA).

Name: The I'M HERE Initiative
Description:
#CorePurpose

As India's premier social impact NGO focused on youth development through sports, we are making a significant difference in the lives of young athletes from underprivileged, low-income communities who are pursuing their passion for elite sports. Our unique residential football academy provides comprehensive training, education, competitive exposure, resources, support, and mentorship, all at no cost. By addressing socioeconomic challenges and the lack of opportunities in rural areas, villages, and interior regions, we aim to alleviate dropouts from the sport, thus enhancing the talent pool. Through life skills development, we are creating opportunities for improving livelihoods. Our nurturing environment cultivates India's next generation of athletes with a long-term holistic view while simultaneously driving business growth and creating social impact for our sponsors.

#KeyDifferentiators

(a) In a crowded marketplace, we differentiate ourselves by prioritizing the athletes. Our program revolves around their needs and goals, with an athlete-centric purpose and philosophy at its core. Importantly, we offer this program to our athletes at no cost.

(b) We are developing long-term, sustainable careers for athletes from underprivileged communities, rural areas, and villages who face significant socioeconomic challenges and are at the highest risk of dropping out from India's football talent pool.

(c) We take a holistic approach by providing a full-immersion residential setup that includes board, lodging, education, nutrition care, travel, transportation, medical care, physiotherapy, and more. Our athletes have access to world-class training facilities at the Padukone-Dravid Centre for Sports Excellence, as well as guidance, mentorship, and exposure. To offer a comprehensive international training curriculum and a global platform for success, we have collaborated with Spain's Universal Football Coaching & Academy.

Name: HyperSpeed Performance Technologies
Description:
Performance Intelligence. Built to Scale.

HyperSpeed is a dual-path system designed to optimize both athletes and everyday adults—combining data, coaching, and structure into a scalable performance model. Founded by Antone Wilson, a strength coach and performance strategist with NCAA and U.S. Army experience, the system operates inside gyms and athletic settings to measure readiness, flag risk, and guide long-term development.

Over the past four years, Antone has developed and tested this system on both sides of the spectrum: from high school football players pursuing scholarships to everyday adults managing stress, sleep, and physical health. The infrastructure is built to plug into gyms, teams, or organizations—delivering clarity through structured assessments, wearable integrations, and expert analysis.

System Pillars
• Football Athlete Engine – Projects athletes based on GPA, size, speed, and sport-specific standards. Matches athletes to levels of play and identifies training gaps.
• General Population Dashboard – Tracks key health metrics (sleep, activity, stress, movement quality) and delivers personalized wellness reports, built for scale inside gym environments.
• Functional Operating Capacity (FOC) – Measures an individual’s ability to perform across life, work, and movement demands—used across both athlete and adult models.
• Assessment-to-Insight Pipeline – Digital intake → Acronym ID → Data segmentation → Dashboard generation → Coaching or programming pathway.

We don’t offer trends—we deliver structured, scalable intelligence backed by lived experience and real-world data.

Whether you're chasing a scholarship or just chasing a healthier life, HyperSpeed gives you the roadmap.

Name: LAMSA
Description:
LAMSA is a football academy and non-profit organisation based in a former Liberian refugee camp in southern Ghana.

Through sport, we provide more than 95 boys and girls with life-changing opportunities both on and off the pitch — including education, nutrition, healthcare, housing, and a safe environment in which to grow.

Our Mission

To develop not only football players, but young leaders with values, character, and real pathways for the future.

Our Model

LAMSA combines a high-performance football academy with a strong social impact ecosystem, working with partners such as FC Barcelona, Puma, and professional athlete Manu Sánchez.

Key Milestones

 A former LAMSA player selected for the Liberia U12 national team; two current players compete with the Ghana U17 District Team.

 Over 40 international volunteers hosted across education, sport, and health programs.

 €50,000+ raised to fund meals, education, housing, and medical care.

 Development of sustainable initiatives (volunteering, services, transportation) that strengthen financial autonomy and create jobs for LAMSA graduates.

Where We Are Going

We are now entering a pivotal phase focused on building the LAMSA Sports Center, a facility designed to multiply our impact and position LAMSA as one of the leading grassroots football academies in West Africa.

Vamos LAMSA.

Name: AAOP - Associação dos Atletas Olímpicos de Portugal
Description:
A AAOP foi fundada com a missão e objectivo de defender, divulgar e promover os “Valores do Movimento Olímpico” e desenvolver laços estreitos de solidariedade, amizade e apoio mútuo, entre todos os Atletas Olímpicos portugueses, mesmo os que já não tenham a nacionalidade portuguesa. Isso será feito em colaboração com outras Organizações Olímpicas (nacionais, como o Comité Olímpico de Portugal ou internacionais, como a Associação Mundial dos Atletas Olímpicos). Por outro lado, será construido e permanentemente mantido actualizado, um “lugar na Internet”, contendo informações pessoais e desportivas respeitantes aos Atletas Olímpicos Portugueses (quer vivos, quer já falecidos).

A AAOP foi oficialmente registada como uma Organização Não Governamental (ONG), a 8 de Julho de 2003. De acordo com os Estatutos aprovados, a Associação é uma Organização independente, não lucrativa, de duração ilimitada, Pessoa Colectiva de Direito privado, agindo segundo os prinicpios do Movimento Olímpico e os Valores do Olimpismo. Está aberta a todos aqueles que tenham competido nos Jogos Olímpicos em representação de Portugal (quer nos Jogos de Verão quer de Inverno), incluindo mesmo aqueles que, presentemente, já não possuam a nacionalidade portuguesa.

 Le hockey sur glace demeure un formidable terrain d’apprentissage de la vie en collectivité, ainsi qu’un lieu de mixité sociale et culturelle. L’intégration dans une équipe, le respect de ses co-équipiers, de l’adversaire et des règles de jeu, mais aussi le renforcement de sa propre responsabilité, constituent des axes de travail importants pour la promotion et le renforcement du lien social.

Name: Brasil Surfe Clube
Description:
No Brasil Surfe Clube, a busca pela onda perfeita vai além do oceano. Criamos um refúgio exclusivo e sofisticado, onde o surfe se transforma em uma experiência única, que conecta o esporte à arte, à cultura, e ao estilo de vida que só o Brasil pode oferecer.

Somos mais do que um clube de piscinas de ondas. Somos um destino onde o surfe se torna uma forma de expressão e imersão. Aqui, cada onda que se forma é uma obra-prima, criada para proporcionar momentos de liberdade, emoção e superação. A nossa missão é oferecer um espaço onde os amantes do surfe e suas famílias possam viver a fluidez do esporte com a sofisticação de um ambiente único.

O Brasil Surfe Clube é a celebração de um estilo de vida autêntico; de uma nova comunidade; de um movimento que, como uma onda, se forma no fundo, pela brasilidade, pela música que ressoa, pela comida que emociona. Aqui, você sente. Você vê. Você ouve. Somos um convite a viver plenamente, a se conectar com a natureza e com a essência do nosso país.

Sua onda, do seu jeito. Nossa piscina de ondas é o palco para aqueles que desejam aperfeiçoar a técnica, se desafiar e, ao mesmo tempo, desfrutar de momentos de leveza e relaxamento. Um respiro na sua rotina. Um sopro de uma brisa que te acolhe, sem precisar ir embora. Somos quentes, mas a nossa quentura está no afeto, no sorriso, na calma. Nascemos no Rio, mas o nosso sotaque é nosso.

Nossa tecnologia inovadora Endless Surf cria condições ideais para surfistas de todos os níveis, do iniciante ao avançado. Aqui, cada sessão é feita sob medida para o seu ritmo e estilo. Escolha sua experiência, deixe a água te guiar e descubra o melhor do surfe com a gente.

Seja bem-vindo ao Brasil Surfe Clube, o berço do surfe-arte brasileiro.
Location: Rio de Janeiro, Rio de Janeiro

Uanset dit aldersgruppe eller færdighedsniveau, finder du en plads hos os.

Vores team, bestående af dedikerede og passionerede professionelle, sikrer, at din oplevelse hos Racket Club er intet mindre end exceptionel. Vi er her for at supportere din rejse inden for sport og oplevelser, uanset om du søger at forbedre dine færdigheder, konkurrere, eller blot have det sjovt.

Opdag glæden ved sport og fællesskab i vores state-of-the-art centre. Vi ser frem til at byde dig velkommen og blive en del af din sportslige rejse. Bliv en del af Racket Club i dag, og lad os sammen skabe uforglemmelige øjeblikke!

Name: Footballtech
Description:
Footballtech is a top-level indoor football training facility, designed to provide football players of all ages and levels, a training environment as can be found in the leading football clubs in the world. 
By incorporating the most innovative training equipment in a controlled top-level facility, Footballtech offers both professional and amateur football players elite level trainings for developing and improving football skills, and a one-of-its-kind football experience firstly to be seen in Israel. 
The training facility is divided to Zones, whereas each zone focus on a different skill set essential to become better players. 
At each zone, dedicated training technology is used to demonstrate real-time game scenarios. Repetition and multiple sessions at the challenging zones improves both technique, game-intelligence and physical skills. 
This training technology can be found in the top-tier football clubs such as FC Barcelona, Man City, Liverpool Arsenal and such. 
Beside training zones, Footballtech's training facility offers the Recovery zone which incorporates the most innovative equipment for after-training physical recovery.  

Innovative sensors and a smart video camera system provides footballtech the ability to track and analyze training performance and to develop an intelligent training plan for trainees, to work on weaknesses and improve strengths in a measurable and trackable way. 

Inside the top-level facility can be also found luxurious showers and dressing room. 

*If you are a professional football player that seeks to improve your game level, Footballtech is the solution. 
* If you are an amateur football player that seeks an European-like training facility experience, join Footballtech. 
* Football clubs that seeks a top-level training environment can find a solution with Footballtech's rental options. 

Join the revolution of football training level, leaded by Footballtech!

Name: Lakeland Flying Tigers
Description:
The Lakeland Flying Tigers are a Minor League Baseball team of the Florida State League and the Single-A affiliate of the Detroit Tigers. Located in Lakeland, Florida, games are played at Publix Field at Joker Marchant Stadium.

The franchise affiliated with the Detroit Tigers' farm system in 1963 and became known as the Lakeland Tigers before becoming the Flying Tigers in 2007. The relationship with Detroit is one of the two longest unbroken affiliate relationships currently existing.

In 2006, the team introduced a new name and colors to pay homage to the Lakeland School of Aeronautics, later the Lodwick School of Aeronautics. The school trained over 8,000 pilots between 1940 and 1945, some of whom later flew with the Flying Tigers in China during World War II, and was actually located at the current site of Publix Field at Joker Marchant Stadium.

Publix Field at Joker Marchant stadium is host to over 80 events and welcomes over 130,000 guests, annually.

Name: Maet
Description:
We believe that team sports are powerful avenues for building strong communities that lead to human flourishing. And in a post-COVID world that is dominated by virtual work and online relationships, there is a huge need for meaningful and healthy in-person experiences.

Maet is a gamified marketplace for amateur team sports - like basketball, soccer, volleyball, and pickleball - that connects and engages athletes in meaningful real-world competitive experiences. On Maet, you can discover competitions, get rated, and keep playing. 

Our definition of an athlete is "anyone with a bottled-up desire for meaningful and healthy in-person experiences." And there is a countless number of athletes who - like us - who have that bottled-up desire that Maet is addressing.

Name: FC Zbrojovka Brno
Description:
FC Zbrojovka Brno patří mezi tradiční fotbalové kluby v České republice. Od svého založení v roce 1913 se stala nedílnou součástí historie moravského i československého fotbalu a během více než sta let existence výrazně ovlivnila jeho vývoj i charakter.

Zbrojovka dlouhodobě patří mezi týmy, které vychovávají výrazné osobnosti českého fotbalu. V brněnském dresu vyrůstali hráči, kteří psali historii nejen domácí soutěže. Jedním z hlavních pilířů klubové filozofie je práce s mládeží – výchova sportovců, které spojují talent, disciplína a charakter.

V posledních letech se Zbrojovka zaměřuje na stabilní růst, modernizaci zázemí a postupný návrat mezi fotbalovou elitu.Věříme, že fotbal se neodehrává jen na hřišti. Je také o hodnotách a sounáležitosti, které přesahují hranice stadionu.

Name: Essex Rebels
Description:
The Rebels Franchise encompasses elite level senior teams for both Basketball and Volleyball that compete on a national level –  driven to make a stand off the court and create positive change across communities.  

The Essex Rebels have been building on their success since their inception in the 2018/19 season when the University of Essex entered the WBBL for the first time. Adding two men’s teams, who also compete in the first and 3rd division in the national league and incorporating a junior programme for 12-18 year olds, completes a robust basketball offering. In 2022/23 the University also established elite level men’s and women’s volleyball teams who complete at the top Super League level in the UK. The stunning Essex Sport Arena is home to the Essex Rebels and welcomes fans to its award-winning match days entertainment home games most weekends throughout the season. 

The rise to competing at an elite national level has been rapid, and, it is through the on-going support of a family of sponsors who share in the vision and determination of the Essex Rebels, that the programme continues it skyward thrust today. 


Joining the Essex Rebels journey as a sponsor offers the unique opportunity for your company to get involved in everything from matchday hospitality, through to high visibility branding and player sponsorship.

Name: Octopoda Academy | Yüzme Kursu
Description:
Octopoda Academy, yüzme tutkusunu paylaşan herkes için bir evdir.

Octopoda Academy olarak, eğitim kalitesine ve öğrenci memnuniyetine büyük önem veriyoruz. Deneyimli ve profesyonel eğitmen kadromuz, öğrencilerimizin bireysel ihtiyaçlarına uygun olarak özelleştirilmiş ders programları sunmakta ve onları suya olan tutkularını keşfetmeye teşvik etmektedir.

Bizler, suyun bize sunduğu sonsuz olanakları keşfetmek için buradayız. Siz de bu tutkulu yolculuğa katılmak ve suya olan sevginizi paylaşmak isterseniz, Octopoda Academy sizleri bekliyor.

Vizyonumuz

Her bireyin suyla olan bağını güçlendirerek ve yüzme tutkusunu paylaşarak, suyun gücünü keşfetmesine ve yaşam boyu süren bir tutku haline getirmesine öncülük etmek istiyoruz. Octopoda Academy olarak, suyun bize sunduğu özgürlüğü ve heyecanı herkesle paylaşmak için buradayız.

Misyonumuz

Öğrencilerimizin suya olan sevgi ve özgüvenle donatarak, yüzme becerilerini geliştirirken aynı zamanda suyun sağladığı fiziksel ve zihinsel faydaları keşfetmelerine yardımcı olmayı amaçlıyoruz. Her yaş grubundan öğrenciye hitap eden geniş bir yelpazede sunulan derslerimizle, bebeklerden başlayarak yetişkinlere ve özel gereksinimli bireylere kadar herkesin suya olan bağını güçlendirmeyi hedefliyoruz.

Name: Escola de Futebol - A Escolinha do Figo
Description:
Criada em 2009 por Luís Figo e João Guerra, como parte da plataforma digital
global de igualdade de oportunidades no futebol Dream Football, A Escolinha
do Figo nasceu originalmente apenas no formato de “vídeo-treino”, com o
intuito de ajudar todos, sem exceção, a desenvolverem o seu futebol.

Para quebrar com todas a limitações no acesso ao treino, em cada
“vídeo-treino” o Luís Figo e a sua equipa ensinavam a jogar futebol,
utilizando objetos e espaços do quotidiano (baldes, vassouras, giz, jardins,
garagens, salas,…).

Após um convite para exibição dos conteúdos na televisão portuguesa, A
Escolinha do Figo tornou-se, em apenas 3 meses, o programa preferido para o público até aos 10 anos e o 6º mais visto até aos 14 anos.
Surpreendentemente, as audiência eram repartidas quase equitativamente entre raparigas e rapazes (44% vs 56%) e era também a série infantojuvenil mais vista por adultos. Cada vídeo-treino incentivava toda a família a montar o seu pequeno cenário e a treinar cada exercício em conjunto.

Todo este sucesso televisivo, levou à exigência por parte do público, para
que fosse dada dimensão física ao conceito através da abertura de academias
de futebol. Desde finais de 2011, esse sonho tornou-se realidade e hoje são
mais de 50 as academias espalhadas por Portugal e já com uma academia-piloto em Inglaterra (Londres).

Name: Club Atlético Sarmiento
Description:
Club Atlético Sarmiento de Junín es una institución deportiva fundada en 1911 en la ciudad de Junín, provincia de Buenos Aires.

Actualmente compite en la Primera División del fútbol argentino, bajo la órbita de la Asociación del Fútbol Argentino (AFA).

Con una extensa trayectoria en el fútbol nacional y regional, Sarmiento fue protagonista del amateurismo, obtuvo múltiples campeonatos de la Liga Deportiva del Oeste y logró históricos ascensos en el fútbol profesional, incluyendo su primer ascenso a Primera División en 1980.

El club cuenta con un estadio inaugurado en 1951, un Centro de Alto Rendimiento, ciudad deportiva, pensión, canchas multidisciplinarias y espacios dedicados al desarrollo integral de sus deportistas.

Además del fútbol profesional, el Club Atlético Sarmiento desarrolla disciplinas como fútbol femenino, divisiones inferiores AFA, básquet, vóley, hockey, tenis, ajedrez y atletismo, promoviendo la formación deportiva y el compromiso con la comunidad.

Name: Fédération Djiboutienne de Tennis
Description:
Fédération Djiboutienne de Tennis (FDT)

La Fédération Djiboutienne de Tennis a pour mission de développer et de promouvoir le tennis sur l’ensemble du territoire national. Elle œuvre à rendre ce sport accessible à toutes et à tous : enfants, jeunes, adultes, amateurs comme compétiteurs.

Nos actions s’articulent autour de trois grands axes :
 Formation et détection : programmes destinés aux jeunes talents, avec un accompagnement technique et pédagogique assuré par des entraîneurs qualifiés.
 Compétitions nationales et internationales : organisation de tournois et participation aux événements de la Fédération Internationale de Tennis (ITF) et de la Confédération Africaine de Tennis (CAT).
 Promotion et inclusion : initiatives scolaires et partenariats pour démocratiser la pratique, notamment à travers le programme Junior Tennis Initiative (JTI).

Ambassadrice d’un sport qui véhicule rigueur, respect et dépassement de soi, la FDT veut faire du tennis un vecteur de fierté nationale et d’ouverture internationale pour Djibouti.

 Nous sommes ouverts aux partenariats, aux échanges et aux collaborations pour continuer à faire grandir le tennis djiboutien.

#Djibouti #Tennis #Sport #Jeunesse #FDT

Name: 10th Inning Ventures
Description:
At 10th Inning, we empower athletes of all levels with customized evaluations and development plans, leveraging advanced technology to guide the path to excellence. We are dedicated to revolutionizing the sports landscape, offering athletes the opportunities to compete, gain exposure, and enjoy their journey to becoming top-tier individuals and athletes.

Core Values

Integrity: Acting with honesty and consistency in all we do.
Human-Centered Care: Prioritizing the wellbeing and success of our athletes and team.
Empathy: Understanding the needs of our community deeply and making a difference.
Clarity: Maintaining simplicity and transparency in our communication.
Passion: Guiding us through change and inspiring us to make a difference in the sports ecosystem.
Inclusion: Promoting acceptance and value for every member of our community.
Discipline: Believing in the transformative power of repeated excellence for sustainable progress.

Why 10th Inning?
In baseball, the game typically ends after nine innings. The 10th inning represents those extra moments where true determination and resilience shine. At 10th Inning, we embody this spirit by pushing beyond the norm, creating new opportunities, and driving athletes to excel. Join us at 10th Inning, where legends are made, and the journey to greatness begins.

Name: Business Club Urk (BCU)
Description:
Welkom bij de Business Club Urk (BCU), het kloppende zakelijke hart van SV Urk

Dat de business club van SV Urk leeft is een understatement, al seizoenen lang mogen we ons verheugen in een groeiende belangstelling van bedrijven om sponsor te worden van de grootste vereniging in de Noordoostpolder. Vaak wordt er de vraag gesteld “Hoe doen jullie dat”  en “Hoe weten jullie de sponsoren aan je te binden?”. We denken dat daar een aantal belangrijke oorzaken voor zijn: Ten eerste de sociale betrokkenheid van het bedrijfsleven met de vereniging. Veel bedrijven zien het belang in van een gezond verenigingsleven en dragen SV Urk een warm hart toe. In de tweede plaats gaan alle financiële middelen direct naar de vereniging en gaan er geen salarissen naar de spelers, iets waar Urk uniek in is. Op deze wijze zijn we in staat om de kwaliteit van bijvoorbeeld onze jeugdopleidingen clubbreed op een hoog niveau te krijgen en houden. Ten slotte vinden we als businessclub dat we niet alleen bij de sponsoren moeten aankloppen voor geld, maar vinden een goed B2B platform net zo belangrijk. Om die redenen organiseren we tal van evenementen waarbij verbinding en ontspanning hand in hand gaan.

Name: Frysk Ljeppers Boun
Description:
Welkom op de LinkedIn pagina  van het Frysk Ljeppers Boun (FLB). De plek waar alle informatie over het fierljeppen is te vinden. De FLB streeft ernaar dat zoveel mogelijk mensen kennis maken met het fierljeppen, dat kan als sporter, als vrijwilliger als toeschouwer bij de wedstrijden, maar ook via de sociale media zijn we goed in beeld: “Iedereen maakt kennis met het fierljeppen”.

Sinds 1960 wordt het fierljeppen in wedstrijdverband georganiseerd door de FLB samen met de aangesloten verenigingen. Fierljeppen is een echte zomersport, de wedstrijden beginnen in mei en eindigen in september met het Nederlands Kampioenschap. Fierljeppen lijkt allang niet meer op het slootjespringen. Elk jaar worden records verbeterd, heren senioren topklasse springen regelmatig verder dan 20 m. Voor de jeugd zijn bij elke vereniging twee jeugdschansjes aangelegd en ook zij hebben hun eigen wedstrijdcompetitie. 

Als FLB kunnen we het niet alleen, we hebben de verenigingen, de ljeppers, de ouders, de bonden, en de vrijwilligers nodig om de fierljepsport op hoger niveau te krijgen. Door zoveel mogelijk kennis en ervaring met elkaar te delen komen we verder. De visie voor 2022 – 2027 is: “Samenwerken om het fierljeppen verder te ontwikkelen’’.

Namens onze voorzitster Etty Kramer-Spriensma

Name: ACBB - ATHLETIC CLUB BOULOGNE-BILLANCOURT
Description:
Créé en 1943, l’Athlétic Club Boulogne-Billancourt (ACBB) — qui doit son nom en partie à l’Association Cycliste de Boulogne-Billancourt, l’une des sections fondatrices emblématiques — a toujours été sur le devant de la scène nationale, mondiale et olympique.

Du premier, Eugène Gravelotte (champion olympique, escrime) en Grèce en 1896, à Stéphane Tardieu (bronze, handi-aviron) à Rio 2016 et Sarah-Léonie Cysique (bronze et or, judo) à Paris 2024, les Boulonnais et l’ACBB ont raflé en tout 36 médailles olympiques.

L'Athlétic Club de Boulogne-Billancourt, association loi 1901, est un club sportif français de la banlieue parisienne dont le siège est à Boulogne-Billancourt.

Avec près de 200 salariés, ses 31 sections et avec plus de 12 000 adhérents, l’ACBB s’impose comme l’un des plus grands clubs Omnisports français.

Name: Argentina Fútbol Scouting
Description:
Argentina Futbol Scouting es una empresa líder en la identificación y promoción de talento futbolístico argentino para clubes europeos. Mediante la combinación de una vasta red de contactos en el mundo del fútbol, tecnología de análisis avanzado y un equipo de expertos dedicados, ofrecemos un servicio integral de scouting y consultoría.

Nuestro equipo de especialistas realiza un trabajo de campo meticuloso, asistiendo a partidos y entrenamientos en todo el país para identificar jugadores prometedores y profesionales consolidados. No nos limitamos a las estadísticas, sino que valoramos la actitud, habilidades y potencial de cada jugador a través de nuestra evaluación en persona.

Aplicamos tecnología de vanguardia, como Big Data, Inteligencia Artificial y análisis científico para recoger, procesar y analizar una gran cantidad de datos. Con estos recursos, identificamos talentos ocultos, mejoramos el rendimiento de los jugadores y proporcionamos a nuestros clientes decisiones informadas que pueden impactar positivamente en sus carreras.

Además, trabajamos con clubes para identificar sus necesidades específicas y presentarles opciones que se adapten perfectamente a sus requerimientos. Nuestro objetivo es construir relaciones duraderas entre el talento argentino y los clubes europeos, beneficiando a ambas partes y contribuyendo al crecimiento del fútbol a nivel global

Name: Extratennis
Description:
Extra Tennis : c’est un concept né en septembre 2022 et mis en ligne à partir de décembre de la même année. “Extra”, c’est notre mascotte, un extraterrestre qui n’a qu’une seule envie : apprendre à jouer au tennis !
“Extra“ est entouré de la “Team Extratennis“ qui est composé de trois ados passionnés de tennis et d‘un prof. Extra va progresser avec nous (la Team “extra“), et nous allons progresser à ses côtés !
Comment allons-nous progresser? Grâce aux différentes vidéos que nous proposons via le site ou les réseaux. Des exercices, du suivi de match, il y aurait plusieurs thèmes !
Notre objectif n‘est pas d‘être les meilleurs ou d‘avoir le meilleur classement... Nous, nous voulons progresser, nous amuser, mais également “matcher“ à notre petit niveau, et grimper quelques échelons pour atteindre au moins la 3eme série

Description:
C’est devant l’église de son bourg qu’est née l’Étoile Sportive de Buxerolles. Plusieurs jeunes se sont retrouvés et se sont amusés à taper dans le ballon. Naturellement, l’idée de créer une équipe de foot a été imaginé jusqu’à ce que les statuts soient officiellement déposés en préfecture le 14 décembre 1937.

Nous avons pour mission de contribuer à faire vivre ce sport populaire en s’appuyant sur nos ressources internes, notre école de foot, les joueurs locaux et le maillage local. Ces piliers visent à nous inscrire dans une démarche de développement allant au delà d’un simple club, notre devise : « plus qu’un club ». 

Nous avons à cœur d’être un acteur de la vie de la cité, d’être facilitateur de rencontre entre le monde du foot et le monde professionnel, un point de rencontre entre différents profils que le football peut rassembler.

Name: Norges Golfforbund
Description:
Norges Golfforbund (NGF) er en av de største særidrettsforbundene i norsk idrett, med rundt 160.000 medlemskap fordelt på 170 golfklubber. Forbundet tilrettelegger for at golfklubbene kan gi et best mulig tilbud til sine medlemmer. I tillegg er NGF ansvarlig for elitesatsingen Team Norway Golf for amatørutøvere. Forbundet rapporterer til Golftinget som består av representanter fra medlemsklubbene. 

Norwegian Golf Federation (NGF) is among the largest federations within Norwegian sports. With a total of 160.000 memberships spread over 170 golf clubs, the federation facilitates golf offers regardless of age, skills and preconditions. NGF has the responsibility and authority to develop the Norwegian elite golf (amateurs) through Team Norway Golf as well as age-specific national teams. The federation also translates the Rules of Golf, funds research for turf and environment in addition to maintaining the world handicap system. NGF reports to the Golf Assembly consisting of representatives from the golf clubs.

Name: Maccabi Israel Sports XP
Description:
We are Maccabi, the largest Jewish sports organization and organizers of the Maccabiah Games, the second-largest international sporting event in the world. Israel Sports Experience is our once-in-a-lifetime opportunity for top Jewish athletes from around the globe to follow their dreams and play semi-professional sports for a year in Israel. We are a post-high school prep program, competing in Israel's official pro-league, as the only team of foreign players, allowing athletes to bring their game to the next level, prepare them for successful college and professional careers ahead and live their dreams in the land of Israel. We develop our players off the court in a professional capacity with internships at sports tech companies, in their relationship with their Jewish identity and Israel, and in who they are as people by volunteering and giving back. We use the game to build skills and values for life.
At a time when communities are divided, Israel is at risk, and unity is scarce, we are using sports to change the narrative and provide solutions. We build bridges, bring all backgrounds together, and strengthen US-Israel ties, developing our next generation of leaders by empowering them today to follow their dreams, to give back and to stand for something big.

With our patented ultrasonic sound wave technology, we’re transforming how fans interact with their favorite teams, venues, and events. From stadium seats to couches at home, we enable frictionless, real-time engagement that brings fans closer to the action than ever before.

Imagine a world where a cheer can unlock exclusive content, a scoreboard moment triggers instant rewards, or a live broadcast lets viewers connect, engage, and shop — right from their mobile devices. Soundpays bridges the gap between experiences and opportunities, turning every fan moment into a deeper connection.

For teams and venues, Soundpays delivers insights and tools to elevate fan loyalty and unlock new revenue streams. Our platform empowers sports organizations to deliver unforgettable, interactive experiences that keep fans coming back for more.

Soundpays: Redefining the fan experience, one game-changing moment at a time.

Name: India Ultimate
Description:
India Ultimate (FDSFI) is the national governing body for flying disc sports in India — including Ultimate, Beach Ultimate, Wheelchair Ultimate, and Disc Golf.

We oversee the growth of the sport across the country, from elite national teams to grassroots programs in schools and villages.

Ultimate Frisbee is a self-officiated, gender-inclusive, fast-paced sport — and is on the cusp of Olympic inclusion. We believe flying disc sports can offer more than just athleticism: they build leadership, character, inclusion, and community.

India Ultimate is proudly affiliated to the World Flying Disc Federation (WFDF) — the international governing body recognized by the International Olympic Committee (IOC).

Our work includes:

- Organizing 25+ domestic tournaments annually
- Training 100+ women coaches through our Game Changers initiative
- Running long-term grassroots programs in 150+ villages and schools
- Sending national teams to Asia-Oceanic and World championships

If you're passionate about sport, systems, or inclusion — we'd love to connect.

Name: XV de France militaire féminin
Description:
Le XV de France militaire féminin est une sélection composée des meilleures joueuses de rugby des trois armées (Armée de Terre, Marine nationale, Armée de l’Air et de l’Espace), et de la Gendarmerie nationale. Toutes licenciées en club, certaines évoluent au niveau élite du championnat de la Fédération Française de Rugby. Encadré par du personnel militaire, le XV de France militaire féminin se réunit trois à quatre fois l’an durant une semaine pour parfaire son entraînement et se mesurer à d’autres équipes nationales, notamment européennes, ou des équipes du championnat de France.

Le mot de la chef d'escadron Agathe Ponge, manager de l'équipe: 
«Nommée récemment sur mes fonctions de manager (janvier 2022), j’ai beaucoup d’ambition, et souhaite faire rayonner la sélection en visant la performance et le haut niveau. 
Mon staff et moi travaillons actuellement sur la préparation de la coupe du monde, qui aura lieu en Octobre prochain, où nous souhaitons faire briller notre nation, au travers de cette équipe, composée de joueuses de talent et courageuses venant des trois armées et de la Gendarmerie Nationale». 
Agathe PONGE 
Manager du XV de France militaire féminin

Name: Ballinteer St Johns GAA Club
Description:
Ballinteer St Johns was founded in 1982.  Since then, it has grown into a vibrant community based GAA Club situated on the edge of Marlay Park in South Dublin.  Its’ catchment area covers Ballinteer, Churchtown, Rathfarnham, Dundrum and beyond. Currently, Ballinteer St Johns has over 3,000 members and 1,000 families, covering girls, boys, mens and ladies Gaelic games.

The Club has many representatives on a wide range of Dublin squads and continues to develop and grow.

Ballinteer St Johns has over 100 teams playing every week during the season throughout the county.  The club’s thriving Nursery section sees over  300 5-7 year olds get introduced to our sports every weekend ensuring the future is bright for Ballinteer St Johns.  Club pitches are in Marley Park, Broadford, Nutgrove, Ballinteer Community School (All Weather Pitch) and Good Shepherd National School.  These are perfectly positioned and visible in the heart of the community.

The club’s main pitch in Marlay Park was recently upgraded to Championship grade and was reopened in Summer 2020.  The clubhouse is the home of regular social & cultural events,  and a buzz of activity when conditions allow!

Name: DARYSE Academy
Description: DARYSE Academy is a Talent Discovery Organization founded by Professional Footballers to discover unrecognized but talented players. Are you ready to take your football career to the next level? You can overcome the challenges of going PRO. Mature your playing style, adapt to the professional environment, and face elite competition. It only requires dedication, a growth mindset, perseverance, and proper guidance with the right network. DARYSE Academy is your gateway to excellence. This is an unparalleled opportunity to train alongside professional players and against professional teams to showcase your skills and impress scouts, coaches, and talent agents who frequent these high-profile games. Name: Delft Challenge Sailing Team
Description:
In 2003, an enthusiastic group of students from the TU Delft started their dream project: starting an offshore student sailing race team to compete in national and international competition and meet the level of the professionals. Ever since, the team has seen many iterations and produced very skilled sailors that are still active in all kinds of sailing competitions.

The team members organise all aspects about the campaign themselves. This includes scheduling trainings, keeping the boat in race condition, contact with our sponsors and organisation of events.

Delft Challenge has been sailing in the Farr30, a 30 foot keelboat with a large spinaker specifically designed for coastal racing, for most of its time to compete in the Tour de France a la Voile and Sailing Arabia Tour. In 2018 the switch
was made to a Diam24, a high performance trimaran for three sailors. This was a large challenge as we were the only team in the Netherlands and nearly all of the races were in France. After two years of racing the Diam 24, another switch was due.

Currently we are racing the J/70, a 4 person 22 foot sports boat with a very competitive international fleet. This season we will compete in the Sailing Champions League in Sopot (Poland) and the European Championships in Weymouth (England). We proudly represent te KNZ&RV Muiden!

Name: AMS Indigenous Business Association at UBC
Description: Providing Indigenous business students with the chance to have new opportunities, grow their network and community, engage in events, and find a home away from home. With IBA, we hope to help in the initiative to reduce barriers and set students up for success through their educational and professional journey here at UBC. We also hope to provide students with an environment where they can engage in activities - some activities with cultural significance - in hopes to help indigenize and revitalize the environment within the Sauder Indigenous community.

Voor zaalhockey heeft de vereniging in de wintermaanden een luchthal op eigen terrein. Goed bereikbaar met auto, fiets en Randstadrail 4 en veel gratis parkeerplaatsen. 

Maatschappelijk actieve en gezellige vereniging waar zoveel mogelijk leden met plezier op hun eigen niveau kunnen presteren. Goede jeugd-hockeyopleiding en speciale aandacht voor talentontwikkeling. Goed georganiseerde evenementen zoals toernooien, clinics, feesten en diners maken de ervaring compleet.

With three vibrant locations across Australia - Sydney (Moore Park & Bondi Junction) and Canberra (Fyshwick), we’re all about fun, community, and good vibes on and off the court. 

Ready to play? See you on court!

Name: Triathlon & Loopvereniging De Langstraat Waalwijk
Description:
Een heel scala van sporten kunt U bij onze mulitsport-vereniging beoefenen. Zwemmen, lopen, wandelen, fietsen en/of een combinatie hiervan. Van oorsprong zijn we een vereniging waar het erom ging wie het hardst kon zwemmen, fietsen en lopen. Door de jaren heen zijn we uitgegroeid naar een veelzijdige multisport vereniging waar iedereen op zijn of haar niveau kan sporten in een sfeervolle ambiance. Wij hebben een enthousiaste leden op alle niveau’s en elke leeftijd in de diverse takken van sport. Zo is er bij TLV De Langstraat plaats voor iedereen en hebben we inmiddels ca. 150 leden.  

Naast sporten vinden we het belangrijk dat mensen zich thuis voelen bij de vereniging. Ook op het sociale vlak zijn wij een actieve vereniging en organiseren we tal van leuke activiteiten. Er zijn dus volop mogelijkheden om ook naast de sport actief bezig te zijn met het verenigingsleven. Mede hierdoor bestaat er een hechte band tussen onze leden.

Name: Buckingham Golf Club

Buckingham Golf Club offers a beautiful parkland 18-Hole Championship Golf Course and Clubhouse with outstanding views over the Buckinghamshire countryside. It is the ideal venue for you to enjoy a round of Golf and then relax in the pleasant surroundings of our Clubhouse.

Buckingham Golf Club provides its Members with a Course to play where each of the 18-Holes is different and offers a variety of challenges. It is also an ideal venue for Golf Societies, Corporate Golf days, Business events or hosting a special Function.

Name: Pitch in Motion
Description:
Chez Pitch in Motion, nous créons des rencontres au sein de l’écosystème entrepreneurial par la pratique des sports d’endurance. 

Pitch in Motion est une initiative portée par trois entrepreneurs et ultra-trailers : Étienne Bourdon, Édouard Thomas et Nathan Gatto. 

Nous organisons des week-ends exclusifs à destination de dirigeants passionnés de sports d’endurance et d’athlètes de haut niveau, dans lesquels nous dressons des parallèles entre endurance sportive et entrepreneuriat.

Nous intervenons également dans les grandes villes avec des Social Runs d’entrepreneurs et sur des salons tels que Viva Technology, dans lesquels nous nous servons du sport pour faire du networking un moment agréable.

Name: Gars du Reun Basket
Description:
Les Gars du Reun Basket de Guipavas, plus qu’un club : un partenaire de visibilité et d’ambition.

Depuis 1948, notre club ne cesse de grandir. Avec près de 350 licenciés, nous faisons aujourd’hui partie des 5 plus grands clubs du Finistère, engagés dans toutes les catégories d’âges, du mini-basket aux équipes seniors.

 Former, fédérer, performer : c’est notre ADN. Nos équipes évoluent au plus haut niveau régional (RF2, RM2, U18, U15 & U13 régionaux), preuve de la qualité de notre formation et de notre engagement auprès de la jeunesse.

Mais les GDR Basket, c’est aussi une salle qui vibre chaque week-end, des centaines de supporters, des milliers de vues en ligne, et des événements phares comme notre Tournoi International Cadets, reconnu bien au-delà de la Bretagne.

 Pourquoi devenir partenaire ?
Parce qu’associer votre entreprise au GDR Basket, c’est :
- Offrir à votre marque une visibilité locale et digitale puissante
- Vous associer à un club structuré, ambitieux et formateur
- Bénéficier d’un ancrage fort dans la communauté guipavasienne et brestoise
- Soutenir un projet qui fait rayonner la jeunesse et les valeurs du sport

 Nos ambitions grandissent, et nous avons besoin de partenaires pour écrire la suite de cette histoire.
Et si la prochaine victoire, c’était avec vous ?

Name: Pitch15 - Women's Sports
Description:
Pitch15 is a next-generation investment fund backing the rise of women’s sports.

We invest in elite teams, leagues, and media platforms that are shaping the future of sport — culturally, commercially, and competitively. Our belief is simple: women’s sports represent the most undervalued asset class in global entertainment.

Through strategic capital, operational expertise, and a fan-first approach, we partner with pioneering organisations to build scalable, iconic properties — redefining what success looks like on and off the field.

Pitch15 exists to unlock the full potential of women’s sport. Join us.

Name: Fareham Hockey Club
Description:

Fareham Hockey Club was founded in 1900 and is one of the oldest hockey clubs in the country. 

Established as a strong part of the local community, the club has grown in size and stature over the years. The often club reaches national finals and individuals regularly gaining international recognition. 

Now acclaimed as one of the South's most respected and leading hockey clubs, we are the premier sports club in the borough. FHC field 7 Senior Men's teams and 3 Senior Ladies teams as well as a thriving junior academy section. 

The Men's and Ladies senior sections offers league hockey at all standards, from National League through to the South Central Leagues and their various divisions. 

FHC offers players of all abilities competitive hockey at the appropriate standard and we also operate an outreach programme in 8-10 local schools to break down barriers in field hockey participation.
