Name: Human-Powered Submarine Team @ FAU
Description:
A Human-Powered Submarine Team is made up of students united by a passion for the ocean and the engineering challenges it presents. Our team includes students from diverse disciplines — engineering, business, marketing, and more — all driven by curiosity and a love for diving. We aim to transform classroom knowledge into real-world experience by designing, building, and testing a fully operational human-powered submarine. Through this process, we strive to develop the next generation of skilled ocean engineers, starting with a submarine.

Our team has proudly competed at the International Submarine Races in Maryland, the European International Submarine Races in the United Kingdom, and the Sub-Racing Series Invitational in Gran Canaria. At Florida Atlantic University, we uniquely blend sport and education, giving members the opportunity to apply theoretical principles through hands-on innovation beneath the surface.

We welcome donations, collaborations, and lab visits — reach out to us anytime at fauhpsc@gmail.com.

https://www.fau.edu/engineering/ome/undergraduate/ocean/

Name: OCEAN'S 4
Description:
OCEAN'S 4 ist das erste Schweizer Team, das 2023 den Pazifik rudernd überquert hat! WORLD’S TOUGHEST ROW – PACIFIC

Die Thunersee-Ruderer Astrid Schmid, Denise Lützelschwab, Toni Fehr und Philipp Kessler sind am 12. Juni 2023 ins härteste Ruderrennen der Welt, von Monterey, Kalifornien nach Hawaii gestartet. Sie ruderten in 43 Tagen, 5 Stunden und 2 Minuten 4467 Kilometer nonstop und unbegleitet über den grössten und tiefsten Ozean, den Pazifik. Das Team sass in 2 Stunden-Schichten am Ruder, das bedeutet 2 Stunden rudern und 2 Stunden ausruhen, 24/7 vom Start bis ins Ziel, der schönen Bucht Hanalei Bay auf Kauaii, die westlichste Insel Hawaiis. Eine unglaubliche Challenge und ein abenteuerlicher Wettkampf gegen die Müdigkeit in der rauhen und gleichzeitig zauberhaften Natur fern ab von Land und Zivilisation. Kommen sie an Bord und erleben sie diese besondere Reise hautnah. Tickets für das SHOWCASE BULLAUGE unter https://www.oceans4.ch/

Name: Almtuna IS Ishockey AB
Description:
I över 90 år har Almtuna varit en bestående del av föreningslivet i Uppsala. Vi är stolta över vår starka tradition som en mötesplats för stadens barn och unga.
Hos oss har otaliga fått en meningsfull fritidssysselsättning och vi har bidragit till att tusentals tillåtits drömma om att bli ishockeyspelare. Vi har fostrat SM-guldmedaljörer, NHL-spelare och världsmästare. Framför allt har vi varit en plats för glädje och bidragit till att barn och unga i våra korridorer och omklädningsrum i många fall skapat livslånga vänskapsband.

I en kall ishall hittar vi värme i vår gemenskap. Från pojkarna och flickorna i hockeyskolan till våra elitlag och vidare upp på läktaren. 
Det är våra unga tjejer och killar som tillsammans med dig - du som sitter på läktaren, som stöttar oss från tv-soffan eller som är vår partner - bygger vår framtid. Det är för er vi spelar och för er vi ger vårt allt för att vinna. När vi vinner gör vi det tillsammans med hela Uppsala och Uppland.
Från isen, via läktaren, längsmed Fyrisån, till Grisslehamn i öst och till Heby i väst. Till Tierp i norr och Arlanda i söder. Mellan Östersjön, Dalälven och Mälaren vill vi vara den självklara hockeyklubben för barn och unga - oavsett om man älskar att själv stå på isen eller vill heja fram något av våra lag. Genom vår plattform som en av 28 elithockeyklubbar i Sverige bidrar vi till att sätta Uppsala på kartan.

With a rich history of developing local talent and fostering a strong community spirit, West Adelaide has earned a reputation as one of the most respected soccer clubs in the region. Name: Association Tout est Possible
Description:
Nous sommes une association à but non lucratif, qui soutient les sportifs en situation de handicap du début de la compétition jusqu’au plus haut niveau – les Jeux paralympiques – par une aide financière, une mise en lumière grâce aux plateformes de communication et la mise à disposition de son réseau d’expertise. Nous contribuons à concrétiser leurs rêves !

Il s’agit également de mettre le handicap en valeur, lui donner de la visibilité par le sport de compétition pour contribuer à une meilleure insertion des personnes en situation de handicap dans notre société. Tout est possible, pour tous et dans tous les domaines de la vie.
Celine van Till a fondé l’Association Tout est Possible. Elle véhicule une énergie solaire nous rassemblant autour d’une cause. Elle veut montrer la force du possible face à une difficulté. Ainsi, le sport est un merveilleux vecteur pour se dépasser.

L’Association Tout est Possible est inscrite au Registre de Commerce du Canton de Genève depuis le 15 octobre 2019. Nous avons obtenu l’exonération fiscale depuis 2019 pour une durée indéterminée. Elle est reconnue d’utilité publique.

Representing the rich heritage of Odisha and the unyielding spirit of Indian hockey, the Kalinga Lancers have always been synonymous with skill, teamwork, and determination.
 
Champions of the 2017 Hockey India League, the Lancers were acquired by the Vedanta Group in 2024, and the team remains committed to showcasing top-notch performances and fostering the growth of hockey in India.
 
Rooted in the history of Kalinga, a legendary kingdom in Odisha, the Kalinga Lancers derive their name from the ‘Lances (warriors)’ of Kalinga, symbolising strength, courage, and readiness for battle. Just like the warriors of Kalinga, we bring passion, precision, and perseverance to every match, representing the state’s rich legacy on the national and international stage.
 
With Vedanta’s passion for sports and its dedication to nurturing young talent, the Kalinga Lancers aim to elevate Indian hockey and inspire the next generation. For us, it’s not just about winning, it’s about honouring the game, the legacy, and the pride of Odisha.

Name: Etihad Club
Description:
Etihad Club – Jordan’s First Privately Registered Football Club 

Since its establishment in 2022, Etihad Club has redefined what a modern football institution can look like in Jordan. Built on a fully professional, corporate, and transparent structure, Etihad stands today as the only fully data-driven club in the country and a model designed for long-term growth, talent development, and investor confidence.

In just three years, Etihad Club has proven the power of a privately run system. We have become Jordan’s leading talent engine, with more than 65 players called up to national teams across men’s, women’s, and youth categories — the highest contribution among all clubs. This achievement reflects our commitment to methodology, sports science, analytics, and individualized development plans.

Competitively, Etihad Club has delivered results that few clubs in the region can match. Our men’s and women’s teams have won 15 official JFA championships, establishing a winning culture built on discipline, structure, and continuous improvement. Our players have also dominated individual awards: Player of the Year (2022), and in 2023 and 2024, Etihad swept Best Goalkeeper, Best Player, and League Top Scorer across multiple competitions.

What makes Etihad unique is not only the trophies, but the system behind them, a clear governance model, data-powered scouting and performance analytics, and a club environment built to scale. As the first officially registered private club in Jordan, Etihad is pioneering a new era of professional football with strong commercial, academy, and partnership pathways.

*Owned by 6 Yard

Name: Little Ship Club
Description:
Founded in 1926, Little Ship Club brought together yachtsmen and women working in the City who wanted to meet and exchange ideas during the long winter months. It became renowned for its classes in navigation and seamanship, and in 1937 the Club was awarded the privilege for its members to wear the defaced Blue Ensign for its contribution to training the RNVSR. Today, members from all over the world meet in the Club which is located on the north bank of the Thames by Southwark Bridge. 

LSC highlights:

• A full and varied sailing calendar, including both domestic and international rallies, complemented by a Skippers and Crews register and Little Ship Club representatives across the world who are happy to welcome members into their particular port.
• Fantastic lunchtime dining facilities overlooking the Thames, Monday to Friday; serving a daily two-course club lunch or a la carte. Members are welcome to bring guests.
• A variety of function rooms, including a private dining room, a fully equipped conference room and a small meeting room. For large events the entire Club is available for hire and working in conjunction with our in-house caterers we can offer a first class facility for business or social events including Weddings and Civil Partnerships, for which we are licensed. 
• Overnight accommodation in our cabins equipped with shower and hand basin at competitive rates.
• A wealth of RYA shore-based training courses from basic through to advanced.

As of 2021, our Commodore is Barrie Martin, welcome aboard!

Name: Dungannon Swifts Football Club
Description:
Dungannon Swifts Football Club is a Northern Irish semi-professional football club playing in the NIFL Premiership. The club, founded in 1949, has risen from the Mid-Ulster League to the top tier in Northern Ireland since its election to the Irish League First Division in 1997. Dungannon earned promotion from Irish League First Division to the Premier Division in the 2002–03 season.

The Swifts hail from Dungannon, County Tyrone and play their home matches at Stangmore Park. Club colours are royal blue with white trim (home strip) and yellow with a blue trim (away strip).

Notable achievements include winning the League Cup in 2018 and securing a historic Irish Cup victory in 2025, further cementing the club’s place in Northern Irish football history.

Name: Österreichischer Hockeyverband (ÖHV)
Description:
Zu den Aufgaben des ÖHV gehört die Förderung und Ausbreitung des Landhockeysportes sowohl am Feld (also im Freien) als auch in der Halle. Er sorgt für die Umsetzung einheitlicher Regeln und den geordneten Spielbetrieb von nationalen Meisterschaftsspielen.

Der ÖHV vertritt den Hockeysport im In- und Ausland - insbesondere gegenüber Förderern und Sponsoren und ist der direkte Ansprechpartner von FIH und EHF.

Insbesondere ist der Österreichische Hockeyverband zuständig für den internationalen Spielverkehr und die damit verbundenen Maßnahmen für sämtliche Hockeynationalmannschaften beginnend mit der U14, U16, U18, U21 und Damen sowie Herren im Erwachsenenbereich.

Im Kompetenzbereich der Österreichischen Hockeyverbandes liegen die Erbringung von Serviceleistungen für die Mitglieder, Vertretung der Anliegen des Hockeysports gegenüber staatlichen Einrichtungen, Vertretung des österreichischen Hockeysports in internationalen Gremien, Übungsleiter-, Instruktoren- und Trainerausbildungen, Erstellung von Dokumentationen und Datenbanken, Event- und Verbandsmarketing und Förderung von Fairness im Hockeysport, insbesondere durch Maßnahmen gegen Doping, Gewalt und Rassismus.

Der ÖHV ist kein gewinnorientierter Verein. Er orientiert sein wirtschaftliches Handeln an betriebswirtschaftlichen Kriterien und klar definierten Qualitätsnormen und ist sich seiner ökonomischen Verantwortung bewusst.  Langfristig erfolgreiche Kooperationen mit der Wirtschaft, der öffentlichen Hand, den Förderern und den Medien wird ständig vorangetrieben. Sponsoren bietet der ÖHV ein attraktives Leistungsangebot.

 Mehr alpine Kompetenz durch fundierte Ausbildungen, Kurse und Trainings. 
 Mehr Sicherheit mit unserer Freizeit-Unfallversicherung. 
 Mehr Hüttenleben mit über 30% Ermäßigung in unseren knapp 140 Hütten und Häusern.

Name: College Prospector
Description:
College Prospector helps student-athletes and families make fully informed college decisions through verified data, athlete mentorship, and one-on-one recruiting advising.

We track over 2,600 college athletic programs across every sport, giving families transparent insights into academic fit, cost, roster trends, and recruiting pipelines. Athletes can compare colleges by athletic level, admissions data, financial details, and on-field performance to see exactly where they fit and what’s realistic for their goals.

For those seeking personalized direction, our Full-Scale Advising Program connects families with experienced college recruiting advisors who guide them step-by-step through the recruiting process—from building outreach plans to communicating with coaches and evaluating offers.

Through our Athlete Mentor Program, families can also book 45-minute video calls with current and former college athletes to learn about the real day-to-day experience—balancing school, training, and life as a student-athlete.

Our mission is simple: make the college recruiting process more transparent, data-driven, and accessible for every athlete—without the high costs or confusion that usually come with it.

Whether you’re a player, parent, coach, or organization, College Prospector gives you the tools and personal guidance to make confident decisions about your future—on and off the field.

 Learn more: www.collegeprospector.com

Our close affiliation with the Widnes Wild Academy fosters mentorship and inspiration, with senior players regularly attending academy sessions to support young athletes from the first skate. This strengthens the connection between clubs, families and our wider community.

We proudly support local youth development through our Match Experiences, welcoming young people from services such as Warrington Targeted Youth to attend home games at The Jungle - a safe, inclusive and inspiring environment that builds lasting memories and community bonds.

Believing sponsorships should deliver wider impact, in 2023/24 we introduced exclusive Halton Haven warm-up jerseys, worn at every home game and auctioned via our “own & loan” program, raising over £1,500 for this vital charity. Additionally, we partnered with Wickes to improve facilities for Halton Haven Hospice staff, reinforcing our community commitment.

Since 2014, Air the Bear has been a beloved tradition. Each December, fans bring teddy bears to a home game, and after the first Wild goal, the ice fills with soft toys tossed from the stands. In 2024, over 150 bears were donated to Alder Hey Children’s Hospital, bringing festive comfort to children facing tough times.

Join The Prowl - Visit widneswild.co.uk for fixtures, tickets, sponsorships and ways to get involved!

Unser Ziel ist es, junge Talente und ambitionierte Frauen im Segelsport zu fördern und ihnen die Möglichkeit zu bieten, auf höchstem Niveau zu konkurrieren.

Dies kann in Form einer Partnerschaft, Gönnerschaft oder einer Spende sein. Mit den Geldern sowie Sach- und Dienstleistungen werden Projekte in der Schweiz unterstützt, die die Förderung des nachhaltigen Schneesports zum Ziel haben.

Snowstainability fördert Projekte in den Bereichen ökologische, ökonomische und soziale Nachhaltigkeit, die in der Schweiz umgesetzt werden und direkt mit dem Schneesport zusammenhängen. Geweldige catering zal de gasten deze avond laten genieten op culinair gebied, terwijl topartiesten optredens zorgen voor een topfeest.

Description:
FK Dukla Praha je profesionální fotbalový klub se sídlem v Praze, který hraje na ikonickém stadionu Juliska. S 11 tituly mistra ligy patří Dukla mezi nejúspěšnější kluby v historii českého fotbalu a je hrdým domovem držitele Zlatého míče Josefa Masopusta. Od roku 2025 je jejím majoritním akcionářem Matěj Turek a jeho investiční fond 10X.

 FK Dukla Prague is a professional football club based in Prague, playing at the iconic Juliska Stadium. With 11 national championship titles, Dukla belongs among the most successful clubs in Czech football history and proudly stands as the home of Ballon d’Or winner Josef Masopust. Since 2025 its majority shareholder has been Matěj Turek and his investment fund 10X.

Name: Aball UPV
Description:
Las siglas "A-ball" juegan con la fonética ingles del verbo "To be Able", para relacionar la palabra ball (pelota) con el objetivo de proporcionar y definir al fútbol en silla de ruedas. Ya que sus deportistas y practicantes son: "CAPACITADOS". 

El "A-ball" es un deporte para que personas con movilidad reducida o no, encuentren en su práctica deportiva, una oportunidad integradora, inclusiva y social para conseguir un crecimiento y mejora personal.

El equipo de A-ball de la Universidad Politécnica de Valencia se creó en el mes septiembre de 2021 y las acciones deportivas y sociales realizadas hasta la actualidad, han permitido a gran cantidad de personas conocer y disfrutar de su universalidad.

Es objetivo prioritario del equipo, llevar la bandera del deporte inclusivo a todas aquellas personas que valoran su integración en la sociedad mediante el deporte. Los valores del deporte se ven reforzados en esta nueva disciplina deportiva que permite a los aficionados al fútbol, disfrutar del deporte rey sea cual sea su situación física, mental y social.

Name: Caversham United Football Club
Description:
Caversham United Football Club are an amateur football club based in Reading, Berkshire. We now boast three teams at the club, including two mens sides in the Reading and District Sunday League, Divisions 1 and 4 respectively, and a women’s side in the sixth tier nationally, in the Southern Regional Division 1 North. Our club is affiliated to the Berks & Bucks Football Association.

Caversham United Football Club was founded under current ownership in June 2015, having been most recently known as AFC Palmer. Previous enitities of the club include RBC Unison, FC Brettle and Miah's. This is all history now and prior to the current ownership.

The Goats? Following a Twitter Campaign in November 2018 the club adopted a new nickname of The Billy Goats, decided by the Twitter public. The nickname was not the only thing devised by our 15,000+ Twitter followers though! The current club crest was chosen, as was the club’s kit… and since then we have held an annual #CavUtdKitCompetition where designers can create a new kit and Twitter followers can vote for their favourite!

For more information, please visit our social media channels using @cavershamunited on Twitter, Instagram, Facebook and YouTube. 

You can also find our specific women’s football team accounts at @cavershamutdwfc on Twitter and @cavershamunitedwomen on Instagram!

Amateur football done differently. #WeAreUnited

Description:

Name: ELEVENHEADS
Description:
ELEVENHEADS ist ein Herzensprojekt mit Start in 2019. Nun haben wir daraus ein Unternehmen gemacht und das mit absolut herausragenden Mitstreitern!

Weshalb es uns gibt?
Wir erleben im Fußball zu viel willkürliches Führungsverhalten, zu viele Bauchentscheidungen aus Impulsen heraus. Hochtalentierte Spieler oder ganze Mannschaften verlieren Leistungsfähigkeit ohne erkennbaren Grund. Wir brauchen mehr Selbststeuerung, mehr Strategie, mehr Wissen um die Auswirkungen intuitiven Führens. 

Welche Lösung bieten wir?
Unser Fokus ist das Individuum im Team. Für Athlet:innen bedeutet das, in die Selbstwirksamkeit zu kommen. Für Coaches bedeutet das, individualisiert zu führen. Es braucht eine tiefe und differenzierte Kenntnis des motivationalen Antriebs des Einzelnen in seiner Beziehung zur Umgebung. Konsequent motivbasierte Entwicklung und Führung erbringt genau die steuerbare Performance, die wir anstreben – auf und neben dem Platz.

Sei Dirigent:in Deiner Motivation. Performance muss kein Zufall sein.

Name: NextBulls Esports
Description:
NextBulls Esports is a next-generation esports organization building the infrastructure layer of competitive gaming.

We combine blockchain technology and artificial intelligence to solve real problems in esports — delayed prize payments, lack of trust, unfair competition, unstable team funding, and closed governance.

NextBulls enables:
	•	Instant, automated tournament rewards through smart contracts
	•	Transparent player and team reputation systems stored on-chain
	•	AI-powered fair matchmaking and bracket creation
	•	Community-driven governance and leadership elections
	•	Innovative crowd-based team sponsorship models

Our focus is not just organizing tournaments, but creating a trusted, scalable, and transparent esports ecosystem where players, teams, sponsors, and fans all have clear rights, data, and opportunities.

NextBulls Esports is built to operate at both national and global levels, starting from Pakistan and expanding internationally, while aligning with future regulatory frameworks and professional esports standards.

Name: ACT e.v. Adventure Country Tracks
Description:
Adventure Country Tracks e.V. is a registered non-profit organization whose mission is to establish and maintain off-road routes and tracks in European countries for so-called adventure motorcycles / dual purpose bikes.

RESPONSIBLE.
By providing information, advocacy and promoting responsible motorcycle travel, ACT seeks to preserve motorcycling on unpaved roads in the hinterland for generations to come and also to promote tourism in rural areas. Adventure Country Tracks works with enthusiastic partners in some countries of Europe, with tourism authorities, land administrations, forest services, tourist boards, tour operators, etc. to provide routes and remote roads for motorcycling.

SUPPORTIVE.
By investing in communication and hopefully supporting local petty businesses, guesthouses, and local resources, ACT is able to provide free GPS tracks and advice, create photo and video archives of the routes, and educate the motorcycle community on the routes. 

EPIC.
Our desire is to provide a detailed documentation of the routes, areas and backgrounds and to motivate the traveler to follow these routes. Epic rides that you can self-guide, taken at your speed, with your friends just however you like to travel. Trails that take you away from population into empty valleys, up windswept hills and mountains, that place you in the nature, and roads – empty sinuous country roads – that make the breaks between the trails every bit as fascinating.

Name: L'Équipage Audencia Voile
Description:
Fondée en 1997, l’association L'Équipage Audencia Voile a pour mission de promouvoir la voile et les sports nautiques au sein d’Audencia Business School. 
Elle poursuit cet objectif à travers la réalisation de multiples évènements, organisés tout au long de l’année par les 26 membres de l’association.

Son activité se structure autour de trois pôles : 

- Le pôle Croisière propose une semaine de découverte de la navigation côtière pour près d’une centaine d’étudiants d’Audencia. 

- Le pôle Event organise le Surf Trip, qui offre une initiation au surf d’une semaine dans les Landes, mais aussi la Régate Audencia Voile, une compétition de voile légère en catamaran, et qui organise une multitude de plus petits événements. 

- Enfin, le pôle Compétition de L’Équipage participe à de nombreuses régates étudiantes, notamment à la Course Croisière EDHEC. L’Équipage obtient régulièrement des classements honorables pour les régates auxquelles elle prend part.

Pour réaliser tous ces projets, l'association se base chaque année sur un budget compris entre 90K€ et 110K€.

Name: Club Aviron ESCP Business School
Description:
Le Club Aviron de l’ESCP est un groupe dynamique et convivial, encourageant la découverte de cette discipline à tous les élèves de l'école désireux de le faire. En une année universitaire, les étudiants, pour la plus part débutants, vivent une carrière « accélérée » du rameur de club, passant de la yolette pour les débutant au 8+ Empacher dernier cri, vivant des compétitions locales (à Choisy le roi, ou à Polytechnique) et des régates internationales (Florence, Amsterdam, Budapest, Monaco…), en vue des championnats de France qui viennent clôturer la saison. Chaque année, ce sont environ une centaine d’étudiants qui s’inscrivent dans notre structure ; quatre 8+ sont généralement constitués en fin de saison. Les entrainements ont lieu le jeudi et le samedi sur l’eau à l'ENCOU et le lundi et le mardi en salle à l’Ecole: il s’agit donc pour nos étudiants d’un engagement très important, témoignant de leur attachement au club et aux valeurs qu’il défend.  
Trois coachs, Etienne BARRAUX, Frédéric CAPLAN et Gaël DESTREBECQ, accompagnent les rameurs tout au long de l’année, permettant un suivi et un travail de qualité. Tout ce programme se déroule dans une ambiance souvent très conviviale, façonnant à sa manière l’esprit de l’aviron universitaire. De plus, le Club Aviron est doté d’une vraie structure associative : ses membres travaillent toute l’année sur l'organisation d'évènements de grande envergure, notamment l’ESCP Eurowing Regatta (Eurowings) qui se déroule sur le bassin des JO 2024.

Name: UHC Kloten-Dietlikon Jets
Description:

Wir betreiben Frauen- und Männer-Teams in allen Altersklassen ab 6 Jahren. Unsere Frauen des L-UPL-Team, sind 12-fache Schweizermeisterinnen und mehrfache Cupsiegerinnen, das Fanionteam der Herren spielt in der Nationalliga B.
Die Mitglieder der Jets-Familie, bei Kindern auch deren Eltern, nehmen aktiv am Vereinsleben teil. Gemeinsam ermöglichen wir unseren jungen und erfahrenen Spielerinnen und Spielern ein tolles Sporterlebnis auch in einem leistungsorientierten Umfeld. Zu letzterem gehört auch der Betrieb es Regionalen Leistungszentrums Zürich, Standort Kloten.

Name: Platform Sports Group
Description:
At Platform Sports Coaching, we believe in using the power of sport to inspire young people, develop their potential, and nurture a lifelong love of physical activity. Based in the UK, we deliver high-quality, values-driven sports coaching to children and young people aged 4–18 through a range of school partnerships, community programmes, football clubs, and holiday camps.

Our team of qualified, passionate coaches is committed to creating positive learning environments that build confidence, teamwork, and resilience. Whether we’re delivering PE in primary schools, running after-school enrichment clubs, or leading grassroots football sessions, our approach always focuses on developing the whole child — physically, socially, and emotionally.

What We Do:
	•	Curriculum PE & PPA Cover
	•	After-school and Enrichment Clubs
	•	Holiday Activity & Food (HAF) Programmes
	•	Themed Holiday Camps
	•	Grassroots Football Coaching (U7–U18)
	•	Coach Mentoring & CPD Support
	•	School Sports Partnerships

We are proud to be trusted by schools, parents, and community leaders across the region. At Platform, we don’t just coach — we help build confident, healthy, and inspired young people.

Platform Sports Coaching – More than Sport.

Name: Manchester Giants Juniors (basketball)
Description:
Manchester Giants Juniors currently consists of 7 teams from Under 12’s to Under 18’s playing in Basketball England Regional and National Leagues, Tournaments and Competitions We are a registered Community Interest Company ran by volunteers - Our primary concern is the development and investment into the local community and the game of basketball.

Players are selected through open trials from all areas Greater Manchester, with a high percentage of successful trialists coming from inner city and areas and disadvantaged backgrounds.

Each team trains a minimum of twice per week around a large variety of schools and sports centres around Manchester, we also offer Strength & Conditioning Training to ensure physical development and injury prevention and rehabilitation.

We encourage personal development into other areas of the game offering courses and training to become the next Coaches, Referees and Table officials and pathway into higher education with links to Xaverian College (Manchester Giants Academy Programme)

Our vision is consistently grow and development to provide more opportunities to the youth of Greater Manchester and aim to be the largest and most successful National League basketball club in the North West of England with teams in all age groups regularly making it to the final fours of the NBL.

We work with young men from across the city with over 30% from disadvantaged backgrounds and aim to enable these athletes to benefit from top class coaches who will work with them to not only fulfil their basketball potential, but also into adulthood. 

Basketball within our club will help our young men learn about working with others, putting the needs of the team above those of the individual. Also, through the medium of sport help them all understand what it means to work hard, be disciplined and aspirational and fulfil their dreams both on and off the court.

Name: Portland Community Football Club (PCFC)
Description:
The Portland Community Football Club's (PCFC) mission is to provide access, belonging, and opportunity through high-quality soccer and wraparound services for low-income and historically underserved youth ages 6-18 in Portland, Oregon.

Through a "whole child" advocacy model, PCFC offers resources such as a monthly food pantry, coach mentorship, free uniforms, and family gatherings to ensure that every child has the opportunity to succeed, both on and off the field. 

We believe that success is built on open access, universal belonging, and shared opportunities, PCFC creates a supportive environment where youth can overcome challenges and thrive.

Name: Oz'Moov
Description:
Alors Oz’Moov, comment tu as commencé ?

À l’origine du projet il y a Jérôme, triple amputé albigeois, 46 ans, deux garçons de 12 et 13 ans. En 1984, une éternité maintenant, un accident de parcours et Jérôme se retrouve à 9 ans avec deux jambes et un bras en moins. Quelques mois d’hôpital, de rééducation, et le revoilà sur pieds. Du moins, sur prothèses . Problème : à cette époque, l’appareillage sert uniquement à marcher. C’est déjà énorme, mais ne permet pas de faire de sport.

Depuis, le matériel a évolué, mais les lames de courses ont un coût non négligeable (plusieurs milliers d’euros). Alors que lorsqu’un valide veut tester la course à pied, une paire de running lui coûte moins de 50€, l’expérience est bien différente pour un handi. Le problème est posé…

C’est alors qu’au hasard d’une rencontre intergénérationnelle entre un handi au parcours atypique et de jeunes ingénieurs inspirants et inspirés, émergeait deux idées singulières : 1- la mise à disposition d’une banque de lames en location, afin de permettre à tout un chacun de tester à moyen terme avant d’investir ; 2- organiser des événements sportifs sur le principe de la mixité handi/valide pour élargir le champs des possible ensemble.

Oz’Moov est né .

Name: Whitehaven RLFC
Description:
Whitehaven RLFC was formed at a meeting held in the Miners' Welfare Club at Kells from the Whitehaven Miners' Welfare team in 1948 and shortly afterwards were admitted into the Northern Rugby Football League by just three votes. Whitehaven took over the Miners' Welfare lease at the Recreation Ground. In their first game Haven beat Hull 5-0. There was a "disappointing" turnout of only 9,000 because of the pouring rain; in those days the Supporters' Club had 4,000 members. The early Whitehaven team were nicknamed "the Colliers" as the Recreation Ground because of the Miners' Welfare connection.
Whitehaven RLFC are currently competing in the Betfred Championship.

Name: Heming Idrettslaget
Description:
Heming er et allsidig idrettslag med åtte hovedidretter og enda flere underidretter. Klubben ble stiftet 25. januar 1916 og er i dag Norges største fleridrettslag med nær 6.000 medlemmer.

Heming holder til på Slemdal i bydel Vestre Aker i Oslo. Her finner du klubbhus, kunstgressbaner med undervarme, Heminghallen med innedørs tennisbaner, trampolinehall og treningssenter. Vi har også eget tennisanlegg med 7 baner, 2 tennisbobler om vinteren og et splitter nytt klubbhus med innendørs padelbaner (aug 2023). Vårt verdisett er nedfelt i håndboken "Hemings Lille Grønne".

For mer informasjon, se våre hjemmesider www.heming.no

Name: Montpellier Handball Association
Description:

Notre mission : accompagner les jeunes dans leur développement sportif, éducatif et humain, tout en menant des projets à fort impact social sur le territoire.

À travers nos écoles de handball, nos équipes de jeunes, nos stages de perfectionnement et nos initiatives RSE, nous œuvrons chaque jour pour transmettre les valeurs d’excellence, de respect et de solidarité qui font la renommée du MHB.

L’association s’appuie sur un réseau solide de partenaires institutionnels et privés qui partagent cette vision d’un sport vecteur d’inclusion, d’éducation et de performance.
En rejoignant nos projets, vous contribuez à faire grandir une nouvelle génération de sportifs et de citoyens engagés.

 Entreprises, institutions, mécènes : engagez-vous à nos côtés pour faire du handball un levier d’impact positif et durable.

Name: Tournefeuille Rugby
Description:
Nous sommes avant tout un club formateur, labellisé trois étoiles, le plus haut niveau par la FFR, et reconnu comme un des meilleurs par nos pairs. Avec plus de 800 licenciés, du baby Rugby aux portes du groupe seniors, et une centaine d’éducateurs, l’école de Rugby et le Pôle Formation sont le vivier qui, en quantité 
et surtout en qualité, nous permettent de construire l’avenir du club, concrétisé par le projet Tournefeuille 2025, #TNF2025
Chefs d’entreprise, nous rejoindre c’est participer à l’aventure du plus grand club de France en nombre de licenciés, et de vous faire reconnaitre auprès d’un écosystème de plusieurs centaines de familles et de partenaires sur tout l’Ouest Toulousain, motivées par les valeurs du Rugby. Pleinement soutenu par la mairie, notre projet est d’amener le club aux niveaux des ambitions de la troisième ville de Haute-Garonne, en ce qui concerne le sportif, le social et l'environnemental. Votre soutien nous est indispensable pour nous donner l’enthousiasme de fédérer toutes les énergies.
Les parcours de nos équipes cadets nationaux et Séniors 2 en championnat de France confirment que nos efforts en investissements de structure et de professionnalisation de l’organisation portent leurs fruits.
Mais l’ambition de Tournefeuille est d’être un club complet. Nous sommes pionniers dans la mise en oeuvre d’une section Rugby adapté et nous alignerons une section féminine complète pour la saison 2022-2023. Enfin la dimension sociale et environnementale est aussi une de nos préoccupations majeures : nous avons été précurseur en ce domaine et sommes le seul club de la ligue Occitanie labellisé sur les cinq piliers du « Club engagé » pour la FFR

Name: Vereniging Diversiteit en Leiderschap in de Sport
Description:
De Vereniging voor Diversiteit en Leiderschap in de Sport is een maatschappelijke beweging (ondergebracht in een vereniging) die met haar activiteiten bijdraagt aan de ontwikkeling van diversiteit en leiderschap in en via de sport. Voorheen de LNVS (alleen gericht op vrouwen) groeien we in 2022 uit tot een vereniging met oog voor élke vorm van diversiteit

Het LNVS stimuleert diversiteit door vrouwen en de sportwereld te verbinden, aandacht te geven, aan te moedigen, te versterken, te ontwikkelen en te inspireren. Sport heeft de kracht om de samenleving te verbinden. Diversiteit in de sport kan bijdragen aan een juiste afspiegeling van de maatschappij. Een maatschappij waarin vrouwen hun talenten en ambities na kunnen streven en waar kunnen maken in welke hoedanigheid dan ook.

Name: Goshen City FC
Description:
Goshen City FC was founded in the spring of 2022 by Henrique Eichenberger, who at the time was a college student at Goshen College. Thanks to the support of the President of Goshen College, Rebecca Stoltzfus, Henrique was able to connect with the Mayor of Goshen, Jim Alvarez, and other key community members who helped him turn his vision into a reality.

Eichenberger’s vision was to establish a team that could compete at a high level, while also contributing to the community and inspiring the next generation of soccer players. To be a part of Goshen City FC, players are required to do at least one community service project to give back to the community. The club also partners with non-profit organizations to use its players as volunteers and contribute to the greater good of the community.

The club’s founding was made possible through the support and guidance of Jeremy Stutsman, the Mayor of Goshen, who helped Eichenberger organize the project. In addition, Goshen College’s Business Department provided the necessary tools and knowledge to start the business, and allowed the club to use their soccer fields for home games.

Name: Harstad Bike Park
Description:
In 2019, HCK partnered with Velosolutions Scandinavia to build the first two asphalt pump tracks - to date, the northernmost Velosolutions Pump Tracks in the world above the Arctic Circle. The project has been a huge success; up to a hundred children can be seen on both tracks daily, and the courses are used for local training and various international competitions that are held regularly.

In 2020, HCK challenged Velosolutions Scandinavia to expand on its success and create what is now the bike park. This marked the next project phase of Harstad Bike Park – starting with the creation of 7 new bike trails - from Green for families and beginners to Black for experienced athletes - and ending with innovative Freestyle and Skills Parks.

Name: Boulevard Collective
Description: On June 6, 2025, Judge Claudia Wilken gave final approval of the House vs. NCAA case, which will drastically alter the landscape of intercollegiate athletics. This settlement creates a new framework for the business of college sports that allows schools to provide direct financial benefits to student-athletes. Beginning July 1, 2025, Division I schools will have the option to distribute up to $20.5 million per year to student-athletes. Now that the House settlement is in effect and SMU has directly taken on the responsibility for revenue-sharing with student-athletes, we invite you to continue your support through the newly created Student-Athlete Benefit Fund. Your tax-deductible contribution to the fund will play a vital role in sustaining SMUs recent momentum and preparing the university for the next era of intercollegiate athletics.

The club was founded in 2004 and also supports a raft of social responsibility projects that make a social impact in New Zealand and the Pacific.

Name: Telangana Divyang Wheelchair Cricket Association
Description:
our association was founded in December 2021 with a mission to provide an opportunity to the specially challenged community to showcase their talent in the field of cricket.

Since our inception, we have organized various national-level matches where our players have exhibited remarkable skills and sportsmanship. The dedication and hard work of our players have enabled them to compete with their able-bodied counterparts and bring pride to our association.

The main objective behind the start of wheelchair cricket was to provide a platform for specially challenged individuals to break free from their physical constraints and fulfill their passion for sports. We believe that sports can be a great equalizer and provide a level playing field to everyone irrespective of their physical abilities.

We envision a future where wheelchair cricket becomes an inclusive sport in India and is supported by companies, political groups, and individuals who share our vision. We encourage everyone to join hands with us in this noble cause and contribute to making the lives of the specially challenged community better.

We, at TDWCA, are committed to providing the best possible training and resources to our players so that they can compete at the highest level. We believe that with the right support and encouragement, our players can achieve their full potential and bring laurels to our association and the country.

Join us in our mission to promote inclusivity and provide equal opportunities to the specially challenged community in the field of sports. Let’s work together to make India a more inclusive and compassionate society.

#csr #wheelchair #cricket #sportsteam #national #corporatesocialresponsibility #motivation

Name: Hunters Tarnów
Description:

Naszym celem jest nie tylko rozwijanie umiejętności sportowych, ale także kształtowanie charakteru, dyscypliny i ducha zespołu wśród młodych ludzi. Poprzez futbol, uczymy wartości, które przenoszą się na życie codzienne – odpowiedzialności, pracy zespołowej oraz determinacji.

Tworzymy silny, zaangażowany zespół, który nie tylko rywalizuje na boisku, ale również aktywnie uczestniczy w życiu lokalnej społeczności.

We are not a grassroots club and do not play in a league. If successful, players will be asked to commit to weekly training sessions, with an opportunity of playing in showcase fixtures against professional sides across the country and Europe. 
Overall, ATF serves as a showcase for the individual talents of players while also providing them with invaluable exposure, development and networking opportunities in the highly competitive world of football.

Our UK-based football academy encourages development in football skills while understanding the need for continued education. Description:
Créé en 2025, le Xv des Poussières est l'équipe de rugby de KEDGE Alumni.

Ce club est basé sur les valeurs simples du rugby : respect, engagement, solidarité, cohésion, entraide et partage.

Aujourd'hui l'équipe évolue en division 3 de la Fédération Française de Sports d'Entreprises (FFSE) en Ile de France.

Notre progression est due a un travail de longue haleine depuis des générations et des générations, non seulement sportif avec un engagement de chaque joueurs, mais aussi grâce à des fondations solides.

Nous souhaitons retranscrire sur cette page la progression, l'engagement et la réussite de notre équipe. Cette page Linkedin, servira également à rassembler la communauté de Kedgeurs autour du rugby et mettra la lumière sur des joueurs, des initiatives étudiantes ou des projets portés par des alumnis qui sont en accord avec nos valeurs et celles du rugby.

Poussinement vôtre,

Name: SV Heimstetten e.V.
Description:
Der SV Heimstetten e.V. ist ein traditionsreicher Sportverein östlich von München gelegen, der seit seiner Gründung 1967 ein breites Spektrum an sportlichen Aktivitäten bietet. Besonders bekannt ist der Verein für seine Fußballabteilung, deren 1. Mannschaft aktuell in der Bayernliga spielt. Doch der SV Heimstetten steht nicht nur für leistungsorientierten Sport, sondern legt auch großen Wert auf Nachwuchsförderung und Breitensport. Neben Fußball umfasst das Angebot des Vereins weitere Abteilungen wie Basketball, Fitness & Gymnastik, Judo, Karate, Skisport, Stocksport, Tennis, Tischtennis, Turnen und Volleyball.

Der SV Heimstetten setzt seit mehreren Jahren auf eine nachhaltige sportliche Entwicklung und leistet einen wichtigen gesellschaftlichen Beitrag in unserer Region! 

Mit derzeit rund 2000 Mitgliedern und jährlich etwa 40.000 Besuchern im wunderschönen ATS Sportpark ist der SV Heimstetten e.V. nicht nur ein Breitensportverein mit 11 Abteilungen, sondern auch ein anerkannter Ausbildungsverein nicht nur im Nachwuchs-Leistungsfußball. Wir fördern junge Talente gezielt und begleiten sie auf ihrem Weg – sportlich, persönlich und pädagogisch. 

Mit einer starken Verwurzelung in der Gemeinde Kirchheim-Heimstetten verbindet unser Verein sportliche Erfolge mit einem ausgeprägten Gemeinschaftsgefühl in der Region. Engagierte Ehrenamtliche, Trainer und Förderer tragen zu einer lebendigen Vereinsstruktur bei, die Sportlern jeden Alters eine Heimat bietet. Der SV Heimstetten lebt den Slogan: “Sport verbindet!” und setzt sich dafür ein, Menschen durch Bewegung und Teamgeist zusammenzubringen.

Für alle Sportbegeisterten und Unterstützer ist der SV Heimstetten ein zentraler Anlaufpunkt, der die Werte Fairness, Respekt und Zusammenhalt täglich lebt und fördert.

Name: Los Gatos United Soccer Club
Description: Our goal at Los Gatos United is to prepare our players for the future, both on and off the field. We do so by creating a safe, positive, and fun environment where our players will learn to be better people through the game of soccer. Not only will we teach them the critical fundamentals of soccer, but we will reinforce non-soccer specific skills such as communication, teamwork, time management, responsibility, discipline, and respect.

Name: Riccione Calcio 1926
Description:
Riccione Calcio 1926. La nuova dirigenza della Riccione Calcio 1926 parte dalla profonda consapevolezza di essere espressione del territorio, legata alla storia di questa società e della città, espressione di una forte identità del luogo che da sempre viviamo, Riccione. Prevedere il futuro significa costruirselo ed abbiamo deciso di farlo insieme: un gruppo di quasi venti dirigenti, aperto alla città e destinato a crescere.

Ed il nostro futuro sono i giovani, al centro del nostro progetto sportivo, attraverso la nostra affiliazione al Sassuolo Calcio e l’adesione convinta al progetto “Generazione S”. Il nostro nuovo settore giovanile parte proprio dalle competenze della società emiliana neroverde, punto di riferimento per la nostra crescita tecnica in un contesto etico e sociale su misura per i giovani calciatori della nostra Scuola Calcio portata avanti dai nostri allenatori-educatori.

Name: Marcialonga Bodø
Description:
Marcialonga Bodø blir en skifest utenom det vanlige, som viser fram både det beste nordlandsnaturen har å by på, såvel som det pulserende urbane bylivet i verdens minste storby. Løpet endrer navn til Marcialonga Bodø, for å knytte løpet sterkere til hovedstaden i Nordland og Saltenområdet.



Dessuten tar arrangementet steget opp, og blir en del av Ski Classics Pro Tour. Det innebærer ca 300 eliteløpere fra hele Europa på startstreken, og at løpet direktesendes på tv i 15 land.

Start- og mål er Rådhusparken, midt i Bodø sentrum. Løypa bukter seg gjennom Bodømarka, og er utformet for å være tilgjengelig for alle – fra den alminnelige skientusiast til eliteutøveren. En høydeforskjell på ca 1100 meter fordelt på 50 kilometer, sørger allikevel for en tøff og fair konkurranse.

Name: Corporate champions
Description: Where Corporates Compete! We organize thrilling sports events and competitions that bring companies together for the ultimate clash of teamwork, strategy, and spirit. Build stronger teams, showcase your company’s prowess, and claim victory in the corporate arena!

Name: Federación Española de Remo
Description:
La Federación Española de Remo es el máximo organismo nacional de remo en España. Su sede está en Madrid y su actual presidente es Miguel Ángel Millán Carrascosa. Fue fundada el 18 de mayo de 1918 en la sede social del Club Marítimo de Barcelona.

En la Federación Española de remo está incluido el remo paralímpico o remo adaptado que debutó en los Juegos de Pekín 2008.

España se subió al podio olímpico en este deporte con la medalla de plata conseguida por Fernando Climent y Luís María Lasúrtegui en el dos sin timonel en los Juegos Olímpicos de Los Ángeles 1984.

En los Juegos Olímpicos de París 2024 el remo español obtuvo cuatro diplomas olímpicos y uno paralímpico.

Name: Horse Racing Women's Association
Description:
The HRWS was created by several passionate women in the Horse Racing Industry who were driven to see women become more engaged, innovate and continue to invest in horse racing.  Through talking to many individuals associated with the sport, the following 5 pillars were created:  

TO REMOVE BARRIERS
Attendees are seeking a collaborative environment in which they can connect across industry pillars as well as influence  the decisions that affect the trajectory of the industry.

TO EMPOWER
Hearing stories from the careers of colleagues and mentors will help build a peer network through which women can  expand their community within the sport. Educational and breakout sessions at the conference will empower women with  the knowledge they need to build their careers in racing.

TO BUILD INCLUSIVITY AND LEADERSHIP
The Summit will promote inclusion in the horse racing industry and give a prominent voice to women, paving the way for  overarching improvements in the sport. Horse Racing enjoys a vibrant fan base of women, and valuable contributions from  its female workforce, but there is more to do to promote women in leadership and executive roles.

TO MENTOR
By establishing a mentorship program, the Summit will provide guidance on how to navigate common industry politics,  creating a path for all to feel confident in pursuing a career in horse racing.

TO DEVELOP AND GROW THE SPORT
Women comprise an enthusiastic and vocal percentage of racing’s audience. Involving women in business decisions is key  to the long term health and success of our sport, and the Summit intends to increase their participation at all levels.

Name: Alliance Football Club
Description:
Alliance FC, a football club with a captivating journey that started in 2009. Founded by a group of friends who were once just a bunch of boys kicking a ball, our club has evolved into a powerful symbol of unity, perseverance, and shared passion for the beautiful game.


Alliance FC, has been privileged to witness and contribute to our remarkable transformation. Our journey has been nothing short of inspiring, demonstrating the immense potential that lies within a collective vision and a shared love for football.


Alliance FC was born out of a simple yet profound belief: football has the power to bring people together and build strong bonds within a community. Led by our undying passion for the game, we embarked on a mission to establish a club that would not only excel on the field but also foster a deep sense of togetherness and camaraderie. Our commitment to these values has been the driving force behind our success.

As Alliance FC began to make its mark in the Delhi-NCR football scene, our success and reputation grew. Our ability to create a sense of community and our dedication to the sport helped us approach Football Delhi (formerly known as Delhi Soccer Association) to become an Associate Member, enabling us to participate in the C-Division league. This recognition opened doors to increased opportunities, including prestigious tournaments and exposure to higher levels of competition.

Name: OVERGROUND BASEL
Description:
Warum:
Weil wir ein einzigartiges Angebot schaffen, dessen Nachfrage immer grösser wird. Und weil wir mit unserem grossen Knowhow in Sport und Ausbildung andere begeistern und inspirieren.
Wir vermitteln unsere Leidenschaft und machen unseren Traum zur Wirklichkeit!

Weil Parkour, 2028 olympisch, und Ninja Warrior mit jährlich steigenden Teilnehmer- und Zuschauerzahlen einen Trend erleben, gleich wie das Snowboard in den 80ern!

Weil wir mit unserem zentralen Standort sowie der Grösse und Professionalität unserer Halle Sportbegeisterte aus der ganzen Schweiz und dem Dreiländereck anlocken! Allein in Basel-Stadt und Basel-Land befinden sich über 135'000 Sportler*innen in unserer Zielgruppe.

Weil unser Trainingszentrum die Bedürfnisse aller deckt!
Ob für Spass und Spiel oder für ernsthaftes, zielorientiertes Training, ob Amateur oder Profis, jung oder alt, Mann oder Frau: Wir begleiten sie zu ihrem Ziel.
--
Wir eröffnen das erste professionelle Trainingszentrum OVERGROUND BASEL für die Trendsportarten Parkour, Ninja Warrior, Tricking, Calisthenics und Chase Tag. In unserem Leistungszentrum bereiten wir unsere Athleten für Olympia 2024 vor.
Auf über 2’500m2, an der Elsässerstrasse 215, entdecken unsere Besucher*innen neue Sportarten mit einem Einzeleintritt oder im regelmässigen Training in einem unserer zahlreichen Kurse, privat oder in der Gruppe. Wir bieten Vorbereitungskurse für Wettkämpfe und führen regelmässig Events in unserer Halle durch. Die Halle, oder Bereiche davon, können auch privat gemietet werden für Geburtstage oder Firmenevents.

Name: Startup Striders
Description:
Startup Striders is a self-perpetuating healthy habits community to deal with the stresses of startup life.

The most amazing version of Startup Striders is if none of us need to be there and Striders keep showing up and running and chatting together.
Community is never about just one person, but about people having a sense of belonging and desire.

That's how Startup Striders is set up, an overarching sense of belonging with each group taking on their own color in their respective city.

Name: Bath Spi Team
Description:
L’Université de Bath, élue Sport University of the Year 2026 par le Times, compte parmi les meilleures du Royaume-Uni grâce à la qualité de ses formations, son excellence sportive et son ouverture internationale.

La Bath Spi Team regroupe une trentaine d’étudiants passionnés de voile et impliqués dans la vie associative. Notre objectif cette année : représenter l’université au 45ᵉ Challenge Spi Dauphine, régate étudiante européenne qui aura lieu du 18 au 25 avril 2026.

Nous recherchons activement des partenaires et sponsors souhaitant gagner en visibilité auprès d’un public jeune, qualifié et en entrée sur le marché du travail, au sein d’un événement nautique de référence.

Contact :
bathspiteam@gmail.com
LinkedIn : Bath Spi Team
Ouverts à toute collaboration à forte valeur ajoutée.

Name: Tigerr Cycling Team
Description: Wielerteam voor ambitieuze jeugd!

Name: Lobo Assessoria Esportiva
Description:
Em 2009, foi apresentada ao mundo a LOBO ASSESSORIA ESPORTIVA.

Após alguns anos de pesquisas, planejamento e estruturação, a LOBO foi criada para atender as necessidades e superar todas as expectativas de seu público, que são as pessoas, as empresas e os condomínios, de maneira ética, competente, transparente e responsável.

Desde o início de suas atividades, a LOBO assume uma grande responsabilidade: a de alterar positivamente os hábitos de vida daqueles que apostam em seu trabalho, utilizando-se das mais diversas e atuais ferramentas disponíveis nos campos da atividade física e da saúde.

Possui, ainda, profissionais capacitados e atenciosos, mantém uma estrutura preparada para atender aos clientes, que participam ativamente para a evolução contínua da qualidade dos serviços e do atendimento.

Detectar os principais obstáculos e apresentar as melhores soluções para a adesão e manutenção à prática de atividade física de qualidade, em um ambiente amistoso e familiar, são os diferenciais da LOBO ASSESSORIA ESPORTIVA.

MISSÃO 
Incentivar pessoas e proporcionar-lhes a adoção de bons hábitos de vida, de maneira sustentável e prazerosa, por meio da prática da atividade física sistemática e aquisição de conhecimentos específicos.
 
VISÃO 
Difundir um novo modelo de promoção de saúde e bem-estar, tornando-o referência no setor, como consequência da alta qualidade e eficácia do seu serviço.

VALORES 
Comprometimento
Respeito
Equilíbrio

Name: Football360
Description: Bringing the latest in micro-learning methodology (15-minute lessons), taught by well-known football industry professionals, and for a fraction of the price of a traditional business school, Football360 will transform access to quality football business education throughout the world.

Name: Amstelveense Rugby Club
Description:
In 1963 is onder de naam The Netherlands Scottish Rugby Club (NSRC) de Amstelveense Rugby Club ontstaan. Bij gebrek aan eigen veld en clubhuis werd samenwerking met de Nieuwer Amstelsche Football Club (NFC) gezocht, en namen we eerste deze naam aan. Vanaf 1987 gingen we zelfstandig verder als Amstelveense Rugby Club (ARC), en na 20 jaar in het eerste eigen clubhuis aan de Sportlaan verhuisden we door de bouw van het Amstelveen College, naar de huidige locatie.

Inmiddels is ARC uitgegroeid tot een club met in iedere leeftijdscategorie 2 jeugdteams in de competitie, 3 senioren herenteams (in Ere-, 2de en 4de klasse), 2 dames teams (in Ere- en 2de klasse), het Wanderers-veteranenteam en gayteam De Lowlanders. ARC is een internationale vereniging, met veel buitenlandse studenten, expats en hun kinderen, die de sport uit hun thuisland voortzetten in de buurt van de Amsterdamse hogescholen, universiteiten en bedrijven.

ARC biedt rugby op iedere leeftijd en niveau aan. Bij de jongsten ligt de nadruk op leren en spelplezier. Het krijgen van zelfvertrouwen, leren kennen van je eigen kracht en het opdoen van de belangrijke rugby-waarden respect, discipline en kameraadschap staan voorop. Later krijgt de competitieve component een grotere rol, al willen natuurlijk ook de jongsten graag winnen! We streven er naar zowel een dames- als herenteam in de Ereklasse te hebben, en met de recente promotie is dit ook wat we doen. We zijn er trots op dat we deze teams grotendeels kunnen vormen met spelers uit onze eigen jeugdopleiding. Er speelt al menig ‘derde generatie’ speler (ook bij de meisjes!) bij ARC.

Dit alles wordt gedragen door een grote groep enthousiaste vrijwilligers, die de handen uit de mouwen steken op en rond het veld. Zonder de hulp van alle leden, hun ouders, supporters en de gulle bijdragen van onze Sponsoren kunnen we de club niet draaiende houden, vandaar dat we iedereen die iets doet zeer erkentelijk zijn. Samen maken we ARC een club om trots op te zijn.

Name: SISPORT S.p.A. S.S.D.
Description:
Polisportiva con scuola calcio Juventus
DAL 01/04/2010 GESTIONE DI IMPIANTI SPORTIVI POLIVALENTI.

Description: Hockey

Name: Fields at Station 63
Description: Once completed, Fields at Station 63 will offer more than 40 acres of dynamic recreation space, reimagined to set a new standard for youth sports and community engagement. With advanced features, versatile programming, and vibrant community spaces, Fields at Station 63 will be a year-round hub for sports, culture, and recreation—an inclusive destination where athletes and families come together to thrive.

Name: TIO TIO Social Sports
Description:
TIO TIO is the urban community of people who are passionate about doing sports together. Sport makes all of us feel good about our bodies and minds and makes us winners and losers. For us, however, the social component of sport is the paramount of everything and what we want to promote with TIO TIO.

As the central driver for our purpose we see padel tennis, the world’s fastest growing sport, that already inspires and connects people, no matter age or sex, all over the world. Padel is fun. Padel is inclusive. Padel is social. Padel is for everyone. The Future is Padel!

Although we got inspired in Stockholm, we are based in Berlin and bring padel directly to the heart of this wonderful unique city. For us it is the best sport in the world.

Name: Blauw Geel '55
Description:
Voetbalvereniging Blauw Geel ’55 is in 1955 opgericht als voetbalteam van de Enka fabriek dat meespeelde in de bedrijfscompetitie. 65 jaar later is Blauw Geel een bruisende club voor alle Edenaren. Met meer dan 950 leden is het één van de grootste sportverenigingen van Ede.

Wij bieden de mogelijkheid om prestatief en recreatief te sporten voor zowel dames en meisjes als heren en jongens. Wij zijn een vereniging die zich onderscheidt van andere verenigingen door onder andere de grote schare vrijwilligers, de sterke onderlinge band en de uitstekende sfeer.

Name: 5K@EASD
Description: Join us for the 5K@EASD Virtual Challenge anytime during 12-17 September! In 2025, the 5K@EASD Virtual Challenge will bring together people across the globe and EASD attendees to emphasize the need for increased physical activity to help prevent diabetes and diabetes complications. This disease awareness activity provides participants with the opportunity to raise public awareness about the importance of a healthy lifestyle in preventing and controlling diabetes. In 2024, the 5K@EASD Virtual Challenge had 20,800+ registered participants from 172 countries and 4,460+ finishers from 136 countries.

Name: YachTime
Description:
בית ספר ומועדון השייט YachTime הוקם מתוך אהבה גדולה לים וניסיון של מעל לעשרים שנה בתחום בארץ ובעולם.

מועדון השייט מתנהל במרינה הרצליה ומציע מגוון רחב של פעילויות על יאכטות מפרשיות חדישות, מאובזרות ומטופחות העומדות לרשותכם שבעה ימים בשבוע.

Name: Team AlUla Championed by LeBron James
Description: This is Team AlUla Championed by LeBron James, where AlUla heritage meets the pinnacle of electric racing technology

Name: Club de Tenis Valencia
Description: Club de Tenis Valencia is a restaurants company based out of CARRER CAVANILLES, 7, VALENCIA, Spain.

Name: ProPfadi Handball
Description:
ProPfadi Handball wurde 1984 von sportbegeisterten Privatpersonen als Sponsorenvereinigung gegründet. Heute hat ProPfadi Handball mehr als 200 Mitglieder und repräsentiert Personen und Persönlichkeiten aus Wirtschaft, Politik und Sport. ProPfadi Handball fördert die spitzen- wie auch die breitensportlichen Ziele von Pfadi Winterthur Handball.

ProPfadi Handball unterstützt damit die sozialen Aufgaben, welche der bedeutendste Sportclub der sechstgrössten Stadt der Schweiz wahrnimmt.

ProPfadi Handball pflegt aktiv die geschäftlichen und gesellschaftlichen Kontakte unter den Mitgliedern.

Name: Ruhuna Racing
Description:
We are Ruhuna Racing, a team of young and innovative undergraduates representing the Faculty of Engineering, University of Ruhuna, Sri Lanka. We design and fabricate an open-wheeled Formula Student electric racing car afresh with the aim of competing in the Formula Student competitions. 

Formula Student is an educational student engineering competition, run by the Institution of Mechanical Engineers, in which student teams from across the globe build a single seated formula style car and compete with each other.

Our ultimate goal is to achieve a leading position for our Electric Vehicle in Formula Student in Sri Lanka.

Any queries or seeking partnerships are welcome.

Name: EA Eye
Description: Founded in 2021, EA Eye (East African Eye) is a truly independent scouting and football data service that provides clients with the tools to identity the next generation of talent emerging from East Africa.

Description:
Club de rugby évoluant en Fédérale 1.

Name: Goudse Sportraad
Description: De Goudse Sportraad is een onafhankelijk adviesorgaan dat gevraagd en ongevraagd advies geeft aan het college en de gemeenteraad van Gouda  over strategische ontwikkelingen en vraagstukken op het gebied van sport en bewegen vanuit een breed en integraal perspectief. Sport en bewegen als doel, maar ook als middel.

Name: KL Tigers RFC
Description:
Founded in 2014, KL Tigers Rugby Football Club has more than 600 players and volunteers from more than 20 countries between the ages of 5 and 65+. Our goal is to introduce rugby union and touch rugby to our community and support a thriving rugby culture in Malaysia. The KL Tigers’ Men’s team regularly takes part in the Selangor KRS League and we are proud of our Men's team for winning the KRS double (league and cup) in 2024. Our players have played for teams in the Agong Cup and several are representing state teams in the 2024 tournament. Five Men’s players have proudly earned Malaysia caps.

We run a school outreach programme with national and international schools in the Klang Valley covering an introduction to rugby, regular coaching sessions, fitness programmes, rugby clinics and special academy bursaries. 

We are always welcoming new members and volunteers to help with club operations and players of all abilities, so if you would like to get involved or give the game a try, please contact us or come down to one of our training sessions.

Name: Centro Cultural e Recreativo Cristóvão Colombo
Description:
O Centro Cultural e Recreativo Cristóvão Colombo é o quarto maior clube do estado de São Paulo. Instituição sem fins lucrativos, o Cristóvão tem como finalidade principal oferecer serviços de lazer, cultura e esporte para os seus mais de 10 mil associados. Com uma movimentação de aproximadamente mil pessoas de segunda à sexta-feira e mais de três mil associados aos finais de semana, o Cristóvão oferece uma grande diversidade de serviços e a completa infraestrutura de esporte e lazer.

As atividades do clube são extensas e ocupam a sede, localizada na Avenida Professor Alberto Vollet Sachs, reúne o prédio administrativo e uma imensa área construída com salas para aulas de ginástica, academia, Parque Aquático, Salão Social, Ginásio e as mais diferentes quadras espalhadas pelos 150 mil metros quadrados de área.

Name: OFF PLAY
Description:
YOUR FUTURE BEYOND SPORTS. 

We offer a home for professional athletes, ex-athletes and young talents. They make the greatest impact through their top sports mentality and character. That's why we do everything we can to further develop that impact, increase their value and provide the perfect assist for their next goal: a career off play.

At OFF PLAY we believe that perseverance, teamwork and a focus on results are essential assets that top athletes naturally possess. With the idea "You have character, you can learn skills", our platform offers the key to unlocking their future after sports. From talent detection, coaching, training and education to complete guidance to the new workplace -and beyond.

Name: Ilkley Town Football Club
Description:
Ilkley Town AFC is an ambitious FA Charter Standard Community Football Club with a men’s 1st team, Ladies 1st team, Reserve team, Under 23 team and Veterans team. We have a thriving junior set up with boys and girls teams at all age groups from Under 6 -under 18. We also have a successful community program which delivers school football camps and 6 a side league, all based down at Ben Rhydding Sports and Social Club.

As a club with over 800 members we pride ourselves on promoting an active and healthy lifestyle for all our players, parents, coaches and volunteers. We believe in the value that we can add to the local community through team sports, exercise and social inclusion. We aim to create a clear 'development pathway' for players, coaches and referees as we grow our club and establish our vision. 

We pride ourselves on providing 'something for everyone' through performance and participation as we strive for sporting excellence in everything we do.

Name: Krankenhaus
Description: (Junioren-)Spitzensport

Name: BeKings
Description:
BeKings – Dove ogni torneo diventa un’esperienza da professionisti.

BeKings è un’agenzia e tour operator specializzata nell’organizzazione di tornei di calcio giovanile internazionali e viaggi sportivi su misura. Da anni accompagniamo migliaia di giovani calciatori in esperienze indimenticabili, creando eventi curati in ogni minimo dettaglio, capaci di trasformare una semplice competizione in un vero sogno da vivere.

 Tornei internazionali di altissimo livello
Ogni evento è progettato per offrire standard professionali: dalla qualità degli avversari alla gestione logistica, fino all’esperienza a bordo campo. I nostri tornei coinvolgono club professionistici, dilettanti e accademie da tutta Europa.

 Tour sportivi ed esperienze uniche
Offriamo pacchetti completi per squadre e famiglie: voli, hotel, navette, pasti personalizzati, visite agli stadi e musei del calcio. Ogni trasferta è un viaggio all’insegna dello sport, della cultura e della crescita.

 Un ecosistema al servizio del talento
Collaboriamo con società professionistiche, brand internazionali e istituzioni sportive per garantire un’organizzazione solida, sicura e coinvolgente. Ogni partecipante vive un’esperienza immersiva pensata per valorizzare il talento e creare ricordi indelebili.

 Oltre 5000 squadre – Più di 60.000 giocatori coinvolti
I numeri raccontano chi siamo, ma è l’entusiasmo dei ragazzi e delle famiglie a definire la nostra missione: fare del calcio giovanile un’esperienza straordinaria.

Name: CFLPA Academy
Description: The #CFLPA Academy is here to help current, former and future #CFL players with #Education, #Employment and #Wellness!

Name: CIF - Club Internacional de Foot-Ball
Description:
Fundado há mais de um século e situado no magnífico Parque de Monsanto, o CIF - Club Internacional de Foot-Ball é um dos mais prestigiados clubes desportivos de Portugal.
Com uma longa tradição de excelência, o CIF oferece aos seus associados e entusiastas do desporto as melhores condições para a prática de várias modalidades, com especial destaque para o ténis, padel e futebol.

Reconhecido como Instituição de Utilidade Pública, o clube é também membro honorário da Ordem de Benemerência, detentor da Medalha de Bons Serviços Desportivos e da Medalha de Honra ao Mérito Desportivo. Ao longo da sua história, o CIF tem sido um pilar no desenvolvimento e promoção do desporto em Portugal, mantendo-se fiel ao seu compromisso com a excelência desportiva e ao serviço da comunidade.

Name: Skipool Tirol
Description: Skipool Tirol fördert den Nachwuchs im alpinen Rennsport durch die Gewinnung von Sponsoren, denen das Aufsteigen des Nachwuchses in den Spitzensport ein Anliegen ist.

Name: IFK Luleå
Description:
IFK Luleå är en anrik klubb, Sveriges näst äldsta kamratförening, som är ett nav i regionens fotbollsfamilj i både med- och motgång. Vår ambition är hög, vi vill utveckla fotbollen i Norrbotten och målet är på sikt att etablera klubben i Svensk Elitfotboll. Tre grundstenar är viktiga i vår satsning; ungdomsverksamheten IFK Luleå Akademi, vår seniorverksamhet och vår marknadssida där fokus ligger på att skapa attraktiva nätverk för våra partners. 

Vill ni vara med på en resa mot elitfotboll? Följ med oss!

Name: Project Padel Jordan
Description: A premium indoor padel club located in the heart of Amman at King Hussein Business Park

Name: Volant Bisontin
Description:
Le Volant Bisontin est une association spécialisé dans la pratique et le développement du badminton implantée depuis 1983 dans la ville de Besançon. Passionnés, nous développons la pratique de notre sport dans un large bassin de population autour de la capitale franc-comtoise. Le club est affilié à la Fédération Française de Badminton (FFBad). Notre association a pour force un public très diversifié qui regroupe tous les âges (de minibad à vétérans) et tous les niveaux de jeu (de joueurs débutants à joueurs nationaux). 

En compétition, comme en loisir, chez les jeunes comme chez les seniors, en entraînements ou en jeu libre, les possibilités de pratiques sont nombreuses et diverses au sein de notre structure, et toujours pleines de convivialité ! Notre club a aussi pour force un collectif de bénévoles fidèles et investis qui sait répondre aux projets d'ampleur des dirigeants et salariés de l'association.

Name: Pace Academy
Description: PACE Academy is a professional and scientific sports organisation that develops the athletic skills of young people and children in a multidimensional way, ensures that they have the body structure suitable for the relevant sports branch, and provides them with movement performance training by ensuring that they are physically successful in the correct movement mechanics and in a sports branch that is chosen correctly for them.

Name: Climb 2 Recovery
Description:
C2R is the only charity offering a year-round programme of adaptive climbing and mountaineering, peer-to-peer mentoring, work experience and professional training and qualification for seriously wounded, injured or sick service people and veterans. Our programme has been carefully designed to compliment clinical support and other recovery and rehabilitative interventions, to maximise recovery, without requiring a clinical setting and eliminating stigmatising. 
C2R offers climbing and mountaineering, funding beneficiaries through the hierarchy of professional mountaineering qualifications, enabling members the opportunity to return and remain engaged with a programme for many years, and we offer the community of members and culture of emotional and practical support.
C2R is also involved in academic research on the benefits of seriously wounded service people and veterans participating in regular climbing and mountaineering, helping to advance theories and approaches to veteran recovery and rehabilitation.
C2R supports seriously wounded, injured and sick service people and veterans, all of whom have completed at least two-years of conventional treatment – yet remain chronically and severely disabled by their adversity, through a year-round programme of fully-funded residential adaptive and progressive climbing and mountaineering.
Climb 2 Recovery has been delivering activity since 2016, registered as a charity in 2019, and became an Affiliated Club of the British Mountaineering Council and a Skills Course Provider for Mountain Training UK in 2023. Our programme is well established, has a track record of delivery success and safety, and organisational/charitable transparency and accountability.
C2R delivers 1300-training days (per person per day) annually, supports 140+ members, of whom 85 members attend multiple courses each year, and has the capacity to grow by 60+ members per year. We sponsor members towards a variety of goals and qualifications.

Name: The Racquet
Description: We're a premier country club and tennis academy type community that extends its reach across all corners of SoFlo. Our skilled coaches, united by a common philosophy, bring professionalism and expertise to every location. Our primary aim is to find the perfect court for your sessions, saving you significant costs compared to expensive club memberships.

Name: FC Haka
Description: 1934 perustettu FC Haka on yksi Suomen tunnetuimmista ja menestyneimmistä jalkapalloseuroista. 9 Suomenmestaruutta, 12 Suomen Cup -voittoa sekä kymmenet kansainväliset ottelut ovat tuoneet Hakalle vähintäänkin Euroopan laajuista tunnettuutta.

Name: Rollstuhlbasketballclub Köln 99ers
Description:
Der RBC Köln 99ers ist ein inklusiver, dynamischer und multikultureller Rollstuhlbasketballclub, der neben dem Leistungs- und Breitensport ein besonderes Augenmerk auf die Nachwuchsförderung legt. Dadurch, dass im Rollstuhlbasketball Nichtbehinderte („Fußgänger“) mitspielen dürfen und zudem Rollstuhlbasketball in gemischten Mannschaften von Frauen und Männern gespielt wird, bietet dieser Sport ideale Voraussetzungen für die Integration in jeglicher Hinsicht.
Als größter Rollstuhlbasketballclub in Deutschland haben wir aktuell 4 Teams im Ligabetrieb. Hier kann jede und jeder von der Einsteigerliga bis zur 1.Bundesliga aktiv werden.
Neben dem rainings- und Spielbetrieb, veranstalten wir regelmäßige internationale Clubturniere, Länderspiele wie den "Nations Cup Cologne" und führen Rollstuhlbasketball Workshops in Schulen durch.
Unser Bundesligateam ist auch auf dem internationalen Parkett unterwegs und spielt seit vielen Jahren erfolgreich im Euroleague Wettbewerb.

Name: True Sports Group
Description: Powering the future of club sports. Find a home for your program in the True Sports Group.

Name: Carlos Machado Jiu-Jitsu Headquarters
Description:
Carlos Machado is one of the pioneers of Brazilian Jiu Jitsu in the United States of America. Currently a Coral Belt, and promoted to Black Belt by Carlos Gracie Junior, Carlos Machado came to the USA in the early 1990’s with his brothers. Carlos Machado then formed the Carlos Machado Jiu Jitsu Association, one of the strongest & growing BJJ organizations in the world today.

Carlos Machado is a multi Hall of Fame Instructor of Jiu Jitsu and known in Texas and the Southwest region of the United States as the “Godfather of Jiu-Jitsu”.  Before Carlos Machado relocated to the Dallas Fort Worth, Texas area, nobody was teaching Brazilian Jiu Jitsu.  Today most of the BJJ lineage in Southwest area can today can be traced back to Carlos Machado.

Carlos Machado’s Headquarters academy is located in North Dallas, Farmers Branch, Texas where he personally teaches all of his students from kids, teens to women and men. Master Carlos actively trains with all of his students, especially his black belts who are always developing and progressing under the direct supervision and tutelage of their Professor who is known as a true legend of Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu.

A proud father of 4 teenage kids and husband, Carlos Machado is currently a Coral Belt and is the head of one of the largest Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu organizations in the world, RCJ Machado and Carlos Machado Jiu-Jitsu Associations. 

One of the main goals of Master Carlos Machado is to simply make the “Average Student, Above Average”.  His mission is also to teach his instructors to be the best they can be by mentoring them and instilling in them a solid foundation on many levels, which will greatly benefit not only their own students but also themselves individually on and off the mats and will ultimately enable successful operation of the many premium Carlos Machado Jiu Jitsu Academies in the United States and around the world. Come start your BJJ journey with us today!

Name: Rygbi Gogledd Cymru (RGC) - North Wales Rugby Development Region
Description: Rygbi Gogledd Cymru 1404 (RGC 1404) is the North Wales Regional Rugby Team representing half the land mass of Wales and almost 1 million people. Playing in the Welsh Rugby Premiership, but with aspirations to become a fully-fledged region in our own right, we aim to give the people of North Wales the opportunity to play, watch and support top-class rugby in their own region.

Name: Stichting Padel Talent

Name: LAB FIVE
Description:
LAB FIVE is a global network of 5-a-side soccer centers rooted in diverse communities and cultures. We combine innovative systems and cutting-edge technology to elevate the game and help players of all levels develop their skills.
Driven by a strong commitment to diversity and inclusiveness, LAB FIVE creates a shared space for amateur players and soccer fans who value equality, fairness, and community.
We currently operate two premier locations: an 8-field facility in Pacoima and a 7-field facility in Gardena. With strong momentum, we are actively expanding across California and are always exploring new opportunities to bring the LAB FIVE experience to more communities.
At LAB FIVE, we offer a wide range of programming, including 5-a-side leagues, tournaments, field rentals, and pickup games. For kids and youth, our dedicated department hosts birthday parties, academy training, seasonal camps, and clinics—all designed to make soccer fun and accessible.
Our facilities integrate advanced technology such as video tools and data tracking systems, and we embrace the future of the sport by incorporating e-sports and gaming events into our club experiences.
LAB FIVE is proud to deliver top-tier playing surfaces with next-generation, non-infill turf and elevated social spaces through our modern clubhouse lounges, setting a new standard for the small-sided game.
If you're interested in partnering, hosting events, or exploring development opportunities, we’d love to hear from you. Reach out and be part of the LAB FIVE movement. 

You can contact us at contact@lab-five.com
