Name: Astre Athlétisme
Description:
ASTRE — La performance plaisir en course à pied… et bien plus encore !

Depuis 2011, ASTRE réunit des passionnés de sport, animés par un même objectif : progresser ensemble dans un esprit d’équipe, de convivialité et de partage. Né de la rencontre d’anciens sportifs de haut niveau issus du ski, du vélo ou encore de la gymnastique, le groupe s’est rapidement étoffé autour d’entraînements réguliers, de compétitions et de nombreux moments festifs.

Sous l’impulsion de Jean Matrat, entraîneur et fondateur de la société de coaching sportif MATRAT-TRAINING, l’équipe s’est spécialisée dans l’athlétisme : course sur route, trail, ultra-trail, mais aussi marche nordique et musculation en salle.

En 2017, l’association ASTRE voit le jour pour structurer l’ensemble des activités et s’affilier à la Fédération Française d’Athlétisme et se professionnaliser à travers un cursus de formation fédéral et ministériel (BPJEPS). Aujourd’hui, nous rassemblons plus de 500 membres, dès 4 ans avec la team Matrat Pour les adultes et Matrat Academy pour les jeunes. 

 Notre savoir-faire sportif au service des entreprises

Conscients des enjeux de bien-être et de qualité de vie au travail, nous proposons également aux entreprises locales des programmes d’entraînement personnalisés pour leurs collaborateurs. Que ce soit à travers des séances de course à pied, de renforcement musculaire, de marche nordique ou des plans d’entraînement individualisés, nous accompagnons les salariés dans une pratique encadrée, conviviale et adaptée à tous les niveaux.

 ASTRE, c’est bien plus qu’un club :
C’est une équipe, une expertise et une énergie au service de la santé et de la performance, aussi bien sur le plan sportif que professionnel.

 Basés à Barr et à Strasbourg, nous sommes fiers de contribuer au dynamisme sportif local et d’accompagner entreprises et particuliers dans une démarche de bien-être durable.

Name: Balzan Football Club
Description:
Balzan football team is the official football team for the village in Malta of 4,000 inhabitants with the same name. Balzan FC has always been a small club, with a big heart.

Balzan football club was established in 1937 and for the majority of its history the club played its football in the lower divisions of Maltese football. The club won their first ever promotion to Malta’s Premier Division, the top division of Maltese football, in the season 2002/3 – although unfortunately this success did not last and the cub was relegated in the subsequent seasons back down to the Second Division.

Thanks to some inspired signings and appointments in season 2007/8, the club steadily improved and rose from the Second Division of Maltese football to win promotion again to the Premier Division, the top division of Maltese, in season 2010/11.

In season 2016/2017 the club has finished its 6th consecutive season in Malta’s Premier Division and ended up in the much coveted 2nd spot on the table – which gave the club the right to participate in the UEFA Europa League 2017/2018 for the third time in its history.

Name: Crawshays Rugby Football Club
Description:
Founded in 1922, Crawshay's Rugby Football Club is a unique institution in the rugby world through the spirit in which we play our rugby, and values we attach to the game.

Over the past 100 years we have provided a playing platform for over 1,600 players, including over 450 internationals from both Rugby Union and Rugby League. The list includes some of the most iconic players to have played the game; Gareth Edwards, Phil Bennett and Shane Williams are amongst hundreds of other internationals, from 9 different countries, that have worn the Crawshay's shirt during this time.

The club prides itself on supporting the development of rugby players. Playing a role in discovering a remarkable number of talented players since Captain Geoffrey Crawshay picked his first team in April 1922. With an annual youth fixture list that sees us play some of the finest colleges in the country, and both male and female senior’s side playing regularly throughout the UK. We also tour on an annual basis and in the past 100 years visited 23 countries and 4 continents since the first overseas tour in early 1970’s. 

Each time we take to the pitch we give young players an opportunity to enjoy the great game, show their undoubted talent, and express themselves fully whilst promoting the values that rugby football what it is. At the same time, we encourage these young men to experience a side of rugby that they perhaps would not normally encounter and take in the feel of new surroundings, furthering life experiences.

Name: Pallacanestro Budrio SSD a RL
Description:
La tradizione per la “Palla al cesto” a Budrio, risale
al 1938 quando alcuni pionieri della palla a
spicchi formarono la prima formazione budriese
di pallacanestro. Ne seguì la prima affiliazione
alla FIP con codice 289 della nascente
“A.S.S.I Pallacanestro Budrio”, che da quel
momento, e fino ad oggi, continua ininterrottamente
a scrivere pagine della sua storia.
Nel corso degli anni 60-70-80 tanti giovani
allenatori e giocatori budriesi hanno vestito
la casacca della Pallacanestro Budrio, alcuni
dei quali passando proprio dalla vecchia “Palestra
Comunale”, hanno poi spiccato al volo
per eccellere a livello nazionale.
Storicamente Budrio ha sempre avuto un
importante settore giovanile, e tantissimo
seguito, e così dopo aver sfiorato negli anni
80 lo storico approdo in Serie B, ci si riesce
nella stagione 2008/2009, non prima però
di aver conquistato, nella precedente stagione,
la 2007/2008 la storica Coppa Italia
Dilettanti in diretta tv su SportItalia.
Si arriva quindi al punto più alto della sua
storia a cavallo degli anni 2008-2010, ed
all’inevitabile flessione, che porterà anche
ad un cambio di direttivo e generazionale,
ma non cambia il “metodo” e non viene
meno la passione per la pallacanestro, e così
si continua a lanciare nuove generazioni di
ragazzi budriesi con un sogno, riportare Budrio
a competere a livello nazionale, riportare
la Pallacanestro Budrio in Serie B.

Name: The Amateur Golf Society of America
Description:
All across the country, millions of golfers are faced with a similar problem: they want to play more golf but between life, work, crowded tee sheets, and the costs of joining a private club, that can be easier said than done. There hasn’t been an easy solution – that is, until now. 

The Amateur Golf Society allows golfers of all skill levels to compete in fun and friendly tournaments on a completely flexible schedule. Rather than one or two-day events with fixed starting times, the unique formatting of AGS events provides a 7-day window for our members to play a round at the top public courses in their backyard. Play to earn weekly and season-long points and prizes based on your performance against golfers of similar ability, with no minimum commitment. 

We partner with Allied Golf Association partners throughout the country to support their efforts in increasing access and opportunity to public golf for all. Our AGA partners include The Golf Association of Philadelphia, Texas Golf Association, Chicago District Golf Association, Florida State Golf Association, and more to be announced soon.

Our members enjoy a myriad of benefits including their annual handicapping services (GHIN/Handicap ID), advanced access to crowded public tee sheets across the country, discounts and perks from sponsors and partners, access to exclusive playing opportunities, a chance to win weekly and season-long prizes, connections within a growing and engaged community of like-minded people, and more!

To learn more, please visit the link in our profile and follow us on social @TheAGSTour.

Name: Association for Women in Sports Media at Penn State
Leiden Atletiek
Description:
Met 1200 leden is Leiden Atletiek een vereniging van formaat. Prachtig gelegen tussen de bomen van sportpark De Leidse Hout waar al ruim 80 jaar aan atletiek gedaan wordt.

Wij zijn trots op onze mooie vereniging. We hebben sporters van alle leeftijden, of het nu recreanten zijn of topsporters (van nationaal, internationaal en zelfs Olympisch niveau). Dankbaar zijn we voor onze enthousiaste en trouwe trainers en alle andere vrijwilligers. Samen hebben we enorm veel plezier en genieten we van elkaars successen.

Leiden Atletiek vindt het belangrijk dat iedereen met veel plezier kan sporten, ieder op zijn of haar eigen niveau, dat we elkaar ondersteunen en stimuleren, in een nette en veilige omgeving. We willen dat iedereen zich welkom en thuis voelt op de baan (voor, tijdens en na de training). Samen maken wij Leiden Atletiek.

Name: SKU Ertl Glas Amstetten
Description:
WIR haben Grundsätze und Ziele
Unser Verein ist der Mittelpunkt des Fußballs im Mostviertel. Wir leben Fußball so leidenschaftlich wie möglich - nicht aber um jeden Preis. Wir richten den Blick nach vorne, wollen zur erweiterten Spitze des österreichischen Fußballs zählen.
 
WIR sind Anziehungspunkt für alle Fußballbegeisterten,
die in Amstetten selber aktiv spielen,
für unsere weltoffenen und toleranten Anhänger & Fans und unsere Partner und Freunde, die bei uns dabei sein wollen
und für unsere gleichgesinnten Schulen und Organisationen der Region.

WIR bekennen uns zu Fairness
Wir respektieren Leistungen unserer Gegner, denn Fairness ist die Basis unseres Handelns. Mit unseren Spielern, Vereinskollegen und Mitarbeitern gehen wir so um, wie man es von guten Freunden erwartet.

WIR sind eine Gemeinschaft
Randalierer und unsportliches Verhalten haben auf unserer Anlage keinen Platz. Gerade für unsere jüngsten Sportler und die Frauen wollen wir eine wertvolle und positive Freizeitgestaltung bieten.

WIR wollen Vorbild sein
für die sportinteressierte Bevölkerung unserer schönen Region -dem Mostviertel und alle, die wir mit unserem Sport erreichen können. Sportler unserer Region sind uns immer willkommen, gemeinsam mit Dir sind WIR der SKU.

É o clube que possui mais títulos do Campeonato Paraibano de Futebol, com 30 conquistas, sendo cinco deles tricampeonatos seguidos (recordista da competição). É também o primeiro e único time da Paraíba a ter sido campeão oficialmente de uma das divisões do Campeonato Brasileiro de Futebol, ao ter vencido a Série D do Nacional de 2013. O Belo, como é chamado por seus torcedores, possui a maior torcida do estado e a oitava maior torcida do Nordeste.

Name: Gujarat Cricket Association
Description:
Gujarat Cricket Association (GCA) is the governing body for the development and organisation of cricket in Gujarat state with 10 districts and a union territory under its wing which comprises of Ahmedabad, Kheda, Anand, Bharuch, Surat, Valsad (Bulsar), Gandhinagar, Banaskantha, Panchmahals, Daman and Dadra Nagar Haveli. GCA is a permanent member of the Board of Control for Cricket in India (BCCI).

Just like any other part of the country, the people of Gujarat were introduced to cricket by the British. It was in the year 1934 when Gujarat got its first governing body with the name Gujarat Cricket Association for cricket activities in the state. Soon after, the Association got affiliated with the Board of Control for Cricket in India (BCCI). Under the association’s accreditation, Gujarat became the first runner up in the 1950-51 Ranji Trophy.

In the year 1982, the government of Gujarat donated 100 acres of land near the Sabarmati River for the construction of the World’s Largest Stadium, Ahmedabad, the home ground for Gujarat Cricket Association located in Ahmedabad, Gujarat. Several memorable tests and one-day internationals have been played in the stadium so far including ICC Champions Trophy and ICC World Cup.

Name: SOMB OFFICIEL
Description:
Présentation
Le Stade Olympique Maritime Boulonnais, SOMB, est un club de basket basé à Boulogne-sur-Mer évoluant en Nationale 1 masculine. 

Palmarès :

- 1998 : Le SOMB est en Excellence Départementale
- 1999 : Accession en Promotion régionale
- 2000 : Accession en Excellence régionale
- 2001 : Accession en Pré-nationale
- 2002 : Accession en Nationale 3
- 2004-2005 : Champion de France de NM3 en restant invaincu toute la saison
- 2005 : Vainqueur du premier Trophée Coupe de France Masculins de Basket-Ball. En finale, le 14 mai 2005, victoire contre Andrézieux au POPB sur le score de 72 à 63.
- 2005 : Accession en Nationale 2 
- 2005-2006 : Le SOMB participe aux barrages Nationale 2/Nationale 1 et se rend à Salon de Provence (NM1) pour pouvoir évoluer à l’échelon supérieur mais en vain.
- 2006-2007 : le SOMB termine premier de la Poule C de N2. Le SOMB décroche son ticket pour la N1 en barrages en battant l’ADA Blois en demi-finale.
- 2007-2008 : Accession en Nationale 1
- 2009-2010 : Remporte la finale de Nationale 1 et accède à la Pro B pour la saison 2010-2011
- 2013-2014 : Champion de France de Pro B, et accède à la Pro A pour la saison 2014-2015
- 2015-2016: Relégation en Pro B
- 2017-2018 : Relégation en Nationale 1

Name: Enea Basket Poznań
Description:
Koszykarski Klub Sportowy Basket Poznań został powołany do życia w 2020 roku jako stowarzyszenie tworzone przez ludzi z pasją do sportu, koszykarskim sercem i nadzieją dla młodzieży w stolicy Wielkopolski. 

Misją Stowarzyszenia jest promocja koszykówki młodzieżowej i regularna gra na szczeblu zawodów centralnych z udziałem przede wszystkim klubowych wychowanków. Istotnym celem jest przeprowadzanie młodych ludzi przez najtrudniejszy etap każdego adepta koszykówki – od wieku młodzieżowca do seniora. Kluczowy jest dla nas człowiek – jego pasja pogodzona z nauką, motywacją i Klubowymi wartościami. 

Już w czasie kilku lat istnienia Stowarzyszenia, pierwsza drużyna Enea Basket Poznań awansowała na zaplecze ekstraklasy, a Przemysław Szurek – Trener drużyny 1LM, został wybrany najlepszym trenerem sezonu zasadniczego gr. A 2. ligi. W sezonie 2021/2022 Klub wywalczył również Mistrzostwo Polski do lat 19, Wicemistrzostwo Polski do lat 15, a także uplasował się na 4. miejscu w finałach mistrzostw Polski do lat 17 i mógł pochwalić się czterema tytułami Mistrza Wielkopolski w kategoriach młodzieżowych. Ponadto wielu graczy broni barw juniorskich reprezentacji narodowych. Sukces złotego medalu w U-19 powtórzyliśmy „back-to-back”, co ostatnio zdarzyło się ponad 50 lat temu. Jesteśmy z tego niezwykle dumni!  

Na początku roku 2024 Zespół Metodyczny przy Instytucie Sportu w Warszawie opublikował najnowszą klasyfikację klubów, z której wynika, że Stowarzyszenie jest drugim najlepszym młodzieżowym klubem koszykarskim w Polsce. Rodzicom, zawodnikom, trenerom i partnerom dziękujemy za dotychczasowy wkład w rozwój Enei Basketu Poznań i deklarujemy dalsze zaangażowanie!

Zarząd Stowarzyszenia składa się z trzech osób: Przemysław Szurek – Prezes Zarządu, Agnieszka Suchecka i Cezary Kurzawski – Członkowie Zarządu. Decyzje w Klubie podejmowane są merytorycznie, z przekonaniem i odpowiedzialnością za zasoby, a także z poszanowaniem wartości.

Club / Team Coaches benefit from BALLR Hub’s streamlined team management tools, effective communication channels, and access to professional resources, enhancing player development and strategic planning to elevate their teams.

Service providers play a crucial role in BALLR Hub by leveraging the platform to share their expertise, expand their networks, and engage directly with football enthusiasts seeking specialised services. This fosters connections that drive growth and development in Australian football.

Name: Guinness Rugby Club
Description:
Guinness Rugby Club was established in 1943 and has been located in the Guinness Athletic Union located in the Iveagh Grounds, in Crumlin, Dublin 12.

Guinness RFC as it is now known was founded in the season 1942/43 and became affiliated to the Leinster Branch shortly afterwards. But long before that in 1926 a rugby section was formed in Guinness's Brewery by Freddie Parkinson, Eddie Potts, Bill Toner and other brewery personnel. 

They were not affiliated as they did not have recognised playing fields or pavilion. This was before the Iveagh Grounds were developed. The Rugby Club was called the St James Gate RFC, they played their home games in fields across the Crumlin Road, from where the Iveagh Grounds are now situated. The first match report alludes to a bemused cow being the sole spectator at the first 'home game'. 

The solitary man and his dog was a slight improvement on that afterwards. The original colours of this early team were reported to have jerseys with horizontal green and red stripes, although one survivor of that era disagrees. The club was known to have survived until the mid 1930s and beyond there is no mention of them and they are believed to have disbanded. 

In 1942 another group of young brewery men who included Paddy Keenan, Jim Hudson and Larry Farrell decided to form Guinness RFC and by now had acquired the use of the front pitch and pavilion at Iveagh Grounds.

They applied for affiliation to the Leinster Branch and were successful in being accepted to enter the Minor League and Minor Cup and other 3rd cups. This would have been equivalent of Junior 2 Rugby today. The club's new colours were royal blue jerseys, white shorts and royal blue stockings.

Name: FIDAF Federazione Italiana di American Football
Description:
In sport the numbers always make the difference between winning and losing.
The numbers never lie. They are all we need to tell the story of the growth of American football in Italy. Just a few years ago FIDAF had fourteen teams. Now it has over a hundred with about 7,000 members representing every region in Italy and new teams eager to join.

American football is now recognized by the Italian National Olympic Committee (CONI) as an Associated Sport Discipline and will soon be a full-fledged National Sport Federation.
 The work of the Italian Federation of American Football covers all aspects of the game from tackle football, the “real” football, to flag football, which is similar but has no contact between the players during the game.
Every year FIDAF organizes and manages the senior men’s and women’s championships and the junior championships for younger players.

The first official Italian Football Season dates back to 1980, more than 40 years ago. CONI (the Italian National Olympic Committee) entrusted The Italian Federation of American Football (FIDAF) with the official mandate to promote football in Italy and regulate the legitimacy of all games played during the regular season, playoffs, and finals.

FREE TRIAL SPEED CLINIC - We're excited to offer free trial speed clinics for Schools and Clubs.

Name: Shawn Reed Racing
Description: NHRA Professional Drag Racing Top Fuel Dragster. Since 2015 Shawn Reed, a former drag boat world champion, has raced in nearly 40 NHRA national events with his most recent efforts coming at the first two races of the 2020 season. He has been a constant threat to win races posting career best numbers during the 2019 season, a 3.709-second pass at the Nevada Nationals and career fastest speed, 329.50 mph at his home track Pacific Raceways during the Northwest Nationals. In 2024 with veteran crew chief Rob Wedland calling the tuning shots along with assistant crew chief Ryan Elliott, Shawn Reed Racing expects to be even quicker and faster when it makes its season debut at the historic NHRA Gatornationals in Gainesville Raceway. The team will enjoy a technical and advancement alliance with AB Motorsports and three-time NHRA Top Fuel world champion Antron Brown’s Matco Tools team. Reed splits his time away from the track living in Lake Havasu City, Arizona, and Defiance, Missouri, overseeing an extensive trucking and excavating business that he built from the ground up. When he is not racing, he enjoys boat racing, golf and travelling with his wife.

Name: Venlosche Boys
Description:
Venlosche Boys staat voor:

KWALITEIT
Venlosche Boys is de beste voetbalvereniging van de regio Venlo op zowel voetbaltechnisch- als verenigingsniveau. Binnen alle gelederen van de verenging is er continue aandacht voor de optimale kwaliteit.

PLEZIER
Voetbal is een hobby. Plezier is hierbij essentieel. Voor de een wordt er met plezier gepresteerd en voor de ander gepresteerd met plezier. Iedereen draagt er aan bij dat ook alle vrijwilligers plezier ondervinden in hun vrijwilligerswerk.

VOOR IEDEREEN & SAMEN
Iedereen is welkom bij Venlosche Boys, ongeacht leeftijd, geslacht, geloof of sportieve ambitie. De vereniging vormt een community waarbij leden zich intrinsiek betrokken voelen en het vanzelfsprekend is dat iedereen - op zijn eigen wijze - zijn steentje bijdraagt.

FATSOEN & RESPECT
Een vereniging met heldere normen en waarden en een respectvolle omgang met elkaar, in en buiten het veld. Een waarde(n)volle club.

OPEN & VOORUITSTREVEND
Venlosche Boys richt zijn blik niet alleen naar binnen, maar ook naar buiten: een vereniging die voeling houdt met maatschappelijke ontwikkelingen en de huidige tijdsgeest, zonder daarbij concessies te doen aan de kernwaarden van de vereniging. Daar waar kansen zich voordoen worden deze actief opgepakt. Stilstand is achteruitgang en middels nieuwe initiatieven wordt voorop gelopen (in de voetbalwereld). 

GELIJKWAARDIG
Ieder lid en vrijwilliger is gelijkwaardig aan elkaar. Ieder lid betaalt evenveel (voor de categorie vastgesteld) contributie en ieder lid krijgt daarvoor terug de mogelijkheid om onder begeleiding te voetballen en desgewenst op andere manieren deel te nemen aan het verenigingsleven. Een duidelijk principe is dat Venlosche Boys geen enkele speler vergoedingen betaalt om uit te komen voor de vereniging.

‘Samen zijn wij de Boys. Samen gaan wij voor het beste.’

Description:
We, The Gaza Sunbirds, are a professional para-cycling team based in Gaza. Founded in 2020, we are Palestine’s first and only para-cycling team. We are made up of amputee athletes using sport and storytelling to fight for mobility justice and an end to occupation.

Since October 2023, our Gaza-based athletes have been unable to compete due to siege conditions. While our refugee athletes continue training internationally, those on the ground have taken on frontline humanitarian work, delivering emergency aid throughout the Strip, often while starving themselves.

Supported by a global community, we’ve distributed over $430,000 worth of supplies and continue to organize the Great Ride of Return, a monthly global cycling action calling for freedom of movement.

—Follow our journey—
 https://gazasunbirds.org
Great Ride of Return: https://gazasunbirds.org/campaigns/great-ride/

—Contribute to our Initiatives—
Aid Fund: https://justgiving.com/page/savegaza
Cycling goals: https://justgiving.com/page/gaza-sunbirds-intl-sports

Name: Par-OLYMPIA
Description:
Par-OLYMPIA is a recreational and informative Sport Event to realize a diverse and inclusive society through Sports. It will take place in Athens, 27 Sept - 4 Oct. 2023. During the Event youths with disabilities from all over Europe will have the opportunity to come together with peers from Europe and enjoy, learn, and connect under the Olympic spirit in Olympic premises, develop and practice physical, behavioural and mental skills by challenging themselves and each other in physical activities, movement, games and sport and learn to live in a multicultural world, accepting and respecting diversity and practice peaceful personal behavior. The event will host approx. 250 participants (100 Youths with Disabilities) from 12 European countries.
Parallel to that agents (coaches, volunteers & facilitators) will have the opportunity through seminars
and satellite activities to improve their skills toward inclusion. Inclusion in and through sport by providing every person full respect, dignity, value and belonging in any roles they may play - athlete, coach, official, administrator, or spectator. 
The general objective of Par-OLYMPIA Sport Event is to educate, engage and inspire young people with disabilities to participate in sports, learn new life skills and adopt the Olympic Values with the aim of facilitating their social inclusion (Social inclusion through sport) in a post-Covid era.
The Par-OLYMPIA Sport Event aims to achieve its general objective by:
• Examining the complex relationship between modern sport (including elite disability sports and Paralympic games as well as physical education and grassroot sports), disability and other aspects of wider society.
• Promoting social inclusion through increased sports opportunities
• Returning to sport and physical activity in a post-Covid world through informed, ethical, inclusive activities.
• Sending out kind reminders of the importance of a sustainable and resilient approach for sports and disabilities.

Name: Code Racing Development
Description:
CODE Racing Development est une structure jeune, éclectique et compétitive, née de la passion et de l’expertise de Pierre Comby et Jérôme Dernis. Créée durant l’hiver 2016/2017, l’écurie est basée à proximité de Périgueux et incarne des valeurs essentielles : rigueur, passion, esprit d’équipe, performance et expertise.

Pierre et Jérôme se sont lancés un défi ambitieux : prendre part intégrante à l’aventure Alpine en exploitant les différentes versions de l’A110 au plus haut niveau international. Pilotes, voitures et équipe ne font qu’un, portés par une quête incessante d’excellence et par l’émotion unique que procure la course automobile. Autour de ces valeurs, CODE Racing fédère ses partenaires, leur offrant une visibilité et une expérience immersive dans l’univers du sport automobile.

2025 : Un Nouveau Chapitre avec Aston Martin
L’année 2025 marque une étape clé pour Pierre Comby, qui ambitionne de renouer avec une marque emblématique de ses débuts : Aston Martin. Ce projet traduit la volonté de repousser toujours plus loin les limites de la performance et de l’excellence. Avec un objectif clair en ligne de mire : participer à la Michelin Le Mans Cup, véritable tremplin vers l’élite du sport automobile.

Ce championnat prestigieux représente une opportunité unique de mettre en lumière le savoir-faire technique et stratégique de CODE Racing Development. Ce défi s’inscrit pleinement dans l’ADN de l’écurie, où le travail, la compétitivité et l’esprit d’équipe restent les maîtres-mots.

2025 s’annonce comme une année décisive, promettant une aventure mémorable !

Name: Ultra-Ordinaires
M&C Multisport School
Description: Movement & Coordination Multisport School (M&C) è un’associazione che nasce nel 2013 dall’idea di due giovani vercellesi, accomunati dalla passione per lo sport e dalla volontà di creare una vera e propria “scuola sportiva” dedicata ai bambini, al fine di avvicinarli al “mondo degli sport”, far capire loro quello che preferiscono ed aiutarli a scoprire quello per cui sono maggiormente predisposti. L’idea dei creatori di M&C è quella che i piccoli, fin dai primi anni, possano e debbano accedere al maggior numero possibile di esperienze motorie, per ricevere stimoli diversi e “giocare a più sport”, con proposte alla loro portata e create su misura per loro, al fine di costruire una motricità il più completa possibile. Si tratta di bisogni fondamentali di ciascun bambino, soprattutto all’interno di una società sempre più sedentaria e frenetica che lascia ben poco tempo e possibilità alle famiglie di far provare ai propri figli proposte motorie diversificate. M&C si basa sul concetto che nell’età della formazione è di fondamentale importanza ricevere un’esperienza motoria multisportiva.

Name: ZUBIE FIVE SPORTS LLC
Description:
Zubie Five Sports (Z5S) - Youth Sports Reimagined. We believe every child deserves the opportunity to play youth sports. Strengthening communities through the power of sports one game at a time. 

The number one barrier for families to participate in youth sports are costs as too many kids have been priced out of participating in youth sports. 

Z5S connects youth sports organizations with local businesses and community partners who are looking to make an impact in the communities they call home through sponsorships that are scalable, customizable, and easy to execute. 

By establishing community partnerships with local businesses, securing sponsorships with national brands, working alongside youth sports advocates and receiving support from community leaders, Z5S is able to increase opportunities to play youth sports while decreasing costs associated with participation. Therefore increasing participation rates by providing opportunities for all kids and families to play. 

For additional information or to get involved, please visit our website, follow Zubie Five Sports on our social media channels @ZubieFiveSports, or contact Z5S today.

Name: Akademicki Związek Sportowy
Description:
Dziś AZS to stowarzyszenie posiadające ponad 30 tys. członków zrzeszonych w blisko 200 klubach uczelnianych, sportowych i organizacjach środowiskowych. Obecnie rozwija działalność w wielu obszarach: sporcie powszechnym, wyczynowym oraz osób z niepełnosprawnościami. Realizowane programy skupione są nie tylko wokół środowiska akademickiego – AZS coraz częściej prowadzi projekty dla dzieci, młodzieży, rodzin i seniorów.

Kluczowe rozgrywki organizacji to Akademickie Mistrzostwa Polski – największy cykl sportowej rywalizacji skierowanej do środowiska akademickiego obejmujący 35 dyscyplin sportowych, w którym corocznie bierze udział blisko 20 tys. uczestników. Z każdym rokiem rosną Integracyjne Mistrzostwa Polski AZS – projekt, którego odbiorcą są studenci z niepełnosprawnościami z różnych środowisk akademickich. Obecnie to już kilkanaście wydarzeń w roku, w których bierze udział kilkaset osób.

Najmocniejszą wizytówką AZS jest sport kwalifikowany. Zawodnicy AZS są gwiazdami światowego sportu i sięgają po najwyższe laury w czasie najważniejszych imprez, stanowiąc średnio ok. jednej trzeciej składu osobowego polskich reprezentacji. Medale zdobywają na wszystkich najważniejszych zawodach, z mistrzostwami Europy, świata i igrzyskami olimpijskimi włącznie. 

Sukcesy na arenach światowych i krajowych odnosimy także w sporcie juniorskim. Nasze jednostki co roku okupują czołowe miejsca klasyfikacji współzawodnictwa sportowego dzieci i młodzieży w Polsce (w czołowej dziesiątce większość to kluby AZS).

Jako członek Międzynarodowej Federacji Sportu Studenckiego (FISU) i Europejskiej Federacji Sportu Studenckiego (EUSA) AZS bierze też aktywny udział w systemie światowej rywalizacji akademickiej. Nasi zawodnicy z powodzeniem startują w Akademickich Mistrzostwach Europy i Europejskich Igrzyskach Studenckich a także w największych imprezach sportowych dla studentów: letnich i zimowych Uniwersjadach (w dorobku 530 medali).

Name: Radomiak Radom
Description:
Radomiak S.A. to klub piłkarski z ponad 115-letnią historią, który łączy tradycję z nowoczesnością i dynamicznym rozwojem. Od sezonu 2021/2022 rywalizujemy w Ekstraklasie, budując markę Radomiaka Radom na najwyższym szczeblu rozgrywek w Polsce.

Jesteśmy organizacją, która stawia na profesjonalizm i zrównoważony rozwój - inwestujemy w infrastrukturę, szkolenie młodzieży i stabilne fundamenty biznesowe. Rozbudowa stadionu, nowoczesne centrum treningowe, profesjonalne zaplecze dla zawodników oraz silna społeczność kibicowska sprawiają, że Radomiak staje się coraz bardziej rozpoznawalny nie tylko w kraju, ale i w Europie.

Naszym celem jest dalsze umacnianie pozycji Radomiaka w Ekstraklasie, rozwój sportowy i organizacyjny oraz tworzenie trwałej wartości dla partnerów, kibiców i całej społeczności związanej z naszym Klubem.

Name: Golf Club Aix les Bains
Description:
Niché entre le plus grand lac naturel de France et les sommets alpins, le Golf Club Aix-les-Bains Riviera des Alpes propose une expérience golfique de haut niveau alliée au plaisir d'un club appartenant au très fermé cercle «1895».

Plus ancien parcours et véritable référence dans la région Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, le Golf Club Aix-Les-Bains Riviera des Alpes a été fondé en 1895 sur un site de 45 hectares et d'une longueur de 5431 mètres (par 70). Ce parcours proposant 18 trous a été construit sur un terrain plutôt plat, à 240 mètres d'altitude. 
Il est ouvert toute l’année et 7 jours sur 7. A moins d’1h de Genève et de Lyon en voiture et 3h en TGV de Paris, il est situé à proximité du lac naturel du Bourget et du centre d'Aix-les-Bains, première ville thermale de France. Son climat tempéré permet une ouverture toute l'année, ce qui fait le bonheur de la clientèle Rhône-alpine et suisse.

Name: Hayling Island Sailing Club
Description:
Founded in 1921 and located on a private peninsula of golden sand at the entrance to Chichester Harbour, Hayling Island Sailing Club (HISC) is one of the UK’s premier sailing clubs and one of only four Royal Yachting Association (RYA) coastal Centres of Excellence. Set within an Area of Outstanding Natural Beauty, the club enjoys a unique microclimate and offers year-round sailing in all tidal conditions—making it one of Britain’s best dinghy racing locations.

Beyond its reputation on the water, HISC is also a dynamic coastal venue with exceptional facilities for weddings, corporate events, private functions and meetings. The contemporary, light filled clubhouse offers panoramic harbour views, a well stocked bar, fresh homemade food, and a variety of indoor and outdoor spaces. Our flexible meeting rooms are equipped for presentations, training sessions and away days, with breakout areas, AV capabilities, and private dining options.

With direct access to both the sheltered waters of Chichester Harbour and the open sea of Hayling Bay, HISC regularly hosts major World and National Championships. The club has played a central role in British sailing history, championing innovation and producing generations of elite sailors, including five Olympic medallists.

Onsite accommodation, warm hospitality, and a friendly, professional events team make Hayling Island Sailing Club the ideal setting not just for sailors, but for business leaders, couples, and families looking to celebrate or connect in a truly unique location.

Whether you're here to race, host a meeting, tie the knot, or simply enjoy the surroundings, HISC offers a standout experience on the South Coast.

Name: Hawk Racing
Description:
Hawk Racing was established in 1999 by Team Principal Stuart Hicken, who over the years has passed on his experience and skills to make the team what it is today.

Since its creation, Hawk Racing has been one of the most competitive and professional teams in the paddock in both track and road races.  

Stuart has enjoyed a long and fruitful association with the sport since he started racing motorcycles in the late 1960’s. During his successful 12 year racing career, including several appearances at the Isle of Man TT, Stuart gained as much pleasure from preparing his bikes as he did from riding them.

After retiring from racing, his mechanical and technical skills were in great demand, especially in Grand Prix where he managed the White Power Suspension support truck for almost a decade. Stuart’s technical and managerial expertise gained at motorcycle racing’s highest level, led him to manage and achieve success with several high-profile national and international championship teams, such as Medd Racing and Rêve Racing. 

Hawk Racing is a family run team, with Stuart’s son Steve now leading the way, however Stuart is always present to pass on his expertise and logic. Together, they have a keen eye for young, up and coming riders that they can develop into potential championship winners, striving for podiums and success. 

Today, the team competes in the British Superbike Championship and major international road races including the Northwest 200 and the Isle of Man TT.

Nous sommes le GPSO 92 ISSY, un club 100% féminin labellisé Or par la Fédération Française de Football. Nous défendons les valeurs du football féminin, la passion de nos joueuses dans un club performant. Allez les chouettes !

Name: Lahti Basketball Juniorit ry
Description:
Lahti Basketball Juniorit ry on vuonna 2012 perustettu juniori- ja harrastekoripalloseura.

Seuran tärkeimpänä toiminta-ajatuksena on tarjota eri-ikäisille junioreille ja harrastepelaajille mahdollisuus harrastaa koripalloa jokaiselle itselleen sopivalla tasolla. Seuralla on useita harrastustoimintaan ja kilpaurheiluun tähtääviä ryhmiä alle kouluikäisistä U19-junioreihin, miesten ja naisten 1-divisioonajoukkueisiin ja aikuisten harrasteryhmiin asti. Kilparyhmien pelaajilla on mahdollisuus tavoitella kansainvälistä huippu-urheilijan uraa. Harrasteryhmissä pelaaja voi vaikuttaa harjoitusmääriinsä. 

Alakoulun korisliigassa eli AKL:ssä sekä alle-kouluikäisten ryhmissä harjoitellaan ryhmässä toimimista, liikutaan monipuolisesti ja opetellaan koripallon perusteita. 

Junioritoiminnan ohella seuralla on akatemiajoukkueet miesten ja naisten sarjoissa, jonka lisäksi seura tarjoaa aikuisille mahdollisuuden harrastaa koripalloa kunto- ja harrastekoripalloryhmissä. Lahti Basketball Junioreiden alaisuudessa pelaavat sekä pojat että tytöt.

Lahti Basketball Juniorit ry tekee vahvaa yhteistyötä lahtelaisen miesten koripallon edustusseuran Lahti Basketballin kanssa tarjoten huipulle tähtääville junioreille pelaajapolun ammattilaisuraan asti. Seurojen yhteinen tavoite on tehdä Lahdesta entistä vahvempi koripallokaupunki kunnioittaen sitä hienoa lahtelaista koripallohistoriaa, joka kaupunkiin on syntynyt jo ennen nykyisten seurojen perustamista.

Name: Sportcity
Description:
Futbolcity. Centro deportivo de fútbol 5 y fútbol 7, ubicado en la población de Massanassa, Valencia. 
Hemos sido el primer centro deportivo de España en ofrecer instalaciones para la práctica del fútbol 5 al estilo indoor. 

El centro dispone de modernas y completas instalaciones. 
•	4 campos de fútbol 5 y 3 campos de fútbol 7
•	Amplio parking gratuito
•	Gradas para ver cómodamente las jugadas
•	Un edificio central con recepción con horario ininterrumpido de atención al público
•	Tienda técnica donde encontraras sólo primeras marcas (JOMA, ADIDAS)
•	Vestuarios climatizados con taquillas gratuitas
•	Una gran sala multifuncional donde la escuela desarrolla sus actividades
•	Bar con pantallas para ver todos los partidos con los amigos y organizar todo tipo de eventos dirigidos a empresas, cumpleaños, comidas multitudinarias...

Todos los campos son de césped seminatural con fibra de coco, que ayudan a disminuir el riesgo de lesiones, a mejorar el bote y la rodadura del balón.

Nuestro objetivo es ofrecer las mejores instalaciones, la gestión más profesional y todos los servicios para que el cliente se sienta como un jugador profesional del fútbol. Somos especialistas en fútbol, y organizamos toda clase de ligas y torneos a medida. 

¿Conoces el fútbol 5?. Juega al fútbol 5 al estilo indoor. Cada equipo se compone de 5 jugadores, terreno de juego con paredes donde el balón puede rebotar. No existe fuera de banda. Podrás ver todas las reglas en nuestra web.

Name: Pura Vida Club
Description:
Un lieu unique, inspiré de l’énergie brute et apaisante du Costa Rica, où l’on vient autant pour se dépasser que pour se retrouver.

Parce que s’entraîner, c’est aussi savoir ralentir et respirer, nous avons imaginé un espace où performance et sérénité ne s’opposent plus, mais se nourrissent l’une l’autre.

Un club de sport et bien-être, en plein cœur de Brest, pensé comme une parenthèse hors du temps, pour celles et ceux qui veulent conjuguer activité, équilibre et évasion.

Pura Vida Club, à Brest, décembre 2025.

Name: Women's Premier Basketball Association
Description:
The Women's Premier Basketball Association (WPBA) is more than a league—it’s a movement. Our mission is to empower women through basketball by providing a professional platform where athletes can develop their skills, elevate their careers, and inspire the next generation of female leaders.

We are committed to breaking barriers and creating opportunities through a powerful network of resources—offering elite training, mentorship, career development, and life-changing connections. Whether it’s through training programs, educational initiatives, job placement, or networking events, the WPBA is dedicated to helping athletes thrive on and off the court.
At the WPBA, we firmly believe in the power of empowerment and leadership. That's why we are dedicated to fostering an environment that supports and empowers all members within our ecosystem. We strive to serve as role models and catalysts for personal and professional growth, ensuring that everyone associated with our organization has the tools they need to succeed.

Through our comprehensive network of resources, we offer opportunities for skill development, mentoring, and career advancement. From training programs and educational initiatives to job placement assistance and networking events, we are committed to helping individuals maximize their potential and achieve their goals.

In summary, the mission of the Women's Premier Basketball Association is to provide a supportive ecosystem and valuable resources for athletes, coaches, officials, staff, and all members of our network. We are dedicated to empowering individuals, fostering leadership qualities, and paving the way for success both within and beyond the realm of basketball. Together, we are working towards a brighter future for women's basketball.

Name: HSG Baden-Endingen
Description:
Die HSG Baden-Endingen ist eine der führenden Teamsportorganisation im Ostaargau und will sich mittelfristig in der höchsten Schweizer Handballliga etablieren. 
Die im Nachwuchs bereits bestens bewährte Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Vereinen aus dem ganzen Ostaargau und Zürich West soll auf die Aktivmannschaften ausgedehnt werden. Ziel ist es, dass allen Spielern eine leistungsgerechte Perspektive geboten wird.
Der positiven Weiterentwicklung des Schweizer Handballs soll Rechnung getragen werden, indem die Kräfte im Ostaargau gebündelt und die Strukturen professionalisiert werden. Der Nachwuchs soll adäquat gefördert werden. Talentierte und ambitionierte Spieler müssen der Region erhalten bleiben und sollen zum Erfolg des Spitzenhandballs beitragen.

Elle accompagne les clubs au quotidien pour les aider à solutionner leurs problèmes juridiques, sociaux, organisationnels, économiques, financiers ou fiscaux. L'Union a également pour but de créer, renforcer les liens et mutualiser les informations entre ses adhérents, masculins comme féminins, toutes divisions confondues.

Name: H-TRAINING
Description:
Sportifs Rochelais (et d'ailleurs..)
Préparez votre compétition au sein d'une et même structure avec les autres sportifs de votre région. 
Toutes disciplines confondues, accédez à un service sur-mesure pour atteindre vos objectifs. 
H-TRAINING s'est installé il y a peu de temps à Dompierre sur mer, dans l'agglomération rochelaise et accompagne de nombreux projets sportifs. 

C'est l'occasion pour un club d'externaliser son staff et de proposer à ses athlètes une préparation physique spécifique dans un environnement favorable.
Ponctuellement ou tout au long de la saison, la formule d'engagement est la votre. 

Gestion de la charge d'entrainement sur la saison, entrainement de la vitesse, développement des qualités de force et de puissance, apprentissage moteur, développement du potentiel physique chez vos jeunes espoirs, stage intensif pour les sportifs et équipe de Haut niveau..

Name: Grasshopper Zurich Rugby Club (GCZ)
Description:
Founded in 1968 the club is one of the oldest rugby clubs in Switzerland. We offer 3 Men's Team playing from the top league in Switzerland (LNA and Excellence A) to a development league (LNA). We are also proud to have a Women's team, the GC Valkyries, who play in the top league (LNFA).

Our Men's teams have won the league and cup multiple times in the last decade and are always competing for the Championship whilst also having multiple international players. Our Women's team are at the forefront of women's rugby in Switzerland and contributing heavily to the Swiss Women's National Rugby Team.

The club also offer a Men's and Women's 7s team that play annually in the Swiss Super 7s and represent the club in international tournaments.

We training Tuesday and Thursday at Allmend Brunau during the season and at Heerenschürli (Men) and Fluntern (Women) between November and March during the Winter. 

Everyone is welcome to our trainings and to join our club regardless if you've played rugby before or not, rugby is a great sport for everyone!

OUR MISSION
The mission of Black Girl Hockey Club is to inspire and sustain passion for the game of hockey within the Black community, specifically with our mothers, sisters, daughters and friends. 

To prevent exclusion in hockey based on race, gender, sexuality or ability in the face of institutional racism, financial gatekeeping and program access, the Black Girl Hockey Club will provide education, scholarship opportunities and community spaces that will give Black women access to hockey. 

OUR VISION
We hope by carving out a safe space for Black women and the people who love them, we can grow the game of hockey in Black communities all across the world.

Name: Little Legends Sports
Description:
At Little Legends, we believe in enabling the holistic development of kids to give them the skills they need to navigate life, both on and off the field. Our core values of Imagination, Humanity and Love of Sports mean everything we do is designed to empower and uplift our Little Legends in the most fun way possible!

Early Years Specialists
Little Legends is a multi-sports provider specialising in early years development, uniquely providing a structured methodology and top quality professional coaches, so that we can give every child the opportunity to build skills for life through an active lifestyle, from toddler to teen.

Versatile Offerings
 Little Legends Foundations: A play-based, multi-sports program introducing early-years children to movement, coordination, and basic sports skills in a fun and engaging way. (Ages 2.5 - 6)

 Legends Academy: A structured program focusing on skill-building, teamwork and competition, helping children develop their technique with confidence (Ages 6-12)

 Holiday Camps: A fantastic way for children to stay active and make new friends during the school holidays with a mix of physical and creative activities, held at Dubai's largest indoor venue - Danube Sports World. 

 After School Enrichment Programs: We coach over 1500 children every week, and are the Enrichment Partner to 40+ nurseries & schools in Abu Dhabi & Dubai.  Having positively impacted over 10, 000 children since our inception, we aim to help kids build skills for life through sport and help them go from the field to the world with confidence.

Im Mittelpunkt steht der ständige Dialog zwischen Verband und Vereinen. Der Aufgabenbereich geht weit über die Kernkompetenz als Administrator des Spielbetriebs hinaus, eine professionelle Nachwuchsförderung in der Breite und Spitze, kompetente Interessensvertretung der Vereine bei Entscheidungsträgern und Institutionen aus Politik und Wirtschaft, die Optimierung der infrastrukturellen Rahmenbedingungen, eine qualitativ hochwertige Aus- und Weiterbildung von Trainern und Funktionären oder die Organisation von Events, Aktionen und Bewerben sind weitere wesentliche Leistungen, die erbracht werden.

Name: Maven Baseball Lab
Description:
At Maven Baseball Lab, we offer a wide range of services to help players improve their game, including hitting and pitching instruction, strength and conditioning programs, and mental skills training. Our team of experienced coaches and trainers will work with you one-on-one to develop a personalized training plan that addresses your specific needs and goals.

Our state-of-the-art facility is equipped with the latest technology and training methods to provide players with a comprehensive training experience.  We incorporate cutting-edge 3D motion capture technology and force plates, which allows us to analyze your movements and mechanics with precision accuracy. This data helps us identify areas for improvement and track your progress over time.

Our commitment to excellence doesn’t stop with our training programs. We also provide a comfortable and supportive environment that encourages growth and development. If you are a player looking to take your game to the next level, you’ll find a welcoming community of fellow players and coaches at Maven Baseball Lab.

Elle aspire à atteindre le circuit professionnel internationale FIBA 3X3. Aujourd'hui elle intègre le circuit international mondial avec 7 participations à un un pro event en 2024, 6 challengers et 1 Master.

Name: le Strade Zitte // Turbolento Thinkbike
Description:
Strade Zitte: piccole e dimenticate strade di campagna e di montagna, strade secondarie, tanto silenziose quanto contorte. Hanno poco da dire al traffico motorizzato e suonano come musica per chi le percorre alla lenta velocità di una leggera e agile bicicletta. Sulle Strade Zitte, si sa, lo sterrato è sempre in agguato. E le Strade Zitte si fanno Gravel Roads.

Turbolento è il punto d’incontro tra velocità e lentezza, tra sport e divertimento. Noi lo chiamiamo CYCLETAINMENT. Uno stile di pedalata e di vita che condivide valori come paesaggio, bellezza, gentilezza, educazione, senso della collettività, sostenibilità e rispetto dell’ambiente. Organizziamo attività ciclistiche con differenti livelli di difficoltà e forti contenuti di creatività e divertimento.
Promuoviamo la conoscenza geografica del nostro paese e l’art.9 della nostra Costituzione che tutela il paesaggio italiano. Il bello da cui tutti vorremmo essere sempre circondati.
Sogniamo e disegniamo percorsi ciclistici, unendo chilometri di strade secondarie: le Strade Zitte.

Name: Akademia Lechia Gdańsk
Description:
Misją Akademii Lechii Gdańsk jest wychowanie nie tylko piłkarza, ale i młodego człowieka. Zapewniamy dzieciom opiekę utytułowanych trenerów o doskonałym przygotowaniu pedagogicznym, nowoczesne metody szkolenia i edukacji. Nasze drużyny U15, U17 oraz U19 rywalizują na najwyższych szczeblach rozgrywkowych w Polsce.

Absolwenci Akademii trafiają do pierwszej drużyny Lechii Gdańsk oraz czołowych klubów w całej Polsce i Europie. Wśród naszych wychowanków znajdują się reprezentanci kraju, tacy jak Kacper Urbański, Przemysław Frankowski, Paweł Dawidowicz i Jakub Kałuziński. Pod względem liczby powołań na EURO 2024, jesteśmy drugą Akademią w Polsce.

Działamy jako aktywny popularyzator sportu w województwie pomorskim, za cel obierając integrację społeczną i przeciwdziałanie wykluczeniu. Realizujemy takie inicjatywy jak Lechia Baby (sportowe zajęcia dla maluszków), Lechia Kids (treningi dla dzieci w przedszkolach), Lechia Camps (sportowe obozy z Lechią) i wiele, wiele innych.

Name: S.V. Heeten
Description:
Voetbalvereniging S.V. Heeten wil een veilige, aangename vereniging zijn voor al haar (kader)leden, supporters, vrijwilligers en alle anderen welke zich verbonden voelen met onze vereniging.

S.V. Heeten vervult een belangrijke rol in de samenleving van Heeten en omgeving en is daar terdege van bewust. Als voetbalvereniging streven we naar kwaliteit in alle geledingen van de vereniging. Van trainingsgroep tot veteranenvoetbal en van vrijwilliger tot hoofdtrainer. 
 
Kwaliteit omvat primair de prestaties in het veld, maar niet zonder uitstekende normen en waarden, zoals die passend zijn voor een warme dorpsvereniging die midden in de samenleving staat. Onze leden dragen met trots ons groen-witte tenue in het streven naar prestaties op het veld en betrokkenheid daarbuiten, zoals dat past bij een warme dorpsvereniging.

Name: IF Lyseng Fodbold
Description:

Eksponer og aktivér din forretning, når unikke minder, og fællesskaber, venskaber og mesterskaber opstår. 

For gennem leg og læring, vil dit brand blive associeret med gode stunder hos vores mere end 80 forskellige hold - på tværs af alder, køn og ambitionsniveau.

Name: Glatronic Sport
Description: Welcome to Glatronic, your go-to source for all things sports! We are a dedicated LinkedIn page that brings you the latest results, insightful interviews, and engaging content from the world of football and various other sports. Whether you're a die-hard fan, a sports enthusiast, or a professional athlete, Glatronic is here to keep you informed and entertained. Join our community and stay updated on the thrilling moments, inspiring stories, and exclusive behind-the-scenes access that make sports so captivating. Let's celebrate the spirit of competition together at Glatronic!

Name: London Seaward FC
Description:
Welcome to the official account of London Seaward Football Club. 
We are an independent FAWNL women's club based in the borough of Redbridge, London, who play in the SE Division 1, which is tier 4 of the women's game! 
We pride ourselves on being an inclusive club where those underrepresented in the game can find a place to make their mark. 
Please consider supporting the club by donating to or sharing our go fund page. 

https://gofund.me/e4910b5f

Name: UiA Esport
Description:
Esports is one of the fastest growing industries in the world. More and more private businesses, governments, and the public sector, both nationally and internationally, see the opportunities to utilise the potential that lies in skills developed through esports. 

UiA esport is a venture from the University of Agder, and deals with the most central topics that are internationally classified as academic esports.

Name: Colchester Golf Club
Description:
Colchester Golf Club has been voted the No.1 golf course in North Essex. Our beautiful, tree-lined, 18-hole course was founded in 1907, designed by none other than 5-times Open Champion James Braid.

With a pleasant terrain, short walks between green and tee, and a sunny climate, this is a lovely place to be and to play golf,  reflected by the Club hosting numerous prestigious events such as the Essex Open (PGA), the Essex Amateur Championship, the East Anglian Amateur Championship and the prestigious Eastern Region PGA Championship and the Eastern Region Championship Pro-Am.

The club is owned and run by its membership for the benefit of the members and the local community.

The club has an excellent and challenging 18-hole golf course, a nine hole academy course, a 300 yard full driving range complete with PGA professional coaches and a Pro Shop including a full swing studio.

Name: Robotics Club  SSBT COET
Description:
This club was started in early 2013 in the Mechatronics Lab. of Mechanical Engg. Dept. & has developed into a vibrant hub for inter-disciplinary & co-curricular activities.

Workshops like VisionBOTics on 6th sense robotics & Tanubhaav was organized to generate interest among students of Mechanical , Electronics & Computer dept. Soon students started building robots for participating in Robo-Tracker, Robo-Race & Robo-War competitions organized by neighbouring institutes like SGD COET Jalgaon, SSGB COE Bhusawal, JTM COE Faizpur , RCPIT Shirpur & GHRIT Jalgaon with great deal of success.

Robotryst (workshop organized by IIT Delhi) 2014 & 2016 has inspired students to build task-specific robots for participation in National Competitions like SHAASTRA (IIT Madras) 2012 Design of Lunar Rover Challenge, Robocon (IIT Delhi) 2015, 2016, 2018 & 2019 – their robots were successful in clearing the initial rounds & securing national ranking.

Name: FC Neftochimic Bourgas
Description:
"FC Neftochimic Bourgas 1962" is an Non-profit association, established with the aim of preserving the history and traditions of the footbal club Neftochimic, founded in 1962. 

The association was established in 2014 under company case 79/2014 and represents a football club within the meaning of Article 9, Paragraph 1, Item 1 of the Sports Act to the Bulgarian Football Union. It is registered in the register of sports organizations at the Ministry of Youth and Sports under number 155-807.

Since its foundation Neftochimic Bourgas relieved itself as a football club aspiring for development. In a short period, from 1962 to 1967, it managed to progress from regional groups to the second tier of football in Bulgaria.

FC Neftochimic Bourgas is the most successful football club in Bourgas and the most successful football club in Southeastern Bulgaria. It was the vice-champion of Bulgaria in 1998, holder of the cups of the Professional League for 1996 and 1997, a finalist for the Bulgarian Cup, holder of the cup of the Amateur League and has made a significant contribution to the development of Bulgarian football over a long period of time.

In 2024 FC Neftochimic Bourgas will celebrate its 62st anniversary. Given the established structure, ambitions, and traditions that the trademark Neftochimic entails, we will take the necessary actions to make our club once again the leader in the development of football in Burgas and the region. However, our aspirations do not end here. We aim to build a club that focuses positive attention from the public and creates a structure with an image that is not only recognizable but also exemplary, reinforcing the fundamental social values of sports.

We believe that with persistent work, based on strong fundamentals, Neftochimic will manage to build a solid ground for future achievements and soon will be back in the professional football, where the people of Bourgas and football supporters from Bulgaria are used to seeing it.

Name: Professional Box Lacrosse Association
Description:
The wait is over. The Professional Box Lacrosse Association is here.

Lacrosse is officially the fastest growing sport in the United States and is currently experiencing a rate of accelerated growth that no other sport has seen before. The PBLA is bringing the intensity and rapid-fire excitement of indoor lacrosse to a city near you, featuring the very best players in the world!

Name: ESCM | Entente Saint-Clément Montferrier
Description:
Fondé en 1964, l’Olympique de Montferrier a, depuis 1989, laissé place à l’Entente Saint-Clément-Montferrier. 

Au-delà de ses équipes, toutes plus performantes les unes que les autres, l’ESCM souhaite se développer notamment grâce au soutien d’une communauté d’acteurs engagés.

Aujourd’hui, l’ESCM compte plus de 560 licenciés et a été, tout récemment, lauréat du Label Jeunes Excellence FFF et Label Bronze Féminin FFF; preuve de la qualité associative, éducative, d’encadrement et sportive du club.

L’ESCM dispose d’une communauté de presque 8 000 abonnés sur les différents réseaux sociaux.

Pour la saison 2023/2024, l’équipe fanion est engagée dans le Championnat National 3. Les U17 évoluent également au niveau National et les U18 ont réalisé l’exploit d’atteindre les 8èmes de finale de la Coupe Gambardella.

Le club et ses équipes sont répartis sur 3 sites: Le Stade Ernest Brousse à Montferrier-sur-Lez, le pôle sportif du Pic Saint-Loup à Saint-Clément-de-Rivière et le Stade Jules Rimet de Sussargues pour les rencontres de National 3.

Name: Time Naurú
Description:
A Naurú é uma associação sem fins lucrativos, que tem como objetivo promover e oferecer esporte de qualidade para todas as pessoas, principalmente pessoas com deficiência.

Atualmente trabalhamos em diversos polos pelo Brasil e atuação reconhecida em modalidades como atletismo, natação, judô, bocha e esportes de areia, a Naurú é a única organização no mundo que declara abertamente trabalhar com pessoas com e sem deficiência juntas, em todas as manifestações do esporte: lazer, educacional, participação e rendimento; trabalhando pela democratização ao esporte e inclusão real.

Nosso trabalho parte do princípio de que a deficiência é apenas uma característica – não um impeditivo – e que o esporte é um direito de todos. Acreditamos que não existe impossível, apenas o difícil, que pode ser transformado com apoio, oportunidade e trabalho em equipe. Que pode ser transformado pelo esporte.

Já atendemos direta e indiretamente milhares de pessoas em diferentes regiões do Brasil, impactando comunidades inteiras por meio do esporte como ferramenta de transformação social. Nosso modelo inovador é referência nacional e internacional em inclusão esportiva e combate ao capacitismo.

Name: Vendée Foot Club La Roche-sur-Yon
Description:
Le Vendée Foot Club La Roche-sur-Yon est une association sportive de football affiliée à la Fédération Française de Football, née en 1947 sous le nom de l’Amicale des Écoles Publiques du Bourg-sous-La-Roche (AEPB).

Fort d’une histoire riche marquée par la fusion en 1989 avec le FC Yon, le club a connu les heures glorieuses de la Deuxième Division, avant de traverser des périodes plus difficiles.

Sous la présidence de Christophe Chabot (PDG d’Akena Vérandas), le club a retrouvé une stabilité et une ambition forte, visant à redevenir une référence du football vendéen et à retrouver une place reconnue sur la scène nationale.

Aujourd’hui, le Vendée Foot Club évolue en National 2 et poursuit sa mission :
- Former les talents de demain,
- Développer des liens forts avec les partenaires locaux,
- Promouvoir les valeurs du sport, de la Vendée et du collectif.

Parce qu’ici, chacun a le droit de rêver

Name: Ashihara karate København
Description:
Ashihara Karate København er en forening og sportsskole med rødder i den japanske Ashihara-karate. Vi træner børn, unge og voksne – og tror på, at stærke resultater skabes, når talent kombineres med bløde værdier, vedholdenhed og fællesskab.

Hos os er det ikke kun kampgejsten, der tæller. Vi møder vores elever dér, hvor de er – i livet og i sporten – og støtter dem på hele rejsen: Med nærvær, motivation og supervision. Vi tror på, at mental sundhed og balance mellem sport, skole, familie og venner er forudsætningen for bæredygtig udvikling – både menneskeligt og sportsligt.

Vi har stolte traditioner for elitepræstationer og arbejder målrettet med træning, coaching og supervision. Samtidig er vi et fællesskab båret af frivillighed, hvor unge engagerede karateudøvere får mulighed for at vokse som hjælpeinstruktører – altid i tæt samspil med voksne rollemodeller.

Le mécénat est un engagement libre d’une ou plusieurs personnes ou entreprises, au service d’une cause d’intérêt général : le sport.

Il peut prendre la forme d’un don financier, de produit, de technologie ou d’un apport de compétence.

Notre politique de mécénat est le fruit d’une stratégie et d’une réflexion quant à son apport au développement des clubs sportifs sur notre territoire.

Elle repose sur une vision claire et partagée des objectifs.

Elle permet la prise d’initiatives, l’expérimentation et l’innovation sociale.

Le mécénat permet de multiplier les rencontres entre mécènes, partenaires, pouvoirs publics, collectivités, sportifs... au profit du territoire chartrain.

Description:
Peoria Sports Complex is the Spring Training home of the San Diego Padres and Seattle Mariners. This thirteen field multi-faceted sporting complex hosts numerous tournaments and events throughout the year including City of Peoria special events like the 4th of July, Halloween, and Easter as well as other events like drone racing, car shows, boutique fairs, weddings, and many more.

Peoria Sports Complex opened in 1994 as the first two-team facility in the Cactus League. It has gone through renovations in 2012-2017 and has the largest videoboard of all Spring Training facilities. With a capacity of 12,339, the Peoria Sports Complex has hosted sell-out Spring Training games and the Savannah Bananas during their 2023 World Tour.

Name: Golden Born Society
Description:
Golden Born – The Action & Wellness Club for Entrepreneurs

Golden Born is more than just a community, it’s a movement for entrepreneurs, solopreneurs, founders, and co-founders who refuse to settle. We provide an alternative way to network, bringing together ambitious and driven startup professionals who push their limits both in business and in life.

Golden Born offers a community where high-achiever entrepreneurs connect, challenge themselves and grow. Through action-driven experiences like running, trekking, canoeing, basketball, football and more, we create meaningful connections that go beyond traditional networking.

This is where endurance meets entrepreneurship, and where like-minded individuals come together to build, scale and thrive.

Name: Heyday Athletic
Description:
Heyday Athletic is probably the best place in the solar system to find fun. We show the world that adults love to play sports and games. Whether you do it for the workout, to make friends or just love the game, we will get you moving and make you feel like a kid again. That's just what we do!

We have provided high quality sports leagues, tournaments and events since 1993 with the inception of Philadelphia Sport and Social Club (PSSC) and later, Lehigh Valley Sports Leagues, Conshohocken Sports Leagues and West Chester Sports Leagues. In 2007, concentrating primarily on Center City, Philadelphia Sports Network (PSN) entered the Philly social sports scene. In 2016, PSSC and PSN entered an equal merger to establish Philadelphia Sports Leagues and within two years, expanded further, with the acquisitions of Delaware Sports Leagues and BAM Sports Leagues in New Jersey.

In 2020, Heyday Athletic combined all six clubs across Pennsylvania, New Jersey and Delaware in an effort to bring more sports, events and benefits to over 60,000 players, making it one of the five largest social sports companies in the United States. The rebrand, with its new name, logos and lineup of playful mascots, reignites our passion for fun, sports and community.

A member of the Sport & Social Industry Association (SSIA), Heyday Athletic is committed to supporting the communities in which we play through community service and donations. Team Heyday employs 17 full-time employees and works with more than 200 referees and scorekeepers.

Name: Aberdeenshire RFC
Description:
Aberdeenshire rugby club have a long and prosperous history dating back to 1875, making us one of Scotland's oldest clubs.

we currently have 2 senior mens teams, our 1XV are in the Tennent's Caledonia Region League 1, and have the goal to be back playing in the national leagues in the near future.

The 2XV is our social team which over the recent years has struggled to keep going but with the support of the club seen the return of the Super Twa's into Tennent's Caledonia North Region Division 3 in 2022 with the goal to supporting our 1XV as a feeder team and for enjoying the social aspects of the sport.

The women's 1XV are a formidable side and currently dominating the Tennent's Caledonia North Region League 1, with a similar goal to the men's 1XV of playing National level rugby in the near future. 

2023 has seen the launch of our youth section with a newly appointed Youth Development Officer Paul Harrow leading the charge, he has quickly set up programmes that is bringing rugby to our catchment area schools and starting rugby camps from easter 2023, this will pave the way for weekly training sessions ranging from primary 1 through to U18s.

In previous years the club has achieved several League title's and seen our Men's 1XV winning the National Bowl at Murrayfiled in 2018, this gave us our platform to build the club back to its former glory, where we deserve to be.

Based at Woodside Sports Complex (The Fortress) with our very own clubhouse and bar why would you go anywhere else, we welcome anyone to join us of any age or gender, join our big cat family and play rugby the shire way.

If you're just starting or working for a small club, academy, college, or university, Coach Paint Lite can help you dig into the video analysis world at an affordable monthly or yearly subscription.

If you're at an elite level, Coach Paint Pro is the right tool for you. It allows you to make deeper and more sophisticated analyses with more than 30 broadcast-quality outputs, AI-powered tools, multi-angle telestration, and much more.

Name: Roma Sports Network
Description:
INSIEME PER LO SPORT DI ROMA. 
Il network, attualmente costituito da 12 società sportive di vertice romane, rappresentanti 10 discipline sportive, ha la finalità di promuovere, sostenere e diffondere una nuova cultura dello sport e un nuovo modo di fare sport nella capitale.
Lo sport è patrimonio culturale ed economico della città, contribuisce in modo fondamentale al miglioramento e al benessere della comunità. 
Partendo da questo presupposto Roma Sports Network si presenta e chiede il coinvolgimento di istituzioni, sponsor, media e cittadini per poter fare sport in maniera sostenibile nella città di Roma.
Le società consorziate hanno scritto un MANIFESTO che racchiude i principi fondamentali di questa iniziativa, invitando tutti a fare sistema e a creare sinergie per sostenere lo sport romano, dall’alto livello alla base, con proposte concrete e obiettivi dichiarati. 
Unire sotto un unico brand le società sportive di vertice della città di Roma, dove gestire, organizzare e praticare lo sport è attualmente più complicato che in altre città, permetterà di sviluppare attività promozionali, iniziative e grandi eventi, unici e continuativi, che faciliteranno la diffusione di tutti gli sport, oltre a permettere alle società sportive romane di competere alle stesse condizioni di quelle del resto d’Italia e a tutto lo sport di base di avere spazi e visibilità per le diverse discipline sportive con il supporto delle società maggiori.
Il brand Roma ha una forza dirompente in Italia e nel mondo, non può più essere un limite allo sviluppo di progetti sportivi di alto livello per difficoltà di reperimento degli impianti, per scarsa attenzione mediatica e cittadina o per limitato sostegno economico. 
Lo sport deve diventare un volano educazionale e formativo per la diffusione del corretto approccio alla qualità della vita cittadina.
Un grandissimo ritorno d’immagine, istituzionale, sociale ed economico per tutta la città di Roma, per chi parteciperà e per chi lo supporterà.

TO CREATE AN ENVIRONMENT THAT GIVES EVERY STUDENT-ATHLETE THE BEST POSSIBLE OPPORTUNITY TO ACHIEVE AND SURPASS INDIVIDUAL POTENTIAL THROUGH STRUCTURE, SUPPORT, KNOWLEDGE AND EXPERIENCE

OKANAGAN HOCKEY GROUP
Okanagan Hockey Group was founded by Larry Lund in 1963 in Penticton, BC Canada. Over the years, Okanagan Hockey Group became an icon in the hockey camp industry and has grown today to be the longest operating hockey camp in the world. Over the 50 plus years, Okanagan Hockey Group has operated camps in Canada, United States, Mexico, Japan, Hong Kong, United Arab Emirates, Switzerland, Austria, Germany, England, Scotland and Denmark. In this time period, the camp in Penticton has hosted players from over 30 different countries. The camp has had hundreds of former and existing NHL players attend over the years as players or as on ice instructors.
In 2002, Okanagan Hockey Academy was established as the first hockey specific sport school recognized by BC Hockey and Hockey Canada. OHA has been built on experience, knowledge, and passion for our game. OHA in Penticton started with one team and has now expanded to seven teams. In 2008, OHG expanded its operations to St Pölten, Austria, and in 2015 to Edmonton, Alberta. OHA’s success can be seen in the long list of players who have moved on to play at the Junior A, Major Junior, University, Professional and International levels. With the vast amount of knowledge and incredible network throughout our staff, our athletes have the inside track to move on to the next level.

L’animation du Centre repose sur le travail bénévole d’une équipe importante et particulièrement soudée. Cette équipe a su doter son groupe sportif de structures semi-professionnelles avec des salariés, mais elle a su également créer et entretenir un climat de convivialité particulièrement remarquable.

Le Centre est légitimement fier de ses brillants et constants résultats.

- En Division Nationale 1 depuis 1996
- 7 fois vainqueur de la Coupe de France des Clubs

Name: Vejby IF
Description:
Vejby IF firar 2022 100 år som idrottsklubb och har med sitt stora engagemang i samhället blivit en viktig mötesplats för invånare i Vejbystrand. Idrottsplatsen samlar inte bara fotbollsintresserade utan lockar även till annan rörelse med allt från padel till styrketräning uppe vid Vejby Sportpark. 

Föreningen är över 1000 medlemmar och bedriver utöver idrotten även en framgångsrik fritidsverksamhet, loppis och ett stort hållbarhetsarbete. 

Under 2021 bildades ett damlag som direkt gick upp en division och spelar i division 3 säsongen 2023. A-laget för herrar är 2023 representerat i division 3. Seniorfotbollen omfattar även ett B-lag, ett J-lag och ett oldboyslag. Ungdomsverksamheten omfattar 17 lag för både pojkar och flickor.

Föreningen driver sedan 1985 en omfattande verksamhet med fritidshem, fritidsklubb och fritidsgård. Vejby Loppis och Rondellen är integrerade verksamheter för långtidsarbetslösa som drivs i samarbete med bl.a. Arbetsförmedlingen.

Vi driver även ett fantastiskt nätverk, Team Oranje, där lokala företag skapar förutsättningar för vår ungdomsverksamhet att växa. Våra nätverksträffar bjuder på mingel, tävlingar och intressanta föreläsningar med stort fokus på hållbarhetsfrågor. 

Historik
Vejby IF som bytte namn från Vejbyslätts IF 2009, bildades i det lilla stationssamhället vid Västkustbanan 1921. Året efter blev man registrerad hos fotbollsförbundet och det är från denna tidpunkt klubben räknar sin historia.

Hemmamatcherna spelas på Vejbystrands Idrottsplats, som stod färdig 1954. Dessförinnan utkämpades ett par decenniers heroiska matcher på "Fåravallen" mellan nuvarande Björnbärsvägen och Pillas väg.

Klubben har sedan 1960-talet haft en livfull ungdomsverksamhet som idag omfattar 17 lag för både pojkar och flickor.

Name: ICC Men's T20 World Cup
Description:
The ICC T20 World Cup is the flagship international Twenty20 tournament, organised by the International Cricket Council. The first men’s competition took place in September 2007, with India winning the inaugural title. The next edition took place in 2009 in England and saw the introduction of the women’s tournament that ran concurrently with the men’s.

Hosts Australia won the women's tournament that was played in February-March 2020, defeating India in the final in front of a record crowd of 86,174 at the MCG on International Women's Day.

The ICC Men’s T20 World Cup 2022 will see the world's best cricketers from 16 international teams clash in 45 matches across seven host cities, bringing people of all ages and backgrounds together for a celebration of cricket and culture – from 16 October to 13 November 2022.

Australia will enter the eighth edition of the men's event as defending champions after winning their maiden ICC Men's T20 World Cup title in 2021, defeating New Zealand in the final played at Dubai International Stadium. 


Men’s Champions
2007: India
2009: Pakistan
2010: England
2012: West Indies
2014: Sri Lanka
2016: West Indies
2021: Australia
2022: (To be hosted by Australia)

Women’s Champions
2009: England
2010: Australia
2012: Australia
2014: Australia
2016: West Indies
2018: Australia
2020: Australia

Name: NXXT Golf
Description:
NXXT Golf is a dynamic, progressive sports-media organization dedicated to reshaping women's and junior golf through innovative competition, engaging storytelling, and meaningful partnerships.

Under the NXXT Golf umbrella, we proudly host three distinct, groundbreaking platforms:

1. NXXT Women’s Pro Tour:
A professional pathway directly affiliated with the LPGA/Epson Tour, annually awarding 10 Epson Tour exemptions. We’ve awarded over $500,000 in total prize money to emerging female golf professionals, significantly impacting their journey to the highest levels of the game.

2. NXXTGen Junior Tour:
An elite junior and collegiate golf series, dedicated to developing future stars by providing enhanced visibility, access to collegiate pathways, and elite-level competition.

3. Battle of the Sexes Tour:
Golf’s first truly gender-unified professional competition, creating head-to-head matchups between leading male and female golfers, redefining equality and driving excitement and audience engagement across all platforms.
Collectively, NXXT Golf’s properties reach an engaged audience of over 600,000 monthly views across social and digital platforms, continually building global recognition through innovative formats and compelling media strategies.

At NXXT Golf, we’re not just hosting tournaments; we’re pioneering the next era of golf—promoting equality, inspiring athletes, and delivering unforgettable experiences.

Sinds 2013 maken de NABV en airsoft in Nederland een ongelooflijke groei door. Binnen 3 jaar werd het aantal van 10.000 leden behaald. Eind 2017 telde de vereniging ruim 16.000 leden en in 2018 zette die groei door met ruim 400 leden per maand. De NABV als vereniging/sportbond professionaliseert in rap tempo. 

De NABV staat voor een veilige en verantwoorde airsoft sportbeoefening.
