Name: IFA SPORT
Description:
Established in the region 20 years ago by sports professionals, IFA is a successful independent football academy. We operate in 6 locations across Dubai and have over 500 participants attending our sessions each week.
 
Our ‘Sport for All’ philosophy means we are inclusive and not exclusive. Our players are taught in a professional environment that is also fun to ensure our players enjoy their sessions and become the best they can be.

Grassroots football is at the core of what we do, however a few years ago we introduced ‘Development’ and ‘Premier’ programmes and this season (2022-2023) our U12’s and U13’s went undefeated in one of the most competitive leagues in the region, which had 26 teams participating. Invincibles!
Approaching our 3rd decade in the UAE, this season we have a new look, new programmes and some great new additions to our coaching and support staff to ensure the best possible experience for all our players, parents and supporters.

We have been working hard to develop the most comprehensive development programme on offer in the UAE and are proud of our coaching programmes, delivered by a coaching team boasting UEFA A and B Licences coaches.

Our Dribblers programme offers ‘toddlers’ their first taste of football until they are ready to graduate at 4yrs into our popular (grassroots) Academy system.
Other than our ‘grassroots’ Academy, Premier and Development Programmes, we also offer extracurricular activities (ECAs) in schools across Dubai and offer support to the respective PE departments. 

We are also very proud of our ‘Stars’ tournaments, which is a friendly competition wherein our Academy players can test themselves against other academies to gain some valuable competitive football experience but in a fun (no pressure) environment.
We have also designed and built football pitches that we rent out every night of the week and we manage various school facilities via an online system, taking care of all everything on profit share basis.

Name: Vilnius Football Academy
Description:
„Vilnius Football Academy“ veiklą pradėjo 2020 m. birželį. Naujosios futbolo mokyklos steigėjais tapo žinomas Lietuvos futbolininkas Darvydas Šernas ir Futbolotreneris.lt įkūrėjai Robertas Šuškevič ir Tomas Staniūnas.

MISIJA

Siekiame sukurti profesionalią futbolo akademija, kurioje kiekvienas išnaudoja visas savo galimybes, gauna reikalingą pagalbą, besąlygišką palaikymą ir yra skatinamas atkakliai siekti užsibrėžtų tikslų.

VIZIJA

Akademija susideda iš Trenerių, Vaikų ir Tėvelių.

Akademijos treneris yra moralinis autoritetas ir tikrasis pavyzdys, ne tik skatinantis kitus tobulėti, bet ir siekiantis pats tobulėti, orientuotas į vaiko ugdymą ir besilaikantis klubo vertybių. Treneris yra mokytojas, o žaidėjai – sprendimų priėmėjai.

Akademijos vaikai yra savimi pasitikintys, kūrybingi, techniški žaidėjai, žinantys ir besilaikantys sporto etikos principų. Puoselėja teigiamas gyvenimiškas vertybes ir charakterio savybes ne tik aikštėje, bet ir už jos ribų.

Tėveliai nuoširdžiai domisi savo vaikų pasiekimais, aktyviai dalyvauja akademijos veikloje, padeda vaikams vykdyti trenerių skirtas užduotis, besąlygiškai juos palaiko ir įkvepia siekti užsibrėžtų tikslų.

Visi kartu esame aktyvi futbolo bendruomenė, dalyvaujanti įvairiose akademijos veiklose ir dirbanti ne tik akademijos, bet ir viso Lietuvos futbolo labui.

VERTYBĖS

Esame atvira, skaidri ir inovatyvi futbolo akademija, kurioje pagrindinis dėmesys skiriamas asmenybės ugdymui. Akademijoje vertinamos pergalės, bet jos nėra svarbesnės už kiekvieno vaiko įgūdžius, pastangas ir asmeninį tobulėjimą. Didžiausias dėmesys skiriamas ilgalaikiam, nuosekliam ir kryptingam tobulėjimui. Organizacijoje kuriama pozityvi aplinką, kurioje futbolas teiktų džiaugsmą rungtynių ir treniruočių metu.

Name: Voetbalvereniging WVF
Description:
WVF is een voetbalvereniging met een totaal van pakweg 1500 leden en ruim 400 vrijwilligers.

De vereniging met een rijke historie is op 1 juni 1937 door een vijftal jongens van 12 en 13 jaar opgericht onder de naam Quick. De Koninklijke Nederlandse Voetbal Bond stelde in 1941 echter de eis dat de naam moest worden veranderd. De keuze viel op WVF, de initialen van de buurtschappen Westenholte, Voorst en Frankhuis.

De club heeft aan de Stinsweg in Westenholte de beschikking over een fraaie accommodatie die onder de naam De Weide Steen in de wijde regio bekend staat. Ruime kleedgelegenheden, een gezellige kantine, vier wedstrijdvelden, (waarvan drie met kunstgras) een pupillenveld en een overdekte tribune maken daarvan deel uit. De bloeiende vereniging heeft een goed eerste elftal, vele sponsoren en een eigen magazine.

WVF richt zich tegenwoordig niet alleen meer op de buurtschappen die in haar naam zijn opgesloten. Ook bijvoorbeeld het dichtbijgelegen Stadshagen wordt bediend.

Description:
أكاديمية الملاكمه هي مركز تدريب رائد متخصص في الملاكمة، الكيك بوكسينج، وألعاب الدفاع عن النفس. تقع الأكاديمية في القاهرة الجديدة، مصر، وتهدف إلى تطوير الرياضيين من جميع المستويات، من المبتدئين إلى المحترفين. نوفر بيئة تدريب عالمية المستوى تجمع بين المدربين الخبراء، أحدث المعدات، والالتزام بالتميز.

 خدماتنا:
 تدريبات احترافية في الملاكمة والكيك بوكسينج – برامج مخصصة لجميع المستويات.
 برامج مخصصة للأطفال والناشئين – لتعزيز الثقة والانضباط والقوة.
 دورات للدفاع عن النفس للسيدات – لتمكين المرأة من خلال الرياضات القتالية.
 تدريب شخصي فردي – جلسات خاصة مع مدربين محترفين.
 برامج اللياقة البدنية والقوة – لتحسين الأداء الرياضي.
 برامج تدريبية للشركات والمدارس – لنشر ثقافة الدفاع عن النفس واللياقة البدنية.

 عن المؤسس:
أكاديمية الملاكمه أسسها البطل الاوليمبي محمد علي رضا، صاحب اكبر انجاز في تاريخ الملاكمه المصريه ، الذي كرس حياته لنشر وتطوير الرياضات القتالية. بخبرته الطويلة في التدريب والمنافسات، أسس الأكاديمية لتكون منصة تصنع الأبطال وتساعد الرياضيين على تحقيق أقصى إمكانياتهم

Name: RIO Volleyball Academy
Description:
Welcome to RIO Volleyball Academy – where passion meets performance.


We offer comprehensive training programs tailored for players of all levels, from beginners to advanced athletes. Our goal is to help each individual develop their skills, enhance performance, and reach their full potential on the court.

Name: KS Pomorzanin Toruń
Description:
Pomorzanin Toruń to przede wszystkim społeczność połączona wspólnymi wartościami. Wspólnie z trenerami, rodzicami, dziećmi oraz pracownikami Klubu tworzymy projekt społeczny, którego głównym celem jest promocja sportu, zdrowego trybu życia oraz właściwych wzorców zachowań zarówno wśród dzieci i młodzieży jak i dorosłych.

Naszym największym atutem są trenerzy, którzy w pierwszej kolejności są świetnymi ludźmi i wspaniałymi wychowawcami a w drugiej merytorycznie przygotowanymi trenerami piłki nożnej. Nasi trenerzy kochają swój zawód i swoją pasją zarażają podopiecznych. Są przy tym cierpliwi i empatyczni co z kolei sprawia, że potrafią zbudować z dziećmi i młodzieżą dobre relacje. Dzięki swoim umiejętnościom przywódczym, potrafią znaleźć zdrowy balans pomiędzy wyznaczaniem granic, a daniem swoim podopiecznym trochę więcej swobody. Fachowość ich wiedzy merytorycznej potwierdzają z kolei liczne certyfikaty UEFA, które zdobyli na przestrzeni lat, a także ciągła chęć rozwoju osobistego, udział w seminariach i szkoleniach. 

Główną siedzibą klubu są obiekty położone przy ul. Szosa Chełmińskia, jednak zajęcia z najmłodszymi adeptami naszego Klubu odbywają się w całym Toruniu - na orlikach, boiskach szkolnych i innych obiektach sportowych. Bardzo blisko współpracujemy również z innymi toruńskimi klubami m.in. Gwiazdą Toruń i Gryfem Toruń.

Naszym partnerom biznesowym oferujemy szereg korzyści – profesjonalną obsługę marketingową prowadzoną w celu budowania pozytywnego wizerunku, dotarcie z propozycją oferty do ściśle określonej grupy docelowej, budowanie rozpoznawalności firmy w określonym regionie. Dzięki indywidualnemu podejściu i kampaniom marketingowym dostosowanym do potrzeb firmy maksymalizujemy efekt zwrotu ze środków przeznaczonych na sponsoring. 

Serdecznie zapraszamy do dołączenia do naszej społeczności!

Name: Rugby Club Huesitos La Vila
Description:
Bienvenido al perfil oficial del Club de Rugby Huesitos La Vila, un emblemático equipo con más de cuatro décadas de historia arraigada en la ciudad de Villajoyosa. Fundado en 1983 por un grupo de apasionados jugadores vileros, hemos cultivado un legado de dedicación al rugby y al desarrollo deportivo en nuestra comunidad.

Desde nuestros inicios en el campo de Calsita hasta la creación del majestuoso Estadio de Rugby de Villajoyosa “El Pantano”, hemos atravesado un viaje de crecimiento continuo. Nos enorgullecemos de haber establecido una sólida escuela de rugby que ha nutrido el talento de jóvenes de diferentes colegios locales, forjando la base de nuestro equipo juvenil y senior.

A lo largo de los años, hemos alcanzado logros significativos, desde el reconocimiento como Mejor Club Deportivo Provincial hasta el histórico ascenso a la División de Honor A, siendo campeones en la temporada 2010-2011, sumado con la Supercopa y la participación en la Amlin Cup Europa, hitos que siguen siendo parte de nuestra identidad y legado. 

En la actualidad, no solo nos centramos en el éxito competitivo, sino que también nos enorgullece cultivar un equipo inclusivo que celebra la diversidad y fomenta la participación de personas de diversas habilidades y capacidades, fortaleciendo nuestros valores y respeto en la comunidad.

Nuestra pasión por el rugby se refleja en la organización de una amplia variedad de eventos deportivos, desde torneos locales hasta encuentros internacionales, donde la camaradería y la pasión por el deporte brillan en cada competición.

En el CR Huesitos La Vila, la responsabilidad social es un pilar fundamental de nuestra filosofía. Nos comprometemos activamente con la comunidad, impulsando iniciativas que generan un impacto positivo en la sociedad.

Únete a nosotros en este emocionante viaje donde el rugby es más que un deporte, es una forma de vida. 

Acompáñanos en nuestra misión de promover el espíritu deportivo y el compromiso con nuestra comunidad!

Name: NK Rudeš
Description:
NK Rudeš hrvatski je nogometni klub iz naselja Rudeš u Zagrebu. U sezoni 2024./25. natječe se u Prvoj NL.

Ranih pedesetih godina 20. stoljeća, na livadi Celini u Rudešu se počeo igrati nogomet. Celinom se zvala livada na kojoj se danas nalazi ambulanta. Upravo s tog mjesta kasnije će na stadione diljem Hrvatske i Europe krenuti nove generacije zagrebačkih nogometaša.

Prema pričanju Ivana Šanteka (Hajbe) u Rudešu je cijela povijest oko nogometa započela na Celini pedesetih godina. Nekolicina dječaka okupljenih na Celini napravila je običnu „krpenjaču“. Krpenjača je stari izraz za loptu napravljenu od najjednostavnijih krpa. Nedugo zatim nastala je prava pomama za tim neobičnim predmetom koji će se s vremenom razviti u najvažniji sporedni predmet na svijetu. Zbog svoje aktivnosti oko okupljanja nogometnog tima, treba spomenuti da su novopečeni nogometaši nerijetko bili, zbog svog pridrživanja veseloj družini „špotani“ od svojih roditelja. Bilo je zaista dosta talentiranih momaka, što će konačno i njihovi životni putovi potvrditi. Spomenuti treba stare Rudeške legende kao što su Ivan Šantek mlađi (kojemu je u tadašnje vrijeme nadjenut epitet „zvijezde zagrebačkog nogometa“), te Ivan Šantek stariji (nadaleko poznati Hajba kojemu je karijera obilježena golovima zagrebačkim suparnicima kao što su HAŠK, Zagreb) koji se poslije prihvatio trenerskog posla (prvi školovani nogometni trener iz Rudeša). Hajba je imao i vrlo važnu ulogu pri osnivanju NK Rudeša 1957. godine.

Kvart Rudeš dao je dosta nogometaša i nekolicinu učitelja nogometa govoreći o ulozi koju je nogomet u Rudešu imao, a i danas ga ima u zagrebačkom sportskom životu. Adresa nogometnog kluba Rudeš je Rudeška cesta 25, 10000 Zagreb.

Klub je igrao u 1. HNL od sezone 2016./17., pa sve do 2018./19. kada se nakon posljednjeg mjesta u prvenstvu vraća u 2. HNL. To natjecanje koje se od sezone 2022./23. zove 1. NL, Rudeš je osvojio te sezone te je time ostvario plasman u HNL (novi naziv za 1. HNL) za iduću sezonu.

Our goal is to build a vibrant global community where skiers of all backgrounds can come together. 

Whether you’re carving down black runs or taking your first steps on the snow, we’re here to guide and support you every step of your journey in this exhilarating sport.

Name: v.v. Broekster Boys
Description:

Voetbalvereniging Broekster Boys is een dorpenclub met een rijke en diverse historie. Sinds 1956 wordt op de grens tussen de dorpen Damwâld en Broeksterwâld voetbal gespeeld. Vanaf de jaren '60 tot en met de jaren '90 van de vorige eeuw maakte de club een roerige fase van "opgaan, blinken en verzinken" door, waarbij de club in de jaren '80 en '90 enkele jaren op het hoogste niveau van het zaterdag-amateurvoetbal wist te spelen. 

Anno nu biedt de club niet alleen nog altijd prestatiegericht en recreatief veldvoetbal aan, maar heeft "de Broek" ook een voor de regio aanzienlijke zaalvoetbaltak en wordt vanuit de SJO Broekster-Wâlden jeugdvoetbal, vrouwenvoetbal, seniorenvoetbal en G-voetbal aangeboden.

Name: Sør Cup - Fotballfestivalen på Sørlandet
Description:
Sør Cup – Fotballfestivalen på Sørlandet

Sør Cup er en breddeturnering i fotball for gutter og jenter mellom 6-19 år. 

I 2022 deltok 574 lag og over 7.500 deltakere. Sør Cup eies av klubbene Fløy, Vindbjart og Donn. 

Vår filosofi er å gi våre deltakere Norges beste cupopplevelse – både på og utenfor banen. Det er en filosofi som vi tar veldig seriøst, og som vi jobber hardt for å oppfylle. Kvalitet skal gjenspeiles i alt vi gjør, alt fra informasjonsbrosjyre til evalueringsskjema etter endt turnering.

Evalueringene våre viser årlig at så mange som 98% av de som har svart, sier at de kunne tenke seg å anbefale Sør Cup til andre. I tillegg opplyser mange at det de liker mest er hvordan de blir møtt på av våre 1.500 dugnadsarbeidere og funksjonærer.

Det gjør oss som arrangører av Sør Cup selvsagt uhyre stolte, men det er ingen garanti for at vi får det samme resultatet året etter. Derfor har vi hele tiden fokus på å bli bedre, slik at våre deltakere får en fantastisk opplevelse i Kristiansand og Vennesla – år etter år.

Name: FC Kalmar
Description:
Futsal Club Kalmar grundades 2017 med visionen att bli Sveriges främsta futsalklubb.

Redan 2018 blev klubben Smålandsmästare, vilket var en stor bedrift och satte föreningen på futsalkartan i regionen. Året därpå kvalificerade sig FC Kalmar till Division 1, vilket blev startskottet för futsalens starka utveckling i Kalmar.

Under säsongen 2021/2022 nådde herrlaget en imponerande andraplats i Division 1 och noterade dessutom det högsta publiksnittet i hela svensk futsal med omkring 600 åskådare per match. Året därpå, 2022, vann FC Kalmar Division 1 och kvalificerade sig för Svenska Futsalligan (SFL) efter två starka kvalmatcher – däribland en seger mot Djurgårdens IF.

I debutsäsongen i SFL slutade laget på sjunde plats och säkrade en plats i slutspelet. Föreningen hade dessutom fem TV-sända matcher via Discovery+/Eurosport – något mycket ovanligt för en nykomling. Under säsongen 2023/2024 hade FC Kalmar näst bäst publiksnitt i Sverige och fick beröm från både ligachefer och experter för sina arrangemang. Laget nådde kvartsfinal efter två jämna matcher och fortsatte etablera sig som en publikfavorit.

Den positiva utvecklingen fortsatte under säsongen 2024/2025, då FC Kalmar tog sig hela vägen till final i Svenska Futsalligan. Efter en förlust på hemmaplan i den första finalen reste sig laget och vann bortamatchen, vilket ledde till en avgörande tredje match i Kalmar. Där fick laget till slut se sig besegrat – men avslutade säsongen som stolta silvermedaljörer, efter klubbens mest framgångsrika säsong hittills.

Mycket av föreningens framgång har inte bara handlat om resultaten på planen, utan också om helhetsupplevelsen kring matcherna. FC Kalmar har gjort sig kända för att skapa underhållande evenemang som lockar barnfamiljer, ungdomar, företagare och äldre. Futsalens fartfyllda karaktär, kombinerad med klubbens fokus på publikupplevelsen, har gjort att evenemangen blivit mycket uppskattade.

Name: Grand Angoulême Athlétisme
Description:
Le Grand Angoulême Athlétisme a été fondé en 2006 suite à la fusion du Sporting Club d'Angoulême, la Jeunesse Sportive d'Angoulême et le Club Sportif de Ruelle.

Le "G2A" a gravit les échelons, de la Nationale 2 à sa création, jusqu'à la promotion en 2023 en Nationale 1 A, le troisième échelon français. 

Nous comptons actuellement près de 900 licenciés représentants fièrement les couleurs du club, mais aussi de la Charente.

Nous souhaitons continuer à développer notre école d'athlétisme
    - Continuer à accueillir des enfants dès Eveil Athlé, avec près de 300 jeunes dans notre école
    - Continuer de former des jeunes vers le haut-niveau, après 15 participants aux France-jeunes en 2022
    - Continuer d'intégrer ces jeunes aux championnats de France Interclubs, la vitrine collective.
    - Continuer d'être une vitrine du sport dans le Grand Angoulême et la Charente

Mais le grand Angoulême c'est également :
    - Une section remise en forme
    - Plusieurs groupes de running
    - Une section marche nordique
    - Les foulées du G2A, un des 10 kilomètres les plus réputés en France, avec près de 3000 participants en 2023
    - Le meeting du G2A, un meeting national, qui se tient le 2 juin 2023

Nous remercions les nombreux bénévoles qui œuvrent au quotidien et qui donnent de leur temps pour nous aider à grandir

Name: TSC Eintracht Dortmund
Description:
Mit 7.000 Mitgliedern in insgesamt 35 Abteilungen und Fachbereichen repräsentiert der TSC Eintracht Dortmund den größten Sportverein an aktiven Mitgliedern in Westfalen. Mit über 170-Jahren bewegter Vereinsgeschichte ist er zudem Dortmunds ältester Sportverein. 
Das Vereinsprogramm umfasst über 100 Sport- und Bewegungsangebote und reicht  vom Freizeit- über Breitensport bis hin zum Leistungssport. Ob einzeln oder in der Gemeinschaft, Jung oder Alt, der TSC bietet seinen Mitgliedern einen lebendigen Ort für sportliche Leistung, Spaß und Wohlbefinden.
Der Verein unterhält vereinseigene Sportstätten mit moderner Ausstattung. Das TSC Sportzentrum an der Victor-Toyka-Straße verfügt über zwei Dreifachhallen, fünf Gymnastikhallen, eine Kunstrasenanlage (drei Einzelplätze) und einen Streetball-Platz. Seit August 2017 umfasst das Gelände außerdem eine moderne Multi-Außensportanlage mit 1 Kunstrasen-Großfeld für Hockey & Lacrosse, 1 Kunstrasen-Kleinfeld für Hockey, 2 Beachvolleyballplätze, 1 Outdoor-Fitnesspark, Leichtathletiklaufbahn, Doppelweitsprunganlage, Kugelstoßanlage und Finnenlaufbahn. Die ganztägige Nutzung garantiert eine neue LED-Flutlichtanlage.  

Der TSC finanziert sich hauptsächlich aus Mitgliedsbeiträgen; zusätzliche Einnahmen fließen aus Mieteinnahmen, Zuschüssen, Spenden und Sponsoring. 

Ziel des TSC Eintracht Dortmund ist es, ein besonders umfangreiches und qualitativ hochwertiges Sportangebot für alle Generationen im Großraum Dortmund anzubieten.
Im TSC Eintracht sind heute über 300 Übungsleiter, über 150 gewählte Ehrenamtliche und viele weitere freiwillige Helfer aktiv. Mit etwa 40 hauptamtlichen Mitarbeitern gehört der Verein außerdem zu den größten regionalen Arbeitgebern im Sportsektor. Sie alle bilden das Fundament für eine erfolgreiche Vereinsarbeit.  Seit 2003 führt Dr. Alexander Kiel die Geschäfte des Vereins (seit 2012 als hauptamtlicher Vorstandsvorsitzender).

Name: AFC Solihull CIC
Description:
Welcome to AFC Solihull.

AFC Solihull were founded in 2012 by David Tyler with a community youth under 10’s team that started playing in the Central Warwickshire Youth Football League. That year this fledgling side became League champions of their division, and our ‘Inform-Involve-Inspire’ club philosophy was born. The club has competed in the Midlands Football League Division 3 since 2015 when the club merged with a men’s team playing in the Stratford Alliance League.

AFC Solihull are members of the Midland Football League, current Division 3 Champions playing in Division 2 for the 2024/25 season.

We are an FA Accredited Club, based in Solihull in the heart of the West Midlands.

AFC Solihull are a community football club with strong belief's that if we can get the local Business community to support us we can continue to grow and gain promotions through the leagues. 

If you are interested in any sponsorship opportunities please contact us on afcscommercial@gmail.com or via our social media pages. 

Admission is £4.00 for Adults and £2.00 for Concessions (Under 16’s and Over 65’s) – payable at the gate by card or cash.

We have a fully licensed clubhouse onsite where hot and cold drinks and food can be purchased – card or cash accepted.

There is ample free parking on site.

Come on Solihull!!!!

Name: Cool Down - The Sport for Climate Action Network
Description:
Cool Down is the Sport for Climate Action Network, working to ensure the sporting community leads the way on a rapid and fair climate transition. The power of sport gives it a responsibility to lead by example, protect its fans, and safeguard its future and the future of all that love it.

We believe that sport and the climate emergency are inseparable, and work with partners to: 

- Challenge high-carbon sponsorships and advertising deals, as well as the broader co-option of sport by major polluters (also known as sportswashing) 
- Raise awareness of how climate change is impacting sport and threatening its future
- Draw attention to the environmental impact of elite competitions and the continued lack of action and ambition
- Champion figures speaking out on climate change and the threat it poses to sport
- Provide a platform for sportspeople from the grassroots to the elite and equip them with the tools to speak out effectively

Name: Club Atletico Kin
Description:
Somos un equipo profesional de fútbol que utiliza la pasión por el deporte, la innovación tecnológica y la educación para crear un cambio positivo. 

Nuestro propósito es empoderar a los jóvenes atletas y fortalecer a las comunidades a través del fútbol, la educación y la innovación. En Ecuador, donde el desarrollo de jugadores y las comunidades rurales a menudo son marginados, trabajamos para romper el ciclo de la desigualdad. Combinando deporte con oportunidades de crecimiento personal, acceso a la tecnología y soluciones innovadoras como el análisis de datos, buscamos inspirar resiliencia, desbloquear el potencial y crear un futuro más brillante y equitativo para todos.

Visión:

Queremos convertirnos en un ejemplo global de cómo el fútbol, el análisis de datos y la tecnología pueden transformar vidas y comunidades. Aspiramos a ser un referente en innovación y cambio social, utilizando el fútbol como plataforma para inspirar, generar impacto duradero y demostrar que la dedicación y el trabajo bien hecho pueden marcar una diferencia significativa en el mundo.

Misión:

Empoderar a jóvenes atletas y transformar comunidades en Cotopaxi, Pastocalle y Ecuador a través del fútbol, la educación y la innovación. Proporcionamos un entorno seguro, formación integral, oportunidades de crecimiento y acceso a tecnología avanzada y análisis de datos, fomentando la resiliencia, el talento y un impacto sostenible tanto dentro como fuera del campo.

Somos un Club Innovador:

Combinamos fútbol y tecnología, análisis de datos e inteligencia artificial para optimizar estrategias y crear soluciones de impacto que mejoren el rendimiento del equipo y de los jugadores. 

Nos enfocamos en el desarrollo integral de nuestros jugadores y nuestra comunidad. A través del fútbol y nuestros programas de educación especializada en análisis de datos e IA queremos crear un futuro más brillante y lleno de oportunidades para todos los que nos rodean.

Name: Motor Racing Club
Description:
Qui sommes-nous ?
Le Motor Racing Club (MRC) a été créé en janvier 2016 par un groupe de passionnés issus du giron du sport automobile. Ayant connu des débuts modestes, le club est aujourd'hui l'un des plus reconnus dans l'univers du sport mécanique mauricien grâce à sa rigueur, le sérieux de ses membres et de son équipe dirigeante. Le MRC est reconnu par Registrar of Associations ainsi que le Ministère de la Jeunesse et des Sports.

Notre mission?
Nous avons pour but de former une nouvelle génération de pilotes et de proposer pour tous les mordus de sport automobile, une plateforme professionnelle et abordable pour pratiquer leur passion en toute sécurité.

Notre discipline phare; Le Rallye!
Le rallye est une discipline de sport automobile pratiquée sur des routes fermées au public. Les épreuves se déroulent sur plusieurs étapes (parfois courues de nuit), avec une succession d'épreuves allant d'un point à un autre. Les épreuves chronométrées sont appelées épreuves spéciales, les parties non chronométrées avant pour appellation étapes de liaison. Nous organisons aussi des slaloms où les non-initiés peuvent pratiquer le sport automobile dans leur voiture de tous les jours. Pour des besoins de sécurité, nous nous assurons que toutes les voitures qui y participent subissent une vérification technique simple mais complète. Nous étageons le slalom comme un mini-rallye afin de préparer les pilotes à faire le pas vers notre discipline reine.

Name: Lëtzebuerg Rugby
Description:
Histoire des principaux clubs de rugby luxembourgeois:

Le Rugby Club Luxembourg (RCL) a été introduit au Luxembourg en mai 1973 par un groupe d’expatriés travaillant au Grand Duché. Plusieurs des membres-fondateurs y résident encore, et contribuent d’une manière ou d’autre au sport. Aujourd’hui le RCL, après un passage en France et en Belgique, joue en Allemagne. Le RCL a brillamment terminé dans le trio de tête des équipes de deuxième division Allemande en 2010-11. La montée en première division s’est avérée plus difficile. L’avenir du RCL s’inscrit dans une école de rugby très performante.

Le Rugby Club Walferdange (De Renert Walferdange) a été lancé en 1990. Après des années difficiles dans le championnat belge, De Renert a fini la saison 2002/03 champion de Belgique de 3ème division. Le club prépare l’avenir en étoffant son école de rugby.

Le Cercle Sportif des Communautés Européennes (CSCE) Rugby Luxembourg s’occupe principalement d’une école de rugby et de catégories U18 et U16, avec plus de deux cents enfants inscrits. L’école a connu de belles saisons surtout au niveau des U17 et U19 qui ont participé aux championnats du monde 98 – vainqueur du groupe D devant la Suisse et 99 au Pays de Galles, puis aux Championnats d’Europe des U18 sans discontinuité depuis 2000, améliorant chaque année son classement européen.

Histoire des sélections nationales Luxembourgeoises:

Le Luxembourg est membre de la FIRA (Fédération internationale de rugby amateur) depuis 1976, deux ans après la naissance de la Fédération Luxembourgeoise de Rugby. Notre Fédération a fêté ses 40 ans en 2014. Le Grand-duché a participé dans plusieurs championnats FIRA, et malgré sa taille a accompli des résultats honorables. Luxembourg est également membre de l’IRB (International Rugby Board) depuis 1991.

Le Luxembourg Rugby est la seule sélection nationale de sports collectifs a avoir gagné trois fois une poule en championnat d’Europe des nations. Notre équipe nationale participe aujourd’hui

Name: Play it On - au
Description:
Play it On is a not for profit social enterprise that receives unwanted new and used sports gear and sports clothing.  The profits from sales assist kids from struggling families to pay for their sporting club fees.

Theresa Brown, the Founder was concerned about the number of kids that miss out on playing organised sport because their families can’t afford it. In some areas around half the number of kids play compared to others. I found this out while working at Playford Council managing the grants program where I was unable to assist many struggling families who just wanted to see their kids happy playing the sport of their choice. 

That was 5 years ago and since then she has left the Council but couldn’t stop thinking about it especially knowing how much sport means for her own children. We know that organised sport is great for kids health and social skills and some recent research found that for 10-12 year olds playing sport can improve mental health and reduce suicide in teenagers.

Play it On collects unwanted gear through collection boxes at businesses, recreation centres, sporting clubs and libraries. Contact us if you would like to be a donation point.

We sell at markets, online and pop up stores and look forward to opening our first shop in 2019.

Name: Accra Majestics Sports Academy
Description:
Accra Majestics Sports Academy (AMSA) is a volunteer-driven youth multi sports community based in Accra, Ghana. We use the power of sports to empower the next generation especially youth from underserved communities with purpose, discipline and opportunity.

Our Story
Founded on 10th July 2021 by Rachel Ankomah and Khalil Njoya, AMSA began as a rugby league club with a bold vision: to create a platform where young athletes could thrive. In October 2023, we rebranded into a full-fledged multi-sport academy, expanding our mission to support youth across various disciplines.

We offer access to organized sports, life skills training, and mentorship for children and youth of all ages and skill levels. 
What sets us apart? We operate entirely on volunteer effort, with no paid staff, no permanent facility and no major sponsorship. What fuels us is passion, resilience and a relentless drive to make a difference.

We are committed to using sport as a tool to promote:
   •    Discipline
   •    Leadership
   •    Community Transformation
   •    Personal Growth

We believe that every child deserves a chance to succeed, on and off the field.

Why We Exist
In communities where opportunities are limited, AMSA stands as a beacon of hope and excellence. Our programs are more than training sessions; they are stepping stones to brighter futures. We are building more than athletes; we are building leaders.

At Accra Majestics Sports Academy, we don’t just play games. We build futures, inspire change and create a legacy that redefines the future of sports in Ghana and beyond.
Together, we rise. Together, we lead.

Mission
At Accra Majestics, our mission is to nurture talent, build character and transform lives through sports. 

Vision
We aspire to be the global benchmark for sports excellence, innovation and community impact. 

Core Values 
Teamwork
Discipline 
Passion
Inclusivity 
Justice & Honour

Name: Rugby Olympic Club de Bruz
Description:
Fondé en 1973, le ROC de Bruz, près de la ville de Rennes, compte aujourd'hui plus de 300 licenciés et officialise une montée en Fédérale 3 depuis 2022. Club de rugby engagé dans la région d'Ille-et-vilaine, c'est 50 ans d'existence, de benevolat et de combativité qui font de lui aujourd'hui le 3eme club de la région et le 7eme de Bretagne.

Portant fièrement les valeurs universelles du rugby, le ROC de Bruz s'applique chaque jour à faire respecter intégrité, passion, solidarité, discipline et respect.

En bientôt 50ans, le ROC Bruzois a construit une équipe solide, avec un parcours fort et impliqué :

2005 - L'équipe devient Championne de Bretagne et se retrouve en promotion d'honneur
2007 - Le ROC obtient la labellisation FFR de son École de Rugby 
2016 - L'équipe remporte le championnat de Rugby à 7
2022 - Le club monte en fédérale 3 et s'inscrit dans une nouvelle catégorie sportive de niveau

Le développement du club s'inscrit dans un réel engagement passionné et compte les sections sportives suivantes :
- L’équipe des vétérans
- L’équipe séniors 
- Le pôle jeune
- L’école de rugby
- L’équipe mixte en rugby touche
- L’équipe feminine
- Les baby rugby (à partir de 3ans)

Egalement parrain de l’association Mathi, le ROC se bat aux cotés des jeunes autistes de la région dans leur volonté d’intégration sur le chemin de l’insertion professionnelle.

Avec à son actif plus de 300 licenciés cette année et plus de 50 bénévoles actifs, le ROC de Bruz continue son ascension de manière fulgurante.

À VOUS D’ENTRER DANS LA MÊLÉE !

Name: SCOTT-SRAM MTB Racing Team
Description:
The SCOTT-SRAM MTB Racing Team (former SWISSPOWER) has a long, successful history in mountain bike racing. It all started in 2002, when Thomas Frischknecht became the face of SCOTT’s racing program to start the SWISSPOWER team together with former national coach Andi Seeli. The team’s philosophy is built around developing young, talented riders from Switzerland such as Florian Vogel, and from 2003 – present, Nino Schurter. By bringing these riders into a professional structure and providing them with both opportunity and support, the SCOTT-SRAM MTB Racing Team is the definition of a success story - one which continues today, having created National-, World Cup-, World- and Olympic Champions over the years. 

While Olympic and World Champion Nino Schurter takes the role of a leader, Team Manager Thomas Frischknecht runs the most successful Cross-Country team on the World Cup circuit with a lot of experience. Completing the 2025 roster, the 2024 Swiss champion Filippo Colombo will compete alongside new team members such as the 2024 US National Champion Bjorn Riley and Emilly Johnston, with Andri Frischknecht (member of the team since over 10 years), rounding out the most successful team in XC MTB racing.

Name: Stella Azzurra Basketball Academy
Description: The Stella Azzura Basketball Academy recruits and accomodates national and foreign athletes that are willing to undergo an all-round program. Only people that aspire to compete at the highest level in life and in basketball participate. Sports culture, knowing how to win and how to lose, working hard every day and wanting to compete: these are the fundamental values of the Academy. Once that the athlete has been deemed to be ready to begin a professional carrier as an athlete or for as a professional managing in any part of the world, they will become a flagship for a new generation of academy players. The “champions” that participate at the program will prove that the methods used by the Academy are successful, training in the body and the mind, following precise moral values and enjoying the success on the court and outside, with the unequivocal brand of the Stellazzurra. “Working with young athletes, Italian or foreign, giving them the possibility to stand out, and fullfill their desires is a commitment that is worth to undertake and promote. The Academy, I am convinced, will be an instrument to diffuse those values that are hard to transfer today. It’s important that sports and knowledge merge and work together, as it is also important that young athletes grow up with a sport and ethic culture that will give them the opportunity to be successful in their everyday life, in whatever area they will decide to work. Hard work, team spirit, respect of their opponents, the will to study and practice hard, and the will to improve every day: in my opinion this is what the Academy means.” (Cit. Valerio Bianchini, 3 Seria A Titles as Head Coach)

Name: A.R. Monex Pro Cycling Team
Description:
Somos el equipo de ciclismo mexicano compitiendo en Europa. 

A.R. Monex Pro Cycling Team es mucho más que un conjunto de ciclistas compitiendo en carreras; somos una fuerza impulsora que busca llevar el nombre de México a nuevas alturas en el mundo del ciclismo profesional, con determinación, pasión y un espíritu indomable de superación.  Con un enfoque claro en el desarrollo y proyección de los ciclistas mexicanos, nuestro equipo trabaja incansablemente para cumplir una serie de objetivos ambiciosos que trascienden las fronteras deportivas.

En el corto plazo, nuestro objetivo es impulsar a nuestros talentosos ciclistas mexicanos hacia la élite del ciclismo mundial. A través de una preparación meticulosa, la superación de obstáculos y un compromiso inquebrantable, buscamos no solo destacar en competiciones de alto nivel, sino también posicionar a nuestros atletas en equipos World Tour(1ra división).

A medida que avanzamos hacia el futuro, nuestra visión se amplía hacia metas a mediano plazo, donde buscamos consolidarnos como un equipo Pro Tour(2da división). 

Sin embargo, nuestra ambición no se detiene ahí. Nuestro objetivo a largo plazo es elevarnos al estatus de un equipo World Tour, convirtiéndonos en el primer equipo mexicano en la máxima categoría del ciclismo. Con un compromiso inquebrantable hacia la excelencia y la mejora continua, trabajamos incansablemente para fortalecer nuestra estructura interna y forjar una presencia sólida en el escenario internacional del ciclismo.

Name: Frederiksberg Idræt (FIU)
Description:
Frederiksberg Idræt er en medlemsorganisation for Frederiksbergs idrætsforeninger. Med 59 idrætsforeninger i ryggen, der samlet repræsenterer ca. 23.000 medlemmer, arbejder Frederiksberg Idræt i tæt samarbejde med Frederiksberg Kommune og Frederiksbergs idrætsforeninger for kontinuerligt at udvikle, optimere og styrke idrættens vilkår på Frederiksberg og skabe de bedst mulige rammer for idrætsforeningerne og deres brugere. 

Vision
Vi ønsker på Frederiksberg at gøre en positiv forskel og være anerkendt for at skabe landets bedste vilkår for idrættens udvikling. Det gør vi først og fremmest gennem vores værdier og involvering af vores medlemmer.

Værdier
Vi kommunikerer tydeligt med vores omgivelser. Vi udvikler ved, at vi tør gå nye veje. Stabilitet forøges ved at udvikle og optimere drift og driftsorganisation. Vi tror på, at forskellighed er en styrke. Det er afgørende, at vi alle kan udvikle og bruge vores viden.

Haller og idrætsanlæg
Udover at varetage Frederiksberg idrætsforeningers interesser, så ejer og drifter Frederiksberg Idræt også en række haller og idrætsanlæg på Frederiksberg, hvorved vi også administrerer tildelingen af tider til idrætsforeningerne.

Du er altid velkommen til at kontakte os, hvis du har spørgsmål – store og små – omkring idræt og motion på Frederiksberg.

Description:
Our team of highly trained and experienced mental performance coaches focuses on the individual behind the athlete, harnessing their inner personality to cultivate a performance mindset that provides a competitive edge during training or game time. Utilising psychometric analysis, we help athletes understand themselves, pinpointing areas for support, and developing tools for them to use in training and competition.

We work with a wide range of athletes from diverse sporting backgrounds, supporting them in various environments:

Professional Clubs:

Partner with elite sports teams, working with specific individuals, small groups, and whole teams to support teamwork, cohesion, and group performance.
Offer fractional partnership contracts, providing set hours per week or month.
Work with both professional and semi-professional clubs, including women's teams.

Individual Athletes:

1-2-1 sessions supporting individual clients with their mental sports performance and mindset.
Sessions take place face to face or virtually.
Ongoing support packages for individuals of all levels.
All sports, professionals, and elite amateurs.
Junior elite athletes.
Schools and Academies:

Offer 1-2-1 and small group work for elite junior athletes, providing both pastoral support and performance coaching.
Fractional partnership contracts allow for set hours per week or month.
Support scholarship athletes and elite sport programmes within school settings.
Option to deliver workshops and seminars to parents and wider staff groups.

Regional County Squads:

Collaborate with teams and squads from county, regional, and national setups.
Support individuals, small groups, and whole teams to promote teamwork, cohesion, and group performance.
Services extend to county, regional, and national teams, including youth and women's teams.

Offer fractional partnership contracts, providing set hours per week or month.

Name: Arnhem Eagles Basketbalvereniging
Description:
Dé basketbalvereniging van Arnhem sinds 1969. 

Arnhem Eagles is lid van de Nederlandse Basketbalbond en speelt op zowel breedtesport- als (amateur)topsportniveau in de regiodivisies, maar ook in de landelijke competities. Er is binnen onze vereniging al kabouterbasketbal vanaf 6 jaar, waarna je uiteindelijk kan doorstromen via alle verschillende leeftijdscategorieën naar een seniorenteam. Daarna is er zelfs ook walking basketbal voor de oudere doelgroep! Iedereen is bij ons welkom!

Onze thuishaven is de gehele week sporthal MFC De Omnibus in de wijk Schuytgraaf, Arnhem Zuid. Daarnaast trainen wij in de sporthal van het Lorentz Lyceum op loopafstand van onze wedstrijdhal. De wedstrijden in MFC De Omnibus kunnen plaatsvinden op vrijdag, zaterdag en zondag. 

Vanuit Arnhem Eagles is er de afgelopen jaren een nieuwe lijn ingezet waarbij gezelligheid, clubgevoel en het spelen op niveau vanuit eigen kracht belangrijke punten zijn. We bouwen langzaam uit om daarbij niet het gezicht van de vereniging te verliezen. Onze missie is dat iedereen met veel plezier basketbalt en dat we diegenen die meer willen die uitdaging ook kunnen bieden. 

Onze vereniging draait aan de hand van gemotiveerde en gepassioneerde vrijwilligers. Wil jij een bijdrage leveren aan onze mooie club of wil je weten of basketballen iets voor jou is? Neem dan contact met ons op en wij gaan graag het gesprek aan! (Info@arnhemeagles.nl)

Youtube: @ArnhemEaglesLive

Name: Wellington Rugby Referees Association
Description:
We hope that you are interested in Rugby Refereeing and in particular in Wellington. Refereeing rugby is a very rewarding way to be involved in the game regardless of your age and experience. We are seeking anyone interested in refereeing and we will help you to learn about the art of rugby refereeing and to develop to any level that aspire to.

We have referees as young as 13 who aspire to be World Rugby Test Referees and at the other end of the scale referees who are collecting the pension who turn out each week to referee a social grade of rugby.

Every weekend we have about 100 referees available to us to referee about 90 games of rugby. We endeavour to cover all Secondary Schools rugby and WRFU grades of rugby. However this year every week there are no referees for Presidents grade and for some Reserve grade referees.

The Wellington Rugby Referees Association operates pretty much as a club under the WRFU and our members pay a nominal sub to belong. All financial members are provided with full refereeing kit and access to the many coaching resources that the association have. All new referees are grouped together and are allocated games according to their ability. Beyond the first year, referees are then graded in to different levels where at the top a panel of around 10 to 15 Level 1 referees referee Premier rugby in Wellington.

Wellington currently have 1 referee on the NZ Rugby National panel (Mike Fraser) with Mike being a full time professional. There are many opportunities for referees with all of these referees having been groomed through the ranks which includes local development panels and Hurricanes Referees Squad. Within our local association there are opportunities to referee in many of the other associations within New Zealand and also opportunities overseas.

So there are many opportunities to enjoy refereeing here in Wellington. If you want to have a look further then please ring David Walsh on 0800 73337

Solidarité, Travail et Performance sont les principales valeurs qui animent le projet. Mutualiser pour performer et ramener ainsi le plus de médailles possibles lors des prochains JOP. Les Jeux Olympiques de Paris seront simplement le plus gros événement jamais organisé en France. Cela représente une chance incroyable pour les sports équestres toujours générateurs d'émotions et de médailles de pouvoir toucher une communauté de passionnés encore plus large. Ensemble vers 2024 se positionne donc comme un groupement précurseur et inclusif qui va faire bouger les choses et véhiculer des messages aussi simples que forts.

Name: Eagleclaw Analytics
Description:
We’re a group of former players and current coaches who started Eagleclaw Analytics in 2021 after helping guide our own players through the recruiting chaos of the COVID shutdown. Recruiting has always been challenging—but when everything stopped, it became clear how broken and outdated the process really was.

Families were making major decisions based on secondhand stories like, “That coach doesn’t recruit high school players,” or “Jimmy committed there, and he was really good.” There was no central source of verified, independent information—and too much guesswork for something so important.

With backgrounds in economics, data analysis, and college baseball, we built a solution. Our first tool let players compare their throwing velocity, exit velo, pop time, and more to real current and former college commits—just like students compare GPA or ACT scores to school averages. That tool took off fast.

From there, we created College Prospector, a comprehensive college fit database that helps players find schools that match their game—without compromising academics, cost, or campus fit.

Then the recruiting world changed again: the transfer portal, NIL, eligibility extensions, and shifting roster strategies. So we launched the College Player Tracker—a system tracking over 100,000 players across college baseball and softball. We monitor game performance, transfer movement, and roster trends to help prospects target real opportunities.

Today, Eagleclaw pairs that unmatched data with experienced recruiting advisors to offer the most complete and focused service available. We don’t believe in chasing offers. We believe in finding programs where you can compete, grow, and graduate—with clarity, not guesswork.

Name: Urban Rec Australia
Description:
Urban Rec is the new way of playing sport. We are here to provide our members with the best ever sports and recreation club; you can experience league nights, end of season parties, charity runs, and weekend adventures. There is only one goal in mind, and that is to be active, be social, and have some fun.

We are a sports club, but what makes us different? We play sports on week nights, we don't steal your weekends for training, and we don't take ourselves or the games too seriously. For us, it is really all about FUN and the social aspects of playing sport, get out there, be healthy, meet some people, and have a great time doing it. Simple.

You will not only be rated on your skill, but also awarded 'Fun Points' by your opposition for how sportsmanlike and fun you were to play. Rec points will also be coming your way if you elect to be a social bunch after the games.

Name: HSC'21
Description:
HSC’21, opgericht 21 juni 1921, is in de loop der jaren uitgegroeid tot één van de grootste voetbalverenigingen uit de regio. Dat gebeurt natuurlijk niet vanzelf. De fantastische ligging van de club in het natuurgebied Scholtenhagen te Haaksbergen, de prima accommodatie maar ook de gezellige sfeer binnen de club hebben hier aan bijgedragen.
Het allerbelangrijkste voor de ontwikkeling van de club zijn echter de sportieve prestaties van de vereniging. Zo speelt het eerste elftal al bijna 30 jaar in de allerhoogste klasse van het amateurvoetbal. Vanaf het seizoen 2016 / 2017 speelt het eerste elftal in de nieuw gevormde 3e divisie. Naast zes afdelingstitels heeft dit ook geleid tot twee titels bij de zondagamateurs. Voorlopig hoogtepunt is het algemeen kampioenschap van Nederland bij de amateurs in 1999.

Om ook in de toekomst verzekerd te zijn van succes, besteedt HSC’21 veel aandacht aan de jeugd. Een actief jeugdbeleid op het gebied van begeleiding, training en coördinatie moet er voor zorgen dat de club tot in lengte van jaren aan de top blijft. Ook buiten de lijnen is HSC’21 bezig zich prominent te manifesteren.  Dit doen we door een actief sponsorbeleid te voeren dat uiteindelijk heeft geleid tot een plek in de top van het amateurvoetbal

Kortom HSC’21 is een actieve dynamische vereniging waar prestaties worden gewaardeerd en scoren de normaalste zaak van de wereld is.

Daar wil iedereen toch graag bijhoren!

Name: SP Collectives
Description:
What is SP Collectives:

SP Collectives is a South African founded sports agency build by sports professionals, sports graduates and volunteers working collectively to promote sports participation and create employment opportunities in the sports industry in South Africa. 

What does SP Collectives do:
The SP Collectives sports agency develops, creates and implements sports programs and resources to enable sports participation. We offer sport-specialised services to professional sports clubs, community sports teams and school sports teams. These include, but are not limited to-   
• Sports management, 
• Sports consulting,
• Sports administration, 
• Sports development and
• Sports marketing services. 

We take pride in recruiting and up skilling graduates, coaches, and volunteers in the sports industry looking to gain experience and complement their education with practical on and off the field skills through our various innovative sports programs such as the “Multi-sports Community League” program.

We recognized the high unemployment rate among sports professionals and leveraged this predicament to adopt those skills and education to create and promote sports activities through an umbrella now known as SP collectives. Through this concept, we are creating employment opportunities and promoting sports participation.

Vision
SP Collective strives to meet its long-term vision of creating and/ or increasing employment opportunities for sports professionals, sports graduates and Volunteers In the sports industry in South Africa.

Mission
The SP Collectives mission is to facilitates and promote organized sports participation and competition for developing sports clubs and teams at all levels.

Values
Provide equal access to sports opportunities and the benefits derived from participating in sports and recreation.

The club also came close in the Czechoslovak Cup, losing twice in 1966 and 1992 finals.

Name: Royal Rugby
Description:
Royal College altered its sporting history forever in 1916 when it took to playing Rugby. By this time, Trinity College Kandy had already started the game in 1906. On July 31st, 1920, the first Royal vs. Trinity rugby match was played, marking the beginning of a historic rivalry. Despite early challenges, Royal secured their first win in 1941 and has since seen many victories.
 
The Royal vs. Trinity series, known as the Bradby Shield, began in 1945, thanks to Principal E.L. Bradby. This two-match series, awarded to the team with the higher aggregate score, is now the most prestigious school rugby match in Sri Lanka. The rivalry is fierce yet gracious, embodying the spirit of sportsmanship.
 
The Centenary match between the two schools was the second leg encounter played in 1983 in which the chief guest was Mr.E.L.Bradby himself. The 2008 second leg match was the 150th match between the two schools. The 2002 Bradby encounter was the highest scoring encounter for Royal, led by Zulki Hamid, winning with a record (39-00) in the first leg held in Colombo and winning the second leg (44-00) in Kandy, thus winning the Bradby Shield with a record aggregate of 83 – 00.
 
In addition to the Bradby Shield, Royal College competes annually against St. Thomas’ College for the Michael Gunaratne Trophy and against Isipathana College for the Major Milroy Fernando Trophy. These matches are a testament to Royal’s rugby tradition and provide an opportunity to showcase talent against some of Sri Lanka's best rugby schools.
 
Royal College is proud to have won the Schools’ Rugby League the highest number of times, cementing its legacy as a powerhouse in school rugby. Join us in celebrating this rich heritage and the incredible spirit of Royal College Rugby!

https://royalcollegerugby.lk/

Name: Golfbaan de Swinkelsche
Description:
Golfbaan De Swinkelsche is een baan met een eigen karakter, want de populariteit van golf neemt hand over hand toe. Als gevolg van deze ontwikkeling komen er steeds meer banen bij. Wie bezoekers wil trekken zal iets moeten bieden. Daar zijn zij van overtuigd en dat is dan ook een van de drijfveren achter de inrichting van deze baan.

Kenmerken van Golfbaan De Swinkelsche zijn: rust en stilte, ruimte en natuur. Daarmee denken de gebroeders Swinkels in Someren een pareltje van een golfaccommodatie te realiseren. Waar de bezoeker rondwandelt in een glooiend, groen landschap, tussen waterplassen, heide en bosschages, een en al onthaasting, uitdagende golfsport in een natuurparadijs aan de Maarheezerdijk in Someren.

Daarnaast komen veel landvormen en natuurlijke elementen van een er vrijwel naast gelegen heidegebied, de Strabrechtse Heide, in de baan terug, en daarmee is een echte inlands linkse heidebaan gecreëerd.

Tegelijkertijd levert de baan door zijn natuurlijke uitstraling een belangrijke bijdrage aan de nieuw te ontwikkelen natuur in het buitengebied van de gemeente Someren en maakt het een integraal deel uit van het Reconstructieproject De Heihorsten.

Description:

Backed by a loyal fan base and powered by a clear vision, the Torpedoes are rewriting how volleyball is played, experienced and celebrated in this country.

 

Our commitment goes beyond the court. Through grassroots programs, school and community events, and our academy in partnership with Centre for Sports Excellence, we’re building a pathway for young athletes to dream bigger.



Guided by Olympic champion David Lee, our playing philosophy is bold, fast and fearless - a reflection of the spirit of Karnataka itself. Whether it’s the roar of the Purple Tribe in the stands or the relentless drive of our players on court, the Torpedoes are here to inspire a generation.

Name: EighteenTwelve, LLC
Description:
Eighteen Twelve, LLC is a management consultant vested in the growth of youth lacrosse. With core initiatives being boutique events and club programming we have developed a portfolio that is easily recognizable in the youth lacrosse space. 

Operating clubs in three (3) different states one of our primary missions is to continue to support local grassroots lacrosse that can compete with national organizations and has a heavy emphasis on matriculation and playing at the college level.  

In the event space we continue to push the boundaries of what boutique events look like. Focusing on masterful coaching and relationships our events reputations are around true development mixed with national competition in environments where players are supported, seen, and heard.

Club Programming 

Clippers LC: 350+ players, grad years 2034-2027 in the Annapolis, MD hotbed

Sonics Nashville: 150+ players, grad years 2025-2031 in the Nashville, TN.

Sonics Greenville: 110+ players, grad years 2025-2030 in the greater Greenville, SC.

Eighteen National: Youth National teams 5th grade - 8th grade representing 27 states competing in the Circuit & beyond.

Team Eighteen: Tournament only teams competing at national level tournaments 9th grade through 11th with a recruiting opportunity focus. 

Events
 
Method 18: 120 players from rising 7th, 8th, & 9th grade levels with the best prep coaches in the country for 4 days of lacrosse in a boarding environment.

Rivalry Weekend: Unique training & competition event for youth players based around PLL & College Games. 

Eighteen Training Camp: 2 days, 10+ hours of training and small sided competition. Has featured 600+ players from 34 states over 3 years. 

Eighteen Showcase: 1 day showcase geared towards players/families in the Eighteen family of programming to help guide them in and through the recruiting process with some of the best coaches in the country. 

Eighteen Academy: Small group training run nationwide for youth through HS players.

Name: Association Les RUBieS
Description:
Les RUBieS ou Rugby Union Bien-être Santé est une association loi 1901 créée en 2017. C’est le 1er club de rugby santé de France, affilié à la Fédération Française de Rugby. 

L'association a pour objet la pratique du Rugby Santé pour les personnes traitées pour un cancer.
Il s’agit d’une activité physique adaptée collective et ludique de rugby à 5, non violente, et adaptée à une pratique "santé". Elle est encadrée par des éducateurs sportifs spécifiquement formés et à votre écoute. 

Cette activité physique peut être débutée dès la phase de traitement, et/ou dans la période post-thérapeutique.
Ces clubs de rugby pas comme les autres ont des valeurs humaines fortes et une ambition heureuse : celle de permettre à des personnes touchées au plus profond de leur corps et de leur être de se réapproprier leur vie, de bouger à nouveau, grâce à un rugby à toucher adapté.

20 sections des RUBieS ont ouvert depuis la création de l’association.

Name: Clube de Campo de Piracicaba
Description:
Nos anos 50, estudantes do município de Piracicaba, no interior de São Paulo, idealizavam um espaço para praticar esportes, realizar eventos e aproveitar o tempo livre ao lado de familiares e amigos. Foram inúmeras conversas até chegarem a um acordo que prometia revolucionar a vida dos piracicabanos: a criação de um Clube Sócio Esportivo na cidade.

Eles tinham tudo planejado e só precisavam encontrar o lugar ideal para iniciar o projeto. Foi aí que algo inesperado aconteceu. A chácara Lara Campos, do falecido Conde Rodolpho de Lara Campos foi colocada à venda. Na época, todos ficaram animados, pois o espaço era privilegiado e com vista para o rio da cidade. Porém, no começo das negociações surgiram algumas complicações, pois o valor era quase inviável.

No entanto, os jovens tiveram a ideia de convidar amigos para serem sócios da transação e a lista chegou aos 96 nomes, além de Carlos Dias Corrêa Filho, Garcia dos Santos Neto, Ben Hur Carvalhães de Paiva e Osmar Ferraz de Almeida Prado, os idealizadores do projeto. A ideia deu certo e a terra foi comprada e repartida entre os quatro estudantes e os associados.

No dia 8 de agosto de 1954, nasceu o Clube de Campo de Piracicaba que, com o passar dos anos, foi ampliando suas instalações, construindo piscinas, quadras, ginásios, canchas de bocce, campos de futebol e, além disso, se tornou referência na formação de atletas em diversas modalidades.

Once the home of Negro League baseball teams, Paterson’s venerable and refurbished Hinchliffe Stadium now anchors a $110 million development and revitalization initiative featuring soccer at its center. 

The two North Jersey Pro Soccer teams will be part of the United Soccer League, a growing group of fully professional, semi-pro and amateur/youth circuits that already is the largest of its kind in North America. 

Launched in the 1980s and now spanning the continent, the USL offers Paterson and the North Jersey region a perfect platform. USL soccer is competitive, and it’s a well-respected part of the sport’s international ecosystem. But it remains accessible and locally focused. Through men’s and women’s soccer at Hinchliffe, New Jersians can gather to support and celebrate their community, while simultaneously projecting that pride and passion across the country.

Name: The Sports Playbook
Description:
Why do so many sports teams have losing records, year after year? Why do others win big, but only every 20 or 30 years? And why is it that so few teams enjoy sustained, continual success? This book gives the answer. Providing a blueprint or "playbook" for success in sports at every level, it lays out a clear step-by-step plan for building a team culture that will lead to winning consistently.

With each step, the book introduces real-world tools that can be easily implemented by every sports organization and coach to achieve success, including team charters, individual athlete plans, player accountability systems, and team communication strategies. It offers expert advice and practical guidance on key areas, such as aligning individuals with a clear team plan, resolving conflicts proactively, and learning from every game and every season to develop a smarter and more consistent culture of success.

The Sports Playbook: Building Teams that Outperform, Year after Year will help every team fulfil its true potential through leadership, focus, and performance. It is essential reading for coaches, sport management professionals, and leaders of every kind of team, inside and outside of sports.

The foreword, introduction, chapter 1 and chapter 2 of this book are freely available as downloadable Open Access PDFs under a Creative Commons Attribution-Non Commercial-No Derivatives 4.0 license available at http://www.taylorfrancis.com.

Name: Green Tick Agency for Health, (Physical) Activity (Sports) and Diet
Description:
young people increasingly rely on digital apps and social media for information about health, diet, and sports. While some benefit from this access, others are adversely affected. However, there is a significant gap in research and policy that needs to be addressed to understand the relationship between young people, social media/digital apps, and their health impacts. As a result, unregulated content continues to circulate freely on social media and digital platforms. As such, modeled after the World Anti-Doping Agency's methods for evaluating supplements used by athletes, Green Tick will verify whether health, diet, and sports-related content on these platforms are convenient, reliable, and confirmable. This project is positioned as a pathfinder in digital content regulation, aiming eventually to act as a control mechanism.

The Green Tick project is a pioneering initiative designed to regulate and assess the content related to health, sports, nutrition, sleep, exercise, body image, weight loss, diet, and physical activity on social media and digital apps. The 24-month project consortium includes seven partners from across Europe: two from Turkiye and one each from Greece, Portugal, Italy, Slovenia, and Spain.
Green Tick proposes the establishment of an umbrella organization tasked with distributing the Green Tick label. This label will be awarded to social media accounts and digital apps that provide verifiable and reliable content in the designated areas. The overarching goal of the Green Tick project is to enhance knowledge and understanding of physical activity, health, and diet among young people throughout the EU. This is expected to lead to increased participation in sports, conducted in a healthy manner. The project will support these goals by providing guidelines, training, and regulatory mechanisms, thereby ensuring that the digital landscape becomes a safer and more reliable space for accessing health-related information.

Name: Dblp Basketball
Description:
Dblp Basketball (DBLP LLC) was formed by CEO/Founder, Pierre Pierce in 2016. It was formed under the premise to provide all basketball players regardless of age, skill level, or gender the opportunity to become the best basketball players they can be. You get out the game what you put in, and often the results from the work you put in do not come immediately. It is our goal to leave a lasting impact on the next generation of players that inspires them to be impactful members of their communities.

Pierre's basketball philosophy is to grow and develop the character of today’s youth by using basketball as the springboard to instill values and principles in which can be applied to situations on and off the court. The best way to go about achieving this goal is to hold each person accountable for their actions and to treat each person we come across with love and respect.

Recognizing weaknesses at an early age is instrumental to success, because being able to turn weaknesses to strengths allows for self growth. Committing to becoming the best at anything is very time consuming. Making that commitment allows athletes to put themselves in rare air because as skills improve so does confidence & basketball IQ. Through this preparation and as we develop a confidence that only comes from putting in work, we focus in on The Five P's as the key to success.

Proper Preparation Prevents Poor Performance

Le projet associatif s’articule donc autour de deux pôles qui coexistent : le projet sportif et le projet social et solidaire.
Le club propose la pratique du Rugby Fauteuil (Quad Rugby) et la discipline Rugby à XIII en fauteuil (handicaps moins lourds et valides).
L’association porte donc un projet solidaire et social en proposant de la sensibilisation au handicap, au handisport, la promotion du vivre-en- semble et de lutter contre toutes les formes de discrimination grâce au Rugby en fauteuil au sein d’écoles, collèges, universités et centres de rééducation, les collectivités et les associations.

Wij tellen momenteel meer dan 2500 leden, verdeeld over vele jeugd- en seniorenteams. We zijn een club waar ambitie en prestatie hand-in-hand gaat met gezelligheid met als fundament onze kernwaarden. 

Het motto van de club is 'ontwikkel jezelf, ontwikkel de club'. 

Daarnaast speelt onze club een verbindende factor voor de (lokale) ondernemers. Wij hebben een eigen, levendige V.V. De Meern Businessclub.

Name: Playside padel
Description:
Playside biedt padelbanen aan voor tijdelijke locaties, zowel binnen als buiten. Denk hierbij aan tennishallen die in de zomer gesloten zijn, omdat men dan buiten op gravel gaat spelen. Of vice versa, plaatsing van de mobiele padelbanen op het gravel in de winter. Daarnaast kunt aan andere tijdelijke locaties denken zoals bedrijfshallen en terreinen die nog niet herontwikkeld kunnen worden vanwege bijvoorbeeld vergunningen die nog in aanvraag zijn.

Wij bieden een full service pakket aan waarbij we zorgen voor de installatie en exploitatie van de banen. Afhankelijk van de periode en locatie kennen wij 3 mogelijkheden voor een vergoeding:
- vaste vergoeding per maand
- percentage van de baanhuur
- een hybride variant van de twee bovenstaande opties

Name: Quatermass Motorsport
Description:
We are a sim racing team aiming to compete at the highest level of sim racing esports competition while also using our experience and expertise to make sim racing more accessible to those with physical and neurological disabilities. 

Our biggest aim is to get a spot on the grid in the Le Mans Virtual Series racing against the biggest sim racing teams and compete in the most prestigious event - The 24 Hours of Le Mans.

While doing this we want to use our experiences and expertise to help get more disabled people into sim racing. We will do this by working with organisations, charities and companies to adapt and develop solutions, promote the sport and lobby for more accessibility to our sport.

Le club est équipé d’appareils haut de gamme et innovants de renforcement musculaire et de cardio auxquels s’ajoute un espace de cours collectifs. Grâce à notre équipe de coach diplômés d’état, vous bénéficierez d’un véritable encadrement personnel adapté à votre niveau, vos objectifs et vos exigences.

Des séances de Cryothérapie Corps Entier sont également proposées dans la partie Eden Ice du centre. Elles permettent de bénéficier des effets de bien être et des bienfaits esthétiques, anti-inflammatoires, antalgiques… du froid extrême.

Description:
Onze missie is om ieder kind gelijke kansen te geven om zich vanuit zijn/haar passie te ontwikkelen als voetballer en persoon.

Wij geloven dat talent overal voorkomt, maar kansen niet. Daarom bouwen we aan een toegankelijk voetbalplatform waarin plezier, ontwikkeling en vriendschap centraal staan. 

Jonger Oranje verbindt kinderen, ouders, trainers, amateurclubs en partners en creëert plekken waar je wordt gezien, ongeacht achtergrond, niveau of netwerk. 

Met sport, media en innovatie maken we talentontwikkeling transparanter, inclusiever en menselijker. Zo zorgen we ervoor dat geen enkel kind langs de zijlijn blijft staan, maar de ruimte krijgt om te groeien, te leren en te dromen.

Name: Intermezzo Sports
Description:
Intermezzo Sports is a FIFA Licensed Football Agency and strategic sports advisory firm operating at the intersection of global talent representation, football club M&A, and financial consulting.

With over a decade of international deal-making experience, we serve as trusted partners to players, clubs, investors, and stakeholders across world football. Our firm is built on deep market insight, transactional expertise, and a proven track record in cross-border negotiations.

Our core services include:

FIFA Licensed Player Representation: Career management, transfers, and contract negotiations for elite talent
Club M&A Advisory: Buy-side and sell-side advisory for football club transactions, valuations, and investment strategies
Football Finance & Liquidity Solutions: Factoring, revolving credit, and bespoke financial structuring for clubs and agencies
International Sports Consulting: Strategic advisory for club growth, market entry, and global football operations

Led by founder Cesare Marchetti, Intermezzo Sports has advised and executed deals in markets including the UK, UAE, Poland, Belgium, Hungary, Norway, Romania, Iceland, and beyond, delivering results in both emerging and established football markets.

Whether you're a club seeking capital, an investor targeting acquisition opportunities, or a player navigating the global football landscape, Intermezzo Sports provides the intelligence, network, and execution to help you win.

 Global Reach |  Football Focus |  Trusted Expertise

Name: The Non-League Network
Description:
Welcome to The Non-League Network — Where Grassroots Football Levels Up

We're on a mission to supercharge football. The Non-League Network connects players and clubs, builds real opportunities, and gives non-league football the platform it deserves.

This isn't just football — it's passion, hustle, and the heartbeat of the UK game. But too often, it’s overlooked. We're here to change that.

What We Bring to the Game
 Smart Connections: Players meet clubs. Clubs find talent. Fast, easy, and tailored to what both sides actually need.

 Next-Gen Recruitment: Our intelligent tools help scouts, agents, and coaches pinpoint the right players — no more guesswork.

 Real Exposure: Whether you're playing on Sundays or climbing the steps to National League, we help raise your profile and get you noticed.

 Full-On Fan Experience: From live match streams to raw behind-the-scenes content, we’re giving non-league fans more of what they love.

 Our Vision: One United Non-League Community
We’re building more than just a platform — we’re creating a movement. One that brings together everyone in the non-league game: players, clubs, coaches, physios, scouts, agents, and fans.

The Non-League Network is where careers get kickstarted, communities grow stronger, and the game gets the respect it’s earned.

Ready to make your mark? Join the non-league revolution today.

Because this is more than football — it’s your future.

Name: Stafford Rugby Union Football Club
Description:
Stafford RUFC is a community rugby club, with 26 teams and over 650 playing members across a broad range of rugby including Senior Men’s, Senior Women’s, Mixed Ability, Touch and Walking teams, as well as being one of the largest Mini and Junior clubs for girls and boys in Staffordshire.

Stafford Rugby Club is more than just a Rugby Club, it’s a unique, multi-functional, impressive venue, conveniently located in Blackberry Lane, near Stafford Town Centre and train station, with ample free car parking. We relocated to our new home in October 2019.

With a new, modern multi-million-pound facility including 4 pitches, one being an all weather grass pitch, a strength and conditioning gym, 6 changing rooms, 3 well equipped meeting rooms, a bar, and a beautiful outdoor patio space, we offer the perfect venue for conferences, meetings, exhibitions, corporate events, as well as weddings, parties and wakes.

Our friendly bar, overlooking the pitch is open 7 days a week.

Whatever you are looking for in a venue, be it a small network meeting, to a major conference or trade show, we can cater for all your requirements. We have 3 spacious rooms which can accommodate up to 180 delegates in a variety of formats. We have free WiFi and a range of standard audio-visual equipment, a licensed bar and can offer quality catering from buffets to more elaborate dining if required, as well as a tea, coffee and biscuits service or light refreshments.

If you would like to know more about how you can partner with Stafford RUFC, explore sponsorship and advertising opportunities, enquire about membership of book one of our conference or meeting rooms please contact:
E | general-manager@staffordrugby.club or lisaclemson@staffordrugby.club

Name: FC Copa Academy
Description:
Here is a modernized and updated version of the FC Copa Academy overview, incorporating accurate details and refined language to reflect the Academy’s evolution and professionalism:

⸻

FC Copa Academy is a nationally recognized, year-round soccer development organization founded in 2004, committed to excellence in player development, academic achievement, and personal growth. Based in New Jersey with additional locations in New York and Pennsylvania, the Academy proudly serves over 1,000 boys and girls aged 5 to 19, offering a comprehensive soccer pathway from the grassroots level to collegiate and professional platforms.

FC Copa Academy’s mission is to educate and develop the complete player in a structured, challenging, and supportive environment. With a dedicated, licensed coaching staff and a clearly defined curriculum, we foster technical proficiency, tactical understanding, and character development. Our teams compete in premier-level leagues, showcases, tournaments, and championships at the state, regional, and national levels.

As part of our player progression model, FC Copa Academy is home to New Jersey Copa FC, which includes U20 and U23 collegiate programs, as well as pre-professional teams competing in USL League Two (Men) and the USL W League (Women), providing elite players a platform to continue their growth beyond youth soccer.

Since our founding, FC Copa Academy teams have made appearances in 26 state, 19 regional, and 7 national finals and championships. The Academy has established one of the highest college placement records in the country, with over 450 student-athletes placed into 215 collegiate programs. Our success extends to the professional level, with 30 players signed to pro clubs, including 2 national team representatives and 2 players selected to the U.S. U17 National Team residency program.

FC Copa Academy remains committed to developing players who are leaders on the field and in their communities.

Name: Linfield Football Club

Name: Saudi Fencing Federation
Description:
The Saudi Fencing Federation, established in 1969, is dedicated to promoting and developing the sport of fencing in Saudi Arabia. Its primary objectives include increasing participation, enhancing local talent, and achieving international success. Over the years, the federation has introduced national championships, facilitated international competition participation, and brought in expert coaches for training.

Recent initiatives focus on expanding the sport through youth programs, partnerships with educational institutions, and hosting significant events like the 2024 World Fencing Championships in Riyadh. The federation aims to boost the performance of Saudi fencers globally, grow the number of participants, and establish advanced training academies, positioning Saudi Arabia as a competitive force in the world of fencing.

Name: Sutton & Epsom RFC
Description:
Founded in 1881, Sutton & Epsom RFC is one of the oldest active Rugby Clubs in England with a proud and magnificent history. We first played against Saracens as far back as 1883/84, as one of their very early opponents, and in 1901 beat Stade Francais on their home turf.

Today the Club is one of the largest amateur Rugby Clubs in the Country and from its main ground in Rugby Lane, Cheam, remains run by enthusiasts for enthusiasts. 

We have over 40 teams with 1,200 current and former playing members, plus 1,800 social members. We continually strengthening our rugby offering to current and future players. We are an inclusive club and sport, and we offer a warm welcome to new members, irrespective of whether they are diehards or new to the game. 

With our outstanding coaches, superb medical team and facilities, we have a lot to offer prospective players at Rugby Lane.

Please contact:

Director of Rugby : Andrew Spooner					
dor-serfc@outlook.com

Women’s Head Coach : Nick Harris:
sandeladiesfrc@gmail.com

Name: Hockey East Association
Description: The Hockey East Association is an 11-team Division I college men’s hockey conference founded in 1984 and a 10-team Division I women’s league which began play in 2002-03. The men’s league has won 10 NCAA championships in the past 27 years, most recently in 2021. Since 1999, Hockey East has won eight men’s NCAA Championships with 17 NCAA Championship Game appearances, while placing 28 teams in the Frozen Four and 74 teams in the NCAA Tournament. Overall, Hockey East has sent 121 teams to the men’s NCAA Tournament since its inaugural season, more than any other conference in that span. Hockey East is home to 11 Hobey Baker winners and four Patty Kazmaier winners.

Name: Ivy League Sports
Description:
The Ivy League stands at the pinnacle of higher education and Division I athletics, rooted in the longstanding, defining principle that intercollegiate athletics competition should be “kept in harmony with the essential educational purposes of the institution.” Unrivaled in its legacy, The Ivy League provides the true test of academic and co-curricular rigor – fostering an enduring culture that celebrates a storied-tradition, thrives on shared values and holds paramount the academic and personal growth of students.

Consistently ranked as the top academic conference and with more national championships than any other collegiate athletic conference, The Ivy League showcased 71 nationally-ranked teams last year and prides itself on sponsoring 34 sports, the highest number of any NCAA conference, with more than 8,000 student-athletes competing annually. The League’s world-renowned schools – Brown, Columbia, Cornell, Dartmouth, Harvard, Penn, Princeton and Yale – serve as the standard bearers for inspiring and transforming student- athletes to boldly take on the world’s challenges and lead lives of great impact.
