Name: Udaipur Cricket Championship Association
Description:
Udaipur Cricket Championship (UCC) Association is the premier cricketing body dedicated to nurturing talent, promoting sportsmanship, and elevating the standard of cricket in Udaipur and surrounding regions.

Established with the vision of creating a strong grassroots-to-professional cricketing ecosystem, UCC organizes annual championships, leagues, and development programs for players across all age groups. Our mission is to provide a competitive yet inclusive platform where aspiring cricketers can showcase their skills, receive professional coaching, and gain exposure to regional and national opportunities.

 What We Do:

Host the prestigious Udaipur Cricket Championship—a celebrated tournament drawing top teams and talents

Conduct coaching camps, skill development workshops, and mentorship sessions

Collaborate with schools, academies, and corporate partners to expand the reach of cricket

Promote fair play, fitness, and leadership through the game

Whether you're a player, coach, sponsor, or cricket enthusiast, UCC is your gateway to the vibrant cricketing culture of Rajasthan.

 Join us in shaping the future of cricket in Udaipur. Connect, compete, and grow with UCC.

Name: Visby IBK
Description:
Visby Innebandyklubb – En stark gemenskap både på och utanför planen.

Visby Innebandyklubb (Visby IBK) är mer än en innebandyklubb – vi är en engagerad kraft i samhället och en naturlig mötesplats för företag, partners och supportrar. Genom vårt företagsnätverk bygger vi starka relationer och samarbeten för framtiden, där idrott och näringsliv möts för att skapa möjligheter och utveckling.

På planen har vi verksamhet från bredd till elit, där vårt herrlag spelar i Svenska Superligan och varje säsong kämpar för att etablera sig i toppen av svensk innebandy. Samtidigt satsar vi stort på ungdomsidrott och skapar möjligheter för spelare i alla åldrar att utvecklas och växa.

Utöver sporten brinner vi för samhällsengagemang och att stärka innebandyn både på Gotland och i Sverige. Vi arbetar aktivt för att bygga en stark klubbkultur och en levande idrottsgemenskap på ön.

Vill du bli en del av vårt nätverk, samarbeta med oss eller stötta Visby IBK? Hör gärna av dig!

Name: Club de Gimnasia y Esgrima La Plata
Description:
El Club de Gimnasia y Esgrima La Plata fue fundado el 3 de junio de 1887 en la ciudad de La Plata. Somos una Institución centenaria, que ha recorrido sostenidamente un camino de crecimiento que le permitió convertirse en el más popular de la ciudad de La Plata y su zona de influencia.

Nuestro Club, desde su nacimiento, ha tenido una relación estrecha con la comunidad, brindando espacios tanto deportivos como sociales y culturales. Los valores de juventud y sociabilidad fueron sus pilares y fundaron el ideal “Mens Sana in Corpore Sano”, procurando un equilibrio entre la tradicional dualidad cuerpo-alma.

Diferentes culturas, edades, ideologías, gustos, clases sociales se fueron agrupando, conformando una identidad tripera, formando lo que es hoy el Pueblo Gimnasista. Aquel que de manera incondicional lo alienta en cada disciplina, en cada encuentro, en cada lugar.

Todos estos valores y objetivos que fueran fundacionales, siguen vigentes aún hoy, se expresan y traslucen en el esfuerzo diario de cada uno de quienes participan y lo construyen; en el sentimiento que envuelve a miles de Triperos y los une en un mismo desafío: el del desarrollo constante y sostenido.

Name: GALLIA CLUB LUNEL
Description:
Le Gallia Club Lunel est un club de football français basé à Lunel et fondé en 1916.

Le club lunellois fait partie des tout premiers grands clubs du Languedoc aux côtés des grands FC Sète, SC Nîmois ou Olympique d'Alès. Il participe d'ailleurs durant quatre saisons, entre 1923 et 1927, à la prestigieuse Division d'Honneur du Sud-Est. Cependant, le club ne franchira pas le cap du passage au professionnalisme et va disparaître de la première scène régionale jusqu'en 1957 et son retour dans le groupe Ouest de la Division d'Honneur du Sud-Est. Mais malgré une finale du championnat régional disputée face au Hyères FC en 1960, le club va stagner entre les deux divisions supérieures de la Ligue du Sud-Est avant de replonger en 1972 dans les profondeurs des divisions de district.

Le renouveau du club a lieu au début des années 1990 avec l’accession en 1988 en Division d'Honneur du Languedoc-Roussillon (Régional 1). Le club progresse lentement et obtient en 1999 son billet pour le CFA 2 (National 3) en remportant le titre de champion du Languedoc-Roussillon. Cependant, après sept saisons à ce niveau, le club va connaitre une relégation en 2006, puis une nouvelle en 2008, pour se retrouver en Division d'Honneur Régionale (Régional 2).

Le club renoue avec le Régional 1 après sa promotion lors de la saison 2018-2019. Lors de la saison 2022-2023 le club termine à la 5ème place du groupe A.

Le club évolue au stade Fernand Brunel, nom d'un ancien joueur international du club.

Name: Rostock Griffins e.V.
Description:
Mitte der Neunziger Jahre taten sich in Rostock einige Verrückte zusammen, um den Sport „American Football“ in Rostock zu etablieren. Angeregt wurde dies durch Kontakte mit amerikanischen Werftarbeitern.

Im Jahr 1997 wurde das Ganze dann offiziell gemacht und unter dem Dach des PSV Rostock eine Abteilung American Football gegründet. Die Baltic Blue Stars waren geboren. Die ersten Spiele wurden in Bad Sülze ausgetragen, aber es gelang, ein Spiel im Leichtathletikstadion stattfinden zu lassen, zu dem weit mehr als 1000 Zuschauer kamen.
Über eine wechselvolle Geschichte gelang es anschließend nicht immer durchgängig an einem Ligabetrieb teilzunehmen. Aber es wurde immer intensiv an jungen Talenten geschmiedet, die auch heute noch den Großteil des aktuellen Kaders bilden. So konnte man die Entwicklung nicht aufhalten.

In den Jahren 2005 und 2006 konnte dann unter dem Dach des SV Dynamo wieder durchgehend und teilweise erfolgreich an einem Ligabetrieb teilgenommen werden, da sich einige Gründungsmitglieder erneut zusammenfanden und ein neuer Hauptsponsor hinzukam. Gemeinsam wurden die vorhandenen Probleme gelöst, die letztlich zu einem Vereinswechsel zum SV Warnemünde führten. Ebenfalls konnten einige erfolgreiche Sportler der Region, wie beispielsweise Ex-Sumo Weltmeister Alex Czerwinski, für den körperbetonten und anspruchsvollen Sport Football gewonnen werden.
Ab dem Jahr 2007 startete das Team dann in der Oberliga OST unter anderem gegen Teams aus Halle, Chemnitz und Berlin. Erstmals gab es auch ein Jugendteam, das in der Jugendliga Ost auflief. Ab 2008 gab man sich den „Kampfnamen“ Rostock Griffins, da es mit dem alten Namen leider rechtliche Probleme gab.

Nach insgesamt 21 Jahren als Abteilung in einem Mehrspartenverein erfolgte im Oktober 2018 der Schritt in die Eigenständigkeit als Rostock GRIFFINS e.V. ! Seit dem bieten wir Sport und Unterhaltung in den Abteilungen Cheerleading (Dance), Flag- und Tackle Football sowie Lacrosse an.

Name: GWARDIA Warszawa 1948
Description:
Since the early 1948's, when the polish GWARDIA Warsaw sports club has been founded in Warsaw and participated polish 1st League from 1953–1960 (8 seasons), 1962–1966 (5 seasons, 1964-1966 GWARDIA Warsaw coach was Kazimierz Górski), 1967–1968, 1969–1975, 1978–1979 and 1981–1983, the biggest successes were winning 2nd in the Polish Championship in the 1957 season, 1st in the Polish Cup in the 1954 season, 2nd in the Polish Cup in the 1974 season, taking part in First Round of the 1955–56 (European Cup UEFA Champions League) and Second Round of the 1974–75 European Cup Winners' Cup (UEFA Cup / UEFA European League).

Moreover, one extraordinary polish sportsman Jerzy Kulej (1940 – 2012), who was a boxer, politician, sports commentator, GWARDIA Warsaw club member (1959-1971) has become a double gold light welterweight Olympic Champion 1964 Tokyo, 1968 Mexico City and double gold light welterweight European Amateur Champion 1963 Moscow, 1964 Berlin.

Having those facts in mind we are pleased to announce the BIZONsport.com idea and intention to support design and development of new sports activities in Warsaw, Poland by creating GWARDIA Warsaw 1948.

Physical culture in Warsaw is well-back to support new sports club activities, but polish sporttech regulatory framework needs to be develop in a manner that will cover all aspects associated with this emerging polish sports technology industry.

Name: Sportservice Roermond
Description:

En juist in een stad die zelf steeds in beweging is, mag Sportservice Roermond natuurlijk niet ontbreken.

Sportservice Roermond beweegt altijd met jou mee! Wij vinden het namelijk belangrijk dat in onze veranderende samenleving niemand buitenspel komt te staan. Daarom helpen we jou om via sport je eigen doelen te behalen, maar ook betrokken te blijven bij wat er om je heen gebeurt. Dat doen we door activiteiten te organiseren waarbij jij je thuis voelt, door je te helpen het maximale uit jezelf te halen of door je wegwijs te maken in het Roermondse verenigingsleven. En bovenal: door via sport en beweging te laten zien wat er speelt in Roermond. Want wie meebeweegt, die beweegt meer!

Sportservice Roermond is een creatief en dynamisch team dat onderdeel uitmaakt van de gemeente Roermond. Vanuit ons kantoor in Zwembad de Roerdomp zetten wij ons dagelijks in om de sport- en beweegdeelname van alle inwoners te vergroten. Dit doen we onder meer door het aangaan van nieuwe verbindingen, het actief betrekken van partners en de organisatie van sportieve activiteiten. Sportservice Roermond draagt daarmee bij aan het welzijn, de kwaliteit van leven en de gezondheid van alle inwoners in de gemeente Roermond.

Name: Voetbalvereniging ATC'65
Description:
1965 – 2010
Dertig mannen komen op maandag 29 november 1965 in een bovenzaaltje van Het Wapen van Hengelo bijeen om een nieuwe sportvereniging op te richten. Aan het eind van de avond is de sportvereniging geboren en een prijsvraag wordt uitgeschreven om een nieuwe naam te bedenken. Daaruit ontstaat A Triginta Conditum (door dertig opgericht) oftewel ATC. Cees Krijnsen wordt benoemd tot voorzitter, John Vasterik tot secretaris en Johan Oude Egberink tot penningmeester. Als bestuursleden worden benoemd Frits Gelevert en Wim Vijn.

Het laatste ATC-decennium: 2000-2010
Het jaar 2000 is het jaar van de verhuizing. In 2002 is er niet alleen sprake van een enorme groei bij de jeugdafdeling, ook de senioren kunnen drie elftallen meer inschrijven, dan het jaar ervoor. In 2004 wordt onder grote belangstelling door voorzitter Joop Munsterman het pronkstuk van de club geopend: de tribune. 

In de zomer van 2007 worden er tegelijkertijd twee kunstgrasvelden aangelegd. 

De afgelopen 45 jaar zijn we een paar keer verhuisd, hebben we diverse jubilea gevierd, hebben we tal van toernooien en andere activiteiten georganiseerd, hebben we slechts een paar voorzitters versleten, hebben we diverse sportieve successen beleefd, hebben we ook regelmatig onze neus gestoten, maar hebben we altijd met ons hoofd fier omhoog door Hengelo kunnen wandelen. Inmiddels zijn we de grootste voetbalvereniging van de gemeente Hengelo. Op 29 november 2009 stond de ledenteller in ons clubhuis op 1.130 leden. Dat geeft ook aan dat we onze zaken goed op orde hebben. Zowel op zakelijk, sportief, financieel als organisatorisch gebied. Dat is een compliment aan ons allemaal. Elk ATC-lid draagt bij aan het succes van zijn/haar eigen vereniging. Dat is een plicht, maar automatisch ook een recht. Of, zoals de inmiddels aangestelde Verenigingsmanager van ATC’65 altijd placht te zeggen: “Vraag niet wat ATC’65 voor jou kan doen, maar vraag jezelf altijd af wat jij voor ATC’65 kunt betekenen!”.    Roel Kok

Name: Bright Talent Acquisition – Here Is My Talent (HMT)
Description:
Talents Company – Here My Talent (HMT) is a global SportsTech startup redefining how football talent is discovered, connected, and transferred. Our digital platform connects amateur and professional players with clubs, agents, and fans through a unified ecosystem that combines talent scouting, social networking, and financial technology.

Founded with a vision to create the world’s most accessible and transparent football marketplace, HMT bridges the gap between aspiring athletes and talent seekers. We leverage video-based profiles, intelligent algorithms, and networking tools to simplify recruitment while enabling global visibility for undiscovered talents.

Our core products include:
•	Player Showcase Platform: Allows footballers to upload skill videos, build digital CVs, and get noticed by scouts worldwide.
•	Club & Agent Dashboard: Empowers clubs and player agents to search, track, and connect with talents efficiently.
•	Smart Transfer Gateway: A digital infrastructure that streamlines player transfers with secure, transparent, and cost-effective transactions.
•	Community & Engagement Hub: A football-focused social network that encourages interaction among players, clubs, agents, and fans.

Our services support talent discovery, scouting, recruitment, and global player mobility—offering time and cost savings to clubs and career-building opportunities for players. With a strategic focus on digital innovation and global scalability, HMT is building the future of football—one connection at a time.

Name: Oregon Premier FC
Description:
Oregon Premier FC is the Premier youth soccer club in Oregon. Join us as we expand our network of coaches, members, sponsors and supporters. 

In partnership with Lake Oswego SC and Willamette United FC, OPFC is the largest youth soccer organization in the state of Oregon serving more than 5,000 players and families at all levels of competition! 

Our mission is to provide a positive, player-centered learning environment for all of our players to celebrate their love of the game. Our staff, board of directors, coaches and volunteers all work tirelessly to support each individual player and team in their pursuit of development and enjoyment in soccer. We understand and harness the unique power of sports to provide a vehicle for youth development on and off the field. At Oregon Premier FC we strive to meet the needs of each player and team as they pursue their individual and collective goals and grow into valuable members of our community. 

Central to our DNA is a culture of inclusion that welcomes all individuals to become a part of something bigger than themself. We encourage every Oregon Premier FC player, team, parent, coach and volunteer to act as a positive steward of our club and our growing OPFC family. 

As an industry leader it is our responsibility to continue to challenge the status quo and look for unique ways to meet the needs of our players and our community. Our club leadership aspires to greatness at all levels of our programming, facilities, coaching development and most importantly player development. As we celebrate the accomplishments of OPFC, we never lose sight of the opportunities for growth and evolution. Alongside our Board of Directors, the leadership at OPFC are committed to attracting, hiring, and training the best coaching staff in Oregon and beyond. As a Nike Premier Club, Oregon Premier FC will continue to provide our coaches and players with the latest innovations in soccer equipment and apparel. 

#WeArePremier

Name: The Colonists
Description:
The Colonists is a trail running community of people who love to run. 

No super heroes, no pro-athletes. Normal people. People with jobs, families and daily ongoing 'stuff'. Throughout the year, we meet up, run the trails and have fun in Belgium.

But at least once a year, we dream big. We dream of doing something exceptional and make it happen. No excuses. We explore the planet, run adventurous trails and conquer mountains. We run to reconnect with ourselves and the beautiful nature that surrounds us.

Join our Colonists' community on LinkedIn and Strava and become part of our running crew.

The details of all our runs are on Strava.

Thanks for becoming a Colonist!

*** Our Mission ***

We run, travel the world and colonize the trails.

*** Our Motto ***

"Life is either a daring adventure or nothing at all." - Helen Keller

*** Our Values ***

G R O W - Face your fears and jump into the unknown. Push yourself beyond your mental and physical limits.

H A V E  F U N - Smile, even through your tears. This is why we run, this is why we live. To enjoy ourselves and have an adventurous time on this planet.

K E E P  I T  S A F E - Safety is a priority. Safety is everyone's responsibility.

T E A M - We are a team. We start together, finish together and support each other along the way.

Volleybal wordt gecombineerd met gezelligheid en een studentikoze sfeer.

De vereniging is er vóór de leden, maar vooral ook dóór de leden. Het waarmaken van de missie is alleen mogelijk door hun vrijwillige inzet. Deze betrokkenheid die voortkomt uit verenigingsgevoel en de wil om een steentje bij te dragen is cruciaal en kenmerkend voor Erasmus Volley. Ongeveer de helft van de leden zit in een commissie, het bestuur, is trainer of scheidsrechter. Betrokkenheid uit zich ook in het plezier waarmee mensen gaan trainen, wedstrijden spelen, na afloop wat drinken in de stamkroeg en begaan zijn met de vereniging.

Asimismo, somos el ente organizador del destacado Campeonato Nacional de Motos Acuáticas, evento emblemático que reúne a los más destacados pilotos del territorio nacional. In kleine teams van twee à drie atleten, gecoacht door hun Unified Partner, dagen wij onze
atleten uit om zoveel mogelijk zeiltaken op zich te nemen om zo hun grenzen te verleggen,
wat een boost geeft aan hun zelfvertrouwen. Dit doen we door met onze atleten en Unified
Partners geregeld samen te gaan zeilen en te trainen, maar ook door deel te nemen aan
allerlei wedstrijden zowel hier in België als in Nederland, Duitsland… Al is deelnemen heel

Name: GC Unihockey
Description:
GC Unihockey wurde per März 2002 gegründet. Der Verein entstand durch die Fusionierung der Clubs UHC Cosmic Zürich, UHC Zürich und der Zurich Lakers. Um die von Swiss Unihockey auferlegten Auflagen zu erfüllen, fusionierten die Zürich Lakers mit dem polysportiven Verein GC. Die beiden Ursprungsverein Hard Sticks Adliswil und die Crocodiles Küsnacht wurden somit aus dem Dachverein der Zürich Lakers entbunden. Dies hatte für die beiden Vereine zur Folge, dass sie nicht mit anderen Vereinen zusammenarbeiten und fusionieren konnten.

Nach der Anmeldung im Jahr 2002 war der Verein für die Saison 2002/03 spielberechtigt. Sowohl die erste Mannschaft der Herren wie auch die erste Mannschaft der Damen konnte in deren ersten Saison in der Nationalliga A antreten. Die Liga-Lizenzkommission hat dem Verein nur eine provisorische Spiellizenz auferlegt. Innert eines Jahres muss der Verein aufzeigen, dass die wirtschaftlichen, sportlichen und restlichen Lizenzauflagen erfüllt werden. Nach der ersten Saison bestätigte Swiss Unihockey GC Unihockey die definitive Lizenz für die Nationalliga.

2015/16 konnte GC Unihockey zum ersten Mal die Schweizer Meisterschaft gewinnen.[2] Eine Saison später gelang GC Unihockey mit einem 8:7-Sieg über den HC Rychenberg Winterthur der Cupsieg. In der Saison 2021/22 holte sich GC Unihockey das Double.

Name: England Kabaddi Association (EKA)
Description:
The England Kabaddi Association (EKA) is the official governing body dedicated to promoting, developing, and growing the sport of Kabaddi across England. With a mission to bring the excitement and competitive spirit of Kabaddi to new heights, EKA provides a structured platform for athletes, clubs, and fans to engage with the sport at both grassroots and elite levels.

Our Mission-
To expand the reach of Kabaddi across England, making it accessible to diverse communities.
To develop and support athletes, ensuring they have the training and opportunities to compete at national and international levels.
To organise tournaments and leagues that foster competitive excellence and sportsmanship.
To build a strong Kabaddi ecosystem by collaborating with local and global partners.

What We Do-
International ,National Competitions & Leagues – Organising and overseeing top-level Kabaddi tournaments in England.
Grassroots Development – Promoting Kabaddi at schools, colleges, and community centers to encourage youth participation.
Coaching & Training Programs – Providing structured coaching pathways to nurture talent and enhance skills.
International Representation – Preparing and supporting England’s national Kabaddi team for global competitions.

Join the Movement-
Whether you’re a player, coach, referee, or fan, the England Kabaddi Association welcomes you to be part of the journey. Together, we are shaping the future of Kabaddi in England and beyond!

 Website: www.englandkabaddi.co.uk
 Contact us: info@englandkabaddi.co.uk
 Follow us on social media for the latest updates!

Name: PAB - Pays d'Ancenis Basket
Description:
Le Pays d'Ancenis Basket (P.A.B) a été créé le 1er juin 2005 à la suite de la fusion de trois communes : Ancenis, St-Géréon et St-Herblon. Le club, comptant environ 250 licenciés, trouve ses racines dans le club historique d'Ancenis Basket, fondé en 1958 par Edouard Landrain. Au départ, l'équipe, connue sous le nom de Racing Club d'Ancenis, jouait à la caserne Rohan.

En 1962, le Rapid Club Hand et Basket est créé, et chaque section devient autonome en 1985. Les équipes masculines et féminines évoluent d'abord dans les championnats départementaux avant de rejoindre les championnats régionaux à la fin des années 80 et début 90. Dans les années 90, l'équipe masculine descend en départemental 2, mais remontera rapidement au régional 2 grâce à une meilleure formation des jeunes et deux victoires en coupe de Loire Atlantique dans les années 2000.

Dans les années 2000, le club traverse une période difficile, redescendant au départemental 1 puis au départemental 2. Afin de remonter, une entente est créée avec les clubs d'Oudon, Couffé et le Pays d'Ancenis, formant le Havre et Loire Basket (H.L.B). Cette collaboration porte ses fruits, et l'équipe revient rapidement en championnat régional, accédant aux demi-finales de la coupe de Loire Atlantique en 2015, la remportant en 2016, et atteignant la finale en 2017.

L’équipe féminine a également marqué l’histoire du club, atteignant deux fois la finale de la coupe de Loire Atlantique au début des années 2000. Plus récemment, en 2018, les équipes U15F et U17G de la CTC Havre et Loire ont remporté cette coupe, ajoutant un nouveau titre à l'héritage du club.

Description:

L’équipe masculine évoluant quant à elle en Pré-Nationale avec pour ambition de monter en N3.

L’objectif du club est de continuer à structurer sa filière Jeune avec un projet de formation ambitieux, tout en maintenant les équipes fanions au meilleur niveau, de manière à ce que nos « jeunes pousses » puissent alimenter les équipes séniors à moyen terme.

Au début de l’année 2019 de nombreux changements se sont opérés dans la structure « administrative et gestionnaire » du club avec une nouvelle présidence et de nouvelles organisations afin de lui permettre de trouver une nouvelle dynamique.

Toutes les parties composantes du NHB, s’activent autour du projet du club afin de lui donner la place qu’il doit avoir dans le paysage sportif local et au delà, en mettant en avant la Fierté dans le Combat / Superbia in Proelio.

Description:
Révéler le potentiel de toutes les sportives sur le terrain et en dehors ! Suivez toute l’actualité sportive, institutionnelle et économique des Félines.

Les Félines c’est l’union de trois clubs engagés - le CRAHB, le Toulouse Féminin Handball et le Handball Club Quint-Fonsegrives - autour d’une ambition commune : faire du handball féminin une force majeure en Occitanie.

Notre vision : offrir à chaque sportive, quel que soit son niveau, un environnement structuré, professionnel et bienveillant pour progresser, performer et s’épanouir, sur le terrain et en dehors.

Notre projet : 

1. Structurer et professionnaliser le club pour accompagner l’essor du handball féminin en Occitanie.
2. Intégrer une brique de développement personnel, afin de soutenir la confiance, l’estime de soi et l’émancipation des femmes à travers le sport.
3. Attirer des sponsors engagés, indispensables pour fidéliser nos talents, en recruter de nouveaux et donner vie à nos ambitions.

Soutenir les Félines, c’est plus que soutenir un club :

1. C’est devenir acteur d’un projet sociétal qui donne aux femmes les moyens de se réaliser

2. C’est associer votre marque à une dynamique positive, moderne et inspirante

3. C’est participer à construire l’avenir du handball féminin en Occitanie.

Nous invitons les entreprises partageant nos valeurs à rejoindre cette aventure et à contribuer à un projet ambitieux, fédérateur et porteur de sens.

Name: The Playbook
Description:
The Playbook is an award-winning mental health sports tech company.

More than 50% of elite athletes report symptoms of depression & anxiety so severe that they struggle to function, let alone perform. The Playbook is a data-driven sports tech platform that helps competitive organizations prioritize safety and athlete well-being.

The Playbook app addresses the gap in evidence-based, scalable mental health tech solutions in elite competitive sports. Our B2B SaaS platform tracks athletes' well-being daily, offering real-time analysis for teams. It provides visibility into mental health, allowing organizations to respond quickly when an athlete's scores enter the Red Zone, indicating an unhealthy range. Player safety and well-being are our top priorities.

The Playbook’s competitive advantage lies in its evidence-based, data-driven approach to mental health, using validated assessments to track mental health metrics over time. Developed by licensed mental health and medical providers with deep expertise in the sports ecosystem, our platform offers actionable insights and real-time alerts for risk mitigation. Patent-pending and proprietary, we fill a critical gap where resources are often scarce.

Name: De 80 van de Langstraat
Description:
De geschiedenis van de 80

De 80 van de Langstraat begon ooit als kleinschalige wandeltocht met 168 startende deelnemers. Nu, 35 jaar later, is De 80 uitgegroeid tot een fenomeen. Dit alles dankzij een doelgerichte werkwijze, het vertrouwen van lopers, de inzet van honderden vrijwilligers en een niet aflatend enthousiasme van toeschouwers. 

De eerste 80
De eerste '80 van de Langstraat' werd gehouden in 1981. De tocht werd in het leven geroepen om de braderie in het centrum van Waalwijk nieuw leven in te blazen. Een jaar later werd het evenement, ditmaal onafhankelijk van de braderie, nogmaals georganiseerd. Toen werd de stichting 80 van de Langstraat geboren.

Snelle groei 
De jaren daarna groeide het aantal deelnemers en werd de organisatie professioneler. De computer werd ingezet voor registratie en de organisatie trok de eerste sponsors aan. Door de route meer door de bebouwde kom te laten lopen, kwam er ook meer publiek. Langzaam veranderde de tocht in een waar volksfeest.


Het succes van De 80
De lopers van De 80 komen vanuit het gehele land. Ook melden lopers zich vanuit Duitsland, België, Luxemburg, Oostenrijk, Zwitserland en zelfs Engeland! Dat De 80 goed bevalt blijkt ook wel uit het aantal lopers die na hun eerste keer terug blijven komen; 60% van de lopers heeft De 80 al eens uitgelopen!

Vi er en af divisionernes mindste økonomier, men kompenserer med kontinuitet, hårdt arbejde og et stærkt fællesskab på og uden for banen.

Name: Verbund Kölner Athleten
Description:
Verbund Kölner Athleten:

Wer wir sind?

Wir sind 25 Spitzensportlerinnen und -sportler. Wir alle trainieren in Köln und bereiten uns hier für die nächsten Wettkämpfe vor. Für nationale und internationale. Und natürlich für Olympia. Alle von uns gehören damit zur absoluten Weltspitze in ihren jeweiligen Disziplinen.

Warum gibt es uns?

Mit unseren Disziplinen sind wir ein bisschen wie das Schaltjahr: Man nimmt uns nur alle vier Jahre wirklich wahr. Und dann auch nur, wenn wir auf dem Treppchen landen. Um aber überhaupt an Olympia teilzunehmen, ist tägliches Training von mindestens 4-6 Stunden nötig. Unser Sport ist ein Vollzeitjob. Aber wird er auch so bezahlt? Leider nein. Wir möchten das ändern.

Warum ein Verbund?

Manche von uns sind Individualsportlerinnen und -sportler, andere im Mannschaftssport. Wir alle aber wissen: Ohne Team geht es nicht. Nur gemeinsam können wir in einem Wettkampf antreten, der für uns essenziell ist: dem Wettkampf um Aufmerksamkeit.

Du möchtest uns dabei unterstützen? Dann findest du hier Möglichkeiten dazu: verbund-koelner-athleten.de
Was auch hilft: Wenn du unser Anliegen teilst.

Name: Kilcullen GAA
Description:
Just five years after the historic meeting at the Hayes Hotel in Thurles when the GAA was founded.

Kilcullen had the distinction of providing the first Chairman and Secretary for the Kildare County Board in it’s first year in office. The Club contested three Senior Finals in 1892, 1917 and 1962.

The original club colours up to 1908 were Green and Gold, but it was agreed to change to black and white following the All Blacks Rugby team playing in Dublin in that year.

The famous nickname of “The Rags” can be traced back to an occasion when Kilcullen played a smartly dressed Dublin team,”Isles of the Sea”, who were very critical of the local team’s attire, or so the story is told.

The club's senior men play in Division 3 in Kildare, and in the Intermediate Championship.

The club's senior ladies play in Division 1 in Kildare, and in the Senior Championship.

Kilcullen has over 1,000 members and fields teams at every age group from U6 to Minor in both boys and LGFA. The club also fields several hurling teams, which is making a resurgence in the town since 2018.

The Collegiate Summer Baseball Register annually ranks the Ripken League one of the best collegiate summer leagues.  For more information on the Ripken League, go to www.calripkenleague.org

Name: Dreams United Football Club
Description:
Dreams F.C. and Afroscots United merged in 2021, to become Afroscots Dreams United F.C. but the partnership was dissolved in January 2023. Dreams United F.C. retained it's core group of players and will continue to achieve its original aims and objectives. 

Chairman: Adam Paterson
Non-Executive Director: Drew Hollinshead
Sponsor: J. R. Rahman Solicitors - https://www.jrrahman-solicitors.co.uk/

In our first season in the Scottish Unity Football League (SUFL), we narrowly missed out on the league title, with the title race going to the final day. Scoutable FC won the tightly contested game 3-2 at Holm Park, only our second defeat of the season, but enough to consign us to finishing second. 

We lifted the SUFL 2022 Summer Cup trophy on 09/10/22 at Holm Park, defeating Scoutable F.C., Universal F.C., and Greens F.C. on the road to the final where we met Red Road F.C. We played out a thrilling 2-2 draw, taking the lead with the final kick of the first half, and Red Road equalising to make it 2-2 with the final kick of the match to ensure penalties would decide the affair. Player/manager Evariste saved two penalties in a row before Rodrick stuck his penalty away to ensure we lifted our first trophy.

We are always looking for talented new young players to get involved with the group, and our squad features players from over 10 different countries, with asylum seekers, refugees, migrant and Scottish players all making up the squad.

In the upcoming 2022-23 SUFL league season, we will be arranging friendly games with semi-pro sides as well as playing weekly Sunday league matches, competing in the league cup, and the annual Refugee Festival 7-a-side tournament held at Toryglen.

Description:

1/ Traverser l'Atlantique en solitaire en 2023 et 2025 l'un après l'autre sur un voilier de 6m50 lors d'une course réunissant 100 bateaux http://www.mini-transat.net/
2/ Promouvoir les énergies renouvelables et les projets citoyens en soutenant l'association à but non lucratif @EnergiePartagée

Le projet se déroule sur 5 ans (2020 à 2025) et inclut de nombreuses courses en solitaire et en double permettant de se qualifier pour l'objectif final: La MiniTransat qui partira à l'automne 2023 pour Aymeric et 2025 pour Gaspard.

Profil des coureurs:
- Aymeric Le Renard, 36 ans, ingénieur, investisseur dans des petites et moyennes entreprises du Grand Ouest
- Gaspard Guillonneau, 36 ans, développeur de projets d'énergies renouvelables

Nous réalisons ce projet en tant qu'amateurs dans une classe qui regroupe de plus en plus de quasi-professionnels, à 50 ou 100% de leur temps sur le projet. 

Palmarès
- MiniFastnet 2022 600milles (6jours) - Aymeric & Gaspard - 25e/66
- Trophée MAP 2022 230milles (2jours) - Gaspard - 13e/63
- Mini en Mai 2022 500milles (3.5jours) - Aymeric - 17e/80
- MiniFastnet 2021 600milles (4 jours) - Aymeric & Gaspard - 21e/62
- Trophée MAP 2021 230milles (2 jours) - Aymeric - 51/59
- Plastimo 2021 300milles (3jours) - Aymeric & Gaspard - 27e/56

Name: Trifora Sports & Health Club
Description:
MEER DAN EEN SPORTSCHOOL

Trifora Sports & Health Club is een club met een unieke mix aan faciliteiten. Fitness, tennis, zwemmen en alle ondersteuning voor een vitaler leven. Wij geloven dat alles draait om balans. Regelmatig sporten, voldoende ontspannen en gezond eten. En daarmee gaan we jou helpen!

MEER DAN FITNESS

Trifora Sports & Health Club is meer dan fitness. Trifora is zelfs meer dan een sportschool. Wij geloven dat je alleen resultaat kunt boeken als je inspanning afwisselt met ontspanning.

PERSOONLIJK

Wil je fitter, slanker of juist sterker worden? Vanaf de intake nemen wij jouw doelstelling heel serieus. Na een persoonlijke kennismaking met een van onze fitcoaches ontwikkelen wij samen een plan. Dat plan begint met een trainingsplan. Dat kan individueel of in groepsverband zijn. Naast dit trainingsplan coachen wij je op het gebied van voeding en gewoontes. Door deze persoonlijke begeleiding weet je zeker dat je het maximale resultaat uit jouw inzet haalt. 

FITNESS

In de ruim opgezette fitness van Trifora Sports & Health Club maak je gebruik van de nieuwste fitnesstechnieken. Combineer dit met onze fitcoaches en onze voedingsapp en resultaat is slechts een kwestie van tijd. Wil je 1 op 1 begeleiding? Maak dan een afspraak met een van onze personal trainers. 

GROEPSLESSEN

Sport jij liever in een groep? Je kunt bij Trifora Sports & Health Club kiezen uit meer dan 60 geweldige groepslessen. Onder begeleiding van onze enthousiaste groepslesinstructeurs vind je, met heel veel plezier, de weg naar een fit lichaam en een gezonde geest!

OOK TRIFORA 

Naast onze fitnessfaciliteiten vind je bij ons een prachtige wellness, binnen- en buitentennisbanen, een tennisschool, een zwemschool, fysiotherapie op topsport niveau, een kidsclub om je als ouder tijdens het sporten te ontzorgen én professionele coaching op het gebied van voeding. En daarmee is Trifora Sports & Health Club een sfeervolle sportclub voor het hele gezin en voor alle leeftijden.

Name: Visually Impaired Rugby England
Description:
Visually Impaired Rugby (VI Rugby) is the UK’s leading adapted rugby initiative for individuals with sight loss.

We provide an inclusive and competitive environment where visually impaired athletes can train, play, and compete safely using specially adapted equipment and rules. Our mission is to make rugby accessible to all, removing barriers and promoting participation at all levels of the game.

Through regular training, community outreach, and international tournaments, we are building a platform that empowers players, educates the public, and champions inclusion in sport.

Key Focus Areas:

Adapted rugby training for individuals with visual impairments

Inclusive equipment and game development

Community engagement and awareness

Strategic partnerships with forward-thinking brands and organisations

Get involved:
We are open to sponsorships, partnerships, and collaborations that align with our values and help advance inclusive sport across the UK and internationally.

Visually Impaired (VI) Rugby is a seven-a-side touch rugby adapted for players with vision impairments, developed by The Change Foundation. It maintains the core elements of rugby, such as passing backwards and running forwards, but uses a seven-a-side, touch-only format with a commentary-based game. 

The game is designed to be inclusive and enjoyable for individuals with varying levels of visual impairment.

Name: Pacific.floaters
Description:
Wir, Wolfgang Fankhauser und Catharina Streit rudern im Juni 2023 von Monterrey, California nach Kauai, Hawaii. Unser Abenteuer finanzieren wird mit Sponsoren und der Erlös wird gespendet. Begleite auch du oder dein Unternehmen unser Abenteuer über den Ozean. 

#Sponsoring 
Wir bieten: die ultimative gleitende Leinwand, eine einzigartige Werbetafel, die national und international in den Medien vertreten sein wird. 
Das Logo auf dem Ruderboot wird je nach Sponsoringsumme platziert. Der Erlös wird an eine Charity gespendet. 

#ThisisFrida 
Unser Ruderboot trägt den Namen Frida. 
Sie wird unser Zuhause, 4444km (2800 Meilen) für ca. 40 bis 60 Tage, von Monterrey (Kalifornien) nach Kauai (Hawaii), sein. Wir sind völlig auf uns allein gestellt. Es gibt KEIN Begleitboot. 

#Challenge 
24/7 rudern und an die eigenen Grenzen gehen. 
24/7 nur die Weite des Ozeans sehen und gefriergetrocknete, hochkalorienreiche Nahrung aus Packungen essen. 
24/7 ans Limit gehen und mental stark bleiben. 
Das ganze 4444 km. 

#Whattoeat?
Gegessen wird Expedition Food. Hochkalorienreiche Nahrung in Packungen. Eine bestimmte Kalorien- Anzahl muss mitgenommen werden (wird nach Körpergewicht bemessen). Zubereitet wird das Essen nur mit Wasser. 

#andDrink? 
Ein Watermaker sorgt für Wasser. Dieser wandelt das Salzwasser in Süßwasser um. 
Wichtig für unser Essen, dass mit diesem Wasser dann aufgegossen bzw. zubereitet wird. 

#Fact 
Erst 80 Menschen sind erfolgreich vom Festland der USA auf eine hawaiianische Insel gerudert.

équipements de haute qualité. 
Notre objectif est de combler ce vide et de donner à 
ces athlètes la plateforme qu’ils méritent.

du sport en Afrique. Nous voulons mettre en lumière les talents sportifs africains et 
leur fournir les outils nécessaires pour réussir. Nous reconnaissons que de 
nombreux athlètes talentueux en Afrique n’ont pas accès aux ressources et aux 
opportunités nécessaires pour développer pleinement leurs compétences. C’est 
pourquoi nous nous engageons à fournir ces ressources et à créer ces opportunités. 
Notre Vision 
Nous envisageons un avenir où chaque athlète talentueux en Afrique a la possibilité 
de briller. Nous voulons être la force motrice qui propulse les talents sportifs 
africains sur la scène mondiale. Nous croyons en un avenir où le talent sportif en 
Afrique est reconnu et célébré, non seulement au niveau local, mais aussi au niveau 
international.

Name: United Riccione
Description:
S.S.D. United Riccione Calcio sotto un’unica bandiera
United è essenziale per descrivere l’unione, la condivisione tipica delle due città, quella romagnola e quella napoletana. 
Napoli e Riccione, contraddistinti dai colori bianco e azzurro, come il mare e il cielo, si rincontrano ancora una volta. 

Ad accompagnare questo viaggio il brand Power X che diventa sponsor ufficiale dei bianco azzurri. 
Power X nasce nel 2007 e diventa il punto di riferimento degli appassionati di device all’avanguardia. Punto di riferimento e d’incontro grazie agli store che da poco hanno conquistato il centro di Napoli. 
La dedizione, la voglia di crescere e migliorare che sono da sempre i principi ispiratori dell’imprenditore napoletano, si sposano perfettamente con il nuovo progetto di Cassese. 
La tecnologia incontra il calcio: in fondo, l’energia è nel sangue!

Il nuovo presidente descrive il suo progetto con l’obiettivo di “scrivere la storia”. 
La squadra romagnola si prefigge di dare importanza ai giovani che saranno la parte essenziale del progetto.

“Il Settore giovanile sarà un nostro punto di partenza. [...]Intendiamo investire pesantemente anche laddove dovremo costruire il nostro patrimonio futuro” commenta Cassese nell’intervista rilasciata al Notiziario del Calcio.
Con la nascita di questa nuova realtà si configura per il Riccione Calcio anche l’iscrizione al Campionato di serie D. 

Da oggi, Power X, Pc Distribution e S.S.D. United Riccione Calcio sotto un’unica bandiera.

Name: União Desportiva de Santarém
Description:
A União Desportiva de Santarém (UDS) foi fundada no dia 23 de Agosto de 1969, fruto da fusão entre dois clubes históricos da cidade de Santarém: o Sport Grupo Scalabitano “Os Leões” e o Sport Grupo União Operária.
Desde a sua criação e até aos inícios dos anos 2000, a UD Santarém foi presença assídua nas competições nacionais de futebol, tendo como pontos altos as conquistas da antiga III Divisão por duas ocasiões (1974/75 e 1984/85). O Clube também chegou a ter a modalidade de basquetebol feminino, tendo vivido o seu período áureo na década de 90, onde conquistou diversos títulos nacionais a nível sénior (2 Campeonatos Nacionais da I Divisão, 4 Taças de Portugal e 2 Supertaças), aos quais se junta o Campeonato Nacional de Cadetes Femininos (sub-16).
A UD Santarém conta ainda no seu palmarés com várias conquistas em modalidades como andebol, ciclismo, ginástica, atletismo e pesca, assim como dezenas de títulos nos vários escalões da sua formação. Atualmente, a UD Santarém é dos clubes da Associação de Futebol de Santarém com mais atletas, possuindo todos os escalões de formação, incluindo futebol feminino (sub-15) e ainda equipa de veteranos.
Desde 2019/20 que a UD Santarém tem marcado presença nas competições nacionais, tendo alcançado a promoção à Liga 3 na época 2020/21, permitindo, deste modo, ser uma das 24 equipas que participaram na primeira edição de sempre desta recém-criada competição organizada pela Federação Portuguesa de Futebol.

PERFORMANȚĂ
PENTRU TIMIȘOARA
Rugby-ul i-a obișnuit pe timișoreni cu multe satisfacții, cu trofee cucerite frecvent și cu mulți jucători chemați la echipele naționale.
XV-le Timișoarei a cucerit de-a lungul timpului 13 trofee: șase titluri de campioană, cinci Cupe ale României, o Cupă a Regelui și o Cupă a Europei Centrale.
CAMPIONI
NAȚIONALI
Tradiția s-a născut în 1972, când Universitatea Timișoara devenea prima echipă din afara Bucureștiului care cucerea un titlu național, dar a continuat abia după anul 2000, când RCM Timișoara câștiga Cupa Europei Centrale (2009), apoi Cupa României (2011) și campionatul (2012).

https://rugby.scmtimisoara.ro/wp-content/uploads/2022/04/Design-fara-titlu-2022-04-18T223252.128.jpg
PALMARESUL
TIMIȘOAREI
RUGBISTICE
Trofeele rugbiului timișorean:
- Titluri de campioană națională: 1972, 2012, 2013, 2015, 2017, 2018
- Cupe ale României: 2011, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2021
- Cupa Regelui: 2015
- Cupa Europei Centrale: 2009

Name: Twente Basketball (Stichting Basketbal Academy Twente)
Description:
The "Stichting Basketbal Academy Twente" has restarted. The name we use to communicate with all stakeholders is "Twente Basketball"

Our Purpose statement: 
Basketball where passionate talents can develop their potential both athletically and socially.

Our Mission:
From Twente we want to lay a foundation in which we unite sports clubs, education, business, government and social institutions to guide passionate talents through basketball in athletic and social development with respect for and trust in each other.

Our Vision
Twente premier league basketball teams that are sustainably and widely supported to compete at the international level.


Become a follower. Be part of this community, join us to build up a community

The overarching goal of Twente Basketball is to elevate basketball in the Twente region to the highest European competition levels. We aim to achieve this by fostering an ecosystem that nurtures homegrown talent and cultivates a dedicated staff within the Twente community. Our vision is to draw from a diverse pool of basketball players, providing them with a supportive, stimulating, and secure environment to thrive and excel in their athletic pursuits. 

To realize our vision and overarching goal, likened to the peak of a pyramid, we recognize the importance of laying a solid foundation. In pursuit of this foundation, Twente Basketball has carefully chosen three primary projects:
•	Empowering Young Athletes Through Basketbal.
•	Expanding Access to Basketball in Communities.
•	Knowledge Transfer and Development Support

Name: Leichtathletik Klub Zug
Description:
Der LK Zug zählt zu den führenden Leichtathletikvereinen der Zentralschweiz. Er orientiert sich primär am Wettkampf- und Leistungssport. Aber auch Gesundheitssportlerinnen finden im Leichtathletik Klub Zug eine Heimat.

Mit seiner breit abgestützten Nachwuchsabteilung sorgt der LK Zug für Kontinuität im Wettkampf- und Leistungssport. Mit der Organisation von Grossanlässen, zuletzt der Schweizer Staffelmeisterschaften 2020 auf der blauen Tartanbahn, engagiert sich der Verein auch gesamtschweizerisch für die Leichtathletik. Im Wettkampfkalender stehen alljährlich das Frühjahrsmeeting, das Zuger Stabmeeting und das Nationale Bettagsmeeting, das zu den grössten Nachwuchsanlässen zählt. Der LK Zug ist Mitglied von Swiss Athletics, dem Schweizerischen Leichtathletikverband.

LK Zug is one of the leading athletics clubs in Central Switzerland. Its main focus is on competitive and performance sports. But the club is also a home for healthy athletes. With its broad-based junior section, LK Zug ensures continuity in competitive sport. By organising major events, most recently the 2020 Swiss Relay Championships on the blue tartan track, the club also promotes athletics throughout Switzerland. The competition calendar includes the annual Spring Meeting, the Zug Pole Meeting and the National Bettagsmeeting, which is one of the biggest events for young athletes. LK Zug is a member of Swiss Athletics.

Name: Run Mummy Run
Description:
Run Mummy Run was founded in 2012 and was the first online running community for women of its kind. Our community empowers women and supports them to lead happier and healthier lives through running.

For us, as a community, kindness is everything. We want women to be kind to themselves, and follow their dreams and passions. We want women to be kind to each other, encouraging, supporting and motivating with every step. We want to teach children the value of kindness, so that they can one day make an impact on the world. We actively promote kindness, friendship, love, support, equality and unity as core values.

We encourage each and every member to pay it forward, and we have witnessed some amazing acts of generosity. We have built a strong, loyal community team, who work tirelessly to ensure that the Run Mummy Run community stays true to our valued ethos of kindness, a place where all opinions are welcome but all must be respected.

Our aim is to encourage, support and inspire all women to take up running and enjoy their journey. We want to be there to help them through the tough times, share their milestones and celebrate their achievements. We want to give them a safe, secure environment to talk openly and honestly about every aspect of running, and know that they’ll be met with kindness, respect and love. We watch as strong friendships grow both online and in real-life, and we see lives change for the better through a shared interest.

We’re passionate about encouraging the next generation to be active, and we believe that by supporting women in their running journeys, they become role models for their children, inspiring them and promoting self-belief.

Run Mummy Run: the online community that values kindness, encourages self-belief, inspires dreams and supports women at every step of their running journey.

Name: Aztec Link
Description:

Our mission at Aztec Link is to connect fans and brands with SDSU student athletes. Our goal is to create strategic and impactful business relationships across the city, state, region and nation that positively impact all parties for generations to come.

Aztec Link empowers San Diego State student athletes to monetize their years in college sports. We provide athletes with the playbook to make passive income by leveraging their name, image, and likeness (NIL) right with ease and confidence.

Aztec Link has grown into a unique collective that not only benefits athletes, but creates opportunities for businesses and fans.

Contact us at info@azteclink.com for more information.

The 1870 Society also believes that success is not just about achieving great things, but doing it the right way. The organization is committed to creating a culture that values integrity, transparency, and a high moral compass.

The 1870 Society is a new and innovative organization that is committed to helping Ohio State student-athletes succeed. The organization is a valuable resource for student-athletes, businesses, and fans alike.

Project Final Push – The Last Summit of the 7 Summits Mission!!

Every journey has a final step, every expedition a final summit. After years of relentless pursuit, overcoming extreme altitudes, brutal weather, and pushing the limits of human endurance, I am now gearing up for the last challenge of my 7 Summits mission—Project Final Push.

Name: Hangtime Basketball Academy
Description:
Welcome to Hangtime Basketball Academy's LinkedIn page! We are a premier basketball training institution committed to nurturing the talents of aspiring athletes and empowering them to achieve their highest potential on and off the court.

Whether you are a young player looking to improve your skills, a parent seeking top-notch training for your child, or a basketball enthusiast interested in our programs, Hangtime Basketball Academy is the place for you. Join us on this journey of excellence.

At Hangtime Basketball Academy, we take pride in our exceptional track record of achievements. Over the years, our academy has produced numerous standout players who have gone on to achieve success at various levels of basketball, from high school championships to college scholarships and even professional contracts. Our alumni have represented their schools, colleges, and countries with distinction, showcasing their skills and sportsmanship to the world.

Our success lies in our holistic approach to basketball development. We combine expert coaching, state-of-the-art facilities, and a comprehensive curriculum to provide our athletes with the tools they need to succeed. Our experienced coaching staff consists of former collegiate and professional players who bring a wealth of knowledge and expertise to the training sessions. They foster a positive and competitive environment where athletes can learn, grow, and thrive.

At Hangtime Basketball Academy, our goals go beyond winning games. We strive to instill valuable life skills in our athletes, such as discipline, teamwork, leadership, and perseverance. We believe that these qualities are essential for success both on and off the court. By emphasizing the importance of character development alongside basketball skills, we prepare our athletes to become well-rounded individuals who can excel in any endeavor they choose.

We are also committed to promoting diversity and inclusivity within our academy.

Name: Penn Athletic Club Rowing Association
Description:
The Mission of Penn AC Rowing Association is: to educate and enable youth and elite rowing athletes, men and women, to achieve sustained competitive excellence and high performance in local, regional, national and international competitions (including but not limited to Olympic, Pan American, and World competitions); to stimulate and foster interest in the sport of rowing among participants as individuals and as participants of schools and associations authorized to utilize Club facilities; to offer equal opportunity to compete without discriminating on the basis of a federal or state protected class or status; and to promote interest through participation in regattas.

Current Penn AC programs include an active and dedicated High Performance Group, a summer high-performance junior team operating as Penn AC Gold, a robust and competitive masters team, and an engaged community of current rowers, alumni, friends and family.

Bill Manning is the current head coach of Penn AC's High Performance team. He started with the club in February 2022, and in his first three years, has coached seven athletes to earn spots on the US senior team. In October, 2023 he coached the W2- (Gold), W4- (Silver), W8+ (Silver), LW2x (Silver), and Mixed 8+ (Gold) at the 2023 Pan American Games. Seven of the twenty rowers/scullers on Team USA came from the Penn AC High Performance Group.

Our key aim is to provide opportunities for all in Carlisle and Cumbria using the power of sport to motivate, encourage and inspire people of all backgrounds to achieve their potential.

Name: Trondheim Maraton
Description:
Trondheim Maraton er Norges eldste maraton, og arrangeres hver høst. Trondheim Maraton ble første gang arrangert i 1969 under navnet Studentmaraton  men løpet fikk først navnet Trondheim Maraton i 1983. Siden den gangen har Trondheim Maraton vært i vekst og har for alvor begynt å markere i Norge som et viktig arrangement. 

Hovedfokuset for TM er folkehelse. Vi skal være et arrangement for alle fra 0 – 99 år. Vi ønsker å ta vare på deltakerne igjennom å gi dem verktøy for å mestre igjennom hele året. Løpekurs, foredrag, ernæringsforedrag, events og treningsarenaer samtidig som vi prøver å bidra til årets treningsmål. Løypa har vi lagt rundt bykjernen slik du som deltaker eller publikum skal få se mye av hva Trondheim by har å vise frem. Vi er stolt over den nye løypetraseen som først og fremst er vakker og publikumsvennlig.

I 2019 tok det helt av og vi hadde 7700 påmeldte deltakere. Det betyr at rekorden fra 2018 med 4857 ble smadret. Målet for 2020 var 10.000 deltakere på startstreken, noe det ikke ble grunnet pandemien. I 2021 ble det arrangement med restrikjoner og vi kunne ha 3000 heldige deltakere med. Nå jobber vi målrettet og bredt for å passere 10.000 deltakere!

Name: Futsal Club Ljiljan
Description:
Välkommen till Futsal Club Ljiljan! 

Futsal Club Ljiljan grundades 2017 i Mölnlycke i utkanten av Göteborg av ett kompisgäng med en gemensam passion för futsal. De såg ett behov av fler renodlade futsalföreningar och valde att själva ta initiativet. Det som började som en idé har idag vuxit till en förening med drygt 250 medlemmar och 15 ungdomslag, från knattar till flick-, pojk- och juniorlag.

Vår resa började med herrlagets debut i seriespel 2018. Sedan dess har laget vunnit sin serie varje säsong – med undantag för säsongen 2022/23 då laget, som nykomlingar, etablerade sig i Division 1. Säsongen 2024/25 blev en milstolpe: herrlaget kvalificerade sig för spel i Svenska Futsalligan (SFL), Sveriges högsta liga för futsal.

Med Mölnlycke Idrottshall A som hemmaarena och helsvart som klubbfärg fortsätter vi att bygga en förening som växer med hjärtat i futsal. Vår drivkraft är att skapa en plats där gemenskap, glädje och utveckling alltid står i centrum – oavsett om du är spelare, ledare eller supporter.

Vi är stolta över vår resa hittills – men ännu mer nyfikna på framtiden.

Syftet med LinkedIn för Futsal Club Ljiljan är att förbättra kommunikationen och synligheten för klubben och dess aktiviteter. Genom att använda Linkedin vill vi: 

Informera och Engagera: Dela nyheter, evenemang och framsteg i högsta ligan samt ungdomslagens utveckling för att engagera både spelare, supportrar och sponsorer.

Bygga Nätverk: Skapa relationer med andra klubbar, potentiella sponsorer och lokala företag för att stärka klubben.

Främja Futsal: Sprida kunskap och intresse för futsal i Mölnlycke och Göteborgsområdet samt inspirera fler att delta i sporten.

Genom denna grupp hoppas vi kunna förstärka vårt varumärke och nå en bredare publik.


Välkommen att följa med oss på vår resa

Name: HK Olimpija Ljubljana
Description:
Olimpija Ljubljana Ice Hockey Club was founded in 2004.

We are a club with a clear vision, a strong men’s team, and a broad base of young hockey players. Our objective is to achieve top results with the mens' team while also ensuring the development of new players in youth categories in the spirit of fair play and values such as respect, collegiality, persistence and dedication. We swear by Slovenian sports expertise and aim to provide young Slovenian hockey players with international experiences.

We are committed to a professional and expert approach in all categories. We are members of the Slovenian Ice Hockey Federation and collaborate with other domestic and foreign hockey clubs and associations. 

We are engaged in the education and training of young hockey players and the promotion of ice hockey in the Ljubljana area and its surroundings. We compete in the National Championship under the patronage of the Slovenian Ice Hockey Federation, in domestic and international tournaments in all categories, and our men’s and women’s teams also compete in international competitions. In the 2017/18 season, the team of HK Olimpija competed for the first time in the international AHL League and won the AHL Cup in the 2018-2019 and 2020-2021 seasons. After three successful years in the Alps Hockey League, we joined the newly formed ICE Hockey League (formerly the EBEL league) in the season 2021-2022. In the subsequent seasons of 2022-2023 and 2023-2024, we remained members of the ICE Hockey League. In the 2022-2023 season, we became the first Slovenian hockey team to participate in the Champions Hockey League.

Name: Kridanta
Description:
Kridanta is a pioneering sports development and education startup dedicated to revolutionizing India’s sporting landscape—starting from the grassroots, with a special emphasis on Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities. In regions where structured sports programs are scarce but raw talent is plentiful, we create pathways for aspiring athletes, coaches, and educators to realize their full potential.

We tackle long-standing challenges such as the shortage of certified coaches, fragmented player development, inadequate performance tracking, and limited access to sporting opportunities. Our comprehensive, end-to-end solution offers on-demand access to qualified coaches, technology-driven player monitoring, expert consultancy on sports infrastructure, and event management services for schools, academies, and clubs.

But Kridanta’s vision goes far beyond athlete performance. We are committed to elevating the entire sports ecosystem by empowering coaches and physical education (PE) teachers. Here, passion meets profession: athletes, coaches, and PE teachers alike can transform their dreams into success stories—from local playgrounds to national arenas.

Our structured approach guarantees:
- Athletes progress from grassroots training to national-level competition and recognition,
- Coaches receive job opportunities, continuous professional development, and deserved recognition,
- PE teachers advance into certified experts with clear pathways for career growth.

Driven by inclusion and impact, Kridanta also champions underprivileged but talented athletes, offering free coaching, scholarships, and exposure to competitive platforms—ensuring that potential knows no barriers of background or circumstance.

At Kridanta, we believe every dream deserves a fair shot—and we are committed to making that a reality.

- The Royal Navy & Royal Marines Charity
- MND Scotland
- Mind, Body & Sole mental health charity.

We are five normal men looking to complete a not so normal challenge. Working offshore in the oil and gas industry out of Aberdeen, we are looking to shake off some labels and perceptions and come together to create something magical.

Currently looking for corporate sponsors to partner with us to help facilitate the ocean crossing and benefit themselves from the marketing potential of an ever growing event that has worldwide outreach, engagement and opportunity whilst facilitating the fund raising for charity in our core focus areas.

Please reach out to find out more and join us on our journey.
