Name: Queen's University Belfast A.F.C.
Description:
Queen’s Football Club was founded in 1910, two years after Queen’s College Belfast became Queen’s University Belfast.

Queen’s, UCD, Trinity College Dublin and University College Galway contested the first Collingwood Cup competition in Dublin in 1914. In the semi-finals, Queen’s defeated Galway 3-1 and UCD overcame Trinity by 5-2. In the final, UCD prevailed by 3 goals to 1 against Queen’s.

The Northern Amateur Football League was founded in 1923 and Queen’s were one of the 16 founder member Clubs.

Queen’s gained a place in the fledgling Irish League “B” division in the early 1950s and they competed in this League until 1996.

There then followed seven seasons in the Northern Ireland Intermediate League before the Club achieved a place in the Irish League second division in the 2003/04 season. Since then Queen’s have progressed to the Northern Ireland Football League (NIFL) Premier Intermediate League which they won in 2018, thus gaining promotion to the NIFL Championship and Senior football for the first time in the Club’s history. 

Other notable achievements in recent years have included reaching the semi-final of the Irish Cup in 2014 and winning the IFA Intermediate Cup in 2018. In January 2020 came an amazing day when Queen’s defeated Linfield in the fifth round of the Irish Cup. 

Over the years Queen’s have fielded a number of teams in addition to the first team. In the 1960s and 70s, Queen’s had 5 teams playing in various leagues. That number has reduced in recent years but the Seconds still play in the Northern Amateur Football League.

Name: Gallia Sport Saint-Aunès
Description: Le Gallia Sport Saint-Aunès est un club de football située près de Montpellier dans l'Hérault.

Name: LXT Esports
Description: LXT Esports oltre ad essere un esports team è un asset strategico di ASK Advisory per perseguire le finalità di “beneficio comunque”, operando anche nel mondo del gaming in modo responsabile, sostenibile e trasparente nei confronti di persone, comunità, territori e ambiente, beni e attività culturali e sociali, enti e associazioni e altri portatori di interesse.

Name: Muhonen & Bremer Sailing
Description: Follow our journey towards Paris Olympic Games 2024!

Name: Green Gully Soccer Club Ltd
Description:
Green Gully Soccer Club was established as Ajax Soccer Club in 1955 by Maltese immigrants. In honour of the Maltese Floriana club, Ajax SC adopted their familiar green and white playing strips.

Green Gully currently compete in the National Premier League Victoria and have been Victorian Champions a total of nine times.

Green Gully Soccer Club is also home to the Gully Bistro and hosts regular functions and events non-related to football.

Name: Padel Insights Network (PIN)
Description: PIN brings together players from across the market research and data sector to play padel, network and have fun.

Name: Lake Victoria Athletic Club
Description: Club operates on Lake Victoria which promotes recreational and competitive watersports. The club is constantly acquiring new members and there is the ongoing development of an academy for teaching swimming and rowing.

Name: The Academy Volleyball Club
Description: The Academy Volleyball Club is a competitive volleyball club in central Indiana with locations in Indianapolis, Westfield, and Lafayette. We offer girls and boys club teams, camps, lessons, leagues, and more!

Name: Tiesse Robot Rugby Calvisano
Description:
Rugby Calvisano è una società sportiva nata nel 1970 con lo scopo principale di promuovere il rugby sul territorio e contribuire alla crescita personale degli atleti secondo principi etici e sani.

Attualmente il Rugby Calvisano vanta 7 scudetti ed una storia di campionati italiani che dura da oltre 50 anni. 

Siamo una realtà dinamica, crediamo molto nel gioco di squadra e nel sacrificio per raggiungere risultati migliori.

Name: Académie Beauvaisienne d'Escrime
Description:
L’Académie Beauvaisienne d’Escrime est une association sportive créée en 2003, de plus de 240 licenciés.
Située à Beauvais, la salle d’armes présente 14 pistes d’escrime, toutes équipées électriquement. 
 Labellisée Centre de Préparation JO de Paris 2024. 

Les disciplines pratiquées sont le Ludo Escrime, l’escrime loisirs et sportive à l’épée, le sabre laser, l’escrime artistique, l’escrime santé et l'Handi escrime.
L’Académie Beauvaisienne d’Escrime comporte également une section pentathlon moderne.

 Palmarès du club 
 1 titre de Champion du Monde Junior en 2019. 
 Double vainqueur de la Coupe d’Europe des Clubs Femmes en 2019 et 2024.
 1 titre de Champion d'Europe individuel et par Équipe en 2024.
 81 médailles aux Championnats de France.
 2 médailles d’or en Coupe du Monde.
 1 médaille d’or aux Championnats d’Europe U23.
 1 médaille d’or aux Universiades.

Name: Chattanooga Sports Leagues
Description:
Chattanooga Sports Leagues (CSL) started unofficially in 2012 running our first kickball and soccer leagues. In 2013 CSL quickly gained traction, adding sand volleyball, cornhole, flag football and Basketball to the sports lineup. Over the years, Chattanooga Sports Leagues has transformed into the largest adult intramural sports operation in the Chattanooga area providing the premier experience you know today. CSL has offered a variety of sports to thousands of participants over the last 10 years.  CSL offers an intramural sport for every level of play and interest. We are always seeking new ways to grow our leagues and ensure all participants enjoy each season. 

As of January 1, 2023, CSL will become part of a larger organization, CCA Sports. We will bring CCA’s 29 years of experience to maintain current leagues and work to provide unforgettable intramural and social experiences for the Chattanooga community.

We understand that you work hard during the week, and CSL wants you to be able to play harder -- whether that be in one of our leagues, or at one of our social events.

CSL would like to thank all our participants, facilities, and any who have helped us over the years. We are always looking for great organizations to get involved with, and we couldn't do it without you. Your comments and suggestions are welcome at any time. Let us be the escape in your everyday routine.

To provide any feedback please contact John@playcsl.com

Name: Craig Molloy Coaching C.I.C
Description:
CraigMolloy Coaching C.I.C is a community-focused social enterprise based in Inverclyde, founded by former professional footballer CraigMolloy.

Our mission extends beyond sport we use football as a platform to uplift individuals of all ages and backgrounds, and to strengthen the bonds within our local community.

We are providing low-cost trauma-informed community sports coaching across In Individuals from age 2 - 73.

We are proud to run a wide range of inclusive programs that make a genuine, lasting impact in the Inverclyde area.

 
These include 
• Children’s Football Classes: We offer structured, fun, and engaging sessions for children of all abilities. These classes not only focus on football skills but also promote confidence, discipline, teamwork, and physical wellbeing. 

 • Over-50s Walking Football Group: This initiative brings together older adults many of whom face isolation or health challenges and offers them a way to stay active, socialize, and maintain their physical and mental health. It’s more than just a game; it’s a lifeline for connection and routine. 

• New Scots Integration Program: We are especially proud of our work with asylum seekers, refugees, and migrants, helping them integrate into the community through football. Through regular training, matches, and social activities, CIC creates a welcoming environment where New Scots can build friendships, improve their English, develop skills.

Girls-only football classes: This creates a safe, supportive, and empowering environment where girls can build confidence, develop skills, and enjoy the game without pressure. We believe in breaking down barriers to participation, promoting equality in sport.

ASN football: We believe every young person deserves the opportunity to enjoy sport in a supportive, inclusive environment, our tailored football sessions help build confidence, improve physical fitness, foster friendships.

Name: Club Hive
Description:
Club Hive is dé sportclub voor bedrijven
Wij geloven in de kracht van samen sporten om het succes van bedrijven te vergroten. Vanuit onze ervaring en expertise organiseren wij alles met betrekking tot sport voor jouw bedrijf. Van het verbinden van collega’s die vaker samen gaan sporten, tot toernooien en evenementen voor klanten, relaties en wervingscampagnes. Alles is mogelijk!

Advies & Executie | Maak samen met de experts van Club Hive een sport jaar plan op maat en benut de kracht van sport het hele jaar.

Netwerk | Club Hive organiseert dé sportieve netwerk events van de toekomst! Samen sporten verbindt, vergroot je netwerk op en naast het veld.

Engagement | Een eigen community in de innovatieve app voor het hele bedrijf. De meest eenvoudige manier om de organisatie en engagement van het sport jaar plan te optimaliseren. 

Club Hive: Play the sport Together!

Name: Local Pitch Ventures
Description:
Local Pitch Ventures, LLC (LPV) is an investment and operations group dedicated to accelerating the game of women's football throughout the globe. Our current mission is to acquire majority ownership stakes in a number of professional women's clubs, semi-professional teams, challenger leagues, youth academies, football related events and complimentary sports within markets of interest. Our vision is to enhance the value of brands, grow enterprise value, increase the level of play, develop communities, support families, and provide opportunities to young girls not only with a dream to play at the top level but to eventually work in it or find the career path of their dreams using football as their pathway.

With a presence in England, Portugal as well as both the East and West Coasts of the United States, our diverse team of experts cross pollinates successful careers in world football (as a manager, coach, consultant, club executive, and technical director), entrepreneurship, business development, brand building, investment banking, legal expertise, and venture capital. 

Our long-term aim includes the development of a Multi Football Project Ownership (MFPO) network. We recognize immense growth potential in the women's game as is supported by increasing viewers/interest, sponsorship, revenue, and conversations about the game globally. Our approach focuses on enhancing the family experience at matches, offering increased funding for players and staff, activating innovative sponsorship, pipeline and collaboration strategies, and building a brand that offers significant development opportunities for young women. Additionally, we place major investment into storytelling, branding, developing pathways in underdeveloped/poverty stricken countries and use a variety of media sources to grow our projects, create "heroes", open doors for players in our ecosystem and increase financial sustainability.

Name: El Palo FC
Description:
El Palo FC es uno de los equipos más señeros del fútbol malagueño, abanderado por el singular barrio marinero que le da nombre. 

Fundado en 1965, nuestra historia se reparte principalmente entre las antiguas Tercera División, Regional Preferente y Segunda B. Actualmente, llevamos nuestro fútbol por el Grupo IX de la Tercera Federación. 

Nuestro presidente, Manuel Heredia, dirige un club que comprende la gestión y el correcto funcionamiento de 24 equipos además del senior, que van desde las categorías bebé hasta juvenil. Así, la cantera paleña es nuestro mayor orgullo y valor, estando formada por más de 400 jóvenes. Su relevancia queda justificada por los más de 20 futbolistas de la casa que han logrado debutar en Primera División.

Para conocernos con más profundidad, síguenos a través de nuestros perfiles oficiales 

Twitter  https://twitter.com/ElPaloFC
Instagram  https://www.instagram.com/elpalofc
Facebook  https://es-la.facebook.com/elpalofc
YouTube  https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2WQiEJCZsgD7QgbXGzY0NQ

Name: Longford Rugby Club
Description:
Longford Rugby Club is one of Irelands oldest rugby clubs, initially formed in the late 1800's. The Club reformed in 1967 and has grown to be one of the most progressive Rugby Clubs in Ireland. LRFC is a community club that fosters & grows rugby throughout the North Leinster/Midlands region with impressive programmes in places to develop players, both Male & Female, from Under 6's upwards. 

Our Senior Men's 1st XV play in the highly competitive  Division 1B of the Leinster League. Our Senior Women play in Division 3 of the Women's League.  New players and club members are always welcome. We operate a vibrant past players and friend of LRFC programme vis the "Auld Blacks".

Name: DeuJogo
Description:
O DeuJogo é uma plataforma que promove a saúde e bem-estar das pessoas através do incentivo à prática de diversos esportes em todo o Brasil. 
Nosso propósito é proporcionar conexões entre as pessoas (jogadores) e também com os locais/quadras esportivas, facilitando e agilizando a reserva de horários em quadras de todo o país, além de atrair novos clientes para esses estabelecimentos esportivos.

- Por meio de um app para os jogadores, é possível reservar e pagar os horários nessas quadras esportivas com muita comodidade, de maneira rápida e fácil, assim como em diversos apps que estamos acostumados a usar.

- Para os donos/gestores de quadras, sabemos como é a correria do cotidiano e a importância do tempo em nossas vidas, justamente por isso disponibilizamos uma plataforma intuitiva que ajuda os gestores de quadras a transformarem sua vida e seus negócios de maneira inteligente, possibilitando uma gestão completa de forma automatizada e descomplicada!

Name: CTG Archery Club
Description:
Mission, vision and value:
Archery’s vision is for a world in which everyone has the opportunity to practice, engage with and enjoy the important sport of archery.

Our mission is:

-To make archery a leading sport in nations around the world.
-To build and regulate and event ecosystem.
-To grow awareness and engagement with the sport.
Archery’s values include:

-Precision
-Intensity
-Innovation
-Heritage
-Fair play
-Sport for all

Name: Padel Arena Jo
Description: A leading Padel club located in the heart of Amman. Padel Arena is on a mission to introduce and grow the sport in Jordan.

Name: Business Club SV Hoofddorp
Description: Welkom bij de business club van SV Hoofddorp. De plek waar sportieve verbinding ontstaat en waar we werken aan uitbouwen van onze gezamenlijke business.  Het creëren van een win-win situatie voor lokale ondernemers en de club door middel van zichtbaarheid op basis van behoeften en toegang tot een bruisend netwerk. Dit is het beginsel van deze voetbalclub voor ondernemers en mensen met hart voor SV Hoofddorp.

Name: Fast and Furio Sailing Team
Description:
The Fast & Furio Sailing Team is a professional team of affirmed sailors, lovers of the sea and challenges founded by Furio Benussi. Active for 30 years in the racing world with an incredible palmares of successes.
The Maxi Yacht ARCA 100 is found by Furio Benussi in late 2018 in a small shipyard on the island of Menorca. In 2019, the BoReAS project (Boat Recycle in Action for Sailing Project) starts, which immediately involves Arca Fondi SGR as sponsor of the initiative, aims to provide the Fast and Furio Sailing Team with a fast and competitive racing boat, minimizing the environmental impact, associated with the ex-novo construction of a boat with the same technical and performance characteristics.
Within a few months, using almost exclusively scrap materials and with a limited budget, the Team captained by Furio Benussi manages to put the boat back into the sea. In 2019, after a series of extraordinary maintenance operations carried out in Trieste, the boat returns to racing.
From 2021, the Maxi-Yacht 100 ARCA SGR achieves an incredible series of successes, crowned by triumphs at the Giraglia and Barcolana.

The Maxi 100 ARCA SGR is not only one of the most competitive boats on the Mediterranean race courses, it is also the circular economy project of the Fast and Furio Sailing Team and Arca Fondi SGR, making it the first boat to obtain EPD (Environmental Product Declaration) certification in the marine industry.
Thanks to the excellent sporting results, the multiple charity initiatives supported by Arca Fondi, and Skipper Furio Benussi's role as Ambassador for charities, the Maxi-Yacht 100 ARCA SGR now represents a phenomenal platform for sustainability initiatives. A project that starting from the circular economy comes to cover the different areas of the ESG approach, constituting a unique example of synergy, coherence and multiplication of value.

Name: Willie Geter Jr
Description:
Upcoming Basketball Pro Athlete
Primary Position: Point Guard
Secondary Position: Shooting Guard
Current Team: Monsignor Pace Spartans

Name: Collingwood College AFC
Description:
CCAFC compete in inter-collegiate football matches at Durham University. With 15 mens and 2 womens teams, we are one of the largest amateur football clubs in the UK.

The Club is also one of the most successful clubs in Durham, winning the Men’s Floodlit Cup and Women’s Football Trophy in 2022. Additionally, CCAFC has 4 mens teams in the Premier league; no other college has more than one. 

We have teams for all standards of football and strive to be an inclusive and welcoming club to all those who wish to join.

Community is everything at Collingwood. We have many events each year which bring the whole club together, the most notable being our Charity Ball and ‘24 hours of Football’ events which last year raised over £7000 for RSACC, a local rape and sexual abuse counselling centre in the North East.

Name: NATIONAL ATHLETICS ASSOCIATION OF ZIMBABWE
Description:
The National Athletics Association of Zimbabwe (NAAZ) is the national
governing body for athletics in Zimbabwe, dedicated to promoting, developing,
and governing the sport at all levels. With a rich history of producing world-class athletes, NAAZ is committed to creating opportunities for Zimbabweans to participate in athletics, from grassroots to elite levels.

Name: Great Yarmouth Town FC
Description:
Great Yarmouth Town FC have existed for 125 years and are an integral part of the local community. A proactive club, The Bloaters are very active in the community and regularly work with local charities and promote good causes.

Our values are at the heart of everything we do, guiding our actions and driving our success

INTEGRITY • DISCIPLINE • RESPECT • EFFORT • AMBITION.

Formed in 1897 with the merger of 2 succesful local clubs, Yarmouth Fearnoughts and Yarmouth Royal Artilery. Originally based at Beacosnfield Recreation ground until 1901-02 when they moved to the Wellesley Recreation Ground.

Great Yarmouth Town FC currently run First and Reserve teams as well as an U18s side and are pleased to announce the addition of a ladies team for the 22/23 season. The club also has an ever growing successful youth division which currently has 11 sides ranging from U7's through to U16's, in addition to this the club also run a Mini Bloaters fun football training session each week for children aged 3-6.

Name: ACNC (Associació de Clubs de Natació de Catalunya)
Description: L’Associació de Clubs de Natació de Catalunya (ACNC) és una entitat que agrupa els clubs de natació catalans amb l'objectiu de representar els seus interessos i de promoure una gestió eficient i sostenible en el sector. La nostra associació treballa per reforçar la veu col·lectiva dels clubs en els àmbits de decisió que influeixen directament en el desenvolupament i la sostenibilitat de l'esport i la gestió esportiva a Catalunya. A través de la col·laboració i la defensa conjunta, l’ACNC facilita un espai de suport mutu i millora contínua per a tots els seus membres.

Name: FutureXI
Description:
FutureXI, a football services company dedicated to connecting players, coaches, and clubs with elite academies across Europe. Our bespoke programmes provide exclusive access to Champions League-level academies, offering unparalleled insights into top-tier youth football. These experiences are designed to enhance knowledge, improve skills, and elevate careers for players and coaches alike.

Our programmes include:

- Elite Academy Training
- Coach Education Programmes
- Academy Training Camps (Easter, Summer, Christmas)
- International Tournaments
- Special Training Programmes for all abilities, ages, and genders

If you or your club want to experience world-class facilities, learn from top youth coaches, and immerse yourself in an elite footballing environment, feel free to get in touch!

Name: River Thames NextGen FC
Description:
English Football Club - Established 2024. Affiliated Association: Middlesex FA. Men's Adult 1st Team will be joining the Combined Counties Football League (Step 6).

Men's Adult 1st Team (18+). Objective: To achieve consistent promotions ultimately reaching the EFL. 

info@rtngfc.co.site

Name: Perak Football Club
Description: Perak Football Club is a professional football club based in Ipoh City that competes in Malaysia Premier League. Founded in 1921, the club's home ground since then has been Perak Stadium in Ipoh, Perak. The club represents the state of Perak in Malaysian football competitions. They currently play in the second division of Malaysian football, the Malaysia Premier League, and since 2022 Perak FC is owned by ONE XOX Sdn.Bhd.

Name: Fraserburgh Football Club
Description:
Fraserburgh FC was formed in 1910 and have always played at Bellslea Park. Prior to 1910 we played as a select side made up of the best players from the local amateur league which was ran by the Fraserburgh FA. In 1909 there was a campaign to form a team to play as Fraserburgh Football Club. This was supported by two famous Brochers, Henry Low - who played for Sunderland AFC - and his brother William Low, who played for Newcastle United FC.

The campaign was successful and the club was eventually formed in the summer of 1910. Membership of the Scottish FA was also gained, ensuring eligibility for the Scottish Qualifying Cup and the Scottish Cup. 

The club is made up of three teams - the First Team, the Under 21s, and the Under 18s.

Name: Rote Raben Vilsbiburg
Description: Rote Raben Bundesligabetriebs GmbH organisiert die 1. Mannschaft des Vereins Rote Raben Vilsbiburg e.V. Der Volleyballsport in Vilsbiburg kann auf eine 50 jährige Tradition schauen mit über 30. Spielzeiten in der höchsten deutschen Spielklasse. Ab der Saison 2024/25 geht es in der 2. Bundesliga Pro an den Start

Name: Dansk Arbejder Idrætsforbund
Description: Dansk Arbejder Idrætsforbund er mere end 100.000 holdkammerater, der hver eneste uge deler smilene, krammene og de gode oplevelser. Vi laver idræt for dig og mig, og vi får alle ind i kampen, fra begynderen til den rutinerede, og vi tager ansvar for, at både seniorer og psykisk sårbare også er med. Vi finder udøvere, som matcher vores idræt – men vi finder også de idrætter, som matcher vores udøvere, for vi er hele Danmarks specialforbund.

Name: Pop Padel
Description: With the strong support of Singapore government authorities (SLA and Sport Singapore), Pop Padel will be the first padel social club centrally located to offer world-class courts, fully covered with F&B and amenities. Our goal is to cultivate an inclusive community and realize the full potential of the world’s fastest growing sport.

Name: FURIA TEAM VENEZUELA
Description:
Somos una gerencia deportiva especializada en deportes de acción y aventura en Venezuela. 

Impulsamos la excelencia y apoyamos a atletas talentosos para alcanzar su máximo potencial. Nuestro equipo experimentado desarrolla estrategias innovadoras y ofrece un entorno de entrenamiento de vanguardia. Valoramos la dedicación y el compromiso en cada atleta, siendo un trampolín para su éxito. 
Compartimos logros, eventos y noticias relevantes. Si buscas apoyo para alcanzar tus metas o colaborar con nosotros, conéctate a nuestra red! 

FURIA TEAM: Pasión y excelencia en deportes extremos en Venezuela.

Name: The Basketball Super League
Description: The Basketball Super League, often abbreviated as BSL, is a premier professional basketball league that has captured the hearts of fans worldwide with its high-octane action and commitment to excellence. Founded with the vision of redefining the basketball landscape, the BSL has rapidly risen to prominence as a global powerhouse in the sport. Featuring top-tier talent and competitive teams, the league showcases some of the best talent of the basketball world.

Name: NK Široki Brijeg
Description: U proljeće 1948. održana je utemeljiteljska Skupština Nogometnog kluba Borak (klub je dobio ime po izvoru rijeke Lištice). Klub je kroz povijest mijenjao više imena. U veljači 1991. klub mijenja ime u NK Mladost-Dubint.  Prva liga Herceg-Bosne 1994. podijeljena je u dvije skupine, a kao pobjednik Sjeverne skupine naš klub igrao je u finalu igra protiv  pobjednika Južne skupine, mostarskoga Zrinjskog. U prvoj utakmici Pod Bijelim brijegom 26. lipnja 1994. bilo je 0:0, a u uzvratu pred 4.000 gledatelja na Pecari Mladost-Dubint zgoditkom Marija Marušića slavi 1:0 i osvaja povijesni trofej koji je nogometnu povijest Širokog Brijega usmjerio europskim dosezima.  Sedam godina igrala se Prva liga Herceg-Bosne u kojoj je Široki Brijeg u 164 utakmice ostvario čak 115 pobjeda, postigavši 458 i primivši samo 83 gola. U svibnju 1998. prvi put  igra se doigravanje klubova iz Federacije Bosne i Hercegovine, koje je vodilo u Europu. Široki je pred 20.000 gledatelja na stadionu Pod Bijelim brijegom izgubio od Sarajeva 0:1. Premier liga BiH startala je 2000. godine, a Široki Brijeg je prvu sezonu završio na sedmom mjestu. No, već u sljedećoj Široki je osvojio drugo mjesto i tako prvi put osigurao nastup u UEFA-inim natjecanjima. Povijesnu, premijernu europsku utakmicu igra 15. kolovoza 2002. u kvalifikacijama Kupa UEFA-e protiv slovačkog Seneca i pobjedama 2:1 i 3:0 osigurava nastup u 1. kolu spomenutog natjecanja protiv češke Sparte.  Velik uspjeh Široki Brijeg je ostvario u sezoni 2003/04., okitivši se po prvi put titulom prvaka Bosne i Hercegovine.  Naslov je donio i prvi nastup u kvalifikacijama za Ligu prvaka. Najbolji europski rezultat „Plavo-bijeli“ su ostvarili u sezoni 2005/06.., kada su u pretkolima eliminirali Teutu i Zetu te,  kao jedini od hrvatskih i BH predstavnika, izborili dvoboj s Baselom u 1. kolu Kupa UEFA-e.  Ova sezona bit će upamćena i po osvajanju druge titule prvaka BiH. Kup BiH Široki Brijeg, pak, osvaja 2007., 2013. i 2017.

Name: Cercle des Nageurs de Brest
Description:
Le Cercle des Nageurs de Brest accompagne les nageurs depuis 1920 de l'apprentissage jusqu'au haut niveau.
L'expertise technique et la qualité des apprentissages sont nos objectifs principaux.
Avec près de 800 adhérents, le CNB est parfaitement ancré dans le territoire Brestois et Breton.
Soucieux de rôle associatif, le CNB propose nombre d'activités permettant au plus grand nombre de pouvoir accéder à ce sport. Ainsi le CNB propose depuis ces dernières années, des groupes pour les personnes ayant des pathologies médicales spécifiques (sclérose en plaques notamment), ainsi qu'un groupe Sport-adapté et développe actuellement la partie handisport.
Dans le cadre du plan national J'apprends à Nager, le CNB a proposé sur la saison 2021-2022 à près de 350 enfants de la métropole, 10 cours de natation gratuits dans le but de lutter contre les inégalités d'accès à la natation.
Ici ça nage!

Name: Holland Ocean Team
Description: In december 2024 gaan Matthijs van Noorden, Rutger Menger en Ron Straver de oceaan oversteken. Ze doen mee aan the World's Toughest Row. Ze gaan de uitdaging aan en willen daarmee bijdragen het goede doel: Stichting ALS.

Name: Wandelsport Vlaanderen vzw
Description:
Welkom op de website van Wandelsport Vlaanderen vzw! 
Wandelsport Vlaanderen vzw verenigt als erkende sportfederatie 350 Vlaamse wandelclubs en ruim 60.000 aangesloten leden. Onze wandelclubs staan jaarlijks garant voor zo'n 2000 wandelorganisaties, goed voor 1.700.000 deelnames. Ben jij ook zo verzot op wandelen? Kom gerust eens wandelen op één van onze organisaties. Voor het volledige aanbod van wandeltochten kan u terecht op onze wandelkalender 'Walking in Belgium'.

Name: UpToPro
Description: Intermediación deportiva de futbolistas adaptado al nuevo fútbol.

Name: HAC Tennis
Description:
Le HAC Tennis est un club associatif, entièrement privé. Il possède 12 courts de tennis : 5 couverts et 4 extérieurs en terre battue et 3 extérieurs en quick. 
Avec plus de 1000 licenciés en 2024, parmi lesquels près de 500 jeunes au sein de son École de Tennis, c’est à ce jour l'un des plus gros club de tennis de Normandie. À la fois vecteur de santé pour les adultes, porteur de valeurs pour les jeunes, de lien social et de convivialité pour tous, le HAC Tennis figure parmi les 100 plus gros clubs Français depuis des années. 
Grâce à la qualité et au nombre de ses infrastructures, le club est labellisé « Club Roland Garros ». Il figure parmi les quelque 80 clubs centenaires affiliés à la Fédération Française de Tennis et fête cette année ses 150 ans.

Name: North Queensland Sports Foundation
Description: The North Queensland Sports Foundation (NQSF) is a not-for-profit established in 1983 to develop sporting events and capacity in regional Queensland. Our flagship event is the NQ Games, hosted bi-annually, which is the largest regularly run multi-sport event in regional Australia. We also admister the NQ Sports Hall of Fame, the annual NQ Sportstar Awards, and the Move It NQ program

Name: TNS ARM WRESTLING
Description:
We started TNS Arm Wrestling, a brand that would promote the sport and provide a platform for arm wrestlers to compete and showcase their skills. We found an opportunity to take their passion for arm wrestling and turn it into something much bigger.

In 2017, Our Founder and friends stumbled upon a local arm wrestling competition while out for a walk. They decided to join in on the fun and see what they were made of. They quickly became regulars at local competitions and even started to win some of them. Over the years, We continued to compete in arm wrestling events, but they never took it too seriously. It was just a hobby, something they did for fun on the weekends.

However, in 2022, everything changed. We associated with Indian Arm Wrestling Federation and started to see new potential in arm wrestling. They began to see it not just as a hobby, but as a brand. The brand quickly gained popularity, and before they knew it, they were organizing large-scale events that attracted arm wrestlers from all over Pune to start with. The brand’s logo became recognizable, and its merchandise became a must-have for fans of the sport.

TNS is the first arm wrestling gym in Pune, India, and also the leading arm wrestling organization in the city. We are dedicated to promoting arm wrestling as a recognized and respected sport in the region. TNS has partnered with Decathlon, Multifit & Poona Club for their open events.

Name: Osnabrücker Bergrennen
Description:
Das Internationale Osnabrücker ADAC Bergrennen ist seit 1968 ein fester Bestandteil der deutschen Motorsportlandschaft. Jährlich im August verwandelt sich der Uphöfener Berg in Hilter-Borgloh in eine Rennstrecke, auf der rund 200 Fahrerinnen und Fahrer aus ca. 15 Ländern in offenen Rennsportfahrzeugen und leistungsstarken Tourenwagen um Bestzeiten kämpfen. 

Die 2,030 Kilometer lange Strecke gilt als nördlichstes Bergrennen Deutschlands und zieht jährlich etwa 30.000 Motorsportbegeisterte an. Neben den traditionellen Fahrzeugklassen nehmen auch Elektro- und Hybridautos am zukunftsweisenden E-Mobil-Berg-Cup teil, wodurch die Veranstaltung besonders vielfältig und innovativ wird. 

Ein besonderes Highlight erwartet die Fans im Jahr 2025: Vom 1. bis 3. August wird das 57. Internationale Osnabrücker ADAC Bergrennen erstmals Teil der Europa-Bergmeisterschaft sein. Dies unterstreicht die wachsende Bedeutung und Anerkennung der Veranstaltung auf internationaler Ebene.

Vision:

Values:
Excellence: We invest in creating the best environment to learn, work, play and volunteer in; we continuously strive to deliver outstanding programs; we don’t just do it … we do it better.

Integrity: We are fiercely committed to doing the right thing, in the right way, at the right time, with the right people; we believe in what we do.

Name: FC Vesoul
Description:
FC Vesoul – Ensemble pour le football et notre territoire !
Depuis 2014, le FC Vesoul s’impose comme un pilier du football en Franche-Comté. Avec plus de 400 licenciés, une équipe senior masculine en Régional 1, une équipe féminine en Régional 2 F, et des équipes jeunes évoluant en régional, le club reflète à la fois l’excellence sportive et l’attachement à ses valeurs fondamentales.

 Nos valeurs et notre ADN sportif :
Le FC Vesoul s’appuie sur trois piliers :

Formation : Accompagner les jeunes talents pour développer leur potentiel, tant sur le terrain qu’en dehors.
Performance : Viser l’excellence sportive dans toutes nos compétitions, des seniors aux jeunes catégories.
Diversité : Promouvoir un football inclusif, avec une section féminine et des opportunités pour tous.
Nos valeurs, ancrées dans le respect, la cohésion et la passion, nous permettent de créer un esprit de famille au sein du club et d’unir la communauté autour du ballon rond.

 Partenariats : Construisons ensemble l’avenir
Au FC Vesoul, nous croyons à des partenariats fondés sur un échange équilibré et mutuellement bénéfique. Nous invitons les entreprises locales et nationales à rejoindre notre aventure pour promouvoir ensemble le football et nos valeurs communes. Votre engagement peut faire la différence, sur le terrain comme dans la vie du club.

 Pour nous rejoindre ou devenir partenaire :
 Contactez-nous : camille.courvoisier.fcvesoul@gmail.com
 Suivez-nous sur nos réseaux sociaux :

Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/footballclubdevesoul/
Facebook : https://www.facebook.com/FCVesoul

The USCSA wants to evolve the traditional model by integrating business strategies and shared resources to increase efficiency and effectiveness of its State Association members.

Name: Comité Judo 28
Description:
Le comité d’Eure-et-Loir est un organisme territorial délégataire de la Fédération Française de Judo. Il participe activement à l’application sur le terrain de la politique fédérale par la mise en œuvre d’une action cohérente dans les domaines techniques, sportifs, administratifs et financiers. Il informe les clubs sur tout ce qui concerne la politique fédérale, les possibilités de subventions, les possibilités d’aide à la création d’emploi.
Il a un rôle formateur – organisation de stages sportifs, formation des enseignants et des dirigeants – il organise aussi des sélections pour les niveaux supérieurs de compétitions, ainsi que des animations en respectant la politique fédérale. Le Comité donne son accord et son aide pour toutes compétitions, animations et manifestations organisées par les clubs.
Il assure un rôle de contrôle du respect du principe mutualiste et des obligations prévues par les textes de la Fédération – obligation pour chaque club de licencier tous ses pratiquants à la FFJDA et contrôle des paiements des cotisations clubs.
Il représente la Fédération auprès des pouvoirs publics, des collectivités locales et du mouvement sportif de son ressort territorial.

Name: FC Remscheid e.V.
Description:
Herzlich willkommen beim FCR, Ihrem familiären und freundlichen Fußballverein, mit Sitz im charmanten Remscheid-Lüttringhausen. 

Gegründet wurde unser Verein als BV08 Lüttringhausen im Jahr 1908. Im Jahr 1985 wurden wir in BVL08 Remscheid umbenannt. Die letzte Namensänderung zum FC Remscheid erfolgte 1990, durch den Zusammenschluss der Vereine BVL08 Remscheid und des VFB Remscheid 06/08.

Wir blicken auf eine bewegte und erfolgreiche Vergangenheit eines Clubs, der einem Dorfverein entwachsen ist. Die zweite Liga hat unseren Club bereits mehrfach beheimatet, wie auch frühere dritte Ligen, wie die Oberliga Nordrhein oder die Regionalliga. Nach den Jahren des Aufstiegs erfolgte ein längerfristige Negativentwicklung, die dazu führte, dass wir uns sportlich wieder neu einsortieren mussten.

Seit einigen Jahren spielen wir in der Landesliga. Wir freuen uns sehr über den Fan-Zuspruch sowohl bei unseren Heimspielen wie auch bei Auswärtsfahrten, bei denen immer treue Remscheider Fans mit von der Partie sind.

LinkedIn möchten wir dafür nutzen uns und unseren Verein einem professionellen BTB-Umfeld vorzustellen und andererseits ganz gezielt über Erfolgsgeschichten aus unserem Umfeld zu berichten. Wir planen den Verein perspektivisch wieder besser aufzustellen und möchten Euch auf dieser Plattform daran teilhaben lassen. Wir stellen Euch bereits vorhandene Freunde & Förderer des Vereins vor und informieren über neu hinzugewonnene Partner. 

Wenn Ihr Interesse habt mit uns diesen neuen Weg gemeinsam zu gehen. Könnt Ihr Euch jederzeit an die nachfolgende Adresse wenden:

partnerservice@fcremscheid.de
www.fcr-unsa-ding.de

Eine letzte Anmerkung in eigener Sache, wir freuen uns über jeden alten und neuen FCR-Fan, der sich hier mit uns vernetzt oder unserer Seite folgt, wir sind Euch dankbar dass es Euch gibt.

Euer FCR

Name: Maidenbower Colts Football Club
Description:
This year, Maidenbower Colts FC celebrates its 25th Anniversary.  

Formed in 1998 to give the young people of the new and rapidly growing area of Maidenbower an opportunity to play grassroots football, our football family has grown to around 200 young people and a group of outstanding and dedicated Volunteers. 

As a England Football Accredited Football Club, we have a thriving and fun Mini Colts section (Reception & SY1), Boys, Mixed and Girls teams playing competitively across 6 affiliated youth football leagues in Sussex and Surrey from U7 to U18 and a recently established Pan Disability Football Section. 

The football club is run entirely by volunteers with the aim to provide access to football for all, structure, a sense of belonging, experiences and friendships to last a lifetime, along with the opportunity to learn behaviors and habits that will serve them well in adult life. 

We offer Player Pathways to Coaching and Refereeing, Sports Nutrition Education, Goalkeeper Workshops and qualified Mental Health Support. 

With a strong sense of community , Maidenbower Colts FC is a Kick it Out Equality Chartered Club, a HerGameToo Partner Club, a Football v Homophobia Champion Club and a England Football recognised Disability Football Recreation Centre.  

We are proud to be Colts. 

Omnino - Altogether.

Name: HADO LONDON
Description:
HADO is the world's first augmented reality sport that combines physical and digital gameplay, played all over the world.

Two teams compete against each other on a 10x6m court, with a halfway line separating both teams.

All players wear an HADO headset and wrist sensor that capture the players movements in the real world, which directly correspond to input in the game.

Thrusting your arm forward fire an energy ball in the direction you are looking, and all players have 4 petals that appear in front of their headset.

If an opposition players' ball hits your petal/s, it is removed.

If all 4 of your petals are removed, you get KO'd, and you are removed from the game for 5 seconds.

After this period, all 4 petals reappear.

Players can place shields, which block the oppositions ball, but allow yours to pass through.

The team with the most KO's at the end of an 80 second game wins.

Name: Tennisclub Albertus Magnus
Description:
Tennisclub Albertus Magnus is een studenten tennisvereniging met 600 leden studerende aan de Rijksuniversiteit Groningen of Hanzehogeschool Groningen. TAM is daarnaast een zusterclub van studentenvereniging R.K.S.V. Albertus Magnus te Groningen. In 2023 vierde TAM haar elfde lustrum.

Bij TAM zijn naast een Dagelijks Bestuur en een adviserend Algemeen Bestuur maar liefst 20 commissies werkzaam. Van de 600 leden zijn daardoor zo'n 150 leden actief betrokken bij het reilen en zeilen van de vereniging en het organiseren van activiteiten.

Met haar eerste team in de hoofdklasse gemengd op zondag, is TAM de hoogstspelende studententennis vereniging van Nederland. Naast hoofdklasse speelt TAM komend jaar met maar liefst drie teams in de tweede klasse, twee teams in derde klasse en één team in de vierde klasse gemengd. Hierdoor is TAM ook één van de breedste tennisverenigingen van Nederland.

Oud-leden van de vereniging kunnen zich aansluiten bij sTAM. Het sTAM-bestuur organiseert jaarlijks activiteiten om de band tussen oud-leden en de vereniging te blijven laten bestaan.

Name: Sportkreis Frankfurt am Main e.V.
Description:
Der Sportkreis Frankfurt ist die Dachorganisation aller Frankfurter Turn- und Sportvereine und ist dem Landessportbund Hessen angeschlossen. Wir vertreten die Interessen der 415 Frankfurter Turn- und Sportvereine mit über 292.000 Sportlerinnen und Sportlern.

Bei den Bürger*innen wirbt der Sportkreis für mehr Sport und Bewegung. Dabei kommt der gesellschaftspolitische Kontext nicht zu kurz: Zu den Schwerpunkten unserer Arbeit gehören Gesundheit, Integration, Behinderten- sowie Seniorensport.

Mit seinen Projekten fördert der Sportkreis das Zusammenleben unterschiedlichster Gruppen in unserer Stadt. So betreut er beispielsweise im Stadtteil Gallus eine Reihe von Projekten, die den Sport mit sozialpädagogischen Angeboten für Jugendliche verknüpfen. Im Herbst 2015 feierten die Gallusprojekte zehn Jahre erfolgreiche Arbeit.

In der Wirtschaft findet die Arbeit des Sportkreises ebenfalls Beachtung. Das ist wichtig, denn ohne die finanzielle Hilfestellung von Sponsoren wären viele unserer Projekte nicht möglich. So bietet beispielsweise unser Internetportal "Mainova Sport Rhein-Main" (www.mainova-sport.de) schnellen Zugang zu Angeboten der Sportvereine in Frankfurt, Groß Gerau, dem Hochtaunus- und Main-Taunus-Kreis sowie in Offenbach und dem Wetteraukreis. Sportinteressierte finden hier reguläre Kurse, aber auch Möglichkeiten zum unverbindlichen Ausprobieren. Die Vereine können ihre Angebote kostenlos einstellen.

Auch die Stadt Frankfurt unterstützt uns und tritt bei vielen Veranstaltungen und Projekten als Kooperationspartner auf.

Name: NTU Formula Racing
Description:
NTU Formula Racing (NTUFR) is the official Formula Student team of Nanyang Technological University, School of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering. The first Singaporean team to compete on the world stage at the Formula Student UK (FSUK) competition, our mission is to push the boundaries of motorsport innovation by designing, building, and racing high-performance formula-style cars.

Since our founding in 2020, NTUFR has grown into a multidisciplinary team of over 50 passionate students, combining expertise in automotive engineering, project management, and business development. Beyond racing, we actively collaborate with sponsors and industry partners to develop sustainable and eco-conscious technologies, contributing to Singapore’s evolving automotive landscape.

With award-winning designs and proprietary technologies, NTUFR continues to set new benchmarks for performance, sustainability, and student innovation.

To always go further, we are determined to move forward as a team to bring out the best in every one of us. 

Projects carried out in previous years:

- Integration of a dozen Erasmus students into our courses

And these projects could not be realized without you, so a big THANK YOU and see you soon!

Name: Saint Brice-Courcelles Handball
Description:
Affilié à la Fédération Française de HandBall depuis 1977, notre club ASSBC Handball a vu le jour en 1976 lors de la construction du gymnase de St Brice Courcelles (51370).
En l’espace de 3 ans, nous atteignons plus de 100 licenciés avec 10 équipes en championnat départemental féminin et masculin.

En 1982, nous créons une école de Handball qui fonctionne encore aujourd’hui avec une cinquantaine de licenciés et qui détient le label or de la FFHB.

Depuis, le club n’a cessé de grandir, passant la barre des 350 licenciés.

Avec plus de 15 équipes engagées principalement au niveau régional, une école de handball, une section Baby Hand de près de 30 bambins et une activité HandFit, nous sommes le plus gros club de Champagne-Ardenne.

Notre club est reconnu pour la formation des jeunes joueurs et joueuses, des arbitres (jeunes et adultes) et pour la qualification de nos entraîneurs qui en majorité ont reçu une formation de niveau fédéral. La saison 2017/2018 a vu l’arrivée d’un entraineur professionnel salarié du club, afin d’entrainer l’équipe fanion désormais en Nationale 2 et superviser les U18 masculins en Championnat de France ainsi que les jeunes du club.

Depuis la création, 3 présidents se sont succédés jusqu’en 2014 : Claude TRISSON, Jacky HUSSON et Bernard HANNEQUIN.
Depuis 2014, un nouveau bureau et une nouvelle organisation sont arrivés avec de nouveaux objectifs : l’ambition d’emmener l’équipe fanion en Nationale 1, tout en continuant à former nos jeunes joueurs, notre encadrement, nos entraîneurs et nos arbitres.

Entourés de nombreux bénévoles, nous continuons à grandir et à avancer pour trouver notre place au sein du paysage de l’agglomération Rémoise.

L’équipe dirigeante

Name: Los Angeles Bulls Soccer Club
Description:
Club Mission

LA Bulls are committed to educating and developing players' growth beyond the sport within a positive playing environment.

We strive to teach essential life skills while developing intelligent, technical, and confident players to reach their highest potential. 

Our high-level coaches are integral to succeeding in our mission and our community-focused approach makes the LA Bulls Soccer Club a unique destination for players of all ages. 

Club Philosophy

We utilize soccer to help to develop qualities in children we believe are key to their success both on and off the field. 

We help to guide our players to identify the level they aspire to play and we focus on individual player development and character building at every level.  

LA Bulls take pride in supporting each player throughout their development to have fun while reaching their potential.

#BullsCare Community Initiative

The LA Bulls are committed to improving the quality of life for individuals and youth in the greater Los Angeles region and beyond through service and leadership. The LA Bulls strive to be strong community leaders by doing our part and partnering with local businesses and nonprofit organizations that support our mission to inspire and positively impact our community. We aim to accomplish this through our #BullsCare Community Initiative, which is meant to deliver on this objective through our three community values of Mentorship, Opportunity, and Service.
 
MENTORSHIP
•	Serving as positive role models and mentors to members of our community
 
OPPORTUNITY
•	Fostering and supporting diversity, equity, and inclusion in the Los Angeles region and within the game of soccer
•	Creating a path for our staff and players to become leaders within their community
 
SERVICE
•	Strengthening and positively impacting

Description:
Hos Jydsk Væddeløbsbane kan du opleve spændende hestevæddeløb - både trav og galop. Hestesporten har tempo og spænding. Hvert løb på Jydsk Væddeløbsbane tiltrækker og engagerer mange forskellige aldersgrupper.

Vi tilbyder oplevelser for alle, store som små, private som virksomheder. Oplev hestesportens sus, hyg jer med selvbragt mad, eller køb noget mad i vores tilknyttede caféer. Der er legeplads for de mindste og borde-bænkesæt i solen til de ældre.

Name: Manchester United Muslims Supporters Club (MUMSC)
Description:
At Manchester United Muslims Supporters Club (MUMSC), our mission is to unite fans of Manchester United from diverse cultural and religious backgrounds under the common banner of passion, respect, and inclusivity. We are dedicated to fostering a community where every member, regardless of faith or origin, feels welcomed and valued.

Our commitment to Manchester United is unwavering, fueled by boundless passion and loyalty. Through triumphs and challenges, we stand together as a beacon of support for our beloved club.

Beyond the stadium, MUMSC endeavors to make a positive impact in our local and global communities. Through charitable initiatives, outreach programs, and engaging events, we harness the unifying power of football to inspire kindness, empathy, and solidarity.

In our pursuit of excellence, we continuously strive to innovate and improve, offering our members enriching experiences and exclusive benefits. Our online platforms and events serve as vibrant spaces for connection and growth, ensuring that MUMSC remains at the forefront of supporter engagement.

Diversity is not just welcomed but celebrated within MUMSC. We embrace the richness of our collective identities, fostering an environment of understanding and respect. Our vision is of a society where ignorance gives way to enlightenment, and prejudice yields to acceptance.

As the voice of Muslim fans within the Manchester United community, MUMSC advocates for their needs and aspirations. We provide a platform for them to express their pride in their identity and ensure their perspectives are heard and respected.

Together, we envision a future where the love for Manchester United transcends all boundaries, uniting us in a shared journey of support, camaraderie, and belonging.

Name: Maastricht Mariners
Description:
Nous sommes Maastricht Mariners, l'association francophone de Maastricht University participant à la régate de la Spi Dauphine.

Notre vision est simple : monter un projet sportif et engagé afin de faire découvrir la voile dans notre université.

Dans cet esprit, nous œuvrons tout au long de l'année pour participer au Challenge Spi Dauphine, la première régate itinérante étudiante en méditerranée, forte de 40 ans d’histoire et désormais incontournable. 
Cette participation annuelle nous permet de nourrir notre vision et de renforcer l’esprit de communauté, tout en apportant une dimension compétitive et inspirante à notre engagement.
Nous nous retrouverons cette année pour la 44ème édition au Port des marines de Cogolin du 12 au 19 avril 2025. Bien entendu, pour notre deuxième participation nous allons réitérer notre succès de l’an passé en conservant la 1ère place en régate et viser un éventuel podium au classement général. 

De ce fait, nous recherchons activement des partenaires souhaitant nous accompagner dans cette aventure. Sponsoriser notre équipe, c'est s'associer à un projet jeune et prometteur, porté par des étudiants ambitieux en passe de rentrer sur le marché du travail et qui aspirent à exceller dans un environnement international.

Pour en savoir plus sur notre association et opportunités de partenariat, nous restons actifs sur linekdIn. Vous pouvez également nous contacter via maastricht.mariners@gmail.com.

Name: Basket Houthalen
Description:
Basket Houthalen is de trotse basketbalclub in de gemeente Houthalen-Helchteren, met een rijke traditie die teruggaat tot de oprichting in 2002. Wat begon als een damesbasketbalclub onder de naam Dames Basketbalclub Houthalen, heeft zich door de jaren heen ontwikkeld tot een bekende en gerespecteerde vereniging in zowel de regio Limburg als in heel Vlaanderen. Door onze focus op kwaliteit en toewijding aan de sport, zijn we uitgegroeid tot een vaste waarde binnen de basketbalwereld.

Sinds het seizoen 2021-2022 verwelkomen we zowel meisjes als jongens, en daarmee hebben we ook onze naam veranderd naar Basket Houthalen. Dit nieuwe hoofdstuk markeert een uitbreiding van onze missie om jongeren te laten genieten van basketbal en hen te begeleiden in hun sportieve ontwikkeling, ongeacht hun achtergrond of ervaring. Basket Houthalen streeft ernaar om een inclusieve en positieve omgeving te bieden waar talent zich kan ontwikkelen en spelers zich kunnen inzetten voor het team en de sport.

We zijn een opleidingsclub en bieden plaats aan jeugdteams van U8 tot U19, actief op zowel provinciaal als landelijk niveau. Dit betekent dat we aan elke speler een kans bieden om basketbal te spelen en zichzelf te verbeteren, onder leiding van ervaren coaches die oog hebben voor persoonlijke groei en teamgeest. 

Op competitief niveau spelen twee dames-teams momenteel in de 2e landelijke klasse. We zijn trots op de gedrevenheid en inzet van al onze teams, die niet alleen het niveau van onze club hoog houden, maar ook het basketbal in Houthalen-Helchteren en omstreken een warm hart toedragen.

Basket Houthalen staat voor sportieve ambitie, fair play en plezier. Samen bouwen we aan een sterke club waar respect, samenwerking en ontwikkeling centraal staan. We nodigen iedereen uit om ons te leren kennen – als speler, supporter of sponsor – en samen de passie voor basketbal te delen.

Name: Malawi National Council Of Sports
Description:
The Malawi National Council of Sports (MNCS), created by Act No. 10 of 1974, is the top body overseeing sports development in Malawi. Its main goal is to develop, promote, encourage, and control sports across the nation. MNCS supports national sports associations, encourages cooperation between them, organizes local and international competitions, and advises the government on sports-related matters.

Before MNCS was established, sports in Malawi lacked coordination. The creation of the Council brought a structured approach. The Act outlines its roles, powers, and how national associations are registered.

Key responsibilities include:

* Developing Sports: Promoting all sports disciplines, improving participation and performance, and ensuring sports are inclusive.

* Supporting Associations: Offering financial, technical, and logistical support to sports associations and local authorities.

* Organizing Events; Managing national and international sports competitions that highlight talent and build global friendships.

* Promoting Values: Encouraging sportsmanship, discipline, and ethics among athletes and officials.

* Capacity Building: Offering training programs and scholarships for athletes, coaches, and sports administrators.

* Government Advisory: Providing expert guidance on sports development and physical recreation.

The MNCS plays a vital role in Malawi’s sports landscape, fostering unity, growth, and excellence through organized sporting activities.

We're extremely proud recipients of the Queen's Award for Voluntary Service (the equivalent of an MBE for volunteer groups) cited as “providing rugby for all ages and delivering huge benefits to their community”.

Whether you want to shine in the mountains or create a furore in the bunch sprints; every dream is worth pursuing. At TALENT Cycling, it's all about ambition, which is why we work with riders and coaches who want to make the most of their career in cycling.

We believe that every athlete can honestly achieve his or her goals when they are set realistically. Strong motivation and perseverance are important factors here. When the athlete possesses these qualities, he or she can achieve what he or she wants. 

With positive coaching and quality support, Talent Cycling wants to guide its riders to their goals, to create a team in which they can compete in a fair and sportive way.

Name: Reparto Corse Ram
Description:
Nato nel 1977 dalla collaborazione tra Romeo De Benedetti, Angelo Rosin e Maurizio Nardon, Reparto Corse Ram affonda le sue radici nella costruzione e nella preparazione dei prototipi da corsa.
Un DNA racing che si è evoluto nel 1992, unendosi al mondo Ferrari sia dal lato stradale che competitivo.
Reparto Corse Ram è stato, orgogliosamente, il primo team a vincere il campionato Ferrari Challenge nel 1993. Da quel momento il motorsport è stata parte integrante della vita del team vincendo sia nel Campionato Velocità in Montagna che nel Campionato Italiano Gran Turismo.
Dal 2024 Reparto Corse Ram fa il suo ritorno nella sfera competitiva del Ferrari Challenge ritornando a vincere il titolo Europeo in Coppa Shell Am oltre a partecipare nella categoria GT-CUP del Campionato Italiano Gran Turismo. 
Reparto Corse Ram, tuttavia, non è solo competizione ma anche esperienza di motorsport: eventi aziendali su misura, team building e piacere di guida sportiva per chiunque voglia approcciarsi al mondo Ferrari.

Name: ALTO ACADEMY
Description:
Benvenuti nell'universo di Alto Academy 
Siamo un'innovativa e ambiziosa società sportiva che sta ridefinendo il concetto di sviluppo giovanile nel calcio. Fondata nel 2017 con una visione chiara, investiamo nei giovani talenti per creare una cantera di calciatori di livello nazionale e internazionale.
 Chi Siamo: Situati a Marano Vicentino, nel cuore del Veneto, siamo nati dalle ceneri dell'Alto Vicentino con l'obiettivo di rivoluzionare il settore giovanile nel calcio dilettantistico. Con 200 tesserati e circa 360 ragazzi tra la nostra sede centrale e il centro di formazione a Valdagno, la nostra missione è formare non solo grandi calciatori, ma anche grandi uomini, promuovendo valori come il rispetto, la lealtà e la determinazione.
 I Nostri Successi: In soli sei anni di attività abbiamo ottenuto ottimi risultati, tra cui la vittoria del Campionato Giovanissimi Regionali e Allievi Provinciali, la partecipazione al Campionato di Serie D di calcio a 5 con conquista della Coppa Veneto e promozione in C2. Ultimo successo è la promozione in Seconda categoria della nostra prima squadra di Calcio a 11.
 Il Nostro Progetto Tecnico: Con un Direttore Tecnico di grande esperienza nel settore giovanile e un team di dirigenti e allenatori di elevate capacità, ci impegniamo a creare una "Ajax dei Dilettanti", dove la prima squadra è funzionale al progetto di sviluppo giovanile, mantenendo sempre alto il nostro codice etico.
 Le Nostre Collaborazioni: Siamo orgogliosi di collaborare con prestigiose società professionistiche come Vicenza, Cittadella, Hellas Verona e molte altre, che riconoscono il nostro impegno nel formare giovani talenti. In particolare, vantiamo una collaborazione con F.C. Internazionale come unica società in Veneto aderente al progetto I.G.P. (Inter Grassroots Program), offrendo ai nostri giocatori l'opportunità di ricevere una formazione di altissimo livello.

Name: Peak Sports Pittsburgh
Description:
Peak Sports Pittsburgh offers private soccer training for athletes of all ages and skill levels. Training is tailored to the individual needs of each athlete, allowing for personal attention and focus on specific areas of need.

Currently, Peak Sports Pittsburgh has a diverse roster of athletes as young as 3 years old, as well as several that represent Peak Sports at the NCAA Division 2 and 3 levels.

Name: PHOENIX CRICKET CLUB PAKISTAN (Non Profit Organization)
Description:
Welcome to the official Linkedin page of PHOENIX CIRCKET CLUB PAKISTAN! 

 About Us:
PHOENIX CIRCKET CLUB PAKISTAN is a passionate and dedicated cricket club that brings together cricket enthusiasts from all walks of life. Our mission is to promote the spirit of cricket, foster a sense of community, and create lasting memories on the pitch.

 What We Offer:
On this page, you'll find all the latest updates, news, and highlights related to our cricket club. We organize regular matches, tournaments, and practice sessions, offering a platform for players of all skill levels to participate and improve their game. Whether you're a seasoned cricketer or someone who's just starting out, you'll find a place here.

 Our Vision:
Our vision is to not only excel in the sport of cricket but also to instill discipline, teamwork, and sportsmanship among our members. We believe that cricket is not just a game; it's a way of life.

 Stay Informed:
Stay updated with our match schedules, event details, and club announcements. We'll be sharing live scores, exciting moments, and insights into the cricketing world. If you're a fan of the game, this is the place to be!

 Join the Community:
We invite cricket lovers, supporters, and players to join our community. Feel free to share your thoughts, memories, and cricket-related experiences. Let's celebrate the sport we all adore together!

 Connect on Instagram:
Follow us on Instagram/Linkedin/Facebook for behind-the-scenes photos, stories, and more cricket action.

 Contact Us:
If you have any questions, want to join our club, or simply want to chat about cricket, don't hesitate to reach out to us or send us a direct message.

Join us on this incredible journey of cricket, camaraderie, and competition. Like our page, interact with our posts, and be a part of the PHOENIX CIRCKET CLUB family!

#CricketClub #CricketLove # #StayTuned

Name: Army Rugby League - British Army
Description:
Rugby League epitomises the heart and soul of what it takes to be a soldier in the British Army. A hard physical game, players put the needs of the team and their team mates before themselves with selfless commitment, loyalty, courage, respect for others, integrity and discipline. To be successful, a rugby league team must live to the very highest professional standards and push as hard as possible on the pitch within the laws of the game, combining competition and fighting spirit with sporting integrity and cameraderie. These qualities have been well recognised by the civilian clubs, competition organisers and supporters who come into contact with the Army Rugby League teams and players. 

The Army Rugby League Men’s play in the “Betfred Challenge Cup” and the Women’s play in the “Women’s Super League South” as well as Academy and Veterans teams that play alongside the representative teams throughout the year leading up to the Inter-Service competition in September.

As important is community engagement, and our success and our values are rooted in the communities from which we recruit our soldiers, particularly in the heartland of Rugby League. 

We thank our sponsors and key partners for their continual support to Army Rugby League.

Name: Not In My House
Description:
Giunta al suo 5 anno di attività, la A.s.d. Not in my house nasce nel 2017 con lo scopo di regalare alla città di Bologna qualcosa che potesse appassionare il pubblico e allo stesso tempo coinvolgere in prima persona chi del basket ne ha sempre fatto una passione.

La prima edizione ufficiale del torneo è una proposta rivoluzionaria e innovativa. Ciò che differenzia Not in my House dagli altri tornei estivi è la formula, frizzante ed itinerante: più tornei nel territorio metropolitano con un solo comune denominatore, la finale.

Fin dalla prima edizione, il comune di Bologna è stato partner dell’evento concedendo per le fasi finali una location unica nel suo genere e simbolo della città all’ombra delle due torri: Piazza VIII Agosto.

Dal 2020, la fase iniziale della manifestazione ha cominciato ad espandersi oltre le mura native, consentendo un espatrio del format, dato in gestione o in collaborazione con altre realtà per creare partnership e per fornire un prodotto qualitativamente superiore di anno in anno. (Dopo il covid sono state molte le realtà che hanno domandato il nostro sostengno).

Sebbene l’idea sia quella di portare il format NIMH a spasso per l’Italia, cercando di raggiungere anche gli angoli meno esplorati, le Finals non abbandoneranno mai le loro origini. Saranno per sempre uno spettacolo della e per la città di Bologna.
Ad oggi il Not in my House conta 12 tornei in Italia, di cui 4 tappe bolognesi, e 1 finale.
Alla 5a edizione è uno dei tornei più famosi d’Italia.

Name: Canes Illinois Baseball
Description:
At Canes Illinois, we are committed to nurturing the physical, mental, and emotional well-being of young athletes while fostering their personal growth and development through the transformative power of travel baseball. Our mission is to create a dynamic and supportive environment that empowers players to excel not only on the field but also in life.

Our Core Values:
Health and Wellness: We prioritize the health and well-being of our youth athletes by promoting proper physical conditioning, injury prevention, and nutrition education. We believe that a strong body and mind are essential for reaching peak performance both on and off the baseball diamond.

Skill Development: We strive for excellence in baseball skills and fundamentals. Our coaching staff is dedicated to instilling a passion for the game and providing personalized instruction to help players reach their fullest potential.

Character Building: Beyond the sport itself, we aim to instill important values such as integrity, sportsmanship, teamwork, and perseverance. Our program emphasizes the importance of becoming not just skilled athletes but also responsible and respectful individuals.

Community Engagement: We encourage our players to actively contribute to the community by participating in outreach programs, charitable events, and volunteer opportunities. Through these experiences, we believe they will develop empathy, leadership, and a sense of responsibility to give back to society.

Academic Excellence: We recognize the importance of education and strive to foster a supportive environment that encourages academic achievement. We believe that a strong commitment to education is the foundation for long-term success, both on and off the field.

Lifelong Learning: We encourage a growth mindset. Our organization is dedicated to providing ongoing educational opportunities for players, coaches, and parents to stay up-to-date with the latest developments in baseball and life.

Name: The Boss Boxing
Description:
The Boss Boxing was born out of an identified need from within the Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander communities in Zillmere and surrounding suburbs for the need for a culturally safe space which allowed for meaningful connection, inclusivity and mentoring. Founder and Head Coach Sammy Leone, a former Australian Institute of Sport Scholarship holder and Australian Indigenous Boxing Champion, saw the opportunity to create positive change through the transaction of culture and connection through his sport of boxing. Boss Boxing provides benefits to participants far greater than just physical activity.

Since its opening in 2019, The Boss Boxing has been offering a range of sponsorship opportunities to marginalised children and youth. Programs include Little Warriors, for those aged 5 to 9 years, Young Warriors 10-12 years, Community Warriors for anyone aged 11 and above Tiddahs Warrioress (Woman only) and a Competitive Boxers program for our elite level athletes. 


Some of our current and previous programs include

The Golden Girls program for First Nations Woman 50years plus. (Low impact exercise, yawning circles,  access to allied health professionals and aged care referrals.)

Youth School engagement program. (Working with Education, DOCS, Youth Justice and Local services 

School holiday programs with Indigenous Health providers

We offer a range of sponsorship opportunities for disadvantaged youth to ensure they have access to benefits of our programs, and aim to keep the cost of participation down for all of our athletes. This helps to overcome financial and social barriers and promotes equal access to a brighter future for all.

Name: Hereford Fencing Centre

Name: Tanzania Cricket Association
Description:
The Tanzania Cricket Association (TCA) is the official governing body for the sport of cricket in Tanzania and an Associate Member of the International Cricket Council (ICC).

With a mandate to develop, regulate, and promote cricket across all levels, TCA is committed to fostering talent, expanding grassroots participation, and strengthening the sport’s presence both nationally and internationally.

Our mission is to build a sustainable cricketing ecosystem that nurtures excellence, empowers youth, promotes gender inclusion, and elevates Tanzania’s status on the global cricket stage.

Key focus areas include:

National team development (Men’s, Women’s, and U19)

Grassroots and school cricket programs

Coaching, umpiring, and infrastructure development

Strategic partnerships and international engagement

Based in Dar es Salaam, TCA continues to grow cricket's impact as a unifying force for communities and a platform for national pride.

Description:
L’AS MINIAC-MORVAN est une association sportive, loi 1901, affiliée à la FFF (Fédération Française de Football), qui a vu le jour en 1956.

Elle compte aujourd’hui plus de 190 licenciés. Nos équipes jeunes évoluent en U7, U9, U11, U13, U14 et U15 et U16. Nous comptons une équipe sénior féminine et trois équipes séniors évoluant respectivement en R3, D2 et D3.

Le club dispose d’une équipe jeune et dynamique, soucieuse du développement d’une bonne image de l’association et très ambitieuse au niveau sportif. Les licenciés du club évoluent dans une ambiance conviviale et chaleureuse et sont fiers de défendre nos couleurs.

La mairie de Miniac-Morvan nous met à disposition de nombreux équipements tels que deux terrains herbe, un foyer, un minibus aux couleurs du club et un mini terrain synthétique.

Name: Mes Que Agency
Description: We are more than just a football/soccer agency. With agents licensed by FIFA, we are able to represent talent all across the globe. We work with athletes, coaches/managers, and clubs to bring them the best representation possible.

Name: Denver Barbarians Rugby Club
Description:
Founded in 1967, Denver Barbarians Rugby Club has been one of the USA’s top-performing men’s rugby clubs, with a total of 44 Barbos representing the USA Eagles national side at 15s and 7s. Current 15s Head Coach, Brian Erichsen, represented Canada, and Assistant Head Coach, Tim Hutchins, was an England Colleges trialist.

Our 1st XV has won the D2 National Championship in 2023, 2018, 1999, and 1990, and runners-up in 2022, and will be competing for more glory in the upcoming 2025-26 season.

Our 7s squad has been runner-up eight times in the National 7s Championship.

15s training is Monday and Wednesday evenings, 8-10pm at Infinity Park Turf Field, 1055 S Cherry St, Denver, CO 80246. Players of all ability and experience are welcome.

7s training commences after the Spring 15s season concludes.

Name: HC Forward Morges - 1ère équipe
Description:
Club amateur de hockey sur glace évoluant en 1ère ligue. 

Nous voulons faire briller le hockey sur glace et les valeurs du sport sur l'ensemble de la région morgienne.

Name: Team FrySk
Description:
Team FrySk bestaat voor het seizoen 2023-2024 uit 40 schaatsers, waarvan 24 tot het Topteam op de langebaan of marathon behoren en 16 tot het Talententeam. Het is een gevarieerd team met dames en heren, sprinters en marathonschaatsers, junioren en senioren.

Team FrySk werkt sinds 2015 in Leeuwarden aan het opleiden van schaatstalent op zowel de langebaan als in de marathon. Het Topteam en het Talententeam is gericht op langebaan en marathon. De sporters in het topteam hebben nationaal niveau of de potentie hiertoe. De jeugdafdeling van Team Frysk bestond tot 2022 uit het talentenplatvorm wat extra trainingen aanbood voor sporters van de schaatsclubs. Sinds 2022 is dit veranderd in de talentenselectie om de talentvolle sporters nog meer te kunnen ondersteunen. Binnen dit team wordt een volledig trainingsprogramma aangeboden, zodat de talenten nog beter begeleid worden in hun ontwikkeling als schaatser.

Name: Stoic 360
Description:
Stoic 360 is a full-service sports agency, providing comprehensive solutions for football clubs and teams across both sporting and commercial sectors. Our expertise spans the entire football ecosystem, making us the go-to partner for clubs and organizations looking for excellence and innovation.

At Stoic 360, we specialize in:

Player Trading: We bring top talents to the market, expertly navigating player transfers to meet clubs' strategic needs.
Football Development: From grassroots to professional levels, we focus on nurturing talent and fostering long-term football development.
Media & Broadcasting: With a deep understanding of the media landscape, we help teams maximize exposure and engage audiences through cutting-edge broadcasting solutions.
Commercial & Sponsorship: Our team drives impactful partnerships and sponsorship deals that elevate brands and generate sustainable revenue streams.
Scouting: Our world-class scouting team identifies emerging talent, ensuring our partners stay ahead in an ever-evolving football environment.
With a tailored approach to every client, Stoic 360 is committed to helping clubs achieve their sporting and commercial goals. We are your one-stop shop for success, on and off the pitch.

Name: Eaton Hall Shooting Ground.
Description: Eaton Hall Shooting Ground nestled in the Derbyshire countryside comprises of 80 acres of the very best clay shooting, air rifle, gunroom, tuition, café and corporate facilities. A premier plus CPSA ground.

Name: playu.in
Description:
Playu.in is a platform dedicated to promoting sports, wellness, and community engagement through tournaments and fitness events. It provides tailored opportunities for participants from schools, colleges and corporates to connect, collaborate and compete in high-quality sports events. Playu.in was co-founded by Shiraj, who brings over 17 years of corporate experience, and Aiswarya S, an IIM Ahmedabad alumni with more than 15 years of work experience.

Playu.in focuses on the following:

1. Grassroots sports development: The platform offers aspiring athletes opportunities to participate in best-in-class tournaments across various sports. It provides a stage for athletes from diverse backgrounds to showcase their talent, compete with top performers, and enhance their skills.

2. Corporate events: Playu.in organizes customized events for corporates, designed to foster employee engagement, team-building, and collaboration. 

3. Community-driven events: Playu.in hosts events like marathons that encourage networking, camaraderie, and shared experiences. These events unite participants from all walks of life, encouraging them to pursue healthier lifestyles.

Description: Toute l'actu du réseau des partenaires du SC Privas Rugby.

Description: Official LinkedIn of Digity Esport | Since 2021 | Esport Association

Name: Club Natació Rubí
Description:
Fundat el 1971, el Club Natació Rubí és una entitat declarada d'utilitat pública que consta de 3 seccions esportives federades de natació, waterpolo i triatló, on s'han aconseguit diverses fites al llarg de la història i se situa com un dels clubs de referència a la ciutat, a nivell català, nacional i internacional.

Actualment, el Club Natació Rubí és l'entitat esportiva més important de la ciutat de Rubí amb més de 5000 socis i sòcies i prop de 200 esportistes que, a més d'esport federat, ofereix serveis de Fitness, un extens programa d'Activitats Dirigides, Activitats Aquàtiques i Cursos de Natació des de nadons fins a adults, Natació Artística, Campus Esportius, etc.

Name: RugbyConnector
Description:
Rugby is built on connection, but finding the right club or the right players has always been harder than it should be. RugbyConnector was created to change that.

We’re a platform where clubs, players and coaches can showcase who they are, highlight what they offer and connect with the right opportunities worldwide. With smart matching, modern profiles and a dedicated jobs ecosystem, we help the rugby community grow stronger, one connection at a time.

Co founded with Bernard Jackman, RugbyConnector blends deep rugby knowledge with simple, modern tech to support clubs and players everywhere.

Name: MILANO BASEBALL 1946 ASD
Description: Il Milano Baseball 1946 è la più antica società italiana di Baseball. Fondata nel 1946, negli anni 2000 aggiunge alla sua attività il Softball (femminile). Oggi ha 13 squadre iscritte ai campionati nazionali, dal Minibaseball Under 9 alla serie A Baseball e alla serie B Softball. Nel 2023 i tesserati sono stati oltre 300 tra atleti, tecnici e dirigenti. Dal 2020 abbiamo in gestione il centro Kennedy di Milano.

Name: Mäntyharjun Virkistys Ry
Description:
Mäntyharjun Virkistys (Mävi) on satavuotias, monilajinen liikuntaseura. Seurassamme on n. 850 jäsentä.

Mävin keskeinen tehtävä on olla lasten ja nuorten liikunnallinen kasvattaja sekä aikuisten elinikäisen liikkumisen tukija.

Seura tarjoaa jäsenilleen kunto- ja terveysliikuntaa, kilpailutoimintaa, harjoitus- ja valmennustoimintaa, ohjaustoimintaa, liikuntatoimintaa eri ikäryhmille, koulutustoimintaa ja muuta vastaavaa toimintaa, jonka tavoitteena on edistää kansalaisten fyysistä ja henkistä toimintakykyisyyttä ja hyvinvointia.

Mävin lajien harrastaminen on yhteinen asia, joka tuo iloa seuratoiminnassa mukana oleville. Onnistumiset syntyvät positiivisessa ilmapiirissä – kaikilla tasoilla.

Name: The Grove Collective
Description:
In 2021, the State of Mississippi enacted its NIL (name, image and likeness) law, and for the first time ever, student athletes at Ole Miss could be compensated for their publicity rights. Mississippi’s NIL law was amended in April 2022 to provide that individuals or entities may “collectively” license publicity rights in exchange for compensation to student athletes.

The Grove Collective was created to ensure that NIL is done right by the law – and right by Ole Miss student athletes. Your support of the Grove Collective translates into support of Ole Miss student athletes, allowing the Grove Collective to compensate them for licensing and use of their publicity rights. And when it comes to NIL, there is strength in numbers.

The Grove Collective also provides a turn-key solution for businesses that desire to utilize the publicity rights of Ole Miss student athletes for advertising. The Grove Collective markets your business, provides contracts for your use, assists the student athlete with accounting and taxation, and fulfills the compliance disclosure required by Ole Miss.

Name: RC ALCOBENDAS
Description:
RC Alcobendas es mucho más que un club de fútbol base. Somos una comunidad formada por jugadores, familias, entrenadores y profesionales que creen en el fútbol como herramienta de formación, crecimiento y valores.

Nacimos en 2011 con una idea sencilla pero ambiciosa: crear un entorno donde cada jugador tenga su espacio para aprender, competir y disfrutar del fútbol. Desde 2021, con una nueva directiva, el club ha iniciado una etapa de crecimiento y profesionalización que nos ha permitido consolidarnos como una cantera de referencia en Madrid.

En 2024 dimos un paso clave al integrarnos en un prestigioso grupo de canteras con presencia en todas las máximas categorías del fútbol base nacional. Hoy contamos con cerca de 1.000 jugadores federados, desde debutantes hasta juveniles, compitiendo en todos los niveles y con un modelo que prioriza el desarrollo individual sin perder la ambición competitiva.

RC Alcobendas es un proyecto en constante evolución, con una fuerte conexión con su entorno y un impacto real en cientos de familias. Buscamos seguir creciendo junto a empresas y marcas que compartan nuestra visión y quieran formar parte de un proyecto deportivo sólido, cercano y con futuro.
