Name: Ice Exchange (Ice X)
Description:
The system is broken. We’re here to fix it.

Ice Exchange transforms how ice time is booked, monetized, and shared — helping rinks, leagues, organizations, and coaches eliminate inefficiencies and unlock new revenue streams.

 For Rinks:

Fill unused hours. Monetize off-peak time. Simplify scheduling. Turn every sheet into revenue.

 For Coaches:

Book smarter. Sell smarter. Build programs that scale. Resell unused ice or run private clinics and camps — all on one platform.

 For Leagues:

Centralize operations across multiple rinks. Simplify communication. Coordinate schedules without manual chaos.

Built by hockey operators — not corporate suits — Ice Exchange is infrastructure for the New Ice Economy, where regional flywheels create healthier, more accessible hockey ecosystems.

 DM us to learn how your rink, organization, or program can activate your flywheel and maximize every hour.

Name: Nairobi Pickleball Club
Description:
Nairobi Pickleball Club is dedicated to providing its members a one-of-a-kind pickleball learning experience while combining an inviting social atmosphere.

Nairobi Pickleball Club is committed to building a long-lasting relationship with our members, ensuring a love of the sport.


Nairobi Pickleball Club has 4 outdoor pickleball courts. We offer pickleball lessons with wonderful pros, and a shop to get you off to a great start. At Nairobi Pickleball Club, located on top of two rivers mall, there is plenty of room to play and socialize for everyone!

Name: HMG CENTRE FOR SPORTS EXCELLENCE
Description:
HMG Centre for Sports Excellence is Central India’s world-class sports facility spread on lush 10 acres of land in Indore with 45,000 sq ft. dedicated solely to indoor sports. Offering state-of-the-art facilities to athletes, coaches, students, and players in cricket,  football, shooting, swimming, basketball, tennis,  the center has become the hub of the best academies.

The centre aims to provide a platform to nurture talent within grassroots through in-house training & development programs designed & executed by qualified Indian & International coaches and instructors.

Name: Rugby Belluno
Description: Il Rugby Belluno nasce nel 1969 e comincia l'attività con la sola squadra senior partendo dal campionato di serie D nella stagione 1969/70. Già dopo il secondo campionato ottiene la promozione in serie C, nella quale resterà 10 anni prima di approdare alla serie B nel campionato 1982/83. A partire dalla stagione 1975/76 la società affianca alla prima squadra l'attività del settore giovanile. Nel corso degli anni 1980 degli anni 1990 la squadra oscilla tra la serie A e la serie B.

Name: Clubra Sports & Aquatics
Description: Welcome to our swimming company, where we provide top-quality swimming lessons for all ages and skill levels. Our experienced and certified instructors are passionate about teaching the art of swimming and helping individuals achieve their goals in the water. Whether you are a beginner looking to learn basic strokes or an experienced swimmer striving to improve your technique, we offer tailored lessons to meet your needs. Our state-of-the-art facilities provide a safe and comfortable environment for learning and practicing, with amenities such as heated pools and modern equipment. At our swimming company, we believe that swimming is not just a skill, but a lifelong passion that promotes health, fitness, and fun. Join us today and dive into a world of aquatic adventure!

European Youth Basketball League (EYBL) is the biggest and the only FIBA certified youth league in Europe. Hosting 50+ tournaments annually, comprised of 250+ teams, in two conferences (North & South) across 33 countries.

EYBL’s vision is to develop young talents and give them an opportunity to grow professionally on an international level!

Name: Softball SJ Ospreys
Description: The SJ Ospreys represent a vibrant community of young athletes, coaches, and families united by a shared passion for softball and a commitment to excellence, both on and off the field. Based in Cape May County, NJ, our 12U travel softball team is dedicated to nurturing the talents of young girls, fostering an environment where they can grow not just as athletes but as confident and resilient individuals. At the heart of the SJ Ospreys is a belief in the power of teamwork, sportsmanship, and the positive impact of competitive sports on youth development.

Name: Azzano Calcio
Description:
Una solida realtà sportiva inserita in un contesto
geografico che garantisce un bacino di utenza e di
visibilità di livello provinciale e regionale. Puntiamo a
crescere giorno dopo giorno attraverso la costruzione di
importanti progetti seguendo una filosofia per certi versi
innovativa nel mondo del calcio dilettantistico.
Azzano è un nome che vuol diventare un brand, promotore
di un calcio diverso, fondato sullo sviluppo dei giovani e
per i giovani, conciliando aspetti formativi di tipo tecnico
ed educativi, caratterizzati da un forte legame e senso di
appartenenza con atleti e famiglie. La professionalità che
si vuol trasmettere deve essere simbolo di un percorso da
seguire come quello che si vive in una casa dove insieme
si cresce, si sbaglia, si impara. Dove il risultato è sempre e
solo una conseguenza di un ottimo lavoro svolto da tutte
le componenti e non l'ossessione che prevarica lo sviluppo
dell'individuo.
Siamo un sodalizio che investe nel presente per garantire
il miglior futuro possibile per gli adulti del domani.

Name: Fight Division
Description:
Fight Division is a specialised social media platform for the combat sports community. Our mission is to create a fighter-focused social media platform, fostering a thriving "fight economy" that supports fighters, gyms, and fans, enabling fighters to increase their income and pursue professional careers.

Our platform empowers fighters to monetize their following, turn professional, and connect with fans through exclusive content and merchandise sales, elevating the combat sports community.

Name: Heighers eSports IIT Madras
Description: The Heighers eSports Society of IIT Madras BS exists to foster a vibrant gaming community that transcends boundaries and promotes inclusivity. With a vision to create an environment where individuals from diverse backgrounds can come together and excel in the realm of competitive gaming, the club aims to provide a platform for students to explore their passion for eSports. The mission of the club is to cultivate a culture of teamwork, discipline, and sportsmanship, nurturing the development of skills in various gaming genres. Embracing values such as fair play, respect, and continuous improvement, Heighers strive to empower its members to achieve excellence in eSports while fostering a sense of camaraderie and mutual support.

Name: STADE OLYMPIQUE DE GIVORS RUGBY
Description:
Créé en 1912, le SOG RUGBY 2 VALLÉES fait partie intégrante du patrimoine givordin et du paysage rugbystique français avec la formation de plusieurs internationaux.

Le club évolue en Fédérale 3, la troisième division nationale et cela grâce au soutien indéfectible des partenaires du club, présents à nos côtés dans les bons comme les mauvais moments.

En continuant de nous appuyer sur nos valeurs qui nous ont permis d’évoluer au niveau national à  savoir : le développement de la formation de nos joueurs, l’ancrage territorial par nos actions sociales et l’augmentation des partenariats privés tout en conservant notre état d’esprit familial.

S’associer au SOG RUGBY 2 VALLÉES c’est l’opportunité de partager des valeurs qui nous sont chères et qui vous sont chères, en vivant une saison au rythme de la passion et des émotions.

Name: Pan Idræt
Description:
Pan Idræt is a sports club in Copenhagen (DK), with more than 1500 members and more than 25 different sports and activities. Pan Idræt was founded in 1984 by a group of gays who were excluded from the public swimming pools because of the AIDS scare. Today Pan Idræt works to create a safe and inclusive environment for everyone regardless of sexual orientation or gender identity. 

Pan Idræt offers an alternative, healthy way to meet other people in an environment where the majority find their social life in the nightlife. Everyone is welcome, as diversity is absolutely essential to Pan Idræt.

Name: Athlete Path
Description:
Athlete Path este prima platformă din România care revoluționează modul în care sportivii își ating potențialul maxim, conectând direct atleții cu susținătorii lor într-un ecosistem transparent și inovator.

Misiunea noastră este să democratizăm accesul la performanță în sportul românesc prin:
⋅Facilitarea suportului financiar direct între susținători și sportivi
⋅Asigurarea transparenței totale în utilizarea fondurilor
⋅Crearea unui ecosistem complet de dezvoltare sportivă
⋅Oferirea de programe educaționale și mentorat

Name: United States Amputee Football Federation
Description: We have seen how amputee soccer can elevate women emotionally and physically with a supportive community. We will make sure all women get a chance to share in this power. To ensure we foster a community of belonging that is welcoming and supportive to all, we are committed to take the necessary steps to improve the lives of our amputee soccer family.

Name: FIG World Trampoline Championships 2023
Description:
Birmingham will welcome gymnasts from across the globe to the 37th edition of the FIG Trampoline Gymnastics World Championships, taking place at the Utilita Arena from the 9th to 19th November 2023.

Over 1,000 gymnasts from over 50 countries will compete across eight days of thrilling competition, in an event that encapsulates the Trampoline Gymnastics World Championship and the World Age Group Competitions.

Dreams will come alive, records will be broken and medals won at this, the pinnacle event in the discipline of Trampoline Gymnastics which will see athletes compete in Individual and Synchronised Trampoline, Double Mini Trampoline (DMT) and Tumbling.

The Championships will create moments that inspire and amaze, showcasing the athletes and the city like never before.

Join us at an event that promises to take Trampoline Gymnastics to new heights. See inspirational performances from gymnasts performing at their absolute peak, with British and local athletes leading the way.  

With breath taking moments of world class agility in the air, the FIG Trampoline Gymnastics World Championships will be an experience that lasts forever in the hearts and minds of everyone who attends.

Name: Fleet Town Football Club
Description:
Officially formed in 1890 we are the oldest sports club in Fleet. We are proud of the connection we have with our local community and beyond. Fleet Town Football Club is affiliated to the Hampshire FA. We are a Volunteer led club. Our Men's and Women's Adults first teams play in the Non League System and we have over 400 girls and boys registered across 40 teams and we will launch the provision of Pan Disability Football in July 2023. 

Our teams compete in the Men's, Women's and Youth FA CUP, FA Vase, Hampshire, Aldershot League cups which sees matches played in Hampshire, Surrey, Middlesex, London Berkshire,The Isle of White, The Channel Islands and Dorset.

Ons mooi gelegen groene park bevindt zich aan de Hoogheuvelstraat 75 in Oss. Het park beschikt over 10 kunstgras tennisbanen, 6 kunstgras padelbanen en een minibaan waar jaarrond op gespeeld kan worden. De vereniging telt op dit moment ruim 700 leden en we zijn groeiende.

Description: Cuala GAC is an amateur volunteer-led organization based in Dalkey, South Co. Dublin, that promotes Gaelic Games, culture, community and lifelong participation. With over 3,200 members from a wide catchment area, we operate as ‘One Club’, training and fielding teams in football, hurling and camogie from our youth academy up to adult level. Cuala has a strong legacy of sporting success and accolades but takes pride not only in sporting achievements but also in the participation of our members and in the enjoyment they derive from being a part of our club.

Name: Etoile Sportive Saint-Simon
Description:
Depuis 1934, l'Etoile Sportive Saint-Simon est un club majeur dans le paysage footballistique Toulousain. Avec près de 500 licenciés, le club s'appuie sur ses bénévoles, ses dirigeants, ses éducateurs qualifiés ainsi que sur son réseau de partenaires pour véhiculer ses valeurs historiques : Éducation - Respect - Solidarité - Plaisir d'être ensemble.

Le club est composé de 2 équipes séniors masculines (évoluant en Régional 3 et Départemental 3), 1 équipe sénior féminine et une école de football constituée de jeunes allant de 5 à 17 ans.

Retrouvez les informations essentielles de l'Etoile Sportive Saint-Simon, les nombreux partenaires qui nous soutiennent dans notre développement, les actions et évènements mis en place le club.

Fort d'un réseau d'une quarantaine de partenaires, le club de l'Etoile Sportive Saint-Simon se positionne comme un acteur majeur et en plein développement pour les entreprises locales.

Name: Wayd
Description:
A picture can say more than a thousand words!

A good camera on your mobile is important, but it doesn’t give you access to your friends' photos of you.

The app sorts photos by where and when they were taken and compares this with the people you add as friends. Then, you can choose what you want to share and get back the photos you haven’t seen from the same moment.

When friends are connected, the app will suggest memories that can be shared between you automatically.

Name: Vanuatu Football Federation
Description: The Vanuatu Football Federation is the governing body of football in Vanuatu. It is an association of Vanuatu football clubs, and it organises national competitions and international matches for the Vanuatu National Football Team. The VFF was founded in 1934.

Name: FantasticWE
Description:
Fantastic Athletes leads the way in both Sports and Esports industries based on a new software platform, committed to elevating athletic performance.

Our cutting-edge platform offers a user-friendly solution that accelerates improvement for athletes, coaches, and teams in record time.

With a global footprint and extensive expertise, we've honed a sophisticated system that transforms Data Analytics and performance optimization.

Our patented data provides precise enhancements in Physical, Mental, and Cognitive abilities, reshaping the landscape of Sports and Esports IQ. 
By identifying overlooked practice elements and seamlessly integrating them into athletes' and coaches' weekly routines, we empower coaching staff to focus on their core mission without the hassle of laborious video analysis. 
Athletes can now refine their game with minimal time investment, swiftly overcoming obstacles to achieve monumental progress.
The data they generate serves as the foundation for reaching new heights, enabling them to break through previous barriers with unparalleled success.

Description:
Paris Gaels GAA was created in 1995 and was the first club in Continental Europe to be affiliated with the GAA (Gaelic Athletic Association, the irish sports and cultural association).

Our club aims to promote Ladies & Men Gaelic Football, Hurling, Camogie, Gaelic Handball as well as Irish culture in Paris, France and across Europe

Le Paris Gaels GAA est un club fondé en 1995. Il fut le premier club d’Europe continentale à être affiliée à la GAA (Gaelic Athletic Association, l’association sportive et culturelle irlandaise).

Notre club a pour but de promouvoir le football gaélique féminin et masculin, le hurling, le camogie, le handball ainsi que la culture irlandaise à Paris, en France et à travers l’Europe.

Name: Pêche Feeder Compétition - (P.F.C.) Rodez
Description:
Pêche Feeder Compétition (PFC) est le club de pêche sportive de la ville de Rodez dans le département de l'Aveyron.

Comme tout club sportif, son objectif prioritaire est l’obtention de bons résultats en compétition, quelle soit individuelle ou par équipe. Le PFC est donc créé en 2016 pour fournir un cadre qui facilite la performance de nos pêcheurs. Le club est basé à Rodez dans le département de l’Aveyron et est affilié au Comité Départemental de la Fédération Française de Pêche Sportive (FFPS).

Le club est aussi un outil de promotion de la pêche sportive et nous envisageons d’organiser des animations pour présenter nos techniques au grand public. Le PFC a également pour vocation l’organisation de compétition de pêche au coup dans le département de l’Aveyron en partenariat avec les acteurs locaux.

Pêche Feeder Compétition est une association loi 1901
Publié au Journal Officiel le 9 janvier 2016 – Annonce n° 91 – page 105.
Date de la déclaration : 23 décembre 2015.

Name: Havířovská desítka
Description:
Obnovili jsme tradici městských běhů v Havířově. Heimstaden Havířovská desítka není obyčejný běh. Každý krok znamená víc než jen cestu k cíli. Sdílíme radost, město a sebe v něm. Benefiční myšlenkou závodu je podpora hráčů HSC Moravia, sportovců na vozíku, kteří hrají paralympijský sport boccia. Z každého startovného putuje celých sto korun na podporu jejich činnosti. 

Máte v práci tým nadšených sportovců? Přijďte porovnat síly v RBP štafetovém běhu 4 x 2,5 km. Podpořte dobrou věc, zasportujte si a užijte si den, který můžete pojmout třeba jako teambuilding. 

Letos se na startu v centru Havířova potkáme 15. října.

Description:
Nujoom is a school sports and facilities management company in Saudi Arabia, dedicated to transforming the landscape of youth sports. 

With a mission to empower the next generation of athletes, we provide world-class sports programs and facility management services that align with Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030.

We bring together over 30 years of combined experience in international sports and the development of innovative sports academies. 

Our local and global expertise uniquely positions us as leaders in the industry, committed to creating long-lasting relationships with our clients and partners to foster sporting excellence and healthier communities.

Name: Capital Rugby Union
Description:
Capital Rugby Union (CRU) is an amateur rugby association based in Port Moresby, Papua New Guinea.

As a Member Union of the Papua New Guinea Rugby Union (PNGRU), the
CRU is the largest and oldest provincial rugby body in Papua New Guinea
(PNG). Established in the early 60s and after various transformations, the
CRU is now comprised of the most successful clubs in PNG sport, which
have a combined history of more than 250 years.

WHO WE ARE

OUR VISION
To be the best community rugby association in Papua New Guinea by providing rugby players of all levels and all ages a pathway to succeed both on and off the field.

OUR MISSION
Our mission is to increase participation and awareness of our great game while fostering our key values as outlined below. We strive to govern the competition for the prosperity of all stakeholders and to effectively manage and deliver the values, sportsmanship and culture that rugby holds.

OUR VALUES
Integrity: To maintain the integrity of Rugby at all levels and in all areas of the game.
Passion: To share our passion of growing the game and being part of the global rugby family.
Solidarity: To build a culture that transcends cultural, ethnic and socioeconomic backgrounds.
Discipline: To adhere to the values and principles of rugby.
Respect: To treat people with respect by honoring and taking pride in the treatment of all who participate in the game.

OUR COMMITMENT TO THE COMMUNITY
Our communities are the heartbeat of the CRU. As such the association is committed to building strong communi through our programs. 
Rugby for integral human development is at the core of our development programs; whereby in ensuring off field and personal growth, our aim is to create environments in rugby that are inclusive, safe and supportive. 

Environments that empower all who participate in our association to be a better version of themselves and bydoing so, becoming better people in their communities.

Name: Bristol Bullets
Description:
Based in the heart of Bristol, we are a professional badminton team bringing world-class players and community engagement together. Proudly competing in the National Badminton League (NBL), our squad is made up of national-level players whose skill, dedication, and passion for the sport place us among the top contenders in the country.

But we are more than just a team on the court — we are ambassadors for badminton. Alongside our NBL campaign, we work closely with local badminton clubs, schools, and junior programs to inspire the next generation of players. Our athletes taking part in coaching and mentorship sessions, offering young talent the chance to learn directly from those competing at the highest levels.

Our mission is two-fold:
1 Compete at the highest level — showcasing the speed, skill, and excitement of badminton while proudly representing Bristol on the national stage.
2 Grow the sport locally — making badminton accessible, engaging, and inspiring for players of all ages and backgrounds.

We believe in building strong connections with our community, fostering grassroots participation, and creating a pathway for young players to rise through the ranks. Whether it’s through thrilling match nights at our home venue or grassroots sessions with beginners, our commitment is to keep badminton thriving in Bristol and beyond.

 Join our journey — follow us for match updates, behind-the-scenes stories, community initiatives, and opportunities to get involved. Whether you’re a player, a supporter, or simply a fan of fast-paced, high-skill sport, we’d love for you to be part of our growing badminton family.

 Show your support — we are looking for organisations to sponsor our team, and volunteers to help us succeed. We would love to hear from you.

Name: House of Padel
Description:
Exciting News! 

Are you ready to elevate your padel game, connect with a vibrant community, and get work done in the heart of Kuala Lumpur? Get ready to experience padel like never before at our brand-new padel club, opening soon in Kuala Lumpur!

 What makes us unique? 
 6 state-of-the-art padel courts by Skypadel + 2 Junior Courts 
 A fantastic courtside clubhouse offering latino treats 
 Self-sufficient, eco-friendly operations, and surrounded by greenery.

At House Of Padel, we're more than just a sports facility; we're a social hub for padel lovers to come together, play, unwind, and now work! Whether you're a padel pro, a remote worker, or a startup entrepreneur, our courts and co-working space are waiting for you.

Our commitment to sustainability means we'll provide a top-notch padel experience while minimizing our environmental impact, and our on-site co-working space ensures you can balance work and play seamlessly. Want to get in touch, be a partner or an investor ? Email us at vamos@houseofpadel.club

Name: FC Rotkreuz
Description:
Der FC Rotkreuz wurde 1958 auf Initiative des heutigen Ehrenpräsidenten Albert Stöckli gegründet. Obwohl das erste Spiel der Vereinsgeschichte gegen den FC Perlen verloren ging, stieg man bereits im dritten Vereinsjahr in die 3. Liga auf. In dieser Liga spielte die 1. Mannschaft bislang die meiste Zeit. Abstiege in die 4. Liga – und entsprechende Wiederaufstiege – waren jedoch nicht selten. Der Verein wuchs seit seiner Gründung von anfänglich 30 Mitglieder und einer Mannschaft auf heute (2022) rund 500 Mitglieder und 25 Mannschaften. Der Mitgliederbeitrag für Aktive erhöhte sich in dieser Zeit von CHF 12 auf CHF 430. 
Rückblickend gab es viele Höhepunkte. Ein für den weiteren Verlauf entscheidender Moment war, als wir zu Beginn der 1960er Jahre einen Fussballplatz am hervorragenden Standort an der Buonaserstrasse erhielten, der sich über den Bau zweiten Spielfeldes (1990), des Sportparkes (2001) und des Kunstrasenplatzes (2018) stetig weiterentwickelt hat. Dass 240 Mannschaften im Jahr 1976 an unserem Dorfturnier teilgenommen haben, hat uns sehr gefreut. Weiter hatten und haben wir viel Freude an den vielen Fasnachtsumzügen, den Gründungen der Gönner,- und Supportervereinigung (1982), Club444 (2002) und Club2000 (2022) sowie an der ersten Publikation des Vereinsheftes FCR News 1979, die 2022 zum fünfzigsten Mal erschien - mittlerweile mit dem Titel FCR Freistoss. Weiter bleibt uns die Teilnahme unserer B Junioren am DANA-Cup 1994, dem damals grössten Juniorenturnier der Welt, in guter Erinnerung. Schliesslich sind wir auf die Profikarrieren unserer ehemaligen Junioren – wie z.B. Maurizio Melina, Selver Hodzic oder Lorik Emini – besonders stolz.
witere Infos unter www.fcrotkreuz.ch

Aujourd'hui l'équipe évolue sur le championnat universitaire bordelais, la Coupe de France des Grandes Ecoles de Commerce, le Challenge et tout dernièrement le Top Eight.

Notre progression est due a un travail de longue haleine depuis des générations et des générations, non seulement sportif avec un engagement de chaque joueurs, mais aussi grâce à des fondations solides.

Nous souhaitons retranscrire sur cette page la progression, l'engagement et la réussite de notre équipe. Cette page Linkedin, servira également à rassembler la communauté de Bemiens et Kedgeurs autour du rugby et mettra la lumière sur des joueurs, des initiatives étudiantes ou des projets portés par des alumnis qui sont en accord avec nos valeurs et celles du rugby.

Poussinement vôtre,

Name: Sport Academy
Description:
Sport Academy nace en el año 2015 con el objetivo de fomentar el deporte, desde el nivel formativo hasta el alto rendimiento. Educando y formando desde cada disciplina, como también preocupándonos de los rendimientos académicos de cada alumno, ofreciendo alternativas que se adaptan a las necesidades de cada jugador y de cada familia, y sobre todo, acompañándolos y guiándolos a cumplir sus sueños.

Hoy somos la academia de alto rendimiento más grande de Chile, con más de 300 alumnos que buscan día a día mejorar y crecer en su disciplina para poder cumplir sus sueños.

Uno de los pilares más importantes que fomentamos es que el deporte y los estudios van de la mano. Y es por esto que contamos con distintas alternativas que cada familia puede optar para que el crecimiento y desarrollo de sus hijos sea de forma integral, sin descuidar la formación académica como tampoco la deportiva.

Hoy en día contamos con formación en Tenis y Fútbol en la sede ubicada en el Club Palestino, Las Condes, y desde este año, una nueva sede en el Club Brisas de San Martin, Colina. A su vez, contamos con alianzas con distintos coaches en Estados Unidos de diversas Universidades para aquellos deportistas que quieran optar por el proceso de postular a una beca deportiva en las mejores Universidades de USA. Hemos ido creciendo y generando vínculos no solo en el mundo del fútbol y el tenis, sino que también en otras disciplinas, tales como natación, volleyball, atletismo, entre otros deportes.Hacemos de los sueños una realidad!

Name: Carlstad Crusaders
Description:
We are always interested in connecting with new players, volunteers, fans, advertisers, and sponsors!

OUR VISION - Carlstad Crusaders will be Europe's best American football association at all levels. We will be a driving force in the development of the association and sports. 

OUR MISSION - Sports is physical activity that we perform to be able to have fun, feel good and perform more. Sports consist of training and play, competition and demonstration. Sport provides physical, mental, social and cultural development. We organize our sports in independent sections that together form a free and voluntary popular movement united in the association. We will also operate and develop areas linked to our sport, such as referees, match arrangements, leaders, etc.. 

VALUES - The association has agreed on a common set of values on which all sections should be based: 
- Enjoyment and community 
- Democracy and participation 
- Everyone's right to participate 
- Clean play 

ORGANIZATION - We divide our sport according to age and level of ambition. By children's sports we generally mean sports up to the age of eleven. By youth sports we mean sports between 12-15 years. By junior sports we mean sports between 16-19 years. By adult sports we mean sports for those who are 20 years or older. We are a unified association that works for the same vision and values, it permeates all sections, both breadth and elite. 

The association complies with the UN Convention on Human Rights, the UN Convention on the Rights of the Child (the Convention on the Rights of the Child) and the UN International Convention on the Rights of Persons with Disabilities. 

Currently there are the following sections in our association: MEN section containing Men's teams and Development teams; WOMEN section containing Women's teams and Development teams; JUNIOR section containing U19, U17 and U15 teams; YOUTH section containing U13 and U11 teams; and CHILDREN section containing U9 and U7 teams

Name: VIZAG CITY FOOTBALL CLUB PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Vizag City Football Club | Pioneering Football in Andhra Pradesh 

As the first-ever football club and school from Andhra Pradesh and the first team from the state to compete in the I-League 3rd Division, Vizag City Football Club (VCFC) is making history. Founded with a passion for developing local talent and elevating the game in Visakhapatnam and beyond, VCFC is dedicated to creating a sustainable football culture that nurtures dreams and fosters excellence.

 Our Goals:

Talent Development: We are committed to discovering, training, and empowering athletes at every level through expert coaching, high-quality facilities, and clear development pathways.
Community Engagement: More than a club, VCFC is a family. We collaborate with local schools, communities, and sports organizations, spreading our love for the beautiful game.
Setting New Standards: By competing at a national level, including the I-League 3rd Division, we’re opening doors for aspiring players in Andhra Pradesh and raising the bar for sports in the region.

Name: GC & FC Olympia
Description:
GC&FC Olympia is opgericht op 1 juni 1886 en is een van de oudste voetbalverenigingen van Nederland. Een actieve vereniging met een breed activiteitenaanbod en ruim 900 leden. Olympia was van oudsher een zondagclub. Seizoen '22/'23 wordt echter de overstap gemaakt door ons eerste elftal naar de zaterdag 1e klasse vanwege het sterk dalende aantal zondagteams in de eigen regio en wensen vanuit de spelersgroep.

Op deze website aandacht voor de rijke historie van onze club. Olympia kenmerkt zich door de focus op: 
- sportief en correct gedrag
- betrokkenheid van de leden
- traditie en evenementen.               

Sportaanbod  
Onze kernactiviteit is competitie veldvoetbal. Seizoen '22/'23 starten 36 jeugdteams, waaronder 5 meidenteams, in de KNVB-competitie. Daarnaast spelen voor het eerst Olympia 1 en een O23-team in de A-categorie op de zaterdag, naast 2 herenteams en 4 O23 teams in de B-catgeorie. Op zondag spelen 2 herenteams competitie; op vrijdagavond 2 vrouwenteams competitiie in toernooivorm.  Teams doen soms ook mee aan andere competites zoals de Rijnmondcup (selectieteams) en Groene Hart Competitie (VBS). Alle jeugdteams en veel seniorenteams trainen twee keer per week op ma/wo of di/do. Ieder competitieteam heeft een eigen websitepagina.  

Wekelijks sportaanbod naast competitievoetbal: 
Voetbalschool (leeftijd: 5-7 jaar)
recreatief voetbal 35+ (7x7 onderling voetballen)
voetbalFIT (vrouwen 30+)
walking football met de Old Stars 1886 (leeftijd: 60+) 
jeu de boules (mannen en vrouwen)
wandelgroep

Activiteiten 
Olympia is een vereniging die midden in de maatschappij staat. Er zijn tal van activiteiten voor leden en voor niet-leden, voor de jeugd en senioren of voor beiden, waar u op de websitepagina's onder evenementen, maatschappelijk, de agenda (Homepage) en Facebook Olympia informatie kunt vinden.  

Velden
We beschikken over een prachtige duurzame accommodatie met twee kunstgrasvelden met verlichting en een natuurgras wedstrijdveld.

Name: Bahrain Asian Youth Games 3rd Edition
Description: The Asian Youth Games is a premier multi-sport event held every four years, bringing together talented young athletes aged 14 to 17 from across the continent. Organized under the Olympic Council of Asia (OCA), the Games provide a crucial platform for the next generation of sporting stars to compete, fostering a spirit of sportsmanship, friendship, and cultural exchange. It is a vital stepping stone for many athletes on their journey to future international competitions, including the Asian Games and the Olympic Games.

Name: kitround
Description:
kitround is the UK's first fully circular online marketplace dedicated to reselling and redistributing sports kit and equipment. 

We're committed to sustainability, inclusivity, and community impact.

Name: Heron Scsd
Description:
HERON is a non-profit sports organization for the promotion of Sport, Play and Education using projects,
courses and initiatives designed to cater for all ages and abilities. 

It was founded in 2016 by a group of young and motivated people who shared an innovative and dynamic vision of the world of sport.

Heron's main objective is the promotion of sport seen as a tool capable of supporting peace, development and social inclusion, while maintaining its founding educational values. Its goal is to sustain a holistic approach, based on its ability to co-design projects with schools, foundations, private social organizations and public administrations. The keywords in Heron's approach are fairness, equality, inclusion, trust, honesty, transparency, team spirit, confidentiality, employee care, and sustainability.

Today, Heron has 10 permanent employees and approximately 100 freelance sports staff. The organization has the capacity to supply sports courses in the gym, school projects, summer and winter camps, after-school activities, various courses and training activities, extending the age range of its target participants to include adults and senior citizens. Approximately 1,500 people living in the provinces of Reggio Emilia and Modena currently make use of its services.

Furthermore Heron has gained a leading role in providing programmes designed for children, teenagers, and families. It has become a preferential partner and focal point for those who believe in the values of sport, play and education, focusing on well-being instead of the competitive side of sport alone.

Name: UF Gator Sport Management Organization
Description:
The UF Gator Sport Management Organization (GSMO) connects Sport Management students at the University of Florida with each other and the sports industry. Our mission is to provide students with the resources, experiences, and networks they need to succeed in their careers.

We foster a collaborative community where students can build relationships with peers and industry leaders. GSMO hosts guest speakers, organizes networking trips, and offers tools to help members stand out as competitive candidates in the sports field.

In addition, we serve as a hub for industry knowledge, keeping students informed about trends, opportunities, and essential career insights.

Whether you're a student eager to grow, an alum looking to give back, or a professional seeking talent, GSMO is your connection to the future of sport management.

Name: Stade Français Basket
Description:
Le Stade Français, implanté dans l’ouest parisien, a été créé le 12 décembre 1883,  et la section basket a vu le jour en 1920.

La section basket du Stade Français se définit selon trois axes majeurs : 
- Initiation par son école labellisée 
- Académie, loisir et apprentissage
- Compétition, 21 équipes engagées 

Nos objectifs : 
- Promouvoir le sport mixte : homme et femme ensemble dans la pratique

- Développer et engager nos jeunes dans la politique du développement durable

Description: La Ligue Corse de Rugby a pour objet d'encourager et de développer la pratique du jeu de rugby (rugby à XV, rugby à 7, rugby à 5, rugby santé, rugby adapté et toutes autres formes de rugby appliquant les règles du jeu fixées par World Rugby) dans son ressort territorial par la délégation de la Fédération Française de Rugby dont elle assure la représentation.

Name: Tasca Racing
Description:
Tasca Racing is one of the most respected and longest standing organizations in professional drag racing, carrying forward a family legacy that began in 1962. Built on innovation, performance, and a relentless commitment to excellence, Tasca Racing competes at the highest levels of the NHRA Drag Racing Series with a championship caliber mindset both on and off the track.

Tasca Racing blends cutting edge technology, world class engineering, and a team driven culture to push the limits of what is possible in modern nitro Funny Car competition. The organization partners with some of the most iconic brands in performance and automotive culture, delivering unmatched value through motorsports marketing, hospitality, fan engagement, and sponsor activation.

From record setting runs to industry leading marketing programs, Tasca Racing continues to set the standard for professionalism and competitiveness in the sport. Our mission is simple: advance the Tasca legacy through performance, innovation, and a dedication to winning that reflects the spirit of the Tasca family motto, “Win on Sunday, sell on Monday.”

Name: Brisbane Metropolitan Touch Association
Description:
The Brisbane Metropolitan Touch Association is Australia’s largest affiliated touch football competition, with over 7,500 players per year at the venue.

Competitions are played five nights per week, with junior boys and girls competitions starting from five years of age, adult social competitions and the rapidly expanding men’s masters competition. The elite Metro Cup competition is also run in the second half of the year with the best players and referees in the world representing their local clubs in our showpiece competition.

We also host major events including the annual Queensland All Schools tournament, a 5 day showcase of touch football with over 400 teams competing, along with the Queensland School Sport Touch Championships and Deadly Choices Indigenous touch carnival.

Through the hard work of two groundskeepers, the association prepares 7 fully-lit touch football fields at the picturesque Whites Hill Reserve, Brisbane’s only dedicated touch football facility. We are also constructing a brand new maintenance shed and 250kL water tank, and also have plans developed for lighting, irrigation and clubhouse upgrades in the medium-term future.

The BMTA Mustangs provide representative opportunities to all age of players, and the association was awarded the trophy for Champion Affiliate at the 2019 Junior State Cup, as well as the inaugural 2019 Queensland State Cup where almost a quarter of all teams competing were representing the association.

We have called Whites Hill Reserve home since 1988 and have recently launched our new 3 year strategic plan to ensure we succeed for many more years to come.

Name: Fédération ivoirienne de BasketBall (FIBB)
Description:
La Fédération ivoirienne de basket-ball (FIBB) est l’instance officielle de gestion du basket-ball en Côte d’Ivoire. Bienvenue sur sa page officielle.

La Fédération ivoirienne de basket-ball (FIBB) est l’instance officielle de gestion du basket-ball en Côte d’Ivoire. La FIBB est la seule autorité reconnue par la FIBA (Fédération Internationale de Basket-ball Amateur) à laquelle elle est affiliée, elle-même seule instance reconnue par le Comité International Olympique (CIO). Elle fut fondée en 1952 et est affiliée à l’AFABA depuis 1961. Moussa Diarra en est le président depuis Décembre 2023..

La FIBB est déclarée comme une association regroupant les clubs de basket-ball de Côte d’Ivoire. Elle organise les compétitions nationales et les matchs internationaux de la sélection ivoirienne.
En tant qu’organisation à but non-lucratif, sa mission est de développer et de promouvoir le basketball, et d’unifier une communauté qui compte plusieurs milliers de joueurs amateurs compris, ainsi que des millions de supporters en Côte d’Ivoire.

Elle établit les règlements qui régissent les relations entre les différents acteurs de la communauté du basket-ball en Côte d’Ivoire.
La FIBB compte aujourd’hui 7 ligues nationales, plusieurs Centres de Formation (41 affiliés rien qu’à Abidjan), ainsi qu’une vingtaine de Clubs enregistrés dans la capitale. Un programme d’identification est en cours sur l’ensemble du territoire ivoirien.

De façon non-exhaustive, la FIBB se charge de :
- Diffuser, faire appliquer et participer aux travaux sur le “Règlement Officiel du Basketball” tel que défini par la FIBA

- Veiller au respect des normes pour les équipements et les infrastructures

- Établir les règles des compétitions nationales et du système de compétition

- Désigner et former les acteurs, techniciens et opérateurs de compétitions

- Réglementer le transfert de joueurs d’un club à un autre

- Conseiller et superviser l’organisation de toutes les activités sportives national relatives au

Name: Kanu-Verband NRW e.V.
Description: Der Kanu-Verband Nordrhein-Westfalen e.V. (KV NRW und/oder Kanu-NRW) hat seinen Sitz in Duisburg. Er ist Mitglied des Deutschen Kanu-Verbandes e.V. und des Landessportbundes Nordrhein-Westfalen e.V. Der Verband umfasst das Gebiet des Bundeslandes Nordrhein-Westfalen. Das Verbandsgebiet gliedert sich in 9 Bezirke, die 35.000 Mitglieder sind entweder in einem der 360 Vereine des Verbandes aktiv oder als Einzelmitglied zugehörig. Der KV NRW ist damit der größte Verband innerhalb des Deutschen Kanu-Verbandes. Zweck des Verbandes ist, alle Formen des Kanusports unter Beachtung der Belange des Natur- und Umweltschutzes zu fördern und zu pflegen. Gleichermaßen stehen der Freizeit- und der Wettkampfsport im Mittelpunkt. Der Wettkampfsport umfasst im Kanu-Verband NRW die Fachsparten Kanu-Rennsport, Kanu-Slalom, Wildwasser-Rennsport, Kanu-Polo, Drachenbootsport, Kanu-Marathon, Outrigger und Freestyle. Insbesondere sollen die Ziele des Kanusports in alle Kreise der Jugend getragen werden; die ihm angehörenden Jugendlichen werden durch sportliche Betätigung gefördert und sowohl innerhalb als auch außerhalb des Sportbetriebes betreut. Diesem Zweck dienen insbesondere: gemeinsame Veranstaltungen wie Wettkämpfe, Wanderfahrten, Lehrgänge und dergleichen auf dem Gebiet des Kanusports. Die KanuJugend NRW ist hier innerhalb des KV NRW das Organ.

Name: Sports Medal Recycling
Description:
We are a team of athletes that works with race directors, event organizers, and individuals to recycle extra and unwanted road race, endurance event, sport and academic medals.  We use the recycling proceeds to fund our charity/fundraising endurance event minimums, or to donate to other athletes fundraising for 501(c) nonprofit organizations. Help keep recyclable metal, textiles, plastic and cardboard out of landfills and help support some great charities.

If we are not fundraising for ourselves, we donate to fellow athletes fundraising for endurance events online directly or through an "Athlete Fundraising Match Challenge."  Sometimes we challenge a fundraising athlete to raise a certain dollar amount online on their fundraising webpage within a certain time frame. If they do, we match the donations raised dollar for dollar.  We do this to help boost fundraising athletes who need help hitting their minimums.

Since 2016, we have recycled over 40,000 pounds of metal, textile ribbons, plastics, bubble wrap ,and cardboard.  

We are able to recycle all sport and academic event medals made of metal- no ceramic, wood or glass medals please!   Also, please- no trophies or plaques of any kind.

Individuals, event organizers, and race directors can send in medals at any time.  We receive and process medals year round.

To contact us: please use the contact us form on our website.
We are an all-volunteer team, and we will answer you as soon as possible.

Whatever level of investment you choose, our services are tailored to provide the right intelligence to match your ambitions with the right club targets. Too often soccer finds itself matching the wrong owners with the wrong club. Our novel approach enables us to align the objectives of investors to target the most effective clubs. Why not book a consultation to explore your requirements?

Name: Restaurant Cricket League (RCL 2025)
Description:
The world faces a paradox: while 1.3 billion tons of food are wasted annually, 811 million people suffer from hunger, and over 2.4 billion lack regular access to adequate food. In this context, the United Nations Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) 2 aims to eradicate hunger and ensure access to safe, nutritious, and sufficient food by 2030.

The Restaurant Cricket League (RCL 2025) supported by Incredible India, Ministry of Tourism, Government of India is committed to tackling this global issue by reducing food waste and promoting sustainable food practices through its engaging platform of sports. RCL’s mission aligns with the humanitarian goal of ending hunger by empowering communities to make simple but impactful changes to their consumption habits.

The Restaurant Cricket League 2025 stands at the intersection of sports, culture, and social impact, working toward a future where every Indian has access to safe, healthy, and sustainable food. By integrating sports, wellness, and community action, RCL aims to not only entertain but also create positive, measurable societal change.

In this season, RCL celebrates India’s diversity and progress, all while serving the greater cause of food security, health, and sustainability—driving the nation toward its vision of Aatmanirbhar Bharat and a developed India by 2047.

Together, through sport and shared purpose, RCL 2025 will continue to build a legacy of “Serving Change, Delivering Impact, and Uniting Communities.”

Unsere Plattform bietet zudem eine kostenlose Wiener Tischtennisplatz Wikipedia mit Navigationslinks und Kurzvideos zu den Standorten, um die Sichtbarkeit des Tischtennissports in Wien zu erhöhen. Durch Kooperationen und den Wiener Tischtennis Cup vernetzen wir Hobby- und Vereinsspieler Innen und streben danach, eine der größten Tischtennis Familien Wiens zu schaffen. Sei beim nächsten Mal dabei - wir freuen uns auf dich!

Name: ASCAF HAND-Ball
Description: L’Association Sportive du CEG Ambohipo Fanantenana fut créé légalement en 2003 suivant la loi 97 -014.L’occasion a été saisie par la Directrice du C.E.G Ambohipo, par sa passion au sport et par l’engouement des élèves du C.E.G à pratiquer la discipline handball. Cependant, malgré la bonne volonté de la directrice, sans l’aide des enseignants d’E.P. S et particulièrement Mme RAMA Anastasie qui était la première pionnière de l’introduction du handball dans le collège dans les années 1998 et ayant de qualification fédérale en handball, l’ASCAF n’a pas pu fonctionné et développé pour réaliser dans des conditions optimales les objectifs escompter au départ. Ainsi pendant 15 ans les dirigeants, les encadreurs techniques, les parents d’élèves et les joueurs ont fait tous leurs efforts et leurs possibilités pour que le handball soit imprégné dans la vie quotidienne des élèves. Les dirigeants qui se sont succédés ont mis en priorité la discipline par rapport à la performance, de ce fait, les joueurs   qui sont indisciplinés sont passible de passer en conseil de discipline et risque d’être radier du club selon la gravité des fautes commises. Jusqu’à ce jour la force de l’ASCAF se base encore sur les relèves, sur l’éducation des jeunes par les dirigeants et les encadreurs techniques pour les voir évolués en tant que citoyens modèles dans la société par le biais de la pratique de Handball. Des milliers d’enfants ont donc connus la discipline Handball pendant leurs années d’études dans le collège, soit en tant que licencié, soit dans le cours de l’Education Physique et Sportive. L’ASCAF est une grande famille d’anciens et de nouveaux venus pratiquants ou non le sport car beaucoup d’entre eux certes même d’ils ne jouent pas sont des éléments constitutifs du club par leurs aides psychologiques, matérielles et financières.

Description:
The England Police Rugby Union Football Club (EPRUFC) is a non-profit organisation led by a committee who are either serving or retired members of police forces, or volunteers who believe in the ethos and wide ranging benefits of the club. The players are serving police officers and staff currently selected from 20+ forces from across England.
Our Chairman is Chief Constable Mark Roberts of Cheshire Constabulary and our honorary President is World Cup winner Lewis Moody MBE.
CC Roberts overseas the extremely busy committee who work tirelessly to arrange a number of domestic fixtures each year against the other home nation police teams from Scotland, Wales and Ireland in the Four Nations Police Cup. Further games are arranged against military or select sides.
As a touring side, we have successfully completed tours to Hong Kong, Vancouver and in 2024 we will tour to Cape Town, advertising our brand and forging relationships overseas with local police forces and communities.

Its our ambition in the coming years to further improve the opportunities for Police Rugby players and coaches to experience high quality rugby in a welcoming and inclusive environment and to challenge themselves at international level against the best that other countries can offer.

Name: SACHSEN Sail
Description: Central Germany and Saxony in particular are a safe haven for business, science, industry and trade. Whether it's the will to create, infrastructural conditions or dynamic, motivated people - our region offers outstanding qualities for national and international companies from Germany and abroad. As an association, we want to maintain and expand this quality and spread it to the world. We facilitate cross-border encounters and use the special flair of a sea voyage to take new perspectives and impulses home with us. Once a year, a top-class team from business, science, politics, economics, culture, sport and the media embarks on our annual sailing trip - the SACHSEN Sail - to make the Saxon region better known beyond the state borders and to establish new economic contacts. Our association has been promoting the advantages of our Free State since 2000. Launched as a small dinghy, the idea of committed Leipzig entrepreneurs has now become an impressive and imposing four-masted gaff schooner for regional marketing. The SACHSEN Sail is a communicative business platform and at the same time initiates new networks - on board and internationally.

Name: Monaco Vicuñas
Description:
Monaco Vicuñas

Founded in 2020, as IUM Sailing Club was and still is an International University of Monaco academic and sport organisation.

The club has seen a lot of interest and growth especially in its professionalism. Therefore we thought a rebranding of the club was in place. Though we haven’t changed our values we believe that adopting to the environment around us is crucial. 

This reorganisation marks a significant change in the way the club wants to grow and prosper for generations to come.

Throughout our weekly lessons and gatherings in collaboration with the Yacht Club of Monaco, we aim to educate, train and coach our members the discipline of sailing and provide them with the proper preparation for international competitions. The club gives the exclusive opportunity to be part of the Monegasque sailing environment .

Being an IUM Sailing Club member implies being part of a brotherhood of individuals that support each other on and off the boat. Every member is highly motivated, ambitious, and has its own story to tell. Our journey together will write the story of the team and its legacy.

Description:

Mission: West-Mont United Soccer Association creates a positive soccer experience that values sportsmanship and character building:
- by providing programs for all levels of play: Recreational, Travel and Premier,
- by focusing on the development of players of all abilities,
- by delivering our programs at top-quality facilities, and

- Youth Travel Soccer

Name: Blue Marlins
Description:
SwimAcademy
Transferring from swimming lessons to competitive racing in a swim club can be a huge step for children and their families. That is why Racing Club has the Swim Academy. Here, children learn the primary aspects of the different swim strokes, including the starts and turns. The emphasis lies on mastering technique and having fun, not on competing or winning. Please email us, if you want to find out more:  zwemacademie@racingclub.nl

Competitive Racing
If a child has successfully completed his/her technique training in the Swim Academy, there will be the option to move to the Racing Club competition team. Racing Club offers possibilities for swimmers of every level to work with enthusiastic and innovating coaches. Long term as well short term goals will be set together with every swimmer to ensure ongoing personal motivation and growth. Please contact us:  info@racingclub.nl

For more information look on our website www.racingclub.nl

Name: CricketMantras Academy
Description:
CricketMantras (CM) Academy specialises in providing holistic Cricket development programs for young budding cricketers. 

Elite to amatuer level players are made to undergo training suitable and specific to their game. Coaching is offered for all aspects of Cricket which includes skills, strength and conditioning (physical fitness), mental conditioning and character development. 

Profile of Coaches:

Swapnil Pradhan:
- Mumbai Ranji probables 
- Coach of MCA Under 16 Thane Centre
- Batting Specialist

Manish Rao:
- Railways Ranji player
- Fast bowling Specialist 

Vishal Chitrakar:
- Mumbai Ranji S&C Coach
- Sports Science & Performance Coach

The academy is operational at 4 centres, 3 in Mumbai and 1 in Sangli plus caters to abroad clients as well.

CM also manages the Cricket team of Parag English School which participates in major inter-school tournaments and also offers homeschooling to its students to facilitate better cricket practice.

Currently, the CM conducts 3 coaching programs,

* Flagship program : CM Special Batch (Specialised Cricket coaching for a small batch of 8-10 players/ batch with coaching program specifically designed as per individual needs with personalised tracking and game analysis)

* One to One Coaching

* CM Regular Coaching Batch

To make sure quality Cricket coaching reaches under-privileged players, CM raised a donation fund and sponsored 4 players under it. This is an initiative by CM team to give back to the game.

CM Team works with the motto of not only producing better cricketers but also developing their character as a person. This comes from the fact that it firmly believes that a better person with strong character invariably does come good in the game at some point when they mature.

So if you have cricketing aspirations and align with the CM's vision of developing cricketers, do reach out to us and we will be glad to support you and coach you in your journey.

Web: www.cricketmantrasacademy.com
Instagram: @cricketmantras

Name: RH3 Football Academy
Description:
The purpose of our academy is to provide affordable, high value Football Coaching to all kids (at all skill levels) aged from 4 to 17.

As these players progress we will continue to provide a coaching platform for all kids keen on their football and from 10-14 we will also start to identify those we believe can progress to the highest levels and facilitate a pathway that best suits their ability and goals.

At 15 years and on we have a major focus on providing these players with opportunitiies to really showcase their talent and advance their football careers.

The Ricki Herbert Football Academy exists to provide high quality football coaching to all levels of skill and experience. Our courses are catorgorised into the following courses:

1. Grassroots Courses – Target ages 4-7
(These courses enable all children the opportunity to take part in this introduction to football training).

2. Youth Football Courses – Target ages 8-15
(For those Footballers who are serious about developing their Footballing skills)

3. Elite Football Courses – Target ages 7-15
(Selection of players who meet the appropriate levels required in each of the specified age groups)

4. Term Courses – Target ages 8-15
(Term courses are held with support from partner Clubs & Schools around the country)

5. Goal Keeper Courses – Target ages 8-15
(Designed specifically to train and mentor Goal Keepers with the potential to work with our elite teams)

6) Football Development Courses – Target ages 14 – 17
(This course will allow for a technical and tactical perspective of football and assist in players understanding of their next challenges in the Football world)

Name: Lima Cricket and Football Club
Description:
Desde 1859, nos enorgullece ser un punto de encuentro para la comunidad deportiva y social de Lima. Fundado por la vibrante colonia británica, somos el club más antiguo de América y un icono de la historia deportiva mundial.

En nuestra casa, ubicada en el corazón de Magdalena del Mar, celebramos la diversidad de disciplinas deportivas, desde el emocionante fútbol hasta el elegante hockey y el desafiante tenis. Nuestros socios también disfrutan de una amplia gama de deportes, desde el baloncesto hasta los tradicionales deportes ingleses.

Pero más allá de las canchas, en Lima Cricket & Football Club, cultivamos valores que nos definen: respeto, amistad y lealtad. Estos principios guían en cada interacción, creando un ambiente donde todos son bienvenidos y se sienten parte de una familia.

En el Lima Cricket & Football Club, las raíces de nuestra historia se entrelazan con la esencia misma del deporte y la camaradería. Desde nuestros humildes inicios hace más de un siglo y medio, hemos sido testigos y arquitectos de innumerables momentos que han marcado la vida de nuestros socios y la comunidad deportiva de Lima.

Fundado en 1859, somos el club más antiguo de América y un bastión del deporte en Perú. Aquí, cada gol, cada raqueta que golpea la pelota, y cada sonrisa compartida en nuestras instalaciones cuentan una historia única de pasión y excelencia deportiva.

Más que un club, somos una familia donde se teje la tradición con la innovación, el respeto por nuestros valores con la búsqueda constante de la excelencia. Nuestro compromiso con el deporte y el bienestar de nuestros miembros se refleja en cada iniciativa que emprendemos, desde torneos locales e internacionales hasta programas de desarrollo juvenil y eventos sociales que fortalecen los lazos comunitarios.

Únete a nosotros y sé parte de una historia que se escribe con cada partido, cada competencia y cada nuevo logro. En Lima Cricket & Football Club, juntos hacemos historia, juntos creamos legado.

Description:
Domine sua mente e, aprenda a controlar suas emoções e alcance o máximo da sua performance!

Quando você domina a sua mente, você aumenta muito as tuas chances de ser quem está no pódio.

Imagine como seria sua carreira e sua vida se você pudesse:
- Ter melhor performance e resultados;
- Conhecer muito bem o que te motiva, , o que te irrita e o que te faz sentir medo;
- Aprender como ter comportamentos mais eficazes;
- Definir suas metas com clareza e desenvolver planos de ação para alcançá-las;

- Ter técnicas para você aprender a lidar com a pressão e o nervosismo na hora da disputa.

Campeões tem os 4 aspectos chave do Alto Desempenho muito bem desenvolvidos, são eles: 
- Físico
- Técnico
- Tático 
- Mental

Para te levar a Excelência no aspecto Mental foi desenvolvido o Programa Competitivamente.

Se você tiver os outros 3 aspectos desenvolvidos e não estiver forte mentalmente, você não vai conseguir disputar o topo!

para quem é o Programa Competitivamente?
- Para quem busca sempre melhorar, tem foco e determinação
- Quem tem coragem para enfrentar desafios e riscos
- Quem entende que para um sonho se realizar, existe uma escada a ser subida, e cada degrau é formado por conquistas
- Quem acredita em trabalho duro e não em sorte, que trabalha duro todo dia

O desenvolvimento da Mentalidade Competitiva é fundamental para o máximo rendimento no esporte e na vida.

Você terá Metas poderosas traçadas e Objetivos Estabelecidos, Direcionamento e Organização do passo a passo, Plano de Ação, Avaliação e Mensuração de Resultados da sua evolução.

Você quer ser ainda melhor?
Quer alcançar melhores resultados?
Quer fazer isso de uma forma prática e rápida?

Então o Programa Competitivamente é para você!!

Venha conhecer esse Programa muito bem estruturado e embasado nas melhores práticas e teorias do mundo.

Name: SportsAid Eastern
Description:
SportsAid gives talented young sports people financial help at the start of their careers, when all their potential lies ahead of them. Our work gives sponsors a clear line of sight to the outcomes and results that their support enables.

About SportsAid Eastern.
SportsAid Eastern was established in 1999 along with 8 other regional charities across England along with the home nations. We currently generate our income through sporting lunches bringing together local and national businesses keen to help young people achieve the best they can in their chosen sport. Typically we assist young people who are already on the talent pathway achieving national rankings, but do not yet qualify for National Lottery assistance and rely heavily on the bank of Mum and Dad.

We also provide opportunities to shine the spotlight on local businesses, to network amongst like-minded people, listen to guest speakers, meet the young athletes we’ve helped and to provide a clear line of sight between sponsors and the outcomes their donations enable.

Together, we support and develop the next generation of Olympic and Paralympic talent. The success of an athlete benefits not only the sport itself, but the community in which they live and the whole sporting-engaged society across the UK.

Name: Talent Horizon Track
Description:
Talent Horizon Track is a not-for-profit para-athletics coaching organisation dedicated to growing participation and creating inclusive pathways in athletics for people with disabilities across Western Australia.

Our mission is to ensure every Western Australian with a disability has access to quality athletics coaching—from first steps on the track through to elite competition. Athletics offers opportunities for health, confidence, social connection, and personal achievement that should be available to everyone, regardless of ability.

What We Do

We provide specialist para-athletics coaching including:

-Individual & group coaching tailored to each athlete's goals and abilities
-Competition preparation for local, state, and national events
-Entry-level programs for those new to athletics
-Performance enhancement for athletes pursuing competitive pathways

We serve children, youth, and adults with physical, intellectual, vision, or hearing disabilities—from recreational participants to aspiring Paralympians.

Our Approach

Athlete-centered programs built around individual goals, abilities, and circumstances. Evidence-based coaching drawing on current sports science and Paralympics Australia frameworks. Inclusive by design through accessible venues, adaptive equipment, and flexible coaching methods. Collaborative partnerships with families, allied health professionals, and disability service providers.

Accessing Our Services

NDIS Participants: Self-managed and plan-managed participants can access our coaching using Capacity Building or Community Participation budgets.

Private Participants: Fee-for-service options available for athletes not using NDIS funding.

Get Involved

Athletes & Families: Contact us to discuss your athletic goals and explore how we can support your journey.

Partners & Funders: We welcome partnerships with organisations who share our commitment to inclusive sport.

 chris@talenthorizon.com.au | 0411 369 406 |  WA Athletics Stadium

Name: PVV - Pays Voironnais Volley
Description:
Issu de la fusion entre le VVB et le MMVB, le Pays Voironnais Volley, s’appuie sur des valeurs fortes : respect, diversité, performance.
Porté par ces valeurs, le PVV se développe autour du programme S’ENVOLLEY ENSEMBLE !
Il a été construit autour de 3 grands axes :
 Le Volley pour tous 
 Le Haut-Niveau et la recherche de performance,
 La Citoyenneté et la responsabilité sociétale pour être un acteur du développement du territoire du Pays Voironnais.

Le PVV c’est :
 7 équipes masculines séniors : National 3, Régional, Pré-Régional et 4 FSGT 
 4 équipes féminines séniors : Pré-National, Régional, Pré-Régional, Départemental
 1 équipe de volley assis : le PVV est champion de France (2022-2023) !
 De nombreuses équipes féminines et masculines jeunes allant de M11 à M21.

Mais aussi, une section loisir, une équipe de fit volley, une école de volley mixte pour les enfants de 7 à 11 ans et une section baby volley pour les 4-6 ans.

Le club se déploie sur 5 équipements sportifs : le gymnase de la Grande Sûre à Saint-Jean-de-Moirans, le gymnase de l’Arcade à Voreppe, le gymnase P. Béghin à Moirans, le gymnase du collège à Chirens, la salle des Cèdres à Charavines.
En fait, le PVV accueille des joueurs bien au-delà de ces communes, puisque nous retrouvons des joueurs venus de tout le Pays Voironnais ! Depuis septembre 2021, le club a ouvert une section "Charavines - Lac Bleu" pour le plus grand plaisir des pratiquants !

Le club s'appuie sur des entraîneurs diplômés et pour la plupart bénévoles. La qualité de la formation a été reconnue par la Fédération Française de Volley avec l’obtention du label or « club formateur », du label argent pour le volley santé et le volley assis.

Mais si le PVV se développe, c’est aussi grâce à ses partenaires ! Pour les découvrir, rendez-vous sur notre site !

Pour connaître toutes les actus du club :
 Instagram & Facebook : @paysvoironnaisvolley
 paysvoironnaisvolley@gmail.com

Name: BLR92escrime
Description:
L’escrime pour tous, à tous les niveaux !

Depuis sa création, le club fournit un entraînement de haut niveau au fleuret.Avec le soutien de la ville et du Département, le club d’escrime de Bourg-la-Reine a pu gravir les échelons un à un pour figurer parmi les meilleurs clubs de fleuret de France. En 2017, en devenant BLR 92, le club de fleuret des Hauts-de-Seine est entré dans une nouvelle ère.

Depuis plusieurs saisons, nous avons également développé avec succès une section épée. L'accueil des enfants se fait à partir de 5 ans.
En parallèle, nous réalisons des animations en milieu scolaire dans le cadre de l’aménagement des rythmes de l’enfant.
Pour les plus confirmés, nous participons à la formation de cadres :
– Arbitres,
– Aide Moniteurs,
– Moniteurs et Brevets d’Etat,
Enfin, pour découvrir l’escrime ou pousser son entraînement encore plus loin, nous organisons des stages pendant les vacances scolaires.

--------------------------------

Challenge International des Hauts de Seine : 

Depuis 1986, le club organise chaque année le Challenge international de Bourg-la-Reine. En 2017, il est devenu le Challenge international des Hauts-de-Seine – Circuit Elite.

L’édition 2023 du Challenge international des Hauts-de-Seine – Circuit Elite Bourg-la-Reine, qui a eu lieu les 28 et 29 janvier 2023 au gymnase des Bas Coquarts a réuni les meilleurs fleurettistes français, hommes et femmes, et de grands noms de l’escrime mondiale : la championne du monde 2022 médaillés au Caire cet été Ysaora Thibus, ainsi que Cheung Ka Long (Hong-Kong) champion olympique à Tokyo et Leonie Ebert (Allemagne) championne d’Europe 2022.

Name: Linton Hotspur Football Club
Description:
Linton Hotspur FC as far as records available state dates back to the 1920's, making it one of the Border's oldest clubs.

The Hotspur, as they were locally known played in several locations throughout the village, namely the school playing field, Broomlee Camp and the Pantiles which is now Lyne Park. Facilities, or lack of money were a constant burden on the club over the years and at the time of dispersion the club had raised a not inconsiderable amount of £9000 for a new pavilion.

Unfortunately the hard work of the committee throughout the century was never realized and club disbanded in 1971, after a heavy 12-2 defeat to Ferranti FC. The latter went onto to become Meadowbank Thistle who in turn be came Livingston. There after they could not raise a team. The funds amassed were contributed to other community projects.

A number of locals still residing in the village feature prominently in the Hotspur's history books, namely the Bell family, Neil Inglis and his late father Jimmy who was the Honorary President, Charlie Smith, Charlie and Kenny Gray to name a few.

On the 8th October 2008 a meeting was called in The Gordon Arms Hotel to gauge the interest locally in resurrecting Linton Hotspur FC. From that date onwards the committee, spurred on by the traditions and history associated with the village alike, have not looked back. 

Currently we operate both our youth and senior sections, with approximately 140 members in total ranging from  age 4 through to the senior squad. We have teams playing competitively at 4, 7 and 11 aside within the Academy section and our senior team competes in the East of Scotland Football League.

Name: Klub Koszykarski Astoria Bydgoszcz
Description:
Klub Koszykarski Astoria Bydgoszcz (obecnie Enea Abramczyk Astoria Bydgoszcz) to instytucja sportowa z bogatą, blisko stuletnią tradycją, będąca integralną częścią historii Bydgoszczy. 

Założony w 1924 roku, z sekcją koszykówki działającą od 1929 roku, Astoria łączy głębokie korzenie z nowoczesnym zarządzaniem sportowym.

Nasza Misja:

 Rozwój sportowy: Konsekwentnie dążymy do powrotu i ugruntowania naszej pozycji w Polskiej Lidze Koszykówki (Ekstraklasa). Obecnie rywalizujemy w I lidze, budując silną kadrę i wykorzystując atuty nowoczesnej infrastruktury, jaką jest Hala Grupa Moderator Arena.

 Kształtowanie przyszłości: Odnosimy sukcesy w szkoleniu młodzieży, co potwierdzają liczne medale Mistrzostw Polski Juniorów. Wierzymy, że inwestycja w młode talenty to klucz do trwałego sukcesu.

 Wartości i Społeczność: Jesteśmy dumni z reprezentowania Bydgoszczy i regionu, promując profesjonalizm, pasję i sportowego ducha.

Jesteśmy dynamicznie rozwijającą się organizacją, która dba o markę, wizerunek i zaangażowanie partnerów biznesowych. Poszukujemy profesjonalistów i entuzjastów, którzy chcieliby współtworzyć kolejny rozdział historii klubu.

Name: GP Venray Wielerspektakel
Description:
GP Venray – Het Grootste Wielerspektakel op Raceway Circuit Venray

Op zaterdag 5 juli 2025 is het zover: de eerste editie van de GP Venray. Een uniek wielerevenement op het iconische Raceway Circuit Venray, waar topsport, familieplezier en regionale trots samenkomen. Elk jaar op de eerste dag van de Tour de France, wordt Venray hét toneel van wielerbeleving voor iedereen.

 Wie wint de allereerste Grote Prijs van Venray per categorie?

Een dag vol actie en beleving:
Jeugdwedstrijden voor categorieën 1 t/m 7
Dikke Bandenraces voor kinderen van 2 t/m 12 jaar
Prominentenrace met bekende gezichten
Chasse Patate Tourtocht 
Bedrijven & Funklasse tijdrit
Prijsuitreikingen en feestelijke ere-rondes in cabrio’s
Afsluiting in wielercafé-stijl

 Voor het hele gezin:
Tour de France live op groot scherm
Clinics door Visma | Lease a Bike voor jeugd, volwassenen en bedrijven
Speelplezier & activiteiten voor kinderen
Meet & Greet met regionale wielerhelden

 Ambassadeurs van de GP Venray:
Tijmen Graat (Visma | Lease a Bike)
Wout Poels & Mike Teunissen (XDS–Astana)
Peter Winnen, oud-prof en schrijver

 Waarom je erbij moet zijn?
De GP Venray is méér dan een wielerwedstrijd. Het is een inspirerende dag vol sport, sfeer en verbinding. Of je nu jong talent bent, fan van de koers of gewoon zin hebt in een gezellige familiedag — GP Venray laat je fietsen beleven zoals nooit tevoren.

 Zet ‘m in je agenda: 5 juli 2025 – GP Venray

#GPVenray #wielrennen #familiedag #racewayvenray #tourstart #sportevenement

Name: Texas FC
Description:
Texas Football Club (TFC) was founded by Hani Al Rifai, a lifelong soccer enthusiast, community builder, and experienced program leader. Growing up in Iraq, Hani had few opportunities to chase his passion for football — an experience that ignited a lifelong mission to create chances for others where none existed. After moving to Texas and establishing himself as a leader in the tech and automotive industries, Hani decided to give back to the community that welcomed him by launching Texas FC from Leander.

Texas FC isn’t just another soccer club — it’s a bold, community-first movement designed to empower local talent and build a real, merit-based pathway to professional soccer. With a strong focus on inclusivity, accessibility, and excellence, TFC brings together passionate players from all backgrounds, providing them with a platform to grow, compete, and ultimately reach higher levels, including USL League One, USL Championship, and beyond.

Through competitive local leagues and tournaments with prize money, TFC fosters a spirit of ambition and community pride while removing barriers to entry. The club’s "path to pro" vision supports top-performing teams and individuals with sponsorship opportunities and structured development, creating an authentic route to the professional stage that has never before existed at this scale in Central Texas.

Hani’s leadership is rooted in the belief that soccer can be a powerful force for change — uniting people, uplifting communities, and inspiring the next generation of dreamers. By focusing on high-level development, strong local engagement, and the love of the game, Texas FC aims to challenge the status quo, stand toe-to-toe with established clubs like Austin FC, and put Leander and surrounding communities firmly on the soccer map.

For the love of the game. For the community. For the dreamers.

Name: The Mental Game Academy
Description:
"At The Mental Game Academy, we transform athletes, coaches, and educators, one mindset at a time, to enhance their performance to its fullest potential.

Our comprehensive Mental Skills Programs are meticulously crafted to impart essential cognitive behavioral strategies, foster healthy phone habits, enhance emotional intelligence, navigate social media responsibly, develop effective coping mechanisms, and cultivate introspective leadership.

We specialize in coaching coaches, enabling them to connect with the modern digital athlete, equipped with tools to combat distractions and maintain resilience. Through our 12-STEP programs, coaches not only prevent burnout but also cultivate happier and more coachable athletes.

Our expertise extends to athletes of all levels and across diverse sports, empowering them with vital mental skills, phone routines, goal setting, confidence building, social skills, stress management, and social media management. We offer both in-person and virtual training via Zoom.

Moreover, we collaborate with schools on a broader scale, working towards transforming students and athletes individually. Our initiatives aim to reduce undesirable behaviors, redefine the values systems of educational institutions, and instill a fresh approach to behavior management, all while engaging with parents.

At The Mental Game Academy, we are committed to revolutionizing the world of sports and education through a holistic and professional approach."

Name: Espoirs Laval
Description:
Founded in 1968, Espoirs Laval is recognized as one of Canada's leading road and track cycling clubs. From discovery to high-level sport, the organization is a benchmark for cycling across the province, and has been active in the Laval region for over 50 years. 


Accredited by the Fédération québécoise des sports cyclistes (FQSC), the club brings together riders from all categories, from under-eight years old to masters. The club also has a paracycling section. Over the years, the club has racked up over 100 national titles, and has welcomed riders who have gone on to a career in the professional peloton. We place great importance on the development of young athletes, providing training by qualified coaches and supporting our elite athletes as never before.  The club is a gateway to top-level sport for aspiring athletes. 


With a view to extending its reach and multiplying its impact on the community tenfold, a major transformation of the organization was initiated in 2020. Programs multiplied, enabling thousands of young people to enjoy a positive sporting experience via our activities. The Vélosco project, aimed at discovery and initiation to cycling sports, has grown exponentially in popularity. Including a day camp, a school program and an after-school program, Vélosco is a must in cycling education. 


Espoirs Laval is proud to contribute to making cycling sports accessible to as many people as possible, while adopting a participant-centred approach. We are convinced that anyone wishing to integrate cycling into their daily life will find a program to suit their objectives and reality.
