Name: Yoshi Football Academy
Description:
Yoshi Football Academy (YFA) is a football academy focused on the development, growth, and general well-being of young players. Our academy provides high-quality coaching, training, and mentoring to young footballers to help them achieve their full potential. Our goal is to help our players become not only successful footballers but also well-rounded individuals who can make a positive impact on their communities.

At Yoshi Football Academy, we understand the importance of holistic player development. Through our comprehensive training programs, we provide young players with the tools and knowledge to excel in football. Our experienced coaches focus on technical skills, tactical understanding, physical fitness, and mental fortitude. We aim to produce well-rounded and competitive football players by instilling discipline, teamwork, and sportsmanship.

Name: Market Harborough Rugby Union Football Club
Description:
A rugby club committed to providing playing and coaching space for health, mental welfare, community support, friendship and collaboration. Established in 1923, originally called Kibworth Rugby Club, we have over 800 members and volunteers. 

We are strictly amateur with our mini and junior boys and ranging from under u6 to u18, plus seniors for men and women. On a Saturday you will regularly find 100+ people watching the 1st, 2nd, 3rd or Colts teams play. On a Sunday typically 300+ children and parents will be around the club and when the girls section and the Senior Women play in the afternoon. On a Tuesday there's 20 players enjoying a fast and energetic game of touch Rugby.

We operate as a not for profit CASC with a studio room, bar, main room and Kibworth lounge, plus 7 full sized pitches and match grade lighting for 5 of those. With 6 changing rooms, a club shop, large car park and secure grounds we can accommodate all nature of events, be it sport or commercial, community or events. We also provide a base for Harborough Athletics Club, a rounders team and a social place for the netball team.

Our sponsors are great partners of ours, providing time and resources as well as supporting the club with their attendance and their donations. We work hard to foster strong relationships and enjoy many social lunches during and at the end of the season, with sponsors joining us.

A club of our size also enjoys the benefit of a healthy allocation of international tickets, so you will usually find plenty of members travelling down to Twickenham for England matches. The clubhouse hosts 5 TV screens and a sound system meaning watching rugby on TV is also a well-attended pass time as fans enjoy our own Harborough Hundred IPA, brewed by Langton Brewery to our recipe, we even have our own Centenary Gin.

On the pitch we are proud and pleased for the players who have made international honours for England, Scotland, Wales & Switzerland or obtained professional club contracts.

We also organize/facilitate training and national multi-sports games. BOA was established in 1977 and received initial recognition by IOC in 1979/’80, BOA promotes and develops the Olympic Movement in Bangladesh while maintaining autonomy aligned with the IOC Charter.

Name: Protern
Description:
Protern's GPS technology for alpine ski racing gives athletes and coaches insights into performance that was never before achievable. Compared to traditional timing with 2 to 3 data points per run, Protern provides around 5,000.

From World Cup teams to resort clubs, any level of alpine ski athlete and coach can benefit from seeing where exactly time and speed was lost or gained on the run. So far Protern's customers have won over 125 World Cup medals.
 
In addition to time and speed, coaches and athletes can merge their Protern data to video making video analysis even more powerful.

Protern is based in Canada and is used worldwide in over 15 countries. Customers include U12 athletes to Olympic gold medalists. It can be used be an entire team, or a single athlete looking to get ahead of their competition.

Name: The Rangers Youth Development Company
Description:
In July 2015, the Rangers Development Fund (RDF) was rebranded as The Rangers Youth Development Company (RYDC) and we have gone from strength to strength ever since.

The Rangers Development Fund (RDF) was originally established in 1964 with the sole purpose of providing funds for the Club and more than £125 million has been generated since its inception.

In the past, RDF provided substantial funds, which assisted, among other things, in the reconstruction of the Copland, Broomloan and Govan Stands, the Ibrox PA system and the purchase of the land our training ground is built on.

However, since 2002 all profit from our portfolio of products has been directed to the Club’s youth programme and almost £12 million has already been provided to the Academy while fans have shared in huge weekly prize money.

Profit generated from Rangers Lotto, The Union Jackpot half-time draw, Stadium Bricks, Scratchcards and out online shop all help to support our Academy and that significant financial support has assisted in the development of a number of youth players who have progressed to our first-team.

Nathan Patterson, Charlie Adam, Alan Hutton, Allan McGregor, Steven Smith, Billy Gilmour, Danny Wilson, Chris Burke, Robby and Ross McCrorie, Leon King, Alex Lowry, Adam Devine, Robbie Fraser, Liam Kelly and Ross McCausland are among the academy graduates to benefit directly from RYDC funding, and we will continue to support the Academy wherever possible.

We also introduced a Museum Lotto with the sole purpose of raising funds for the creation and upkeep of the Rangers Museum.

Visit our website for more information on RYDC and our portfolio of products.

Name: Sportjeal BV
Description:
Sportjeal BV: Samen bewegen verslavend maken

Bij Sportjeal BV benutten we beweging als krachtig middel om mensen in actie te brengen, communities te verbinden en plezier te vergroten. Wij richten ons op het ondersteunen van trainers, buurtsportcoaches, sportverenigingen en BSO's met inspirerende workshops en innovatieve tools om deelnemers van alle leeftijden en niveaus te inspireren.

Onze tools, zoals de Gamificator en Sportjeal Play, maken van elke training, activiteit of les een unieke ervaring. Van het enthousiasmeren van kinderen in een BSO-setting tot het begeleiden van teamsporten: wij bieden praktische en effectieve oplossingen waarmee iedereen in beweging komt.

 Wat maakt ons uniek?

Toegankelijkheid: Onze workshops en tools sluiten aan bij verschillende niveaus en settings, van buurtsport tot georganiseerde clubtrainingen.
Plezier en groei: Door gamification en innovatieve leerlijnen te integreren, creëren we activiteiten die deelnemers uitdagen én laten genieten.
Samenwerking: We werken samen met trainers, coaches en organisaties om beweging laagdrempelig en impactvol te maken.
Of je nu sport wil inzetten om de jeugd te inspireren, nieuwe trainingsvormen zoekt voor je sportvereniging, of activiteiten wilt ontwerpen die echt raken — Sportjeal BV staat voor je klaar. Samen bouwen we aan een actieve en verbonden toekomst.

 Bezoek ons op www.sportjeal.com en ontdek hoe wij jouw beweegambities waarmaken.

 Laten we verbinden! Volg ons voor praktische tips, inspirerende verhalen en de nieuwste ontwikkelingen in het beweegveld.

Name: Golfclub Landgoed De Compagnie
Description:
Golfclub De Compagnie staat bekend als een van de mooiste golfbanen van Noord-Nederland.

Golfclub De Compagnie is zeer ruim opgezet op 90 hectare en heeft 18 uitdagende holes en een volwaardige, mooi aangelegde 9-holes Par-3 baan.
Dit is met recht een uitdagende baan.
Niet in de laatste plaats door de vele waterpartijen.
De weidse uitzichten, de rust van het Groninger land en een baan die het beste in u naar boven haalt.

Verder beschikken we over een unieke driving range en uitstekende chip- put- en oefenarea’s.
De baan is ontworpen door Gerard Jol.

Hoewel De Compagnie een echte ledenclub is, bent u er als gast altijd welkom!
Als lid van De Compagnie speelt u altijd op een prachtig onderhouden golfbaan, maar er is meer! 
Gezellige wedstrijden, een top-pro en een bruisend clubhuis. 
Bovendien heeft u onbeperkt speelrecht in Zwolle, Havelte én Leeuwarden!

Name: British Women Racing Drivers’ Club
Description: The British Women Racing Drivers’ Club was formed in 1962 by Mary Wheeler MBE, with the aim of promoting and supporting women in all forms of motorsport. Name: Strikers FC
Description:
STRIKERS FC - Irvine (formerly the IRVINE STRIKERS) has received national recognition for being one of the top clubs in the country for producing collegiate, professional and national team players. Our unique training philosophy has a proven track record in producing elite players. In 2010, the U.S. Men’s National Team took the 23 best players in the country to represent the United State in the World Cup in South Africa. Of those 23 players, two of them, Jonathan Bornstein and Benny Feilhaber grew up playing in Irvine with the Strikers.

Don Ebert, Technical Director of Strikers FC is also the Director of Coaching for the Irvine club. As one of the more highly regarded DOC's in the Nation, Ebert has surrounded himself with one of the region's brightest and most ambitious coaching staffs. 

In 2007 the United States Soccer Federation, offered Strikers FC membership as one of the inaugural 40 members to participate in the U.S. Soccer Development Academy. As a member of the Development Academy, our players are evaluated over ten times a year by National Team coaches at practices and games, as well as offering exposure to hundreds of college coaches at national showcases. Starting at the U14 age group, the Development Academy is a platform for the best male players in the country to compete in an environment designed to produce the next generation of National Team players.

In 2008, Strikers FC was invited by US Club Soccer to become a member of the Elite Clubs National League (ECNL). ECNL is the nations premier league for girls U14 to U18 and gives the club’s female players the opportunity to compete at the highest level. Much like the Development Academy, ECNL offers unmatched exposure to U.S. National Team scouts and college coaches at national showcase events.

Name: Hedge End Rangers Football Club
Description:
We are an FA Charter Standard Community football club based in Hedge End in the borough of Eastleigh. Founded in 1974 to give children in Hedge End and the wider community a chance to play and develop in a safe sporting environment through football.

We take pride in seeing our players, coaches and parents grow through the club.
As a club our aim is to support every player, coach and volunteer to be the best they can be and to develop on and off the pitch.

Name: Wirtschaftsrat 1. FC Union e. V.
Description: Der Wirtschaftsrat 1. FC Union e. V. versteht sich als das Wirtschaftsnetzwerk für den 1. FC Union Berlin. FC Union Berlin und der Intensivierung der Beziehungen seiner Mitglieder untereinander. Gleichwohl bewahrt er als eigenständiger Verein seine Unabhängigkeit und ist kein Gremium des Vereins.

Name: DTU Roadrunners
Description:
DTU Roadrunners is a student-driven engineering team from the Technical University of Denmark (DTU) designing and building ultra energy-efficient vehicles.

We compete in the Shell Eco-marathon, a global engineering competition where the goal is to drive as far as possible on the equivalent of one litre of fuel.

We are European champions and consistently perform among the best teams. With a total of 15 first place in the Internal combustion category. In 2024, we received the Data & Telemetry Award supported by Schmid Elektronik for our innovative real-time telemetry system and dashboard.

Our team combines mechanical, electrical, and software engineering to build record-breaking vehicles. From carbon fibre chassis design and lightweight suspension to engine tuning and live telemetry systems, every detail is optimized for efficiency. 

We work to push the limits of sustainable vehicles and automotive innovation!

Follow us to learn more about our work and race results.

Name: Cambrian United FC
Description:
Cambrian United FC
Established in 1965, Cambrian United FC is proud to return to its roots, embracing a rich and storied history. Having once united with a local side to form Cambrian & Clydach Vale BGC, we are thrilled to reclaim our original identity as Cambrian United FC. Now operating as a limited company, we’re guided by a newly appointed board of directors whose values are deeply aligned with the club’s vision and community-centric goals.

Our Men’s First Team competes in the JD Cymru South, and we are widely recognised as a focal point for football in the Valleys. We boast a nationally affiliated academy, accredited by the Football Association of Wales (FAW), and are committed to sustaining and advancing our competitive and developmental success.

Cambrian United is more than just a football club, we are a community. Our Women’s Team continues to make great strides each season, while our Disability Football Team thrives as a key part of our inclusive ethos. Most recently, we welcomed the Hotsteppers, a Women’s Walking Football team, further enriching our inclusive and diverse sporting environment. Through our close relationship with Cambrian Village Trust, our community outreach continues to grow, making us a blueprint for the future of Welsh football.

Our infrastructure has recently been upgraded to match our ambition. New changing rooms, a state-of-the-art gym, and the installation of a new 3G pitch this season, and within the last few weeks, new terracing area, are just a few of the developments we've undertaken. We are also in discussions with the FAW to designate areas within our facility for social enterprise initiatives, reinforcing our role as a hub for community engagement and development.

Cambrian United FC is a progressive, forward-thinking club, driven by high aspirations and a clear purpose. As we continue to grow, we remain committed to providing opportunities for all, both on and off the pitch.

Name: Pat Heuzenroeder
Description:
Pat (@patheuzenroeder) is a 19-year-old Australian racing driver and 2025 Vice Champion in the GB3 Championship, the UK's leading single seater category, a recognised pathway to F1.  

Always a gifted athlete, Patrick commenced competitive karting at the age of 13 and moved into racing cars at 15.  After moving to the UK at just age 16, after his talent was recognised in the 2022 Ferrari Driver Academy Asia Pacific trials, selected in the final against 23 of the most talented young drivers in Asia/Oceania, he competed in the British F4 championship in 2023 and GB3 in 2024.  He took the next step in his career at the start of 2025 by competing in the FIA Formula Regional Oceania Championship, widely acknowledged as a European ‘winter’ proving ground for many drivers who have gone onto F1. He achieved 4th in the Championship, with an impressive 9 top 5 finishes and 4 podiums, including a win at the NZ Grand Prix weekend, in what has been stated to be one of the most competitive fields since Formula 1 drivers, Liam Lawson, Franco Colapinto and Yuki Tsunoda competed in 2020.

In the 2025 main season he was crowned Vice Champion in GB3, the UK's highest single seater category, an incredible result competing in a team new to the Championship against highly established rivals. 

Pat has the support of legendary names in motorsport, including mentor, ex F1 driver and winner of the LeMans 24 Hours, David Brabham

Patrick has a relaxed and outgoing personality, combined with a focus and dedication uncommon for someone of his age.  He has surrounded himself with a professional and committed team of energetic and positive people who provide driver coaching, physical training, cognitive development and sports psychology support. Testing with an Olympic athlete level VO2 Max, Patrick understands physical and mental capacity work hand in hand with racing talent. 

"Follow" to see insights into what it takes to perform as an individual and team at the highest levels of motorsport.

Name: Segel-Bundesliga
Description:
Seit 2013 hat auch der deutsche Leistungssegelsport einen prestigeträchtigen Vereinswettbewerb: Die Deutsche Segel-Bundesliga. Das Konzept der Bundesligen anderer Sportarten wurde erstmalig in den Segelsport übertragen. Im ersten Jahr kämpften 18 Segelvereine um die Meisterschale und ermittelten den besten deutschen Segelclub. Seit 2014 vergibt der Deutsche Segler-Verband den Titel “Deutscher Meister der Segelvereine”.

Bisher gab es im deutschen Hochleistungssegelsport keinen bundesweiten Clubwettbewerb mit hohem sportlichen Stellenwert. Das änderte sich ab Juni 2013 mit der Einführung der „Deutschen Segel-Bundesliga“.

Die Idee ist simpel: Die besten Segelclubs Deutschlands treten über eine Saison hinweg bei mehreren Regatten in ganz Deutschland gegeneinander an. Jeder der teilnehmenden Vereine stellt dafür eine Mannschaft aus seinen besten Seglerinnen und Seglern zusammen. Gesegelt wird um den Status des besten Segelclubs in Deutschland.

„Die Clubs sollen in der Bundesliga erstmals aktiv als Wettkämpfer in Erscheinung treten. Die Bundesliga soll die höchste nationale Leistungsstufe im Segelsport auf Vereinsebene sein“, erklärt Geschäftsführer Oliver Schwall.

Anfang April 2013 gründeten in Hamburg 17 Segelvereine die „Deutsche Segel-Bundesliga“. Mit der Organisation und Vermarktung der Bundesliga wurde die Sportvermarktungsagentur Konzeptwerft Holding GmbH beauftragt. Seit 2014 übernimmt die Deutsche Segel-Bundesliga GmbH die Aufgaben der Konzeptwerft Holding GmbH.

Gesegelt wird mit vier bis fünf Personen auf One-Design-Kielbooten. Der Kader eines Bundesligavereins umfasst bis zu 20 Seglerinnen und Segler. Jede Regatta zählt gleichwertig für die Tabelle. Der Club mit den wenigsten Punkten nach der letzten Regatta hat die Bundesliga gewonnen. Nach dem erfolgreichen Premierenjahr 2013 wurde 2014 zusätzlich zu der 1. Segel-Bundesliga auch eine 2. Segel-Bundesliga eingeführt. In beiden Ligen treten jeweils 18 Vereine an.

Name: Alliance de l'inclusion par le sport
Description:
Madame Sarah OURAHMOUNE, Vice-championne olympique et Fondatrice de Boxer Inside, Monsieur Stéphane VIRY, Député et Co-président de l'ANPSS, ainsi que Monsieur Jean-Philippe ACENSI, Président de l'Agence pour l'Éducation par le Sport, ont été nommés ambassadeurs de l'inclusion au sein de l'Alliance pour l'Inclusion par le Sport le 8 avril 2024.

L'Alliance pour l'Inclusion par le Sport a été lancée le lundi 8 avril 2024 par Madame Catherine Vautrin, Ministre du Travail, de la Santé et des Solidarités, Madame Amélie Oudéa-Castéra, Ministre des Sports et des Jeux Olympiques et Paralympiques, ainsi que Madame Sabrina Agresti-Roubache, Secrétaire d’État chargée de la Citoyenneté et de la Ville. Ce projet ambitieux découle des réflexions initiées lors du séminaire organisé par Madame Oudéa-Castéra en juillet dernier à l’INSEP, et vise à faire du sport un levier toujours plus efficace d'insertion et d'inclusion sociale.

L'événement de lancement, qui s'est tenu dans les locaux de la salle de boxe "Boxer Inside" dans le 13ème arrondissement de Paris, a réuni une centaine de participants, dont des présidents de fédérations, des dirigeants de clubs sportifs engagés, des parlementaires, des maires, ainsi que des dirigeants d'entreprises privées et d'opérateurs publics. Il a permis de faire le point sur les mesures prioritaires à mettre en place pour favoriser l'inclusion par le sport. Dans le cadre de cette initiative, ils ont été officiellement désignés comme les trois ambassadeurs de l'Alliance pour l'inclusion par le sport. Experts reconnus des sujets d'inclusion et de performance sociale par le sport, ils seront les porte-parole de l'Alliance et contribueront, aux côtés des autres acteurs, à promouvoir des propositions concrètes pour renforcer la coopération entre tous les intervenants et garantir l'efficacité des actions d'insertion par le sport sur le terrain. Cette nomination souligne l'importance de l'engagement de chacun dans la promotion de l'inclusion par le sport.

Name: AL-VOWZ AS

Whatsapp +222 27 77 73 46. 

Dans l'ombre des stades majestueux et sous le ciel bleu azur, un nom brille tel une étoile, illuminant les cœurs des passionnés du ballon rond : "AL-VOWZ AS". Bien plus qu'un simple club de football, c'est une véritable légende en devenir.

Nous sommes la quintessence de la passion, l'incarnation de la détermination, et l'âme du jeu. Notre histoire est tissée de moments épiques, de victoires exaltantes, et de liens indéfectibles entre nos joueurs, nos supporters, et notre communauté. "AL-VOWZ AS" n'est pas seulement un nom sur un maillot, c'est une promesse de persévérance et de fierté.

Dans chaque coup de sifflet, dans chaque passe précise, et dans chaque but marqué, nous écrivons un nouveau chapitre dans notre histoire glorieuse. Chacun de nos joueurs incarne l'esprit du guerrier sur le terrain, portant notre emblème avec une fierté inébranlable.

Mais "AL-VOWZ AS" est bien plus qu'un club, c'est une famille. Nos supporters sont le cœur battant de notre passion, leur ferveur illuminant les tribunes à chaque match. Nous sommes unis par l'amour du jeu, par notre engagement envers l'excellence, et par notre désir inextinguible de repousser les limites.

Que ce soit sur la pelouse verdoyante ou en dehors, nous sommes déterminés à inspirer la jeunesse, à promouvoir les valeurs du fair-play, et à être un phare d'espoir pour notre communauté. Ensemble, nous grandissons, nous apprenons, et nous construisons un avenir meilleur.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure extraordinaire, où chaque coup de pied, chaque dribble, et chaque sourire partagé forment la toile de notre histoire. "AL-VOWZ AS" est bien plus qu'un club de football. C'est une source d'inspiration, une force unificatrice, et une passion qui transcende les générations.

Rejoignez notre famille, embrassez notre histoire, et devenez une partie de la légende. "AL-VOWZ AS" vous attend, prêt à écrire de nouveaux chapitres de gloire, à réaliser des rêves et à célébrer chaque victoire.

Fußball kennt keine Grenzen!

Name: MarathonWoman366
Description:
Introducing Marathon Woman 366 

Hilde Dosogne, 53 Years old, from Lochristi, Belgium, is embarking on a challenge to run a marathon every day for 366 consecutive days in 2024, aiming to set a new world record.  

The #MarathonWoman project is about more than breaking a world record. It's about inspiring everyone to move and supporting BIG against breast cancer.

*Encouraging Active Living*
The main aim is to promote healthy habits. You don't need to run a marathon daily; incorporating regular physical activity into your routine is what matters.  That's why with #MarathonWoman we invite all kinds of people to join Hilde during the record attempt. Inclusivity is key – experience, age, background, none of it matters. Whether you're a beginner or a pro, you're welcome! 

Supporting Good Causes
But there's an even bigger reason behind this project: supporting a good cause. By involving people, organizations, and companies, we're raising funds for non-profit organizations such as BIG. They're a global network of breast cancer research groups. BIG uses these funds for academic studies, aiming to improve treatments and patients' lives, and ultimately find a cure. Since some essential research isn't financed by the pharmaceutical industry, funds are critical. 

For more information about the Project: www.marathonwoman.be

#MarathonWoman366 #BelieveYouCan #BIGagainstBC #Moveforbig #ultrarunning

Name: From Now On - Sport For Impact
Description:

All sports must provide the safe, inclusive and quality experiences Australians deserve to expect. We help with that. But beyond that, we ensure sport also deserves every ounce of our nation’s abundant pride. 

Sport can be a powerful vehicle for social cohesion, physical and mental health, education engagement, community inclusion, reduction of inequalities and more. By designing with new and diverse audiences and social impacts at the fore, sport can capture more hearts and minds, engage larger membership bases and open doors to new partnerships and stakeholders. Through considered design, sport can reach its true potential. 

From Now On partners with future-focused organisations to engage new audiences and deliver social impact through strategy and program design. With over 20 years’ experience in growing sport participation, founder Anna Walker has a pragmatic and creative approach with experience spanning both tradition and non-traditional sports, crossing many borders and cultures. She has supported customised sport participation solutions to more than 20 sports within Australia, New Zealand, England and the Pacific Islands.

Name: Ness Academy
Description:
Promoting sports teams and clubs is essential to building a fan base, attracting talent, and ensuring long-term sustainability, whether the team is professional, amateur, or recreational. Effective promotion strategies can vary based on the resources available, the target audience, and the goals of the team or club. Below are some key methods and strategies for promoting sports teams and clubs:

1. Social Media Marketing
Social media platforms are powerful tools for reaching fans and engaging with them on a daily basis. Teams and clubs can use platforms like Facebook, Instagram, Twitter, TikTok, and YouTube to promote themselves.

Content Creation: Share behind-the-scenes footage, highlight reels, player interviews, training sessions, and game-day content.
Live Streaming: Stream games, practice sessions, or special events on platforms like Facebook Live, YouTube, or Twitch.
Engage with Fans: Use polls, Q&A sessions, and interactive posts to engage fans directly.
Hashtags and Trends: Create and leverage popular hashtags to join ongoing conversations or create unique branded hashtags for your team.
2. Website and Online Presence
A well-designed website is crucial for professional and amateur teams alike.

Official Website: Create a central hub for the team where fans can find schedules, team rosters, news, merchandise, and more.
SEO (Search Engine Optimization): Optimize the website for search engines to ensure that people can find the team or club online when searching for related sports content.
Member and Fan Portals: Offer membership or fan club signups where supporters can get exclusive content, discounts, or early access to tickets.
3. Traditional Advertising
Traditional methods of advertising can still be effective, especially in local markets or for regional teams and clubs.

Description:

Non solo simulazione di guida, ma un vero sport con una stagione agonistica, allenamenti professionali e competizioni ufficiali.

 Le nostre aree principali:
Sim Racing & Competizioni: allenamenti su simulatori professionali, coaching tecnico e mentale, partecipazione a campionati IRT e ITJ.
Formazione: programmi per giovani piloti (Young Racers), team building per aziende e percorsi professionali in collaborazione con Synergia (Esports Mental Coach, Cultural Communication Specialist, Team Manager).
Drivefulness: progetto innovativo di sicurezza stradale attraverso la guida consapevole.
Eventi & Community: affitto sala simulazione, eventi promozionali, feste dello sport, attività di inclusione sociale, podcast e dirette a tema motorsport.

 La nostra missione è allenare, educare e ispirare attraverso il motorsport e il digitale, trasformando la passione in opportunità di crescita personale e professionale.

Through hosting a variety of events, Race Connects will look to encourage, welcome and engage racing fans as well as newcomers to the sport. 

Race Connects will provide a variety of opportunities for young people to be involved in the thoroughbred racing industry whilst looking to provide them with industry education.

Name: Golf des 24 heures - Le Mans
Description:
Découvrez un parcours d'exception !

Situé dans l'enceinte du circuit des 24 heures du Mans, au bout de la légendaire ligne droite des Hunaudières, le Golf des 24 heures vous ouvre ses portes dans un cadre boisé et paisible, idéal pour combiner sport et détente.
Profitez de son restaurant avec terrasse offrant une vue imprenable sur le parcours, jouable toute l'année de part sa nature sableuse.

Engagé dans une démarche écologique, le golf gère efficacement sa consommation d'eau, et limite l'utilisation de pesticides (label biodiversité - Niveau ARGENT).
Ouvert à tous, il propose une École de golf pour les enfants dès 4 ans (70 enfants) et des cours adaptés pour les débutants comme pour les joueurs confirmés.
Rejoignez une communauté de près de 600 adhérents et venez vivre une expérience unique au cœur de la nature !

Name: SportsCool - East London | South Essex | Reading | Doncaster
Description:
Sportscool | A Sport for Every Child 

At Sportscool, we believe that sports education is a cornerstone of a child’s development — shaping not just their physical health, but their confidence, motivation, and overall well-being.

By partnering with local primary schools, we enhance the PE curriculum and provide exciting extracurricular opportunities, ensuring that every child has the chance to participate, progress, and excel. 

 Our Impact
Our programmes are designed to boost:
 Self-esteem & confidence
 Physical fitness & health
 Motivation & resilience
 Social skills & teamwork

 A Sport for Every Child
We believe that every child has a sport they are destined to love. With a wide range of activities, we help children discover the sport that truly resonates with them — inspiring a lifelong love of physical activity. 

 Exercise and Mindfulness
Sport is more than movement. Our classes teach children about teamwork, friendship, competition, and self-expression — while supporting relaxation, balance, and mental well-being.

 Before & After School Clubs
Beyond the school day, our engaging clubs keep children active, entertained, and motivated. These experiences enrich school life and help create healthy, happy, and confident young people.

 At Sportscool, we’re passionate about building brighter futures through sport — one child at a time.

Name: Basket Namur Capitale
Description:
Créé en 1978, le Basket club Saint-Servais a évolué au fil des années….

Issu de la fusion du Dexia Namur et du Novia Namur, le Basket Namur Capitale hérite d’un palmarès riche en succès tant sur le plan belge :

18 titres de champion de Belgique en 1991, 1992, 1993, 1994, 1997, 1998, 1999, 2000, 2001, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2009, 2013 et 2021.

17 victoires en Coupe de Belgique en 1992, 1993, 1994, 1998, 1999, 2000, 2002, 2003, 2004, 2005, 2006, 2007, 2008, 2009, 2013, 2016 et 2018.

que sur la scène internationale avec de nombreuses participations aux différentes Coupes Européennes :

En 1990 et 1991 : Coupe d’Europe.
De 1992 à 1995 : Coupe d’Europe des clubs champions.
De 1996 à 2002 : Coupe Ronchetti.
En 2003 et 2004 : FIBA Euro Cup for Women.
De 2005 à 2008 : FIBA Euroleague for Women.
De 2009 à 2023 : FIBA EuroCup  Women.

De nombreuses distinctions ont aussi récompensé le club : le Trophée du Mérite Sportif de la Ville de Namur et le Trophée du Mérite Sportif de la Communauté Française pour ne citer que ceux-là.

1. Consolidar los equipos profesionales
2. Las cinco categorías desarrolladas
3. Nuestros valores como seña de identidad y ejemplo

Name: The Beyond Berlin Club
Description:
At Beyond Berlin, we’re flipping tennis on its head - making it fun, inclusive, and all about connecting people. Whether you’ve never swung a racket or you’re already smashing aces, our community is built for everyone.

What we’re about:
We create moments that spark joy and bring people together through movement:

_ Weekly tennis classes that break down barriers and keep it light for all skill levels
_High-energy bootcamps and summer leagues that turn up the fun
_Pop-up courts in the city’s most unexpected spots - rooftops, parking lots, office spaces (so far, zero broken windows)
_Events that mix tennis with live music, art, and food - turning the game into a full-on cultural experience

Why it matters:
Tennis can feel intimidating or stuck in its old ways. We’re here to change that - with colorful, movement-driven experiences that make everyone feel welcome. It’s never just about the score, but about building community and real connections that stick.

Our impact so far:

_ 4,000+ people energized through our vibrant, culture-rich events
_A growing tribe of partners who share our vision of tennis for all
_Revitalizing urban spaces by turning them into playgrounds 

Interested in teaming up? Let’s chat.

Follow the journey on Instagram: @thebeyondberlin_club
Location: Berlin, Please select region, state or province

Als leidenschaftliche Kampfsportler:innen wissen wir, dass echter Kampfsport mehr als nur körperliche Stärke und Technik ist.
Er verkörpert Werte wie Selbstbeherrschung, Respekt und eine entschiedene Ablehnung von unkontrollierter Aggression und Unfairness.
In einer Welt, in der Gewalt gegen Frauen eine traurige Realität darstellt, wollen wir eine Plattform schaffen, die nicht nur Aufmerksamkeit für dieses wichtige Thema generiert, sondern auch konkrete Hilfe bietet.

Name: American Collegiate Hockey Association (ACHA)
Description:
The American Collegiate Hockey Association (ACHA) was founded in 1991 and is the national association for Non-NCAA Collegiate Hockey throughout the United States.

Our organization of more than 461 colleges and university-affiliated teams representing 48 states and 2 Canadian provinces provides a structure, regulates operations, and promotes the sport of Hockey nationwide.

With approximately 13,000 players and coaches as well as countless volunteers and game officials, the ACHA has experienced tremendous growth over the past decade and continues to be a viable option for college bound student-athletes to continue playing competitive hockey nationwide.

The primary mission of the ACHA is to support the growth of Collegiate Hockey while emphasizing academic performance, personal development and opportunities for regional, national and international competition.

Name: Skyline Soccer Association
Description:
Skyline Soccer Association has been the heart of Denver youth soccer since 1965, and in 1976 became a Colorado non-profit 501(c)3 tax-exempt organization. We are the oldest youth soccer club in Denver and are a sanctioned club member of the Colorado Youth Soccer Association (CYSA). 

Today, Skyline serves roughly 3,000 players each season ranging in age from 2.5 – 18 years old and provides options for all levels of players, from the beginner to the advanced. Skyline is the largest Denver-based sports organization serving all areas of Denver and its surrounding suburbs. The association uses over 25 field complexes every season to host practices, games, camps and clinics. Skyline also employs over 100 staff coaches and referees each season. To learn more about our employment and coaching opportunities, please visit our website at https://www.skylinesoccer.org/club/soccer-jobs 

The philosophy at Skyline soccer is: “To Teach, To Inspire, To Excel”. We implement this philosophy in all aspects of our programs. Through our soccer camps and soccer leagues, we develop a foundation for players to thrive and be creative and find success in whatever they aspire to do. Skyline Soccer Association is committed to providing our players and their families with high quality soccer programs that allow each player to achieve the highest level of soccer that they desire in a fun, educational, and safe environment through the proper training and assessment of our coaches and players while operating in a financially sound and prudent manner.

Please contact us if you have any questions regarding our programs, camps and clinics, tournaments, or you just want to get involved with a non-profit soccer organization.

Darüber hinaus bietet das Unternehmen umfassende Rennbetreuungsdienste an, um sicherzustellen, dass Fahrer und Teams ihre beste Leistung abrufen können. Diese Dienstleistungen machen Schubert Motorsport zu einem unverzichtbaren Partner im professionellen Motorsport.

Name: Cricket Dorset Limited
Description:
Dorset Cricket is the governing body responsible for the development and delivery of recreational and representative cricket across Dorset. We closely partner with the England & Wales Cricket Board (ECB), local authorities, schools, clubs, and community organisations to grow the game at every level — from grassroots participation to high-performance pathways.

Our vision is to make cricket a game for everyone, everywhere in Dorset. We are committed to creating inclusive environments, enabling lifelong engagement in cricket, and ensuring a positive experience whether playing, coaching, volunteering, or supporting.

At the heart of our operations is a modern, ambitious team focused on strategic growth and community impact. We manage county representative teams (male and female) across all age groups, deliver talent pathway programmes, support over 60 affiliated clubs, and facilitate competitions, school programmes, coach development, and safeguarding.

We are also growing our commercial and marketing footprint, building strategic partnerships that align with our values and expand the reach and relevance of cricket across Dorset’s business and civic communities. Initiatives like the Dorset Women’s Showcase (#DWS25) and sponsorship of representative teams and players are central to our efforts to connect cricket with local pride, innovation, and investment.
Creating a Lifelong Connection to Sport

Through collaboration, innovation, and strong governance, Dorset Cricket is building a future where the game thrives, inspires, and creates opportunities on and off the field.

Name: Grannies on Waves
Description:
3 grannies die de atlantische oceaan oversteken in een roeiboot... Wij zijn Carla, Ineke en Trea en wij gaan dat doen! Stel je voor: een eindeloze oceaan, de horizon die zich oneindig uitstrekt en midden in die immense watermassa 3 stoere grannies met een missie. We starten in december 2026 op het Canarische Eiland La Gomera en zetten koers naar het Caribische eiland Antigua, 5000 kilometer verderop. In een roeiboot.  
Wij steken vastberaden, enthousiast en gemotiveerd veel tijd, geld en energie in ons avontuur. Wij doen dit niet alleen en wij doen dit niet voor onszelf. Wij werken aan een goede combinatie van donaties voor ons goede doel en sponsoring van onze deelname. Het één kan niet zonder het ander, maar het één mag ook niet ten koste gaan van het ander. 

Wij roeien voor kinderen met dromen. Onze prachtige kleinkinderen zijn gezond en groeien op in een veilige en liefdevolle omgeving. Dat geluk gunnen wij ieder kind en iedere ouder. Het Prinses Máxima Centrum behandelt kinderen met kanker. Kinderen die dromen van een toekomst. Misschien is er wel een kind dat er ook van droomt de oceaan over te roeien! Wij zijn in gesprek met de Prinses Máxima Foundation. De Foundation draagt bij aan essentiële voorzieningen en onderzoek om ervoor te zorgen dat kinderen kunnen blijven dromen.

Name: Helsingfors Segelsällskap r.f. (Yacht Club)
Description:
Helsingfors Segelsällskap Yacht Club or HSS, is the second oldest yacht club in Helsinki, established in 1893. The yacht club is the home for 1450 sailors and 350 boats. The club is located on the Liuskasaari island on the southernmost shore of Helsinki. Liuskasaari is a few minutes ferry ride away from Merisatamanranta.

Helsingfors Segelsällskap is renowned for its large number of junior sailors, the AUDI HSS Sail Centre and the eighty boat strong classic fleet. The classic fleet consists of yachts mainly in the Metre and Skerry Cruiser boat classes. The club also harbours Golk Boats, Classic Dragons, Hai boats and Classic Cruising Yachts. 

The active HSS junior section with 150 youngsters in the age between 7 and 15. The optimist program is extended with a ten boat strong 29er Skiff-centre.

The Olympic AUDI HSS Sail Center has a a fleet of 6 Elliott 6m boats, 8 Laser 16 boats, two monohull Americas Cup training boats - SM 40ies and six 606'ies. The center runs an extensive sailing course program for adults.

(Picture curtesy of Erkki Lähteenmäki, Sailpix)

For more info see: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Helsingfors_Segelsällskap

Name: Fédération sénégalaise de Badminton (FESBAD)
Description:
Le Comité national de Promotion du Badminton au Sénégal, créé en décembre 2019 par arrêté ministériel, a passé le volant en février 2022 à la Fédération sénégalaise de Badminton (FESBAD).

La FESBAD a pour vision de permettre à chaque enfant sénégalais de jouer au badminton là où il/elle se trouve. 

La mission principale de la fédération est de promouvoir, de vulgariser et de développer le badminton au Sénégal et aussi de valoriser le badminton sénégalais à l’International. Une discipline devenue olympique depuis 1992.

La FESBAD a pour objectif de changer de paradigme en démocratisant le badminton et ainsi donner l’opportunité, à chaque enfant et à chaque adulte, de pratiquer ce sport.

Grâce à l’engagement des membres de la fédération et le soutien de nos partenaires stratégiques tels que l’État du Sénégal, le CNOSS, la Fédération mondiale de Badminton (BWF), la Confédération africaine de Badminton (CAB), la Fédération francophone de Badminton (FFB) et nos sponsors, le badminton sénégalais est en train de gagner du terrain.

Nos activités sont, entre autres :
- Le Shuttle Time – Programme d’apprentissage du badminton en milieu scolaire et universitaires. Le Sénégal est classé parmi les meilleurs pays au monde.
- La formation d’officiels techniques et d’organisateurs, de tuteurs et d’enseignants pour l’intégration et la mise en œuvre du programme d’apprentissage du badminton à l’école. 
- Le renforcement de capacités des athlètes.
- Le Badminton No Limit – Activités de cohésion sportive entre civils et hommes de tenue.
- Les activités inclusives – Badminton à l’Empire des Enfants et au Village Pilote.
- Les activités Gender Equity – Développement du leadership chez les jeunes filles et les femmes à travers le badminton. 
- Le divertissement à travers le badminton.
- Les partenariats.

Name: Saint-Sébastien Football Club
Description:
Le Saint-Sébastien-Football-Club est le plus grand club du Grand Ouest et de la façade Atlantique avec plus de 900 licenciés. 
Club historique de la région Nantaise, le SSFC évolue au sein du championnat Régional 1 Intersport et au niveau Régional 3, ainsi qu’au niveau Ligue en U19 et U18. Son école de foot labellisée par la Fédération Française de Football est en plein essor tout comme sa section féminine qui est en développement constant. 
Fort de ses valeurs, le SSFC a pour but de promouvoir la solidarité, le partage, l’entraide, la compétitivité... Le club offre ainsi une activité adaptée à chacun et chacune de ses licencié(e)s. 
Le Saint Sébastien Football Club, né de la fusion des 3 clubs que comptait la ville (GSSS, La Profondine, St-Sébastien Foot Entreprise) est depuis 2016 l’unique club de la ville de Saint-Sébastien-Sur-Loire (Politique sportive de la Ville 1 sport - 1 club). 
Sous l’impulsion de son Président Laurent BLOINO, le club se structure et se professionnalise autour de plusieurs objectifs et de sa devise "Ensemble Vers Demain". Le club compte aujourd’hui 5 salariés. Pour cela le SSFC peut compter sur le soutien indéfectible de ses partenaires qu’ils soient Locaux ou Nationaux. 
Souhaitant développer son réseau de partenaire afin de poursuivre sa croissance et pouvoir atteindre ses objectifs Sportifs et Associatifs, le SSFC vous invite à le rejoindre dans son aventure et ainsi faire partie de la grande famille « Bleue » 

Rejoignez-nous pour continuer l’aventure.

Name: Smiths Rugby
Description:
Smiths Rugby is Cheltenham based men’s rugby club with two teams competing in the 8th & 10th Tiers of English Rugby Union.

Based at the 490-seater Prince of Wales Stadium on Tommy Taylors Lane in the centre of Cheltenham Spa, the club was founded in 1952 as part of the Sport & Social club of Smiths Industies.

Taking the rugby seriously on the pitch, but fostering a family friendly, fun and social atmosphere has been the blueprint of our 70-year Rugby club history here in Cheltenham.

The 1st XV team play in the Counties 2 Tribute Gloucestershire North league, having won Tribute Gloucestershire 1 North in 2023 ahead of the restructuring of leagues.

The second team, dubbed Smiths United, compete in the Counties 4 Tribute Gloucestershire League in 2024/25. Smiths United have experienced a resurgence in the last few years and are always looking for players of all ability to join the team.

Team training is at 7:00pm on Thursday evenings at the Prince of Wales Stadium, with a Strength & Conditioning sessions at 7:00pm on Tuesday evenings at the Stronghold Gym in Kingsditch.

We are always looking for new players of all abilities to welcome them into our great club.

En A2G Playmaker, creemos en el poder del deporte como catalizador de grandes experiencias, conexiones y oportunidades. Somos una consultora estratégica que combina pasión, profesionalidad e innovación para transformar la relación entre marcas, clubes deportivos y comunidades.

¿Qué hacemos?
Diseñamos soluciones integrales para empresas y clubes deportivos que buscan maximizar su impacto en el mundo del deporte. Desde viajes corporativos y experiencias exclusivas hasta la gestión de clubes de empresas y fundaciones deportivas, nuestras estrategias están diseñadas para generar valor tangible y fortalecer la marca de nuestros clientes.

Para Empresas:

Patrocinio Estratégico: Identificamos y gestionamos oportunidades que conecten tu marca con proyectos deportivos alineados con tus valores y objetivos.

Activación de Marca: Diseñamos campañas que aprovechan el entorno deportivo para generar visibilidad, impacto y reconocimiento.

Corporate Events: Creamos experiencias únicas en eventos deportivos y espacios exclusivos para fidelizar clientes y motivar equipos.

Para Clubes Deportivos:

Club de Empresas: Potenciamos tu red empresarial con estrategias de captación y activación que fomenten el networking y generen ingresos.

Eventos en Espacios Únicos: Transformamos tus instalaciones en escenarios para eventos corporativos, rodajes o presentaciones de producto.

Fundaciones y Sostenibilidad: Ayudamos a fortalecer tu impacto social mediante iniciativas alineadas con los valores del club y las necesidades de la comunidad.

Nuestro enfoque:
Nos integramos como parte de tu equipo, ofreciendo soluciones personalizadas que conectan marcas, deporte y personas. Trabajamos con clubes y empresas en sectores como fútbol, golf, pádel, tenis y más, siempre enfocados en resultados medibles y experiencias inolvidables.

Description:
The Young Racing Driver Academy (YRDA) was launched in April 2013 by The Business of Sport, (TBOS) a global sports management consultancy - with the aim of providing young drivers with the support required to make it to the highest echelons of motorsport.

The YRDA is a motorsport academy that is focused on identifying, mentoring and coaching young racing driver talent and providing a pathway from Karting into single-seater racing.

YRDA delivers a specialist programme and provides tailored mentoring, marketing and management support to young racing drivers. YRDA and its programme partners possess wide-ranging expertise and experience across the business of motorsport and are perfectly placed to encourage and assist a young racing driver in maximising his or her on and off track potential.

YRDA’s aim is to identify talented young racing drivers and provide opportunities for those individuals to develop the necessary range of skills, knowledge and level of confidence to fully prepare them to compete to the best of their ability in their chosen feeder series and move towards their ultimate goal of racing in F1 or other categories of professional motorsport.

Services
The YRDA provides a unique set of benefits to each member of the programme. These range from our state of the art YRDA simulator, human performance monitoring, sports science assessments and evaluation. Guidance on the core skill-sets include the following:

Simulator Driver Coaching

Presentation Skills and Public Speaking

Marketing, Branding and Social Media

Bespoke Motor Racing Fitness and Nutrition

Optimal Mindset Coaching

Driver Well-Being and Lifestyle

Off-Track Race Preparation

As part of our holistic approach to driver development, the YRDA will focus on all of the key areas that a young driver requires in today's evolving motorsport environment.

For more information about the YRDA and the services it provides, please contact us via cbraggins@arden-motorsport.com

Name: v.v. DCV
Description:
Welkom bij DCV!

DCV is een bloeiende voetbalvereniging op het schitterende sportpark Waalplantsoen in Krimpen aan den IJssel.

Als voetbalvereniging hebben wij de ambitie om een gezellige en een sociaalbindende factor binnen Krimpen aan den IJssel te zijn, met als spil een sfeervolle accommodatie die bol staat van de activiteiten voor zowel senioren als jeugd. 

DCV is 1 november 1919 opgericht. We hebben momenteel circa 900 leden, onder verdeeld in meerdere jeugdteams voor jongens en meisjes tussen de 8 en 18 jaar, een Champions League voor onze mini's tussen de 3 en 7 jaar, een trimploeg, meerdere seniorenteams, meerdere damesteams en diverse 7vs7 teams. 

De doelstelling van DCV is om met de hoogste seniorenteams en de selectieteams van de jeugdafdeling op een zo hoog mogelijk niveau te voetballen. Verder wil de vereniging iedere voetballer de mogelijkheid geven om op zijn of haar eigen niveau te spelen en wil de daarbij behorende training en begeleiding optimaal verzorgen. 

De jeugdafdeling is de afgelopen jaren kwalitatief sterk gegroeid. Bij onze teams staat plezier in de sport voorop. Toch zullen ook deze teams voor de overwinning gaan. Vanaf de leeftijd van 3 jaar ben je van harte welkom om op een plezierige en ontspannen manier voetbal te spelen.

De jeugdteams en de senioren spelen hun wedstrijden op zaterdag, terwijl de veteranen (7 tegen 7) op donderdag en/of vrijdagavond spelen. Het trainen vindt plaats op de doordeweekse avonden.

Het sportcomplex bestaat uit een kantine met 16 kleedkamers, een fysio-ruimte, een ballenhok, een commissiekamer, 4 kleedruimtes voor scheidsrechters en een grote businessclubruimte, genaamd: "De Voorzet".  

We hebben 4 velden (1 FIFA goedgekeurd kunstgrasveld, 2 standaard kunstgrasvelden en 1 grasveld), waarvan er 3 voorzien zijn van verlichting. Daarnaast beschikken wij over ruim 200 parkeerplaatsen. 

Kortom, voetbalvereniging DCV is dus een vereniging waar je als lid trots op kunt zijn. Dus word lid van DCV!
Location: Krimpen aan den IJssel, Zuid Holland

Name: SPOC Football Club
Description:
SPOC FC was the second old scholars team to enter the South Australian Amateur Football League (SAAFL) after Prince Alfred O.C. It ranks fourth in seasons played in the SAAFL behind Adelaide Uni, Kenilworth and PAOC. Until 2021, it was the only old scholars team to win the A1 premiership twice (1935 & 2012). It has spent more years in A1 (35) than any other old scholars club. It has had more players (7) win an A1 medal than any other club other than Adelaide College and Adelaide University. Its captain in the '30s, Bob Lee, along with old scholar Chris Sangster, captained the state in more years (4) than any other player in the SAAFL. Until 1999 it was the only old scholars club to have its first team placed no lower than A2. It has won more A2 premierships (6) than any other club. In 1996 the SAAFL created the Premier and Amateur League divisions and the Club opted for the Amateur Division winning the A1 premiership. During these record-breaking feats, Steve Brookman played 310 games between 1966 and 1989. Former captain Keith Sims was President of the SAAFL from 1967 to 1996.
Recently, SPOC FC A grade won the Division 1 Premiership (2012) and Division 2 Premiership in 2011 and 2018, whilst the B grade won the Division 1R Premiership in 2022. The club has now been in Division 1 since 2019 and the A and B grades will play finals in the 2025 season.

Name: Raleigh Firebirds
Description:
The Raleigh Firebirds are a member of The Basketball League (TBL), the third largest basketball league in America behind the NBA and the NBA G-League. As members of the Southeastern Conference, they play against teams ranging from Virginia to Florida, and further when the TBL playoffs come around.

The Firebirds are dedicated to creating a winning organization that fosters growth in player development and helping young professionals reach their career aspirations. Many Firebirds players go on to have successful careers overseas.

Off the court, the Firebirds are heavily invested in the community. During the offseason (and sometimes during the season), the Firebirds spend time doing community service, as well as visiting middle and high schools. The team heavily believes in STEM education and setting up players for success once their playing careers are over. The same philosophy applies to the underprivileged youth who the Firebirds mentor from all over Raleigh and the Triangle.

Home games are played at Word of God Christian Academy, typically on Fridays or weekends. Tickets cost $20, making it an affordable yet enjoyable experience for basketball fans in the area. We're here to put on a show, and the Firebirds aren't going away anytime soon.

Name: Meridian Racing p/b de la Uz | UCI Continental Cycling Team
Description:
We are a UCI Continental men’s cycling team, registered with USA Cycling and proudly based in Oviedo, Spain. Our mission is to develop the next generation of talent, focusing on U23 riders—especially from the USA and Canada—while providing the structure, support, and international racing opportunities needed to progress to the highest levels of professional cycling.

We race primarily in Spain, Portugal, and France, and our objective—our hope and ambition—is to gain entry into UCI point 1 and 2 events and, with a bit of luck, one-day UCI ProSeries races. We target the pinnacle events of rider development—, Giro Next Gen, the Tour de l’Avenir and Volta a Portugal—elite stages where future WorldTour professionals are forged, offering unmatched exposure for both our athletes’ progression and our partners’ brands. From January through March, Spain offers unmatched broadcast exposure on Eurosport, RTVE, and international streaming platforms—turning every race into meaningful visibility for our sponsors and technical partners.

Based in Oviedo, in collaboration with the experienced structure of De la Uz Junior Team, we operate from one of Spain’s strongest development hubs, combining world-class terrain, a dense racing calendar, and direct access to European competitions. Our transatlantic identity—connecting North American talent with the European racing scene—creates a unique pathway for riders aiming to reach ProTeam or WorldTour level.

On and off the bike, we work to deliver value through media presence, digital growth, sponsor activation, and high-impact brand exposure in some of the most televised and prestigious races of the early season.

Name: HSS – Helsingfors Segelsällskap (Helsinki Sailing Club)
Description:
Helsingfors Segelsällskap Yacht Club (HSS), is the second oldest yacht club in Helsinki, established in 1893. The yacht club is the home for 1450 sailors and 350 boats. The club is located on the Liuskasaari island on the southernmost shore of Helsinki. Liuskasaari is a few minutes ferry ride away from Merisatamanranta.

Helsingfors Segelsällskap is renowned for its large number of junior sailors, the AUDI HSS Sail Centre and the eighty boat strong classic fleet. The classic fleet consists of yachts mainly in the Metre and Skerry Cruiser boat classes. The club also harbours Golk Boats, Classic Dragons, Hai boats and Classic Cruising Yachts. 

The active HSS junior section with 150 youngsters in the age between 7 and 15. The optimist program is extended with a ten boat strong 29er Skiff-centre.

The Olympic AUDI HSS Sail Center has a a fleet of 6 Elliott 6m boats, 8 Laser 16 boats, two monohull Americas Cup training boats - SM 40ies and six 606'ies. The center runs an extensive sailing course program for adults.

(Picture curtesy of Erkki Lähteenmäki, Sailpix)

For more info see: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Helsingfors_Segelsällskap

Name: Basketball Löwen
Description: Wir sind ein professioneller Sportverein aus Erfurt, der drei Schwerpunkte verfolgt: Spitzensport, Nachwuchsförderung und gesellschaftliches Engagement.  Das öffentliche Aushängeschild unseres Vereins ist unsere Profimannschaft, deren Spieler zugleich als nahbare Vorbilder für unsere Nachwuchsarbeit und die sportbezogenen Sozialraumprojekte fungieren. Gemeinsam mit unseren Partnervereinen organisieren wir unterschiedliche Sportangebote für Mädchen, Jungen und Erwachsene. Dabei bemühen wir uns mit unseren sportbezogenen Sozialraumprojekten Kinder und Jugendliche aus allen Milieus zu erreichen. Besonders am Herzen liegt uns die wertvolle Rolle von Sport für Inklusion. Gemeinsam mit unserem Förderverein organisieren wir wöchentliche Inklusionssporteinheiten und nehmen mit unserem Special Olympics-Team an Turnieren teil. Die wichtigsten Ziele unseres ganzheitlichen Ansatzes rund um das Zusammenspiel aus Spitzensport, Nachwuchsförderung und gesellschaftlichem Engagement sind die Stärkung der Chancengerechtigkeit für Kinder und das positive Zusammenführen von Menschen. Wir sind davon überzeugt, dass Sport und gerade die international geprägte Sportart Basketball dazu einen wertvollen Beitrag leisten kann und sehen dies als unsere Verantwortung als Verein.

Name: Landessportverband für das Saarland
Description:
Der Landessportverband für das Saarland ist eine rechtsfähige Körperschaft des öffentlichen Rechts mit Sitz in Saarbrücken. Er ist die Vereinigung der Sportvereine und -verbände im Saarland, Mitglied des Deutschen Olympischen Sportbundes und mit rund 370.000 Mitgliedern die größte Personenvereinigung des Saarlandes.

Der LSVS dient der Förderung des Sports im Saarland und unterstützt insbesondere die Fachverbände und Verwaltungsarbeit der ihm angehörenden Fachverbände finanziell und organisatorisch; er fördert die Verwirklichung ihrer sportlichen Interessen. Er schafft mit seinen Mitgliedern die Voraussetzung zur Förderung des Breiten-, Freizeit- und Gesundheitssports ebenso wie des Leistungs- und Spitzensports.

Zu den Aufgaben des LSVS zählen insbesondere die Verteilung des dem LSVS zufließenden Achtels der Wetteinsätze der Saarland-Sporttoto GmbH im Rahmen der Richtlinien von Sporttotomitteln zur Förderung des Sports im Saarland, die Gewährleistung des Versicherungsschutzes seiner Mitglieder,Planung und Ausbau von Sportanlagen, die Durchführung repräsentativer Sportveranstaltungen, die Mitwirkung bei der Gestaltung von Zuschüssen für sportliche Zwecke und die Beteiligung an sportbezogenen Einrichtungen.

Der LSVS versteht sich mit seinen verschiedenen Referaten als zentraler Ansprechpartner für Sport und Bewegung sowie als Service- und Dienstleistungsunternehmen für seine Vereine und Verbände. Der LSVS setzt sich gemeinsam mit anderen Institutionen dafür ein, das Saarland als Sportland weiter zu etablieren.

Name: I Quadrifogli di Vigevano Onlus
Description: I primi nel nostro genere in tutta la provincia di Pavia, dal 1999 promuoviamo l’attività motoria per persone con disabilità intellettiva; affiliati al movimento internazionale Special Olympics, ne condividiamo la mission inclusiva e promuoviamo sul territorio lo sport unificato: Bowling, Nuoto, Atletica e Sport Invernali praticati da atleti con e senza disabilità intellettive, di ogni livello di abilità, partecipando ogni anno alle manifestazioni sportive del Movimento in tutt’Italia.

Name: Pétanque Union Bois le Duc, 's-Hertogenbosch
Description:
Pétanque Union Bois le Duc is the first official pétanque association in 's-Hertogenbosch (NL) affiliated with the Dutch Pétanque Association (NJBB). Our association combines play & sports and is a home for both recreational and competitive players.

Pétanque Union Bois le Duc stands out from the countless neighbourhood associations in our city, which occasionally play on 1 or maybe 2 clustered pétanque courts. In addition to a limited playing capacity, these locations usually have no (sanitary) facilities. By offering structure, - with fixed afternoons and evenings on which the association is open -, and sufficient pétanque courts, Pétanque Union Bois le Duc makes the difference, increasing the inclusiveness of the Bossche society. This is because everyone can participate when it suits them.

Our accommodation, - consisting of 16 pétanque courts equipped with sustainable LED lighting -, is located on the grounds of soccer association s.v. C.H.C. with whom Pétanque Union Bois le Duc shares the facilities. All this in the social heart of the multicultural residential area De Schutskamp.

Description:

Notre objectif principal est de participer au 45ème Challenge Spi Dauphine, un événement étudiant majeur du Sud de la France qui aura lieu du 19 au 25 avril 2026.

Nous sommes donc à la recherche de partenaires qui souhaiteraient nous accompagner dans cette aventure. Sponsoriser la Spi Barca, c'est s'associer à un projet jeune et prometteur, offrant une visibilité sans précédent auprès d'une audience étudiante dynamique et prête à intégrer le marché du travail.

Pour en savoir plus sur notre association et les opportunités de partenariat, suivez-nous sur LinkedIn ou contactez-nous à spibarca@gmail.com. Rejoignez-nous dans cette passionnante aventure nautique !

Name: Sportclub Susteren
Description:
De voetbalclub in "Het Smalste Stukje Nederland". 

Met 4 grasvelden, één kunstgrasveld en een prachtige kantine zijn wij een club met ongeveer 550 leden, een van de grootste uit de regio, waar wij uiterst trots op zijn. 

Gekleed in het groen-wit speelt het 1ste elftal op zondag in de eerste klasse C. De seniorenteams 2 t/m 6 spelen respectievelijk in de hoofdklasse, 3de, 5de, 6de en 6de klasse en op zaterdag speelt er ook een veteranenteam in een competitie rondom de kerk. Wij besteden veel aandacht aan de jeugd en zijn er trots op dat onze standaardteams op een mooi niveau voetballen.

Wij streven ernaar om er bij Sportclub Susteren voor iedereen te zijn met een voetbalhart. Dat zijn uiteraard onze spelende leden (jeugd, senioren, veteranen & G-team), maar ook de ouders, opa’s & oma’s, vrijwilligers, voetballiefhebbers, ambassadeurs en sponsoren. 

Iedereen is welkom op ons prachtige sportpark. 

Graag willen wij onze vereniging in de huidige omvang behouden, danwel uitbreiden, waarbij sponsoren van groot belang zijn. Daarom zijn we steeds op zoek naar nieuwe samenwerkingen. Met een groot ledenbestand (B2C), een bedrijvige kantine, leuke activiteiten, een prachtig complex, een voetbalweek met meer dan 150 kinderen, connecties met andere sponsoren (B2B) en een groot online bereik op de website, facebook, instagram, linkedin en een interne nieuwsbrief, kunnen wij ook voor uw bedrijf iets betekenen.

Wij staan open om het gesprek met u aan te gaan en samen te kijken naar uw wensen. Dat kan in de vorm van een van onze pakketten of wellicht met maatwerk. 

Neem gerust contact op met sponsoring@scsusteren.nl, met Guus Bisschops (Bestuurslid Sponsoring) of iemand vanuit de sponsorcommissie (Chrit Coenen, Jan Ramakers, Joep van de Laar en Tom Jennissen).

Hopelijk mogen we u en uw bedrijf binnenkort verwelkomen als trotse sponsor van Sportclub Susteren.

Name: Curves Zwolle
Description:
“Niet twijfelen, maar gewoon beginnen” is ons motto. 

Wij zijn Margriet Pompstra en Jeanine Mulder en wij wonen in Meppel en Zwolle. Beiden werken wij al jarenlang als zelfstandig ondernemer en nu kiezen we ervoor om onze krachten te bundelen door samen een Curves onderneming te openen in Zwolle. 
Wie ons kent weet dat wij een grote passie hebben voor sport, met name cardio- en krachttraining. We houden ervan om onszelf fit, krachtig en gezond te houden. Vanuit dit enthousiasme willen we vrouwen inspireren en motiveren om dit ook te gaan doen. Sporten draagt bij aan een gezonde leefstijl op fysiek, mentaal, emotioneel en spiritueel niveau. 
Met de komst van een Curves club in Zwolle kunnen wij vrouwen een optimale sportbeleving bieden en een belangrijke rol spelen in hun weg naar een gezonder en gelukkiger leven. We zullen een club neerzetten waar alle vrouwen van Zwolle zich welkom en op hun gemak voelen, terwijl ze aan het sporten zijn. Ongeacht hun leeftijd, uiterlijk of gewicht. 

Wij richten ons alleen op vrouwen, omdat er veel vrouwen zijn die:
•	Zich binnen de traditionele sportscholen vaak niet op hun gemak voelen en niet de persoonlijke aandacht krijgen die ze wel verdienen;
•	Fitness niet leuk vinden;
•	Vaak weinig tijd hebben in hun leven of zichzelf de tijd niet gunnen; 
•	Het vaak moeilijk vinden om gemotiveerd te blijven.

Wat Curves Zwolle uniek maakt is dat er nog geen gelijkwaardige sportschool voor vrouwen is gevestigd in Zwolle. Doordat Curves al 29 jaar bestaat is er veel onderzoek gedaan naar de effectiviteit van de training.

Spreekt jou dit aan en wil je meer informatie? 
Neem contact met ons op via mail/telefoon:
zwolle@curves.nl / 06-52377712 (Margriet) / 06-38716215 (Jeanine)
www.curves.nl

eute kommen unsere 2.174 Mitglieder (Stand Nov. 2022) aus den unterschiedlichsten Religionsgemeinschaften oder sind religiös nicht gebunden. Breiten- und Leistungssport sowie Mädchen- und Frauenförderung haben bei uns eine lange Tradition. Daher haben wir 2018 das Leistungszentrum für Frauen- und Mädchenfußball gegründet. 

Wir verfügen über ein gemütliches Vereinsheim, einen Rasenplatz mit Laufbahn und Sprunggrube sowie durch die Kooperation mit unserem Nachbarverein Grün-Weiß-Rot über zwei Kunsträsenplatze. Den Beachvolleyballern steht ebenfalls eine moderne Anlage zur Verfügung. 

Derzeit bieten wir die folgenden 8 Sportarten an:

- Mädchen- und Frauenfußballleistungszentrum
- Fußball

Een echte “familie” club voor en door de leden. Een club voor iedereen waar je mag zijn wie je bent en waar je meetelt.

Momenteel telt de club ongeveer 200 leden waarvan zo’n 100 jeugdleden. Dames, heren, veteranen en jeugd.

De heren Senioren trainen op de woensdag en vrijdagavond en de dames Senioren trainen op de dinsdag en vrijdagavond. De allerjongste jeugd tot 8 jaar traint op de zaterdagochtend en de wat oudere jeugd traint op woensdag- en vrijdagavond.

Rugby is natuurlijk de hoofdzaak maar er is meer. Van rugbyfit tot leuke activiteiten er is voor iedereen wat te doen. Een mooi voorbeeld hiervan zijn de senioren en jeugdtrips die ver de landsgrenzen overgaan en waar vriendschappen voor het leven ontstaan.

Wil je een keer meetrainen? Kom kijken of neem contact op voor meer informatie.

Rugby……vormt je, drijft je en beweegt je.

Een club, een familie

Name: SV Austria Salzburg
Description:
Fußballkultur in violett und weiß – das Original aus der Mozartstadt.

Unser Verein knüpft an die Geschichte der 1933 gegründeten Salzburger Austria an. Im Jahr 2005 sicherte eine Faninitiative den Erhalt der traditionsreichen Identität als SV Austria Salzburg, wofür der völlige Neustart des Vereins im Sommer 2006, beginnend in der untersten Spielklasse in Angriff genommen wurde.

Heute spielt die Austria in Österreichs dritter Leistungsklasse, der Regionalliga West, und ist dort sogar amtierender Meister. Nun gilt es, der sportlichen Entwicklung entsprechend, wirtschaftlich zu wachsen - deshalb engagieren wir uns gemeinsam aktiv, um nachhaltige finanzielle Strategien für die angedachte Rückkehr in den Profifußball auf die Beine zu stellen.

Wir bieten eine Partnerschaft mit Prestige, über die Sie das positiv konnotierte Image des Mannschaftssports auf Ihr Unternehmen abstrahlen lassen und Mehrwert erzielen können, während Sie unseren Sportverein, das Gemeinschaftsgefühl Fußball und Ihre eigenen sportlichen Prinzipien fördern.

Name: Momentum Sports Management Ltd
Description:
Momentum Sports Management was established in 2017, by Phil Korklin and Brian Howard.

Since Momentum was created, they have gone from strength to strength and absolutely love working with all different types of players and people. For example, young footballers helping them to plot their career pathways, players in the midst of their journeys and achieving success, and older players ensuring they secure best options both in football and afterwards.

Whether it’s the company, Phil or Brian, they have featured across many different media, from Sky Sports News, Not the Top 20 podcast, Talksport and 442 magazine, as well as the daily newspapers. 

On top of this, they have also created their own Podcast mini-series with Si Watts called 'Transfers Uncovered' available to download.

Brian Howard is an ex-footballer, having had a long career playing the game, before transitioning very successfully across as a mentor, advisor and now business owner with his own agency.

Phil Korklin has been an agent for over 15 years, having worked at large and small agencies, before meeting Brian at a previous agency, and teaming up to create Momentum in 2017. 

The agency specialises in helping players build their own pathways and development opportunities based on many years’ experience in the game, as well as data, analysis and scientific information to help make evidence-based decisions. 

Together, Phil and Brian have built a successful, player first, agency, where the player is the centre of every decision they make.

Name: Clubnited
Description:
Binnen de sportsector groeit de behoefte aan professionele ondersteuning, duidelijke afspraken én duurzame samenwerking tussen verenigingen en professionals. Met My Clubnited zetten we ons in om juist dat mogelijk te maken. We helpen sportverenigingen bij het creëren van een solide basis voor goed werkgeverschap — juridisch, organisatorisch én menselijk — zodat professionals optimaal kunnen bijdragen aan de ontwikkeling van de club en zichzelf.

My Clubnited biedt een combinatie van juridische zekerheid, HR-ondersteuning en begeleiding die verder gaat dan alleen contracten. We ondersteunen clubs bij het kiezen van de juiste vorm van samenwerking (vrijwilligersvergoeding, zzp, dienstverband of andere constructies) en zorgen dat alle afspraken kloppen, helder zijn en passen bij de rol. Tegelijkertijd helpen we professionals met onboarding, coaching, persoonlijke ontwikkeling en toegang tot een waardevol netwerk binnen de sport.

Binnen My Clubnited werken we met twee abonnementen:

• My Clubnited Basis
Dit abonnement biedt alle essentiële ondersteuning voor juridisch en contractueel werkgeverschap. Denk aan contractopzet of -controle, formats, advies rondom arbeidsrelaties en begeleiding bij het inrichten van duurzame afspraken.

Recent events include:

Fitting Out Dinner - Spring
Cowes Inter-Livery Regatta – May
Presentation Dinner in Cowes - May
Commodore’s Dinner at the Royal Yacht Squadron - September
Laying Up Dinner - Autumn
Regattas, Rallies and Cruises in Company

Membership Benefits include:
- Exclusively for Liverymen, Freemen of Livery Companies, Freeman of the City of London and Freemen of the Guild of Freeman.

Notre G.A.N.G, notre club !
Le G.A. Noisy-le-Grand est le 1er club d’athlétisme du bassin de Marne-la-Vallée et arrive à se classer parmi les meilleurs de l’est parisien depuis plusieurs années.

L’athlétisme, discipline phare de l’olympisme, incarne des valeurs d’excellence, de dépassement de soi, de respect et d’esthétisme auxquelles le public aime s’identifier et permet à chacun de trouver son objectif : performance, plaisir, remise en forme, santé, convivialité,…

L’année athlétique du club est organisée autour des 2 saisons estivale et hivernale, allant de novembre à fin février, et d’avril à septembre, totalisant environ 40 semaines de compétitions

En moyenne, le club réalise, sur cette saison 2 200 performances sportives, lors de compétitions de tous niveaux, allant du niveau départemental au niveau national et élite

Les 412 membres du club sont présent dans les 3 grandes familles d’athlétisme, à savoir les disciplines sur piste et hors-stade et le sport santé

Chaque année le club participe à l’organisation des Foulées de Noisy (course hors-stade avec un parcours balisé à travers la ville). Cette course offre une forte visibilité pour tout éventuel sponsor, grâce aux 600 participants et plus de 1 000 spectateurs. Le club organise par ailleurs environ 15 compétitions sur piste, rassemblant en moyenne 300 à 400 personnes (athlètes et public confondus) dont un meeting à thème labellisé par la Fédération française d'athlétisme dont la prochaine édition aura lieu le 4 juin 2023.

Our vision is to see more women at the decision-making table, building strong communities and connections through exclusive, immersive global experiences. We aim to find tangible solutions to the challenges faced by women in sports and business, fostering environments where women can thrive and lead.

We lead two interactive experiences. "Immersions" which gather diverse women's experiences & strengthen their capabilities. Learning from a cross section of industry leaders to transform individual thinking and organizational growth.

"Ultimate sports tours", primarily for women, to the world's biggest and best sporting events, led by former elite women athletes. These tours provide a comprehensive experience that includes the sporting event as well as cultural experiences of the host countries.
 
Our Founders are Mel Jones OAM, an international cricket broadcaster on the men’s and women’s game for global events, former Australian Cricketer, two time World Cup winner and PE teacher. 

Jacqui Ellery has 20 years experience at TGI leading sports retail, merchandise and collectibles. An expert in management, commercialisation and activation of intellectual property specialising in sports and entertainment.
And Allison Tranquill who competed at the 1996 & 2004 Olympics with the Australian Women's Basketball Team, was the founder of Australia’s first ever sports agency for female athletes only and current basketball coach.

Join us and be part of the movement to reshape the sporting and business landscapes.

Name: Glenavon Football Club
Description:
Founded in 1889, Glenavon FC has had a long and eventful history.

Glenavon was the first provincial club to win the Irish League title (1951–52) and also the first provincial club to do the league and cup double (1956–57). The latter triumph also made them the first Northern Irish team to enter the European Cup. Glenavon has had a number of talented and famous players, none more so than Wilbur Cush and Jimmy Jones, who were to the fore in “the glory years” of the Fifties. The success of the 1950s is still the benchmark at the club – the closest the club have come to achieving a league success since came in the 1993–94 season, when but for two late goals in the final match Glenavon would have been crowned champions.

Glenavon enjoyed a good run throughout the 1990s, consistently achieving good placings in the league and winning several cup competitions, including Irish Cup wins in 1991–92 and 1996–97, and were runners-up against Glentoran in the 1995–96 and 1997–98 editions of the cup.

Name: Remuera Golf Club
Description:
Located only a short distance from Auckland's CBD, Remuera Golf Club (RGC) is central Auckland's premier golf course, offering one of New Zealand’s best golfing and sports’ club experiences. Situated within 60 hectares of stunning woodland reserve, players and visitors are surrounded with an abundance of nature, birdlife and tranquil beauty at all times.
 
Established in 1934, Remuera Golf Club has a proud history of providing first-class facilities for our members, guests, and corporate visitors. With a strong sense of community spirit, RGC is renowned for the warmth and friendliness extended to all who come and enjoy the Club. 
 
Remuera Golf Club features a magnificent 18-hole, par 72 competition course, famed for its strategic layout and consistently high condition.  The world-class practice facilities include a state-of-the-art driving range, equipped with the latest Toptracer ball tracking technology.
 
The extensive clubhouse facilities provide the ideal place to socialise, relax and enjoy hospitality for any occasion. The popular Winstone’s Cafe Bistro & Bar features both indoor and outdoor seating, supplying food and beverage service of the highest standard to members and guests, the local community, and catering to private hospitality functions.
 
Remuera Golf Club’s team of onsite PGA Professionals and Pro shop staff provide the full range of coaching, custom club-fitting, retail and rental services, utilising the latest equipment and technology to opitimise your golfing performance and Club experience.
 
Remuera Golf Course was the first, and still one of only a handful of courses in New Zealand to be fully Geo-Certified for environmental sustainability. 
 
The location, overall facilities and Club ethos are some of the main reasons that New Zealand Golf, Auckland Golf and the NZ PGA have chosen to headquarter themselves here at RGC.
 
Remuera Golf Club offers a modern and welcoming approach, maintaining a strong membership base and Junior programme.
