Name: Sun Valley Ski Education Foundation
Description:
The Sun Valley Ski Education Foundation provides year-round ski and snowboard training and competitive opportunities for Wood River Valley youth. Our team philosophy is implemented by both identifying with our incredible heritage as a community (25 Winter Olympians) and innovating to meet the changing demands of our society.

OUR MISSION:
To provide exceptional snowsport programs for the youth of the Wood River Valley thereby enabling each participant to reach their athletic potential, while developing strong personal character through good sportsmanship, strong values, and individual goals.

OUR VISION:
To positively influence the future of the non-profit snowsport industry through purposeful thought leadership, innovative programming, and meaningful community collaboration.

OUR VALUES:
Sportsmanship. Citizenship. Character. Teamwork. Creativity. Passion. Perseverance.

Name: Belangenorganisatie Amateur Voetbalverenigingen
Description:
De afkorting BAV staat voor Belangenorganisatie Amateur Voetbalverenigingen. De BAV is per 1 juli 2013 ontstaan uit een fusie tussen de LBA (Landelijke Belangenorganisatie van Amateurvoetbalverenigingen) en de BZV (Belangenorganisatie Zaterdagvoetbal Verengingen).

We zijn er voor alle amateurclubs, ongeacht het niveau,  de regio en of men de voorkeur geeft aan het spelen op zondag of zaterdag. De BAV is te beschouwen als een werkgeversorganisatie voor het amateurvoetbal.
Vaak geven we voorlichting en kiezen we voor een rol op de achtergrond. Maar, als de nood aan de man komt, schromen we niet om eveneens de barricaden te beklimmen om de belangen van onze leden te verdedigen. 
Het is de primaire taak van de BAV en ze ontleent er zelfs haar naam aan: de belangenbehartiging. De BAV komt op voor de belangen van de bij haar aangesloten amateurvoetbalverenigingen, met name richting de KNVB. Met dank aan het adviesrecht tijdens de Ledenraadsvergaderingen van de KNVB hebben we  de mogelijkheid om namens de verenigingen het woord te voeren, maar veelal wordt voordat een ontwikkeling de Ledenraadsvergaderingen ingebracht, dit al in de ontwerpfase besproken met de Directeur- Bestuurder en/of de organisatie.

Name: FC Talence
Description:
Riche d'une histoire de plus de 100 ans et rebaptisé FC Talence en 2019, 
notre club entame aujourd'hui une nouvelle page de son histoire ! 

Autour de la passion du football qui rassemble nos 500 joueurs et joueuses ainsi que tous nos bénévoles et supporters, notre projet associatif est constitué d'axes forts en phase avec les enjeux de notre époque : 
- La pratique féminine
- La pratique des jeunes
- Le développement d'une sensibilité à l'écologie
- Le développement de dispositifs d’éducation civique, culturelle et citoyenne
Enfin, le développement de la pratique masculine est également un objectif de progression du club. 

Vous pouvez faire partie de ce projet ! 

-Grace au sponsoring, Boostez votre image et votre visibilité en touchant notre communauté de plus de 3000 membres (Facebook et Instagram), participez à nos événement partenaires, soyez présents sur les maillots de nos équipes ou sur le bord des terrains avec nos offres de visibilité  
-Grace au mécénat, soutenez nos projets responsables tout en récupérant 60% de votre don sous forme de crédits d'impôt ! 

Nos équipes pour la saison 2023-2024 :

-École de Football : de U6 à U9 
-Préformation : de U10 à U14 + 2 équipes féminines
-Formation : de U15 à U19 
-Nos équipes séniors féminines : Régional 1F (4ème division française), brassage 
-Nos équipes séniors masculines : Régional 2, Départemental 1 et départemental 3.
-Football loisirs : Une équipe

Vous avez des questions ? Contacter sur nos réseaux et nous vous répondrons !

Name: Expedition Summits
Description:
We are adventurers, explorers of untrodden paths, and conquerors of great heights. The mountains are not just our destination—they are our passion, our canvas for painting the most magnificent landscapes, and our classroom for life’s greatest lessons.

We have touched the sky atop the Alps, wandered through the mists of the Himalayas, and stood in awe before the endless horizons of the Andes. Every ascent has been a victory, every step a discovery of a new dimension of ourselves.

But expeditions are not just about climbing—they are about friendships forged in the silence of the peaks, about support that takes root among the rocks, about courage and solidarity written in the snow. The mountains call to all who crave adventure, to those who fear the heights, to those whose hearts beat for exploration. They extend their hand to those ready to learn, to grow, and to find themselves reflected in the wilderness.

If you are a curious traveler, if you seek challenges and self-discovery, if the mountain wind calls to you—welcome!

Together, we will conquer new summits, build lasting friendships, and write new chapters in the story of mountaineering.

Name: Coaches’ Association (HKHDCCA)
Description:
The Coaches’ Association (HKHDCCA) is a not-for-profit organisation responsible for recruiting and accrediting young cricket coaches from north-western Sydney and providing them with coaching opportunities.  It conducts popular junior cricket clinics during each school holidays.
HKHDCCA was formed in 2010 and has experienced significant expansion in recent years, now being one of the largest providers of junior cricket coaching and development in NSW.
In 2022-23, HKHDCCA conducted 16 separate coaching programs with generous Coach / Player ratios, achieving a total attendance of 915 children.
Our Head Coach is Cricket Australia High Performance (Level 3) accredited, plus we have 13 Representative (Level 2) coaches, and 18 Community (Level 1) coaches. The feedback from parents, clubs and players is always outstanding, with many highly positive testimonials received.
The Coaches’ Association designs and implements coaching programs aimed at increasing the cricket participation, skills and enjoyment of boys and girls aged U/6 – U/16, including beginners, club players, representative standard players, disadvantaged groups, and children with special needs.  It is run by volunteers and the fee structure is subsidised to ensure that all families, including those with several children, can access the popular coaching services.
The Coaches’ Association also provides a wonderful opportunity for young men and women to take up coaching to develop their leadership, organisational and communication skills, and put back into the sport, being excellent role models for young boys and girls to participate actively in organised sporting activities, thereby promoting healthy lifestyles and leisure activities.

Enquiries - president.hkhdcca@gmail.com
Annual Reports - https://bit.ly/HKHDCCA-Annual-Reports
Overseas Tour Reports - https://bit.ly/HKHDCCA-overseas-tours-Reports
Sponsor - Parramatta Leagues Club

Name: Futsal Club Cardiff
Description:
Futsal Club Cardiff evolved from the most successful domestic futsal club in Welsh history, Cardiff University Futsal Club. 

Since the inception of the Football Association of Wales’s National Futsal League in 2010, either Cardiff University Futsal Club or Futsal Club Cardiff have been crowned champions on six occasions. 

The two clubs now co-exist and work in partnership, offering parallel opportunities for players to compete in multiple competitions and leagues. Futsal Club Cardiff, as an independent entity are now able to offer opportunities for players from a wider backgrounds and the current men’s first team squad includes several multi-title winning players, eight different nationalities and nine Welsh internationals who have amassed over 250 caps for the FAW’s men’s national futsal squad.

Futsal Club Cardiff most recently represented Wales in the UEFA Futsal Champions League in August 2022, following a thrilling, two-legged play-off final win versus Cefn Druids Futsal Club.

During the 2022/23 season, the club competed in the English FA’s National Futsal Series as Bristol Welsh Futsal Club.

Name: Training Academy O.R.
Description:
La Training Academy Olympic Roma è una società sportiva della Capitale che unisce Pallanuoto di Serie A1 e Nuoto Artistico, con un settore giovanile in costante crescita e una visione che va oltre il risultato in vasca.

Fondata da Mario Fiorillo, Campione Olimpico e oggi Presidente, la TAOR rappresenta un modello preciso nel panorama sportivo italiano: un progetto socio-sportivo e imprenditoriale che promuove lo sport come strumento di educazione, inclusione e sviluppo umano.

Dalla prima squadra di Pallanuoto in Serie A1 alle giovanili maschili e femminili, fino al settore di Nuoto Artistico con un team di livello nazionale, ogni atleta cresce in un ambiente fondato su valori di rispetto, impegno, disciplina e spirito di squadra.

Il nostro obiettivo è duplice:
- Formare atleti di alto livello capaci di competere ai massimi standard nazionali;
- Crescere persone consapevoli, in grado di portare nella vita i principi dello sport.

La Training Academy Olympic Roma è anche un punto di riferimento per imprese, istituzioni e partner che credono nel valore sociale dello sport. Attraverso progetti educativi, eventi solidali e attività sul territorio, costruiamo un ecosistema che unisce sport, scuola e comunità.

Siamo convinti che la vera vittoria non sia solo il trofeo, ma la crescita collettiva di chi crede nel nostro percorso: atleti, famiglie, allenatori e imprenditori che condividono la stessa visione.

 Training Academy Olympic Roma

Scopri di più sul nostro progetto: https://fiorilloacademy.it

Name: Schweizerischer Schachbund
Description:
Der Schweizerische Schachbund (SSB) ging 1995 aus der Fusion des Schweizerischen Schachverbandes (SSV, gegründet 1889) und des Schweizerischen Arbeiterschachbundes (SASB, gegründet 1923) hervor. Er vereint 225 schweizerische Schachclubs und 5591 Mitglieder und bietet ein breites Spektrum an Dienstleistungen für die Schachspielerinnen und Schachspieler der Schweiz.

Der SSB ist Mitglied der European Chess Union (ECU) und Gründungsmitglied des 1924 gegründeten Weltschachbundes (Fédération Internationale des Échecs, FIDE), des zweitgrössten Sportverbandes der Welt. Der SSB ist seit 2000 Mitglied von Swiss Olympic.

Der SSB gibt die Schweizerische Schachzeitung heraus und pflegt die Homepage des SSB.

Wir fördern den Schachsport und setzen uns vor allem für die Förderung der Junioren ein. Neben den sozialen Aspekten ist es wichtig, dass unsere talentierten Junioren leistungsorientiert gefördert werden, damit später die bestmögliche Grundlage für eine problemlose Integration in die Nationalkader gewährleistet ist.

Name: Les exSEPtionnelles
Description:
Équipage 104 engagé pour la Ligue contre la sclérose en plaques.
 
En nous engageant pour la Ligue française contre la sclérose en plaques nous ambitionnons de lever plus de fonds que le budget du rallye pour reverser le solde à la ligue. 
Le neurologue et le traitement de fond ne sont que 2 pièces du puzzle complexe de la vie du patient diagnostiqué d’une SEP (Sclérose En Plaques), les missions de la Ligue Française contre la Sclérose en Plaques vont bien au-delà du soutien à la recherche.
La Ligue Française contre la Sclérose en Plaques accompagne les personnes concernées par la Sclérose en Plaques autant les malades, que les familles, les aidants et tous ceux qui gravitent dans l’entourage du patient.
La Ligue Française contre la Sclérose en Plaques sensibilise le grand public, les personnes concernées, les autorités sanitaires et les médias à la maladie et ce qu'elle implique au quotidien.

Name: Bonnyrigg Rose Football Club
Description:
Bonnyrigg Rose Football Club is a Scottish football club from the town of Bonnyrigg, Midlothian. Formed in 1881 and nicknamed the Rose, the team plays in Scottish League Two, having been promoted after winning the Lowland Football League in 2021–22.

Their home ground is New Dundas Park, and they have traditionally played in red and white hoops. They have won the Scottish Junior Cup twice, in 1966 and in 1978, as well as finishing runners-up in 1972. Their 6–1 defeat of Whitburn in 1966 is a joint record margin of victory in a Scottish Junior Cup final.  Bonnyrigg won the East Region Super League championship four times during their membership, making them the league's most successful side.

Name: SVTF - Schweizer Verein Textilfachleute
Description:
Der Schweizer Verein Textilfachleute (SVTF) stellt sich die Aufgabe, Textilspezialisten aller Stufen sowie Personen aus benachbarten Fachgebieten eine Heimat zu geben. Der SVTF ist ein Zusammenschluss im Sinne von Art 60 ff. des Schweizerischen Zivilgesetzbuches. Ziele sind unter anderem die berufliche Aus- und Weiterbildung und die Pflege der Kontakte unter den Mitgliedern sowie zu anderen Vereinigungen mit vergleichbarer Zielsetzung – auch ausserhalb der Schweiz.

Der SVTF setzt damit die jahrzehntelange Tradition der Schweizer Vereinigungen für Textil- und Veredlungstechnik fort.

Der Verein finanziert sich aus Mitgliedsbeiträgen und Spenden. Er unterstützt auch Studierende, die sich für die faszinierende Welt der Textilien begeistern. Der Vorstand besteht aus neun Mitgliedern und wählt aus seinen Reihen im 2-Jahresrhythmus den Präsidenten. Weitere Vorstandsmitglieder sind in den Ressorts Weiterbildung, GV-Organisation und Kommunikation tätig. Seit einiger Zeit gibt es den «Verein im Verein» - weTEX – das Netzwerk, ausgerichtet auf junge Menschen, die sich für einen intensiven Austausch in der Textilbranche interessieren. Damit bietet der SVTF jungen Erwachsenen in der Schweizer Textilbranche einen Mehrwert.

Name: Jimbee Cartagena Costa Cálida
Description: Jimbee Cartagena encarna la pasión y ambición por el fútbol sala en Cartagena. Desde su fundación en 1991, el club ha superado desafíos, resurgiendo con fuerza después de un descenso en 2011. Bajo el liderazgo de los hermanos Jiménez Bosque y la propiedad de Jimbofresh desde 2018, el equipo se ha convertido en un referente en la LNFS. La temporada 2020-2021 fue histórica, con el club proclamándose campeón de la primera vuelta y destacando en la Copa de España. En la temporada 2023-2024 el club consiguió su primer título, la Supercopa de España FS, y posteriormente el importante título de liga de Primera División FS, dándole la clasificación a la UEFA Futsal Champions League. Cabe destacar que la conexión con la afición, representada por diversas peñas han cimentado la identidad única de Jimbee Cartagena. El Club no solo es una entidad deportiva, sino una historia de éxito y pasión compartida con la ciudad, así como una corporación comprometida con los valores sociales.

Name: VVTB4Business
Description:
Bewegen is belangrijk. Voor jong en oud, fit blijven is essentieel voor lichaam en geest. Onze voetbalvereniging kan daar een belangrijke bijdrage in leveren. De voetbalsport zorgt voor beweging in teamverband en dat levert een belangrijke bijdrage in het sociale welzijn. Contact met anderen zorgt voor een bredere kijk op het leven, voorkomt eenzaamheid en zorgt voor een gezond gevoel voor
verantwoordelijkheid. Het is daarom dat VV Terneuzense Boys er alles aan wil doen om iedereen de mogelijkheid te bieden om te sporten. Dat start bij de kleinste jeugd, vanaf 5 jaar zijn jongens en meisjes bij ons van harte welkom. Beginnend spelenderwijs groeit dat naar ‘echt’ voetballen. In alle leeftijdscategorieën hebben
we meerdere teams, van de kleinste jeugd tot en met de senioren, een dames- en een G-team. Daarbij gaat het zeker niet alleen om prestatie, maar vooral om plezier te hebben op ieders eigen niveau. Naast het voetballen speelt het sociale aspect, de gezelligheid een belangrijke rol. Ongeacht afkomst, geslacht of beperking doet iedereen mee en wordt iedereen geaccepteerd binnen onze vereniging.
Daar zijn we trots op en daar maken we ons als bestuur ook hard voor.
Met recht stellen we dan ook dat wij een inclusieve vereniging zijn. Iedereen kan bij ons terecht en iedereen kan zichzelf zijn zoals hij of zij is. Samen maken we de vereniging, zo is ons streven. Om dit alles te kunnen realiseren zijn een solide, stabiele organisatie en goede duurzame faciliteiten van essentieel belang.

Doelstelling sponsorcommissie
Inkomsten genereren middels een sponsornetwerk wat bijdraagt aan de continuïteit en inclusiviteit van VV Terneuzense boys met als tegenprestatie ondersteuning van de sponsor zijn marketing- en communicatiestrategieën en het aanbieden van het sponsornetwerk.

Name: ProFit X
Description:
ProFitX: Revolutionizing Talent Evaluation and Management Through Advanced AI

ProFitX is an innovative, AI-driven platform designed to revolutionize how talent is evaluated, managed, and optimized across industries. By harnessing both structured and unstructured data, ProFitX delivers unparalleled insights that combine qualitative and quantitative analysis to drive superior decision-making in human capital management and performance optimization.


Advanced AI Capabilities and Impact

ProFitX’s proprietary AI delivers precision and actionable insights for human capital management:

Pre-Match/Live Game Strategy: Optimizes lineups and game strategy while providing in-depth opponent scouting.

Talent Evaluation: Identifies high-talent costs to support strategic decisions.

Financial Planning/Salary Cap: Assists in salary cap planning and highlights team-friendly or outperforming contracts.

Player Development: Strengthens prospect pools and supports personalized development plans.

Competitive Balance: Promotes transparency across leagues, teams, and players.

Benchmarking/Storytelling: Provides data-driven narratives to display player evolution and progress.






Proven Success in Sports Analytics

Dallas Mavericks Partnership: Optimized contract evaluations for all roster transactions that made the 2024 NBA Finals. Instrumental in enhancing player development operations, and team performances. 

Contract Support: Influenced over 250 NBA contracts in the last three years using historical performance data and predictive analytics, delivering over $200M in total contract value.


Athlete & Agent Collaboration: Worked with over 20 NBA players during free agency as well as top sports agents like CAA and Jason Glushon helping drive over $200M in NBA Contract Value. 


Media Validation: Models and data have been featured in leading publications, including ESPN, Forbes, Bleacher Report, and Sports Illustrated.Sports Industry Expansion

Name: ELAN MARIVALOIS
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page Linkedln officiel de l’ELAN MARIVALOIS.

Club lotois née en 2016 de la fusion entre 3 clubs : l’EFLS 96, la FLAM et l’UFM. 

Son siège social se situe à Lacapelle-Marival (46).

Aujourd’hui, l’Elan Marivalois regroupe des joueurs, joueuses, dirigeants, bénévoles de plus de 10 communes aux alentours, plus de 270 licenciés(e)s participent au développement de ce club dynamique et ambitieux. 
 
L’ELAN MARIVALOIS est composé de 4 équipes séniors masculines (dont l’équipe première en Régional 3), 1 équipe féminine (en Départemental 1), 1 équipe vétérans et une école de foot accueillant des jeunes de 6 à 19 ans.
 
S'associer à l’ELAN MARIVALOIS, c'est associer son image à un club ambitieux, qui vise à développer la pratique du football pour tous.

S'associer à l’ELAN MARIVALOIS, c'est aussi soutenir un club impliqué sur le territoire bien au-delà de ses résultats sportifs. Plus qu'une équipe de football, l’ELAN MARIVALOIS souhaite être vecteur de valeurs éducatrices et morales. 

Véritable créateur de lien social depuis son existence, notre ADN repose sur celui des grandes valeurs sportives : Esprit d’équipe, Convivialité, Respect, Humilité

L’ELAN MARIVALOIS a l'ambition de fédérer et dynamiser le territoire lotois autour d'un projet global (associatif, sportif, éducatif, économique et social), innovant et exemplaire.

Retrouvez les informations essentielles de l’ELAN MARIVALOIS, les nombreux partenaires qui nous soutiennent dans notre développement, les actions et évènements mis en place par l’école de foot et le club séniors.

L’ELAN MARIVALOIS constitue un réseau de 50 partenaires majeurs et 60 autres partenaires, membres dans le Lot et l’Occitanie et se positionne comme un acteur dynamique et en pleine évolution pour les entreprises locales et nationales. 

www.elanmarivalois.com

Facebook : @Élan Marivalois

Instagram : @elan_marivalois

Contact : marivalois.elan@gmail.com

Nous comptons actuellement près de 500 licenciés se regroupant en 35 équipes, allant du micro-basket (3-5 ans) aux équipes séniores.

Le CJS Geispolsheim, c'est plus qu'un club !

* Notre équipe phare, les Indomptables, est une équipe féminine évoluant en Nationale 1, soit le 3e niveau français, depuis 15 saisons consécutives.

* Nommé Club Elite Formation par la FFBB, nous portons une attention particulière à l'éducation des jeunes en leur inculquant des valeurs fortes telles que la citoyenneté, le respect, le partage, et la solidarité.

* C'est grâce aux 70 bénévoles et aux plus de 90 partenaires que le club s'est inscrit comme une marque forte du basket féminin français.

* Nous prônons le basket festif, dans une ambiance familiale. Ainsi, nous avons un club partenaires que nous réunissons lors de divers événements : petits-déjeuners, afterworks, soirées partenaires, et salon VIP les soirs de match. Le but étant de mettre en relation nos partenaires dans un cadre sportif et de convivialité.

Si vous souhaitez être en contact avec notre club pour toutes raisons, n'hésitez pas à nous envoyer un message sur notre messagerie LinkedIn !

With spring-loaded floors and apparatus’ ranging from balance beams, bars, rings, and foam pits, we are fully equipped to cater to the needs of everyone. Our goal is to help gymnasts, whether young or old, achieve their full potential through exceptional gymnastics coaching and management, in a child-friendly and professional environment.

Apart from being just another gymnastics club, we consider ourselves as a family club, where gymnasts and parents are an integral pillar within the organization. Each member of our coaching team is experienced in their domain, nationally accredited, and, more importantly, passionate about what they do. To know more about our artistic gymnastics classes in Dubai, send us an inquiry today!

Name: Montevideo Cricket Club
Description:
The Montevideo Cricket Club (MVCC), founded in 1861, is the oldest sports club in Uruguay and the dean of sporting institutions in the country. Internationally, it is recognized as the eighth oldest rugby-playing club in the world, according to the Twickenham Museum, making it a historical landmark in both Uruguayan and global sports. In addition to its rich traditions in cricket and rugby, the club has been a pioneer in promoting other sports such as field hockey and tennis.

With a long history and a strong commitment to fostering amateur sports, the Montevideo Cricket Club has played a crucial role in the development of sports in Uruguay. Its premises, surrounded by extensive green areas, boast modern facilities for both sports and social activities, positioning MVCC as a key reference in the social and sporting life of Montevideo.

Name: Club Argentino de Futbol
Description:
El Club Argentino de Fútbol de Madrid, España, nace con la ilusión de representar esa pasión única que los argentinos sentimos por el fútbol; lejos de la Argentina, cerca de los cientos de miles de argentinos que vivimos hoy en España.

Somos un club de fútbol de España, con pasión argentina.

Entre finales del S. XIX y principios del S. XX, la gran inmigración española en Argentina sentó raíces que hoy se mantienen vivas a través de hijos, nietos y bisnietos argentinos que han sabido conservar rasgos que nos identifican a ambos países.

Como un giro de la historia, el Club Argentino de Fútbol nace en 2023 en Madrid, como consecuencia natural de una creciente y con tante inmigración argentina hacia España que da continuidad temporal a esa vinculación histórica entre ambos países.

Ahora, esa hermandad será a través de una pasión compartida: el fútbol.

Así como en 1956 nacía el Club Deportivo Español en Buenos Aires, con la misma filosofía e ilusión: Ser un espacio deportivo y social de encuentro de argentinos que siembran semillas de progreso en una nueva tierra, de confraternidad, de colaboración mutua y amistad.

Como todos nosotros, soñamos con ver a nuestros hijos, argentinos y españoles, crecer felices, con mejor calidad de vida y más oportunidades de progreso. Pero al mismo tiempo, sentimos la necesidad de sembrar y cultivar en ellos el eterno sentimiento de amor que sentimos por nuestro país.

Name: Special Olympics Österreich
Description:
Special Olympics ist die größte internationale Sportbewegung für Menschen mit intellektueller Beeinträchtigung.
Für mehr als 4,2 Millionen Sportler:innen (Kinder ab 8 Jahre, Jugendliche und Erwachsene) bietet Special Olympics weltweit in mehr als 170 Ländern ganzjährige Trainings- und Wettkampfmöglichkeiten in 32 verschiedenen olympischen Sportarten an. Diese Sportarten (bzw. ihr Regelwerk) sind so gestaltet, dass möglichst viele Menschen mit intellektueller Beeinträchtigung daran teilnehmen und sich ihrer Beeinträchtigung entsprechend mit annähernd gleich starken Sportlern messen können.
In Österreich haben mehr als 2.000 Sportler:innen eine Lizenz gelöst, Special Olympics Österreich bietet jährlich mehr als 200 Veranstaltungen und 250 Trainingsangebote in allen Bundesländern an.

Name: Girls Day Out - Women in Sport
Description:
Girls Day Out are one-day event for girls aged 5-16 years to try new sports, meet professional female athletes, learn new skills and be inspired.

It’s all about giving girls a go at sports they might not have tried or want to learn more about. We want to encourage healthy bodies, healthy minds – and maybe even inspire our next generation of female superstars.

Our 45 minute, mini-clinics are small and focused, giving the young girls a high-energy, fun taste of sports offered locally in the Hunter and played by incredible female athletes at the highest levels.

The mini-clinics are run by professional sportswomen, top female athletes and coaching staff from the sporting codes. The athletes & staff running the clinics spend time with the girls teaching them the skills of the sport and talking about what it’s like to be a top-level sportswoman.

The young girls are given a chance to see these extraordinary athletes are normal humans, who have achieved their goals through hard work and determination. It teaches our young ones that their dreams are possible and achievable – whether that’s to play professional sport or to be anything they wish to be, because they are face to face with women who have made it happen!

Name: Stichting Beyond Fighting | Kickboxfit Schiedam
Description:
Kickboxfit is een non-contact vorm van  kickboksen. Er is geen sparring of fysiek contact. Er wordt geslagen en geschopt op de bokszakken, trapkussens, armpads of bokshandschoenen/ scheenbeschermers. Dus geen blauwe ogen of andere lelijke blessures.
De nadruk van deze lessen ligt op het sterker worden van lichaam en geest. 
Lekker even een uurtje “het hoofd leeg maken”.

Voor de aller jongste hebben wij de  kickboxfun les. In de deze les krijgen de kinderen op een veilige manier de technieken mee. Dit is goed voor hun zelfvertrouwen. Ook hier is er geen sparring. De lessen eindigen we altijd met een leuk spel. 

De lessen zijn laagdrempelig. IEDEREEN kan meedoen. Ook al heb je nog nooit gesport.

Op zondag is het bij ons familiedag. Tijdens deze training kunnen ouders samen met hun kind(eren) trainen. Dit verhoogt het enthousiasme en plezier bij zowel ouder als kind.

Lijkt het je leuk om een keer met ons mee te doen en op een veilige en gezellige manier te werken aan weerbaarheid, conditie, versterken van jouw lichaam. Of wil jij gewoon even jouw hoofd helemaal leegmaken door flink uit te halen op een van  onze bokszakken?

Meld je dan aan via beyond-fighting.nl/aanvragen-proefles/

Je krijgt standaard 3 proeflessen helemaal gratis. Zo kun je meerdere lessen volgen om voor jezelf te bepalen wat jij van onze lessen vindt.

Wil jij een beeld krijgen van onze lessen of op de hoogte blijven van al onze ontwikkelingen? Volg ons dan op instagram @beyondfighting.

Name: TraffordFC
Description:
Website: traffordfc.com
Twitter/X: @FCTrafford
Trafford TV: www.youtube.com/@TraffordFCTV
Instagram: www.instagram.com/traffordfootballclub/
Brief History:
Trafford FC est. 1990. David Brown, John Harrison, David Law, Bill Whitten the founders. Originally North Trafford FC sharing Shawe View in Urmston with Trafford Borough RL Club, we began our journey in the Cheshire FL. Under manager Dave Law. The club rose through the non-league pyramid reaching the NW Counties League in 1992, and winning its first trophy, a Divisional Cup, in 94. During this period the club gained sole tenancy of Shawe View, built stands & floodlights, and generally improved the facilities to what you see today. The club won the NW Counties League Title in 1997 thus reaching the Northern Premier League. Dave Law stepped down as manager in 1998 after leading the club to three promotions, a League Title, 2 cup wins, 4 further finals, and reaching the last-16 of the FA Vase in 1996 (losing to the eventual winners). Mark Molyneaux took over and guided the club to victory in the NPL Presidents Cup before moving on, whereupon a tough spell of seasons followed. Manager Joey Dunn was succeeded by Mike McKenzie, both working hard to turn results around but the club slipped back into the NW Counties in 2003. For the next 4 seasons Danny Johnson held the reigns and led us on some excellent runs in the FA Cup/FA Vase before Ged Kielty's two years in charge (07-09) saw us win the NWCL Title (taking us back to the NPL) and Presidents Cup. Playing Legend Garry Vaughan then held the reigns for 5 years, leading the club to its highest ever level - NPL Premier Division & a Manchester Premier Cup win. Following a short period under interim boss Graham Heathcote, Tom Baker's 5 seasons from 2015 saw us reach the play-offs & win the NPL League Cup. Post-Covid we were led for 3 years by Danny Caldecott; Since October 2023 by Karl Marginson. We play in NPL West Division, the 8th Tier of English football.

Name: Tenhults IF
Description:
Tenhults IF was founded in 1912 and is one of the oldest football clubs in Småland.
Today, the club has four sports sections: football, floorball, tennis and padel.

Tenhults IF’s Mission

Tenhults IF’s mission is to offer sports activities for people living in and around Tenhult. The aim is to contribute to people’s physical, mental, social, and cultural development.

Vision

Tenhults IF is a community-based sports club that creates the conditions for developing and maintaining a lifelong interest in sports.

Core Values

Tenhults IF is a club for everyone. Our core values are based on four guiding principles:

Community

With us, everyone should feel comfortable, feel well, and develop in a positive club environment.
The group should serve as an inspiration for togetherness and growth.

Joy

Joy is a driving force for participating in sports and contributes to interest and engagement.

Participation

With us, everyone should be able to take part based on their own abilities.
All participants are encouraged to be involved in decision-making and take responsibility according to their age and maturity.

Respect

With us, we show respect for everyone, regardless of gender, gender identity or expression, ethnic or social background, religion or belief, ability, sexual orientation, or age.

Contact via email: kontakt@tif.se

Name: Comité de l'Ain tennis de table
Description:
Le comité de l’Ain tennis de table est une association loi 1901, qui a vu le jour en 1967, par
Gérard Festaz. Son siège social se situe à Mézériat. Le Comité fait partie de la ligue Auvergne
Rhône-Alpes qui est affilié à la FFTT et regroupe toutes les associations sportives pratiquant le
tennis de table. Il rassemble actuellement 23 clubs dans le département de l’Ain pour 1225 licenciés.

Le comité de l’Ain tennis de table a toujours eu le même objectif depuis sa fondation :
« Grouper toutes les associations sportives pratiquant le tennis de table sur le territoire du
département de l’Ain ».

Le Comité de l’Ain tennis de table a pour objectif :
• De développer et de coordonner la pratique du tennis de table sous toutes ses formes
dans le département de l’Ain,
• D’organiser les compétitions départementales de tennis de table individuelles ou par
équipe pour toutes les catégories,
• De défendre les intérêts moraux et matériels du tennis de table du Département.

Name: Champions Cricket Club
Description:
About Champions Cricket Club
At Champions Cricket Club, we are passionate about nurturing the future of cricket. We understand the dreams and aspirations of young cricketers aged between 12-19, and we are here to turn those dreams into reality.
Our Mission
Our mission is to provide a professional platform for aspiring cricketers to grow and excel in the sport. We are committed to honing their skills, instilling a competitive spirit, and preparing them for the larger stage. Our goal is to be the stepping stone to a successful cricketing career.
What Sets Us Apart?
Professional Environment: Champions Cricket Club provides a professional and highly competitive environment for young cricketers. We believe that early exposure to challenging conditions is the key to their growth.
Regular Matches: We ensure that our players have ample opportunities to showcase their abilities by organizing regular matches and competitions. This exposure helps them gain confidence and experience.
Holistic Development: Our approach goes beyond the cricket pitch. We believe in holistic development, including mental conditioning, physical fitness, and character building.
Age-Appropriate Teams: We have teams tailored for different age groups (12-19), ensuring that each player gets a suitable platform to thrive.
Join Us on this Journey
Champions Cricket Club invites young cricketers with dreams in their eyes and fire in their hearts to join us on this exhilarating journey. Whether you are a budding talent or a seasoned player looking to refine your skills, our club is the place for you.
We are here to make champions. We are here to make dreams come true. Join Champions Cricket Club and be a part of the future of cricket!

Description:

Name: North London Shamrocks GAA
Description:
The North London Shamrocks GFC was formed in 2005 by the amalgamation of St Theresa’s (Ponders End and Shannon Rovers) and Sam Maguires (Wood Green). The club currently boasts two adult teams (senior and reserves), six youth teams comprised of under 7’s, 9’s, 11’s, 13’s, 15’s, and 17’s, and three girls' teams at under 12’s, 14’s, and 16’s.

The North London Shamrocks compete at the senior level in London, following a successful 2014 where the club captured the Intermediate Championship, the Murphy Cup, and the Shiels Cup, while finishing as runners-up in the All Britain Championship. Building on this legacy of success, the club proudly won the London Senior Championship in 2024.

Our mission is to promote Gaelic games while fostering a strong sense of community, teamwork, and personal development. Over the years, North London Shamrocks has nurtured talent at all levels, from youth teams to senior squads, providing a pathway for players to develop their skills and enjoy the sport in a competitive and supportive environment.

At North London Shamrocks, we take great pride in our youth development programs, offering opportunities for young players to learn the game, build confidence, and develop leadership skills. Our commitment to nurturing the next generation of athletes is demonstrated through our thriving underage teams, who train and compete under the guidance of experienced coaches.

Beyond the pitch, North London Shamrocks is dedicated to building lasting relationships within the community. We celebrate Irish culture and heritage through various social events, fostering a deep connection between members and the wider Irish community in London. Whether through our games or our social activities, the club plays an essential role in bringing people together.

With the support of our generous sponsors and a passionate membership base, North London Shamrocks continues to grow, making a significant impact both on and off the field.

Notre mission est de promouvoir la pratique des sports d’hiver d’une part, et d’autre part de former la relève au ski de compétition. Pour cela, les meilleurs athlètes de 11 à 15 ans sont sélectionnés dans les ski-clubs, dans les disciplines suivantes:
- Ski alpin
- Ski de fond
- Freestyle (ski et snowboard)
- Biathlon
- Saut à ski et combiné nordique

Name: Minnesota Distance Elite
Description: Minnesota Distance Elite (MDE) improves the competitiveness of post-collegiate American distance runners. Since its formation in 2001 as a 501(c)(3) non-profit, MDE developed an Olympian and 24 National Champions in events ranging from the 1500 meters up through the marathon.

Name: Global Sports Initiatives
Description: GSI provides the future of fan engagement with athletes, teams, leagues and their sponsors.

Name: FSV Berolina Stralau 1901 e.V.
Description:
Der FSV Berolina Stralau 1901 e.V. ist mit über 650 aktiven Mitgliedern und 30 Teams der größte Fußballverein in Friedrichshain. Wir bieten Kindern, Jugendlichen und Erwachsenen die Möglichkeit, Fußball auf verschiedenen Leistungsniveaus zu spielen – vom Breitensport bis zum leistungsorientierten Wettkampf.

Unsere Mission geht über den Sport hinaus: Wir vermitteln Werte wie Respekt, Fair-Play und Teamgeist und fördern die persönliche Entwicklung unserer Spieler*innen. Unser qualifiziertes Trainerteam sorgt mit modernen Trainingsmethoden für eine optimale fußballerische Ausbildung.

Auf unserem Heimspielort, dem Lasker-Sportplatz, schaffen wir die besten Bedingungen für unsere Teams. Neben dem regelmäßigen Spielbetrieb organisieren wir Trainingslager, Leistungstests und Vereinsveranstaltungen, die unser Vereinsleben und den Kiez bereichern.

Berolina Stralau – Fußball. Gemeinschaft. Zukunft.

Name: Castrol Ford Team Türkiye
Description: Castrol Ford Team Turkiye is a motorsport and rally team established with the official partnership of Ford Turkey and Castrol Turkey. The team has won many national and international titles and success. It is based in Istanbul, Turkey and has been found in 1998.

Name: Blueband Sports
Description:
Official Sports Partner of INRC. Blueband Sports is one of India’s leading sports management companies, specializing in motorsport, talent development, large-scale event branding, and athletic development.

Blueband Sports has been actively associated with motorsports, primarily rallying from 2017 where we sponsor riders participating in 4-wheeler categories. 

In line with our vision and mission, Blueband Sports partners with national sports bodies and organizers to conduct, organize, and manage mega sporting events.

Name: Ajman Police Sports and Shooting Club
Description:
"About Ajman Club and Its Journey: What Sets Us Apart from the Rest

Ajman Police Sports and Shooting Club is dedicated to enhancing the quality of both health and sports in one comprehensive facility. We offer a wide range of sporting activities while delivering top-tier services marked by quality and excellence."

Name: Padel Datalab
Description:
We provide reliable data and actionable insights to help the padel industry make smarter decisions and achieve sustainable growth.
Combining data, market intelligence, and tailored analysis, we empower clients to understand trends, identify opportunities, and strengthen their position within the rapidly expanding global padel industry.

Name: Revel Sailing Team
Description:
Founded in 2023 by students from the degree programs in Nautical Engineering, Yacht Design, and Nautical Product Design at the University Campus of La Spezia, the REVEL SAILING TEAM was born out of a shared passion for the sea and sailing. Our team is dedicated to innovation and sustainability in the nautical Racing world.

Comprising 40 students, our team is organized into four main departments: Management, Project, Production, and Shore Team. Together, we are working on designing and building a 4.6-meter sailboat using innovative and sustainable materials.

The REVEL SAILING TEAM was established to create a highly specialized group where students can blend the theoretical knowledge gained from their academic studies with practical, hands-on experiences. Our current focus is on participating in the international regatta 1001VELACup 2024, proudly representing the newly established La Spezia University Campus, which is dedicated to the nautical sector.

Our achievements are made possible thanks to the support from the University of Genoa, Promostudi, CUS Genova, and the La Spezia Naval League. Additionally, we receive daily backing from our numerous sponsors: Harken Italia, Quantum Sails, SangiorgioMarine, Gottifredi&Maffioli, Mureadritta, Mascherpa, Studio Premoli, and the La Spezia Sailing Club.

Name: Forum Sport
Description:
Forum Sport is een voetbalvereniging in Voorburg en telt ongeveer 1200 leden. Hiermee is Forum Sport een van de grootste voetbalclubs van de Haagse regio. De club is 1 juli 1998 ontstaan na de fusie tussen de zaterdagclub DEVJO en zondagclub SV Voorburg.

Forum Sport is een grote, gezellige en laagdrempelige voetbalclub voor jeugd-, heren- en  vrouwenvoetbal, waar prestatief en recreatief voetbal prima samengaan. De vereniging vindt het belangrijk dat eenieder de gelegenheid krijgt op zijn eigen wijze deel uit te maken van die vereniging.

Forum Sport staat midden in de Voorburgse samenleving door plaatselijke en regionale 
maatschappelijke activiteiten te organiseren en te ondersteunen. Wij willen aandacht blijven geven 
aan de maatschappelijke functie van onze vereniging en onze leden de kans geven hun sociale 
vaardigheden te ontwikkelen.

Name: Eden Polo Club
Description:
Unwind amidst the natural surroundings at Eden Polo Club, Gurugram.
Horse Riding | Polo Training | Aravalli Trail Rides | Garden Café
#horseriding

Name: PSIS Semarang
Description: PSIS Semarang is a football club based out of Indonesia.

Name: VV Amstelveen Heemraad
Description: Amstelveen Heemraad is een bloeiende en groeiende voetbalvereniging in Amstelveen. Wij voetballen met plezier, passie, strijd, sportiviteit en inzet. Iedereen moet de ruimte krijgen om, met plezier, te voetballen op zijn/haar eigen niveau.

Name: Blees Lentilly
Description: Club de Basket situé à Lentilly

Name: Comité Départemental de Loire Atlantique de Badminton - CD44
Description: Le Comité Départemental de Badminton de Loire Atlantique (CD44) est un organe déconcentré de la Fédération française de badminton qui promeut la pratique du badminton dans le 44. Il organise des formations, des championnats, des stages à destination des adultes et des jeunes joueurs. Son rôle est également d'accompagner les 48 clubs de Loire Atlantique dans leur développement en déclinant le projet fédéral.

Name: Yacht Club Adriaco
Description:
Nei primi mesi del lontano 1903, un gruppo di yachtsmen della “Società delle Regate”, spinto dal desiderio di incoraggiare la vita marinaresca e lo sport della vela, decide di costituire una Società Velica denominata Yacht Club Adriaco.
Spinti da un forte spirito irredentistico, i primi soci scelgono come colori sociali il verde ed il rosso che, sventolanti sul guidone sociale, in mezzo al bianco delle vele, riproduceva l’amato tricolore italico che, in quel periodo veniva badito dalla vigile gendarmeria austriaca.
Lo Yacht Club Adriaco può vantarsi così della qualifica di più antica Società velica dell’Adriatico e si onora di numerose partecipazioni olimpiche, di tre medaglie olimpiche, di svariate medaglie d’oro al valore atletico, numerose vittorie in campionati nazionali, europei e mondiali e dell’ambito riconoscimento della “Stella d’oro al merito sportivo” seguita nel 2009 dall’ancora più prestigioso “Collare d’oro al merito sportivo”.

Name: Fryslan Basketball
Description:
De basketball community van Fryslan! 

 Talentontwikkeling – We investeren in jong talent en bieden kansen om te groeien, zowel op als naast het veld.

 Basketball activiteiten & events – Spannende evenementen en activiteiten voor spelers en fans van alle leeftijden!

 Verenigingsondersteuning – Wij helpen verenigingen met alles wat ze nodig hebben om te groeien en succesvol te zijn.

Name: Taxan[TRIA]
Description: TAXAN[TRIA], de Turnhoutse triatlon club promoot triatlon en duatlon in al zijn facetten voor zowel de starter als de doorwinterde tri- en duatleet.

Name: AMERICAN AMPUTEE SOCCER ASSOCIATION
Description:
The official page of the American Amputee Soccer Association and US National Amputee Soccer Teams. 

On a mission to unite a community of #AmputeeAthletes through the advancement & awareness of recreational & competitive soccer programs at the local, regional, and international levels. Join our movement! #SoccerForAll

Name: DMHC Shinty
Description: Driebergse Mixed Hockey Club te Driebergen

Name: Sportma - Sports Booking and Social Network
Description:
Discover Sportma, the all-in-one app for sports enthusiasts! Easily book exciting sports activities while connecting with fellow sports lovers. Sportma simplifies how you experience sports, whether you're a seasoned athlete, a casual enthusiast, or simply curious about new sports experiences.

Key Features:

 Easy Booking: Reserve courts, classes, workouts, and more with a few taps, wherever you are.

 Social Media Aspect: Share your sports achievements, connect with other athletes, and build communities around your favorite sports.

 Ratings and Reviews: Provide feedback on the activities you've joined and discover top options through user reviews.

 Connect with Clubs: Join local sports clubs and stay informed about events and special activities.

 Personalized Recommendations: Explore new sports activities based on your interests and location.

Download Sportma today to experience sports in a simpler, more social, and more thrilling way than ever before!

Name: AFHP Coaching
Description:
AFHP Australian Rules High Performance Coaching provides coaching resources, education and  consultancy for players & coaches from the community to the professional levels.

We founded the world’s largest online Australian rules football coaching resource platform. Designed by coaches and analysts from the professional competitions.

From creating game plans & strategies to designing training sessions from our drill library, our educational info graphic videos allow members to learn the ins and outs of Australian Football theory designed by football analysts and coaches from the professional environments. Our membership resource platform is like a streaming service but for football intellects. 

For more information about our platform, either click the link to go to our website contact us directly.

Established in early 2018, initially we provided clubs with training resources, game plan graphics and private coaching for players individually, but now we have grown to become the national provider for three of the skill acquisition coaching education courses on behalf of the AFLCA (Coaches association) and AFL Sports ready. We have vastly become renowned for the highest quality coaching resource centre for Australian rules football within a short matter of time. We have consulted to official AFL Clubs and the industry, along with hundreds of community clubs to. 

At AFHP Coaching our goal is to improve the training, learning, playing and coaching performance of teams and individuals using skill acquisition coaching methods. Our priority is to “Enhance the game“. We can assure that your football program and individual performance will have a major improvement, you will be enhanced from the coaching education resources of professionals that have previously worked within the Australian Football League.

Name: Futsal Club Dijon Clénay
Description:
Club historique de futsal situé à Dijon et Clénay

Name: Actonians LFC
Description:
Actonians WFC is a England Football  Accredited Club affiliated to Middlesex FA based in Acton West London. 

Actonians WFC aim to develop the whole player from foundation to first team and allow all women and girls the opportunity to play in a fun, friendly and inclusive environment.  

2025-26 Senior Teams

First Team - FA Women's National League Div 1 SE (Tier 4)
Reserves - London & SE Regional Women's Football League Div 1 N v(Tier 6)
3rd Team - Greater London Women's Football League Div 1 S (Tier 7)

All youth teams compete in the Capital Girls League.  School years starting Sept 2025)

U13s - Year 8
U14s - Year 9
U16s - Year 10 & 11

Recreational Football (no commitment just turn up and have fun!)

Name: Floorball-Verband Deutschland e.V.
Description:
Floorball-Verband Deutschland e. V. ist der Bundesverband und Fachsportverband, der die Sportart Floorball in Deutschland vertritt.
12 Landesverbände - mehr als 200 Vereine - über 13.000 Spieler*innen.

Name: Bozic Estriche Knights Kirchheim
Description:
Wir sind ein bodenständiger Proficlub, der keine Starallüren beheimaten möchte, sondern vor allem professionellen, teamorientierten und erfrischenden Basketball bieten will. Unser Markenzeichen ist die Nähe zu Fans, Sponsoren oder Partnern und das familiäre Umfeld mit vielen ehrenamtlichen Helfern, auf das wir sehr stolz sind und dessen Zusammenhalt wir pflegen.

Obwohl wir aus einer verhältnismäßig kleinen Stadt kommen, sorgen wir bundesweit für Aufsehen und nehmen den Kampf gegen die großen Namen immer wieder gerne auf. Das macht uns zum sportlichen Aushängeschild der Stadt und der Region Kirchheim, was auch so bleiben soll.

An unserem Slogan „Mehr als ein Spiel!“ wollen wir uns messen lassen. Für Fans und Zuschauer wollen wir stimmungsvolle Events und Spieler zum Anfassen bieten. Unseren Sponsoren wollen wir ein verlässlicher Partner sein, der möglichst optimale Bedingungen zum Netzwerken anbietet und ihnen in der Aktivierung des Sponsorships helfend zur Seite steht.

Wir sind die Knights, wir sind mehr als ein Spiel!

Name: Indonesia Snowboard Team
Description:
Indonesia Snowboard Team  , Timnas / Tim Nasional Snowboarding Indonesia, part of the Indonesian Olympic Committee.

We are from Jakarta and are based in Switzerland.   

We train in LAAX, the freestyle epicenter of Europe. And we travel to Saitama Quest in Japan for airbag training, and to Cardrona, New Zealand, chasing the snow.

Name: Hattrick.cl
Description:
Agencia especializada en la representación de futbolistas y entrenadores profesionales de Fútbol.
Nuestro objetivo principal es la gestión de los deportistas profesionales y búsqueda de nuevos talentos femeninos y masculinos. 
Con profesionales altamente calificados en todos los ámbitos, integrados dentro del organigrama de la organización en el ámbito legal, comercial, deportivo, social, nutricional y psicológico

Name: Ball on Board
Description: Welcome to the LinkedIn page of Ball on Board. We're dedicated to empowering student-athletes as they strive to excel in both basketball and academics, opening doors to prestigious boarding schools and colleges. We provide comprehensive support and guidance to help student-athletes to navigate through the competitive landscape of high school and college admissions. From personalized highlight videos to expert advice on recruitment and admissions, Ball on Board is here to help student-athletes both on and off the court.

Name: The Sports Cell - Department of Operational Research, University of Delhi
Description: The Department of Operational Research at the University of Delhi is known for its expertise in solving complex problems through analytical methods. As students, we've recently taken the initiative to create a Sports Club that blends this knowledge with our passion for sports. Our goal is to make the students utilize data-driven insights and strategic thinking to improve athletic performance and decision-making on the field. By applying the principles of operational research, we're committed to helping athletes and teams achieve their best.

Name: Hessischer Behinderten- und Rehabilitations- Sportverband e.V.
Description:
Der Hessische Behinderten-und Rehabilitations-Sportverband e.V. (HBRS) wurde 1951 in seiner jetzigen Form gegründet und hat heute fast 600 Vereine mit rund 65.000 Aktiven, mit rund 3.000 Übungsleiter*innen und 1.600 anerkannte Sportärzte*innen.


Der HBRS ist damit deutschlandweit der zur Zeit viertgrößte Landesfachverband im Rahmen des Deutschen Behindertensportverbandes (DBS).

In nun mehr 70 Jahren hat sich der HBRS, in den Bereichen Breiten- u. Leistungssport mit über 27 Sportarten sehr stark entwickelt. Seit fast 30 Jahren zählt der Rehabilitationssport auch zum Angebot.

Name: Ottawa Internationals Soccer Club
Description: Ottawa Internationals Soccer Club is a non-profit organization based at 1237 Newmarket St, Ottawa, Ontario, Canada.

Name: CCE37
Description:
Le Club Croisière Énergie 37 a pour vocation de faire découvrir et de partager le plaisir de la navigation sur des voiliers habitables.
Depuis 1997, notre association, affiliée à la Fédération Française de Voile, forme des pratiquants du niveau débutant à celui de chef de bord, organise des évènements nautiques et accompagne des personnes en situation de handicap sur des voiliers.

Name: AFLE - The League Europe
Description: AFLE (The League Europe) is a professional American Football league committed to building a strong, sustainable future for the sport across Europe.

Name: Rugby San Donà
Description:
Il Rugby San Donà nasce nel 1959, ad opera di un gruppo di appassionati pionieri, e dal medesimo anno è affiliata alla FIR.
Il club ha scritto pagine importanti del rugby italiano: Serie A dal 1979, quattro semifinali scudetto, e tanti atleti passati in azzurro tra Nazionale maggiore e giovanili. Tra i capitani della Nazionale cresciuti in biancoceleste ricordiamo Adriano Fedrigo, Giancarlo Pivetta e Andrea Sgorlon.

Dalla stagione 2025/26 si apre un nuovo capitolo: il consiglio guidato dal presidente Cristiano Falcier rilancia il progetto sportivo e sociale del Club, in sinergia con l’associazione La Meta Comune.

La nostra mission: essere un bene della comunità, formare persone prima ancora che atleti, promuovere inclusione, responsabilità, rispetto, lavoro di squadra. Investiamo nel settore giovanile, nelle scuole e in iniziative aperte al territorio, trasformando lo Stadio “Pacifici” in un hub di sport, crescita e partecipazione.

Se condividi questi valori, sostieni il nostro percorso: segui la pagina, vieni allo stadio, diventa partner del progetto biancoceleste.

Name: Passaro - Kitesurf & Wingfoil school Portugal
Description:
Wanna learn a new sport?

If we could give you a few characteristics of the sensations that kitesurfing and wingfoiling provide, we would say they are sports that combine navigation between sky and sea, giving you feelings of gliding and freedom that are quite incredible, making you feel like you're flying above the water. In other words, beware, these are highly addictive sports. 

Are you looking for an unusual activity for a birthday party, a team-building event, a bachelor party…? You’re in the right place!

Call us to organize a memorable trip to Portugal with your team or friends! 

 Email: hello@passarokite.com  
 Phone/WhatsApp: (+351) 963 923 539

________

You have doubts about your ability to learn kitesurfing and wingfoiling? 

Kite and wing sports are not extremely physical activities that require extraordinary fitness. These sports are accessible; the only prerequisite is knowing how to swim. There is no age limit, so it's never too late to learn!

If your doubts persist, send us a message 

See you soon on the water!  
Passaro crew

Name: ABO LDP DONZA
Description:
HEREN A - Top Division Men 1 -  Champions TDM1 23-24 & 24-25 
 DAMES A - Top Division Women

ABO LDP Donza is een fusieclub die ontstaan is in 2019 door het samenvoegen van het toenmalige BBC Latem-De Pinte en BBC Deinze-Nazareth. De club is hierdoor actief op het grondgebied van Sint-Martens-Latem, De Pinte, Nazareth, Deinze en heeft leden uit deze gemeentes maar ook heel wat omliggende gemeentes.

Met meer dan 550 leden behoort LDP Donza tot de 5 grootste clubs van België en zijn we vertegenwoordigd in alle jeugdreeksen (op zowel recreatief als competitief niveau), daarnaast hebben we zowel bij de heren als dames senior ploegen op verschillende niveau’s om elke jeugdspeler later de kans te geven door te stromen tot op zijn/haar niveau.

Bij LDP Donza streven we naar een gezonde geest in een gezond lichaam en dit binnen een familiaal gevoel.

Name: Sweat x Equity
Description:
Connect yourself outside the ordinary.
High level networking for extraordinary people.

Join us for an invitation-only event where top entrepreneurs, founders and investors come together to connect, learn and grow. Engage in tailored training sessions, exhilarating sports activities and high-impact networking opportunities that will elevate both your professional and personal potential. Don’t miss this chance to push boundaries and build invaluable relationships.

Name: Plérin Football Club
Description:
Le Plérin Football Club est un club sportif créé en 2001, né d'une fusion entre deux clubs locaux : l’Amicale Plérinaise et le Racing Club de Plérin. 

Actuellement il compte 550 licencié(e)s avec notamment 14 équipes de foot à 11. 
Nos écoles de foot sont labellisées, et offrent une pratique pour les enfants de tous âges.
Nos équipes séniors féminines évoluent aux plus hauts niveaux régionaux, R1 et R2. L'équipe fanion masculine évolue en Régional 3.

PFC

Name: Handball Club Loriol
Description:
Le HBCL a vu le jour en 1976 avec des fondatrices & fondateurs des plus engagé.e.s. 

Le club rassemble 14 équipes, l'équipe fanion masculine évolue en Nationale 3 et l'équipe fanion féminine en Prénationale. 
Les équipes garçons de -15 à N3 sont en entente avec Rhône-Eyrieux Handball. 

Faire du handball au HBCL, ça reste comme en 1976 : 
 le plaisir du jeu, 
 la convivialité, 
 le respect de l’autre et du bien commun, 
 la citoyenneté, 
 la compétence sur et autour du terrain, 
 la mixité sociale, 
 le partage. 
Au fil du temps, le Handball Club Loriolais s’est consolidé, s’est modernisé, s’est développé.

Depuis 1976 et encore aujourd'hui le club sort du simple cadre handballistique pour "faire bouger les lignes" ! L'objectif est d'avoir un impact économique-social et solidaire en s'appuyant sur la pratique sportive. 

En tant que professionnel.le.s, faire partie du HBC Loriol, c'est aussi, prendre part à un projet où l'humain et l'avenir sont au centre de nos préoccupations. 

A l'image des dernières actions menées ces dernières années : 
 création de la section hand adapté, 
constitution d'un Conseil des jeunes (9-18 ans), 
 Organisation d'un Hackathon sur la féminisation dans le sport, 
 Organisation d'Autour d'un vert (le moment pour nos partenaires)...

Alors, vous êtes prêt.e.s à faire bouger les lignes à nos côtés ? 
Rejoignez la Green Team Family !

Name: FEMDE MX
Description:
FEDERACIÓN MEXICANA DEL DEPORTE EMPRESARIAL
La Federación Mexicana del Deporte Empresarial es una organización que tiene como objetivo fomentar el deporte, la convivencia y estilo de vida saludable.

Name: Queensland Powerchair Football Association Inc.
Description: The Queensland Powerchair Football Association (QPFA) was founded to provide people with disabilities the opportunity to play team sport. Powerchair Football is an adapted version of football. Two teams of four hit and spin a 13-inch football on a regular-size basketball court. The game is played by athletes who use powerchairs for their everyday mobility.

Name: Barford Tigers Sports Club
Description:
Barford Tigers Sports Club (BTSC) is a community sports and wellbeing club based in Handsworth, Birmingham. BTSC plans to develop this site as a community hub offering access to organised sport, physical activity, civic and health wellbeing services to the local community. BTSC believes that promoting inclusivity and community cohesion should be central to this broader development plan and ranks of equal importance to top-class sport.

BTSC will function as an umbrella organisation to all sports sections (Hockey, Football, Kabaddi, Netball, Badminton, Tennis and Mixed Martial Arts) as well as all civic, social and wellbeing activities for the wider local community.

Barford Tigers Sports Club Limited has been registered by the FCA under the 2014 Co-operative and Community Benefit Societies Act as a charitable community benefit society.

If you would like to get involved or partner with BTSC, please drop us a direct message or email on linkedin@btsc.com.

Name: PASS University
Description:
A PASS University é um projeto educacional, fundado em 2019 para desenvolver uma nova geração de especialistas em futebol.

Os programas da PASS são baseados em aulas interativas com foco em prática, permitindo que os estudantes apliquem o conhecimento imediatamente em situações reais.

89% dos graduados da PASS conseguem colocação profissional com sucesso em clubes de prestígio ao redor do mundo.

Name: Koç Topluluğu Spor Kulübü
Description: KTSK olarak, Koç Topluluğu şirketleri çalışanlarımız ve aileleri için çeşitli sportif, sosyal ve kültürel etkinlikler düzenliyoruz. Koç Topluluğu'nun değerlerinden ilham alarak, çalışanlarımızın motivasyonunu artırıyor, iş ve özel hayat dengelerini destekliyor ve topluluğumuzun bağlarını güçlendiriyoruz.

Name: Alabama Women's Hockey
Description: Alabama Women's Hockey is a student-run organization at The University of Alabama competing in the College Hockey South (CHS) conference. The team was founded in 2023 by Keara Duffany, Morgan Grzybowski, and Teegan Mathey.

Name: Early Birds | Urban Movement
Description:
The Early Birds are an inclusive global movement with the goal to move people for the better.

In this pursuit, we are driven by the desire to motivate & inspire positive action, care about people, and strive for high quality in everything we do.

We bring this spirit to life by building an inclusive global community (physically & digitally) that embraces an active morning lifestyle and enjoys life together. 6.30am. Everyday. For Everyone.


How would the world be different if we, the Early Birds, succeed with our mission?

Ultimately, the Early Birds success would lead to a world where individuals are empowered, connected, and inspired to reach their full potential, creating a positive impact on themselves, their communities, and society as a whole.

Name: Moncalieri Basketball
Description:
Da oltre cinquant'anni Moncalieri fa rima con pallacanestro.
Poco alla volta la Pallacanestro Moncalieri è riuscita a ritagliarsi uno spazio importante sul panorama regionale e nazionale, calcando i primi prestigiosi parquet già nei primi anni ’90.

In totale Moncalieri BasketBall conta più di 1000 tesserati tra ragazze e ragazzi. E tramite il progetto scuole, che vede i nostri istruttori presenti nei principali istituti della città e della cintura, raggiungiamo migliaia di bambini grazie anche e soprattutto al lavoro dello staff tecnico e dirigenziale composto da quasi 100 persone che lavorano quotidianamente per il miglioramento dell’azienda.

Più di 70 aziende del territorio ogni anno decidono di affiancare il loro nome alla nostra realtà condividendo valori e sostenendo l’attività d’eccellenza che promuoviamo ogni giorno da anni.

A dimostrazione di un progetto solido che ha visto una crescita costante negli anni oltre 20 sponsor sono entrati nella famiglia gialloblu da più di 10 anni.

Name: TSV Weilheim a.d.Teck - Abteilung Fussball
Description:
Herzlich willkommen beim Turn und Sportverein Weilheim an der Teck
Gegründet 10.Dezember 1893
Mit rund 2.300 Mitgliedern gehört der TSV Weilheim zu den großen Sportvereinen in der Region. 12 Abteilungen und Referate bieten sportliche Möglichkeiten für jeden Sportbegeisterten. Mehrere Sporthallen und Fussballplätze stehen den Sportlern zur Verfügung. Für das kameradschaftliche Miteinander besitzt der TSV Weilheim zudem eine eigene Skihütte auf der Gruibinger Alb und für das leibliche Wohl wird in der Sportvereinsgaststätte „Dolce Vita“ gesorgt. 

Abteilung Fussball - Gegründet 1926
Der Ball rollt!

Mit einer Herrenmannschaft in der Kreisliga A und insgesamt circa 12 Jugendmannschaften gehören wir zu den größten Vereinen im Bezirk Neckar/Fils und zu den größten Abteilungen innerhalb des TSV Weilheims.

Unsere Jugendmannschaften im Leistungsbereich sind alle überregional in der Landes-bzw. Regionenstaffel vertreten und dürfen sich mit Vereinen wie dem VfL Kirchheim, FC Eislingen, VfR Aalen, Normannia Gmünd usw. messen.

Seit Jahren sind wir für unsere gute Jugendarbeit bekannt und dürfen von dieser im Aktivenbereich Früchte tragen.

Name: Maswa Warriors Football Club
Description:
Official Maswa Warriors Football Club Page
Maswa District
Under 15, 17 & 20
2023/24 Under 17 Simiyu Champions
2023/24 SRL Semi Finalists

Name: BEAUJOLAIS BASKET
Description:
3 CLUBS, 3 VILLAGES, LA MÊME PASSION !!!!!!
BEAUJOLAIS BASKET a été créé en 2007, suite au rapprochement de 3 Clubs.
Ce rapprochement avait été initié quelques années auparavant avec la création de l'UBB (Union Beaujolais Basket) qui allait permettre aux jeunes des clubs de Brouilly Sports (Cercié), de l'ESRD (Etoile sportive de Régnié-Durette) et du BCQB (Basket Club de Quincié-en-Beaujolais) de continuer à jouer au basket. En effet déjà depuis quelques années de nombreuses équipes était en sous effectif dans certains de ces 3 clubs et donc il se devait de trouver une solution pour que ce sport perdure dans notre région.
Depuis le club a évolué, avec notamment l'équipe 1 évoluant en Nationale 2 depuis 10 ans, une équipe 2 qui est revenu en région 2 avec encore des ambitions. Du coté de l'organisation, le club s'est aussi structuré autour de son président Gilles Duthel avec la création de commision qui oeuvre tout le long de l'année pour nos équipes jeunes, pour l'organisation des manifestations, pour trouver des partenaires sans qui nous ne pourrions pas fonctionner.

Name: Württembergischer Tennis-Bund e.V.
Description: Der Württembergische Tennis-Bund e.V. (WTB) ist der Dachverband für den Tennissport in Württemberg. Als zweitgrößter Tennisverband Deutschlands vertritt er die Interessen von über 1.000 Tennisvereinen mit mehr als 176.500 Mitgliedern. Zu seinen Hauptaufgaben gehören die Förderung des Breitensports, die Organisation von Wettkämpfen und Turnieren sowie die Aus- und Fortbildung von Trainern und Schiedsrichtern. Der WTB unterstützt seine Mitgliedsvereine auch in Fragen der Vereinsführung und Infrastruktur. Zudem fördert er den Nachwuchssport durch gezielte Förder- und Trainingsmaßnahmen, um junge Talente zu entwickeln und den Tennissport in Württemberg nachhaltig zu stärken. Als einer von insgesamt vier DTB-Bundestützpunkten und Landesleistungszentren ist der WTB eine tragende Säule des Nachwuchs-Fördersystems im deutschen Tennis.

Name: Coolmine Rugby Football Club
Description:
Coolmine RFC, situated in the northwest Dublin 15 area of Dublin, was first affiliated to the Leinster Branch Irish Rugby Football Union in 1980 and entered the Junior Leagues in 1981.

The Mini Rugby Youths section was founded in 1980 and has prospered ever since in the Dublin 15 suburb of Co Dublin. In 1985, after a number of successful  years on the playing fields, Coolmine purchased its current home, a site consisting of eight acres at Ashbrook, Castleknock, Dublin 15. A series of developments took place over the following years, and the site now consists of two floodlit pitches, several 4G training areas, car park and a modern two-storey clubhouse which was officially opened in 1993 by the then President of Ireland, Mary Robinson.

On the playing front, Coolmine has continued to prosper and the first XV currently competes in the Leinster League.  The Under 20s compete in the J.P. Fanagan League and the youths from u7s-18s have their own Metropolitan League and Cup Competitions. 

In 20024, Coolmine completed an ambitious new state-of-the-art gym on our Ashbrook grounds, and a modern 30m by 8m shed to house all the equipment needed by our players for their athletic development.

The Club currently runs a total of 21 teams across all age groups, with a total playing population of approximately 700. 

Coolmine Rugby Club has one of the largest Youths and Minis systems in the country, and we are fortunate to have a leading Rugby school, Castleknock college, in very close proximity (4km away). 

As one of the few rugby clubs operating in the Dublin 15 area, we are the go-to club for many current and former players from surrounding schools. A number of our senior and junior coaches also teach and coach in local secondary schools, which is enabling us to cultivate even stronger ties with these schools. 

Coolmine is highly ambitious, and this is backed up by a strategic rugby plan built around a club-wide shared vision.

Name: BORN FOR PADEL
Description:
At Born for Padel, we are not only passionate about this sport; we believe it's our way of life.
Our mission is to make world-class Padel accessible in Southeast Asia. To achieve this, we focus on creating a sense of community. For us, quality and professionalism are not just conditions; they are essential standards of our services.

- Courts Supply: We specialize in providing Spanish high-quality courts and delivering end-to-end projects. Whether you're starting a new club or renovating an existing one, we'll build your dream padel club.

- Academy: Elevate your game with our world-class Academy. Our team of professional coaches is dedicated to helping players of all levels improve their skills and reach their full potential. Additionally, we offer an Academy for Coaches, providing official certifications recognized by Padel MBA to empower racket sports professionals in becoming professional padel coaches.

- Events: We believe that communities create padel clubs. That's why we activate padel club communities through a variety of events, including Social, Competition, Corporate, and Padel & Travel activities. Whether you're looking to socialize, compete, network, or explore new destinations, we have an experience for you.

- Club Management: Leave the day-to-day operations of your padel club to us. Our experienced team takes care of everything to ensure the success of your club, allowing you to focus on providing exceptional experiences for your members and guests.

At Born for Padel, we are focusing on expanding Padel in a sustainable way to take care of the sport and the community in Asia Pacific countries.

Join us in embracing the spirit of padel and discover why we truly believe that we're all Born for Padel.

Name: JOG Yacht Racing
Description:
JOG is a yacht club with a difference. What makes JOG different is known amongst the members at “the spirit of JOG”, it is an outlook and an attitude that captures and combines serious seamanship with a chivalrous but competitive edge and lots of joie de vivre. 

Since 1950, they have been focused on making coastal and offshore racing accessible to small boat owners by keeping entry fees modest. Whilst they take racing seriously, they value sportsmanship and community above all else. Name: Modena Rugby 1965 scsd
Description:
Il Modena Rugby 1965 è la trasformazione del Modena Junior Rugby Club nato nel 2000 per rispondere all’esigenza di dedicare tempo e risorse all’attività giovanile. Partito con circa 50 tesserati oggi, con una crescita costante dopo 14 anni, i giocatori tesserati sono oltre 400 che diventano 430 con i seniores.
Il 7 luglio 2014 l’assemblea dei soci del Modena Junior Rugby ha deliberato oltre alla modifica del nome anche l’ampliamento all’attività seniores per consentire l’iscrizione al campionato di serie B con la squadra del Modena Rugby Club non in grado di proseguire l’attività, del quale ha ricevuto dalla FIR i diritti sportivi.
L’attività giovanile sarà ancor più il fulcro della nostra attività così come restano inalterate le peculiarità della società, come quella di consentire ai ragazzi di praticare uno sport sano, in un ambiente che non tenga conto solo delle qualità sportive ma anche del bisogno di formazione, di educazione e di socializzazione dei giovani, coinvolgendo in questo il più possibile anche le famiglie, attraverso l’opera di allenatori/educatori costantemente in formazione a cui si chiede la condivisione delle scelte societarie e la disponibilità a rimettersi sempre in gioco.
Con il completamento del percorso formativo / sportivo attraverso la Prima Squadra s’intende dare a tutti i ragazzi un traguardo motivazionale che ne favorisca la crescita e la competenza, una Prima Squadra che sarà espressione del nostro movimento e del nostro territorio.

Name: Swimistry
Description:

#  Dive into Swimistry 

**Where the Science of Swimming Meets Fun**

Welcome to **Swimistry**, the swimming academy that transforms water into confidence and splashes into success.

At Swimistry, we believe swimming isn’t just a sport – it’s a **life skill**. Our mission is to empower swimmers of all ages and abilities to feel safe, confident, and joyful in the water.

—

Swimistry is more than a swim school – it’s a community where **science meets fun**. Our certified coaches use proven techniques, innovative teaching methods, and a progressive curriculum that makes every lesson exciting and effective.

—

* **Smart Swimming** – We blend technique, efficiency, and water safety to build strong swimmers.

* **Modern Facilities** – Train in a safe, professional, and comfortable aquatic environment.
* **A Lifelong Journey** – Whether learning your first stroke or preparing for competition, Swimistry supports you every step of the way.

—

Discover the confidence, health benefits, and happiness swimming brings. From toddlers to adults, Swimistry welcomes everyone to **dive in, learn, and thrive**.

Name: HACKNEY RFC (RUGBY FOOTBALL CLUB)
Description:
Hackney Rugby Football Club is a rugby club based in Hackney, London, England. We are an inclusive & vibrant & friendly rugby club in East London, with Community at our heart & soul. We are a registered Charity(charity number 1131238) established in 1965, playing rugby at Spring Hill sports Ground, where rugby has been played since the 19th century.  Everyone who steps onto the field, volunteers their time or allows us to enjoy our game is crucial to our success and we treat them respectfully. This attitude ensures we are honest, hard working and supportive of team-mates. Hard to earn and easy to lose, every member of our club maintains this respect, and everyone walking through our door is afforded it.

We are drawn from every walk of life and every section of our community, and Hackney Rugby Club is richer for it. The only obstacle to anyone's involvement at any level of our club is their attitude and desire.
Combining a competitive spirit on the pitch with a fierce commitment to building the most welcoming environment off it, our ethos has always been to present an alternative form of rugby.  At the heart of our community club is a desire to lower the barriers to playing the sport we love, and we strive to create the most inclusive rugby family across all of our teams.  

We welcome all new players with open arms; from those who have played at a high level looking to continue competitive rugby, to those for whom it is the first time picking up a rugby ball, and all the casual players in between - Hackney RFC is the club for you.  We have three burgeoning and vibrant sections, 3 Men's senior teams, 3 Ladies' teams and 12 Junior's teams, from U6 to U18. It is the fastest growing Rugby club in east London.

Please do get in touch, using the links or call to action.  We'd love for you to join, either as a player or volunteer. You won't regret joining our family.

Name: Varsity Flag
Description:

Our team placements are player-centric across separate boys’ and girls’ divisions. We offer players the option of forming teams with friends or they can elect to be assigned to a team. We balance developing athleticism with building relationships and creating exciting memories.

Varsity Flag’s game plan is to provide an equal-participation youth sports league that includes elite character building for all skill levels. We are THE forward-thinking, premier flag football league providing empowering, supportive sports play that includes the entire family. That is supportive sports play at its best.

Name: Shoreline Lacrosse LLC
Description:
Home of the CT-Sharks Lacrosse Club.

Shoreline Lacrosse LLC was started in 2009 with the mission to utilize our coaching staffs experience playing Lacrosse at the collegiate and professional level to come back and grow the level of Lacrosse in the State of Connecticut. 

We began by offering boys and girls camps in Southeastern Connecticut.   Since then Shoreline Lacrosse has expanded from Southeastern CT down the Shoreline and now offers our year round CT-Sharks Lacrosse Club Program, a wide range of Hybrid Skills Focused Clinics, College Lacrosse Recruiting Platform, and our Town League Consulting Program.

Our mission is to guide our athletes and their families through the ever changing Lacrosse world by building an unbreakable culture that teaches our players the importance of believing in themselves, their team, setting their goals high, and once they reach their goals to reset them even higher!

We develop our athletes on a progression based platform teaching every member of Shoreline Lacrosse the core concepts and fundamentals of being a successful athlete on the field and individual off the field.  We use a developmental based program to maximize our youngest athlete’s skills through the use of fundamental focused skills clinics, position specific training, and playing on our “Year- Round” CT- Sharks Club Lacrosse Team's.  Once our athletes enter High School Lacrosse we offer a more advanced level of Skills Clinics and a chance to compete on our (CT-Sharks HS Showcase Team’s) which is a recruiting focused team offering an unparalleled experience to help guide our members through the college recruiting process.

Name: Power Mobile Gym CIC
Description: At Power Mobile Gym our aim is to tackle childhood poverty through the use of tailored boxing and personal development programmes. We predominately work with ages 5-18 and 19-24 years old we believe that these are vital periods within a young persons life. The demand for the work we do has grown rapidly throughout both the knife crime and Covid pandemic. Our main goal is to inspire, empower and uplift the young people of today so that they can pave the way to those after them.

Description:
Fundado el 1 de Mayo de 1946, en Santa Cruz de la Sierra, Bolivia, bajo el cielo más puro de américa con el objetivo de representar al pueblo oriental.

Somos una institución deportiva de Santa Cruz, uno de los clubes más importantes de Bolivia, contamos con cinco títulos nacionales, cuantiosas participaciones internacionales, poseemos una importante sede social y deportiva, contamos con un coliseo multifuncional propio y se está desarrollando el proyecto de la construcción del estadio más moderno del país.
Location: Santa Cruz De la Sierra, Santa Cruz de la sierra
