Description: Futebol Clube de Infesta é um clube histórcio e de grande prestígio no panorama desportivo da cidade Porto.
Location: São Mamede de Infesta, Porto District

Name: Örgryte IS
Description: Örgryte IS 1887 är ett idrottssällskap i Göteborg, bildat den 4 december 1887 av Wilhelm Friberg och har sektioner för Bowling, Brottning, Fotboll,  Handboll och Friidrott.  Örgryte IS är en av de äldsta fortfarande verksamma klubbarna i Sverige.

Name: Next Best Player
Description: Next Best Player is a cutting-edge Platform designed to revolutionize the way athletes and sports teams manage their profiles and organize their teams. Whether you're an individual athlete looking to showcase your skills or a team manager seeking efficient team coordination, Next Best Player is the all-in-one solution you need.

Name: MHC Lelystad
Description: Welkom bij MHC Lelystad! Wij zijn een levendige en gepassioneerde hockeyclub gevestigd in Lelystad. Bij MHC Lelystad staat plezier in hockey voorop, of je nu een beginner bent of een ervaren speler. We bieden een breed scala aan mogelijkheden voor alle leeftijden en niveaus, van jeugd tot volwassenen.

Name: BCN PRO Soccer
Description:
Headquartered in Barcelona, BCN PRO Soccer delivers world-class football experiences for international players, teams, and clubs — with operations also in Sweden, the United States, and Greece.

We specialize in:
	•	 Team tours with matches against top Spanish academies
	•	 High-performance training camps led by UEFA coaches
	•	 Academy programs combining football, education & cultural immersion
	•	 Scouting events, clinics, and international partnerships
	•	 Video analysis, mentoring, and player development

With strong connections to clubs like FC Barcelona, Atlético de Madrid, Girona FC, Espanyol, FC Porto,.. we provide access, structure, and opportunity to take the next step in football — on and off the pitch.

Name: BDS ESTACA SQY
Description:
Le BDS ESTACA, Bureau des Sports de l'École Supérieure des Techniques Aéronautiques et de Construction Automobile, situé sur le campus de Paris-Saclay, est une association à but non lucratif, régie par la loi 19XX. Notre principale mission consiste à répondre aux besoins des étudiants de l'ESTACA en leur offrant des opportunités sportives de qualité.
Notre objectif premier est de permettre aux étudiants de participer activement au sport en collaborant avec la Fédération Française des Sports Universitaires (FFSU). À ce jour, l'association a déjà atteint une étape significative en formant des équipes compétitives dans diverses disciplines, notamment le football, le basket-ball, le rugby, le handball et le volley.
Nos futurs défis incluent le renforcement de l'esprit sportif au sein du campus et l'adaptation de nos programmes d'entraînement pour promouvoir la mixité dans le sport. Nous avons également pour ambition de créer des équipes féminines solides qui pourront représenter notre école avec succès lors des compétitions organisées par la FFSU (Fédération Française des Sports Universitaire).

Le BDS ESTACA Paris-Saclay est situé à Saint Quentin en Yvelines (SQY, 78).

Name: Padel Republic
Description: Padel Republic is the place to come and enjoy Padel, whatever your level. Our first two locations are in Wallasey and Preston. See you soon!

Name: Comité Départemental Olympique et Sportif Dordogne
Description:
Le CDOS 24 agit au cotés des associations sportives et a pour mission :
De représenter et fédérer le mouvement sportif
De défendre et promouvoir le sport et ses valeurs éducatives
D'accompagner la structuration et le développement du mouvement sportif

Name: TuS Makkabi Frankfurt e.V.
Description:
Wir sind ein jüdischer Turn- und Sportverein und mit über 5.000 aktiven Mitgliedern einer der größten Vereine in der Mainmetropole. Der Sport ermöglicht es uns, Menschen unterschiedlicher Herkunft zusammenzubringen, Stereotypen entgegenzuwirken, Begegnungen zu schaffen und kulturübergreifend Brücken zu bauen. Daher möchten wir als Verein religionsübergreifend und unabhängig von Herkunft und Hautfarbe für demokratische Werte und Völkerverständigung einstehen und somit einen wichtigen Beitrag für ein friedvolles und gemeinsames Miteinander in unserer Gesellschaft leisten.

Wir möchten Integration aktiv vorleben, anstatt nur davon zu sprechen und sind voller Überzeugung, dass das aktive Erleben und Vorleben von Integration sowie ein fairer Umgang essenziell für ein gemeinsames Miteinander sind. Unser Bestreben ist es, dass unsere Botschaft und Werte im Rahmen unserer täglichen Vereinsarbeit mit aller Entschiedenheit nach außen getragen und aktiv vorgelebt werden. Wir legen großen Wert auf ein familiäres und respektvolles Umfeld. Bei uns ist kein Platz für Hass, Intoleranz und Ausgrenzung, wir sind vielfältig, tolerant und emotional!

Seit 1965 sind wir Teil der Frankfurter Sportlandschaft und begeistern seither Kinder, Jugendliche und Erwachsene aus den verschiedensten Gesellschafts- und Kulturkreisen. Wir sind sehr stolz, dass wir auf mittlerweile mehr als 5.000 aktive Vereinsmitglieder heranwachsen und ein umfassendes Sport-, Freizeit- und Kulturangebot schaffen konnten, das sich in über 27 verschiedenen Abteilungen, zahlreichen Social Events sowie einer Vielzahl an Kooperationen mit Schulen, Kindergärten und weiteren sozialen Organisationen widerspiegelt. Ob Jung oder Alt, Klein oder Groß, mit unserem breitgefächerten Sportangebot versuchen wir möglichst viele Interessen und Nachfragen abzudecken. 

Makkabi Chai!

Name: BeachSport Nederland
Description:
BeachSport Nederland ondersteunt organisaties, gemeenten en evenementen bij alles wat met beachsport te maken heeft. Van advies en aanleg tot beheer en evenementen: wij brengen beachsport tot leven.

Onze expertise omvat onder andere:
 Advies voor beachsportaccommodaties en multi-beachsportlocaties
 Aanleg en inrichting van beachsportaccommodaties
 Productontwikkeling binnen de beachsport
 Optimalisatie van beheer en onderhoud
 Organisatie, aanleg en beheer van beachsport evenementen

Met meer dan 20 jaar ervaring in op- en afbouw, transport en beheer van beachsportmaterialen weten wij precies wat er nodig is om beachsportlocaties en -events duurzaam, efficiënt en professioneel neer te zetten.

Onze focus ligt volledig op beachsport, bekeken vanuit de aanleg-, beheer- en eventkant. Dat maakt ons een betrouwbare partner voor elk beachsportvraagstuk.

Vragen over beachsport? BeachSport Nederland helpt je graag verder.

Name: GOLF LE VERT PARC
Description: LE GOLF LE VERT PARC club de golf, dans la campagne des Weppes à -20 mn de Lille. Parcours 18 trous, practice, zone d’approche, putting green. Initiation gratuite pour les débutants. Bar, Restaurant, Pro shop.

Name: JMF Badminton Academy-London
Description:
We are an International & Inclusive London based badminton academy, full of passionate and qualified coaches to help develop competency and transform badminton skills from basic to advanced. We are a Badminton England affiliated club. We have established coaching techniques and formats to help the players. 

We have deployed automated shuttle feeding machines in all our venues to build the technical skills faster.

Currently the coaching sessions are held at Eltham, Bexley, Orpington, Tonbridge, Erith, Brentwood, Basildon, Watford. We have a venue in Denmark  and in Chennai-India.

Name: Deutscher Badminton Verband e.V. / German Badminton Association
Description:
Der Deutsche Badminton-Verband e.V. (DBV) ist der Zusammenschluss von 16 Badminton-Landesverbänden und dem Deutschen Badminton Liga Verband (DBLV). Innerhalb dieser sind insgesamt rund 3000 Badmintonvereine zugehörig. Gemäß Satzung verfolgt der DBV u.a. folgende Ziel- und Aufgabenstellungen:
1.	Den Badmintonsport zum Wohle der Allgemeinheit zu organisieren und zu fördern sowie der sportlichen Betätigung der Mitglieder seiner über die BLV angeschlossenen Vereine, vornehmlich der Jugend, zu dienen.
2.	Den deutschen Badmintonsport im In- und Ausland zu vertreten und alle damit im Zusammenhang stehenden Fragen zum gemeinsamen Wohl aller Mitglieder auf der Grundlage echten Sportgeistes zu regeln.

Name: Club des sports Val Thorens
Description:
Le Club des Sports de Val Thorens est une association sportive qui regroupe plusieurs sections telles que le ski club, le freeski / freeride, le snowboard, le vélo et Mountain United. Vous pouvez suivre l'actualité du Club et l'évolution de nos champions sur nos réseaux sociaux.
De plus, tout au long de l'année nous organisons de nombreux événements comme des Coupes du Monde, d'Europe, mais aussi des trails et randonnées en lien avec nos différentes sections.
Nos événements se veulent festif et convivial, des villages animations sont à disposition de tous.
Pour un séminaire, un team building ou autre, vous pouvez nous faire appel pour la réservation de la piste de slalom et autres activités. 

#événements #valthorens #ski #coupedumonde #sports #athlètes

Name: Run DFW
Description: Run DFW is the result of a 2021 vision and a desire to grow Dallas-Fort Worth's emerging basketball community. Run DFW will be utilized to showcase DFW's basketball talent on a national stage, and to inspire youth throughout the metroplex to pave their own way within the game. The Basketball Tournament is a proven launching pad that will help us impact Dallas-Fort Worth for years to come.

Name: Cosmic Sports
Description: Cosmic Sports is redefining how athletes and fans experience sports entertainment. Through the innovative use of lighting technology, music, merchandise, entertainers and athletes, Cosmic Sports transforms the traditional sports experience into an immersive entertainment event.

Name: PickleBall.Collective
Description:
Introducing one of the world's fastest-growing sports to both professional and individual markets. We unite people for personalized sessions, enhancing your organization's collaboration. 

Our focus is on enjoyment, well-being, establishing relationships, and becoming one of the largest PickleBall communities in the world. When you think of Pickleball, think of us as your dedicated professionals. 

Discover the transformative impact of Pickleball as the ultimate team-building tool. Our customized events effortlessly strengthen teamwork and communication. The accessible nature of the game promotes team growth, and our offerings even include private coaching sessions. Our experts guide you through each lesson to ensure every shot leads to success.

Name: Laghezza RACING
Description:
Laghezza RACING è una Società sportivo-dilettantistica che ha come obiettivo la gestione della carriera di giovani piloti di kart e motorsport e la promozione della loro immagine e delle aziende sponsor, attraverso attività di marketing, pubbliche relazioni ed occasioni di networking.

Laghezza RACING nasce da un’idea originale di Alessandro Laghezza, ispirata dalla sua grande passione per tutti gli sport motoristici ed in particolare per le automobili, di cui è fine collezionista.

General Manager di Laghezza RACING è Antonio Tamburrano, ex pilota di Rally ed esperto del mondo dell’automobilismo sportivo.

Name: KVV Quick’20
Description:
KVV Quick’20 werd op 12 oktober 1920 als RKSV Quick opgericht. In haar bijna 100-jarig bestaan is de vereniging, die inmiddels meer dan 1800 leden kent, uitgegroeid tot een van de grootste zondagvereniging van het land. Met ruim 100 teams (waaronder meisjes- en een vrouwenteam) neemt de club deel aan de competitie.

KVV Quick’20 speelt sinds 18 augustus 1963 op het sportpark Vondersweijde. Het sportpark bestaat uit 9 speelvelden, waar onder drie kunstgrasvelden, twee trainingsvelden en een pupillenveld van kunstgras. Het hoofdveld heeft een capaciteit van 6400 staanplaatsen waarvan 1500 overdekt en 600 overdekte zitplaatsen.

Name: CourtSideClub
Description:
We are a VIP basketball project that will let its members manage a pro basketball team IRL, meet pro players, access basketball giveaways & much more !

We will start by a launching a 3x3 basketball team to reach the FIBA World Tour then it will about taking over a 5x5 pro basketball team!

Each member of CourtSideClub will reveive a token registered on the blockchain Polygon. The token will allow them to vote for the basketball teams management, get access to rewards,...

Name: Saint Colomban Locminé
Description: Fondée en 1908, la Saint-Colomban Sportive Locminé est un club de football amateur emblématique du Morbihan, évoluant en National 2. Porté par des valeurs de respect, convivialité et ambition, la "Stco" est reconnue pour sa formation de qualité, labellisée « Jeunes Élite » par la FFF, et pour ses performances sportives, notamment sa promotion en National 2 en 2024 après avoir été sacré champion de France de National 3.

Name: Prestige Golf Tours
Description:
2010: Michael Patterson, or Patto to his friends, founded Prestige Golf Tours to give Golfers from Australia access to the fantastic Golf Holiday Experiences in Asia. PGT offers the opportunity to play on excellent unique courses and replicas of the most famous PGA, LPGA and European Tour courses and holes.
2020: Dean Page, a friend and past client of PGT, bought the company. Dean's vision is to continue the great work of Prestige Golf Tours, with Asian, South Pacific and Australasian tours and continuing to support the causes that are important to Patto and the PGT family.  
Prestige Golf Tours partners with some of the worlds leading and most awarded golf tour operators including Go Golfing & Golfasian. As well as our custom tours PGT partners in the World Masters series of events in the Asia Pacific. These events attract more than 2,500 club golfers from around the world for week-long celebrations of golf, social and entertainment events at established golf tourism hotspots. Bringing golfers together for the best time of their lives is what we do. You’ll have a full escort on all tours, so you don’t have to do anything. Just enjoy yourself!!

“Having toured with Dean, and played golf with him as well, I can say that he is a Proper Golf Tragic... he is passionate about golf, loves playing his best, but also loves enjoying the social side of golf too. 

Having someone like Dean look after your golf tour, means that he has done all the hard work for you, found the best places to stay, the bars with the coldest beer, and you are free to just enjoy yourself. ”
— Mick Murnane, PGA Professional

Name: Network Padel
Description:
Network Padel is a business networking group built around a shared interest in Padel tennis. We bring professionals and business owners together in a relaxed, inclusive environment where meaningful connections happen both on and off the court.

Whether you're new to the game or play regularly, you're welcome here. Our aim is to create a space where people of all backgrounds and abilities can meet, network, and enjoy the sport — without pressure or pretense.

What we offer:
• Regular Padel meetups and sessions
• A diverse and supportive business network
• A friendly mix of casual play and professional connection
• Open access for players of all skill levels

It’s about real relationships, not just exchanging business cards. If you're looking for a fresh way to build your network while enjoying a great sport, we’d love to have you join us.

#PadelNetworking #InclusiveNetworking #BusinessCommunity

Name: KODOKAN PAMIERS JUDO
Description: Bienvenue dans l'univers du Kodokan Pamiers Judo, ancré à Pamiers depuis 1977, au sein d'une communauté de 16 000 habitants. Fort de 210 licenciés affiliés à la Fédération Française de Judo, notre club s'engage dans une gestion innovante, intégrant des aspects économiques, sociaux, éducatifs, de santé, et d'inclusion. Membre actif du comité de l'Ariège et de la Ligue OCCITANIE, nous contribuons à l'épanouissement du judo à l'échelle régionale. Dynamique et proactif, notre club propose un cadre sain et ambitieux, soutenu par un budget de fonctionnement annuel de 20 000€. Rejoignez-nous pour une aventure judo exceptionnelle, unissant passion et engagement, au service de notre communauté.

Name: Durham University Athletic Football Club
Description: Durham University Athletic Football Club are the reigning BUCS National Champions in Men's Football and Women's Futsal. Our 10 teams compete across the BUCS football pyramid as well as in local non-league football. With an esteemed 137-year history, we have produced a plethora of professional players who have gone on to represent DUAFC at the highest level.

Name: Ayala Polo Club
Description:
Ubicados en #Sotogrande el Ayala Polo Club cuenta con tres canchas de polo profesionales y continúa evolucionando.

El objetivo principal es ofrecer los servicios más modernos y adecuados para la estancia de los caballos, la práctica del polo y las distintas modalidades de la hípica durante todo el año. Actualmente contamos con dos sedes Ayala Central y Ayala Los Pinos.

Name: Ashfield Football Club
Description: North Glasgow based Football Club. Established 1886, First Junior Club to win 100 Trophies. This is Our Ashfield. This is Your Ashfield!

Name: Golf Gerre Losone
Description:
Il campo 18 buche da campionato, del Golf Gerre Losone è uno dei campi più attraenti della Svizzera. Dal 2006 al 2012 si è incontrata l’élite del Ladies European Tour.
Il Golf Gerre Losone dispone di strutture di prima classe: a disposizione per allenarsi un campo pratica, l’area Pitch-and-Putt con relativo spazio pratica interno, due Putting Greens e un Academy Course di 3 buche. Nella Club House troverete un elegante ristorante, locali spaziosi per il guardaroba, locali caddy, una sala riunione con capacità fino a massimo 100 persone, oltre a un Pro-Shop gestito con professionalità. Al Golf Gerre Losone troverete un campo e servizi di elevata qualità, in un ambiente sportivo, giovane e dinamico, che grazie alla collaborazione con i nostri partner vi permetterà di avere un’esperienza golfistica indimenticabile, in armonia con la natura che ci circonda.
Dopo anni di impegno nel rispetto dell'ambiente e per una gestione ecosostenibile, nel mese di Giugno 2020 il Golf Gerre Losone ha ottenuto la prestigiosa Certificazione ambientale GEO.

Name: CA Evron Handball
Description:
Page officielle du CA Evron Handball. 

Pour toutes informations, n'hésitez pas à contacter :
Nathan Conctreras : ncontreras.hand@outlook.fr
Naomi Masson: nmasson.hand@outlook.com

Name: Chosen 1 Academy, LLC
Description: Chosen 1 Academy is a leading multi-sport and educational institution tailored for dedicated student-athletes seeking to optimize their potential, refine their skills, and attain their goals. Our primary objective is to facilitate the realization of our student-athletes' full potential while placing significant emphasis on player development and university preparedness.

Name: Tennisclub Racso
Description:
TC Racso vzw is een tennisclub uit Destelbergen met meer dan 1600 leden die openstaat voor iedereen en ten dienste wil staan van al zijn leden. We willen dat alle tennissers zich maximaal kunnen ontplooien ongeacht hun afkomst, leeftijd of niveau. Onze club is een ontmoetingsplaats waar iedereen zich thuis voelt en waar kameraadschap, flairplay en plezier in de tennissport centraal staan. We hebben oog voor een zo optimaal mogelijke accommodatie voor alle leden.
At your service:
- Als opleider van jonge tennissers en motor voor jeugdwerking in Oost-Vlaanderen met een optimale omkadering en maximale doorgroeimogelijkheden voor al onze competitiespelers
- Als ontmoetingsplaats voor volwassen leden met een vraag gestuurd tennis- en activiteitenaanbod
- Als expert-partner voor Tennis Vlaanderen zowel op sportief als extra sportief vlak
- Integraal toegankelijk met een inclusief aanbod in samenwerking met de gemeente Destelbergen en Tennis Vlaanderen, gekaderd binnen de ‘Racso Foundation’.

Name: LK Teamwear
Description:
LK Teamwear is een toonaangevend bedrijf in de wereld van sport- en teamkleding, met meer dan 17 jaar ervaring in de sector. Wij zijn gepassioneerd over het leveren van kwaliteit, service , advies over kledingkeuze en persoonlijke aandacht aan elke klant. Wat ons onderscheidt is niet alleen ons brede assortiment aan op maat gemaakte kleding voor sportclubs, bedrijven en evenementen, maar ook onze toewijding aan het leveren van de allerbeste klantenservice.
Onze bedrijfswaarden draaien om passie voor het vak en het streven naar perfectie in alles wat we doen. Of het nu gaat om het ontwerpen van de perfecte teamoutfit of het garanderen van snelle en betrouwbare levering, wij zetten ons in voor de optimale klantbeleving. We begrijpen dat de juiste kleding het verschil kan maken, zowel op het veld als in het dagelijks leven, en we zijn trots op het leveren van producten die de prestaties en het imago van onze klanten versterken.
LK Teamwear blijft zich ontwikkelen en vernieuwen, en onze 17 jaar ervaring stelt ons in staat om steeds weer de verwachtingen van onze klanten te overtreffen. Met passie, betrouwbaarheid en maatwerk als onze kernwaarden, zorgen wij ervoor dat jouw team, bedrijf of evenement altijd perfect gekleed is.

Name: Rhinos Rugby and San Clemente Rhinos
Description:
Rhinos Rugby is an official National Development Program of USA Rugby. 

Rhinos Rugby was founded in 2014 in Southern California with the vision of providing high-performance rugby training and competition for Boys and Girls, Men and Women in USA. In 2021, Rhinos Rugby established San Clemente Rhinos, the professional team playing in Rugby Tens events, and has grown to provide athletes a clear and competitive rugby pathway from junior age, to college and professional level, as well as USA Rugby National Teams.

Name: WBC Amateur MuayThai
Description:
A NEW BEGINNING
In light of talks with many key stakeholders throughout the world of MuayThai, across all continents where the sport is thriving, the WBC MuayThai has made a careful decision to enter the market of Amateur MuayThai.
This was done to offer a pathway of success and opportunity to aspiring amateur Muaythai athletes across the globe to win coveted WBC MuayThai accolades as not everyone involved in our beautiful sport wants to compete as a professional fighter.
The newly formed WBC Amateur MuayThai program will offer tournament-like events and super-bouts for adults in the sport of MuayThai throughout the more than eighty-four countries and territories the WBC MuayThai is active in — and beyond.

Name: Alabama Hockey
Description: The Alabama Hockey Club was founded in 2005 by University of Alabama students. The team is now in its nineteenth (19th) season and plays all of its home games in Pelham, AL at the Pelham Civic Complex. The organization is managed by the University of Alabama students.

Name: Swedish Tennis Society
Description: We at Swedish Tennis Society strive to engage, help and push players to reach their goals; whether that is to learn the sport, compete, get better health, or anything in between. We aim to create a cheerful community of committed players and people by bringing them together through the world of tennis. Since every person is unique, individualizing and tailoring each training session to the players involved is at the core of our training philosophy. We want to create a social space where everyone involved has a great time while at the same time progressing toward their goals!

Name: RiGandGO by Antoine Rigaudeau
Description: RiGandGO s’adresse à toutes et à tous (Aller au contact de la base, Transmettre-Partager-Démontrer, Faire vivre une expérience unique)

Name: Squash Now 44
Description:
Squash Now - Comité Départemental de Loire-Atlantique
Le squash en Loire-Atlantique
La compétition démarre MAINTENANT !

Name: Soccer Scholar Academy Juniors
Description:
The Soccer Scholar Academy is an energised, creative and vibrant organisation specialising in developing the skills, talent and ability of young players. We believe every kid should have the opportunity to play and, most importantly, enjoy Football. Here at SSA we look to achieve this by producing an environment that creates a strong, positive, learning culture and maximises the opportunity for all kids to reach their potential.

We achieve this through our Fun & Futures Technical Sessions, SSA Tots, 1-2-1’s, Travel Teams and WildCats programmes. Check out ‘Our Services‘ for more information on each of our football initiatives.

Name: MGoalkeeper - keepersacademie
Description: MGoalkeeper ambieert om jonge keepers/keepsters te begeleiden in zijn/haar uniek leerproces. Trainers met inzet, gedrevenheid & ervaring geven steeds het beste van zichzelf om dit te doen slagen!

Name: Under the Lights Flag Football
Description:
Under the Lights is a national youth flag football league for kids in 1st-8th grade, with the emphasis on promoting a competitive, confidence building, non-contact experience for both boys and girls of all skill levels. 

Games are played on Weekend nights during the Fall, Winter, and Spring season at locations across North America.

Name: Lahti Basketball
Description:
Tervetuloa tutustumaan upeaan koripallojoukkueeseemme, joka on täynnä intohimoa, taitoa ja voitontahtoa! Olemme joukkue, joka rakastaa koripalloa sydämessään, ja meillä on tarjota sinulle ainutlaatuinen kokemus niin pelaajana katsojana kuin yhteistyökumppanina.

Miksi valita meidät? Ensinnäkin, meillä on vahva joukkuehenki. Yhdessä pelaamme, voitamme ja kasvamme. Lahti Basketball on kuin perhe, joka tukee toisiaan kentällä ja sen ulkopuolella. Tässä joukkueessa olet osa jotain suurempaa.

Toiseksi, meillä on taitoa ja lahjakkuutta, joka hehkuu kentällä. Harjoittelemme kovaa ja panostamme jatkuvaan kehittymiseen. Jokainen pelaaja tuo mukanaan omat vahvuutensa ja osaamisensa, mikä tekee meistä vahvan ja monipuolisen joukkueen.

Kolmanneksi, rakastamme voittamista. Meillä on himo voittoihin, mutta myös nöyryyttä tappioissa. Jokainen peli on meille mahdollisuus oppia ja kasvaa. Olemme sitoutuneet antamaan kaikkemme jokaisessa ottelussa ja tuomaan iloa faneillemme.

Lisäksi, pelimme ovat viihdyttäviä ja intensiivisiä. Emme pelkää haastaa itseämme ja vastustajiamme. Katsomossamme on aina huumaava tunnelma, ja fanit ovat osa voittojamme.

Meidän Lahti Basketball on paikka, jossa koripallosta nauttiminen saa uuden merkityksen. Liity mukaan, ja ole osa voittavaa perhettämme!

Name: GnG esports
Description: GNG Esports is a Tunisian association founded in 2016 by young enthusiasts passionate about gaming. Affiliated under the auspices of the Tunisian Federation of Electronic Sports (TUNESEF), GNG Esports is thriving and gradually making its mark in major local and regional tournaments.

Name: ASU NBA Trade Deadline Competition
Description: The ASU NBA Trade Deadline Competition gives students from across the country the opportunity to simulate running an NBA front office at the trade deadline. Our multi-day experience requires students to trade amongst one another and present the rationale for their decisions in front of real NBA front office employees, who act as judges to score the moves that were made. Students also have the opportunity to network with these executives, thus increasing equity and availability to a profession which has long been difficult to break into. NBA front offices have the ability to scout out the next round of talent coming up the ranks and maybe even get ideas for moves their teams can make.

Name: Tayrus Esports
Description:

Name: AJ Racing: Driving Female Success
Description:
AJ Racing is the UK’s first all-female owner driver kart team open to all abilities and experience levels. 

Based in the Midlands, the team provides kart hire as well as storage, preparation & transport of customer karts.

The increase in the number of females in motorsport has been noticeable in recent years thanks to the work of several programmes and initiatives. AJ Racing aims to bridge the gap between rental karting programmes, such as F1 Academy Discover your Drive and the Jamie Chadwick Series, and those for more experienced female drivers like Iron Dames Young Talents, More than Equal and of course F1 Academy.

Our role will be to ensure each driver reaches their full potential to enable them to be a strong candidate for such opportunities by teaching racecraft, using data, mechanicing, engineering but most importantly, having fun!

Name: Midleton RFC
Description:
Midleton Rugby Football Club | Est. 1967 | Co. Cork, Ireland

Welcome to the official LinkedIn page of Midleton RFC, a proud rugby club based in East Cork. The club was founded in the 1927, but disbanded in 1934. Midleton RFC was reformed in March 1967 and we’ve been a cornerstone of the local sporting community—developing talent, forging friendships, and fostering a lifelong love for the game of rugby.

We field competitive teams across all levels, from underage and women’s rugby to our senior men’s squad, who compete in the All-Ireland League. Whether it's grassroots development or top-level performance, our club is built on teamwork, resilience, and a shared commitment to excellence—on and off the pitch.

 Location: Townspark, Midleton, Co. Cork
 Facilities: State-of-the-art clubhouse, multiple pitches, gym, and match-day hospitality
 Community: 500+ active members, coaches, volunteers, and supporters
 Mission: To develop players of all ages and backgrounds while enriching the wider East Cork community through sport, inclusivity, and leadership.

We’re always open to connecting with current and former players, sponsors, supporters, and rugby enthusiasts across Ireland and beyond. If you’d like to get involved—whether as a player, coach, partner, or volunteer—don’t hesitate to reach out.

#MidletonRFC #ClubRugby #EastCorkRugby #AIL #IrishRugby

Name: FC Russikon
Description:
Der FC Russikon ist ein solider, menschennaher Dorfverein. Das Motto «mit Herz und Seele» ist tief verankert und wiederspiegelt sich in sämtlichen Handlungen. Die Wurzeln für den Verein wurden 1969 durch die ortsansässigen Italiener gelegt. Diese gründeten im damaligen Restaurant Kreuzstrasse den heutigen Fussballclub. 1973 konnten erstmals zwei Juniorenmannschaften angemeldet werden.

Die Trainings- und Matchanlage war damals der Sportplatz Helvital. Als das Stimmvolk von Russikon 1994 an der Gemeindeversammlung «Ja» zum neuen Fussballplatz Tüfiwis sagte, konnte dieser 1997 eingeweiht werden. 1998 stieg die 1. Mannschaft zum ersten Mal in die 3. Liga auf, im Jahr 2007 sogar in die 2. Liga. Der FC Russikon ist heute ein wichtiges Zentrum im Zürcher Oberland. Mit der wohl schönsten Sportanlage in der Umgebung feiert er regelmässig sportliche und soziale Höhepunkte.

Name: New York Gridlock Ultimate
Description:
New York Gridlock Ultimate (NYGL) is a professional ultimate team for women, non-binary and genderqueer elite athletes from the New York City area. We are a participating team in the Premier Ultimate League.

Our mission is to achieve competitive excellence on the field and equity in ultimate frisbee by increasing accessibility to the sport and visibility of women, non-binary and genderqueer ultimate players. We achieve this by providing high-quality competition, leadership experiences, and community partnerships. 

NYGL continues to push for equity-centered spaces for all women, cis and trans, and actively advocates for a transformation in the league structure that creates a new space inclusive of non-binary and genderqueer players.

Increase accessibility and provide opportunities for all women (cis and trans), non-binary and genderqueer athletes to play high-level ultimate

Increase the visibility of all women (cis and trans), non-binary and genderqueer ultimate players locally, regionally and nationally
Provide all women (cis and trans), non-binary and genderqueer people with various ways to participate in a professional sports organization outside of just playing: the opportunity to gain experience (interns, volunteers, etc.), a pathway to leadership (coaching intern, assistant coach, coach, etc.)

Help increase the number of girls, women (cis and trans), non-binary and genderqueer people playing ultimate by offering clinics and workshops and building community partnerships 

Approach outreach through a thoughtful lens that asks WHY and HOW when looking at potential partnership opportunities: why are we coming into this community and how are we interacting with the community

Build a robust, local fan base connected with the team

Gender and racial justice are central to how we make decisions and hold ourselves accountable to each other, our volunteers, and our fans

Name: EuroGames Vienna 2024
Description:
EuroGames are the premier multi-sports event in Europe celebrating diversity in sexual orientation, sex characteristics and gender identity. Started in 1992, the main goal is to provide a safe space for everyone to come together and play sports. EuroGames are primarily geared towards LGBTIQ+ athletes (lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, intersex, queer), but are open to everyone regardless of sexual orientation, gender identity, age and skill level.

The EuroGames feature a range of sports, including athletics, basketball, swimming, volleyball, and many others. The event aims to promote inclusion and diversity in sports, as well as to challenge stereotypes and discrimination against LGBTIQ+ individuals in athletics.

In addition to the sports competitions, the EuroGames also feature a range of cultural and social events, such as parties, concerts, and art exhibitions. The event provides a platform for LGBTIQ+ individuals and allies from across Europe to come together, celebrate their identities, and participate in a supportive and inclusive environment.

The EuroGames are governed by the European Gay and Lesbian Sport Federation (EGLSF), which works to promote LGBTIQ+ participation in sports and combat homophobia and transphobia in athletics. The EuroGames have grown in popularity over the years and have become an important event for the LGBTIQ+ community in Europe and beyond.

Name: FC Niederweningen
Description:
Niederweningen liegt im Wehntal, hinter der Lägern, unmittelbar an der Grenze zum Kanton Aargau, nur 20 km von Zürich entfernt. Der FCN arbeitet sowohl interkantonal als auch überkommunal; er weist ein Einzugsgebiet von über 10 Gemeinden auf. Im Verein spannen und spielen Zürcher und Aargauer zusammen. In 5 Aktiv- und teilweise bis zu 20 Juniorenmannschaften spielen über hundert Aktive und gegen 300 Junioreninnen und Junioren.

Die 1. Mannschaft hat sich im in den letzten Jahren wieder im regionalen Fussball etabliert und spielt derzeit in der 3. Liga vorne mit. Ebenfalls in der 3. Liga spielt unsere Frauenmannschaft. Die 2. Mannschaft spielt in der 5. Liga. Drei weitere Aktivmannschaften bilden die Senioren 30+, 40+ und 50+.
In der Juniorenabteilung wächst unser Nachwuchs heran. Als Landverein legen wir grossen Wert auf den Breitenfussball. Doch wir führen auch in allen Altersklassen eine Mannschaft mit talentierten Fussballern, die den Vergleich mit renommierteren Clubs nicht zu scheuen brauchen.


Die Anlagen des FCN werden vom Verein geplant, finanziert und erstellt. Auch für den Unterhalt der Anlage müssen die Mitglieder selbst aufkommen. Durch die Gemeinde Niederweningen wird der Verein seit 2013 beim Unterhalt der Grünflächen unterstützt. Dies entlastet nicht nur im Bereich Fronarbeit, sondern auch das Budget des Vereins. Dem Nachteil, dass wir unsere Anlagen selber unterhalten und betreuen müssen, steht der grosse Vorteil gegenüber, die Plätze nach unseren Bedürfnissen nutzen zu können.

Glücklicherweise dürfen wir auf einen guten Rückhalt in der Bevölkerung zählen. Nur durch die stetige Hilfe der Mitglieder, der Eltern, Gemeinden, Sponsoren und Supporter ist es uns möglich, den aufwändigen Betrieb überhaupt zu finanzieren. Herzlichen Dank an alle, die uns in irgendeiner Form unterstützen. Durch diese gemeinsamen Anstrengungen bleibt unser Verein weiter gut im Spiel. 3, 2, 1 – HUU!

Description:
Come Società ci impegniamo a rendere i nostri obiettivi chiari, coerenti e credibili coinvolgendo nei processi lo staff, gli associati e il territorio. Universal Basket nasce nel 2010 a Modena come Associazione Sportiva Giovanile di Pallacanestro fondata sui valori di qualità, passione, senso di appartenenza, aggiornamento tecnico.
La nostra visione si indirizza verso i valori di competenza, organizzazione, continuità ed efficienza dei processi con una presenza e una attenzione costante verso le nuove forme di comunicazione digitale.
La nostra realtà si integra nel territorio prendendo in considerazione le esperienze, le riflessioni e i riscontri ricevuti dall’ambiente in cui ci muoviamo e dalle persone con cui ci relazioniamo. 
Universal Basket 2010 gestisce il settore Minibasket accogliendo bambini/e dai 5 agli 11 anni, nonché il settore Giovanile con le categorie under13, under14, under15, under17, under19.
La nostra Società crede nella condivisione delle emozioni, delle conoscenze e nello sviluppo di competenze e abilità che nel gioco di squadra si moltiplicano. 
I ragazzi acquisiscono competenze sociali e relazionali utili anche nel modo del lavoro, quali strategia, anticipazione, decision making e problem solving, con la consapevolezza che il fallimento fa parte della vita e che ci sono tante altre strade per potersi realizzare.

Name: CI2S Centre d'Initiation Sportif et Social
Description:
Le C.I.2S est une association loi 1901 et qui est un groupement d’éducateurs sportifs qui intervient dans le secteur Grand-lieu & Sud Retz.

Pourquoi sportif & social ?

Parce que nos éducateurs sont formés à encadrer des activités physiques et sportives de tous genre.

Mais leur intervention ne s’arrête pas aux sports. L’objectif est aussi de développer les maisons de jeunes dans les villes où ce dispositif n’existe pas.

Auprès de qui intervenons nous ?

Auprès de tous les publics. Nous intervenons en milieu scolaire, en milieu associatif et nous créons aussi nos propres séances, nos propres stages sportifs sur la période des vacances scolaire.

Nos axes de travail pour l’année 2022/2023 sont : le public 3/6 ans, le sport entreprise, le public séniors +65 ans et les maisons de jeunes.

Nous sommes également ouverts à toutes les idées, toutes envies pour développer de nouvelles thématiques et de nouvelles disciplines.

L'Associazione Sportiva Dilettantistica Atletico Calvizzano nota più semplicemente come Atletico Calvizzano, è un'associazione sportiva calcistica italiana con sede nella città di Calvizzano. Milita nel campionato di Seconda Categoria.
I colori sociali sono il giallo ed il verde. Disputa le partite interne presso lo stadio privato "Sport Village". I calciatori del Calvizzano sono conosciuti i tigrotti, ma l'attuale società a preferito un restyling totale dell'emblema giallo verde, attualmente rappresentato da un disegno stlizzato raffigurante una pantera con il canone simbolo della città e il pallone da calcio, il cambiamento è stato rappresentato anche da una rinascita del calcio nella città di Calvizzano, dove per anni è stata esclusa dai settori dilettantistici.

Storia
Il calcio a Calvizzano è nato a settembre del 1965, in cui la prima società nacque con la denominazione di Associazione Sportiva Dilettantistica Calvizzano Calcio 1965. Negli anni del 1970 il Calvizzano Calcio era conosciuta in tutta la Regione per il campo sportivo e per la squadra che ha dato lustro alla città con i suoi fortissimi giocatori e i suoi record. Unica in Italia a fare 56 punti su 60, quando la vittoria valeva 2 punti, in un campionato di Prima Categoria. Ma il Calvizzano Calcio ha militato anche nei campionati di Promozione ed Eccellenza. Dopo anni fuori dai campionati dilettantistici, nasce l'Associazione Sportiva Dilettantistica Atletico Calvizzano, militando in Terza Categoria per la Stagione Calcistica 2022/2023. Nell’anno 2023/2024 milita nel campionato di Seconda Categoria.

Description:
“BORN AND RAISED”. “Nati e cresciuti” in questa città, in questo quartiere, in questa palestra. 

Basket Roma nasce nel 2015 con questa idea, partire da chi quel posto lo vive da quasi tutta la vita e portarlo più in alto possibile.

La nostra società dopo solo 8 anni è diventata un punto di riferimento per lo sport di base e per lo sport agonistico, detentrice di 6 scudetti giovanili, numerosi titoli regionali e una quantità enorme di obiettivi personali raggiunti da staff e giocatori. Le nostre strutture sono funzionali e la territorialità è l’elemento fondamentale per sviluppare tutta la nostra missione. La passione, la competenza, il mettersi continuamente in discussione, la cura dei dettagli, la coltivazione dei sogni fanno si che il nostro terreno sia fertile per la crescita umana e tecnica di tutto il nostro personale e atleti. Lo sport è da sempre una delle principali componenti della civiltà, oltre ad essere l’espressione di miglioramento fisico e psichico, intorno ad esso nascono passioni, momenti di socializzazione ed occasioni per manifestare con orgoglio il proprio senso di appartenenza.

Il Basket Roma vuole essere modello di eccellenza, un “sistema” da promuovere, valorizzare e esportare, fenomeno che unisce e abbatte le barriere. 

“BORN AND RAISED”, in campo e fuori dal campo.

Club Golfers es un Club de Golf Sin Campo de Madrid, registrado como Club Deportivo Elemental ante la Comunidad de Madrid, federado ante la REFG y adscrito ante la FGM, lo cual nos permite emitir licencias y dar hándicap a los jugadores que empiezan.

Tenemos como objetivo facilitar y fomentar el jugar al golf para los amateurs de cualquier nivel y edad y el conseguir todas las ventajas posibles para los socios en lo relacionado con la práctica del golf, fruto de estar organizados y alcanzar cierto volumen significativo. 

Como Club, formamos parte además de la Asociación de Clubes Sin Campo de Madrid, lo que nos da acceso, entre otras cosas, al circuito de Clubes Sin Campo que dicha asociación organiza todos los años.

Actualmente operamos en la Comunidad de Madrid y provincias limítrofes, en Cantabria, Málaga, Vigo y Alicante, y contamos con poner en marcha nuevas expansiones lo antes posible.

Name: St. Moritz Winter Pentathlon
Description:
The St. Moritz Winter Pentathlon was born from a love of winter sports, a passion for the beauty and natural resources of the Engadin, and a commitment to conservation. Even in the niche world of amateur sporting events, this one stands out, by blending heritage — several sports were invented or popularized in St. Moritz — innovation, luxury, and environmental sustainability.  
  
The Winter Pentathlon includes five disciplines: ski mountaineering, cross-country skiing, giant slalom, speed skating and monobob or curling. The disciplines – all either current or former Olympic sports – have been chosen to test participants’ athleticism and endurance across a range of different sports, and  expose athletes to novel activities, many of which are integral to winter life in St Moritz. 90% of participants have never tried every single event; and they spend time on their own preparing and training, showcasing a true "Day Zero" mentality. 
 
Athletes began at the Cresta Club House (home of the infamous Cresta Run), and ski mountaineer a 700m ascent to Corviglia, up the piste used for the 1948 Winter Olympics. From there, competitors ski to Muntanella for the giant slalom, set by the same team that prepares events for tFIS Ski World Cup. Next, they transitioned to the frozen lake of St. Moritz for a head-to-head speedskating circuit, followed by a ~8km cross-country skiing course. Finally, participants headed to the Olympia Bob Run for a monobob race down the world's only all-natural bob run, from St. Moritz to Celerina. This year, participants will be able to opt in to curling instead. 

The St. Moritz Winter Pentathlon is open to anyone with a sense of adventure, a love of winter sports, and an interest in trying new things, with participants ranging in age from 18 to 70+ with mixed levels of skill and experience in the activities. We look forward to welcoming new competitors in 2025!

Name: PuMa HELSINKI matkalla Mestaruusliigaan
Description:
Tämä on polku unelmiin.  

Me olemme matkalla kohti lentopallon Mestaruusliigaa. Meillä lahjakkaat nuoret urheilijat saavat mahdollisuuden lentopalloammattilaisuuteen omalla kotiseudullaan.  

Tämä on myös pääkaupunkiseudun lentopallon uusi aika. 

Suomen suurin juniorilentopalloseura PuMa-Volley rakentaa nyt pääkaupunkiseudulle polun, jota pitkin nuoret lentopalloilijat pääsevät näyttämään taitonsa lentopallon Mestaruusliigassa. Me toteutamme nuorten urheilijoiden unelmia yhdessä Etelä-Suomen muiden kasvattiseurojen kanssa. 

Matkassamme Mestaruusliigaan yhdistyvät intohimo, tavoitteellisuus ja yhteisöllisyys. 

Tavoitteenamme on rakentaa pääkaupunkiseudulle menestyvä ja vastuullinen liigatoiminta, joka kokoaa yhteen urheilijat, fanit ja kumppanit. Vastuullisuus näkyy meillä ammattitaitoisessa ja laadukkaassa valmennuksessa sekä puitteissa, jotka tukevat paitsi nuoren urheilijan kehitystä, myös pidemmän tähtäimen urasuunnitelmia. Liigalentopallo pääkaupunkiseudulla mahdollistaa opiskelun yhdistämisen urheiluun. 

Yrityksillä ja kumppaneilla on mahdollisuus tulla mukaan ainutlaatuiseen kasvutarinaan. Me tarjoamme uuden ajan urheilukumppanuuksia, joilla toteutetaan nuorten unelmia, vahvistetaan naisten asemaa urheilussa ja synnytetään menestyjiä suomalaiselle lentopallokartalle. Kanssamme brändisi näkyy ja kuuluu, saa vaikuttavuutta vastuullisella tavalla ja luo aitoa merkitystä.

Me olemme osa suomalaisen lentopallon uutta menestystarinaa – ole sinäkin!

Name: Sports Strategic Partners
Description:
We help Leaders of sporting organisations identify blind spots that could be impacting profit & growth which means they strategise a route to stay ahead of the game and even 'fall back in love' with their sport and organisation.  We do this by working with you - working on your priorities and problems. 

Some of the programs and processes I use include a four month block Discovery Program which I deliver an independent examination of your sports business challenges followed by 12 month Kick’n Goals Roadmap which plans out a path for the present and future in collaboration with you. 

As you probably know, the sports industry is a unique one, in that your product is everything wrapped around your team and brand.

But in this day and age of disruption and the sports industry morphing into the entertainment industry, new challenges are creating headwinds which slow the growth of many sports organisations. 

CEO and Founder, Bill Kostandas is The Most Trusted Strategic Growth Advisor For The Sports Industry. For many years now, Bill has been enabling organisations to substantially increase revenue, introduce profitable new lines of business, expand their reach, increase their market penetration and improve their profitability in highly challenging environments.

In his book, Kick’n Goals & Growing Strategically!, Bill reveals the 10 blind spots every business leader must know to ensure their long-term success. 

Bill Kostandas has made it his mission to help business leaders in the sports industry grow their businesses profitably, continue to differentiate and stay ahead of the game. You can have a free copy (real book) by just getting in touch with us at enquiries@sportsstrategicpartners.com.au

Name: Racing Experience S.àr.l.
Description:
MORE THAN 44 YEARS OF MOTORSPORT EXPERIENCE

Founded in 2000 by the driver Christian HAUSER, Racing Experience is a family racing team with more than 40 years of experience. Currently, the third generation, Gary and David HAUSER, have stepped forward to take over the driver business. Both are well known athletes in Luxembourg and have been members of the national Olympic team (COSL / Comité Olympique et Sportifs Luxembourgeois).

Based in the small town of Wormeldange in eastern Luxembourg, the team is at this date formed by 8 people: our director, two drivers, two mechanics, two engineers and a logistic and communication responsible.

Driven by its passion, Racing Experience has known numerous successes in very different disciplines in motorsports, notably in hillclimb and circuit racing. The team has been able to gradually climb the level of competition and diversify its participation in various championships: Formula Renault 1.6 Belgium, ATS Formula 3 Cup, BossGP with a Dallara GP2, Luxembourgish and FIA European hillclimb championship, GT&Prototype Challenge with a Ligier LMP3, the Michelin Le Mans Cup with a Norma M30 LMP3 in 2019 and 2020 and the European Le Mans Series in 2021 with a Duqueine D08 LMP3. In 2022 they competed with a double commitment in the new ADAC Prototype Cup Germany as well as in the GT & Prototype Challenge (Prototype Class Winner).

Our coaches, who are athletes themselves, are dedicated to bringing out the best in each individual. With a wealth of experience and a track record of achievements, our team leverages this extensive knowledge for the benefit of all our athletes.

We focus on all aspects of training, including triathlon, running, cycling, swimming, and strength. Our comprehensive approach ensures that every facet of your athletic performance is addressed. We provide unwavering support and motivation, fostering a community where everyone feels encouraged and driven to reach their full potential.

Our commitment to excellence ensures that every athlete receives the guidance and resources they need to succeed. At ONE80 Endurance, we are more than just a training program – we are a family, united by our passion for endurance sports and our drive to help each other succeed.

Name: Taçspor Kulübü
Description:
Kökleri 1947’ye kadar uzanan Taçspor Kulübü, Türkiye’de spor kültürünü toplumla buluşturan en önemli yapı taşlarından biridir ve Türk sporuna başta tenis olmak üzere, basketbol, yüzme, futbol ve voleybol branşlarında sayısız sporcu yetiştirmiştir. 

1996 yılında Ataşehir’e taşınan, 2015 yılında ise Galatasaray SK’nın bir parçası olan Taçspor Kulübü, 26 dönüm arazi üzerinde spor ve sosyal olanakları ile üyelerine hizmet vermektedir. Bir parçası olduğu Galatasaray SK’nın yüz yılı aşkın birikimleri ve değerleri ile yol almaya devam eden Taçspor Kulübü’nün hedefi; başta tenis olmak üzere amatör branşlarda üst seviyede hizmet vermek ve genç sporcular yetiştirmektir. 

Taçspor Kulübü, 1500 izleyici kapasiteli bir merkez kort ve 11 tenis kortu ile Türkiye’nin en büyük üç tenis altyapısından biridir. Galatasaray SK – Taçspor açık ve kapalı yüzme havuzları, jimnastik, karate , fitness gibi grup dersleri verilen salonlarının yanı sıra Galatasaray Kadın & Erkek Voleybol takımlarının evi olarak hizmet vermektedir.

Name: Parkstone Yacht Club
Description:
Parkstone Yacht Club was established in 1895 and is situated on the North shore of the second largest natural harbour in the world. Poole harbour boasts panoramic views, sandy beaches and clean waters.

The Club has an active membership of 2800 members, comprising equal numbers of dinghy and cruiser owners. Both sailing and racing are actively encouraged for the amateur sailor young and old alike.

Parkstone Yacht Club regularly hosts World, National Championships and Open meetings for a variety of classes and is renowned for Poole Week which is held each year in August, offering Open Regatta racing for classes of Dinghy, and Parkstone Regatta for Cruisers. There is also the Youth section offering training, racing and including Youth Week, very active fun days out on the water.

Name: FIBB, Fédération Ivoirienne de Basket-Ball
Description:
La Fédération ivoirienne de basket-ball (FIBB) est l’instance officielle de gestion du basket-ball en Côte d’Ivoire. La FIBB est la seule autorité reconnue par la FIBA (Fédération Internationale de Basket-ball Amateur) à laquelle elle est affiliée, elle-même seule instance reconnue par le Comité International Olympique (CIO). Elle fut fondée en 1952 et est affiliée à l’AFABA depuis 1961. Mahama Coulibaly en est le président depuis janvier 2020.
La FIBB est déclarée comme une association regroupant les clubs de basket-ball de Côte d’Ivoire. Elle organise les compétitions nationales et les matchs internationaux de la sélection ivoirienne.
En tant qu’organisation à but non-lucratif, sa mission est de développer et de promouvoir le basketball, et d’unifier une communauté qui compte plusieurs milliers de joueurs amateurs compris, ainsi que des millions de supporters en Côte d’Ivoire.
Elle établit les règlements qui régissent les relations entre les différents acteurs de la communauté du basket-ball en Côte d’Ivoire.
La FIBB compte aujourd’hui 7 ligues nationales, plusieurs Centres de Formation (41 affiliés rien qu’à Abidjan), ainsi qu’une vingtaine de Clubs enregistrés dans la capitale. Un programme d’identification est en cours sur l’ensemble du territoire ivoirien.
De façon non-exhaustive, la FIBB se charge de :
- Diffuser, faire appliquer et participer aux travaux sur le “Règlement Officiel du Basketball” tel que défini par la FIBA
- Veiller au respect des normes pour les équipements et les infrastructures
- Établir les règles des compétitions nationales et du système de compétition
- Désigner et former les acteurs, techniciens et opérateurs de compétitions
- Réglementer le transfert de joueurs d’un club à un autre
- Conseiller et superviser l’organisation de toutes les activités sportives national relatives au basket-ball

Description: Weightlifting (often known as Olympic weightlifting) is a sport in which athletes compete in lifting a barbell loaded with weight plates from the ground to overhead, with the aim of successfully lifting the heaviest weights. Athletes compete in two specific ways of lifting the barbell overhead. The snatch is a wide-grip lift, in which the weighted barbell is lifted overhead in one motion. The clean and jerk is a combination lift, in which the weight is first taken from the ground to the front of the shoulders (the clean), and then from the shoulders to over the head (the jerk).

Name: Cairndhu Golf Club
Description:
Cairndhu Golf Club is a ' Hidden Gem' of a coastal headland course located on Northern Ireland's world famous Antrim Coast Road, near Larne, between Belfast and Portrush. 

From its signature 2nd hole and clubhouse, Cairndhu boasts stunning views of the Glens of Antrim, as well as over the North Channel to Scotland's Mull of Kintyre, Islay and the Paps of Jura. 

The club is proud to have been the host golf course of the  2021 and 2022 Northern Ireland Open & ISPS HANDA World Invitational Qualifier.

Our world famous hospitality always provides a warm welcome for members, visitors and societies, alike.

Club History

Larne Town Golf Club was founded in May 1928 by local business men. They purchased fifty acres of land at the top of The Roddens in Larne and here a nine hole course was designed and constructed by golf course architect Major CA MacKenzie. Amazingly the course was open for play the same year and competition began for two splendid trophies presented by Sir William Brown and Mr David Baine, trophies that are still played for today.

The Golf Club grew quickly in stature and membership and in 1930 a clubhouse was built and opened. This growth continued for several years. One of the social high points of the age came in 1950 when the then Governor of Northern Ireland, the Earl of Granville and Lady Granville (sister of the late Queen Mother) visited the club.

Relocation

However, changes were afoot and in 1954, due to the industrial development of Larne, the Golf Club was forced to relocate to a more suitable site. The East Antrim Hospital Authority agreed to lease the club the land next to Cairndhu Hospital. The new land was originally owned by Sir Thomas and Lady Dixon. Mr John SF Morrison, part of the Colt, Allison and Morrison firm of course architects, was commissioned to design the new course and work commenced in 1956. The old clubhouse closed on 12th October 1957.

The new course was declared a great success and was opened in May 1958.

The club currently has teams registered from Under 7s  to a men’s team and three women’s teams (16+). We also operate 'Mini Edo's' and Wildcats - groups for younger children from age 5.

Name: Pomona-Pitzer Athletics
Description: The Department of Physical Education and Athletics at Pomona-Pitzer Colleges subscribes to the belief that participation in physical education, intercollegiate athletics, and campus-sponsored recreational activities can provide some of the most challenging and meaningful educational experiences in a student’s life. The department believes that when properly presented, such activities encourage the development of positive values such as sportsmanship, teamwork, leadership, confidence, courage, and dedication and provide opportunities for positive social growth and development with an efficiency that is difficult, if not impossible, to duplicate in other educational settings. Furthermore, such experiences provide students with specific knowledge in the areas of physical fitness, body awareness, skill acquisition, and nutrition. Participation in these activities also sets the stage for adoption of a healthy lifestyle at a young age and provides a foundation for optimal health in life after college. Consequently, a student’s participation in physical education, intercollegiate athletics, and campus- sponsored recreation is considered to be a significant and integral part of the educational process at Pomona-Pitzer Colleges.

Te ayudamos a crear una carrera sólida y rentable, a acceder a oportunidades de alto nivel en clubes y ligas internacionales, y a desarrollar una imagen de marca personalizada y atractiva.

- Psicólogos deportivos para ayudarte a manejar la presión y a mantener la motivación

- Expertos en marketing y comunicación para desarrollar tu imagen de marca y aumentar tu visibilidad

Estamos comprometidos con tu éxito, con tu crecimiento y con tu futuro. Queremos ser tu aliado estratégico, tu equipo de confianza y tu pasaporte al éxito en el fútbol.

En RR9 FOOTBALL AGENCY, te ofrecemos:

Name: Fondation Arthritis - Cap Martinique 2026 - Alexandre NOEL & Damien LE MOIGN
Description:
La Fondation Arthritis, reconnue d'utilité publique, est la première source de 
financements privés en France à accompagner l'émergence d'une recherche française sur 
les rhumatismes et les maladies musculo-squelettiques.
Depuis sa création en 1989, la Fondation a notamment contribué à l'émergence des 
biothérapies, et a permis plusieurs avancées comme la création du test diagnostique de la 
Polyarthrite Rhumatoïde. Aujourd'hui, elle promeut des projets innovants et développe 
de nouveaux outils, avec des équipes d'excellence, pour trouver de nouveaux traitements 
aux rhumatismes et maladies musculo-squelettiques.
L'épouse de Damien est atteinte d'une polyarthrite rhumatoïde sévère.
La fondation Arthritis soutient le projet Cure-RA qui vise à développer un traitement 
ciblant les causes de la PR pour une rémission à long terme voire une guérison.
A travers cette aventure humaine et les valeurs fondamentales du sport. nous nous 
engageons auprès de la recherche, des malades, de leurs familles et de leurs 
collaborateurs pour leur dire que tout est possible.
Lors de notre préparation, nous nous sommes également inscrits dans une démarche de 
transmission de savoir en mettant le bateau à la disposition des jeunes régatiers du YC 
de Granville. Encadrés par notre coach Benoit Charon ces jeunes ont pu développer des 
compétences sur d’autres formats de courses . Nous sommes très fiers de pouvoir aider 
les champions de demain.

Name: Zagreb Meeting - Boris Hanzekovic Memorial
Description:
The Boris Hanžeković Memorijal is the oldest sporting event in Croatia; it has been taking place in Zagreb every year since 1951. The Meeting and its 110m hurdles memorial race were named after hurdler Boris Hanžeković, one of Croatia’s best athletes before WWII, who was killed in WWII while trying to escape from the Jasenovac concentration camp. 

It originated as an inter-club duel between Mladost and Dinamo and became an international event in 1962. In the following years, numerous good athletes from the Soviet Union, Hungary, Bulgaria, East Germany and Cuba participated in the Meeting, and soon also others from Austria and West Germany. 
At the end of the 1990s, the Meeting rocketed on the IAAF list and received the Grand Prix status in 2000. Today, Boris Hanžeković Memorial is one of the world’s best meetings. In 2020, it became part of the WA Continental Tour GOLD, which is just one level below the Diamond League.

The Meeting’s start lists regularly include around twenty Olympic and world champions, and the results achieved in Zagreb are at the top of the IAAF lists.

It was at the Zagreb Meeting that Blanka Vlašić cleared 2.08m, which was the second best high jump result ever, one of the best athletes of all time Usain Bolt holds the 100m Meeting Record with 9.85, the world’s best discus thrower Sandra Perković threw the discus 70.83 metres, and the 110m Hurdles Memorial Race has featured absolutely all Olympic and world champions and world record holders in the past 30 years.

Since 2014, the shot put event, named the Ivan Ivančić Memorial, has been taking place outside of the stadium, at the Zagreb Fountains. In 2016, the IAAF declared that event the strongest shot put event since 1988, because it was for the first time in 28 years that two shot putters threw over 22.20 m. Those were Olympic Champion Ryan Crouser and Olympic bronze medallist Tom Walsh

Name: Uganda Lacrosse Association (ULA)
Description:
The Uganda Lacrosse Association (ULA) is the legally registered, and World Lacrosse recognized national governing body for the sport of lacrosse in Uganda.

ULA believes in the passion, intensity, joy, confidence, and sense of community that lacrosse brings to those who play, coach, and love the sport. From practice to playoffs, we work to make the game better and safer in our nation, ensuring that nothing stands in the way of a player’s excitement for the sport.

We evolve and grow the sport through innovative standards and best practices to advance coach and player development, participation and safety within the fun of the game and its inherent values. As the sport’s national governing body and member of the World Lacrosse the global governing body, ULA also partners with and is fully recognized by the National Council of Sports (NCS).

Our dedication to lacrosse pushes us to provide the best certifications, resources and programs, keeping the spirit and integrity of the game alive for the thousands of athletes who enjoy the fun and benefit of playing.

In Uganda, the sport was introduced in 2009 by American Lacrosse Coach Kevin Dugan and Maurice Sserunkuma working with Fields of Growth, USA. In 2011, the sport was boosted with a donation by Notre Dame University, USA to Makerere University Business School.

Uganda gained global attention in 2014, coming away with wins over Korea and Argentina and being featured on the cover of the September 2014 edition of Lacrosse Magazine, a publication of US Lacrosse, the sport’s governing body in the United States. The Cranes' journey to the 2014 Championship is the subject of a documentary called Kandote (Kandote is a Ugandan word meaning “Let me dream”), a film by former Johns Hopkins Lacrosse player Will McCance.

Uganda's appearance at the 2023 World Lacrosse Championship will be its third consecutive, with Uganda holding the distinction of being the only African to participate in the Championship.

As a member of GIANT Wings you will have access to various opportunities that begin with attending AFL and AFLW games, Club events such as the annual launch of its AFLW, the Ladies Lunch and the Foundation dinner. Membership will also extend to professional and personal networking activities and opportunities, as well as an opportunity to participate in a range of annual fundraising campaigns.

Name: StinkySocks Hockey
Description:
StinkySocks Hockey started on the ice in the winter 2006-2007 season with the goal of building a league that was dedicated to providing a great experience on and off the ice. We were looking for was something that was difficult to find... a game that was more structured and dependable than pickup hockey without the nonsense (fights, disrespect, etc.) that we all too often found in the more intense leagues.
SSH is a league that consists of players who all realize that they have to get up the next day and who have come grips with the fact that they are not skating for the cup. Our players want a competitive game that is within their appropriate skill level and is also friendly. We have been fortunate to continue to grow while maintaining these common values in our player base. Our games have over a 95% history of having two goalies, and they are always officiated.
We've grown over 500% in the past year . We offer leagues that you can join with a group or as an individual, game by game play through the No Commitment Hockey program, local and travel tournaments, and now Women's field hockey. We continue to grow, evolve, and improve in ways that exceed the expectations of our players. Today we continue our commitment to providing the best adult hockey in the Boston area. In summary, we are a league that offers well organized, competitive (but not aggressive), dependable, friendly hockey, consisting of a group of great people who enjoy competing. This is hockey, redefined.

Name: SA Sports Limited
Description:
At SA Sports LTD, we believe sport should be exciting, inclusive, and a key part of every child’s development.
We deliver a wide variety of sporting clubs and events during the school term and throughout the holidays, designed specifically for primary-aged children (4–11 years). From high-energy after-school clubs to action-packed holiday sessions, every programme is built around fun, skill-building, and active participation.
What We Do:
We proudly partner with local primary schools across Berkshire to run engaging sporting fixtures and tournamentsduring term time.
Some events are open to all schools in the area, while others are invite-only, designed to bring schools together in friendly and inclusive competition.
Our Approach:
Our goal is simple…
To make sure every child enjoys being active, while gaining a deeper understanding of each sport — from the basic rules to the finer technical details.
We expose children to a wide range of sports throughout their primary years, helping them build strong foundations, confidence, and physical literacy that will benefit them as they grow.
We prioritise fun and meaningful game time.
We focus on the detail and structure of each sport.
We nurture teamwork, resilience, and a love for staying active.
Looking Ahead:
While our current programmes focus on children aged 4–11, we’re just getting started. Our long-term vision is to expand both upward and downward — offering tailored sessions for younger children and older students alike, opening more doors for young people to thrive through sport.
Stay tuned…
SA Sports LTD

Description:

We travel all over the country to represent our organization in various military, first responder, and charity affiliated ice, ball, and roller hockey tournaments. We liaise with local professional, amateur, and public service teams and nonprofit associations to raise funds and awareness for initiatives that mean something to our military and local communities. Description:

We are the regional and first German chapter of RedBar Group, the world’s largest community of watch collectors.

There are more than 90 chapters all over the world and we are adding new ones each month. You can find us for example in Amsterdam, Barcelona, Cape Town, Dubai, London, Milan, New York, Oslo, Paris, Shanghai, Tokyo, Vienna and on the Bahamas.

Our goal is to create an inclusive and diverse community of collectors from all over the world. Our over 100 members come from all walks of life and all age groups. We especially like to encourage the female enthusiasts among you to join us.

We host private get-togethers and events with brands mainly from but not limited to the international watch industry, where we talk watches and have a great time.

Every watch is welcome! Regardless of whether it is an A. Lange & Söhne, Breitling, Cartier, F.P. Journe, G-Shock, Hublot, Oris, Patek Philippe, Seiko or a Swatch, automatic or quartz, vintage or modern.

A membership at RedBar Frankfurt is completely free and open to everyone.

Then we support our club partners to make sure their clubhouse reflects the culture and spirit of that unique community. 
We're proud to be building for community sport because clubland is where it all starts and clubland is where we all come home to.

Name: Tewkesbury Rugby Football Club
Description:
Founded in 1881, Tewkesbury Rugby Club stands as one of Gloucestershire's oldest rugby institutions. Nestled at the heart of the town, we proudly embrace diversity, welcoming individuals from all backgrounds. As an accredited England RFU and Gloucestershire RFU club, our dedicated team, from management to coaches, shares a common goal – delivering top-notch rugby experiences for both adults and children.

With men's 1st XV and 2nd XV teams, a women's team, along with Tag and Walking Rugby for those who still crave the game, we offer inclusive opportunities for all. Our thriving junior and Colt teams, comprising over 180 boys and girls aged 6 to 18.  

All of our players, members and volunteers proudly call The Moats their rugby home.

Beyond the field, our clubhouse boasts an active public bar for members and non-members alike and is a vibrant hub of Tewkesbury community life. Enjoy a host of events and entertainment throughout the year at this friendly, relaxed and welcoming gathering spot. The clubhouse and grounds are also available for hire, ideal for family celebrations or business meetings.

Join us in fostering a robust community united by our commitment to Real Rugby, Great People, and Your Local Club! 

Find out more about our vibrant rugby family and become a part of something special.

Description:
A fast-growing local community sports club, offering a pathway to women and girls. With options for young stars (ages 4-9) we have the fantastic Wheetabix Wildcats program. Our established U11 and U12 teams are thriving, and we're excited to have recently introduced a new U8 side! We also have a dominant women's team. With a number of local sponsors, and strategic business partnerships, AFC Totton is the place to play football!

Unity in Play, Excellence in Every Stride - Where Football Meets Family

Name: Danske Idrætsråd & Samvirker (DIS) Danish Sports Council
Description:
Danske Idrætsråd & Samvirker (DIS) er en uafhængig idrætsorganisation og et forum for dialog mellem relevante idrætspolitiske aktører med fokus på den lokale idræt. 
DIS arbejder for at den lokale idræt får de bedst mulige rammer og ser med idrættens øjne på idrætsudfordringer og aktiviteter lokalt også på Folkeoplysningsområdet.
Organisationen varetager kommunernes idrætsråd og samvirkers idrætspolitiske interesser og er således disses talerør i idrætsdebatten både regionalt og på landsplan.

Name: Long Beach FC
Description:
At Long Beach FC, we are driven by our passion for the beautiful game and the transformative power of sports. Our mission is to create a positive impact in our community by bringing people together and changing the culture surrounding soccer in the US. 

We believe that soccer has the power to change lives and we are committed to helping individuals become the best they can be, both on and off the field. Our goal is to build a foundation for success that will last for years to come, and to create a team that embodies the spirit of Long Beach. 

We are inspired by the love of the game and the joy it brings to players and fans alike. We are dedicated to creating a team that represents the diverse and vibrant community of Long Beach and to build a soccer culture that celebrates the beauty, passion, and excitement of the sport. 

At Long Beach FC, we are dreamers and doers. We are committed to taking concrete steps to bring our ideas to life and to create a team that reflects our values and vision. Our ultimate goal is to make soccer a part of the fabric of Long Beach and to share our love of the game with everyone in our community.

Name: Merched Y Môr
Description:
WE’RE FOUR ORDINARY WOMEN FROM PEMBROKESHIRE WHO WANT TO DO SOMETHING EXTRAORDINARY. WE WANT TO SHOW THAT NOTHING - NOT GENDER, NOT OUR AGING BODIES, NOT EVEN OUR OWN MINDS - CAN STOP US FROM ACHIEVING GREAT THINGS. IT’S A ONCE IN A LIFETIME OPPORTUNITY, AND WE’RE GRABBING IT BY THE OARS!

We will be rowing across the Atlantic Ocean in 2025, taking part in the Talisker Whisky Atlantic Challenge. As well as the huge physical and psychological challenge just to get across we will also be raising money for four charities along the way. These are Action for Children, Popham Kidney Support, RNLI and Sea Trust Wales.

Name: Jupiter Links Golf Club
Description: Jupiter Links Golf Club ownership group led by Tiger Woods’ TGR Ventures and investor and sports team owner David Blitzer. The team representing South Florida will play in five regular season matches broadcast live on ESPN against the other TGL teams, followed by a four-team postseason, with a semi-final and finals series. The matches will be played at the SoFi Center, a custom-built venue in Palm Beach, Florida, will combine a data-rich virtual course with a state-of-the-art short game complex creating a unique experience for fans in the stands as well as those watching around the world.

Name: Whickham Fellside Youth Football Club
Description:
Welcome to Whickham Fellside Youth Football Club! Established in 1980, we've been fostering a passion for grassroots football for over four decades. Our mission is simple: to offer a safe, inclusive, and fun environment where boys and girls of all ages can thrive and develop their skills on the field.

At Whickham Fellside, we're not just a club; we're a community. We take immense pride in opening our doors to everyone, ensuring that no one is left on the sidelines. From our youngest recruits in the Under 7s teams to our seasoned players in Senior Football, we provide opportunities for all to experience the joy of the beautiful game.

Join us in our commitment to nurturing talent, fostering camaraderie, and instilling a lifelong love for football in the hearts of our players. Together, let's kick off a journey filled with teamwork, dedication, and unforgettable moments on the pitch. Welcome to the Whickham Fellside family!

Aus den Anfängen auf der Rotwandwiese entwickelte sich ein Verein mit über 100 Jahren Geschichte, der seinen Werten und Farben grün, weiss und rot stets treu geblieben ist.

Heute zählt der F.C. Red Star Zürich rund 300 Junioren, betreut von engagierten Trainerinnen und Trainern, und fördert neben sportlicher Leistung auch Fairness, Kameradschaft und Zusammenhalt. Bei den Aktiven und Senioren spielen nochmals ungefähr 150 Fussballer.

Name: Cuppie
Description:
Cuppie maakt ieder potje voetbal nog leuker! Er worden wekelijks 100.000 potjes voetbal gespeeld op de pleintjes, in het park en bij de clubs. Met Cuppie maak je die potjes makkelijker voor de trainer en leuker voor de spelers.

Cuppie brengt meer plezier in je training door:
1. Een individuele ranglijst waarbij de prestaties van spelers worden bijgehouden.
2. Geautomatiseerde functies die administratieve taken vereenvoudigen (zoals de teamindeling bij partijtjes)

Het resultaat? Spelers die zich maximaal inzetten tijdens trainingen, een gezonde competitieve sfeer binnen het team, en trainers die meer tijd hebben voor wat echt telt: coaching en spelersontwikkeling. Hierdoor wordt trainen nog leuker!

Description:
We are a professional Football & Futsal club, officially registered under the 𝐀𝐥𝐥 𝐈𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐚 𝐅𝐨𝐨𝐭𝐛𝐚𝐥𝐥 𝐅𝐞𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 (𝐀𝐈𝐅𝐅) and 𝐃𝐞𝐥𝐡𝐢 𝐒𝐨𝐜𝐜𝐞𝐫 𝐀𝐬𝐬𝐨𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 (𝐃𝐒𝐀), committed to developing talent, building champions, and growing the sport at every level.

• 3-Time Consecutive Delhi Futsal Champions: 2022-23, 2023-24, 2024-25
• 2-Time AIFF Futsal Club Championship Participants and preparing for our 3rd national appearance this season.
• Delhi C Division League Champions 2022-23
• Delhi B Division League 2024-25: Secured 3rd place and promoted to the A Division League 
• Delhi Youth League Under-13 Runners-Up 2023–24 and also qualified for the AIFF Youth League U-13 in the same year

Beyond competitive football, we also operate dedicated football training centres equipped with qualified coaches and quality infrastructure:

 Gyanshree School, Sector 127, Noida

From grassroots development to top-tier competition, we’re building a strong football and futsal culture across India .

Description:
At Jets, we’re proud to lead a Positive Gymnastics Movement for kids aged 6 months to 18 years. 

Our programs are thoughtfully designed by childhood development experts to support your child’s physical, social, and emotional growth - all in a safe and super fun environment. We specialise in classes that do so much more than just teach gymnastics. Every session is designed to ensure each child is celebrated, has fun, builds friendships, learns listening and discipline skills, sets goals, embraces change, tries new things, and learns to never give up… 

Oh and yes, we teach some pretty cool gymnastics skills as a bonus!

Name: Champions11CricketLeague

India’s Fastest-Growing Short-Format Cricket League!!

Welcome to C11CL – where every over counts and every player matters.

We are India’s first grassroots-level cricket league with a unique 2-to-3 over trial format, designed to spot raw talent and give every player, from every city, village, or academy, a fair and fast platform to shine.

Whether you're a gully cricketer, an academy player, or a dreamer with a bat—C11CL is your stage.

 What We Do:
Conduct open trials across India (Tier 1, 2, and 3 cities)

Provide opportunities for local, state, and national recognition
Build future cricket champions from the grassroots

To democratize cricket by making talent, not contacts, the only way in.

Jede Ausgabe setzt Impulse, hinterfragt Routinen und liefert konkrete Anregungen für eine moderne Trainings- und Trainerarbeit.

Im Fokus stehen Praxisnähe, fachliche Tiefe und Inhalte, die sofort im eigenen Umfeld anwendbar sind – unabhängig von Spielklasse oder Altersstufe.

Du arbeitest selbst als Trainer*in oder bringst fachliche Expertise mit und möchtest deine Perspektive einbringen?

Dann werde Teil des FUSSBALLTRAINER MAGAZINS.

Bliv klogere på team cranks
