Name: Vitaal Sportpark
Description:
www.vitaal-sport-park.nl > Samen in sport & beweging, dat is waar ik (Robbert Bonsink) voor sta! Als sociaal ondernemer zet ik mij in om sportverenigingen en sportparken vitaler te maken. Hierbij zet ik beweging in als middel en zo werken we samen toe naar een Vitaal Sportpark (Open Club of Open Park).

We versterken de maatschappelijke meerwaarde van de vereniging (SROI), waarbij we de samenwerking zoeken met zorg, welzijn en het onderwijs en andere partners uit de omgeving. Vanuit doen en enthousiasme komen we tot een meerwaarde voor alle samenwerkende partijen. Het maatschappelijke effect en rendement is groot, net als de preventieve werking die we met elkaar realiseren op het sportpark.

Ik ben onder andere werkzaam geweest voor de VSG, gemeente Putten, Gelderse Sport Federatie, Provincie Gelderland, SVN Lekkerkerk, gemeente Bodegraven-Reeuwijk, Sport ID Nieuwegein, Ichthus College Kampen, Gemeente Zwolle, Rugby Club Zwolle, ZAC, ICS Adviseurs, NOC*NSF e.a. 

Ik heb +/- 20 jaar ervaring in de sportwereld o.a. bij de Gelderse Sport Federatie, Sportservice Flevoland (Topsport Flevoland), Sportservice Zwolle, verschillende gemeenten en de Provincie Overijssel. 

Mijn ambitie is om meer samenwerking te creëren (als procesbegeleider, coördinator) waarbij iedere partij, organisatie en vereniging er baat bij heeft. Ik wil verschillende doelgroepen in beweging krijgen en houden, met plezier als uitgangspunt. Wanneer dit alles kan bijdragen aan een langdurig, plezierig en gezond leven (maatschappelijke rendement) is het doel behaald! Of het nu gaat om senioren, (ex) dak- en thuislozen, (ex) verslaafden, (ex) gedetineerden, inburgeraars, peuters & kleuters of volwassenen (ouders), dat maakt niet uit. Een leven lang sporten & bewegen met plezier staat voorop!

Name: Pickle At The Palms
Description:
Hello! 

Thanks for visiting with us on LinkedIn! We'd like to introduce Pickle at the Palms, a new indoor pickleball destination, designed and built from the ground up for Seattle’s pickleball community. 

Pickle at the Palms is now under construction and will be arriving in Seattle's Interbay neighborhood in summer, 2026.

The Details!

Where: 3543 15th Avenue W, Seattle, WA (just south of the Ballard Bridge in Interbay)

When: Opening summer 2026.

What!
o	Two levels of play. 20 competition-level indoor courts.
o	A place to play your way. Drop-in, level-based open play, court reservations.
o	Central heat + air. Never too hot, never too cold.
o	Snacks + drinks all-day. Comfy court-view lounge.
o	Paddles, one-of-a-kind branded gear + more. On-site Pro Shop.
o	A lifelong learning center. Learn-to-play, skill clinics, and coaching.
o	Tech-driven skill-building. On-court cameras, replay systems, video analysis + AI-tools too. 
o	Full of fun! Round robins and in-house tournaments. 
o	Smiles for miles. Friendly, helpful pros and staff.

We can’t wait to say hello in person at Pickle at the Palms in 2026! Check out our early website at www.pickleatthepalms.com and follow us here for updates as we work toward opening.

Name: Shotokan Karate-Do International Federation Denmark (SKIF.DK)
Description:
About the Organization:

Shotokan Karate-Do International Federation - Denmark (SKIF.DK) was founded on May 20, 1983 and is part of the largest and worldwide karate stylist organization Shotokan Karate-Do International Federation (SKIF) with millions of practitioners worldwide.

Shotokan Karate-Do International Federation - Denmark (SKIF.DK) is the largest Shotokan style organization in Denmark with member clubs distributed throughout Denmark in the Faroe Islands and Greenland.

SKIF was founded by Hirokazu Kanazawa in 1977 after leaving the Japan Karate Association (JKA).
 
SKIF.DK is a association for karate clubs in Denmark whose purpose is to allow their members to train Shotokan karate. A membership of SKIF.DK gives the clubs and their members access to a wide range of training training courses, training with some of the most skilled instructors from Denmark and from around the world and many other activities that you can read elsewhere on the website. .

SKIF.DK is chaired by a democratically elected board, assisted by a number of relevant academic committees.

Link to SKIF GHQ - Japan - http://skifworld.com/
Link to SKIEF (SKIF Europa) - http://www.skifeu.com/

Name: Consorzio Lega Serie A Futsal
Description:
IL CONSORZIO
Il Consorzio Lega serie A Futsal nasce nel luglio 2024 per volere di 14 squadre di Lega serie A Futsal che hanno deciso di collaborare per promuovere e far crescere il Futsal in italia, in particolare per poter creare un movimento capace di attrarre i tifosi, le istituzioni, gli operatori economici e gli addetti ai lavori e a tutti organi di stampa.

Al consorzio possono partecipare tutte le società, ASD, Polisportive che hanno acquisito il titolo sportivo per partecipare al campionato Italiano di Serie A di calcio a 5.

Gli obiettivi più importanti sono :

-la ricerca e la realizzazione di tutto quanto necessario al consolidamento ed al miglioramento dell’immagine del calcio a cinque maschile di vertice (Serie A) in Italia, nei rapporti con gli organi di informazione, con le aziende e gruppi industriali e commerciali, con gli Enti Pubblici e con le istituzioni e componenti qualificate dell’intero movimento del calcio a cinque nazionale ed internazionale;

-la conclusione di accordi economici, nell’interesse ed in favore delle società consorziate o di alcune di esse;

-la realizzazione di accordi per la gestione dei servizi nell’interesse delle società consorziate ed, in particolare, quelli relativi all’organizzazione comune dell’attività sportiva istituzionale delle società medesime;


Il consorzio è dotato di un Consiglio di amministrazione formato da 5 consiglieri di cui uno ne è il presidente.

Attuale organizzazione 

CDA Consorzio 

Gianfilippo Valentini Presidente 

Serafino Perugino Vice presidente 

Lorenzo Bonaria  Membro

Gaetano Di Domenico Membro  

Andre Verde  Membro

Name: Real Chikkamagaluru FC
Description:
In the heart of Chikmagalur, a district adorned with fragrant coffee, breathtaking hills, and an unwavering passion for football, emerges the Real Chikkamagaluru Football Club (RCFC). With each passing day, this club shines brighter, heralding a new era in professional football.

Born in the year 2020, RCFC holds a profound vision: to nurture the growth of football at the grassroots level. We provide a sanctuary for budding talents of all ages, offering year-round junior development academies and captivating summer programs. Their unwavering commitment lies in cultivating the sport's essence from its very roots.

But our aspirations stretch far beyond the realm of youth football. With indomitable determination, RCFC strives to forge an unyielding senior team capable of rivaling the best in the state and the entire nation. Their ambition knows no bounds.

RCFC yearns to ignite the flames of passion for football within every community, both near and far. We aspire to elevate football to a revered status, weaving it into the fabric of local and global communities. Moreover, we seek to contribute to India's grand vision of hosting the FIFA World Cup in 2030.

With every kick of the ball, RCFC embodies the hopes, dreams, and fervor of an entire district. Our journey symbolizes the triumph of dedication and unity, painting a picture of resilience and love for the beautiful game. The Real Chikkamagaluru Football Club—where passion takes flight and dreams find a home.

Vorberichte, Analysen und Facts zu den wichtigsten Spielen, interaktive Community-Tippspiele mit FINN OR LOSE, Fantasy Football, Infos zu den deutschen Profis und denen, die es mal werden wollen. Wir beleuchten, wie American Football, als Sport und Kultur in Deutschland einen Platz findet.

Name: Olympia'60
Description:
Olympia’60: Sportief én gezellig

Olympia’60 is met ruim 650 leden (waarvan ruim 300 jeugdleden) een grote Dongense vereniging. En zeker ook één van de meest opmerkelijke. Voor zowel jeugd als senioren valt er een boel te beleven. Wie eenmaal kennis heeft gemaakt met de aparte sfeer op sportpark Crispijn, loopt grote kans besmet te raken met het Olympia-virus. Want eens Olympiaan, altijd Olympiaan.

Voetbal is natuurlijk het hoofddoel. Door de introductie van het kaboutervoetbal kun je al op 4-jarige leeftijd (!) beginnen bij Olympia. Gezien de grote belangstelling, kunnen we zeker spreken van een succes. Het is prachtig te aanschouwen hoe die kleintjes in de weer zijn met een bal, trappen en gillen, en trachten het eerste (en tweede, tiende, twintigste) doelpunt van hun leven te maken. de ruim 300 jeugdleden zorgen ervoor dat alle leeftijdscategorieën met één of meer teams bezet zijn.

De jeugdafdeling van Olympia staat behalve om de competitiewedstrijden, trainingen en toernooien, ook bekend om de populaire extra activiteiten die worden georganiseerd. Dat kan verschillen van een sinterklaasavond tot een bezoek aan een betaald voetbal wedstrijd. Jaarlijks hoogtepunt is het geheel verzorgde Weekendkamp, waarbij vele seniorenleden van de club en ouders zorgen voor begeleiding én hilarische impulsen.

Geen wonder dat er altijd veel aanloop van belangstellenden is op Crispijn, vooral op zaterdag als de wedstrijden van zowel de jeugd- als de seniorenteams worden gespeeld. Al sinds de oprichting in 1960 is Olympia – dat speelt in het originele Feyenoord-tenue, dus met rood-wit shirt en zwarte broek – een échte zaterdagclub. Dat heeft als grote voordeel dat in een tijdsbestek van zo’n acht uur alle wedstrijden worden gespeeld,waardoor jong en oud, selectie- en niet-selectiespelers, elkaar haast automatisch leren kennen. Dat verstevigt de onderlinge band en het respect voor elkaars prestaties.

Name: Nantes Roller Derby
Description:
NRD has several recreational and elite teams, including Team A Les Duc.hesse.s and Team B Les Divines Machines.

Les Duc.hesse.s de Nantes is the A team of the Nantes Roller Derby club, founded in 2010. The non-profit sports association, based in Nantes, comprises several teams, including the Duchesses (Team A). The club is affiliated with the French Roller Sports Federation (FFRS) and has been a member of the Women's Flat Track Derby Association (WFTDA) since 2013.

The Duc.hesse.s played their first match in November 2011 and have since participated in hundreds of matches in France and Europe, including friendly matches, French Elite Championships, and WFTDA competitions. They were runners-up in the French Championship in 2023 and 2022. The team is currently ranked among the top 3 European teams and hopes to continue climbing the rankings, with the ambition of playing in the WFTDA Global Championships in Portland, Oregon (USA) on November 1-3, 2024.

They also participate in local tournaments such as the West Track Story and the Hangar Games, which invigorate the region.

The team's values include creating a safe environment, respect, team spirit, and solidarity.

Name: Lansing Common FC
Description:
Our Mission is to be a soccer club that represents our community. We believe by bringing people together from all walks of life, listening to each other’s ideas, and working collectively, we can be a club that truly represents our great city.

Our Vision is that by creating a club rooted in community, and by growing it slowly and sustainably, we’ll be able to have a team here in Lansing for the long haul. It will allow us to develop our own supporter culture that is uniquely Lansing while providing local players and coaches a platform to elevate their skills and get noticed. It will be a club everyone in Lansing is proud to call our own.

We compete in the Midwest Premier League, a group of like-minded clubs focused on sustainability, promoting high-level competition. Our season runs mid-May through early August.

We are a 501c3 non-profit built and run by supporters. We’re led by a volunteer board and our goal is to use this soccer club to support soccer at all levels in the Lansing community.

With over 10,000 children trained annually across the globe, we collaborate with over 90 clubs, supporting players of all ages—from enthusiastic beginners to professional athletes. Our mission is to nurture every individual, fostering skills, confidence, and joy in the game, while teaching important life values.

Name: Bravo Sports Tours
Description:
Our founder a former IVY league coach from Yale,took his first two tours in the early 1990s. Little did he know the impact it would have on his life and many others. He took the first ever American soccer team to South Africa in 1992 and little after that, made history again by taking men’s and women’s soccer teams from to Cuba for friendly matches against the Cuban Football Federation.  Ever since then, he’s been dedicated to recreating that same experience for sports fans all over the world. 

After over 30+ years in the industry, we are still doing what we love – helping people all over the world indulge in their passion for their sport. 

We’ve made history before…..come help us continue to make history for years to come.

Name: Hockey Club Charcot
Description:
Présent depuis 2003 sur la commune de Sainte Foy-lès-Lyon, le hockey est pratiqué au sein du club omnisports du Club Sportif Charcot dans le but de promouvoir ce sport aussi bien auprès du jeune public de la commune que des adultes désirant pratiqués un sport en loisir. Afin de proposer plus de perspectives à ses jeunes joueurs le Club Sportif Charcot Hockey souhaitait assurer son développement par son renforcement au niveau local et national passant par le développement du hockey sur gazon.

Déjà partenaires de nombreux événements à l’échelle nationale, le Club Sportif Charcot Hockey en plein développement et le LOU Hockey Club ayant des difficultés à renouveler son effectif et à répondre aux exigences de la Fédération Française de Hockey décidaient de fusionner au début de l’été 2014 donnant naissance au Hockey Club Charcot Sainte Foy-lès-Lyon, deuxième club de la région Rhône-Alpes avec plus 100 membres affiliés. Le Hockey Club Charcot s’appuiera ainsi sur l’expérience du haut niveau du LOU Hockey Club et sur le savoir-faire du Club Sportif Charcot pour l’école de hockey pour bâtir un club de renommée nationale mais aussi grâce à l’embauche d’un salarié.

Le projet de développement du Hockey Club Charcot s’appuie sur plusieurs programme dont le programme « Hockey 2020 » porté par la Fédération Française de Hockey. Le club souhaite notamment poursuivre sa présence dans les établissements scolaires de Sainte Foy-lès-Lyon et des communes limitrophes de l’ouest Lyonnais afin de faire découvrir le hockey aux jeunes et organiser un tournoi inter-scolaire entre les différentes écoles participantes.

Le Hockey Club Charcot veut également développer le hockey féminin par l’intermédiaire de journées découvertes dédiées et dès à présent par la participation d’une équipe féminine au championnat de France de Nationale 2.

Name: Venice Beach FC
Description:
Venice Beach Football Club, or VBFC, is a community football club built by washed up players of the past and  local legends of the future. Over the last 8 years, the club has grown to become one of the the most diverse soccer communities for men and women of all ages in Los Angeles with an international audience of supporters.

Venice Beach is iconic for many reasons, but up until 2017, football was not one of them. Once VBFC was created the world began to take notice, which led some of the biggest names and teams in the game to descend on to the Estadio to visit and work with the club.  

You can find this beautiful mixture of outcasts, dreamers, has-been's and soon-to-be's, playing every week while entertaining and inspiring the next generation of talent to come. Above all, VBFC is built by the power of community, and bound by the mutual love for football.

Description:
THE GRID is the organizer of e-racing championships, present in the official E-MOTION and THE GRID Approved sim center network.  

Convinced that the virtual and the real are one, THE GRID relies on advanced driving simulator technology developed by LP SIMU to detect, train, and develop talent.  

THE GRID organizes multiple competitions, open to everyone, with the first taking place at the Paris Motor Show 2024.  

The best sim racers will win an experience behind the wheel of a sports car on a real track, under the supervision of professionals from the Schumacher Racing Teams.

Name: Baseballclub Hamburg Stealers e.V.
Description:
Die Nr. 1 im Norden. Verwurzelt in Hamburg. Leidenschaft und Haltung im Baseball seit 1985. 

Seit 1985 stehen die Hamburg Stealers für Spitzenleistung, Leidenschaft und Zusammenhalt im Baseball. Was als ambitioniertes Hamburger Team begann, ist heute der erfolgreichste Baseballverein Norddeutschlands, mit einer klaren Haltung: Wir verbinden Leistung mit Werten, fördern Talente und leben Baseball als Mindset.

Als führender Baseball-Club im Norden spielen wir in der DBL Baseball-Bundesliga und prägen seit Jahrzehnten auch im Nachwuchs die deutsche Baseballlandschaft.

Unser größter Erfolg: 2000 haben wir im vierten Anlauf endlich die Meisterschaft nach Hamburg geholt und darüber hinaus den Deutschen Pokal sowie den Europapokal gewonnen. Dieses historische „Triple“ ist bis heute einzigartig im deutschen Baseball.
Doch wir ruhen uns nicht auf Erfolgen aus. Unsere Nachwuchsarbeit gehört zu den besten Deutschlands:
 U12 Deutscher Meister 2023
 U10 Deutscher Meister 2024
Zwei Titel, die zeigen, wie stark die nächste Generation der Stealers bereits heute ist.

Unsere Arbeit basiert auf drei Säulen:
Leistung – Wir fördern und fordern auf höchstem sportlichen Niveau.
Leidenschaft – Wir leben Baseball mit Herz, Begeisterung und echter Hingabe.
Haltung – Wir stehen für Respekt, Fairness und Verantwortung, auf und neben dem Feld.

Mit einer klaren Vision, engagierten Coaches, Ehrenamtlichen und einer starken Fanbase sowie nachhaltiger Nachwuchsförderung, investieren wir konsequent in die Zukunft des Baseballs in Hamburg und Deutschland.

Unser #stealersmovement steht für mehr als Sport. Es ist ein Ausdruck von Haltung, Mut und Gemeinschaft. Für alle, die an Teamgeist, Entwicklung und Leidenschaft glauben und für die Baseball mehr ist als nur ein Spiel.

Name: Sniegaklubs
Description:
Sniegaklubs ir kalnu un sniega draugu kustība, kuras mērķis ir apvienot, iedvesmot, aizraut visus, kuri alkst jaunas pieredzes un jaunus draugus kalnos un dzīvē. 

2000. gada sākumā Sniegaklubs tika radīts kā medijs ar mērķi izglītot sabiedrību par sniegadēļošanu tuvu un tālumā - aizraušanos, kas mūs vienoja - bez nosacījumiem.

Kopš tā laika daudz sniega ir sasnidzis un Sniegaklubs var pamatoti lepoties ar daudz aizraujošiem brīžiem, kas ir radīti, lai iedvesmotu visus, kas vēlas pievienoties sniega dēļošanas kustībai.

 2000. gada 14. janvārī Valmierā, Baiļu kalnā notiek Sniegaklubs atklāšanas pasākums - www.sniegaklubs.lv sāk darbu;

 2000. gadā www.sniegaklubs.lv saņem vairākus starptautiskus apbalvojumus par mājas lapas dizainu.

 2002. gadā www.sniegaklubs.lv organizē populāras snovborda sacensības, pulcējot vairāk kā 120 dalībniekus

 2003. gadā www.sniegaklubs.lv sadarbībā ar Orange Bar sāk organizēt iknedēļas snovborda kopsavilkuma video apskatu seansus klātienē.

 2004. gadā www.sniegaklubs.lv publicē pirmo Latvijas sniegadēļošanas DVD “Kodekss”.

 2005. gadā www.sniegaklubs.lv pulcē vairāk kā 3000 virtuālo biedru.

 2006. gadā www.sniegaklubs.lv Ņujorkā intervē Džeiku Burtonu un veido multimediju reportāžas no pasaules snovborda notikumiem ASV, Austrijā, Beļģijā, Japānā, Norvēģijā, Vācijā, Šveicē un citviet.

 2007. gadā www.sniegaklubs.lv izdod Ievas Meļko un Lienes Kreišmanes radītu grāmatu par Latvijas snovborda vēsturi “Sezona nekad nebeidzas".

 2007./2008. gada ziemas sezonā www.sniegaklubs.lv organizē kampaņu Drošais kalns, lai novērstu letālus gadījumus Latvijas kalnos.

 2008. gadā www.sniegaklubs.lv saņem investīciju piedāvājumu no Norvēģijas vadošās snovborda mediju grupas Tacky.

Pēc šīs vienreizējās pieredzes Sniegaklubs atjauno savu darbību kā medijs jaunā veidā un pulcē visus kalnu, sniega, veselīgas atpūtas un piedzīvojumu draugus uz viena viļņa - tiešsaistē un dzīvē. 

 Mēs joprojām ticam - SEZONA NEKAD NEBEIDZAS!

Name: Sutton United Football Club (West Midlands)
Description:
We are currently a Charter standard club consisting of over 40 teams, our home is at the new stadium at Coleshill Road and we have a second site at the Hollyfield Road with grass pitches and a clubhouse. The history of Sutton United is a story of commitment, endeavour, enterprise and above all hard work. New chapters will be written but these traditional values remain at the heart of a thriving club where members old and new continue to make vital contribution to its future.

In 2016, we acquired a playing facility at Coleshill rd. Less than half a mile from the original Hollyfield Rd facility. Having used it for 4 years, the plans for the 3G playing facility with stands & floodlights were submitted. In 2020, the council gave SUFC the green light. Current club chairman, Pete Lugg invested a ,ot of money into the club to fund the development. This was completed at the end of 2022. 

The site has two pitches, a full size pitch and 7,6 or 5 a side pitch as well as kick about pitch next to the bar which is mainly used by children who's parents are enjoying a drink in the bar and can see them from their table.

We also host music acts every week amongst other events which are all open to the public and local community.

The future of the club, with this new facility is certainly bright, with the possibilities being endless!

Name: CFS Box
Description:
Más que un box de CrossFit, somos un equipo de profesionales dedicados a transformar vidas a través del deporte.

Nuestro equipo está formado por entrenadores personales, monitores y técnicos titulados en múltiples disciplinas: Fitness, halterofilia, girevoy sport, defensa personal y más. Contamos con una sólida formación y una amplia experiencia práctica, lo que nos permite ofrecer entrenamientos seguros, eficaces y adaptados a todos los niveles.

Además, somos preparadores físicos especializados en oposiciones y formadores en disciplinas vinculadas al ámbito de la seguridad. Nuestra trayectoria profesional y docente nos permite trabajar con rigurosidad, exigencia y compromiso, tanto con deportistas recreativos como con quienes se preparan para pruebas físicas de alto rendimiento.

Pero, por encima de todo, somos emprendedores que luchan cada día por un sueño: que nuestro trabajo siga siendo nuestra pasión. Creemos en el deporte como motor de cambio, de superación personal y de comunidad. Por eso, cada entrenamiento es una oportunidad para crecer, desafiarte y alcanzar tu mejor versión.

Aquí no solo vienes a entrenar: vienes a formar parte de una familia que entrena unida, se apoya y se motiva constantemente. Ya seas principiante, atleta o aspirante a una plaza en cuerpos de seguridad, te ayudaremos a alcanzar tus objetivos con profesionalismo, cercanía y pasión.

Entrena con nosotros. Entrena en el box de los Leones

Name: Thömus maxon
Description:
Thömus maxon has grown from a small MTB team into one of the world’s top squads, competing at the highest level of the sport. Originally known as Radon Factory XC and later Thömus RN Racing Team, the team saw Thömus come on board in 2018, marking a new era of Swiss innovation and excellence. Since its founding in 2017, it has continued to evolve, now featuring elite riders like Alessandra Keller, Mathias Flückiger, Lars Forster, and Vital Albin.

Backed by Swiss precision and cutting-edge technology, Thömus maxon is not only a powerhouse on the race circuit but also a symbol of excellence in developing riders and pioneering advancements in the sport.

#MTB #Cycling #ThömusMaxon #RacingExcellence #SwissEngineering

Name: ['MAUN.TEN]
Description:
Willkommen bei ['MAUN.TEN] – Der St. Moritzer Community für Ski-Langlauf, Laufen und Radfahren!

Unsere Mission bei ['Maun.ten] ist es, eine Community von Einheimischen, Zugewanderten und Sportbegeisterten aus der ganzen Welt zu schaffen. Zusammen wollen wir Spaß am Sport, an der Natur und an der Gemeinschaft haben. Zudem möchten wir gemeinsam Rennen und Events unterstützen, an ihnen aktiv teilnehmen und anderen Mitgliedern helfen, ihre Ziele zu erreichen. Wir setzen uns für lebhafte "Cheering Zones" bei regionalen Rennen ein, um jeden Lauf zu einer Party zu machen. Unser Fokus liegt auf Spaß, Gemeinschaft, Lifestyle und Leidenschaft für den Sport. Zudem organisieren wir Community-Veranstaltungen (z.B. einen Weekly Run) und haben noch viele weitere spannende Projekte in Planung. 

We are altitude training

Name: Women in Sports Empowerment Club
Description:
Women in Sports Empowerment (W.I.S.E.) is a University of Florida student organization dedicated to supporting and advancing women pursuing careers across the sports industry. Our mission is to empower future leaders through professional development, networking, mentorship, and community engagement.

We provide our members with access to industry speakers, career workshops, resume and skill-building sessions, leadership opportunities, and connections with professionals and alumni working in areas such as sports business, sports media, coaching, analytics, events, athlete representation, and more.

As a community built on inclusion, empowerment, collaboration, and integrity, W.I.S.E. is committed to fostering a supportive environment where women can build confidence, gain hands-on experience, and prepare to thrive in their sports careers. We also advocate for gender equity in sports and work to elevate the voices and achievements of women across the field.

Whether you are exploring a career in sports or actively pursuing one, W.I.S.E. helps you grow your network, strengthen your skills, and become part of a community dedicated to shaping the future of the sports industry.

Name: Moncalieri Calcio 1953
Description:
Siamo una squadra dilettantistica impegnata nella promozione del calcio a tutti i livelli, con un forte focus sulla crescita della comunità, dell’inclusione sportiva e del rispetto dei valori sportivi, per formare non solo atleti, ma cittadini responsabili.

Le nostre squadre

Prima squadra femminile: partecipiamo con orgoglio alla Serie C, sostenendo il calcio femminile e creando opportunità per le atlete.

Prima squadra maschile: competiamo nella Prima Categoria, dove uniamo esperienza e gioventù per raggiungere traguardi ambiziosi che hanno contraddistinto la storia della nostra società nel calcio piemontese.

Settore Giovanile (maschile e femminile): il nostro settore giovanile di terzo livello è dedicato alla formazione di giovani calciatori e calciatrici, offriamo un ambiente stimolante e inclusivo.

La nostra missione

Promuoviamo valori fondamentali come il fair play, il rispetto e la collaborazione. Crediamo che lo sport possa unire le persone e contribuire allo sviluppo sociale e personale. 
Attraverso attività di allenamento e competizioni, non formiamo solo atleti, ma anche cittadini responsabili.

Unisciti a noi

Siamo sempre alla ricerca di nuovi talenti, sostenitori e collaboratori che condividano la nostra passione per il calcio. Scopri le nostre iniziative e sostienici nel nostro cammino.

Name: Rugby Cernusco
Description:
L'ASD Rugby Cernusco, fondata nel 1979, è una delle società di rugby più importanti della Lombardia.

La società è attiva in tutte le categorie, dal minirugby al seniores, sia maschile che femminile; tramite l'affiliazione a RugbyTots organizza corsi per i bambini a partire dai 2 anni.
La squadra seniores maschile milita in Serie B.

Il Rugby Cernusco è una società che si basa sull'impegno costante dei priori soci. Tutti gli allenatori ed educatori hanno seguito un percorso formativo per offrire la migliore esperienza a chiunque decida di avvicinarsi al nostro sport e di imparare i suoi valori.

La società è anche impegnata nel sociale. Organizza infatti eventi e manifestazioni per promuovere il rugby come sport educativo e di inclusione. I più rilevanti sono il Milano Rugby Festival (Torneo Internazionale di Rugby a 7) e il Torneo del Bruco dedicato alle categorie giovanili.


I valori del Rugby Cernusco sono:

Sportività: il rugby è uno sport di contatto, ma è importante che sia giocato in modo leale e rispettoso.
Educazione: il rugby insegna ai ragazzi valori importanti come l'amicizia, il lavoro di squadra e il rispetto per gli avversari.
Inclusione: il rugby è uno sport per tutti, indipendentemente dall'età, dal sesso o dalle condizioni fisiche.

L'obiettivo del Rugby Cernusco è di promuovere il rugby come sport educativo e di inclusione, di contribuire allo sviluppo dei giovani atleti e di raggiungere risultati sportivi sempre migliori in modo etico e sostenibile.

Name: Proton Huber Competition
Description:
Über Proton Huber Competition:
Der deutsche Rennstall ist bekannt dafür, dass er im Porsche Mobil 1 Supercup immer wieder für Überraschungen sorgt. Gegründet wurde das Team 2016 von Christoph Huber, der sein Handwerk bei einem der Besten gelernt hat: Walter Lechner Senior. Die deutsch-österreichische Zusammenarbeit hat dem Team den Start in den härtesten Arenen der internationalen Porsche Markenpokale sicher erleichtert. 

Proton Huber Competition hat seinen Sitz in Hofkirchen bei Passau, Deutschland, und sich in 2023 erfolgten mit Proton Competition, einem der größten und erfahrensten Teams im modernen Langstreckensport, zusammengeschlossen. Proton Competition bringt ausgewiesene Markenpokal-Expertise in den Huber-Rennstall ein: 

In seiner Debütsaison im Porsche Supercup 2021 erreichte Huber Racing mehrere Podiumsplätze, einen Sieg und wurde mit Laurin Heinrich Rookie-Champion. Im Jahr 2024 setzt das Team zwei Rookies und einen Porsche-Supercup-Routinier ein: Alex Tauscher, Sebastian Freymuth und Roar Lindland. Der Supercup ist die Königsklasse der Porsche-Markenpokale und richtet sich an die internationalen Top-Teams aus den verschiedenen Carrera-Cup-Rennserien. 

Proton Huber Competition ist 2024 eines der jüngsten Teams, nicht nur in Bezug auf die Fahrer, sondern auf das gesamte Team. „Das macht uns zu einer Talentschmiede und einem Trainingszentrum für neue aufstrebende Talente hinter dem Lenkrad sowie für Mechaniker, Ingenieure und Techniker. Die langjährige Erfahrung und das Know-how von Proton Competition sind dabei sehr wichtig. So können wir das gesamte Spektrum des Rennsports abdecken, was ziemlich selten ist.“ Mehr über Proton Huber Competition unter www.huberracing.de

Name: Pro Active Bromley
Description:
Pro-Active Bromley is a Community Sports and Physical Activity Network (CSPAN) established as a strategic, independent alliance of partners who are active in sustaining and increasing participation in sport and physical activity in the London Borough of Bromley.

Strategic Planning and Co-ordination

Identify the needs of the local community, to promote active lifestyles, tackle barriers to participation. Interpret national and regional strategy to help shape local policy.

Advocacy

Raise the profile of sport and physical activity, increasing recognition of the wider values of sport and physical activity, and representing the interests and concerns of the sector.

Partnership Development

Broker and facilitate partnership working, making the whole greater than the sum of the parts.

Capacity Building

Encourage sports clubs, community organisations and other partners to adopt minimum operating standards, and support education and development courses for coaches, school teachers and volunteers.

Equal Opportunities

Support and promote equality in sport and physical activity, providing opportunities for everyone. Encourage participation for all regardless of their age, ability, gender, race, ethnicity, sexual orientation, religion, social or economic status.

Safeguarding

Promote the safety and wellbeing of children, young people and adults at risk of harm when participating in sport and physical activity in Bromley.

Facilities

Encourage and support the use and development of accessible sports and recreation facilities. Support the protection and enhancement of existing community sports facilities, including parks and open spaces.

Funding

Seek external funding to support the work of Pro-Active Bromley and its partners. Encourage investment into the sector to make delivery more sustainable.

Maestros Football Academy is a premier football training academy based in Abu Dhabi, dedicated to providing young players with the highest level coaching and training programs. Our mission is to help players of all skill levels improve their game and reach their full potential.
 
Our coaching staff is led by experienced professionals who have played and coached at the highest levels of the sport. We use a proven training methodology that emphasizes technical proficiency, tactical awareness, and mental toughness, helping our players develop the skills and confidence they need to succeed on the field.
 
At Maestros Football Academy, we offer a range of training programs to suit players of all ages and skill levels. From our Mini Maestros program for young beginners, to our Elite Development program for advanced players, we have something to offer everyone. We also offer specialized programs such as goalkeeper training and strength and conditioning.
 
We take pride in our track record of success, with many of our players representing their schools teams and given opportunities to play at professional levels. But we believe that success is about more than just winning games – it's about instilling a love of the game, fostering a competitive spirit, and developing the whole player.

Today, ISC is home to over 300 youth soccer teams and helps more than 3000 children each year to learn, compete and grow as athletes and valuable members of the community.
We believe that every player should have the opportunity to play soccer at any level and ability. LFC IA Washington is a full service Club offering programs that introduce players to the game at a very young age (U5) as well as providing development programs for players competing at the highest levels. The Club also has the women's U-23 team plays in the Women's Premier Soccer League (WPSL).
LFC IA Washington is dedicated to providing superior programming and fostering the physical, mental, and emotional growth and development of youth players of all skill levels through the sport of soccer in our community, state, and on the national stage, creating stronger, more confident players, future leaders, better people, and a love for the beautiful game.

Wir sind der einzige aktive Skisprungclub in Wien & Niederösterreich, aber - für viele im Flachland überraschend - eine der größten Talenteschmieden für den österreichischen Skisprung-Nachwuchs. 

Von uns kommen seit 2005 Jugend-Olympia-Sieger, Jugend-Staatsmeister, Staatsmeisterinnen und Staatsmeister in der Schüler-Altersklasse, Austria Cup-Siegerinnen und -Sieger und zwölf Gesamtsiegerinnen und Gesamtsieger der Internationalen Kindervierschanzentournee. Acht Trainerinnen und Trainer - darunter ein Olympia-Medaillengewinner, mehrere Stams-Absolventen und allesamt Skisprung-Begeisterte - heben unseren Mädchen & Burschen die Flügel.

Und das unter erschwerten Bedingungen: Wir sind der einzige Skisprungclub Österreichs ohne eigene Nachwuchs-Trainingsschanze im eigenen Bundesland. Unsere Betreuerinnen und Betreuer fahren mit den Kindern jedes Wochenende mindestens 100 Kilometer zur nächsten Schanze nach Mürzzuschlag - immer wieder auch nach Eisenerz, Hinzenbach, Höhnhart, Bischofshofen, Schwarzach, Villach oder Planica und trainieren dort mit den Kindern im Winter auf Schnee und im Rest des Jahres auf bewässerten Matten.

Mit mehr als 30 Kaderathletinnen und -athleten haben wir eines der größten Teams aller Bundesländer. Insgesamt engagieren sich bei den Stadtadlern mehr als 200 Vereinsmitglieder in Wien & Niederösterreich.

Name: International Club Sant Just Desvern (ICSJD)
Description:
We are a club of international and local individuals living in or planning to live in and around Sant just Desvern. Our purpose is to deepen the relationships with the local community by organizing through the organization of social and cultural events, activities and informal get togethers. We are open minded, inclusive, happy, charitable, sustainable, non political and pursue exclusively and directly non-profit activities.

Somos un club de personas internacionales y locales que vivimos en Sant Just Desvern o alrededores. Nuestro propósito e ilusión es estrechar las relaciones entre nosotros, organizando eventos lúdicos y culturales donde internacionales y locales seamos los protagonistas. Somos personas de mente abierta, inclusivos y con una actitud voluntariosa y feliz. La sostenibilidad es imprescindible para nosotros, y nuestros actos son altruistas y no relacionados con la política.

Som un club de persones internacionals i locals que vivim a Sant Just Desvern o voltants. El nostre propòsit i il.lusió és enfortir les relacions entre nosaltres, tot organitzant esdeveniments lúdics i culturals on internacionals i locals siguem els protagonistes. Som persones de ment oberta, inclusius i amb una actitud voluntariosa i feliç. La sostenibilitat és imprescindible per a nosaltres, i els nostres actes són altruistes i no relacionats amb política.

Description:
Briars Sports is a sports club located in Concord, Sydney. Briars have a strong sporting influence in the inner west of Sydney, with a sporting program including rugby, cricket, hockey, squash, netball and bowls.
Briars also have a bistro within the clubhouse. Dining at Briars Sports has become a favourite destination for members, guests and families living in Concord and the Sydney’s inner west.

Name: Prawira Bandung
Description: Prawira Harum Bandung merupakan salah satu klub basket profesional Indonesia yang berbasis di kota Bandung, Jawa Barat. Prawira Harum Bandung lahir pada tanggal 28 November 2018, dimana sebelumnya bernama Garuda Bandung dan bertransformasi menjadi Prawira Harum Bandung. Dalam perjalanannya selama 5 tahun berkompetisi di Indonesian Basketball League (IBL), Prawira Harum Bandung berhasil menjuarai kompetisi IBL tersebut pada tahun 2023.

Description:
Logic Masters India (LMI) is the Indian representative of the World Puzzle Federation. The organisation has been conducting national championships since 2008 to select the Indian team for the world championships.

The group aims at encouraging puzzling and sudoku activities in India. With this goal we will be organizing various puzzle competitions to recognize talent within the country.

Our dream is to see Indian participants and the Indian team being recognized as one of the top teams at the World Championships.

Name: Dublin United FC
Description:
Welcome to Dublin United FC, a cornerstone of our community since 1967. What started as a simple way to engage young athletes has grown into a vibrant organization dedicated to developing skills, building character, and fostering lifelong friendships for generations of youth in Dublin.

In 1973, we proudly expanded our mission by introducing a girls’ program, ensuring that every child had equal opportunities to participate and excel in sports. This commitment to inclusivity and opportunity has been a guiding principle throughout our history.

Our dedication to nurturing young athletes and fostering a strong, supportive community remains at the heart of everything we do. Together, we celebrate our past and look forward to shaping an even brighter future for Dublin United FC.

Name: Weston NextGen Academy
Description:
LFC Introduction

Liverpool Football Club was formed in 1892. One of the most recognisable sports teams in the world, LFC has won 6 European Cups, 19 domestic league titles, 7 FA Cups and more than 20 other major domestic and European honours.

Based at our home stadium of Anfield, Liverpool, the team is managed by the FIFA Best Men's Coach, Jurgen Klopp. His star-studded squad is a mix of global superstars and home-grown talent, all of whom proudly represent the values of the Club.

We have a formidable record of developing young footballers in our Academy, many of whom have gone on to enjoy long professional football careers at the elite level of the game. Such names include Steven Gerrard, Michael Owen, Robbie Fowler and Trent Alexander-Arnold.

LFC International Academy (LFC IA)

LFC International Academy is the global youth coaching arm of LFC. Delivering the same coaching curriculum and techniques that are used with the Club’s own young players at the Academy in Liverpool, LFC IA teaches young participants how to play The Liverpool Way in countries across the world.

LFC International Academy Singapore is an official partner of the Club and we deliver coaching programmes under the guidance of LFC. Through daily communication with the technical and business teams in Liverpool, programmes are planned, delivered and administered to the high standards expected by LFC.

The Liverpool Way & Our Values

LFC International Academy offers young fans around the world an opportunity to learn to play The Liverpool Way,developing them both on and off the pitch. The Liverpool Way is a philosophy that runs throughout LFC. It incorporates the four core values of the club, and these values permeate through everything that we do at the LFC International Academy.

Name: Hahndorf Soccer Club
Description: With a proud history as one of the largest and strongest clubs in the Adelaide Hills, Hahndorf Soccer Club has been providing sporting opportunities for the local community since 1979.

Name: VADK J80 Sailing Team - FRA 1290
Description:
Notre équipage est basé à Dunkerque et nous naviguons sur le bateau de l’association Voile Ambition Dunkerque.

Nous soutenons les bénévoles de la SNSM qui font face à la mort au quotidien à Dunkerque : https://www.ulule.com/soutenons-les-sauveteurs-en-mer-dunkerquois/

Pour la saison 2025, nous participons sous les couleurs de DEME aux World J80 à Nieuwpoort ainsi qu’aux différentes étapes de la Coupe de France dont le Spi Ouest France à la Trinité-sur-Mer, le Grand Prix de Saint-Cast, la Corsaire JCup à Saint-Malo, l’Atlantique Telegramme à Lorient, le national français à Por’ic. 

Nous irons aussi à Naarden pour le national hollandais et Nieuport pour le national belge. 

Localement, nous couconrons également avec nos amis belges lors des étapes du Flanders Trophy pour désigner la meilleure équipe flamande !

Name: Canterbury France
Description: La marque Canterbury existe depuis 1904 et prend sa source en Nouvelle-Zélande. Trois hommes y ont décidé de créer une entreprise spécialisée dans la conception et la fabrication de vêtements de rugby. Cela ne leur ait pas venu par hasard en effet le rugby est le sport le plus populaire en Nouvelle-Zélande. En référence à leur patrie, trois kiwis, symboles nationaux de la Nouvelle-Zélande  composent le logo, . En plus de 100 ans la marque est devenue une référence planétaire. Canterbury a même conçu des vêtements pour l’armée néo-zélandaise pendant la Seconde Guerre mondiale. Chaque joueur de rugby trouvera chez Canterbury la tenue parfaite pour s’entraîner et jouer. De plus, la marque conçoit également des vêtements que vous pouvez  porter en dehors du terrain. Nous nous investissons corps et âme pour créer des  articles de qualité qui sublimeront votre jeu .Les  passionnés de rugby savent qu’ils font avec Canterbury le choix de l’excellence.

Name: Team Beat the Beast
Description:
Team Beat the Beast zet zich in voor meer bekendheid en onderzoek naar clusterhoofdpijn, ook wel suïcide hoofdpijn genoemd. Dit doen wij door middel van sportieve doelen met als hoofdnummer van 2022 de halve triathlon in Zell am See!

Wij doen dit samen met de support van @stichtingbeatthebeast en kunnen uw hulp goed gebruiken. Neem eens een kijkje op onze website of hou onze social media accounts in de gaten voor meer informatie.

English:

Team Beat the Beast raises donations for research & creates awereness for the neurological disease Clusterheadaches, also known as suicideheadaches. Our biggest event this year is the half Triathlon 70.3 Zell am See Kaprun @ironmantri

We are supported by @stichtingbeatthebeast but could use your help as well! Check out our website, social media accounts, or contact us for more information!

Name: SSN Sportium
Description: SSN Sportium is the official sports club at SSN College, focused on promoting an active lifestyle and fostering a vibrant sports community. The club organizes a variety of events, tournaments, and training sessions, encouraging participation and teamwork. With an emphasis on athletic development and sportsmanship, SSN Sportium provides students with opportunities to enhance their skills and engage in friendly competition.

Name: fc.koeln.fanclub.brasil
Description:
Official Fan Club of 1. FC Köln in Brazil 

We connect Germany and Brazil through football, culture, and language.

FC Köln stands for passion, diversity, and unity — values we carry with pride and heart across South America.
 Football can build bridges — between hearts, nations, and cultures.

As an officially recognized international fan club, we represent the spirit of 1. FC Köln in Brazil.
Our mission is to share the joy of Cologne, the warmth of the Rhineland, and the spirit of “mer sin eins” — experienced across continents.

We promote cultural exchange between Germany and Brazil, organize fan events, language and cultural projects, and create spaces where football brings people together — regardless of origin, language, or religion.

Together with our partners, we help keep the values of 1. FC Köln — passion, diversity, and respect — alive around the world.

#1fckoeln #effzeh #cologne #fanclub #football #brazil #culturaalema #spuerbaranders #mersineins #hennes

Name: Businessclub SV Budel
Description:
In maart 1991 is de Stichting Sponsorgroep sv Budel opgericht met als doel sv Budel financieel te ondersteunen in de meest brede zin. De nadruk werd hierbij met name gelegd op de eigen jeugdopleiding.

Sinds 2013 gaat de Sponsorgroep door het leven als Business Club - SV Budel. 
De naam mag dan anders zijn, maar de doelen blijven precies hetzelfde. De club moet op een zo breed mogelijke manier ondersteund worden om ervoor te zorgen dat iedereen die betrokken is bij onze club het naar zijn zin heeft. Een gezellige, leuke en ontspannen sfeer binnen sv Budel is belangrijk. Op die manier bevorderen we de teamgeest, maar ook de motivatie om voor en met elkaar te streven naar een zo optimaal mogelijk sportief resultaat.

Als lid van de Businessclub - SV Budel wordt u uitgenodigd voor diverse events gedurende het jaar waaronder een netwerkdiner waar u contacten kunt leggen met ondernemers die eveneens de passie voor onze vereniging delen. Inmiddels zijn 50 bedrijven lid van de Businessclub.

Ben je enthousiast geworden en wil je ook lid worden van de Business Club - SV Budel? Neem dan contact op met Stefan te Raaij – (06) 5798 0043 of per mail stefanteraaij@svbudel.nl

Description: Gantoise vzw is a sports club based out of Noorderlaan 10 & 25,9000 Gent, Belgium.

Name: The Sports Sales Centre
Description:
The Sports Sales Centre has rewritten the playbook for sports sales.

Whether you need a short-term boost during peak-sales periods, or ongoing strategic support, we offer a flexible and cost-effective approach designed to meet your unique needs.

Name: Nakiska Alpine Ski Association
Description:
The Nakiska Alpine Ski Association is a non-profit organization that was founded in the summer of 2009, bringing together four Nakiska based ski racing clubs who agreed to re-organize their programs to work collaboratively as a goal to build Canada's best alpine ski racing development system. We are proudly the home club of the Nakiska Ski Resort in Kananaskis, Alberta.
 
In the first season of operation, NASA established itself as one of Alberta’s largest and strongest alpine development systems.  A new member club joined the NASA organization in 2011 bringing the current number of member clubs to five.  NASA’s clubs have continued to grow and improve their programs every year. NASA and its member clubs collectively represent one of the largest alpine ski racing organizations in Western Canada.

Name: Apollo 8 volleybal
Description: Volleybal in het hart van Twente! Met bijna 600 leden verdeeld over meer dan 40 teams, voor ieder wat wils. Van Eredivisie met businessclub tot 4e klasse vriendenteams tot recreantenvolleybal en van meisjes en jongens jeugdteams tot de volleybalspeeltuin voor volleyballertjes vanaf 3 jaar. Al met al volleybal voor alle niveaus en voor iedereen. Zien we jou binnenkort ook schitteren in onze sporthal in Borne?! Kijk dan op: https://www.apollo8.nl/lid-worden/

Name: KDY - Royal Danish Yacht Club
Description:
Kongelig Dansk Yachtklub, stiftet i 1866, er Danmarks største og mest anerkendte sejlklub med over 2.000 medlemmer. Vi er beliggende i hjertet af København og tilbyder faciliteter af højeste kvalitet til både sportssejlere, entusiaster og erhvervslivet.

Som en stolt og traditionsrig institution har KDY et stærkt engagement i at fremme sejlsport på både nationalt og internationalt niveau. Vi arrangerer et væld af konkurrencer, events og aktiviteter, der tiltrækker både amatører og professionelle sejlere fra hele verden.

Vores faciliteter og placering ved Københavns havn giver ideelle rammer for eksklusive events, møder og netværksmuligheder. Vi tilbyder skræddersyede løsninger til virksomheder, der ønsker at afholde arrangementer i en unik og inspirerende atmosfære. Med fokus på kvalitet, service og professionalisme er vi den perfekte partner for jeres næste erhvervsevent, møde eller teambuilding-aktivitet.

Vi inviterer både eksisterende og nye samarbejdspartnere til at blive en del af vores værdifulde fællesskab og opleve, hvordan KDY kan være med til at styrke jeres brand, skabe netværk og levere uforglemmelige oplevelser.

Name: Roehampton Elite FC
Description:
Roehampton Elite FC is more than just a football club; it's a cornerstone of opportunity and growth for young players. As a club we established a clear vision: to increase player pathways and development in the Southwest London area, addressing the need for structured opportunities and support. We offer the chance to train and compete at club level, with access to top-notch facilities and coaches.

At Roehampton Elite, we have high aspirations to establish ourselves as a renowned brand and quality grassroots club in London, and we know the significant dedication and effort required to achieve this goal!

Join us at Roehampton Elite as we begin to make our marks onto grassroots football and help contribute to our legacy and shared passion for the game!

Name: ENTENTE VAULNAVEYS VIZILLE RUGBY
Description:
Champions Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes (U19 Régionale 2)
 Champions Alpes (Seniors 1-Régionale 1)
 Champions Alpes (Seniors 2-Régionale 1)
 Accession en Division Fédérale 3

Avec un palmarès exceptionnel pour la saison 2024-2025, l’Entente 2V concrétise son projet de territoire, fondé sur la formation, les valeurs associatives et une ambition sportive affirmée .

Ces titres sont ceux de nos champions et également ceux de tous les acteurs du club : joueurs, éducateurs, bénévoles, familles, partenaires privés et institutionnels. 

Merci à toutes et à tous pour leur engagement et leur passion 

L'Entente entre les clubs de rugby de Vaulnaveys et de Vizille incarne une vision commune, tournée vers le développement durable du rugby sous toutes ses formes, la formation des jeunes, la mixité, l'inclusion, la promotion des valeurs sportives et humaines.

 Une entente au service du territoire allant des contreforts de Belledonne aux rives de la Romanche.

Nous avons mutualisé nos forces, nos infrastructures et notre savoir-faire pour créer un projet solide et structuré, AU SERVICE :

 de nos jeunes talents, de l’école de rugby aux équipes seniors,

 de la visibilité locale, en valorisant les entreprises et institutions qui partagent nos valeurs.

 Visibilité locale et régionale
 Partenariat convivial et festif, démarche RSE 
 Soutien à la formation et à la cohésion sociale

 Envie de rejoindre l’équipe ? Contactez-nous !
E-mail : partenaires2V@gmail.com ou entente2v@gmail.com

Name: interaktiv . Handball
Description:
Die SG Ratingen befindet sich erst seit 2011 Jahren auf der Handballkarte. In dieser Zeit spielten die Löwen bereits zwei Jahre in der A-Jugendbundesliga und die 1. Mannschaft konnte nach Gründung viermal hintereinander aufsteigen. Aktuell befindet sich das Rudel in der Nordrheinliga und möchte sich sukzessiv weiterentwickeln. Dazu wurde eine Spielbetriebs- und Marketing-GmbH gegründet und ein neues Büro in Ratingen bezogen, um den Anforderungen einer fortschreitenden Professionalisierung gerecht zu werden.
Seit der Saison 2021/2022 gehen wir als interaktiv . Handball auf Torejagd.

Name: Kangoeroes Basket Mechelen
Description:
Een unicum in België
 
Kangoeroes Basket Mechelen behoort tot de top van het Belgische Basketbal, dit zowel bij de dames als bij de heren, wat op z’n minst gezegd, uitzonderlijk is.
 
De afgelopen seizoenen was al duidelijk dat ons Heren BNXT-team meer dan voortreffelijke resultaten behaalde. Onze Kangoeroes dames zijn een begrip in het Belgische vrouwenbasketbal. Voor het derde jaar op rij slaagde het team erin de dubbel binnen te halen. Ook voor het komende seizoen liggen de ambities weer zeer hoog en willen onze dames op hetzelfde elan verdergaan. Dit niet alleen op nationaal niveau, maar ook internationaal met opnieuw een deelname aan de prestigieuze FIBA EuroCup Women competitie.
 
Onze twee fanionteams zijn ware smaakmakers en zorgen beide, met hun wervelende en kenmerkende speelstijl, voor inspirerend basketbal op het hoogste niveau. Hieraan gekoppeld zijn onze jeugdacademies die als een verbindende rode draad door onze club lopen.
 
Basketbal is meer dan een teamsport… het is passie, beleving, pure emotie en entertainment van de bovenste plank harmonieus samengebracht in de magische sfeer van onze iconische sporthal Winketkaai. De plek bij uitstek om onze klanten en partners samen te brengen en onze banden te versterken want onze partners zijn een integraal onderdeel van ons succes.
_____________________________________________________________________

Kangoeroes Basket Mechelen belongs to the top of Belgian Basketball, for both women and men, an exceptional feat.
 
In recent seasons it has been clear that our Men's BNXT team achieved more than excellent results. Our Kangoeroes ladies are a household name in Belgian women's basketball. For the third year in a row, the team managed to achieve league and cup glory. The ambitions for the coming season are higher than ever and our ladies want to continue on the same momentum. Not only at a national level, but also internationally, with another participation in the prestigious FIBA EuroCup Women competition.

Name: US Chauvigny
Description: Bienvenue sur US Chauvigny ! Actualité , transfert, résultats de nos 3 équipes séniors ! Équipe 1ère en National 3 , Équipe réserve en Régional 2 et l'Équipe 3 en 1ère division !

Name: Sportmanagement-Deutschland-Cup
Description:
Der Sportmanagement-Deutschland-Cup dient seit 2005 als Plattform für angehende Sportmanager*innen für den Ausbau ihres Netzwerkes im Business und für den Austausch unter den Teilnehmenden.
Dabei erhalten Studierende, Dozent*innen und Professor*innen die Möglichkeit, neue Kontakte hochschul- bzw. universitäts-übergreifend zu knüpfen.

Hauptbestandteil ist wie bei jeder Durchführung der Veranstaltung das Fußballturnier, bei welchem mehrere Frauen- und Herrenmannschaften im Heinz-Ziehl-Sportpark um den begehrten Titel wetteifern können.

Spaß und Entertainment sollen dabei natürlich im Vordergrund stehen – neben einem Sportbusinesstalk mit prominenten Persönlichkeiten aus der Sportwelt und einem anschließenden Get-Together stehen zahlreiche weitere Highlights auf dem Programm.

Name: CF Benidorm
Description: El Club de Fútbol Benidorm es un club de fútbol fundado en 2023 a raíz de la unificación del fútbol en la ciudad alicantina. Su ambicioso proyecto, basado en la profesionalidad y en el conocimiento de DV7 Group, tiene los objetivos de, por un lado, crear la mejor academia formativa profesional, abierta a todos los niños y niñas y con el objetivo de generar talento, y, por otro, de alcanzar el fútbol profesional con el primer equipo, que actualmente milita en la Lliga Comunitat.

Name: Yıldız Teknik Üniversitesi Okçuluk Kulübü

2019 yılından beri kulüp üyelerine Yıldız Teknik Üniversitesi Eğitim Fakültesi sığınağında okçuluk eğitimi vermektedir. Bununla beraber zaman zaman üyelerle beraber archer tag, kültür turları, kulüp kahvaltıları ve piknik şölenlerinde ok atımı gibi çeşitli etkinlikleri gerçekleştiriyor.
Aynı zamanda ulusal yarışmalarda okulu temsil ediyor.

AUSFS provides a broad range of services in the football industry such as career consulting and organizing international and domestic tournaments in Australia.

Name: Sporting Code
Description: We're a forward-thinking, customer-centric, experienced team that understands the importance of creating innovative and well-considered brand and digital experiences. We have lived and breathed sport and understand the nuances that sports digital products require to be successful.

Name: Life Football Club
Description: Professional football club in Preah Sihanouk Province, Sihanoukville, Cambodia. Currently participating in the Cambodian League 2.

Name: Players Development Club
Description:
How I serve as a coach:

COACHING DELIVERY:
Individual Sessions (Zoom or On-Site)
- Athletes developing championship mentality + life preparation
- Non-athletes applying athletic discipline to business growth
- Customized development plans based on goals

Team Coaching (On-Site or Virtual)
- Championship culture building for clubs and academies
- Leadership development within competitive teams
- Mental performance training that elevates collective performance

Parental Sports Advisor (PSA)
- Strategic guidance through athletic development decisions
- Scholarship navigation and recruiting strategy
- NIL education and family wealth building
- Supporting without pressuring - the parent's playbook

CORE DEVELOPMENT AREAS:
- Winning Mindset & Mental Resilience - Focus, competitive excellence, handling pressure
- Life Skills Mastery - Communication, leadership, financial literacy, professional presence
- Success Frameworks - Discipline, patience, consistency, balance (principles proven in sports, applied to life)
- Passion Discovery - Identifying income-generating talents beyond athletics
- Transition Preparation - Planning for life after competition before the career ends

Philosophy:
The pursuit of mastery in sports builds transferable excellence for life. I coach the complete individual - not just the athlete.

Name: Pickleball Paris Ouest
Description:
Jean-pierre Berger, franco-canadien et Christophe Douplat, 2 entrepreneurs aguerris, passionnés de sport de raquette (tennis, tennis de table, badminton, squash, padel) lancent PICKLEBALL Paris Ouest afin de développer et promouvoir le PICKLEBALL en région parisienne OUEST.
Pratiqué par plus de 37 millions d'américains, il se pratique depuis quelques années en Europe et bien sûr en France.
Intergénérationnel, convivial et ludique, il se joue en DOUBLE et en SIMPLE avec des règles simples et un match court en 11 points sur un 1/4 de terrain de tennis mais aussi dans une salle omnisports avec idéalement des terrains de badminton existants.

Name: Push Business Club
Description:
De Push Business Club (PBC) is een groep ondernemers die zich, al dan niet vanuit hun verbondenheid met hockeyclub Push, inzetten voor de ontwikkeling van jong talent in de Bredase hockeywereld én onlosmakelijk daaraan verbonden, het zakelijk netwerk eromheen optimaal benutten én bevorderen. Altijd in een sfeer van genieten en gastvrijheid!

Het netwerk van de PBC kent een diversiteit aan leden die actief zijn in advocatuur, finance, assurantiën, notariaat, catering, consultancy, accountancy, leisure, makelaardij, etc. Voor een deel ook verbonden door en met Push. De PBC levert een belangrijke financiële bijdrage aan het kunnen spelen van tophockey in Breda. Maar zéker zijn er ook andere interesses dan hockey.  

Tegelijkertijd immers, hebben de leden tijdens de originele en zeer gezellige bijeenkomsten prima kansen tot het benutten van de zakelijke contacten; building your business zogezegd. De businessclub organiseert daartoe jaarlijks 4 tot 6 veelzijdige evenementen en bijeenkomsten op diverse locaties. 

Zo is er het jaarlijkse golf-event, wordt er regelmatig de inmiddels fameuze PBC-autorally georganiseerd en zijn er diverse bedrijfsbezoeken bij één van de leden. Daarnaast worden er ook buiten het eigen netwerk interessante, leerzame en attractieve ‘best-of-breed’ business cases bezocht en nodigen we met regelmaat inspirerende gastsprekers uit die hun ervaringen uit het bedrijfsleven of uit de sportwereld met ons delen.

Ter ondersteuning van juist ook de zakelijke waarde van het lidmaatschap, zijn er een aantal media ter beschikking om de exposure onderling én naar de Push community vorm te geven. Die community bestaat uit de omstreeks 2.000 leden van hockeyclub Push, de naar schatting 6.000 bezoekers in een speelweekend van Push en de ruim 600 actieve padellers die gebruik maken van de padelbanen op PushPark.

Wilt U meer weten of gewoon meteen lid worden? Neem dan contact op met één van de bestuursleden via pbc@push.nl !

Name: Stichting LSgofast
Description:
Begin 2020 stapte Lukas Stiefelhagen (@lsgofast) voor het eerst in een kart en was meteen verknocht aan racen. In 2021 werd hij Nederlands Kampioen Huurkarts en Kampioen NXT 9pk. In 2022 werd hij Kampioen RK1 15pk. Ook kwam hij dat jaar voor Nederland uit in de elektrische karting slalom van de FIA Motorsport Games in Marseille.

Maar het doel was steeds de autosport. In 2022 werd hij de eerste kampioen van de Dutch Superlap Junior Cup time-attack en behaalde hij vervolgens ook zijn racelicentie. In 2023 heeft Lukas volledig de overstap naar de autosport gemaakt. Als zestienjarige werd hij dat jaar kampioen in het rookie klassement van de PTC Racing Cup (P5 overall), en de winnaar van SuperSpa 2023. In 2024 - zijn tweede autosportjaar - behaalde hij de vierde plaats in de internationale, 100% elektrische NXT Gen Cup, in het programma van de DTM. In 2025 komt hij uit voor team Witte Raaf Racing in de BMW Racing Cup en de DTM NXT Gen Cup. In de NXT Gen Cup is hij kampioen geworden.

Zijn ambitie is om concreet iets te willen betekenen in de verduurzaming van zijn racesport. We volgend daarbij drie sporen; Lukas racet altijd of elektrisch, of op biofuel, of compenseert zijn (resterende) uitstoot. Lukas treedt op als duurzaamheid ambassadeur van de KNAF. We promoten zelf actief de verduurzaming van de racesport in social media posts, artikelen, en presentaties. 

In de racesport is sponsoring heel erg belangrijk. Wij zijn altijd op zoek naar nieuwe partijen die met ons willen samenwerken en onderdeel willen gaan uitmaken van Lukas zijn unieke verhaal. Onze (hoofd)partners en sponsors zijn direct verbonden aan Lukas' ambities en doelen, en aan zijn ontwikkeling en prestaties als sporter. We maken u als (hoofd)partner goed zichtbaar. Heeft u interesse, neem dan vooral contact met ons op!

- Lukas Stiefelhagen is a carbon neutral racing driver -

Name: USA Prime
Description:

We partner with elite clubs nationwide, removing the operational burdens that slow growth. But our impact goes far beyond operations. We create real pathways to professional identification and opportunity through high-level partnerships and national exposure. Our collaboration with the Detroit Tigers, where our 18U team competes as the official Tigers Scout Team, is just one example of how we connect talent to the next level.

Our results speak volumes. USA Prime is the only organization in history to have all age groups from 12U to 18U ranked in the Top 5 nationally by Perfect Game. This consistent success is no accident, it’s the product of our world-class coaching, advanced player development, and unified culture of excellence.

Rooted in baseball and expanding across multiple sports, USA Prime Sports is building a new model for athletic organizations. A model that combines elite performance with professional-grade operations and nationwide reach.

Join the movement redefining club sports.

Name: Basquete Joinville
Description:
O basquetebol em Joinville possui tradição e forte domínio histórico em campeonatos estaduais e Jogos Abertos do Estado de Santa Catarina, desde seu nascimento com a Sociedade União Palmeiras em meados de 1851 no nascimento do esporte em todo o Brasil.

A expressividade do Basquete Joinville alcançou o início de seu auge em 2003, quando a equipe do Joinville foi formada para disputar a Copa Brasil Sul, competição classificatória para a Supercopa Brasil. Devido a dificuldades financeiras e administrativas, o nosso time pediu licença das competições oficiais ao término da temporada 2012-13. E com uma nova gestão, em 2015 se tornou novamente presente nos campeonatos Estaduais e Brasileiros.

O Basquete Joinville tem um grande envolvimento no cenário regional e hoje nos preparamos para atuar de forma marcante tanto na modalidade feminina quanto no masculino. Nosso sonho é trabalhar para que o basquete nacional alcance o glamour das grandes partidas americanas, e em Joinville, temos potencial para um celeiro de atletas.

Description:

The club entered The Provincial Cup in 2016, it's first senior mens tournament, and were beaten in the semi finals. In the same year the club saw is first players graduate and sign professional contracts with clubs here in Cambodia. A year later we were crowned provincial champions and would win go on to win the competition three times between 2017-2020.  

In 2022 the club turned professional and made their debut season in the Cambodian second division. The club gave professional debuts to 23 players, fielded the youngest average age side in the country and became one of the fastest growing clubs in terms of popularity in the country.

Name: Frauenfussballverein Basel (FFV Basel)
Description:
Wir schaffen Chancengleichheit im Fussball!
Der FFV Basel ist ein unabhängige Frauenfussballverein in der Region Nordwestschweiz und ermöglicht jungen Mädchen und Frauen die Ausübung ihrer Leidenschaft.

PHILOSOPHIE
Wir engagieren uns dafür, Frauen und Mädchen für den Fussball zu begeistern und sportlich zu fördern. Der FFV Basel ist ein Verein geführt von Menschen, die einstehen für den Frauenfussball.

Unser Schwerpunkt liegt in der Ausbildung von Juniorinnen aus der Region und der Etablierung eines ambitionierten Breitensports. Wir pflegen einen familiären Umgang und transparente Kooperation auf allen Ebenen des Vereins.

Ziel des FFV Basel ist, jungen fussballbegeisterten Frauen und Mädchen ein lehrreiches Umfeld, auf und neben dem Platz zu bieten, und wettbewerbsfähige Teams aufzustellen, die sowohl auf regionaler als auch auf nationaler Ebene erfolgreich sind.

Der FFV Basel wird von einem engagierten Team von Trainern:innen und Partnern geleitet und finanziert sich durch Beiträge von Gönnern und Sponsoren.

MOTIVATION
Die Region Nordwestschweiz ist im nationalen Vergleich des Frauenfussballs in den oberen Ligen unterrepräsentiert. In den letzten Jahren konnte sich kein Verein in den oberen Ligen etablieren und zielgerichtete Juniorinnenausbildung anbieten. Unser Ziel ist es Juniorinnen und aktiven Spielerinnen einen alternativen Weg zu bieten, Fussball ambitioniert auszuüben und sie auf ihrem persönlichen Weg zu begleiten. Der FFV Basel bietet die Möglichkeit Fussball auf allen Stufen und in allen Lebenslagen mit Freude auszuüben und in einem professionellem Umfeld zu trainieren.

UNSERE VISION, UNSER ZIEL
Unsere Vision ist die Präsenz der Nordwestschweiz im nationalen Frauenfussball zu stärken und Mädchen und Frauen den Zugang zum Fussball ermöglichen.

Der FFV Basel setzt sich als mittelfristiges Ziel zwei aktive Frauenteams im nationalen und regionalen Wettbewerb zu etablieren

Our ambitious sports program within CD Montcada aims to provide a unique platform for talented players from all around the world, with the purpose of fostering their comprehensive development, maximizing their potential, and preparing them to compete at the highest level

Name: WINGS
Description:
We are a Swedish women sailing team that have been top ranked on the match racing world ranking for the last 10 years. We love sailing and the ocean. We love the team work we need to perform. We love to take steps forward, develop and try our wings in new demanding challenges. 

WINGS will sail the first historic America's Cup event for women in Barcelona 2024. This is a huge demanding challenge and we will work day and night to learn how to foil and sail fast boats. 

We are driving this campaign as a team and one big task will be to fund the project. We work close to our partners and look forward to this journey where we will find many new partnerships. Together with companies willing to support us we will use this opportunity to inspire more young girls to continue following their sailing dreams. And also to show them all great career opportunities within Swedish companies. Sailing is a great plattform to develop as a leader, as a team and as an individual. Let's create tomorrow's women leaders through sailing!

Name: Legends United Football Academy India(LUFC INDIA)
Description:
Legends United Football Academy & Club is a premier football training institution dedicated to nurturing young talent and shaping future champions.
Based in Pune, Maharashtra, we provide structured football coaching to players aged 7 to 22 years, focusing on skill development, tactical awareness, and fitness.

Our academy offers professional training programs tailored for beginners, intermediate, and advanced players. We conduct 4-day-a-week training sessions, including weekday and weekend batches, ensuring flexibility for students. Our structured curriculum emphasizes technical skills, game intelligence, physical conditioning, and mental resilience, helping young athletes reach their full potential.

At Legends United Football Club (LUFC), we provide a competitive platform for players to showcase their skills in local, state, and national-level tournaments. We are committed to fostering a winning mentality while upholding the values of sportsmanship, teamwork, and discipline.

We believe in holistic player development, integrating professional coaching, match experience, and exposure to scouting opportunities. Our expert coaches and training methodologies are designed to help aspiring footballers transition from grassroots to elite levels.

As a football community, Legends United collaborates with local and national organizations, ensuring players receive the best guidance, resources, and opportunities to grow in the sport.

Join us in building the next generation of football legends!

For admissions, collaborations, or sponsorship opportunities, connect with us today. #LegendsUnited #FootballAcademy #GrassrootsFootball #PuneFootball

The goal for Potenza Sports Lions is to be the gold standard for sports fitness and training, and career development for athletes. All while fostering a culture that provides opportunities to develop athletes through success in competition to achieve excellence in life and develop future leaders.

Name: GMadrid Sports
Description:
GMadrid Sports es el club multideportivo LGTBI+ más longevo de la Comunidad de Madrid, fundado en 2007 como una asociación sin ánimo de lucro.

En la actualidad está integrado por más de 1000 socios/as que se distribuyen en hasta 18 secciones deportivas diferentes: balonmano, yoga, crossfit, danza jazz, aikido, patinaje, voleibol, senderismo, running, pádel, natación, fútbol 7, fútbol 11, fútbol sala, baloncesto, quadball, teatro, coro y tiempo libre.

GMadrid Sports está compuesto principalmente por personas LGTBI aunque no de forma exclusiva, lo que le constituye en un referente para la inclusión. Sus miembros tienen el firme propósito de erradicar la LGTBIfobia en general y dentro del mundo del deporte en particular, con diversas actuaciones que incluyen la organización o participación en coloquios, conferencias y actividades deportivas específicas.

From our REBA (Richards Elite Basketball Association) regional structure in the UK to our participation in The Basketball Tournament (TBT) in the United States, we’re building a bridge between UK basketball and the global game.

Name: NANTES NATATION
Description:
Bienvenue sur notre compte Linkedin ! 

Fondé en 1913, notre club s'est épanoui pour devenir une référence incontournable dans la région. Comptant fièrement près de 1500 membres passionnés, nous sommes dédiés à la promotion de la natation sous toutes ses formes.

 Nous offrons une palette complète d'activités pour tous les niveaux et toutes les aspirations. De nos cours d'apprentissage de la natation, qu'elle soit pratiquée en loisir ou en compétition, à nos sessions d'aquaforme dynamiques, chacun trouve sa place dans nos bassins.

 En 2020, nous avons innové en introduisant des cours de natation dans des bassins mobiles d’apprentissage en partenariat avec certaines écoles primaires de l’agglomération nantaise. Ce projet offre ainsi une opportunité unique à plus de 1000 élèves par an de découvrir les joies de la natation.

 En plus de nos activités en piscine, nous proposons des formations reconnues pour le Brevet National de Sécurité et de Sauvetage Aquatique (BNSSA), garantissant des compétences solides pour assurer la sécurité dans l'eau.

 Notre engagement ne se limite pas aux piscines. Nous organisons également des séances de natation en milieu naturel, explorant les lacs, rivières et mers pour une expérience aquatique unique.

 Depuis trois ans, nous avons offert la possibilité aux enfants issus d'IME de bénéficier en toute sécurité de nos cours de natation, leur permettant d’apprendre à nager dans un environnement adapté.  

Rejoignez notre communauté passionnée, où l'apprentissage, la compétition et le bien-être aquatique se rencontrent pour former une expérience enrichissante et conviviale pour tous nos adhérents

Name: Baltimore Community Rowing
Description:
Baltimore Community Rowing (BCR) promotes the sport of rowing for fitness, competition, and recreation. While striving to be a national leader in the sport of rowing, BCR is committed to creating a welcoming, inclusive, racially diverse rowing community and providing equitable access to the sport of rowing for residents of the Baltimore metro area.

Programs are available for Middle School, High School, and collegiate students and adults and run from recreational opportunities to programs designed to ready an athlete for competition at a regional and national level. 

BCR Juniors is a competitive rowing program with year-round opportunities for high school and middle school athletes. Participants attend public and private schools in Baltimore City and the surrounding counties.  

Athletes of color from Baltimore City and the surrounding counties are served through Reach High Baltimore, founded in 2011 as an outreach program of BCR Juniors. Reach High Baltimore provides athletes with fee assistance, as well as transportation assistance and summer job opportunities for high school athletes. By leveling the playing field for athletes of color, Reach High Baltimore and BCR strive to create a diverse, equitable, and inclusive access point to the sport of rowing for all athletes.

Name: CRA Motorsports OPC Private Limited
Description:

We provide elite training programs for riders at all levels and deliver expert race management services for premier events. Our mission is to develop talent, foster competitive racing, and cultivate a worldwide community of motorbike enthusiasts. Join CRA Motorsports to train with top professionals and experience unparalleled race management.
For over a decade,CRA MOTORSPORTS a premier destination for motorsport enthusiasts, we are dedicated to bring the thrill of circuit racing to young talents around the globe.Our story is one of relentless pursuit and unwavering commitment to the art of racing. Founded on the principles of integrity, innovation, and excellence, we have carved a distinctive path in the world of motorsport, leaving tire tracks of triumph and inspiration along the way.

Name: Stichting De Springplank Twente

De Springplank is een stichting, opgericht in 1998 en heeft de  sportactiviteiten overgenomen die tot die tijd onder verantwoordelijkheid van SPD Twente en later MEE-Twente werden uitgevoerd.

De doelstelling is tweeledig:

•
	De leden die recreatief bij ons sporten willen we graag sportieve ontspanning en beweging bieden

•
	De wedstrijdsporters krijgen de gelegenheid om hun techniek te verbeteren en hun mogelijkheden te testen in wedstrijden met medesporters. Zowel lokaal, regionaal, nationaal en internationaal.




De Springplank heeft ruim 100 sporters, die wekelijks een

uur sporten onder leiding van zo’n 40 vrijwilligers. 

De Springplank is aangesloten bij Gehandicaptensport Nederland.

Name: Bratpfännli
Description: Im Herbst 1983, stellten sich vier FC Rorschach Spieler die Frage, wie sie auch in der spielfreien Winterzeit, die freundschaftliche Gemeinschaft pflegen könnten. Nachdem verschiedene Vorschläge abgelehnt wurden, kam ein Spieler auf die Idee, regelmässig gemeinsam den Kochlöffel zu schwingen. Der Vorschlag wurde aufgegriffen und heute zählt der Hobby-Kochclub Bratpfännli 20 aus unterschiedlichen Altersschichten und Berufsgruppen, die mit dem FC Rorschach nichts mehr zu tun haben. Achtmal pro Jahr treffen sich die Mitglieder in der Schülküche Steig in Rorschacherberg, um ein gemeinsames Menu zu zaubern. Zusätzlich lädt der Verein alle sechs Monate die regionale Bevölkerung zum grossen Essen ein und die Mitglieder verreisen einmal pro Jahr. Neben kulinarischem Genuss, werden Humor, Zusammensein und Geselligkeit grossgeschrieben.

Name: FC Neufchâteau Liffol
Description:
En 1903 voient le jour des deux premières équipes de la ville de Neufchâteau D'une part La Balle Néocastrienne. 
D'autre part la Section Football de Rouceux. 
Les deux associations fusionnent en 1907 pour donner naissance à l'Union Sportive Neufchâteau-Rouceux.

En 1913, le club change de nom et devient l'Avenir Neufchâteau-Rouceux. 

Dans les années 1990 le nom du club devient Football Club Neufchâteau. 

En 2007, après la fusion avec l'US Liffol, le nom du club devient celui que l'on connait actuellement Football Club Neufchâteau-Liffol.
