Name: British Softball Federation
Description:
The vast majority of softball played in the UK is the co-ed (mixed) slowpitch format, however there is also numerous single-sex slowpitch teams and a growing fastpitch community.

Softball has a wide-ranging Great Britain Softball National Teams programme in both fastpitch and slowpitch. This includes men's and women's senior and junior fastpitch teams, and co-ed and men’s slowpitch teams. 

The GB Senior Women's Fastpitch Team is ranked 12th in the world, and in 2019 were the runners up in Africa/European Olympic qualifying berth for Tokyo 2020. 

The GB Senior Men's Fastpitch Team is currently ranked fifth in Europe and 13th in the world.

The Men's slowpitch team have recently retained the Europan gold medalist status and ranked first in Europe. 

The Co-ed slowpitch team are the current gold medalists and first raked side in Europe, having previously won the European Co-ed Slowpitch Championship on 11 of 12 occasions.

There are many regional slowpitch leagues around the country whose teams affiliate annually to the BSF through their leagues, as do fastpitch teams through the Great Britain Fastpitch League.  Tournament-only teams must also affiliate in order to take part in BSF National Championship tournaments.  Aside from National Championships, there are a multitude of local tournaments during the summer in different parts of the country.

Name: Federația Română de Go
Description:
Federația Română de Go – FRGo este organizația sportivă națională recunoscută oficial pentru coordonarea, reglementarea și promovarea jocului de Go în România.

Activitatea sa începe în anul 1986, ca secție în cadrul Federației Române de Șah, iar din 1990, FRGo funcționează ca federație sportivă independentă. În prezent, are statut de persoană juridică de drept privat, de utilitate publică, conform Legii educației fizice și sportului nr. 69/2000.

FRGo este o structură autonomă, apolitică, neguvernamentală și non-profit, constituită prin libera asociere a cluburilor sportive și a asociațiilor județene de Go. Este continuatoarea de drept a activității instituționale desfășurate sub egida Go-ului românesc încă din 1986.

Misiunea Federației este de a promova și dezvolta Go-ul în toate formele sale:

ca sport de performanță, prin campionate naționale și selecții pentru competiții internaționale;

ca instrument educațional, prin proiecte desfășurate în parteneriat cu Ministerul Educației;

ca vector cultural și strategic, în cadrul cooperării internaționale.

FRGo reprezintă România în cadrul European Go Federation (EGF) și International Go Federation (IGF).

Viziunea FRGo este de a deveni principalul motor al dezvoltării jocului de Go în România, prin extinderea rețelei de cluburi active, creșterea numărului de practicanți legitimați și integrarea Go-ului în educație, cultură și programe de formare strategică adresate tinerilor, profesorilor și liderilor din societate.

Name: Schaats Academy Nederland
Description:
Welkom bij  SAN Talent Team

Welkom bij het SAN Talent Team, een initiatief van Stichting Schaats Academy Nederland (SAN) dat jonge, ambitieuze schaatstalenten van 15 tot en met 18 jaar optimaal ondersteunt en begeleidt op hun weg naar een mogelijke professionele carrière. Vanuit onze kernwaarden Passie, Plezier, Persoonlijke Ontwikkeling en Prestatie creëren wij een stimulerende omgeving waarin talenten gezamenlijk trainen, wedstrijden rijden en het team en zichzelf maximaal kunnen ontwikkelen.

Ons doel reikt verder dan alleen sportieve prestaties; wij streven ernaar om het schaatsen als breedtesport te promoten en jongere generaties te inspireren om deze prachtige Nederlandse sportieve traditie voort te zetten. Exceptioneel getalenteerde jongeren onder de 15 jaar worden al in een vroeg stadium begeleid en voorbereid op een toekomst binnen het SAN Talent Team.

Bij Stichting SAN geloven wij in het totaalpakket en investeren wij gericht in de fysieke, technische, mentale en sociale groei en ontwikkeling van onze talenten. Samen als team bouwen wij aan de weg naar ieders persoonlijke top, waarbij passie en plezier altijd voorop staan.

Waar staat Stichting Schaats Academy Nederland voor:
•	Professionele begeleiding
•	Individuele groei en evaluatie
•	Competitieve uitdaging
•	Toegankelijkheid voor talent
•	Transparante en sterke organisatie
•	Duurzame financiering
•	Continu verbeteren

Door onze gezamenlijke inspanningen, passie voor schaatsen en professionele aanpak werken wij elke dag aan de versterking en continuïteit van de Nederlandse schaatssport in de breedste zin en tot op het allerhoogste niveau.

Name: PlayVista
Description:
For amateur clubs, youth academies, and sports agencies, PlayVista is redefining the way football is analyzed and coached. Our cutting-edge AI platform transforms simple game footage into detailed player and team insights, eliminating the need for costly GPS hardware. Through dynamic heatmaps, precise event detection, and intelligent reports, we equip coaches and managers with actionable data to make informed decisions and drive performance.

Elevating our offering further, PlayVista now includes an innovative AI Coach Agent. This advanced feature acts as your virtual assistant, delivering real-time tactical advice, customized training plans, and in-depth game analysis tailored to your team’s unique needs. It’s like having an expert coach by your side, helping you strategize and unlock your team’s full potential.

At PlayVista, we’re committed to making professional-level analytics and coaching accessible to clubs of all sizes, at a fraction of the cost. Discover how we can transform your game by visiting https://playvista.ai . Let’s build winning strategies together.

Name: Centro de Graduados del Liceo Naval Militar Alte. G. Brown
Description:
El Centro de Graduados del Liceo Naval Militar “Almirante Guillermo Brown” es una institución civil sin fines de lucro que reúne a los alumnos y exalumnos del Liceo Naval Alte. Brown con el propósito de fortalecer los lazos de camaradería, preservar los valores liceanos y ofrecer un espacio de desarrollo personal, familiar y comunitario.

Ubicado en Núñez, frente al río, el club cuenta con instalaciones deportivas, sociales y recreativas que permiten a sus socios disfrutar de una amplia gama de actividades: rugby, hockey, fútbol, náutica, tenis, gimnasio, actividades sociales, culturales y recreativas para todas las edades.

Nuestra misión es acompañar a los egresados y sus familias a lo largo de la vida, promoviendo el sentido de pertenencia, la vida activa, el compromiso con el país y la integración entre generaciones. Nos proponemos ser un punto de encuentro para quienes comparten la formación liceana, tanto en lo deportivo como en lo humano.

Contamos con categorías de socios pensadas para exalumnos, sus familias y allegados, ofreciendo propuestas que integran formación, deporte amateur de calidad, vida social, recreación y cultura.

El club también promueve el vínculo con promociones, organiza eventos institucionales y mantiene una activa agenda social y deportiva. A su vez, tiene un fuerte compromiso con la formación de jóvenes en valores a través de sus escuelas deportivas y actividades náuticas.

Desde 1953, el Centro de Graduados es un espacio vivo donde se honra el pasado, se disfruta el presente y se proyecta el futuro, siempre con el espíritu liceano como guía.

Description:

The aims and objectives of the Hoopsfix Foundation are to:

- Grow & raise the profile of basketball in the United Kingdom

Name: Oxford University Cross Country Club
Description:
Welcome to OUCCC's LinkedIn page!

Throughout the university year, we provide training sessions and club runs, the former led by our dedicated club coach, Matt Seddon. A typical week includes drills and speedwork on Monday, club runs on Tuesday and Thursday, training sessions on Wednesday and Saturday, and a long run on Sunday. There are also twice-weekly social runs, where the distances are shorter and the pace more relaxed.

The university year begins in early-October. Michaelmas is perhaps the busiest term for us, with opportunities to race at Cuppers, Milton Keynes Chiltern League, and, of course, the historic Varsity Match against Cambridge University. 

In Hilary term, the main event is the British University Cross Country Championships. Here, we pride ourselves on being consistently towards the top-end of results. Other opportunities to race include the English National Cross Country Championships, Hyde Park Relays, and Armagh 5k. The term concludes with our own Teddy Hall Relays, held in Wednesday of Week Eight. 

In Trinity term, emphasis shifts towards athletics, with many members representing OUAC in middle- and long-distance events. We also organise Iffley Festival of Miles. Besides track, there are a fair few mountain and road runners, so all niches are catered for.

Of course, our club is as much about friendship as it is race performances. Throughout the year, our social secretaries organise a diverse array of events. Against this backdrop, many lifelong friendships have been forged. We also aim to welcome alumni to club events throughout the year, at which such friendships can be rekindled. Another highlight is our pre-season training camp, held in September, at a scenic location in the UK.

We hope you find the content on this page enjoyable and informative.

To join the alumni mailing list: https://ouccc.org.uk/ouccc-old-members
To donate: https://www.development.ox.ac.uk/sport/clubs/cross-country

Nuestra misión es proporcionar a las tiendas y clubes de pádel de todo el país acceso a los mejores equipos y accesorios del mercado, garantizando siempre la excelencia en cada uno de nuestros productos. Además de representar a Drop Shot, también contamos con una línea de productos propios, diseñados y fabricados con los más altos estándares para satisfacer las necesidades de los jugadores de todos los niveles.

En Hola Padel, estamos comprometidos a impulsar el crecimiento del pádel en Perú a través de alianzas estratégicas, un servicio al cliente excepcional y una dedicación inquebrantable a la calidad.

Nuestros productos incluyen:

Ropa de pádel de alto rendimiento
Calzado especializado para pádel
Palas de pádel de última generación
Raqueteros y mochilas de diseño ergonómico
Con un equipo apasionado y experimentado, estamos aquí para apoyar a nuestros socios comerciales en cada paso del camino, brindándoles no solo productos, sino también soluciones integrales para el éxito en el mercado del pádel.

Name: ASD Roma 2020
Description:
Nata nel 2019 con l'intento di creare una realtà sportiva sana, competitiva e familiare, siamo un’associazione sportiva dilettantistica che si occupa della promozione, organizzazione, gestione e sviluppo delle attività sportive di Nuoto e Pallanuoto.
Costituita da Enrico di Santo ed Andrea Calderone, operiamo dal 2020 sul territorio di Roma e provincia e ad oggi contiamo più di 250 tesserati tra atleti agonisti, amatoriali, tecnici e dirigenti.
La nostra associazione è iscritta al Registro CONI e al Registro Nazionale delle attività sportive dilettantistiche del Dipartimento per lo Sport della Presidenza del Consiglio dei Ministri ed è affiliata per la stagione agonistica 2023/2024 alla Federazione Italiana Nuoto e agli Enti di Promozione sportiva ASI e CSEN.
Dopo soli 4 anni di attività arriva il primo grande successo per la nostra società.
Con un cammino incredibile i nostri Allievi/B si laureano Campioni d'Italia,  conquistando il nostro primo scudetto giovanile.

Born in 2019 with the aim of creating a healthy, competitive and family-friendly sporting reality, we are an amateur sports association that deals with the promotion, organisation, management and development of swimming and water polo sporting activities.
Set up by Enrico di Santo and Andrea Calderone, we have been operating in the Rome and province area since 2020 and to date we have more than 250 members including competitive and amateur athletes, technicians and managers.
Our association is registered in the CONI Register and in the National Register of amateur sports activities of the Department for Sport of the Presidency of the Council of Ministers and is affiliated for the 2023/2024 competitive season to the Italian Swimming Federation and to the ASI and CSEN sports promotion bodies .
After just 4 years of activity comes the first great success for our company.
With an incredible journey, our U16/B are crowned Italian Champions, winning our first youth Scudetto championship.
